1:1: Sha sov q'inkhetame a‚ q'inkhetamea volchu Delan ts'artsa.
1:3: Sha sov q'inkhetame a‚ q'inkhetame a volchu,
1:5: Dekq'a Ḥuna ʿibadat do okha‚ dekq'a Ḥöga ġo a dökhu.
1:7: Aḥ shayna niʿmat dellacheran novq'a,Ḥo shayna öġaz tsa vakhancheran a‚ tila tsa bellacheran a novq'a.
2:2: Hxara zhayna, tsu choḥ sheko yats, niysa neq' bu /Delakh/ qörush bolcharna.
2:3: Üsh bu ḥulamekh dolchukh teshash bersh, lamaz hxottosh bersh, Okha shayna dellachu ritsq'anna t'era /dikachu aġor/ kharzhash a esh bersh.
2:4: Ishttanash a bu üsh, teshash, ḥöga dossiynachukh (Q'urʾanakh) a, ḥöga dossiynachul ḥalkha dissiynachekh a, ekhartakh a üsh ch'oġa teshash bu.
2:5: Üsh bu shayn Qiosh-Qobuchüngara niysachu novq'aḥ‚ üsh bu bakqiybiyrash.
2:6: Bakq'alla a, tsa teshash bersh – tsarna ben dats aḥ shayna qeram tescha a‚ tsa tescha a‚ üsh teshar bats.
2:7: Tseran degnash a‚ lergash a, muhxar a tökhna, dʿaq'evlina‚ tseran bʿärgashna düḥal kirḥa du‚ tsarna khir du deza -dokqa ʿazap.
2:8: Nakhakh bu tsḥabersh‚ shäsh olush: "Teshna tkho Delakh a‚ t'äkhḥarchu diynakh a"- üsh ma bats teshash.
2:9: ʿekho ġerta üsh Dela a‚ iyman dillinarsh a‚ amma tsara tsa ʿekhabo shäsh ben‚ – /i/ tsa khaalo-q tsarna.
2:10: Tseran degnashkaḥ tsamgar yu‚ Dala alsamʾyakqi i qin t'e a tsamgartsa‚ tsarna ma du lazosh dolu ʿazap‚ shäsh khilarna khartslüysh.
2:11: Tsärga älcha: " Ma lelade lätta t'eḥ bökhanig", tsara olu: "Tkho-m dikanig lelosh dersh ma du!"
2:12: Üsh bats‚ tq'a‚ bökhanig lelosh bersh? Delaḥ a‚ khaa tsa lo-q tsarna.
2:13: Tsärga älcha: "Teshiysha‚ nakh ma teshshar", tsara olu: "Tkho teshar du tq'a‚ ʿovdalsh sanna?" Bakq'alla a, üsh bats tq'a‚ ʿovdalsh? Amma, tsa khäa-q tsarna.
2:14: Iyman dillincharna düḥalqetcha‚ tsara olu: "Tkho iyman dillina du." Shayn shayt'anashtsa tsḥänabischa‚ tsara olu: "Bakq'alla a, tkho shütsa ma du‚ tkho-m üsh (iyman dillinarsh) ḥiyzosh dariy".
2:15: .15. Dala siysaza biyr bu üsh, ch'aġbiyr bu shayn tilarchoḥ, dʿa-sḥa ḥiyzash.
2:16: Üsh bu niysachu neq'akh tilar etsnarsh‚ ma sắ tsa khili-q tseran yokhka-etsarkh‚ üsh tsa khili-q niysachu novq'aḥ.
2:17: Üsh tera bu‚ ts'e a latiyna‚ t'akqa tso shena gonakha derg serladäkqicha‚ Dala shayn nur dʿa a däḥna‚ bodaneḥ bisincharekh‚ shayna hxumma tsa gush.
2:18: Q'ora a‚ mott a tsa khuush a‚ bʿärze a khilla, üsh yukha tsa börzu-q/niysachu novq'a/.
2:19: Ya stiglarchu doġanan markhanakh tera‚ shena choḥ boda bolush‚ q'ovq'ar dolush‚ tq'es tokhar dolush – tsara lergash chu p'elgash dükhku‚ tq'es qetna balarkh larlush. I Dela ma vu gone lotsur bolush i tsa teshash bersh.
2:20: Tq'es gerga du tseran bʿärsa dʿaetsa‚ shayna tso serlo ma ellineḥ‚ dʿabölkhu üsh tsüntsa‚ shayna ʿarzh ma ellineḥ‚ sovtsu. Dalla liʾneḥara‚ khazar a‚ bʿärsa a dʿaḥur dara tseran: Dela masso a hxumanna t'eḥ nitsq' qochush ma vu.
2:21: Hxay nakh! Shäsh a, shayl ḥalkharnash a qöllinchu shäsh Qiosh-Qobuchunna ʿibadat de‚ shu khila tarlo-q /Delakh/ qörush.
2:22: I vu shuna lattanakh mott bina‚ stiglanakh tkhov bina‚ stiglara khi a daiytina‚ tsüntsa stömash a qiina shuna ritsq'ana. T'akqa ma nisve Delatsa tsḥa a‚ shayna khuʾusheḥ.
2:23: Nagaḥ shu shekoneḥ delaḥ, Okha Tkhan lega /Muḥammad- paykhamare/ dossosh khillachukh, t'akqa sḥadalade tsunakh tera tsḥa surat‚ sḥaqayqa shayn teshash (ġönchiy)‚ Dela votsurg‚ shäsh baq'lüysh delaḥ.
2:24: Nagaḥ shüga i tsa dalaḥ – tq'a i shüga tsq'a a dalur dats - qeriysha ts'arakh‚ shen yagorig adamash a‚ t'ulgash a dolchu. Iza kechyina tsateshacharna.
2:25: Aḥ /hxay Muḥammad/ qaʾ bakqa iyman dillinchärga a, dika ʿamalsh yinachärga a shayna /yalsamanin/ boshmash khirg khilartsa‚ bukhakhula ökhush khish a dolush. Hxorazza shayna tsu chüra stömekh ritsq' mel deli‚ tsara er du: "Hxarra dara ḥalkha a vayna lush khillarg" – tsarna ḥalkha a dellera tsunakh teranig /delaḥ a hxara qin dara chomatsa a, ḥozhatsa a, kuts tera khilleḥ a/. Tsarna tsu choḥ ts'ena zudariy a khir bu‚ üsh tsu choḥ guttar a lättar bu.
2:26: Bakq'alla a, Dela iyza tsa lo masal daladan: chürkkal hxumanakh a‚ tsul laqarchekh a (tölush dolchekh ya tsul öshush dolchekh a). Iyman dillincharna khäa i shayn Delera baq'derg duyla‚ tq'a tsateshachara olu: "Hxun liʾna-te Dalla tsu masaltsa?" Tso tilabo tsüntsa dukqa a bersh‚ Tso nisbo tsüntsa dukqa a bersh. Tsüntsa tila-m tsa bo Tso pesaq bersh ben,
2:27: Shäsh yokhosh bolu Delatsa khilla vaʿda bart khillachul t'äḥa‚ khedosh bolu Dala khotta älla omra dinarg‚ leladesh bolu lätta t'eḥ bökhanig‚ – üsh ma bu eshnarsh.
2:28: Shu mukha tsa tesha Delakh? Shu della ma dara. T'akqa Tso shu den ma dira. Yukha Tso dolüytur du shu‚ yukha a dendiyr du‚ t'akqa Tsunna t'e dʿaderzor du shu.
2:29: Iza vu lätta t'eḥ mel derg shuna qöllinarg‚ t'akqa t'evirzira I stiglanna – Tso dʿanisyira i vorhx stigaltsa‚ – I masso a hxumanakh derg Shena khuush verg ma vu.
2:30: Ḥan Qiosh-Qobucho ällera malikashka: "So vollu lätta t'eḥ t'äḥe khiliyta". Tsara elira: "Aḥ qullu tq'a tsu t'eḥ bökhanig den derg a‚ ts'iy ʿeno derg a? Okha biyr bara Ḥuna khastam a‚ okha vazviyr a ma vara Ḥo". Tso elira: "So khuush ma vu shuna tsakhuurg a".
2:31: Tso ʿamiyra Ādamna masso a hxumaniyn ts'ersh‚ t'akqa üsh malikashna a gaytina‚ elira: "Yiytsa Suna tseran ts'ersh‚ shäsh delaḥ baq'lüysh".
2:32: Tsara elira: "Masso a vochukh ts'ena vu Ḥo. Tkhögaḥ ma dats Aḥ tkhayna ʿamiyna dolu ʿilma ben. Ḥo vu-q khuush verg a‚ ḥeq'ale verg a".
2:33: /Dala/ elira: "Hxay Ādam‚ aḥ yiytsal tsärga tseran ts'ersh". T'akqa tso tsärga tseran ts'ersh yiytsicha‚ elira /Dala/: "As shüga tsa ällera tq'a: So khuush vu stiglaniyn a‚ lättan a q'ayle‚ So khuush vu ash guchudokqush derg a‚ ash ḥuldesh khillarg a?"
2:34: Okha ällera malikashka: "Suzhud de Ādamna". T'akqa tsara suzhud dira‚ Iblis dotscho. Iza düḥal a delira‚ tso kuralla a yira‚ – i khilira tsateshacharakh.
2:35: /Dʿaala ḥayn q'ome, hxay Muḥammad/: Okha elira: "Hxay‚ Ādam‚ vākha ḥo a‚ ḥan zuda a /yalsamanin/ beshaḥ‚ daa tsu choḥ dolchukh ma-dezza shayna luʾurg. Amma shu gerga ma ġolash hxoqu dittana – /dodaḥ/, shü-shiʾ khir du zulam dinacharakh".
2:36: Galabäkhira shayt'ano i shiʾ tsüntsa (dittatsa – marzdira tsarna i stom qalla). T'akqa Tso i shiʾ aradäkqira shäsh khillachüra (yalsamanera). Okha elira /Ādame a, Ḥavaga a, Iblise a/: "Oḥadissa /lätta t'e/‚ vovshiyn mostaġiy a dolchu ḥoleḥ. Shuna lättaḥ khir yu dakharan mettig a‚ tsḥa khan t'eqachchalts bakham a".
2:37: Ādama ʿamiyra sha Qiosh-Qobuchüngara deshnash‚ Tso (Dala) tsünan tōba q'obaldira. Bakq'alla a‚ Iza vu /t'ett'a/ tōba q'obaldiyrig a‚ q'inkhetame verg a.
2:38: Okha (Dala) elira: "Chudissa tsigara (yalsamanera) masso a. Nagaḥ shüga San niysonan neq' qachaḥ (i qacha a qochur bu), tsunna t'äḥabäznacharna qeram a khir bats (shayna düḥalqetar dolchu ekhartan ġullaqekh), üsh singattame a khir bats (dünenaḥ shaykh dʿatilna disina ġullaqash baḥaneḥ, Dala shayna mela tsabalarna qörush).
2:39: Tsateshnarsh a‚ Tkhan ayatash khartsdina bersh a – üsh ma bu /zhözhakhatin/ ts'eran day‚ üsh tsu choḥ guttarenna a büsur ma bu".
2:40: Hxay‚ Israilan k'entiy‚ Ash dagadaiyta San niʿmat‚ As shayna della khilla dolu‚ ash qochushʾe Sötsa /shäsh Suna a ben ʿibadat diyr dats, älla/ khilla vaʿda‚ As qochushyiyr yu shütsa /Aysa shuna khaza mela lur bu, älla/ khilla vaʿda‚ Sokh tsḥannakh qeralash.
2:41: Shu teshalash As oḥadossiynachukh (Q'urʾanakh)‚ shügaḥ dolchüntsa (Tavratatsa) niysa doġush a dolchu‚ – shu ma khila tsunakh ḥalkhara tsatesharsh. San ayatekh k'ezzig bolu makh ma etsa‚ Sokh qeralash.
2:42: Ma iede ash baq'derg kharts dolchüntsa‚ baq'derg ḥul ma de‚ shayna khüusheḥ (Tavrata choḥ dolu Muḥammadan sibat).
2:43: Lamaz hxottade‚ lo zakat‚ suzhudane ġo suzhud dechärtsa.
2:44: Ash ḥökhu nakhana dikanig? Tq'a ditsdesh ma du shayn doġmash! Shu ma du zhayna (Tavrat) döshush – shu ḥeq'ale tsa khülu?
2:45: Ash ġo lakha sobartsa a‚ lamaztsa a. Bakq'alla a, iza deza (khala) ma du/Delakh/ch'oġa qörush bersh botsucharna. (Iza qochushdalur dolush dats /Dalla/ müt'aḥ bolchärga ben).
2:46: Üsh bu shäsh shayn Qiosh-Qobush volchunna düḥalqetarg khilarkh a‚ shäsh Tsunna t'e dʿadörzurg khilarkh a teshash.
2:47: Hxay Israilan k'entiy! Ash /Suna shukur dartsa/ dagadaiyta San niʿmat, As shuna della khilla dolu, – As shu dazdina khilar ʿalamel (shukh elchanash bakhkiytartsa, zhaynash dissortsa).
2:48: Shu qera diynakh‚ sino sinna payda biyr botschu, tsüngara ġo q'obaldiyr dotschu, tsüngara makh ötsur botschu, shayna /Delan ʿazapakh/ ġo khir dotschu.
2:49: Dagadaiyta /hxay Israilan k'entiy/! Okha k'elḥardekhira shu Firʿavnan nakhakh: von ʿazap shuna t'eḥ hxottadora tsara‚ boyura shun k'entiy‚ diyna bütura shun zudariy – tsu choḥ shun siylaḥ-veza volchu Qiosh-Qobuchüngara zer ma du.
2:50: Okha shuna hxord biyq'ira – shu k'elḥaradekhira‚ Firʿavnan nakh bukha bakhiytira‚ shu ḥözhush dollusheḥ.
2:51: Okha Musatsa shovztq'a de-büysa khan bilgalʾyakqira (tsünga Tavrat dala)‚ t'akqa tsul t'äḥa shu esanna ʿibadat dan düyladelira, ishtta shukh zulamkhoy khilira.
2:52: T'akqa tsul t'äḥa a Okha gechdira shuna‚ shu barkalle khir datsara teḥa, älla.
2:53: Dagadaiyta! Okha delira Musaga zhayna, baq'derg khartsdolchukh a, ḥanal derg ḥaram dolchukh a q'astosh dolu‚ shu nislur datsara teḥa, älla.
2:54: Musas ällera shen q'ome: "Hxay san q'am‚ ash shayna zulam dina‚ shäsh esanna ʿibadat dartsa. Tōbanash de shäsh Qöllinchünga‚ t'akqa shäsh-shayn daya. I dika du shuna shu Qöllinchunna (Dalla) gergaḥ. T'akqa Tso shun tōbanash q'obaldira. Bakq'alla a, I ma vu /t'ett'a/ tōbanash q'obaldiyrig a‚ q'inkhetame verg a.
2:55: Ash ma elira: "Hxay Musa‚ tkho teshar ma dats ḥokh‚ i Dela tkhayna q'ästtash tsa gaḥ". T'akqa shu letsira tq'eso (stelakhäshtigo shu dayira)‚ shu ḥözhush lättasheḥ.
2:56: T'akqa Okha dendira shu /tsḥana diynaḥ-busa/ della lättinchul t'äḥa – shu barkalle khir datsara teḥa älla.
2:57: Okha shuna t'ekhula markha hxottiyra /shu mälkhan yovkhonakh lardesh/‚ daiytira shuna manna a‚ salva a. Daa Okha shayna dellachu ritsq'anakh ts'enaderg (ḥanalderg). Tkhuna zulam-m tsa dira tsara‚ amma üsh khilira shayna zulam desh-m.
2:58: Dagadaiyta! Okha elira: "Chuġo tsu shaḥara‚ daa tsu chüra shayna luʾurg shortta. Kevnekhula chöḥadovla, suzhud a desh. Ash āla: "Gechde tkhuna!" – Okha gechdiyr du shun ġalatashna‚ t'akqa alsambokhur bu dikanig desh bersh.
2:59: Zulamkhosha khiytsira shayga älla dolu dosh älla dotschüntsa‚ t'akqa zulamkhoshna Okha stiglara rizhs dossiyra‚ üsh pesaq' khilarna.
2:60: Dagadaiyta! Musas ma diykhira /Dele/ shen q'omana mala khi / üsh, ḥagbella, “Tihx”oluchu böraḥ bolush/. T'akqa Okha elira: "Dʿatokha ḥayn ʿasa t'ulgakh". T'akqa tsunakh delira shiytta ḥosta. Berrige a nakhana evzira shayn-shayn khi molu mettig. Daa a daa‚ mala a mala Delan ritsq'anakh – ma de lätta t'eḥ vonig, bökhanig darzhosh.
2:61: Ash ällera: "Hxay Musa‚ okha toam biyr ma bats tsḥana taypana daarkh. Ḥayn Qiosh-Qobuchünga dekha‚ Tso yoliytüyla tkhuna lätta t'eḥ qüush bolchu khasstömekh‚ ekhachu närsekh‚ särmaseqekh‚ ḥoziyn qöekh‚ khokhekh tsḥatstsa hxuma. Tso elira: "Tq'a ash khüytsu dikanig /tsul/ lakharchukh? Oḥadissa Misra‚ shuna khir du ash dekhnarg". Tsarna t'etüykhira siy dayar a‚ miskalla a‚ Delera öġazlo khilira tsarna. Iza – üsh Delan ayatekh tsa teshash khilarna a‚ niysa dotsush paykhamarsh boyush khilarna a du. Iza – tsara düḥalo yarna a‚ üsh dozanakh bovlush khilarna a du.
2:62: Bakq'alla a, /Muḥammadna t'äḥahxittina/ iyman dillinarsh a‚ /Musana t'äaḥahxittina khilla /zhügtiy a, /ʿiysana täaḥahxittina khilla/ nasarash a‚ sabiash a – /tsarakh/ Delakh a, t'äkhḥarchu diynakh a teshash bersh a, dika ʿamal yinarsh a – tsarna shayn yal khir yu shayn Qiosh-Qobuchun gergaḥ, qeram a khir ma bats tsarna /ekhartan taʿzarkh/, üsh singattame a khir ma bats /mela tsakhilarkh qörush/.
2:63: Dagadaiyta! Okha shüga ch'aġo yaytira, shuna t'ekhula lam hxottiyna. Ch'oġa sḥalatsa Okha shayna dellarg‚ tsu choḥ derg a dagadaiyta shu khir datsara-te /dünenaḥ hxallaqilarkh a, ekhartaḥ ʿazap khilarkh a/ qörush.
2:64: T'akqa‚ tsul t'äḥa‚ shu yukhadevlira /Tavratatsa ʿamal yarakh/. Delan dozalla a‚ Tsünan q'inkhetam a shuna tsa khilleḥara – shu khilla khir dara eshnacharekh (shu hxallaqir dara).
2:65: Shuna bevzira shaykh shotdiynan baq'o talkhiynarsh. Okha tsärga elira: "Khila shukh siysazdina maymalash!".
2:66: Okha iza khiliytira tsu zamanna a‚ t'äḥa yoġur yolchu zamanna a masalna a‚ /Delakh/ qörucharna qetamna a.
2:67: Dagadaiyta! Musas ällera shen q'ome: "Bakq'alla a, Dala omra do shüga attana urs ḥaqa‚ älla". Tsara elira: "Aḥ ḥiyzor dara tkho?" Tso (Musas) elira: "Dala larvoyla so zhehxal nakhakh khilarkh".
2:68: Tsara elira: "Dekha ḥayn Qiosh-Qobuchünga‚ bilgalbe tkhuna i hxun ett bu‚ āliy". Tso elira: "Tso (Dala) bokhu: "I ett bu‚ q'ena a botsush‚ zhima a botsush‚ yukq'era. Shayga bokhurg qochushde".
2:69: Tsara elira: "Dekha ḥayn Qiosh-Qobuchünga‚ bilgalde tkhuna‚ bos hxun bu tsünan‚ āliy". Tso elira: "Tso bokhu: "I ett bu‚ sirla-mozhachu basaḥ‚ shega ḥözhursh ch'oġa tsetsbokhush".
2:70: Tsara elira: "Dekha ḥayn Qiosh-Qobuchünga‚ bilgalde tkhuna‚ i mukha bu‚ āliy. Bezhnash derrige a vovshekh tera du tkhuna. Tkho‚ Dalla laaḥ‚ dʿanislur dolush du".
2:71: Tso elira: "Tso (Dala) bokhu: "I ett bu okhana dan ya yaltanan arenna khi dilla ʿamiyna a botsush, aypekh ts'ena a bolush. Ch'ama botsush a bu iza". Tsara elira: "Hxintsa deana aḥ baq'derg". T'akqa tsara tsunna urs ḥäqira‚ shäsh gerga khilleḥ a /i/ tsa dan.
2:72: Dagadaiyta /hxay Israilan k'entiy/: "Ash sa (adam) ma diyra. Tsu t'eḥ vovshashtsa devne devlira shu". Dela ma vu guchudokqurg ash dʿaḥuldesh derg.
2:73: T'akqa Okha elira: "Tsu doq'akh tokha /ättan/ tsḥa mezhe". Ishtta denvo Dala vellarg‚ goytu shuna Shen ʿalamatash‚ shu khiliytarḥama qetash.
2:74: T'akqa tsul t'äḥa shun degnash q'iza khilira‚ t'ulg sanna ya tsul a ch'oġa shayn q'izallitsa. Bakq'alla a, t'ulgash yukq'era sḥadüylu shovdanash. Tsarekh (t'ulgekh) du, shäsh lelkha a lelkhash, shaykh khi dolursh a. Bakq'alla a, tsarekh du Delakh qerartsa ögush dersh. Dela ma vats tergal tsa desh ash diyrig.
2:75: Shu dog dokhush du /hxay busalbanash/ üsh (zhügtiy) shaykh teshash khilare? Khilla tsarakh tsḥabersh Delan dosh khezash‚ t'akqa‚ shäsh tsunakh qettachul t'äḥa‚ i khartsḥadokqush‚ shayna khuʾusheḥ.
2:76: Shäsh iyman dillincharna düḥalqetcha‚ tsara olu: "Iyman dillina du tkho"‚– tq'a shäsh vovshashtsa bischa, olu: "Ash tsärga düytsur du tq'a shayna Dala khaiytinarg tsärga /busulbanashka/ shaytsa shayn Dalla gergaḥ dolchüntsa q'iysiyta. Shu hxunda tsa khülu ḥeq'ale?"
2:77: Tsarna (zhügtashna) tsa khäa-te, i Dela tsara ḥuldiyrig a, tsara guchudokqurg a khuush vuyla?
2:78: Tsarakh bu bodane bersh‚ shayna zhayna (Tavrat) tsa khuush‚ bekq'a besa satiysamash ben - üsh ma bats shayna khetarsh desh ben.
2:79: Bala bu shayn küygashtsa zhayna yazdecharna‚ t'akqa tsara olu: "Hxara du Delera"‚– shayna tsunakh paydabotstsu makh etsarḥama. T'akqa bala bu tsarna shayn küygasha yazdinchukh‚ bala bu tsarna shäsh karaderzochukh.
2:80: Tsara elira: "Tkhokh qetanne a qetar yats /zhözhakhatin/ ts'e‚ tsḥa masiytta diynaḥ ben". Aḥ āla /ya Muḥammad/: "Delera vaʿda etsna ash? – Dala tsq'a a tsa yokhayo Shen vaʿda – ya shu Delakh lätsna düytsush du shayna tsakhuurg?"
2:81: Hxaʾ, vonig dinarsh a, shayn ġalatash shaykh ḥärchinarsh a – üsh bu zhözhakhatin day, shäsh tsu choḥ guttar khir bolush.
2:82: Tq'a iyman dillinarsh a‚ dikanig dinarsh a – üsh bu yalsamanin day‚ shäsh tsu choḥ guttar khir bolush.
2:83: /Dagadaiyta tsarna‚ hxay Muḥammad/ Israilan k'entashtsa ch'aġo yira Okha: "Dalla ben ʿibadat diyr dats ash‚ detsa-nenatsa a dika khir du shu‚ gergarchärtsa a‚ boberashtsa a /zhimalleḥ day bella bisinchu/‚ miskachärtsa a /dika khir du/‚ älla; ash āla nakhe dikanig‚ lamaz de‚ zakat lo". T'akqa shu yukhadevlira‚ shukh tsḥa k'ezzig bersh botsursh‚ shäsh düḥal a khülush.
2:84: Bart binera Okha shütsa: "Ash vovshiyn ts'iy ʿenor dats‚ shäsh vovshiyn ts'enoshkara ara a dokhur dats"‚ – älla‚ t'akqa ash ch'aġdira /i/‚ shäsh teshash a dolush.
2:85: T'akqa, tsul t'äḥa, shu du hxorsh: shäsh shayn doyush‚ shaykh tsḥabersh shayn hxusamashkara arabokhush‚ q'a latortsa a‚ mostaġallitsa a tsarna (mushrikashna) ġo a desh. Üsh yiysarsh khilcha‚ mekhakh parġatbokhu ash. Shuna ḥaram du üsh (shayn zhügtiyn vezhariy shayn ts'enoshkara) arabakhar. Tq'a zhaynan tsḥadolchekh shu tesha‚ vazha khartsdo ash? Shukh i lelochunna beqam bats dünenan dakhareḥ sisazalla ben‚ tq'a q'ematdiynaḥ üsh dʿaberzor ma bu uggar ch'oġachu ʿazape‚ ma vats i Dela tergal tsa desh ash diyrig.
2:86: Üsh ma bu ekhartakh dünenan dakhar etsnarsh. Tsarna ʿazap daydiyr ma dats‚ tsarna ġo a diyr ma dats.
2:87: Okha dellera Musaga zhayna‚ tsul t'äḥa a bakhiytira elchanash‚ Maryaman k'ante ʿiysaga delira qochchush teshallash (Inzhil)‚ ch'aġvira i Dezachu sitsa‚ tq'a mella a shayn doġmashna tsadezarg doḥush shüga elcha veʾcha‚ shu kuradovlura /hxay Israilan k'entiy/‚ /elchanekh/ tsḥabersh khartsbora ash‚ tsḥabersh boyura ash.
2:88: Tsara (Israilan k'entasha) elira: "Tkhan degnash muzhalt du (dʿaq'evlina du)”. Hxaʾ‚ Dala neʿalt elira tsarna, üsh (Delakh) tsateshar baḥaneḥ. Ma k'ezzig du-q i, üsh shekh teshash berg.
2:89: Tsärgaḥ derg (Tavrat) baq'desh dolu zhayna (Q'urʾan) Delera shayga deʾnachul t'äḥa…– ḥalkha üsh ma khillera tsateshacharna t'eḥ shayna ġo a dökhush…– shayga i shayna khuush derg deʾcha (Muḥammad paykhamar)‚ tsunakh tsa tiyshira üsh. Delan neʿalt khülda tsateshacharna.
2:90: Ma von dökhki tsara shayn doġmash Dala Shen lekh Shena luuchünga Shen q'inkhetamakh dossiynarg ḥoġatsa kharts a desh. Öġazallina t'e a öġazallina ḥaq' khilira üsh. Tsateshnacharna du siysaza dolu ʿazap.
2:91: Tsärga älcha: "Tesha Dala dossiynachukh (Q'urʾanakh)"‚– tsara olu: "Tkho tesha tkhayga dossiynachukh". Üsh ma teshats tsul t'äḥa dössinchukh. Tq'a i ma du baq'derg‚ tsärgaḥ dolchüntsa niysa a doġush. Aḥ āla /zhügtashka/: "Tq'a ḥalkha Delan paykhamarsh hxunda boyura ash‚ shäsh teshash khilleḥ?"
2:92: Shüga ma veʾnera qochchush teshallashtsa Musa‚ t'akqa a, tsul t'äḥa, ash t'eletsira esa, shäsh zulamkhoy a khülush.
2:93: Dagadaiyta! Okha ma bira shütsa bart‚ shuna t'ekhula aybira lam. "Ch'oġa dʿaetsa Okha shayna dellarg‚ la a doġa". Tsara elira: "Ladöġna okha‚ ʿesa khilla tkho". Tseran degnashkaḥ qollabelira ese bezam üsh tsatesharna. Aḥ āla: "Ma von hxuma du-q shun iymano shuna ḥökhush derg‚ shu teshash khilleḥ."
2:94: Aḥ āla: "T'äkhḥara hxusam Dalla gergaḥ‚ nakhana a yotsush‚ ekq'a shuna khilaḥ‚ dala laa‚ shäsh baq'lüysh delaḥ".
2:95: Tsarna tsq'a a dezanne a dezar dats shayna iza shayn küygashtsa ḥalkhadäkqinchüntsa. Dela ma vu bevzash i zulamkhoy.
2:96: Ḥuna karor ma bu üsh (zhügtiy) masso a nakhal /dünenan/ dakharna sutara‚ Delatsa naq'ost lätsnacharel a. Tsarakh hxoranna a luur dara ezar sharaḥ vākha. Ma vats-qa i ʿazapakh gena valalur volush sha /mel duqa/ vākharkh. Dela gush ma vu tsara diyrig.
2:97: Aḥ āla: "Mila khilla Dzhibrilana mostaġ? Tso ma dossadora i /Q'urʾan/ ḥan dag chu Delan purbantsa‚ tsul ḥalkha khillachüntsa niysa a doġush, teshacharna sha niysa neq' a‚ qaʾ a khilla dolu".
2:98: Mila khilla mostaġ Dalla a‚ Tsünan malikashna a‚ Tsünan elchanashna a‚ Dzhibrilana a‚ Miykalna a..? Tq'a Dela a ma vu mostaġ tsateshacheran.
2:99: Okha dossiyna ḥöga bilggala dolu ayatash‚ üsh kerstdiyr ma dats pesaq' nakha a ben.
2:100: Shäsh vaʿda mel yi a‚ tsarakh (zhügtekh) tsḥana tobano i yokhayo‚ melkho a tsarakh duqakhbersh teshash ma bats /Tavratakh/.
2:101: Shayga Delera elcha veʾcha‚ shaygaḥ derg baq'desh khilla volu‚ zhayna dellacharekh tsḥana tobano dʿatesira Delan zhayna shayn bakq'ashna t'ēḥa‚ shayna tsa khuush sanna.
2:102: Üsh t'äḥa ma hxittira Suleymanan pachchaḥalleḥ shayt'anasha shayna düytsash dolchu bozbuunchallina. Suleymana kersta tsa dira‚ amma shayt'anasha kerstadira‚ tsara nakhana ʿamadora bozbuunchalla a‚ Babileḥ shina malike Hxarute a‚ Marute a dossiynarg a. Tq'a tsara shimmo tsḥanna a ʿama tsa dora‚ shäsh olush ben: "Bakq'alla a, tkho tsḥa pitana du – ḥo tsa teshash ma khilalaḥ". T'akqa tsara tsu shingara (Hxarutera a‚ Marutera a) ʿama ma dora mar a‚ zuda a vovshakhdakqar. Tsara ma tsa do tsüntsa (bozbuunchallitsa) zen tsḥanna a‚ Delan purbantsa ben. Tsara ʿamado tsarna zen den hxuma‚ tsa ʿamado tsarna payda ben hxuma. Tsarna (zhügtashna) khiira i etsnacharna ekhartaḥ tsḥa a daq'a tsakhilar. Ma von hxuma du-q i, tsara shayn sinoykh etsnarg‚ tsarna khuush khilleḥara.
2:103: Üsh teshna a‚ /Delakh/ qörush a khilleḥara – Delera mēla tölush khir bara‚ tsarna khuush khilleḥara.
2:104: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Ash ma āla /paykhamare/: "Tkhan ġayġa be". Ash āla: "Tkhöga ḥazha"‚ la a doġa. Tsateshacharna lazosh dolu ʿazap /khir/ du.
2:105: Zhaynin ohxlakh a‚ mushrikekh a bolchu tsateshnacharna ma tsa deza shuna shäsh Qiosh-Qobuchüngara /tsḥa a/ dikanig dossa. Dala q'astavo /paykhamar khila a, qin dikanig dala a/ Shen q'inkhetamtsa Shena luurg. I Dela siylaḥ – dokqa dozalla dolush vu.
2:106: Okha tsḥa ayat dʿadäkqicha ya ditsdaliyticha‚ doüytu tsul dikanig ya tsunakh teranig. Ḥuna tsa khäa‚ i Dela masso a hxumanna t'eḥ nitsq' qochush khilar?
2:107: Ḥuna tsa khäa‚ stiglaniyn a‚ lättan a pachchaḥalla Deleḥ khilar? Shuna ma vats-qa i Dela votsurg tsḥa a doladiyrig a‚ tsḥa a ġöncha a.
2:108: Ya shuna läa shayn elchane (Muḥammade) dekha‚ ḥalkha Musaga /zhügtasha shayna Dela gayta, älla/ dekhna ma-khillara? Iyman tsateshartsa khüytsush verg ma vu-q tilavella niysachu neq'akh.
2:109: Baq'derg shayna guchudällachul t'äḥa a liira zhaynin ohxlanakh duqabolcharna, shaygara ḥaġ baḥaneḥ, iyman dillinchul t'äḥa shu iymanakh yukhadakha. Q'int'era dovla /tsarna/‚ bita märsha üsh Dala Shen omra daiyttalts. Bakq'alla a, i Dela masso a hxumanna t'eḥ nitsq' qochush ma vu.
2:110: Lamaz hxottadelash‚ zakat lōlash‚ ash shayn doġmashna ḥalkha mel däkqina dikanig karor ma du shuna Dalla gergaḥ. Bakq'alla a, i Dela ash diyrig gush ma vu.
2:111: Tsara elira: "Vakhanne a yalsamane ġur ma vats sha zhügtekh ya nasarekh verg ben". Iza tseran dagaḥ derg du. Aḥ āla: "Dalade shayn delil‚ shäsh baq'lüysh khilleḥ".
2:112: Hxaʾ! /Ġur vu yalsamane/ shen yuḥ Dalla müt'aḥ yinarg‚ sha dika ʿamal yinarg – tsunna shen yal khir ma yu shen Qiosh-Qobuchunna gergaḥ. Qeram a khir ma bats tsarna‚ üsh singattame a khir ma bats.
2:113: Zhügtasha elira: "Nasarash tsḥanna a hxumanna t'eḥ bats". Nasarasha elira: "Zhügtiy tsḥanna a hxumanna t'eḥ bats". Tq'a üsh ma bu zhayna döshush. Ishtta elira hxumma tsa khuush bolchara‚ tseran dashakh terra. I Dela ma vu ḥukam diyr dolush tsarna yukq'eḥ q'ematdiynaḥ tsara khilpalo echu hxumaneḥ.
2:114: Tq'a mila vu zulame Delan mäzhdigashna choḥ Tsünan ts'e yakqar tsa magosh volchul‚ üsh dokho ġertash volchul? Üsh (i nakh, mäzhdigash dokhosh bolu) - tsarna bakha megar ma datsara tsu /mäzhdigashna/ chu‚ /Delakh/ qörush ben. Tsarna yu dünenaḥ siysazalla‚ tq'a ekhartaḥ-m tsarna ma du deza- dokqa ʿazap.
2:115: Delan yu malkhbale a‚ malkhbuze a. Shu michchaḥa dirzicha a – tsigaḥ yu Delan yuḥ. I Dela ma vu derrige a chulotsush verg a‚ dika khuush verg a.
2:116: Tsara elira: "Dala dözalkho lätsna". Vonakh ts'ena vu Iza. Tq'a Tsünan ma du stiglanashkaḥ mel derg a‚ lättaḥ mel derg a. Masso a Tsunna müt'aḥ ma vu.
2:117: Sha stiglanash a, latta a yuḥantsa qöllinarg vu I. Tsḥana ġullaqa t'eḥ Sha tsḥa satsam bicha‚ Tso olu tsünga /Shena khila luuchu hxumane/: "Khila!" – i khülu.
2:118: Shaygaḥ ʿilma dotschara elira: "Tkhöga vistkhilla velaḥara Dela‚ ya tkhöga tsḥa delil deana khilleḥara". Ishtta olura tsaral ḥalkha bakhanchara a‚ tsara bokhuchünga terra‚ tsḥaterra khilira tseran degnash. Bilgaldäkhna Okha ayatash ch'oġa teshash bolchu nakhana.
2:119: Bakq'alla a, Okha ḥo vaiytina baq'dolchüntsa /qaʾ bakqa/ khaamcha khilla a‚ /ʿazapan/ qeramcha khilla a‚ ḥöga khottur ma dats zhözhakhatin ohxlanna t'era.
2:120: Khilanne a reza khir ma bats ḥuna zhügtiy a‚ nasarash a‚ ḥo tseran dinna t'äḥahxötticha ben. Aḥ āla: "Delan niysa neq' – i ma bu niysa neq'"‚ ḥo nagaḥ tseran laamashna t'äḥahxottaḥ‚ ḥayga ʿilma (baq'dolu din – islam) deʾnachul t'äḥa‚ Delera ḥuna khir ma vats tsḥa a vali a‚ tsḥa a ġöncha a.
2:121: Okha shayga zhayna dellacharekh i /Q'urʾan/ desha ma-dezzara döshush bersh bu‚– üsh ma bu tsunakh/ḥaq'-baq'/ teshash. Tsunakh tsa teshash bersh – üsh ma bu eshameḥ.
2:122: Hxay Israilan k'entiy! Ash dagadaiyta San niʿmat‚ As shuna della khilla dolu‚ As daz ma dira shu ʿalamel.
2:123: Qeralash diynakh, tsḥanna sino qechunna payda biyr botschu‚ shegara /Delan ʿazapakh k'elḥarvala/ makh q'obalbiyr botschu‚ ġodakqaro (shapaʿato) shena payda biyr botschu a. Tsarna (tsateshacharna) ġo diyr dats.
2:124: /Aḥ ḥakhade tsärga‚ hxay Muḥammad/: Ibrahxim ma ziyra shen Qiosh-Qobucho deshnashtsa‚ tso üsh qochush ma dira. Tso (Dala) elira: "As ḥokh nakhana imam vesh vu". Tso (Ibrahxima) elira: "Tq'a san t'äḥenakh?". Elira /Dala/: "San vaʿda tsa ḥaqalo zulamkhoykh".
2:125: Ḥakhade! Okha i ts'a dira nakhana t'ebörzu a‚ märsha a mettig khiliyta: "E Ibrahximan mettig lamaz den mettig". Okha omra dira Ibrahxime a‚ Ismaʿile a: "Ash shimmo ts'ande San ts'a (Kaʿba) go bokqucharna a /t'avap desh/, choḥ khevshina ʿibadat (iʿtikaf) decharna a‚ gorabakhana lamaz decharna a".
2:126: Ibrhxima ällera: "Hxay san Qiosh-Qobu/Dela/‚ Aḥ khiliytaḥ hxara /mettig/ märsha mokhk‚ Aḥ ritsq' lolaḥ tsünan ohxlanna stömashtsa‚ tsarakh Delakh a‚ t'äkhḥarchu diynakh a teshnacharna". Tso elira: "Tq'a /Delan ts'en din/ kerstadinachärga Asa paydaötsüytur bu niʿmatekh tsḥa k'ezzig‚ t'akqa dʿaḥavsor ma bu üsh ts'eran ʿazape". Ma von yu-q üsh qochu bolu mettig!
2:127: Ibrahxima a‚ Ismaʿila a ḥalaoybu tsu ts'iynan bukh / Dele dökhush/: "Hxay‚ tkhan Qiosh-Qoburg! Q'obalde Aḥ /hxara ġullaq/ tkhögara. Bakq'alla a, Ḥo ma vu khezash verg a‚ khuush verg a.
2:128: Hxay tkhan Qiosh-Qoburg! Tkhoyshiʾ khiliyta Aḥ Ḥayna müt'aḥ‚ tkhan t'äḥenakh a Ḥayna müt'aḥ ummat de Aḥ‚ gaytaḥa tkhuna tkhan ʿibadat den mettigash‚ Aḥ gechdelaḥ tkhuna. Bakq'alla a, Ḥo ma vu t'ekh gechdesh verg a‚ q'inkhetame verg a.
2:129: Hxay tkhan Qiosh-Qoburg! Aḥ vaiytalaḥ tsarna elcha‚ tsarakh a volush‚ sha tsarna döshush Ḥan ayatash‚ tsarna ʿamosh zhayna a‚ ḥeq'alalla a‚ üsh ts'anbesh. Bakq'alla a, Ḥo ma vu veza verg a‚ ḥukame verg a".
2:130: Tq'a mila vu Ibrahximan millatakh /buq' tökhna/ dʿavörzush verg? – Ma vats iza shen ʿovdallalitsa sha vayvesh verg ben. Okha khärzhina i /Ibrahxim/ dünenaḥ‚ tq'a ekhartaḥ i khir ma vu dikacharekh.
2:131: Ḥakhade! Ällera tsünga i Qiosh-Qobucho: "Müt'aḥ khila!" Tso elira: "Müt'aḥ vu so ʿalamiyn Dena (Dalla)".
2:132: Tsüntsa (islamatsa) veset dira Ibrahxima shen k'entashka‚ Yaʿq'uba a dira: "Hxay san k'entiy! Dala khärzhina shuna din‚ shu dala ma loyla /tsu Dalla/ müt'aḥ dolush a ben".
2:133: Tq'a shu dariy ulloḥ lättash Yaʿq'ubana t'e ʿozhalla eʾcha‚ tso shen k'entashka olush: "Ḥanna ʿibadat diyr du ash sol t'äḥa?" Tsara ma elira: "Okha ʿibadat diyr ma du ḥan Delana‚ ḥan dayn – Ibrahximan‚ Ismaʿilan‚ Isḥaq'an – Delana‚ sha tsḥaʾ volchu tsu Delana‚ Tsunna müt'aḥ ma du tkho".
2:134: I dʿadakhna ummat du. Tsunna tso shena lekhnarg kariyna‚ shuna ash shayna lekhnarg kariyna. Shüga zhop dökhur ma dats tsara desh khillachukh.
2:135: Tsara (zhaynin ohxlakh bolchara) elira: "Khila zhügtiyn dineḥ ya nasarash‚ t'akqa khir du shu niysachu novq'aḥ". Aḥ āla: "Hxan-hxa! Sha ts'ena Delakh teshash khillachu Ibrahximan din du san‚ tsa khilla iza mushrikekh".
2:136: Ash āla: "Teshna tkho Delakh a‚ tkhayga dossiynachukh (Q'urʾanakh) a‚ Ibrahxime‚ Ismaʿile‚ Isḥaq'e‚ Yaʿq'ube‚ tsünan t'äḥene dossiynachukh a‚ Musaga a‚ ʿiysaga a dellachukh a‚ shäsh Qiosh-Qobuchu Delera paykhamarshka daiytinchukh a. Okha tsarakh tsḥa a tsa q'astavo. Tkho tsunna (Dalla) müt'aḥ ma du".
2:137: Nagaḥ sanna üsh teshna belaḥ‚ shu ma teshshara – t'akqa üsh khir bu niysachu novq'aḥ. Nagaḥ sanna üsh dʿaberzaḥ /tsu teshamakh/ – bakq'alla a, üsh (zhügtiy a, nasarash a) ma bu /ḥögaḥ dolchunna/ düḥal. Dala / tseran zenakh a, bokhamakh a ʿalashvartsa/ qacho yiyr yu ḥuna. I ma vu sha khezash verg a‚ khuush verg a.
2:138: /Ala zhügtashka a, nasarashka a: tkho q'astiyna/Delan dinan khazallin basartsa. Mila vu tq'a Delachul din khaza dolush? /Ash āla/: “Tsunna ʿibadat do okha.”
2:139: Aḥ āla: "Tkhötsa q'üysu ash Delan ḥoq'eḥ? I ma vu tkhan Qiosh-Qoburg a‚ shun Qiosh-Qoburg a‚ tkhuna tkhan ʿamalsh yu‚ shuna shun ʿamalsh yu‚ tkho tsunna (Dalla) teshame du".
2:140: Ya ash bokhu: Ibrahxim‚ Ismaʿil‚ Isḥaq'‚ Yaʿq'ub‚ tsünan (Yaʿq'uban) t'äḥe a khilla zhügtiy ya nasarash? Aḥ āla: "Shuna dika khäa ya Dalla dika khäa? Mila vu zulame shena gergaḥ Delera khilla dolu teshalla ḥuldesh volchul? Ma vats i Dela tergo tsa esh ash diyrig".
2:141: I dʿadakhna ummat du. Tsunna tso shena lekhnarg kariyna‚ shuna ash shayna lekhnarg kariyna. Shüga zhop dökhur ma dats tsara desh khillachukh.
2:142: Nakhakh ḥeq'ale botsuchara er ma du: "Sten dʿaberziyna teḥa üsh shäsh t'ebörzush khillachu q'ilbanna t'era?" Aḥ āla: "Delan yu malkhbale a‚ malkhbuze a‚ nisvesh vu I Shena luurg niysachu novq'a".
2:143: Ishtta Okha dira shukh yuq'ara ummat‚ shu khiliyta nakhana t'eḥ teshash‚ elcha a khiliyta shuna t'eḥ tesh. Okha ma tsa dira ḥo shena t'evörzush khilla q'ilba /Bayt al-Muq'addas/ q'asto ben elchanna t'äḥavozurg sha /kerstanallina t'e/ vukhavörzuchukh. Bakq'alla a, khillera iza khala hxuma Dala nisbinacharna dotsush. Dela tsa khilla shun iyman eshor dolush. Bakq'alla a, i Dela ma vu nakhakh dog lozush a‚ q'inkhetame a.
2:144: Gira Tkhuna /hxay Muḥammad/ ḥan yuḥ stiglaḥa ḥiyzar. Okha ḥo t'evörzor ma vu ḥo reza volchu q'ilbanna. Dʿaerzae ḥan yuḥ Dezchu Mäzhdigan aġor. Shäsh michchaḥa delaḥ a‚ dʿaerzae shayn yakhḥash tsu aġor. Zhaynin ohxlanna khuush ma du i shayn Qiosh-Qobuchüngara baq'derg khilar. Ma vats i Dela tsara diyrig tidameḥ dotsush.
2:145: Zhaynin ohxlanna mülkhkha delil aḥ daliycha a‚ üsh t'ebörzur bats ḥan q'ilbanna‚ ḥo a vörzur vats tseran q'ilbanna t'e. Tsarakh tsḥabersh börzur ma bats qecheran q'ilbanna t'e. Ḥo tseran dezarshna t'äḥahxottaḥ‚ ḥayga ʿilma deʾnachul t'äḥa‚ ḥo khir ma vu zulamkhoykh.
2:146: Okha shayga zhayna dellacharna i /Muḥammad paykhamar/ vevza‚ shayn k'entiy shayna ma bovzarra. Bakq'alla a, tsarakh tsḥa toba ḥuldesh ma yu baq'derg‚ shayna khuush dollusheḥ.
2:147: Baq'derg du /iza/ ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchüngara. Khilanne a ḥo ma khilalaḥ sheko yolush bolcharakh.
2:148: Hxoranna a – shen aġo yu‚ i tsunna t'evörzush. Asha sikhoe dikachu ġullaqashkaḥ ḥalkhe yakqareḥ. Michchaḥa a shu delaḥ a‚ – Dala shu derrige a tsḥäna guldiyr du /q'ematdiynaḥ/. Bakq'alla a, i Dela masso a hxumanna t'eḥ nitsq' qochush ma vu.
2:149: Michchaḥara ḥo aravälcha a‚ dʿaerzae ḥan yuḥ Dezachu Mäzhdigan aġor. Bakq'alla a, i baq'derg ma du ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchüngara. Ma vats i Dela asha diyrig tidameḥ dotsush.
2:150: Michchaḥara ḥo aravälcha a‚ dʿaerzae ḥan yuḥ Dezachu Mäzhdigan aġor. Shäsh michchaḥa khilcha a‚ dʿaerzae shayn yakhḥash tsu aġor‚ nakhana shuna t'eḥ bekhk billa baḥana tsa khiliyta‚ tsarakh zulamkhoy botsucharna, – shu tsarakh ma qeralash, Sokh qeralash, - Söga shuna t'eḥ Sayn niʿmat cheqdakqiyta - shu niysachu novq'a t'eḥ khila tarlora-q.
2:151: Okha shuna elcha vaiytarkh terra‚ shukh shaykh volu, sha düytsush volu shuna Tkhan ayatash‚ tso shu ts'andesh‚ shuna zhayna a‚ ḥeq'alalla a ʿamadesh‚ shuna tso ʿamadesh, shuna tsa khuush khillarg.
2:152: Ash So dagavaiyta / Suna müt'aḥ khilartsa/ – Asa shu a dagadoüytur du /shuna gechdartsa/‚ Suna shukur de‚ Suna inkarlo esh ma khila.
2:153: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Ash ġo lakha sobartsa a‚ lamaztsa a. Bakq'alla a, i Dela ma vu sobare bolchärtsa.
2:154: Ash ma āla Delan novq'aḥ boyucharakh "bella". – Diyna bu üsh. – Amma shuna tsa khaalo.
2:155: Okha ditanne a tsa züysh dütur dats shu qeram tasartsa a‚ matsalla yaiytartsa a‚ däkhni a‚ sinosh a‚ stömash a eshiytartsa a‚ – aḥ qaʾ bakqa sobare bolcharna‚ –
2:156: Ishtannash bu üsh shayna t'e tsḥa bokqa bāla becha‚ olush: "Vay Delan du‚ Tsünga dʿadörzur dolush a du".
2:157: Tsarna shayn Qiosh-Qobuchüngara gechdar a ma du‚ q'inkhetam a ma bu‚ üsh ma bu niysachu novq'a t'eḥ bersh.
2:158: Bakq'alla a, Safa a‚ Marvat a Delan dinan bilgalonekh du. Ḥäzh dökhkuchunna a‚ ʿumrat dechunna a q'a dats tsarna go bäkqicha. Laa a luush, /Shena/ dikanig dinachunna – i Dela barkalla olush a‚ khuush a vu.
2:159: Bakq'alla a, Okha yaiytina bilgalonash a‚ niysa neq' a, Okha shäsh nakhana Zhaynin choḥ bilgalʾyakhnachul t'äḥa, ḥuldesh bersh – üsh ma bu Dala shayna neʿalt er dersh a‚ neʿalt oluchara a shayna neʿalt er dersh a.
2:160: Bats /neʿaltan k'el/ shäsh dechunna t'era /tōba dartsa/ yukhabevlla‚ dika a lella‚ /shäsh ḥuldesh khillarg/ bilgala däkqinarsh-m – tseran tōba As q'obaldiyr du – So tōba /duqa/ q'obaldiyrig a vu /Sayn leshna/, /Saygaḥ/ shortta q'inkhetam berg a vu.
2:161: Bakq'alla a, shäsh /din/ kerstadinarsh‚ /otsu/ kersta ḥoleḥ bellarsh – tsarna khir du Delan a‚ malikiyn a‚ masso a nekhan a neʿalt.
2:162: Shäsh tsu choḥ (ts'ergaḥ) guttar a lättash‚ ʿazap daydiyr ma dats tsarna‚ t'äḥatottur a ma bats üsh.
2:163: Shun Dela – Sha tsḥaʾ volu Dela vu. Qin Dela vats I ben‚ sov q'inkhetame a‚ q'inkhetame a verg vu Iza.
2:164: Bakq'alla a, stiglanash a‚ latta a qollareḥ a‚ büysa-de khiytsadalareḥ a‚ hxorda choḥ nakhana paydanna dʿasalelash dolchu kemaneḥ a‚ Dala stiglara oḥadoüytuchu, dellachul t'äḥa shetsa latta dendesh a, tsu /lätta/ t'eḥ masso a diynat darzhadesh a dolchu khineḥ /doġaneḥ/ a‚ mokh ḥeqareḥ a‚ shäsh /Dalla/ müt'aḥ khilla stiglanna a‚ lättana a yukq'eḥ dʿasalelachu markhashkaḥ a – bilgalonash ma yu shäsh oyla yan khuuchu nakhana.
2:165: Nākhakh bu Allahx-Dela vitina qibersh /deliy/ lötsush bersh, üsh Tsüntsa nisbesh, shayna üsh bezash, Dela vezarkh terra. Tq'a /Delakh/ teshash bersh Dela ch'oġa duqavezash ma bu. Gush belḥara i zulam desh bersh – tsarna gur ma dara ʿazap – tsarna khuur ma dara nitsq' berrige a Delan buyla a‚ i Dela ʿazap dareḥ ch'oġa vuyla a.
2:166: Shayna nakh t'äḥahxüttush khilla bersh ts'anlur ma bu shayna t'äḥa hxittina khillacharekh‚ tsarna gur du ʿazap‚ khedar yu tseran yuq'amettigash.
2:167: Shäsh qecharna t'äḥahxüttush khillachara er du: "Tkhan yukha dünena dörziyla delaḥara‚ tkho a ts'anlur ma dara tsarakh‚ üsh tkhokh ts'anbalarkh terra". Ishtta goytur yu Dala tseran ʿamalsh tsarna bāla khilla. Üsh arabevra ma bats ts'ergara.
2:168: Hxay nakh! Daa lättaḥ dolchukh ḥanal derg a‚ ts'ena derg a. Shu ma hxittalash shayt'anan lar t'e – i shuna bilggala mostaġ ma du.
2:169: Bakq'alla a, tso shuna ḥökhu vonig a‚ irchanig dar a‚ ash Delakh lätsna shayna tsakhuurg alar a.
2:170: Tsärga älcha: "T'äḥahxitta Dala shayga dossiynachunna (Q'urʾanna)", tsara olu: "Hxan-hxa! Tkho t'äḥahxüttur du tkhayna tkheshan day shena t'eḥ kariynachunna». – I shayn day tsḥanna hxumanakh qetash a‚ niysachu novq'aḥ a khilla batsaḥ a? /T'akqa a hxüttu üsh tsarna t'äḥa??/
2:171: Kerstanalla decheran masal du shega moḥ bitticha a, ts'oġa ḥeqcha a ben tsa khezachünga qayqaran masalakh tera: q'ora, mott tsa khuush, bʿärze khilla, üsh qetar bats.
2:172: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Daa Okha shayna dellachu ritsq'anakh ts'ena derg‚ tsu Dalla shukur a de‚ shäsh Tsunna ʿibadat desh delaḥ.
2:173: Tso shuna ḥaram yina q'eella hxuma a‚ ts'iy a‚ ḥaqin zhizhig a‚ Dalla dotsush‚ qechunna lerina yiyna hxuma a. Nagaḥ sanna /i ḥaram yinarg/ tsa yiʾcha tsa valaḥ‚ /bekhkamna/ düḥal a votsush‚ dozanal t'ekh a tsa volush‚ tso i /ḥaramnig daarkh/ tsunna q'a dats – bakq'alla‚ i Dela ma vu gechdiyrig a‚ q'inkhetame verg a.
2:174: Bakq'alla a, Dala Sha dossiynachu zhaynakh /tsḥaderg nakhakh/ ḥuldesh bersh‚ tsunakh shayna k'ezzig makh ötsush bersh – üsh ma bu shayn kiyraḥ ts'e ben yuur yotsursh. Vistkhir ma vats i Dela tsärga /reza khilartsa/ q'ematdiynaḥ‚ ts'anbiyr ma bats Tso üsh. Tsarna khir ma du lazosh dolu ʿazap.
2:175: Üsh ma bu shäsh niysa neq' bökhkina tilar etsnarsh‚ shäsh gechdar dökhkina ʿazap etsnarsh. Ma sobare bu üsh zhözhakhatin ts'e la(v)reḥ!?
2:176: Iza du Dala i zhayna (Tavrat) dossosh khilarna baq'dolchüntsa. Bakq'alla a, tsu zhaynitsa tsḥäna tsa boġursh (i dokhosh, kharts tüdush bersh) genarchu /bart/ eġareḥ ma bu (baq'dolchunna genaḥ ma bu).
2:177: Mela khir bats ash shayn yakhḥash malkhbaleḥa a‚ malkhbuzeḥa a erzayareḥ. Tq'a mela khir bu i /nakh/ Delakh a‚ t'äkhḥarchu diynakh a‚ malikekh a‚ zhaynakh a‚ paykhamarekh a teshash belaḥ‚ shena a dezachu däkhnikh /saġina/ delcha gergarcharna a‚ boberashna a‚ miskachu nakhana a‚ neq'khochunna a‚ dökhuchunna a‚ lay parġatvakqarna a‚ lamaz a tso hxottiycha‚ zakat a delcha‚ shäsh della dosh qochush a dicha‚ yakqiychu khalonashkaḥ a‚ balanashkaḥ a‚ t'ameḥ a sobare a khilcha. Üsh bu baq'lüysh bersh. Üsh bu /Delakh/ qörush bersh.
2:178: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Shuna t'edillina bayʾincheran ch'ir eqar: märshanig /vüyr vu/ – /tso/ märshanig /vēr/ baḥaneḥ‚ lay /vüyr vu/ – /tso/ lay /vēr/ baḥane‚ zuda /yüyr yu/ – /tso/ zuda /ēr/ baḥaneḥ. /Busalba/ vashas tsḥanna gechdicha – dikantsa tsunna t'äḥahxotta veza. Niysa qochushdan deza diyat. I shuna Delera attalla yu‚ q'inkhetam a ma bu. Tsul t'äḥa dozanakh vällachunna (ch'ir eqa ġirtinachunna) khir ma du lazosh dolu ʿazap.
2:179: Shuna ch'ir eqareḥ dakhar du‚ hxay ḥeq'al dersh, shu khiliytarḥama qörush /bekhk botsush stag verakh/.
2:180: Shuna t'edillina tsḥanna t'e valar deʾcha‚ nagaḥ tsünan bukhadüsush hxuma delaḥ, tso i niysontsa dena-nanna‚ gergarcharna dala veset dar – bakq'alla a t'eḥ du i /veset dar Delakh/ qörucharna.
2:181: Nagaḥ sanna tsḥammo i /vesetan chulatsam/ shena kheznachul t'äḥa khiytsaḥ – q'a i khiytsinchunna khir du. I Dela ma vu Sha khezash verg a‚ khuush verg a.
2:182: Nagaḥ sanna tsḥaʾ veset dechüngara niyso tsa yarakh ya q'a darakh qeraḥ‚ tso maslaḥat daḥ tsarna yukq'eḥ‚ tsunna q'a khir dats. I Dela ma vu gechdesh verg a‚ q'inkhetame verg a.
2:183: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Shuna t'edillina markha qabar‚ shul ḥalkharcharna t'edillarkh terra‚ shu khiliytarḥama /Delakh/ qörush.
2:184: /I markha qobur du/tsḥa k'ezzig denoshkaḥ; shukh tsḥaʾ tsomgush velaḥ ya novq'aḥ nislaḥ – qechu khenaḥ /markha qobur du tso/ disinchu denoyn metta. Markha tsaqabalucharna t'eḥ du miskachu stagana daar dalar. Dikanig tso sovdäkqicha (shen daggara saġa sovlush) – i tsunna dika du. Ash markha qäbcha – shuna dika du‚ shu khuush khilleḥ.
2:185: /I markha qaba deza denosh/ Ramazan butt bu‚ shena choḥ nakhana niysa neq' a bolu‚ niysachu neq'an a, /baq'derg-khartsderg, ḥanal-ḥaram/ q'astoran a bilgalonash a yolu Q'urʾan dossiyna bolu. Shukh i /ramazan butt/ lerincho markha qobiyla. Tsḥaʾ tsomgush velaḥ‚ ya novq'aḥ velaḥ – qechu denoykh tsḥa daq'a /qochushder tso/. I Dela luush vu shuna atto khilar‚ luush vats I shuna khalo khilar. Qochushder ash i denosh /markhanash qobush/‚ vazver ash i Dela /Allahxu akbar ālartsa/‚ Tso shäsh niysachu novq'a nisdarna‚ shu khilaḥara barkalla olush.
2:186: San lesha ḥöga khattaḥ Sokh lätsna – So gergaḥ vu‚ zhop lush vu dökhuchünan dekharna – tso dekhcha. Suna zhop loyla tsara (Suna müt'aḥ khilartsa)‚ Sokh teshiyla üsh - üsh khila tam bara niysachu novq'aḥ.
2:187: Magosh du shuna markhiyn battaḥ busa shayn zudarshna gergadakhar – üsh shun dukhar du‚ shu – tseran dukhar du. Dalla khiira shu khilla khilar shäsh shayn ʿekhadesh. Shun tōba q'obaldira Tso‚ shuna gechdira. Hxintsa /busa/ gergaġo shayna tsarna‚ lakha Dala shayna yazdinarg. Daa‚ mala shayna satasaran k'ayn tay ʿärzhachu taykh q'astadallalts. T'akqa qochushde markha qabar büysa t'eyallalts. Gerga ma ġo tsarna (zudarshna) shäsh mäzhdigash choḥ lättash dolush /iʿtikaf desh/. Üsh Delan dozanash du. Gerga ma ġo tsarna (dozanashna – üsh dokho). Ishtta bilgaldokhu Dala shen ayatash nakhana‚ üsh khiliytarḥama larlush /Delan dozanekh/.
2:188: Ash ma daa vovshiyn däkhni khartsontsa ḥäkamashtsa berta a dakhana, q'a dartsa nekhan däkhni daarḥama‚ shayna khüusheḥ /i shayn dotsiyla/.
2:189: Ḥöga /hxay Muḥammad/ khöttu tsara bettan kütsash khiytsadalarakh lätsna‚ aḥ āla: "Iza nakhana khan bilgalʾyakqarḥama a‚ ḥäzhdekhkarna a du". Mēla khir bats shu hxusamash chu t'eḥakhula dakharkh. Mēla bu /shu Delakh/ qörush khilar. Hxusamash chu ġo neʿarshkakhula! Delakh qera – shu dakqiyder du.
2:190: T'om be Delan novq'aḥ shaytsa t'om besh bolchärtsa‚ amma dozanal sov ma dovla. Dalla tsa beza dozanal sov büylursh.
2:191: Baya üsh shayna karabäkhkkinchoḥ‚ arabakha üsh shäsh aradäkhnachüra. Pitana ch'oġa du stag vēral a. T'om ma be tsärtsa Deza Mäzhdigana ulloḥ‚ tsara shaytsa t'om tsa baḥ. Tsara shaytsa baḥ /t'om/ – baya üsh! Ishtta bu tsateshacharna beqam.
2:192: Üsh sovtsaḥ – Dela gechdesh a‚ q'inkhetame a vu.
2:193: T'om be tsärtsa pitana satstsalts‚ din /desh dolu ʿibadat dekq'a tsḥana Dalla khillalts/. Üsh sovtsaḥ/t'om bechüra/ – t'elatar ma de zulam decharna ben.
2:194: Lerame butt – lerame battatsa‚ ḥurmatash a – ch'ir etsa dezash du. Shayna tsḥaʾ t'elataḥ – shu a t'elata tsunna‚ i shayna t'e ma letta. Delakh qera, shuna khaa i Dela Shekh qöruchärtsa vuyla.
2:195: Kharzhash e Delan novq'aḥ. Shayn küygashtsa shäsh hxallak ma de. Dikanig de. Dalla duqabeza dikanig desh bersh.
2:196: Qochushde ḥäzhdekhkar a‚ ʿumrat a Delan düḥa. Shun ätto bökhneḥ /tsḥana hxumano novq'arlo yina/, shayn nitsq' qochu bezhana de saġina. Shayn kortosh ma dasha i saġina diyna bezhana shen mettige dʿaqachchalts. Shukh tsḥaʾ tsomgush velaḥ ya körtan tsamgar yolush velaḥ – /korta boshur bats‚ amma/ tsunna düḥal markha qobur du /qaa diynaḥ/‚ saġa lur du /yalkh miskachu stagana‚ tsḥanna akh saḥ lush/‚ ya üstaġ büyr bu. Shu qeramakh parġatdevlacha‚ shukh tsḥammo ʿumrat ḥalkhadakqaḥ ḥäzhdekhkaral – shena nitsq' qochu bolu bezhanna urs ḥaqa saġina. I tsa karadaḥ – markha qobur du qaa diynaḥ ḥäzhdökhkuchu khenaḥ‚ vorhx diynaḥ – ts'a yukhavirzicha. Üsh qochchush itt de du. I du shen nakh Deza Mäzhdigana gonaḥ botscharna. Shu qera Delakh‚ shuna khaa i Dela taʿzar dareḥ ch'oġa vuyla.
2:197: Ḥäzhdekhkaran bilgaldäkhna bettanash du. Tsu khenaḥ ḥäzh- dikhkinchunna – zudchüntsa /gergara/ yuq'amettig khilar a‚ ʿesalla a‚ q'iysar a tsa mega ḥäzhdekhkareḥ. Ash mülkhkha a dina dika Sha khuush ma vu i Dela. Shaytsa sursatash etsa neq'ana (ḥäzhdekhka dölkhush). Tq'a uggar dika sursat – Delakh qerar du. Sokh qera‚ hxay ḥeq'al dersh.
2:198: Shuna q'a dats‚ ash shayn Delera dikanash lekhcha. Shäsh ʿarafatera oḥadäkhkicha, Dela ḥakhave siydolchu mashʿareḥ. Ḥakhave I /dika/‚ Tso shu /niysachu novq'a/ nisdare terra‚ shu khilleḥ a tsul ḥalkha tillabelllacharekh.
2:199: T'akqa lela nakh lelachukhula‚ Dele gechdar a dekha. I Dela gechdesh verg a‚ q'inkhetame verg a vu.
2:200: Shäsh ḥäzhdekhkar qochushdina devlcha‚ ḥekhave i Dela‚ shäsh shayn day ḥekhabarakh terra‚ ya qin a ch'oġa. Nakhakh ma bu olursh: "Hxay tkhan Qiosh-Qoburg‚ lo tkhuna dünenaḥ" /dikanash/ – ma dats tsarna ekhartaḥ dāq'a.
2:201: Tsarakh bu olursh a: "Hxay tkhan Qiosh-Qoburg! Aḥ tkhuna lōlaḥ dünenaḥ a dikanash‚ ekhartaḥ a dikanash‚ Aḥ tkho lardelaḥ ts'eran ʿazapakh".
2:202: Tsarna ma du dāq'a shayna karadinchukh. I Dela ma vu ḥesap dareḥ sikhanig.
2:203: Dela ḥekhave masiytta diynaḥ. Shina diynaḥ /bärzanashna t'e t'ulgash qissina dʿavakha/ sikhvellachunna q'a dats‚ (qoalġachu denna) t'äḥavisinchunna a q'a dats – q'a dats /Delakh/ qörush volchunna. Delakh qeralash‚ shuna khaalash shäsh Tsunna t'e dʿaguldiyr duyla.
2:204: Admashna yukq'eḥ ishttanig a vu, sha dünenan dakhareḥ shen q'amelatsa ḥo tsetsvokqush verg‚ dag choḥ dolchunna Dela tesh a hxottosh – i ma vu lüra mostaġ.
2:205: /Ḥokh/ dʿa ma q'ästtineḥ, sikhlo iza (munepiq') lätta t'eḥ pasad hxumanash dan‚ hxallakdo tso okhana a‚ däkhni a‚– Dalla tsa deza pasad hxuma.
2:206: Shega älcha: "Qera Delakh!" –kurallo sḥalotsu iza q'a latortsa. Tsunna qacho yiyr yu zhözhakhatino‚ –ma von yu-q /i sannacharna/ nisyina mettig.
2:207: Nakhakh ishttanig a ma vu, Dela reza khilar lökhush, shen sa dukhkush verg. Dela ma vu q'akhetash /Shen/ lekh.
2:208: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Chuġo islamna qochchush. Shu ma hxitta shayt'anan larashna t'äḥa – i shuna bilggala mostaġ ma du.
2:209: Shayga hxara bilgalonash qächnachul t'äḥa shu galdovlaḥ – shuna khaalash: i Dela veza vu /beqam bareḥ/‚ ḥeq'ale vu /ġullaqash dʿadaḥareḥ/.
2:210: Üsh /islam din t'e tsa lotsursh/ ḥözhush bu-teḥa Dela shayga vare markhashna yukq'ekhula‚ ishtta malikash a /shayga dakhkare ʿazap doḥush/‚ t'akqa /ʿazapan/ ġullaq qochushkhilare? Dele dʿadörzush ma du ġullaqash.
2:211: Aḥ khatta Israilan k'entashka, mel dakhkiytina Okha tsärga bilgala dolu delilash. Delan niʿmat khüytsuchunna‚ shega i deʾnachul t'äḥa – i Dela ma vu taʿzar dareḥ ch'oġa verg.
2:212: Tsateshacharna khazdina dünenan dakhar‚ üsh bölush bu teshacharekh. Bakq'alla a, /Delakh/ qörursh tsarna t'eḥ khir bu q'ematdiynaḥ. Dala ritsq' ma lo Shena luuchunna, ḥesap a dotsush.
2:213: Nakh khilla tsḥana ummateḥ‚ t'akqa /üsh tilarchu bakhcha/ Dala bakhkiytira, shäsh qaʾ bokqush khilla bolu‚ qeram tosush khilla bolu paykhamarsh‚ tsärtsa dossiyra baq'dolchüntsa zhayna‚ tsärga nakhana yukq'eḥ ḥukam dayta tseran khilpalo khillachoḥ. Tsu choḥ khilpalo-m tsa khili i /Delan zhayna/ shayga dellacheran ben‚ shayga bilgalonash qächnachul t'äḥa vovshashna yukq'eḥ ḥaġ khilarna. Dala Shen purbantsa nisbira iyman dillinarsh, üsh (zhaynin ohxlakh bersh) shetsa khilpaloneḥ khillachu baq'dolchunna t'e. I Dela ma vu nisvesh Shena luurg niysachu novq'a.
2:214: Shuna möttu shäsh yalsamane ġur du /hxay busalbanash/ shul ḥalkha bakhancharna (busalbanashna) t'edeʾnarg shayna t'e a tsa doġush? Letsna khilla üsh balanasha a‚ tsamgarsha a‚ degnash ʿiyzhira tseran‚ elchano a‚ tsüntsa tsḥäna iyman dillinchara a olush: "Matsa khir du Delera ġo?" – Hxaʾ! Bakq'alla a, Delera ġo gerga ma du!
2:215: Tsara ḥöga khöttu: "Hxun lur yu saġina?" Aḥ āla: "Ash saġina dokqush dolu dika hxuma - /dakqa/ dena-nanna a‚ gergarcharna a‚ boberashna a‚ miskachu nakhana a‚ neq'akhochunna a. Ash desh dolu dika Dela khuush vu".
2:216: Shuna t'edillina t'om bar. Iza shuna tsa deza hxuma du. Shuna tsa deza tarlo tsḥa hxuma, i shuna dika a dolush. Shuna deza tarlo tsḥa hxuma, i shuna von a dolush. I Dela khuush vu‚ shu khuush dats.
2:217: Tsara ḥöga khöttu bezachu battakh lätsna‚ tsu choḥ t'om barkh. Aḥ āla: "Tsu choḥ t'om bar – dokqa q'a du. Tq'a Delan neq'akh /nakh/ dukhatokhar a‚ Tsunakh tsateshar a‚ Deza Mäzhdigakh /nakh dukhtokhar/ a‚ tsünan nakh tsu chüra arabakhar qin dokqa du Dalla gergaḥ". Pitana dokqa du t'om baral a. Üsh (kerstanash) sovtsur bats t'om bechüra shu shayn dinakh dʿaderziycha ben‚ shayn nitsq' qachaḥ. Shukh shen dinakh dʿavirzina kersta ḥoleḥ vellarg – üsh bu shayn ʿamalsh yaynarsh dünenaḥ a‚ ekhartaḥ a. Üsh bu zhözhakhatin day‚ üsh tsu choḥ guttar lättar bu.
2:218: Bakq'alla a, iyman dillinarsh a‚ hxizhar dinarsh a‚ Delan novq'aḥ q'iysam lattiynarsh a – üsh dogdokhur dolush bu Delan q'inkhetame. I Dela ma vu gechdesh verg a‚ q'inkhetame verg a.
2:219: Tsara ḥöga khöttu chaġarkh a‚ maysirkh a lätsna‚ aḥ āla: "Tsarna choḥ dokqa q'a a du‚ nakhana paydanash a bu. Tsarna choḥ dolu q'a dokqa du tsarna choḥ bolchu paydanal". Yukha a khöttu tsara ḥöga: "Hxun dokqur du shäsh saġina?" Aḥ āla: "Sovdällarg". Ishtta Dala bilgalyokhu shuna bilgalonash‚ shu khiliytarḥama oyla esh
2:220: Dünenaḥ a‚ ekhartaḥ a /dolchu ġullaqekh/. Tsara ḥöga khöttu boberekh lätsna. Aḥ āla: "Maslaḥat dar dika du tsarna". Ash üsh vovshakhtökhcha – üsh shun vezhariy bu. I Dela khuush ma vu khartso yiyrig a‚ niyso yiyrig a. Dalla liʾneḥara‚ Tso khalo yiyr yara shuna. Bakq'alla a, Dela ma vu veza verg a‚ ḥeq'ale verg a.
2:221: Ash ma balabe Delatsa naq'ost lüytsu zudariy tsara iyman dillalts. Teshash yolu lay tölush yu Delatsa naq'ost lotsuchu zudchul‚ tso (Delatsa naq'ost lotsush yolcho) shüga tamasha baytaḥ a. Delatsa naq'ost lötsuchu bozharshka a ma bakhiyta /busalba/ zudariy tsara iyman dillalts. Teshash volu lay tölush vu Delatsa naq'ost lotsuchu stagal‚ tso shüga tamasha baytaḥ a. Tsara qoyqu zhözhakhate‚ Dala qoyqu yalsamane a‚ Shen laamtsa gechdare a. Tso bilgalyokhu Shen bilgalonash nakhana‚ üsh khiliytarḥama oyla esh.
2:222: Ḥöga khöttu tsara zudariyn ts'ano yokharkh‚ aḥ āla: "Iza bāla ḥegar du". Ts'ano yökhnachu khenaḥ zudarekh dʿaq'asta‚ tsarna gerga ma ġo, üsh ts'anballalts. Üsh ts'anbelcha‚ ġuo tsarna ullo‚ Dala shayna ma ḥekhkhara. Bakq'alla a, tsu Dalla ma beza tōba dinarsh‚ Tsunna ma beza ts'ena bersh.
2:223: Shun zudariy – shun /okhanan/ are sanna bu /shuna/. Shayn /okhanan/ arenga ġo shayna ma lüu. /Dikanig/ ḥalkha dakqa shayna. Delakh qera‚ shuna khaa shu Tsunna düḥalqetarg khilar. Aḥ qaʾ bakqa iyman dillincharna.
2:224: I Dela shayn duyniyn ʿalasho ma khiliyta dikanig tsa dan a‚ /Delakh/ tsa qera a /vonig desh/‚ nakhana yukq'eḥ maslaḥat tsa dan a. I Dela khezash verg a‚ khuush verg a vu.
2:225: Dala bekhke tsa lotsu shu dässa duynekh‚ shun dagaḥ dotsush i khilleḥ‚ amma Tso bekhke lotsu shu shun degnasha dinchunna. I Dela gechdesh a‚ sobare a ma vu /Shen leshna q'inosh ma dinneḥ ʿazap tsa desh, tsarna tōba dan (dokhko dovla) khan lush/.
2:226: Shayn zudarshna gerga ġur dats älla duy biincharna t'eḥ du bea battaḥ larvalar. T'akqa üsh dokhkobovlaḥ – i Dela gechdesh verg a‚ q'inkhetame verg a vu.
2:227: Nagaḥ sanna zudariy bita satsam tseran khilaḥ – i Dela khezash a‚ khuush a vu.
2:228: Bitina bolu zudariy ḥovsur bu quzza «q'irʾ» cheqʾyalare. Megash dats tsarna shayn kiyraḥ Dala qöllinarg ḥuldan‚ shäsh Delakh a, t'äkhḥarchu diynakh a teshash belaḥ. Tseran maroyn baq'o yu üsh yukhaberzo tsu choḥ, üsh luush belaḥ maslaḥat dan‚ tseran (zudariyn) baq'onekh terra deqarsh a du dikantsa yuq'amettig lelayartsa.. Maroy darzheḥ tsaral laqara bu. I Dela sha veza verg a‚ ḥeq'ale verg a vu.
2:229: Q'astar shozza du‚ tsul t'äḥa – niysontsa yukhaerzor yu /zuda/‚ ya dikantsa dʿayokhüytur yu. Shuna ḥanal dats ash dʿadellachukh hxumma yukhaetsa. Megar du üsh qörush khilaḥ Delan dozanash tsa lardarna. Shu qörush delaḥ tsara shimmo a Delan dozanash tsa lardarna‚ tsarna shinna a q'a dats zuda mekhakh parġat yalcha. Üsh du Delan dozanash‚ üsh dōkha ma delash. Delan dozanash dōkhosh bersh – üsh zulam desh bersh bu.
2:230: Nagaḥ sanna zuda yitaḥ /quzza/‚ tsul t'äḥa tsunna i ḥanal yats‚ qechünga i mare yodaḥ ben. T'akqa tso (i sholġa yakhancho) i yiticha‚ tsu shinna a q'a dats shäsh tsḥänaqetcha‚ shayna Delan dozanash larlur du älla khetaḥ. Üsh du Delan dozanash‚ Tso bilgaldesh dolu khuush bolchu nakhana.
2:231: Ash zudariy /tsq'a ya shozza/ bitina bolush‚ tseran khan t'eqächcha – sovtsabe üsh dikachu aġontsa‚ ya dʿabakhiyta üsh dikachu aġontsa. Ash ma sovtsabe üsh zulamtsa – t'akqa ash dozanash talkhor du. I dēcho shena zulam do. Delan ayatash zabare ma lera. Ash dagadaiyta shayna khilla dolu Delan niʿmat a‚ Tso shetsa shuna ḥekham besh dolu Sha shüga dossiyna dolu zhayna a‚ /shuna della dolu/ ḥeq'alalla a. Shu Delakh qera‚ shuna khaalash i Dela masso a hxuma khuush vuyla.
2:232: Ash zudariy bitina‚ tseran khan gergaqächcha‚ ash novq'arlo ma elash tsarna shayn maroshka yukhaberzan‚ üsh vovshashna reza khilleḥ dikachu aġontsa. I ḥekham besh bu shuna‚ shukh Delakh a‚ t'äkhḥarchu diynakh a teshash volchunna. Iza ḥeq'ale a du shuna‚ ts'ena a du. I Dela khuush vu‚ shu khuush dats.
2:233: Nanosha daqadoyla shayn berash düzzina shina sharaḥ i daqadar qochushdan luush volchunna (marana). Shena ber dinchunna t'eḥ du – zudarshna daa hxuma a, t'edukha hxuma lattor niysontsa. Tsḥanna adamna t'edüllush dats shen nitsq' tsa qochurg. Nanna zen ma doyla shen ber baḥaneḥ‚ shena ber dinchunna (beran dena) a zen ma doyla shen ber baḥaneḥ. /Den/ irs ötsuchunna – tsünga terra (da velleḥ, tsu bero tsüngara etsnachu irsana yukq'era vaqochunna makh loyla beran veraso). Tsarna shinna a laaḥ daqor yuq'akhdakqa vovshiyn reza khilartsa a‚ dagabovlartsa a – q'a dats tsarna. Shuna laaḥ shayn berash daqo qin zuda lakha, shuna q'a dats ash tsunna makh belcha daggara. Shu Delakh qeralash‚ shuna khaalash i Dela ash diyrig gush vuyla.
2:234: Shukh dʿaqelkhina shayl bukha zudariy bitinarsh – tseran zudariy ḥovsur bu bea battaḥ a‚ itt diynaḥ a. I khan t'eqächcha‚ shuna q'a dats tsara shaykh dinarg baḥaneḥ dikantsa. I Dela ash diyrig dika khuush vu.
2:235: Q'a dats shuna /hxay bozhariy/ ash shayn zakhalo tsu zudarshka dʿaḥedicha a‚ ya q'ayladäkqina shaygaḥ diticha a. Dalla khäa, bakq'alla a, shuna üsh (zudariy) dagaboġur buyla. Mukhkha delaḥ a‚ vaʿda ma e tsarna q'aylakha‚ niysa dosh olush ben. I yalor ch'aġ ma de yazdinarg shen khanna t'eqachchalts. Shuna khaalash‚ i Dela khuush vuyla shun dagaḥ derg. Tsunakh larloyla shu. Shuna khaalash‚ i Dela gechdesh a‚ sobare (q'a dicha, taʿzar dar t'äḥatottush) a vuyla.
2:236: Q'a dats shuna ash zudariy biticha /tsärtsa makh ḥakhiynachul t'äḥa/ shäsh tsarna gergadakhana a dotsush, ya urdon makh khadiyna dʿabella a botsush. /Ishttachu ḥoleḥ i zudariy bitincho/ luo tsarna shayna paydenna tsḥatstsa hxuma: ḥal dolcho – shen tarone ḥäzhzhina, ḥal dotscho – shen tarone ḥäzhzhina, ġillaqtsa paydenna hxuma. Iza ḥaq' du hxor shen ʿamal dika khiliyta luuchu stagana t'eḥ.
2:237: Ash üsh (zudariy) bitaḥ‚ shayn tsärtsa gergadakhar a khilla dotsu‚ tq'a shayna urdon makh khadiyna bolu – shäsh khadiynachul akh urdon makh lur bu ash tsarna. Lur bats‚ nagaḥ tsara (zudarsha), ya zuda yalor-yitar shayn karaḥ dolchara /tsa bökhush/ bitaḥ. Ash makh tsa ötsush bitar (urdokh hxumma yukha tsadakqar) gerga du /Delakh/ qörush khilarna. Ash dits ma de vovshiy yukq'eḥ dolu dozalla. Bakq'alla a, i Dela ash diyrig gush vu.
2:238: Larde lamazash a‚ yukq'era lamaz a‚ dʿahxitta Dalla müt'aḥ khilla.
2:239: Shayna qeram khilaḥ – lamazash de shäsh /kogasht'aḥ/ ġash dölkhushsheḥ ya /tsḥana hxumanna t'e/khevshina dölkhushsheḥ. Shäsh qeramakh ḥalkhadevlcha‚ Dela ḥekhavelash‚ Tso shayna ʿamadesh ma-khillara shuna tsa khuush khillarg.
2:240: Shukh dʿaqelkhinchara shayl bukha zudariy a bitina, shayn zudarshna veset dina tsarna öshush dolu hxuma dütiyla tsḥa sho duzzalts. Üsh arabovlaḥ‚ shuna q'a dats tsara shaylaḥ dinchunna dikantsa. I Dela veza verg a‚ ḥeq'ale verg a vu.
2:241: Bitinchu zudarshna sovġat lur du khazachu ġillaqeḥ‚ Delakh qörucharna i dalar ḥaq' dolush.
2:242: Ishtta bilgaldokhu Dala shuna Shen ayatash shu ḥeq'ale khiliytarḥama.
2:243: Ḥuna tsa khaʾa /hxay Muḥammad/ balarkh qerabella shayn ts'enoshkara bevdda arabevlachu ezarnashna khillarg? Dala tsärga elira: "Le shu!" /Üsh belira/, t'akqa Tso üsh denbira. Bakq'alla a, i Dela q'inkhetam bolush ma vu nakhakh, amma duqakhbolchu nakha barkalla tsa olu.
2:244: Q'iysam lattabe Delan novq'aḥ. Shuna khaa‚ i Dela sha khezash verg a‚ khuush verg a vuyla.
2:245: Dalla khaza deqar dellarg milla velaḥ a‚ Tso masiyttaza alsamdokqur du tsunna i. I Dela sha ritsq' dʿaq'ovlush verg a vu‚ dʿakhötsush verg a vu‚ Tsünga shu dʿaderzor dolush a du.
2:246: Ḥöga tsa qächna Israilan k'entekh /tsḥana/ elasha Musal t'äḥa shayn paykhamare ällarg? "Vaiyta tkhuna pachchaḥ‚ okha Delan novq'aḥ t'om biyr bu"-ma elira tsara. Tso elira: "Shu khila tarlo-te‚ shayna t'e t'om bar dillicha‚ i tsa ban dokhkush?" Tsara elira: "Okha hxunda tsa bo Delan novq'aḥ t'om‚ tkho tkheshan ts'enoshkara a, tkheshan dözalekh a aradäkhna khilcha?" Tsarna t'om bar t'edillicha‚ yukhabevlira üsh‚ tsarakh tsḥa k'ezzig bersh botsursh. I Dela bevzash ma vu zulam desh bersh.
2:247: Tseran paykhamara tsärga elira: "Dala vaiytina shuna T'alut‚ pachchaḥ khilla". Tsara elira: "Tso hxunda dan deza tkhuna t'eḥ pachchaḥalla? Tkho ḥaq' du tsul pachchaḥalla dan. Shortta däkhni a tsa della tsunna". Tso elira: "Dala i khärzhina shuna t'eḥ‚ Tso i sovväkqina ʿilmaneḥ a‚ deġeḥ a. Dala pachchaḥalla lush du Shena luuchunna. I Dela /Shen q'inkhetamtsa masso a/ chulotsush vu‚ Sha khuush a vu /i q'inkhetam ḥanakh ban beza/".
2:248: Tseran paykhamara tsärga elira: "Tsüngaḥ pachchaḥalla khilaran bilgalo yu shuna t'orkaz dartsa‚ shena choḥ shun Qiosh-Qobuchüngara sakinat dolush‚ Musan a‚ Hxarunan a dözalo bukhayitina tsḥatstsa hxumanash yolush- malikasha daḥar du iza". Bakq'alla a, tsu choḥ delil ma du shuna‚ shu muʾmanakh khilleḥ.
2:249: T'alut shen eskartsa aravälcha‚ tso elira: "Dala shu züyr dolush du khitsa: tsunakh khi mellarg sokh vats (san eskartsa ġazote ġur vats). Tsunakh cham tsa bäkqinarg‚ shen küyga etsna tsḥa kana dotsurg‚ i sokh vu (i ġur vu ġazote)". Tsara tsunakh khi melira‚ tsḥa k'ezzig bersh botsuchara. Iza (T'alut) a, tsüntsa /Delakh/ teshash khillarsh a dʿabakhcha‚ tsara elira: "Vayn nitsq' qochur bats takhana Dzhalutana a‚ tsünan eskarna a t'eḥ". Shäsh Dalla düḥalqetarg khilarkh teshnabolchara elira: "Mosazza zhimachu tobano yokqa toba eshiyna Delan laamtsa. Bakq'alla a, Dela ma vu sobare bolchärtsa".
2:250: Dzhalutana a‚ tsünan eskarna a üsh guchubevlcha‚ tsara elira: "Tkhan Qiosh-Qobush verg! Aḥ sobar lolaḥ tkhuna‚ ch'aġbelaḥ tkhan kogash‚ ġo delaḥ tkhuna tsa teshash dolchu q'omana t'eḥ tolam bakqa".
2:251: Delan laamtsa tsara üsh eshiyra. Davuda viyra Dzhalut. Dala tsunna pachchaḥalla a‚ ḥeq'alalla a delira‚ ʿamiyra tsunna Shena luurg. Dala nakh tsḥabersh vovshashtsa larbesh batsaḥara‚ latta galderadara (kerstanash tolartsa, busalbanash bayartsa, mäzhdigash dokhortsa), delaḥ a, i Dela vu komärshallin da derrige a ʿalamashna t'eḥ.
2:252: Üsh Delan ayatash du‚ Okha ḥuna döshush baq'ontsa. Bakq'alla a‚ ḥo ma vu /Dala/ bakhkiytincharekh.
2:253: Üsh bu elchanash. Okha tsarakh tsḥabersh vuqaral bazbina. Tsarakh vu Dala shetsa q'amel dinarg a‚ Tso aybina tsarakh tsḥabersh darzhashkaḥ. Okha elira Maryaman k'ante ʿiysaga a bilgalonash‚ ch'aġ a vira Okha i siydolchu sitsa. Dalla liʾna khilleḥara‚ t'om biyr batsara tsaral (elchanel) t'äḥa khillachara shayga bilgalonash dʿaqächnachul t'äḥa. Delaḥ a, tsḥa bart tsa khilla tseran – tsarakh bu tesharsh a‚ tsarakh bu tsatesharsh a. Dalla liʾna khilleḥara‚ t'om biyr batsara tsara‚ amma Dala do Shena lüurg.
2:254: Hxay iman dillinarsh! Kharzhash e /Delan novq'aḥ/ Okha shayna dellachu ritsq'anakh‚ shena choḥ yokhka-etsar a‚ dottaġalla a‚ shapaʿat a khir dotsu de t'eqachale. Tsatesharsh – üsh bu-q zulamkhoy.
2:255: Allahx (Shen ts'e yolu tsḥa Dela) vu – qin Dela vats I votsurg‚ diyna vu I‚ Sha dʿahxöttina vu‚ nab ozor a nab yar a dotsush. Tsünan du stiglanashkaḥ derg a‚ lättaḥ derg a. Tsḥa a ma vats Tsunna gergaḥ shapaʿat diyr dolush‚ Tsünan laamtsa ben. Tsaral ḥalkha khillarg khuush vu I‚ t'äḥa khinderg a /khuush/ vu. Tsünan ʿilmanan hxumanna a t'eqüur ma bats üsh, Tsunna luuchul ben. Shüyra khilla Tsünan kursiy stiglanash a, latta a chu lotsush. Üsh ʿalashʾyareḥ hxumma a khalo tsa khülu Tsunna, I leqa verg a‚ siylaḥ – veza verg a vu.
2:256: Nitsq' biyr bats dineḥ; niysa neq' q'astabella kharts neq'akh. T'aġutakh tsa teshash‚ Delakh teshnarg – i lättash vu sha khedar yotschu ch'oġachu üyratsa. I Dela sha khezash verg a vu‚ khuush verg a vu.
2:257: Dela vu teshash bolcheran vali. Tso üsh arabokhu bodanera serlonga. Tsa teshash bersh – tseran avliyaash t'aġutash du, tsara bokhu üsh serlongara bodane. üsh ma bu ts'eran day‚ üsh tsu choḥ guttar a lättar ma bu.
2:258: Ḥuna khaiy Ibrahximtsa i Qiosh-Qobuchukh lätsna q'üysush khillachukh‚ Dala shena pachchaḥalla della khillachu? Ibrahxima ällera: "San Qiosh-Qoburg vu Sha dendesh a‚ dolüytush a verg". Tso (Namruz- pachchaḥa) elira: "As den a do‚ dala a dolüytu". Ibrahxima elira: "Dala malkh boüytu malkhbaleḥakhula‚ aḥ baiytal i malkhbuzeḥakhula". T'akqa vüykhira tsatesharg. Dala nis tsa do zulame dolu q'am.
2:259: Ya /khäiy ḥuna/ tsḥana evlana ullokhula vöduchukh khillarg, tkhevnash t'e a khirtsina, yokhiyna khillachu? Tso elira: "Mukha denyiyr yu hxara Dala ellachul t'äḥa!?" Dala i valiytira bʿesharna‚ t'akqa denvira. Elira /Dala/: "Mel lättira ḥo?" Tso elira: "So lättira /vella/ tsḥana diynaḥ ya ekha diynaḥ". Tso (Dala) elira: "Hxan-hxa‚ ḥo lättira bʿesharaḥ‚ ḥo ḥazhal ḥayn qachane a‚ malare a – khiytsa tsa della üsh‚ ḥo ḥazhal ḥayn vire‚ Okha tsḥa delil khülüytur du ḥokh nakhana. Ḥazhal hxintsa däʿakhkashka‚ Okha üsh mukha denyo‚ t'akqa tsarna t'e dilkha düllu". I shena bilgaldällachul t'äḥa‚ tso elira: "Suna khäa Dela masso a hxumanna t'eḥ nitsq' qochush vuyla".
2:260: Ibrahxima ällera: "San Qiosh-Qoburg‚ gaytaḥ suna‚ Aḥ mukha denbo bellarsh". Tso (Dala) elira: "Ḥo tsa tesha tq'a?" Elira /Ibrahxima/: "Tesha‚ delaḥ a‚ dog ch'aġdaliytarḥama". /Dala/ elira: "Hxeta‚ sḥaetsa diʾ ḥoza‚ ḥayna t'edaladay‚ daq'osh de tsarakh. T'akqa hxor lamanna t'e tsḥatstsa daq'a dilla tsarakh‚ t'akqa üsh t'eqayqa ḥayna – sikhkha t'edoġur du ḥuna üsh‚ ḥo khuush khilalaḥ i Dela Sha veza verg a‚ ḥeq'ale verg a vuyla".
2:261: Shen dolaḥderg Delan novq'aḥ däkqinchun masal du‚ bürtigan masalkh tera: tso sḥabaliytina vorhx kan‚ hxor kena choḥ bʿe bürtig bolush. Tsu Dala alsam ma dokqu Shena luuchunna‚ i Dela shorto yolush verg a‚ khuush verg a ma vu.
2:262: Shayn dolaḥderg Delan novq'aḥ dokqush bersh‚ t'akqa shäsh däkqinchunna t'äḥa t'ekhdettarsh a‚ bekhkash a tsa dokhush‚ tsarna shayn mēla ma bu shayn Qiosh-Qobuchun gergaḥ. Qeram a khir ma bats tsarna‚ üsh singattame a khir ma bats.
2:263: Khaza dosh a‚ gechdar a tölush du shena t'äḥa bekhk bokqush dolchu saġanal‚ i Dela ḥal dolush a‚ sobare a ma vu.
2:264: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Hxallak ma de shayn saġanash t'ekhdettarshtsiy‚ bekhkashtsiy‚ sha Delakh a‚ t'äkhḥarchu /q'emat/diynakh a teshash a votsush, shen dolaḥderg nakhana gaytarḥama /saġina/ dokquchukh tera. Tsünan masal du shena t'eḥ latta dolchu sherachu t'ulgakh tera: shena t'e ch'oġa doġa dilkhicha - i bisira sherra /shena t'era latta dʿadälla/. Nitsq' qochur bats tsarna shäsh guldinchukh /tsḥa a/ hxumanakh /paydaetsa/. Dala nis tsa do tsa teshash dolu q'am.
2:265: Dela reza khilare dogdokhush, /iymana t'eḥ/ shäsh ch'aġdalarḥama shayn dōlaḥderg /saġina/ dokqucheran masal tera du basaḥ yolchu beshakh: shena t'e ch'oġa doġa dilkhicha‚ stömash dukqa alsambüylush. Ch'oġa doġa tsa daġaḥ a, doġa sersash, /tsunakh a toam khülush/. I Dela tsara lelorig gush ma vu.
2:266: Shuna tsḥanna a luur dariy shen khurmaniyn a‚ kemsiyn a besh khila‚ shena bukhakhula khish a lelash‚ masso a stom shena choḥ a bolush‚ t'akqa shen kegiy dözal a bolush i vokqa khilcha‚ choḥ ts'e yolu ch'oġa mokh bälla‚ tso i yagayan? Ishtta bilgaldokhu Dala shuna ayatash‚ shu khiliytarḥama oyla esh.
2:267: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Saġina lo‚ shayna karadeanachu ts'enchukh‚ Okha shayna lättakh sḥadaliytinchukh a. Ash saġa dokqush shun ʿalasho ma khüliyla bökhanig‚ asha a ötsur ma yatsara i /shayna elcha/ bʿärgash ḥabbiyna ben. Shuna khaalash‚ i Dela vuyla ḥal dolush a /Shena shun saġanash tsa öshush /‚ khastame a /dika ʿamal yinchunna khaza yal lush/ .
2:268: Shayt'ano qeramash tüysu shuna q'ölallitsa‚ ḥökhu shuna irchanig. Dala vaʿda yo shuna Shegara gechdar a‚ komärshalla a. I Dela /Shegaḥ/ shorto yolush a vu‚ khuush a vu.
2:269: Shena luuchunna ḥeq'alalla lush vu I‚ (Tso) shena ḥeq'alalla dellarg – shena dukqa a dikanash dellarg vu-q. Otsunakh oyla-m tsa yo kheq'aldolchara a ben.
2:270: Ash hxuma saġina elcha, ya mülkha nuzar dicha – bakq'alla a, Dela i dika khuush ma vu. Ma khir bats zulamkhoshna ġönchiy.
2:271: Ash saġanash /nakhana/ gush dākhaḥ – dika du iza. Ash üsh q'aylakha dākhaḥ‚ peq'arshna laḥ – i du shuna tölush derg‚ tso doyur du shuna shun vonash. I Dela ash diyrig dika khuush ma vu.
2:272: Ḥuna t'eḥ dats üsh niysachu novq'aḥ khilar‚ amma Dala nisvo Shena luurg. Ash saġina mel däkqinarg – shuna shayna du. Ash tsa dokqu i Delan yuḥe satüysush a ben. Ash mel däkqinchu saġina beqam khir bu shuna‚ zulam diyr dats shuna.
2:273: Peq'arashna /lo saġanash/‚ shäsh Delan novq'aḥ /shayn ch'aġonasha/ sovtsiyna bolchu‚ tsa qüu üsh lättakhula qersta. Tsakhuuchunna möttu üsh ḥal dolush bu‚ üsh /saġa/ tsa dökhush bolu dela. Ḥuna bevzar bu üsh shayn ʿalamatashtsa‚ t'ehxöttina /saġa/ tsa dökhu tsara nakhe. Mülkhkha a dikanig ash /saġina/ däkqicha – bakq'alla a, Dela i dika khuush ma vu shuna.
2:274: Shäsh shayn dōlaḥderg /saġina/ dokqush bersh busa a‚ diynaḥ a‚ q'aylakha a‚ gush a – tsarna shayn mēla khir bu shayn Qiosh-Qobuchun gergaḥ‚ tsarna qeram a khir ma bats‚ üsh singattame a khir ma bats.
2:275: Shäsh riba duush bersh ġovtur ma bats, sha shayt'ano ʿävdinarg ġottush sanna a ben. Iza du tsara alarna: "Yokhka-etsar ribakh tera du". Yokhka-etsar ḥanal dina Dala‚ riba ḥaram dina. Shega shen Qiosh-Qobuchüngara ḥekham a beʾna, setsnarg – tsunna ḥalkha dʿadakhnarg du‚ tsünan ġullaq Dele dʿadörzu. Yukha a tsunna t'evirzinarg – üsh ts'eran day bu‚ tsu choḥ üsh guttar lättar bu.
2:276: Dʿadoyu Dala riba‚ qiado saġanash. Tsu Dalla tsa veza masso a t'ekh tsatesharg a‚ q'inosh diyrig a.
2:277: Bakq'alla a, iyman dillinarsh, /t'akqa/ dika ʿamalsh yinarsh‚ lamaz hxottadesh bersh‚ zakat lush bersh – tsarna mēla bu shayn Qiosh-Qobuchun gergaḥ‚ qeram a khir ma bats tsarna‚ üsh singattame a khir ma bats.
2:278: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Qera Delakh‚ dita shäsh /yukhalurg dellachunna/ t'e dokqu riba‚ shäsh /Delakh/ teshash khilleḥ.
2:279: I ash tsa daḥ – Delera a‚ Tsünan elchanera a t'om qayqabe. Ash tōba daḥ – shuna shayn dōlaḥdolchun körteḥ khillarg du: ash zulam diyr dats /riba dökhush/ – shuna a zulam diyr dats /ash dellarg eshosh/.
2:280: Tsüngaḥ khalo khilaḥ – atta khillalts t'äḥatottur du /deqar sḥadekhar/‚ ash i /derrig ya tsunakh tsḥaderg/ saġina ditaḥ – dika du shuna‚ shu khuush khilleḥ.
2:281: Shu qera diynakh‚ shena choḥ shu Dalla t'e dʿadügur dolchu‚ t'akqa masso a sina sha karadinachüntsa beqam biyr bu‚ tsarna zulam diyr dats.
2:282: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Shäsh vovshashkara deqarsh ötsush ts'e tökhnachu khanna – dʿayazde üsh. Yazdoyla shuna yukq'eḥ yazdecho niysontsa. Yazdiyrig düḥal ma khüliyla yazdan‚ Dala sha ʿamiyna ma khillara. Tso yazdoyla‚ shena t'eḥ deqar dolcho dʿadüytsiyla. Delakh – shen Qiosh-Qobuchukh qöriyla i /kharts diytsa/‚ hxumma a ma eshadoyla tso tsunakh. Nagaḥ sanna i shena t'eḥ deqar derg khilaḥ t'alam botsush ya zäʿap‚ sha dʿadiytsa tsa lush‚ – tsünan veraso düytsiyla niysontsa. Shayn bozharekh shina teshe teshalla a dayta‚ shi börsha stag tsa khilaḥ – tsḥa börsha stag a‚ shi zuda a‚ shäsh tsarna teshash khila reza dolchu‚ tsarakh (zudarekh) tsḥaʾ tilalaḥ a – vuqo tsunna dagadoüytur du. Teshasha düḥalo ma yoyla /teshalla dan/ shäsh qayqinchu khenaḥ. Ash malo ma yoyla i /deqar/ dʿayazdan‚ zhima delaḥ a‚ dokqa delaḥ a shen khan t'eqachchalts. Iza melkho a niysa du Dalla gergaḥ‚ ch'oġa du teshallina‚ gerga du shuna sheko tsa khilareḥ. Nagaḥ i khilaḥ lättash yolu yokhka-etsar‚ ash vovshiy yukq'eḥ dʿaḥosh yolu‚ – i tsa yazdarkh q'a dats shuna. Teshash hxittabe shäsh yokhka-etsar esh. Yazdesh volchunna a zen ma doyla‚ teshana a. Ash i daḥ – i shütsa pesaq'alla khilar du. Shu qera Delakh‚ Dela shu ʿamadesh vu. I Dela masso a hxuma Sha khuush vu.
2:283: Shu novq'aḥ khilla‚ shuna yazdan stag tsa karavaḥ – kara hxuma lo zaq'altana. Shukh tsḥabolchara vuqarna teshamna hxuma elcha – shena teshamna ella hxuma yukhaerzayoyla tso‚ shen Delakh – shen Qiosh-Qobuchukh – qöriyla iza /i yukha tsa erzayan/. Ash ma ḥuldelash teshalla‚ i ḥuldiynarg – shen dago q'inosh diynarg vu. I Dela ash diyrig khuush ma vu.
2:284: Delan du stiglanashkaḥ derg a‚ lättaḥ derg a‚ ash guchudäkqicha a shaygaḥ derg‚ ya ḥuldicha a – i ḥesap diyr du shuna Dala. Shena luuchunna gechdiyr du Tso‚ Shena luuchunna ʿazap diyr du. I Dela masso a hxumanna t'eḥ nitsq' qochush ma vu.
2:285: Elcha tiyshira shen Qiosh-Qobuchüngara shega dossiynchukh‚ muʾmanakh a tiyshira. Masso a tiyshira Delakh a‚ Tsünan malikekh a‚ Tsünan zhaynekh a‚ Tsünan elchanekh a. /Olu muʾmanakha/: “Tsünan elchaniy yukq'era tsḥa a q'asta tsa vo okha”. T'akqa tsara elira: "Ladöġna okha‚ müt'aḥ khilla tkho. Aḥ gechdelaḥ tkhuna‚ tkhan Qiosh-Qoburg‚ Ḥöga du-q dʿaderzar".
2:286: 286. Sina t'e tsa düllu Dala tsunna nitsq' qochurg ben. Tsunna – sha karadiynarg du‚ tsunna dükhal a – sha karadiynarg du. "Tkhan Qiosh-Qoburg‚ Aḥ tkho bekhke ma latsalaḥ tkho ditsdelcha a‚ ya ġalatdälcha a. Tkhan Qiosh-Qoburg‚ Aḥ tkhuna t'e ma yillalaḥ khalo‚ Aḥ tkhol ḥalkhabakhancharna t'e yillarkh terra. Tkhan Qiosh-Qoburg‚ Aḥ tkhuna t'e ma dillalaḥ tkhuna shena t'eḥ nitsq' tsaqochurg‚ ḥalkhadakhalaḥ tkho‚ gechdelaḥ tkhuna‚ q'inkhetam a belaḥ tkhokh‚ Ḥo vu tkhan veras‚ ġo delaḥ tkhuna tsa teshachu q'omana t'eḥ". (Ishtta dekha bokhu Dala muʾmanakhe).
3:2: Allahx /tsḥa Dela/ vu‚ qin dela vats I ben‚ Sha diyna vu‚ guttar lättash vu /Shen leyn ġullaqash qochushdesh/.
3:3: Tso ḥöga dissiyna ḥaq'-baq' a dolush‚ shel ḥalkha khillarg baq'desh a dolu zhayna (Q'urʾan). Tso dossiyna/Musaga/ Tavrat a, / ʿiysaga / Inzhil a
3:4: Ḥalkha niysa neq' khilla dolu nakhana‚ Tso dossiyna Furq'an. Bakq'alla a, Delan ayatekh tsa teshash bersh – tsarna ma du ch'oʿa ʿazap. I Dela ma vu sha veza verg – beqaman da.
3:5: Bakq'alla a, i Dela ma vu Shekh hxumma a q'aylaer yotsush, lättaḥ a, stiglaḥ a.
3:6: I vu shu kepe derziyna beran ts'a choḥ (nenan kiyraḥ) Shena ma luʾu‚ qin dela vats I ben‚ Sha veza verg a‚ ḥeq'ale verg a vu I.
3:7: I vu ḥöga zhayna dossiynarg‚ tsünakh du ḥikmate ayatash – üsh (ḥikmatenash) zhaynin nana yu‚ qidersh – tsḥaterranash du. Amma shayn degnashkaḥ dʿatovzhar dersh – üsh t'äḥahxüttu tsu chüra (Delan sibat) tsḥana hxumanekh tardesh dolcharna pitana lökhush a‚ üsh dasta ġertash a. Üsh dasta ma tsa khäa Dalla Shena ben. Shäsh ʿilmanchoḥ k'argbellachara olu: "Teshna tkho tsunakh‚ derrige a du tkhan Qiosh-Qobuchüngara". Oyla-m tsa yo shayn ḥeq'al dolchara ben.
3:8: /Olu iyman dillinchara/: "Tkhan Qiosh-Qoburg‚ Aḥ tkhan degnash dʿa ma tovzhadelaḥ, Ayḥa tkho nisdinchul t'äḥa‚ Ḥaygara q'inkhetam lōlaḥ tkhuna‚ bakq'alla a, Ḥo ma vu /shortta/ lush verg‚
3:9: Tkhan Qiosh-Qoburg‚ Ḥo ma vu nakh gulbiyr berg shegaḥ sheko yotschu /q'emat/ denna‚ bakq'alla a, Dala tsa yokhayo vaʿda".
3:10: Bakq'alla a, tsateshnarsh – tseran bakhamo a‚ tseran dözalo a Delera (Tsünan ʿazapakh) hxumma a ḥalkhabokhur ma bats üsh. Üsh ma bu /zhözhakhatin/ ts'eran yagorig.
3:11: Firʿavnan dözalan ʿadatakh terra‚ tsaral ḥalkha khillacheran ʿadatakh terra: khartsdira tsara Tkhan ayatash – Dala sḥaletsira üsh shayn q'inosh baḥaneḥ. I Dela taʿzar dareḥ ch'oġa ma vu.
3:12: Aḥ āla tsateshnachärga: "Eshor a du shu‚ zhözhakhatina chu lokhkur a du shu". – Ma von mott bu-q iza.
3:13: Shuna delil dara-q vovshashna düḥ-düḥal yakhna khillachu shina tobaneḥ: tsḥa toba t'om besh Delan novq'aḥ‚ vazha – tsateshash erg. Tsarna üsh guora shayl shozza alsam bʿärgatsa. Dala ch'aġvo Shen ġöntsa Shena luurg. Bakq'alla a, tsu choḥ ḥekham ma bu bʿärsadolcharna.
3:14: Nakhana khazbina bezam zudarshka a‚ k'entashka a‚ t'ett'a guldinchu deshiga a‚ detiga a‚ vast dolchu govrashka a‚ däkhniga a‚ yaltiga a – iza dünenan dakharan bakham bu‚ tq'a Dalla gergaḥ ma yu khaza dʿavörziyla.
3:15: Aḥ āla: "As diytsiy shuna tsul dikanig?" /Delakh/ qörush bolcharna shayn Qiosh-Qobuchunna gergaḥ boshmash yu‚ bukhakhula khish a ökhush‚ gutarenna a tsu choḥ khir bu üsh‚ ts'ena zudariy a bu‚ Delera reza khilar a du. I Dela gush ma vu Shen lesh‚
3:16: Shäsh olush bolu: "Tkhan Qiosh-Qoburg! Okha, bakq'alla a, iyman dillina‚ Aḥ gechdelaḥ tkhan q'inosh‚ Aḥ ḥalkhadakhalaḥ tkho ts'eran ʿazapakh"‚ –
3:17: Shäsh sobare bolush‚ baq'derg düytsush‚ Dalla müt'aḥ bolush‚ /dikchu aġor/ kharzhash esh‚ gechdar dökhush satasale.
3:18: Dala teshalla dina tsḥa a dela tsakhilarna‚ I Sha ben‚ malikasha a‚ ʿilma dolchu nakha a dina /teshalla/‚ niysonna t'ehxöttina vollush vu Iza‚ qin dela vats I ben‚ Sha veza verg a‚ ḥeq'ale verg a vu Iza.
3:19: Bakq'alla a, din Dalla gergaḥ islam du. Shayga zhayna dellarsh beq'a tsa belira shayga ʿilma deʾnachul t'äḥa ben vovshashna yukq'eḥ ḥaġ qollayalartsa. Delan ayatash khartsdesh milla velaḥ - Dela ma vu ḥesap dareḥ sikhanig.
3:20: Tsara ḥaytsa q'iysaḥ‚ aḥ āla: "As müt'aḥ yina sayn yuḥ Dalla‚ suna t'äḥahxöttincho a yina". Aḥ āla shayga zhayna dellachärga a‚ bodane bolchärga a: "Shu khilliy müt'aḥ?" Üsh müt'aḥ belaḥ‚ t'akqa üsh niysachu novq'aḥ bu‚ üsh dʿaberzaḥ – ḥuna t'eḥ dʿaqachorben dats. I Dela ma vu Shen lesh gush verg.
3:21: Bakq'alla a, Delan ayatash khartsdesh bersh‚ tsḥa a baq'o yotsush paykhamarsh boyush bersh, nākhakh shayga niyso e olursh boyush bersh – tsarna aḥ qeram tasalaḥ lazosh dolchu ʿazaptsa.
3:22: Üsh ma bu shayn ʿamalsh yaynarsh dünenaḥ a‚ ekhartaḥ a - tsarna ġönchiy /khir/ ma bats!
3:23: Ḥuna tsa gina i shayga Zhaynin tsḥa dāq'a dellarsh – üsh Delan Zhayne qayqicha vovshashna yukq'eḥ ḥukam dan‚ tsarakh tsḥa toba dʿayörzu‚ düḥal a khülush.
3:24: Iza du tsara olu dela: "/Zhözhakhatin/ts'aro sḥalotsur dats tkho tsḥa masiytta denna ben". Shäsh shayn dineḥ kharts qullush dolcho ch'oġa tiliyna üsh.
3:25: Mukha khir du Okha üsh gulbinchu khenaḥ shegaḥ sheko yotschu /q'emat/ denna‚ masso a sinna sha karadinachüntsa beqam bicha‚ shayna tsḥa a zulam a diyr dotsush?
3:26: Aḥ āla: "Hxay Dela‚ pachchaḥalla Ḥayn dōlaḥ dolush volu‚ Ḥayna luuchunna lo-q Aḥ pachchaḥalla‚ Ḥayna luuchüngara sḥadokqu Aḥ pachchaḥalla‚ Ḥayna luurg vazvo Aḥ‚ Ḥayna luurg siysazvo. Ḥan karaḥ du-q dikanash. Bakq'alla a, Ḥo ma vu masso a hxumanna t'eḥ nitsq' berg.
3:27: Büysa denna chu yokhüytu Aḥ‚ de büysanna chu dokhüytu Aḥ‚ vellachukh diynaverg sḥavokqu Aḥ‚ diynavolchukh vellarg sḥavokqu Aḥ‚ ritsq' lo Aḥ Ḥayna luuchunna tsḥa a ḥesap dotsush".
3:28: Muʾmanakha ma lötsiyla tsatesharsh ġönchiy /qechu/ muʾma nakhana düḥal. I dinarg vats Delera /tsḥanna a/ hxumanna t'eḥ‚ shu tsarakh (kerstanekh) qeranne a qörush datsaḥ. (Shayna qerame delaḥ – latsa). Dala shu lardo Shetsa. Dele ma du dʿaderzar.
3:29: Aḥ āla: "Ash ḥuldaḥ a shayn degnashkaḥ derg‚ guchudakqaḥ i – Dela i khuush vu. I khuush vu stiglanashkaḥ a‚ lättaḥ a derg. I Dela masso a hxumanna t'eḥ nitsq' qochush ma vu.
3:30: Otsu diynaḥ masso a sinna shena ḥalkhaḥ karor du sha dina dikanig. Sha dinchu vochunna a, shena a yukq'eḥ genara khan (yokqa yuq') khüliyla luur dara tsunna. Dala lardo shu Shetsa. I Dela q'inkhetame vu leshtsa".
3:31: Aḥ āla: "Shu Dela vezash delaḥ‚ suna t'äḥahxitta – Dalla dezar du shu‚ shuna gechdiyr du Tso shun q'inosh"‚ – i Dela gechdesh verg a‚ q'inkhetame verg a vu.
3:32: Aḥ āla: "Müt'aḥ khila Dalla a‚ elchanna a". Üsh dʿaberzaḥ (aḥ shayga qoyquchüngara) - Dalla tsa beza tsatesharsh.
3:33: Bakq'alla a, Dala khärzhira Ādam a‚ Nuḥ a‚ Ibrahximan dözal a‚ ʿimranan dözal a ʿalamel,
3:34: Tsḥabersh vuqeran zürret a dolush‚ i Dela khezash verg a‚ khuush verg a vu.
3:35: /Aḥ ḥakhade tsärga, hxay Muḥammad/ ʿimranan zudcho ällera: "San Qiosh-Qoburg‚ as Ḥuna nuzar (nigat) dina-q, sayn kiyraḥ derg, masso a hxumanakh parġat a däkqina, q'obaldeḥa sögara. Bakq'alla a, Ḥo khezash verg a‚ khuush verg a vu-q".
3:36: Sha ber dina yalcha /tso/, elira: "San Qiosh-Qobushverg‚ asa-m yoʿ yina".- I Dela dika khuush ma vu‚ tso mila yina.- "Börshanig ma tsa khülu stenig sanna. As tsunna ts'e tillina Maryam‚ as iza a‚ tsünan zürret a Ḥötsa lardo, t'ulgash dettash, ekqosh dolchu shayt'anakh".
3:37: Dala t'eiytsira tsünan i khazchu q'obaldartsa. Khaza a, ts'ena a qiira Tso i (Maryam)‚ tsünan doladar t'edillira Zakariyna. I yolchu miḥraba chu ma-velli‚ Zakariyna tsunna (Maryamna) ḥalkhaḥ ritsq' karadora. Tso olura: "Maryam‚ hxara michaḥara du ḥuna?" Tso (Maryama) olura: "Hxara Delera du. Bakq'alla a, i Dela ritsq' lush ma vu Shena luuchunna, ḥesap dotsush".
3:38: Tsigaḥ diykhira Zakariys shen Qiosh-Qobuchünga. Tso elira: "San Qiosh-Qobushverg‚ lōḥa suna Ḥaygara ts'ena zürret‚ bakq'alla a‚ Ḥo ma vu (Ḥayga) dekhar khezash".
3:39: Tsünga qayqira malikasha‚ i lamazna hxöttina miḥraba choḥ a volush: "Dala qaʾ bokqu ḥöga Yaḥʾyatsa (i ts'e yolu k'ant valartsa)‚ sha Delan Dosh baq'desh, sha ela a, sha vochukh larlush volu q'onakh a‚ sha dikacharekh paykhamar a khir volchu".
3:40: Tso elira: "San Qiosh-Qobushverg‚ michara khir vu suna k'ant? So vokqa a ma khilla‚ san zuda a ma yu ber tsa khülush". Tso (Dala) elira: "Ishtta Dala do Shena luurg".
3:41: Tso (Zakariys) elira: "San Qiosh-Qobushverg‚ tsḥa delil khiliytaḥ suna". /Dala/ elira: "Ḥan delil du ḥo nakhe qaa diynaḥ vist tsakhilar ishartsa ben‚ ḥan Qiosh-Qobushverg ḥekhave dukqa a‚ khastave I saraḥ a‚ ʿüyranna a".
3:42: Malikasha ällera: "Hxay Maryam‚ bakq'alla a, Dala khärzhina ḥo‚ Tso ts'anyina ḥo‚ Tso ḥo khärzhina (masso a) ʿalamiyn zudarel (ḥan kiyrara, börsha stag ḥaqavella a votsush, k'ant dünen chu ver volush).
3:43: Hxay Maryam‚ müt'aḥ khila ḥayn Qiosh-Qobuchunna‚ suzhud a de‚ gor a hxotta gorhxüttuchärtsa".
3:44: Iza du ḥulaman khabarekh, shäsh ḥuna khoüytush dolchu. Ḥo vatsara üsh bolchoḥ‚ tsara shayn q'olamash qüssush‚ mülkhacho dola diyr du Maryaman‚ ḥo vatsara üsh bolchoḥ tsara q'üysuchu khenaḥ.
3:45: Malikasha ällera: "Hxay Maryam‚ bakq'alla a, Dala qaʾ bokqush bu ḥuna Shegara Dashtsa - shen ts'e Ḥäkhnarg‚ Maryaman k'ant ʿiysa a yolush (dözalkhochüntsa)‚ sha dünenaḥ a‚ ekhartaḥ a siy dolush khinvolchu‚ sha /Dalla/ gergarcharekh khinvolchu.
3:46: Nakhatsa khabar düytsur du tso agana choḥ a‚ vokqa khilcha a, dikacharekh khir vu iza".
3:47: Tso )Maryama( elira: "San Qiosh-Qoburg, michara khir vu san dözalkho‚ sokh /tsḥa a/ adam ḥaqa- della a tsa khilcha?" Elira /malikasha/: "Ishtta Dala qullu Shena luurg. Shena tsḥa ġullaq t'eḥ satsam khilcha‚ Tso ōlu tsünga: "Khila!" – I khülu".
3:48: Tso ʿamor du tsunna )ʿiysana( yoza a‚ ḥeq'alalla a, Tavrat a‚ Inzhil a.
3:49: Elcha (viyr vu Dala tsunakh) Israilan k'entashka", /sha olush:/ "So veana shüga shun Qiosh-Qobuchüngara delilatsa‚ as qullu shuna popparkh ḥozan sürteḥ hxuma, hxup olu tsu chu – khülu ḥoza Delan purbantsa‚ as taviyr vu bʿärsa dotsurg‚ burs tsamgar erg a‚ bellarsh a denbiyr bu Delan purbantsa‚ as düytsur du shuna ash yuuchukh a‚ ash shayn ts'enoshkaḥ ʿalashdesh dolchukh a lätsna. Bakq'alla a, tsu choḥ delil du shuna‚ shu muʾmanakh delaḥ.
3:50: Baq'dan /veana so/ sol ḥalkha khilla Tavrat‚ ḥanal dan shuna /Tavrata choḥ/ ḥaram khilla dolchekh tsḥadersh‚ – so veana shüga shun Qiosh-Qobuchüngara delilashtsa – Delakh qera‚ suna müt'aḥ khila.
3:51: Bakq'alla a, i Dela san Qiosh-Qoburg a vu‚ shun Qiosh-Qoburg a vu‚ Tsunna ʿibadat deysha – i bu niysa neq'", /ʿiysas er du i deshnash/.
3:52: ʿiysas shena tsärgara tsateshar khaadelcha‚ elira: "Mülsh bu san ġönchiy Deleḥa?" Ḥavariysha elira: "Tkho du Delan ġönchiy‚ Delakh teshna tkho‚ aḥ teshalla de tkho müt'aḥ dersh (busalbanash) du‚ aliy.
3:53: Tkhan Qiosh-Qoburg! Tkho teshna-q Aḥ dossiynachukh‚ tkho t'äḥahxittina elchanna – Aḥ dʿayazde tkho teshalla dinchärtsa".
3:54: /Tsateshachara/ mekarlo yira‚ /tseran mekarlonna düḥal/ Dala a yira mekarlo. /Mekarlona düḥal/ Dela mekarlo dika esh vu.
3:55: Dala ällera: "Hxay ʿiysa‚ As ḥo dʿaqalkho‚ Sayna gerga ḥalavokqu (sitsa a, deġatsa a)‚ ts'anvo ḥo tsateshacharekh (ḥo paykhamar khilarkh). So latto vollu ḥuna t'äḥahxittinarsh tsateshacharna t'eḥ q'ematde dallalts. T'akqa Suna t'e khir du shun dʿaderzar. As qel yiyr yu shuna yuq'aḥ‚ ash khilpalo esh khillachunna t'eḥ.
3:56: Tq'a tsateshnarsh – As tsarna ʿazap diyr du ch'oġachu ʿazaptsa dünenaḥ a‚ ekhartaḥ a – ma khir bats-q tsarna ġönchiy".
3:57: Amma iyman dillinarsh a‚ dikanash dinarsh a - tsarna shayn qochchush yal dʿalur yu Tso. Dalla tsa beza zulamkhoy.
3:58: I du Okha ḥuna döshush derg ayatekh a‚ ḥeq'ale ḥekhamakh a.
3:59: Bakq'alla a‚ ʿiysan masal Dalla gergaḥ Ādaman masalkh tera du: Tso i qöllira lättakh‚ t'akqa elira tsünga "Khila!" – i khilira.
3:60: Baq'derg du i ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchüngara – ḥo ma khilalaḥ sheko echarakh.
3:61: Ḥayga khaam beʾnachul t'äḥa tsunakh lätsna ḥaytsa q'üysush bolchärga āla: "Dülo‚ qoyqu vay tkhan k'entashka a‚ shun k'entashka a‚ tkhan zudarshka a‚ shun zudarshka a‚ tkhöga tkhayga a‚ shüga shayga a‚ t'akqa doʿanash der vay‚ Delan neʿalt är vay khartslüycharna".
3:62: Bakq'alla a, hxara du baq'dolu khabar. Vats tsḥa a dela‚ sha Allahx (ts'e yolu i tsḥa Dela) a ben. Bakq'alla a, i Dela sha veza verg a‚ sha ḥeq'ale verg a vu.
3:63: Üsh dʿaberzaḥ (aḥ düytsurg q'obal tsa desh) – i Dela khuush (gush) vu bökhanig lelosh bersh.
3:64: Aḥ āla: "Hxay zhaynin ohxla‚ düyla tkhuna yuq'aḥ a‚ shuna yuq'aḥ a tsḥaʾ dolchu dashna t'e: "ʿibadat diyr dats vay tsḥana Dalla ben‚ Tsüntsa naq'ost lotsur vats vay tsḥana a hxumantsa‚ i Dela a vitina, vaykh tsḥabolchara vuqarakh deliy lötsur bats". Üsh dʿaberzaḥ, ash āla: "Ash teshalla de tkho /Dalla/ müt'aḥ dersh khilarna".
3:65: Hxay zhaynin ohxla‚ ash hxunda q'üysu Ibrahximan ḥoq'eḥ? Tavrat a‚ Inzhil a ma tsa dossiyna tsul t'äḥa a ben - ash oyla tsa yo?
3:66: Hxay shu, ma du q'iysameḥ khillarsh shaygaḥ ʿilma dolchoḥ a /Musan a, ʿiysan a ġullaqashkaḥ/. Hxunda q'üysu ash shaygaḥ ʿilma dotsuchukh mukhkhale a? I Dela khuush vu‚ shu tsa khuush du.
3:67: Tsa khilla Ibrahxim zhügti a‚ nasari a – i khilla ts'ena teshash verg a‚ müt'aḥ verg a‚ i tsa khilla mushrikekh a.
3:68: Bakq'alla a‚ Ibrahximtsa tam bolu nakh bu – tsunna t'äḥahxittina khilla bersh a‚ hxara paykhamar a‚ teshash bersh a. I Dela ma vu teshash bolcheran vali (dottaġ).
