3:69: Liira zhaynin ohxlanakh tsḥana tobanna shu tilo (niysachu neq'akh)‚ tilor-m dats tsara shäsh ben - am tsarna i tsa khaalo-q.
3:70: Hxay zhaynin ohxla‚ ash hxunda khartsdo Delan ayatash‚ shayna khuusheḥ /üsh baq' duyla/?
3:71: Hxay zhaynin ohxla‚ hxunda vovshakhʾedo ash baq'derg khartsdolchüntsa‚ baq'derg ḥuldesh du shu, shayna khuʾusheḥ.
3:72: Zhaynin ohxlanan tsḥana tobano (zhügtiyn dineḥ khillachara vovshashka) elira: "Shu tesha teshnachärga dossiyna dolchukh diynan yukhḥeḥ‚ khartsde tsünan /diynan/ chaqengaḥ /dissinarsh/‚ üsh /busalbanash/ dʿaberza tarlo /shayn dinakh/.
3:73: Shu ma teshalash shayn dinna t'äḥahxuttush volchukh ben". Aḥ āla: "Niysa neq' bu Delan niysa neq'" – "Shüga dellachukh teranig qechünga dala /tam bats Dala/‚ ya shütsa q'üysu tsara shun Qiosh-Qobuchun gergaḥ?" Āla: "Bakq'alla a, dozalla Delan karaḥ du‚ I lush vu i Shena luuchunna". I Dela Shegaḥ shortta /dollu hxuma/ dolush a vu‚ khuush a vu.
3:74: Shen q'inkhetamtsa q'astavo Tso Shena luurg‚ i Dela Shen siylaḥ-dokqa dozalla dolush vu!
3:75: Zhaynin ohxlanakh vu aḥ shena tsḥa q'int'ar delcha‚ shekh teshna‚ iza ḥöga yukhaderzosh verg‚ tsarakh vu aḥ shekh teshna‚ shega tsḥa dinar delcha a‚ iza ḥöga yukha tsa derzosh verg a‚ ḥo shena t'ehxöttina lätticha ben. Iza du tsara olu dela: "Tkhuna bodane nakhalaḥ neq' bats". Dalla t'eḥ khartsderg olu tsara, shayna khuʾusheḥ.
3:76: Hxaʾ‚ sha della dosh qochushdinarg a, sha /Delakh/ qiyrinarg a (shekh bina teshamna yamart tsakhillarg a – üsh bu niysachu novq'aḥ) – bakq'alla a, tsu Dalla ma beza /Shekh/ qörush bersh.
3:77: Bakq'alla a, Delan vaʿdanakh a‚ shayn duynekh a k'ezzig makh etsnarsh (dünenan bakham baḥaneḥ üsh dokhadesh)‚ ekhartaḥ dāq'a ma dats tsarna‚ Dela tsärga vistkhir ma vats‚ tsärga ḥozhur ma vats Iza q'ematdiynaḥ‚ ts'anbiyr ma bats Tso üsh‚ tsarna lazosh dolu ʿazap a ma du.
3:78: Bakq'alla a, tsarakh ma yu tsḥa toba shayn mettanashtsa khüytsush /Delan/ zhayna‚ iza shuna /Delan/ zhaynakh du mottiyta. Ma dats i /Delan/ zhaynakh. Tsara olu: "I Delera du", ma dats i Delera. Üsh olush bu-q Dalla t'eḥ khartsderg‚ shayna khuʾusheḥ.
3:79: Adamna tam bats Dala shega zhayna a‚ ḥukam a‚ paykhamaralla a delcha‚ āla nakhe: "Shu khila san lesh‚ Dela a vitiy". Mukhkha delaḥ a‚ tam bu tsara āla: "Shu khila shäsh zhayna /nakhana/ ʿamosh khilartsa‚ shäsh iza /shayna/ ʿamadesh khilartsa k'orggera ʿelamnakh".
3:80: Tso shüga omra dan tam bats malikekh a‚ paykhamarekh a delanash letsa‚ älla. Tq'a tso shüga omra diyr du, ma tesha, älla‚ shu müt'aḥ khillachul t'äḥa?
3:81: Dala bart bira paykhamarshtsa: "Hxara As shüga dellarg du zhaynakh a‚ ḥeq'alallakh a. T'akqa voġur vu shüga elcha‚ shügaḥ derg baq'desh volu. Shu bilggala teshar du tsunakh‚ ash tsunna ġo a diyr du". /Dala/ elira: "Ash ch'aġdiriy‚ iytsiriy ash tsunna t'eḥ San vaʿda?" Tsara elira: "Ch'aġdina okha". Elira /Dala/: "Teshalla de‚ So a vu shütsa teshalla desh bolcharekh".
3:82: Tsul t'äḥa yukhabevllarsh – üsh ma bu pesaq'ash.
3:83: Tq'a Delan din /Islam/ dütiy, qin din lökhu tsara (zhaynin ohxlano)? Tsunna (Dalla) müt'aḥ ma vu stiglanashkaḥ a‚ lättaḥ a mel verg, shena luush a‚ tsa luush a‚ Tsünga üsh dʿaberzor bolush a ma bu.
3:84: Aḥ āla: "Teshna du tkho Delakh a‚ tkhöga dossiynchukh a‚ Ibrahxime a‚ Ismaʿile a‚ Isḥaq'e a‚ Yaʿq'ube a‚ tsünan berashka dossiynachukh a‚ Musaga a‚ ʿiysaga a, /qechu/ paykhamarshka a shayn Qiosh-Qobuchüngara dellachukh a. Tsarakh tsḥa a q'asta tsa vo okha‚ tkho Tsunna (Dalla) müt'aḥ du".
3:85: Islam dotsurg /qin/ din dezash verg – q'obaldiyr dats iza tsüngara‚ ekhartaḥ iza eshnacharekh ma vu.
3:86: Mukha nisdiyr du Dala shäsh iyman dillinchul t'äḥa a, /Muḥammad/ elcha baq'khilaran teshallash ginchul t'äḥa a, shayga bilgalonash eʾnachul t'äḥa a kerstanalla dina dolu q'am? Tsu Dala nis ma tsa do zulame q'am.
3:87: Üsh bu shayna beqam Delan a‚ malikiyn a‚ masso a nekhan a neʿalt dersh.
3:88: Guttar lättar bolush bu üsh tsu /neʿalta/ choḥ. Oyur dats tsarna t'era ʿazap‚ t'äḥa a tottur bats üsh‚ –
3:89: Tsul t'äḥa tōba dinarsh a, t'akqa dika ʿamalsh yinarsh a ben. Bakq'alla a‚ i Dela gechdesh verg a‚ q'inkhetame verg a ma vu.
3:90: Bakq'alla a, shäsh iyman dillinchul t'äḥa tsa teshash khillarsh‚ t'akqa tsateshartsa sovbüylush bersh – tseran tōba q'obaldiyr ma dats. Üsh ma bu tilbellarsh.
3:91: Bakq'alla a, /Muḥammad elcha khilarna/ inkarlo yinarsh‚ /t'akqa otsu/kerstanallina t'eḥ bellarsh – tsarakh tsḥängara a dʿaötsur ma dats latta düzzina deshi‚ nagaḥ sanna tsara delcha a. Tsarna lazosh dolu ʿazap ma du. Ma bats tsarna ġönchiy.
3:92: Tsq'a a mela qochur bats shuna, ash saġina lush yolu hxuma shayna ezachukh elcha a ben. Ash saġina lush yolu hxuma – bakq'alla a, Dela i khuush ma vu.
3:93: Masso a qacha ḥanal khilla Israilan k'entashna‚ Israila shen deġana sha ḥaram bina botsurg‚ Tavrat dossale ḥalkha. Aḥ āla: "Tavrat doḥush düyla‚ desha i, shäsh baq'lüysh delaḥ".
3:94: Tsul t'äḥa Dalla t'eḥ khartsderg qöllinarsh – üsh bu zulamkhoy.
3:95: Aḥ āla: "Baq'liyna Dela‚ shu t'äḥahxitta Ibrahximan millatana‚ sha baq'-ts'ena teshash khilla volchu. Tsa khilla i /Delatsa/ naq'ost lötsucharekh".
3:96: Bakq'alla a, nakhana /ʿibadat dan/ hxottiyna khilla dolu dükhḥarlera ts'a- du Bakkateḥ derg: berkate a‚ niysa neq' a laralush masso a ʿalamashna.
3:97: Tsu choḥ bilggala ayatash du: Ibrahximan mettig. Tsunna chöḥa vällarg märsha khilla. Nakh Dalla deqar bu ḥäzhalla dekhka‚ shayn neq'atsa nitsq' qachaḥ. Milla a teshash vatsaḥ – i Dela tsḥa a ʿalam tsa khilcha a volu.
3:98: Aḥ āla: "Hxay zhaynin ohxla‚ shu hxunda tsa tesha Delan ayatekh‚ i Dela tesh ma vu ash desh dolchunna t'eḥ?"
3:99: Aḥ āla: "Hxay zhaynin ohxla‚ ash hxunda dʿatöttu Delan neq'a t'era iyman dillinarg? Shu du luush i gamban‚ shu shäsh ma duy /tsunna t'eḥ/ teshash". Ma vats i Dela tergal tsa desh ash desh derg.
3:100: Hxay iyman dillinarsh‚ shu shayga zhayna dellacheran /tsḥana/ tobanna müt'aḥ khilaḥ‚ tsara dʿaderzor du shu kerstanallina t'e, ash iyman dillinchul t'äḥa.
3:101: Shu mukha khülu tsa teshash – shuna t'eḥ döshush Delan ayatash ma du‚ shuna yukq'eḥ Tsünan elcha ma vu? Milla velaḥ a, Delatsa ch'aġvellarg – nisvella i niysachu novq'a.
3:102: Hxay iyman dillinarsh‚ qera Delakh khaq'-baq' qerartsa‚ shu dala ma loyla Tsunna müt'aḥ dolush ben.
3:103: Ch'aġlo Delan müshtsa masso a. Shu deq'a ma lo. Dagadaiyta shayna khilla Delan niʿmat: shu ma dara mostaġiy – shun degnash k'addiyra Tso‚ shukh khilira Tsünan niʿmattsa vezhariy. Shu ma dara ts'eran ora yistteḥ – Tso shu tsunakh k'elḥaradekhira. Ishtta bilgaldo Dala shuna Shen ayatash – shu nisdala tarlora.
3:104: Shukh khüliyla ummat‚ sha dikane qoyqush‚ dikanig ḥökhush‚ vochukh /nakh/ dukhatukhush. Üsh bu bakqiybiyr bersh.
3:105: Shu ma khilalash shayga bilgalonash eʾnachul t'äḥa beq'abellacharekh a‚ shayn bart tsakhillacharekh a tera. Tsarna – deza-dokqa ʿazap du.
3:106: Otsu /q'emat/diynaḥ /Dalla müt'aḥ khillachu muʾmanekhan/ yakhḥash k'aylur yu‚ /Dalla inkarlo yinchu kersta nekhan/ yakhḥash ʿarzhlur yu. Amma shayn yakhḥash ʿarzhʾellarsh /qüssur bu zhözhakhati chu‚ tsärga khottur du/: "Tq'a shu tsa tiyshi shayga iyman /iymanan ʿalamatash/ deʾnachul t'äḥa a? ʿovsha ʿazap, shäsh tsa teshash khilarna!"
3:107: Tq'a shayn yakhḥash k'ayʾellarsh – Delan q'inkhetamna choḥ (yalsamaneḥ) khir bu. Üsh tsu choḥ guttar lättar bu.
3:108: Üsh Delan ayatash du, Okha düytsu ḥuna üsh baq'dolchüntsa. I Dela ma vats zulam luush ʿalamna (sha qöllinchu tsḥanna hxumanna).
3:109: Delan dolaḥ du stiglanashkaḥ a‚ lättaḥ a mel derg. Dele dʿadörzu ġullaqash.
3:110: Shu khilla nakhana yuq'adällachekh uggar dika ummat: dikanig ḥökhush‚ vochukh /nakh/ dukhatukhush‚ Delakh teshash. Zhaynin ohxla teshna khilleḥara‚ tsarna dika khir dara. Tsarakh tesharsh a bu‚ tsarakh duqakhbersh pesaq'ash ma bu.
3:111: Tsara shuna danne a zen diyr dats‚ tsatam baḥ ben. Shukh lataḥ a – shayn bakq'ash berzor bu tsara shuna (eshna bukhabevr bu üsh)‚ t'akqa tsarna ġo diyr dats.
3:112: Tsarna t'eqössina siysazalla‚ üsh michchaḥa khilleḥ a‚ Delera vaʿdiytsa a‚ nakhera vaʿdiytsa a üsh batsaḥ. Delera öġazallina t'eqiira üsh‚ t'eqössira tsarna miskalalla. Iza – üsh khilla khilarna Delan ayatekh tsa teshash‚ baya ḥaq' botsush‚ paykhamarsh boyush. Iza – tsara ʿesalla yarna a‚ üsh dozanekh bevlla khilarna a du.
3:113: Tsḥaterra bats üsh. Zhaynin ohxlanakh yu tsḥa /niysa/ hxöttina yolu toba: tsara Delan ayatash döshu büysanan zamanchoḥ, tsara suzhud do /Dalla/.
3:114: Üsh teshash bu Delakh a‚ t'äkhḥarchu diynakh a‚ dikanig ḥökhush bu‚ vochukh /nakh/ dukhatukhush bu‚ sikhlush bu üsh dika hxumanash dan – üsh bu dikacharekh.
3:115: Tsara dina dikanig – kerstadiyr dats i tsarna (q'obal tsa desh dütur dats), i Dela ma vu bevzash /Shekh/ qörush bersh.
3:116: Bakq'alla a, tsateshnarsh – tseran bakhamo a, tseran dözalsha a tsarakh hxumma a dukhatukhur dats Delera. Üsh bu /zhözhakhatin/ ts'eran day, üsh tsu choḥ daima lättar bu.
3:117: Gergarchu /dünenan/ dakhareḥ tsara (kerstanasha) yina kharzh tera yu shetsa ch'oġa shelo yolchu makhakh, shayna zulam dinchu nekhan yaltina ḥeqna bolchu - tso i hxallakdina. Dala zulam tsa dina tsarna, mukhkha delaḥ a, shäsh zulam desh bu üsh shayna.
3:118: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Ash ma letsa shayn /daggara/ dottaġiy, shäsh dotsursh. Shun ġullaqash dokho zhigara khülu üsh, shuna khalonash khüliyla läa tsarna. Öġazalla guchuyalla tseran bagakhula, tseran degnasha ḥuldinarg qin a dokqa du. Ayatash bilgaldäkhna Okha shuna, shu ḥeq'ale khilleḥ.
3:119: Hxay shu! Üsh bezash du shu, tsarna shu tsa deza. Shu tesha masso a zhaynakh. Shuna düḥalqetcha‚ tsara olu: "Tkho iyman dillina du ". /Shäsh shukh/ dʿatilcha, shayn p'elgekh tsergash yukhku tsara öġazlontsa. Aḥ āla: "Sa dala shu shayn öġazallitsa. I Dela khuush ma vu degnashkaḥ derg".
3:120: Shukh dikanig qetcha, tso von do tsarna, shuna von khilcha, tsunakh bakqiybe üsh. Ash sobar daḥ, shu Delakh qeraḥ, tseran mekarlono hxumma a zen diyr dats shuna. I Dela tsara desh derg derrige a chulotsush ma vu.
3:121: /Aḥ dagadaiyta, hxay Muḥammad/: ḥo ʿüyranna ara ma velira ḥayn dözal bolchüra /t'eman kechamna/, muʾmanakh t'amna dʿanisbesh, tq'a Dela khezash verg a, khuush verg a ma vu.
3:122: Shukh shina tobanna dagchu eara osalalla (qerabella t'amakh yukhabovla oyla khilira tseran), liira dʿasadarzha. I Dela ma vu tseran ġöncha. Dalla t'etevzhiyla muʾmanakh.
3:123: Dala ġo ma dira shuna Badreḥ, shu ledara dolush. Delakh qera‚ shu khila megara shukur desh.
3:124: Aḥ olura muʾmanakhe: "Shuna toam tsa khülu shun Qiosh-Qobucho shäsh ch'aġdicha oḥadossiynachu qaa ezar malikatsa?"
3:125: Hxan-hxa! Ash sobar daḥ‚ shu /Delakh/ qeraḥ‚ shuna t'e sikhontsa üsh (mostaġiy) letacha, shun Qiosh-Qobucho ch'aġdiyr du shu pkhea ezar malikatsa‚ ʿalamatash dolchu.
3:126: I tsa dina Dala shuna qaʾ khilla ben‚ shun degnash iymantsa ch'aġdarḥama a ben. Tolam bats sha veza volchu‚ ḥukam niysa desh volchu Delan gergara ben.
3:127: /I dina Dala/ tsa teshash bolcheran tsḥa aġo khadorḥama ya üsh siysazbarḥama – dog dillina bukhbevr bu üsh.
3:128: /Otsu/ ġullaqakh hxumma dats ḥuna: ya gechder Tso tsarna‚ ya ʿazap der – üsh zulamkhoy bu.
3:129: Delan du stiglanashkaḥ mel derg a‚ lättaḥ mel derg a‚ Shena luuchunna gechdo Tso‚ shena luuchunna ʿazap do. I Dela gechdesh verg a‚ q'inkhetame verg a vu.
3:130: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Ma daa riba t'ekh alsamdakqartsa. Delakh qera – shu dakqiyde tarlo.
3:131: Shu qera ts'erakh‚ tsateshacharna kechyina yolchu.
3:132: Shu müt'aḥ khila Dalla a‚ elchanna a - shukh q'inkhetam ban tarlo.
3:133: Shu sikhlo shayn Qiosh-Qobuchüngara gechdare a‚ yalsamane a‚ shen shoralla stiglanash a‚ latta a /sanna/ yolchu‚ /Delakh/ qörush bolcharna sha kechyina yolchu.
3:134: Ishttanash bu üsh‚ shäsh saġa dokqush ättoneḥ a‚ khaloneḥ a‚ öġazlo yukhatukhush‚ nakhana q'int'erabovlush. Tsu Dalla beza dika bersh.
3:135: Ishttanash a bu üsh‚ shäsh tsḥa von q'a dicha ya shäsh shayna zulam dicha, Dela dagavoġush‚ shayn q'inoshna gechdar dökhush. Mila vu tq'a gechdiyr dolush q'inoshna sha Dela votsurg? Shäsh dinchunna (q'ina) t'e yukha tsa börzu üsh, khaa a khuush.
3:136: Üsh bu shayn beqam shayn Qiosh-Qobuchüngara gechdar a‚ boshmash a bersh‚ shayn bukhaḥ khish ökhush yolchu‚ tsarna choḥ üsh guttar a khir bolush. Ma khaza yal yu i ʿamal echarna!
3:137: Shul ḥalkha a dʿadakhna /shuna t'ehxüttush dersh sanna dolu/ khillarsh. Shu lela lättakhula‚ ḥovsa, mukha khilla /din/ khartsdincheran chakqe!
3:138: Hxara khaam bu nakhana‚ niysa neq' a bu‚ ḥekham a bu /Delakh/ qörucharna.
3:139: Shu ledara ma dovla /ġazot dan/‚ shu singattame ma khila /Uḥudeḥ esharna/ – shu laqaḥ khir du /kerstanashna t'eḥ tolam bakqartsa/, shu /bakq'alla a, /muʾmanakh khilleḥ.
3:140: Shuna chov khilcha – nakhana a khilla chov, tsunakh terra. I denosh Okha ḥiyzado nakhana yukq'eḥ‚ Dalla bovzarḥama (nakhana guchubokhush) iyman dillinarsh‚ shun yukq'era ġazotan yal ersh khiliytarḥama a. Tsu Dalla tsa beza zulamkhoy.
3:141: Dala /q'inoykh/ ts'anbarḥama iyman dillinarsh, hxallakbarḥama tsatesharsh.
3:142: Shuna möttira shäsh yalsamane ġur du Dalla bovzale shukh q'aḥegnarsh a, Tsunna bovzale sobar dinarsh a?
3:143: Shu ma dariy dala luush /ġazoteḥ/ tsunna (ġazotana) düḥalqetale ḥalkha‚ i /dalar/ gira shuna‚ shu ḥözhush dolush (tq'a hxintsa yukhadovlu shu?).
3:144: I Muḥammad ma vats elcha ben. Dʿabakhana tsul ḥalkha a elchanash. Iza velcha ya viycha – shäsh khillachu /tsateshare/ yukhadörzur du shu? Yukhavirzinarg milla velaḥ a‚ tsḥana a hxumantsa Dalla zen tsa do tso. T'akqa mēla lur bu Dala barkalle bolcharna.
3:145: Tsa khilla sinna dalar Delan laamtsa ben‚ shen yozantsa tökhna khan yolush ben. Milla velaḥ a dünenan yal ezash – Okha lo tsunna tsunakh‚ milla velaḥ a ekhartan yal ezash – Okha lo tsunna tsunakh. T'akqa mela lur bu Okha barkalle bolcharna.
3:146: Mel duqa paykhamarshtsa tsḥäna t'emash bina /Delan novq'aḥ/ ch'oġa Dalla teshame khillachu muʾmanakha. Khalchu tsa däkqira tsara shayna Delan novq'aḥ khilla dolu tsatame derg‚ ledara tsa bevlira üsh‚ k'el tsa bisira /mostaġchunna/. Tsu Dalla beza sobare bersh
3:147: Tseran dosh tsa khilla dekq'a alar ben: "Tkhan Qiosh-Qoburg‚tkhuna gechdelaḥ tkhan q'inosh‚ tkhan ġullaqeḥ /tkhögara yalla/ tkhan t'alamazalla a, ch'aġbelaḥ tkhan kogash‚ tolam lolaḥ tkhuna tsa teshash dolchu q'omana t'eḥ" /tkhötsa q'iysameḥ dolchu q'omana t'eḥ/ .
3:148: Dala ella tsarna dünenan yal‚ tq'a ma khaza yu ekhartan yal. Tsu Dalla beza dikanig desh bersh.
3:149: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Tsateshacharna shu müt'aḥ khilaḥ‚ tsara shu yukhaderzor du /shayn dine/ – t'akqa shu dʿadörzur du /iymanakh/ eshna.
3:150: Hxaʾ! Dela vu shun ġodokqurg. I vu ġodokqucharakh uggare a dikanig.
3:151: Okha qüssur ma bu tsateshacheran degnashka qeram‚ tsara shayga yossiyna /tsḥa a/ baq'o yotsush, Delatsa naq'ost latsarna. Tseran hxusam – /zhözhakhatin/ ts'e ma yu. Ma von yu-q zulamkhoyn chuġoyla!
3:152: Dala baq'yina shuna Shen vaʿda‚ ash i /tsatesharsh/ boyush Tsünan purbantsa‚ shu ledara dovllalts‚ ġullaqeḥ vovshashtsa q'iyssalts‚ shu ʿesa khillalts‚ shuna dezash khillarg (tolam) Tso shüga gaytinchul t'äḥa. Shukh düne dezash verg a vu‚ shukh ekhart dezash verg a vu. T'akqa shu dʿatettira Tso tsarakh‚ shu zerḥama. Shuna q'int'eravelira Iza. I Dela Shen komärshalla yolush ma vu muʾmanakhana t'eḥ.
3:153: Shu ḥala devdira tsḥänge a yukha tsa ḥovsush‚ qecharna yukq'eḥ elcha shüga qoyqush volush. Singattamna t'e a singattam belira Tso shuna‚ shu ġayġane tsa khiliytarḥama shayna tsa khillachunna (hxonsana) a, shuna /nakh bayartsa a, eshartsa a/ khillachu bokhamna a. I Dela sov dika khuush vu ash diyrig.
3:154: T'akqa Tso yossiyra shuna ġayġanal t'äḥa parġato – nab ozor. Shukh tsḥa /iymana t'eḥ ch'aġʾella/ toba ḥulyira tso. Vuqu /munepiq'iyn/ tobanan sintem bayira shayn sinosha: tsarna khetara Delakh lätsna baq'dotsurg‚ zhehxal zamananchoḥ khetash khillarg /khetara tsarna/. Tsara olura: "Otsu ġullaqa t'eḥ hxumma a duy vayna?" Aḥ āla: "Ġullaq derrig Delan du". Ḥuldesh bu üsh shaygaḥ ḥuna shäsh guchu tsa dokqurg. Olu tsara /shayga/: "Tkhuna khilleḥ ġullaqakh /tsḥa/ hxuma‚ quzaḥ doyur datsara tkho". Aḥ āla: "Shu ʿiyna khilleḥara shayn ts'enosh choḥ‚ /shukh/ biyshina ʿokhkkucharna /tseran Dāla tökhna ʿozhalla t'eqächneḥ/ t'eboġur bara shayna t'om bar yazdina bersh, Dāla zerḥama shun kiyraḥ derg‚ /q'inoykh/ ts'andarḥama shun degnashkaḥ derg. I Dela khuush ma vu kiyraḥ derg”.
3:155: Bakq'alla a, shukh /Uḥudeḥ t'amakh/ yukhabevllarsh /busalbaniyn a kerstaniyn a/ shi toba düḥalqettachu diynaḥ‚ – shayt'ano tiliyna üsh tsḥadolchu tsara dinchu /von/ hxumantsa. Dela q'int'eravelira tsarna. Dela sha gechdesh a‚ /Shena ʿesa khillachunna taʿzar dan sikh tsa lush/ sobare a vu.
3:156: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Shu ma khila tsateshachärga tera, shäsh olush khilla bolchu shayn vezharshka, üsh yokhk-etsarna ya ġazotana arabevlcha: "Tkhuna gergaḥ lättineḥ liyr a batsara‚ boyur a batsara üsh". Tsunakh Dala tseran degnashkaḥ bokqa singattam biyr bu. I Dela denbesh a vu‚ bolüytush a vu. I Dela ash diyrig gush ma vu.
3:157: Shu dayaḥ Delan novq'aḥ, ya /tsigaḥ qechu baḥanitsa/ laḥ – Delera gechdar a ‚ q'inkhetam a beza khir bu tsara guldesh dolchul /dünenan bakhamal/.
3:158: Shu laḥ a‚ ya dayaḥ a – Dalla t'e guldiyr dolush du shu.
3:159: Delera q'inkhetamtsa khilira ḥo /hxay Muḥammad/ tsärtsa k'eda. Ḥo k'orshame‚ dog dera khilleḥara‚ ḥuna gonaḥara dʿasabärzhira bara üsh /ḥan naq'ostiy/. Q'int'eravala tsarna‚ gechdar a dekha tsarna, dagavala tsarakh ġullaqeḥ. Aḥ ayḥa satsam bicha, Dalla t'etovzha. Dalla beza /Shena/ t'etevzhinarsh.
3:160: Dala shuna ġo daḥ – shuna t'eḥ tolamkho vats. Tso shu ġo tsa desh ditaḥ – mila vu Tsul t'äḥa shuna ġo diyr derg? Dalla t'etovzhiyla muʾmanakh!
3:161: Tsa khilla paykhamar hxons q'aylayokqur yolush. I q'aylayakqinarg sha q'aylayakqinchüntsa voġur vu q'ematdiynaḥ. T'akqa hxor sinna shena karadeʾnachüntsa beqam biyr bu – tsarna zulam diyr dats.
3:162: Dela rezakhilarna t'äḥahxväznarg tera vuy teḥa Delan öġazallina k'elnisvellachukh, shen dʿaverzar zhözhakhati khir yolchu?! Ma ircha yu i qochu yolu mettig!
3:163: Üsh tayp-taypana bu Dalla gergaḥ /yalsamane ġur bersh a, zhözhakhate ġur bersh a/. I Dela gush vu tsara desh derg.
3:164: Dala bokqa q'inkhetam ma bi muʾmanakhakh tsaralaḥ shayna yukq'era elcha a vakhiytina‚ tso tsarna Tsünan ayatash düytsush‚ üsh ts'anbesh‚ zhayna a‚ ḥeq'alalla a tsarna ʿama a desh, ḥalkha üsh bilggalchu tilarchoḥ khilleḥ a.
3:165: Ya shayna esham khilcha, ash a ma bira esham /Badreḥ mostaġchunna/ shozza alssam, ash elira: "Hxara michara du?" Aḥ āla: "Iza shügara shaygara du". Bakq'alla a‚ Dela masso a hxumanna t'eḥ nitsq' qochush ma vu.
3:166: Shi toba düḥ-düḥal qettachu diynaḥ shuna khilla bolu esham Delan laamtsa bu‚ tsu Dalla /Shekh/ teshna khillarsh /nakhana guchubokhush/ bovzarḥama.
3:167: Tsunna bovzarḥama shalkholelorash a‚ shayga älcha: "Sḥadüyla‚ t'om be Delan novq'aḥ‚ ya dʿalelkhabe /mostaġiy/"‚ ällarsh: "Tkhuna t'om ban khuush khilleḥara‚ tkho shuna t'äḥahxüttur dara". Üsh tsatesharna gerga bara otsu diynaḥ iymanna /gerga/ khillachul‚ mettanashtsa düytsush shayn degnashkaḥ dotsurg. I Dela dika khuush vu tsara ḥuldesh derg.
3:168: Üsh bu shäsh /ġazote tsa bölkhush/, choḥ khevshina a ʿiyna shayn vezharekh lätsna älla khillarsh: "Okha bokhurg dineḥara‚ boyur batsara üsh". Aḥ āla: "Dukhatokha shaykh dalar (ʿozhalla)‚ shu baq'lüysh khilleḥ".
3:169: Aḥ larrane a ma laralaḥ Delan novq'aḥ bellarsh bella. Diyna bu üsh – shayn Qiosh-Qobuchun gergaḥ /Tso shayna/ ritsq' a lush.
3:170: Dala Shen komärshallakh shayna dellachüntsa bakqiybesh bu üsh‚ shaykh tsa qüush /ġazoteḥ tsa lesh/ t'äḥa bisincharna qaʾ bökhush bu üsh tsarna qeram tsa khiliyta /ekhartaḥ/ a‚ üsh singattame tsa khiliyta a /dünenaḥ bukhadüsuchukh/.
3:171: Qaʾ bökhush bu üsh Delera niʿmattsa a‚ komärshallitsa a‚ Dala tsayayʾare muʾmanekhan yal /dog dokhush bu üsh/.
3:172: Üsh bu Dalla a‚ elchanna a zhop dellarsh‚ shayna chov khillachul t'äḥa. Tsarakh dikanig dinacharna a, /Delakh/ qiyrincharna a siylaḥ-yokqa yal yu.
3:173: Ishttanash bu üsh, shayga nakha älla: "Nakh bu shuna go billina‚ tsarakh qera". Tso üsh alsambekhira iymantsa. Tsara elira: "Tkhan qacho yu – Dela‚ dika vekal a vu I".
3:174: Delera niʿmattsa a‚ dozallitsa a yukhabirzira üsh‚ zeno tsa letsira üsh‚ Dela reza khilarna t'äḥahxittira üsh. I Dela Shegaḥ siylaḥ-dokqa dozalla dolush vu.
3:175: I shayt'a dara shen dottaġashka /kerstanashka/ shuna qeram tüssüytush‚ ma qera tsarakh‚ Sokh qera‚ shäsh teshash khilleḥ.
3:176: Ḥo singattame ma voyla tsateshareḥ sikhbellachara. Tsara danne a tsḥana a hxumantsa zen diyr dats Dalla. Dela luush vu tsarna /yalsamanin/ dāq'a tsa dan ekhartaḥ. Tsarna deza dokqa ʿazap khir du.
3:177: Iyman a dökhkina, tsateshar etsnachara danne a /tsḥana a/ hxumantsa zen diyr dats Dalla. Tsarna lazosh dolu ʿazap khir du.
3:178: Tsateshacharna ma möttiyla Okha shäsh lattor shayna dikanna du, Okha üsh lattosh bu q'inoshtsa alsambovliytar- ḥama. Tsarna siysaza dolu ʿazap khir du.
3:179: Tsa khilira i Dela muʾmanakh bütush shu dolchu ḥoleḥ /teshamenig a, munepiq' a ievella/‚ bökhanig ts'enchukh q'asta tsa vesh. Tsa khilira i Dela shu qiadesh q'aylenna t'e‚ mukhkha delaḥ a, Dala khorzhu elchanekh Shena luʾurg. Teshalash Delakh a‚ Tsünan elchanekh a. Shu teshaḥ a‚ shu /Delakh/ qeraḥ a – shuna siylaḥ-yokqa yal yu.
3:180: Dala Shen komärshallekh /shayna/ dellachunna t'eḥ pisalla lelocharna ma möttiyla i shayna dika du. I melkho a tsarna von du, q'ematdiynaḥ i tsara qoiynarg tseran logakh ḥarchor yu. Delan du stiglaniyn a‚ lättan a irs. I Dela ash diyrig dika khuush vu.
3:181: Dalla khezira oluchara älla dolu dosh: "Dela peq'ar vu‚ tkho ḥole du". Okha dʿayazdiyr du tsara ällarg a‚ tsara, ḥaq' dotsush, paykhamarsh bayar a. Okha er du: "ʿovsha zhözhakhatin ʿazap".
3:182: Shun küygasha kechdinarg baḥaneḥ du iza /ʿazap/. I Dela zulam desh ma vats leshna.
3:183: Ishttanash a bu üsh, shäsh älla: "Dala bart bina tkhötsa‚ tkho elchanakh teshar dats älla, tso saġa daiyttalts, sha duush ts'aro". Aḥ āla: "Shüga bäkhkira sol ḥalkha bilgalonashtsa elchanash‚ ash älla dolchüntsa a – üsh hxunda bayira ash‚ shäsh baq'lüysh delaḥ?"
3:184: Ḥuo tsara khartsvicha /i tidame ma etsa/‚ ḥol ḥalkha a elchanash khartsbina. Bilgalonashtsa bäkhkina bara üsh: zuburshtsa a‚ nüre dolchu zhaynitsa a.
3:185: Masso a sino (masso a adamo, dzhino, maliko, diynato) ʿovshur ma du dalar (ʿozhalla). Shuna /qochchush/ lur yu shun yal q'ematdiynaḥ. T'akqa zhözhakhatina, gena a väkqina, yalsamane vakhiytinarg – i vu tolam bäkqinarg. Dünenan dakhar ma dats ʿekhavaran hxuma ben.
3:186: Shu züyr ma du shun bakhameḥ a‚ shäshkaḥ a, shuna khezar ma du shul ḥalkha shayga zhayna dellachärgara a‚ mushrikashkara khalakhetarsh. Ash sobar daḥ‚ shu /Delakh/ qeraḥ – bakq'alla a, i du-q ch'oġachu ġullaqekh.
3:187: Dala bart bira zhayna dellachärtsa: ash bilgaldokqur du nakhana‚ ash ḥuldiyr dats i älla. I dʿatesira tsara shayna t'eḥa‚ tsunakh k'ezzig makh iytsira tsara. Ma von hxuma yu-q tsara ötsurg!
3:188: Ḥuna ma mottalaḥ i shäsh deʾnachüntsa (dinchüntsa - Delan neq'akh nakh dʿatilosh) bakqiybesh bersh‚ shäsh dina dotsuchüntsa nakha shäsh khesto luush bersh‚ ḥuna ma mottalaḥ üsh ʿazapakh k'elḥarabevr bu‚ - tsarna lazosh dolu ʿazap du.
3:189: Delan du stiglaniyn a‚ lättan a dolalla‚ i Dela masso a hxumanna t'eḥ nitsq' qochush ma vu.
3:190: Bakq'alla a, stiglanash a‚ latta a qollareḥ‚ büysa-de khiytsadalareḥ bilgalonash ma yu ḥeq'al dolcharna.
3:191: Ishttanash bu üsh shäsh Dela ḥekhavesh dʿahxittina a‚ oḥkhevshina a‚ shayn aġonashna t'eḥ a‚ oyla esh bu üsh stiglanash a‚ latta a qollaran (olush): "Tkhan Qiosh-Qoburg‚ Aḥ qöllina ma dats hxara erna‚ Ḥo khastavo okha‚ lardelaḥ tkho /zhözhakhatin/ ts'eran ʿazapakh.
3:192: Tkhan Qiosh-Qoburg‚ bakq'alla a, Aḥ ts'erga völlinarg, Aḥ siysazvinarg vu-q iza. Zulamkhoshna ma bats ġönchiy.
3:193: Tkhan Qiosh-Qoburg‚ tkhuna khezira tsḥa qoyqush verg, sha /nakh/ iymane qoyqush: iyman dilla shayn Qiosh-Qobuchünga, bokhush‚ t'akqa Okha iyman dillira. Tkhan Qiosh-Qoburg‚ Aḥ gechdelaḥ tkhuna tkhan q'inoshna‚ ts'andelaḥ tkho tkhan vochu ʿamalekh‚ tkho daliytalaḥ dikachärtsa.
3:194: Tkhan Qiosh-Qoburg‚ Aḥ tkhuna daiytalaḥ Ayḥa ḥayn elchanashka doüytur du ällarg‚ siysaza ma delaḥ tkho q'ematdiynaḥ‚ bakq'alla a, Aḥ tsa yokhayo – q vaʿda."
3:195: Zhop delira tsarna shäsh Qiosh-Qobucho: "As eshor ma yats yinchun ʿamal‚ i stag velaḥ a, ya zuda elaḥ a‚ – shu vovshekh du. Dʿaqelkhinarsh‚ shayn ts'enoshkara arabäkhnarsh‚ San novq'aḥ shayna khalonash khillarsh‚ shäsh t'om binarsh‚ shäsh t'am t'eḥ bellarsh – ts'anbiyr bu As üsh shayn vochu ʿamalekh‚ bukhakhula khish lelash dolchu boshmashka bokhüytur bu As üsh, – mēla bu i Delera. I Dela Shegaḥ khaza mēla bolush ma vu".
3:196: Ḥo ʿekha ma voyla i tsateshnarsh makhkaḥ dʿay-sḥay lelaro.
3:197: K'ezzig hxuma du iza. T'akqa üsh chuġon bolu mettig zhözhakhati yu. Ma von tovzhiyla yu iza.
3:198: Mukhkha delaḥ a‚ shayn Qiosh-Qobuchukh qörush bolcharna boshmash yu‚ shayn bukhakhula khish ökhush‚ guttar a khir bu üsh tsu choḥ, – Delan gergara ḥeshashna /khaza/ kechdar du iza. Dalla gergaḥ derg dika du dika ʿamal yinacharna.
3:199: Bakq'alla a, zhaynin ohxlekh vu Delakh teshash verg‚ shüga dossiynachukh a‚ shayga dossiynachukh a teshash verg‚ Dalla müt'aḥ a volush. Delan ayatash tsa dukhku tsara k'ezzigchu mekhakh. Tsarna shayn yal ma yu shayn Qiosh-Qobuchun gergaḥ. I Dela sikha ma vu ḥesap dareḥ.
3:200: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Shu sobare khilalash, shu sobareḥ yaḥe dovlalash, ch'aġlolash vovshashtsa‚ Delakh qeralash - deq'alkhila tarlo shu.
4:1: Hxay nakh! Shu qera shäsh tsḥana sinakh (Ādamakh) qöllina volchu shu Qiosh-Qobuchukh. Tso qöllina tsunakh tsünan zuda (Ḥava)‚ tsärshinnakh Tso barzhiyra dukqa bozhariy a‚ zudariy a. Shu qera Delakh‚ ash Shetsa vovshashka dekharsh desh volchu. Gergarlonashkaḥ a /qera Delakh/. Bakq'alla a, i Dela khilla shuna t'eḥ tergamkho.
4:2: Dʿalo boberashna tseran däkhni /üsh bakqiy khilcha/. Ma khiytsa bökhanig ts'enchüntsa, ma daa tseran däkhni‚ shaychukh tokhiy. I khilla dokqa q'a (iza dakqiychu q'inoykh du).
4:3: Shu qörush delaḥ boberashkaḥ niyso tsayarkh‚ ash balabe shayna dika khetta bolu zudariy: shishsha, qoqkha‚ yiʾ-yiʾ. Shäsh niyso tsayarkh qeraḥ – tsḥaʾ‚ ya shayn ättu küygasha doladinarg (yalae). I gerga du ash khartso tsayarna (ya shu peq'ar tsakhilarna (duqa dözalsh khilla).
4:4: Dʿalo /shäsh balosh bolchu/ zudarshna tseran urdo sovġatana. Tsara shuna tsunakh hxuma ts'enchu daggara yukhalaḥ‚ ġoza doiyla i ash.
4:5: Dʿa ma lo t'alam ban tsakhuuchärga shayn däkhni‚ Dala shun dakharan bukh bina dolu. Tsunakh daa a‚ t'e dukha a lo tsarna (boberashna)‚ tsärga khaza dosh a āla.
4:6: Zie (ʿalashde) boberash zuda yalorig khillalts. Üsh qiʾna buyla shayna khaadelcha‚ dʿalo tsärga tseran däkhni. Ash ma daa i qoam tsa besh a‚ t'alam botsush a, üsh bakqiy khilale. Ḥal dolush verg ozaloyla /otsu boberiyn däkhni daarkh/‚ miskanig – tso zhimma doiyla. Shäsh tsärga tseran däkhni dʿalush‚ tsu t'eḥ teshalla hxottade. Dala qacho yina ḥesaptsa.
4:7: Bozharshna dāq'a du das-nanas a‚ gergarchara a /shäsh dʿaqelkhina/ bukhaditinchukh‚ zudarshna a du dāq'a das-nanas a‚ gergarchara a bukhaditinchukh‚ k'ezzig delaḥ a i‚ dukqa delaḥ a – dāq'a du parz khilla.
4:8: Irs döq'uchoḥ khilaḥ peq'arsh a, /shayna tsunakh irs tsa qochu/ gergarnash a‚ boberash a‚ miskanash a khilaḥ – ritsq' lo tsarna tsunakh‚ khaza dosh āla tsärga.
4:9: Qöriyla üsh, shäsh shayl t'äḥa shayn zäʿape dözal bitcha, (üsh ġeloneḥ bisarna) qörush ma khilla. Üsh qöriyla Delakh /shen dözalna ya boberashna esham khilarkh/‚ tsara oliyla niysa dosh /vala gerga vakhanchünga veset niysa de, oliy/.
4:10: Bakq'alla a, zulamtsa boberiyn däkhni duush bersh – üsh ma bu shayn gaysh choḥ ts'e yuush‚ üsh ġur ma bu /zhözhakhatin/ ts'erga.
4:11: Dala veset do shüga shayn dözalshkaḥ (tsarna irs deq'areḥ): tsḥana bozhaberana lo shinna zudaberana qochu dāq'a. Nagaḥ sanna zudariy belaḥ /shiʾ a/ shinnal sov a, tsarna bukhaditina dolchukh qo dāq'a dicha, shi dāq'a du (tsunakh tsḥabossa döq'ur du tsarna). Nagaḥ sanna tsḥaʾ elaḥ – tsunna /bukhadisinchukh/ akh du. Dena-nanna – tsarakh hxoranna – yalkhalġa dāq'a du bukhaditinchukh‚ nagaḥ sanna tsünan dözalkho velaḥ. Tsünan dözalkho vatsaḥ – tsünan irs qochu tsünan dena-nanna‚ nanna – qo dāq'a dicha, tsḥa dāq'a (disinarg dās sḥaötsu). Nagaḥ sanna tsünan vezhariy belaḥ‚ nanna yalkh dāq'a dicha, tsḥa dāq'a du‚ /ḥaq'bolcharna irs döq'ur du/ tso dina veset qochushdinchul t'äḥa‚ deqaral t'äḥa. Shun day‚ shun k'entiy – shuna tsa khäa tsarakh mila vu shuna gerga paydeḥ. Delera parz du iza. Bakq'alla a, i Dela khilla Sha khuush a‚ ḥukma /niysa/ desh a
4:12: Shuna a qochu akh shun zudarsha bukhaditinchukh‚ nagaḥ sanna tseran dözalkho vatsaḥ (qechunna vina‚ ya shuna vina). Tseran dözalkho (qechunna vina volu‚ ya shuna vina volu) velaḥ – shuna tsara bukhaditinchukh döalġa dāq'a qochu tseran veset qochushdinchul t'äḥa‚ deqarel t'äḥa. Tsarna (shu della, bukhabisina bolu shun zudarshna) – ash bukhaditinchukh döalġa dāq'a qochu‚ nagaḥ sanna shun dözalkho (qechu zudcho vina‚ ya tso vina) vatsaḥ. Shun dözalkho velaḥ – tsarna ash bukhaditinchukh, borhxalġa dāq'a qochu, shun veset qochushdinchul t'äḥa‚ deqarel t'äḥa. Nagaḥ sanna shegara irs qochush volu stag‚ ya zuda shen da ya dözalkho votsush velaḥ – tsünan vasha‚ ya yisha elaḥ – tsu shinnakh hxoranna a, yolkhalġa dāq'a lur du. Nagaḥ üsh tsaral alsam belaḥ – üsh deq'ashkhoy khir bu qoalġachu deq'an‚ tsünan veset qochushdinchul t'äḥa‚ deqaral t'äḥa‚ sha zen tsa desh (tsḥanna sovdokqush‚ vuqunna eshosh). Delera veset du iza. I Dela ma vu khuush a‚ sobare a (dünenaḥ sikha taʿzar tsa desh q'inosh dincharna).
4:13: Üsh du Delan dozanash. Dalla a‚ Tsünan elchanna a müt'aḥ verg – i vokhüytur vu Tso yalsamane‚ shena bukhakhula khish ökhush yolchu‚ tsu choḥ üsh guttar a khir bu. I siylaḥ-bokqa tolam bu-q.
4:14: Dalla a, Tsünan elchanna a ʿesa verg a‚ Tsünan dozanekh vällarg a – i vokhiytur vu Tso /zhözhakhatin/ ts'erga‚ guttar a tsu choḥ khir volush. Tsunna – siysaza dolu ʿazap du.
4:15: Shun zudarekh bökhanig dinarg – shukh veammo teshalla doyla tsunna t'eḥ. Tsara teshalla daḥ – ts'aḥ satsabe üsh ballalts‚ ya Dala tsḥa neq' hxottolts.
4:16: Shukh shimmo daḥ i (bökhanig – zina) – taʿzar de tsarna (chovkhortsa a, bekhk bakqartsa a, ieḥ khetiytartsa a, macha tokhartsa a). Tsara shimmo a tōba daḥ, dika ʿamal yaḥ‚ yustakhdovla tsarakh. Bakq'alla a, Dela ma khilla sha tōba q'obaldesh verg a‚ q'inkhetame verg a
4:17: Bakq'alla a, tōba q'obaldar du Dalla t'eḥ, shäsh tsa khuush vōnash a desh, t'akqa sikhontsa tōba desh bolcharna. Bakq'alla a, tseran tōba q'obaldiyr du Dala. I Dela khilla khuush verg a‚ ḥikmate verg a.
4:18: Tōba q'obaldiyr dats shäsh vonig decharna, shäsh bala gerga bakhcha olush bolchu: "Hxintsa as tōba di"‚ shäsh tsa teshash a bolush, bellacharna a. Tsarna Okha kechdina lazosh dolu ʿazap.
4:19: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Ḥanal dats shuna ash zudariy nitsq'atsa irse bitar‚ khalo ma e tsarna shäsh tsarna dellachukh (urdokh) tsḥaderg yukhaetsarḥama‚ nagaḥ sanna bilggala bökhanig tsara t'edaiytina datsaḥ. Khaza dākha tsärtsa. Shuna üsh bezash tsa khilaḥ a /sobare khila tsärtsa/. Shuna tsḥa hxuma tsa eza tarlo‚ Dala tsu choḥ dukqa dikanash khiliyta tarlo.
4:20: Shu luush delaḥ zudchun metta zuda khiytsa‚ ash tsarakh tsḥanna dukqa däkhni della delaḥ‚ tsunakh hxumma a yukha ma etsalash. Ash sḥaötsur du iza tq'a dokqa zulam a‚ bilgala q'a a desh?
4:21: Ash i sḥa mukha ötsu‚ shu (mayra a‚ zuda a khilla) vovshashna yuq'adakhana ma khilliy? Shügara ch'oġa vaʿda etsna ma yariy tsara.
4:22: Ash ma balabe shun daysha baliyna khilla bolu zudariy‚ ḥalkha dʿadakhanarg dotsurg. I khilla bökhanig‚ ch'oġa irchanig‚ vuno bökha ʿadat a.
4:23: Shuna (bālo) ḥaram bina shun nanoy a‚ shun yoʿariy a‚ shun yizhariy a‚ shun den yizhariy a‚ shun nenan yizhariy a‚ shun veshin yoʿariy a‚ shun yishin yoʿariy a‚ shu daqiyna khilla bolu shun nanoy a‚ shun shurin yizhariy a‚ shun zudariyn nanoy a‚ shun ts'enoshkaḥ ʿesh bolu shun tsärtsa gergara yuq'amettig a khilla bolchu zudariyn qecharna bina bolu mekhkariy a. Shun tsärtsa gergara yuq'amettig tsa khilleḥ – q'a dats shuna /tseran mekhkariy balo/. Shun ch'urakh sḥabevlla bolu shun k'entiyn zudariy a‚ shi yisha /ishtta yoʿ a, tsünan den yisha ya nenan yisha a/ vovshakhtokha (tsḥäna yalo) a /ḥaram du shuna/‚ ḥalkha dʿadakhna khillarg dotsurg. Bakq'alla a, i Dela khilla gechdesh verg a‚ q'inkhetame verg a.
4:24: Zudarekh mareḥ bersh (ḥaram bina shuna bālo)‚ shun ättu küygasha doladina botsursh‚ i t'edillina Dala shuna. Ḥanal bina shuna tsul dēḥaḥ bersh‚ shayn bakhamtsa ash lekhcha‚ shayn doġu urdo dʿalush‚ sharʿatsa bālosh dolush‚ zina lelortsa dotsush. Shäsh tsärgara marzo iytsicha – tsarna boġu makh dʿalo parz khilla bolu. Parz qochushdina (tsarna doġu urdo dʿadella)‚ shu vovshashtsa reza dolush dinchunna t'eḥ (tsara shuna tsḥadolu urdo yukhalush) q'a dats shuna. Bakq'alla a, i Dela ma khilla khuush a‚ ḥukma /niysa/ desh a.
4:25: Shukh mülkhachunna tsa magaḥ shen tarontsa ts'ena bolu muʾma zudariy bālo – shayn ättu küygasha doladinachu shayn muʾma mekhkarekh (lekh) balabe. Dalla dika khäa shun iyman‚ shu vovshakh /sḥadevlla/ du. Balabe üsh tseran ohxlan purbantsa‚ dʿalo tseran makh dikantsa‚ ts'ena khilla bolu‚ lelar bökha dotsush bolu‚ dottaġ lätsna botsush bolu – (zudariy). T'akqa mareḥ bolush tsara bökhanig daliytaḥ‚ tsarna özdachu zudarshna doġuchukh akh ʿazap du. I derrige du shukh q'inakh (zinakh) qörush volchunna. Ash sobar daḥ (i zuda tsa yalosh) – i shuna dika du. I Dela gechdesh verg a vu‚ q'inkhetame verg a vu.
4:26: Dalla läa shuna bilgaldakqa‚ shul ḥalkha khillachiyn novq'a shu nisdan‚ shun tōba q'obaldan. I Dela khuush a vu‚ ḥukma /niysa/ desh a vu.
4:27: Tsu Dalla läa shun tōba q'obaldan. /Shayn/ dezarshna t'äḥahxüttush bolcharna läa shu /ts'enchukh/ dukqa genadovla.
4:28: Shuna t'era /khalonash/ yayʾyan läa Dalla. Adam qöllina zäʿap.
4:29: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Vovshiyn däkhni ma daalash khartsontsa‚ shun vovshiyn rezallitsa yokhka-etsar yatsaḥ. Shäsh ma daya. Bakq'alla a, i Dela khilla shütsa q'inkhetame.
4:30: Mostaġallitsa‚ zulamtsa i dinarg‚ t'äḥa Okha chuverzor vu ts'erga. I khilla Dalla atta (i Dalla atta du).
4:31: Shayna nehxa dina dolu dakqiy q'inosh ash yustakhtattaḥ‚ kegiycharna (kegiychu q'inoshna) Okha gechdiyr du shuna‚ chudokhüytur du shu siylaḥchu chuġoylina (yalsamane).
4:32: Shuna ma deziyla Dala shukh tsḥabolcharna vuqaral bazbina dellarg. Bozharshna dāq'a du shayna karadeʾnachukh‚ zudarshna a dāq'a du tsarna shayna karadeʾnachukh. Ash Dele dekha Tsünan komärshallakh. I Dela khilla (vu) masso a hxuma Sha khuush.
4:33: Hxoranna Okha khiliytina das-nanas a‚ gergarchara a bukhaditinchukh irsötsurg. Shun duynasha ch'aġbinacharna (ḥalkha ash shayna irs lur du, älla, vaʿda yina khilla bolu dottaġiy), – dʿalo tsarna tseran dāq'a. Bakq'alla a, i Dela khilla masso a hxumanna t'eḥ tesh.
4:34: Bozhariy t'ehxittina bu zudarshna, Dala tsḥabersh vuqaral bazbartsa a‚ tsara shayn bakhamakh kharzh yartsa a. Dika zudariy bu – / Dalla a, shayn maroshna a/ müt'aḥ bersh‚ shäsh lardesh bersh /maroshna/ guchaḥ dotsurg Dala larde alarna. Shu – tseran ʿesallekh qörush dersh – ḥekham be tsarna‚ /tsunakh payda tsa khilaḥ/ bita üsh mettaḥ‚ /tsunakh a payda tsa khilaḥ/ tokha tsarna (ḥekham khiliytarna‚ lazorna dotsush). T'akqa üsh shuna müt'aḥ khilaḥ – neq' ma bokhabe tsarna. Bakq'alla a, i Dela khilla leqa verg a‚ vokqa verg a
4:35: Shu qeraḥ (maran (mayrachun) a‚ zudchun a) yukq'eḥ bart bokharkh‚ qayqa ḥeq'ale bersh tsünan (maran) nakhana yukq'era a‚ zudchun nakhana yukq'era a. Maslaḥat luush i shiʾ delaḥ‚ Dala ätto biyr bu tsarna yukq'eḥ. Bakq'alla a, i Dela khilla (masso a hxuma) khuush verg a‚ /q'aylakha derg/ dika khuush verg a.
4:36: Dalla ʿibadat de‚ naq'ost ma latsa Tsunna tsḥana a hxumantsa‚ dena-nanna a dika khila‚ gergarcharna a‚ boberashna a‚ miskacharna a‚ gergara volchu lulakhochunna a, gergara votschu (khiyrachu) lulakhochunna a‚ aġor naq'ostana a‚ neq'an naq'ostana a‚ shayn ättu küygasha doladinacharna a /dika khila/. Bakq'alla a, Dalla tsa veza dekq'a shetsa tamash besh verg a‚ kura verg a.
4:37: Pis bersh a, nakhana pis khila, älla, omra desh bersh a‚ Dala shayga daiytina dolchu komärshallakh ḥuldesh bersh a /tsa beza Dalla/ – Okha kechdina tsateshacharna siysaza dolu ʿazap.
4:38: Shayn däkhni nakhana gaytarḥama saġina dokqush bersh a, shäsh Delakh a‚ t'äkhḥarchu diynakh a teshash botsush /tsa beza Dalla/, shena shayt'a dottaġ khillarg – von dottaġ khilla tsunakh.
4:39: Hxun dara tsarna Delakh a‚ t'äkhḥarchu diynakh a teshcha‚ Dala shayna dellachu ritsq'anakh saġa delcha? I Dela üsh bevzash ma khilla.
4:40: Bakq'alla a, i Dela misq'ala zarratal , zulam desh ma vats. I (misq'ala zarrat) dika khilaḥ – i t'ett'a alsamdokqu Tso‚ Shegara yokqa yal lo.
4:41: Mukha khir du Okha masso a ummatakh /tsḥatstsa/ tesh valiyna‚ ḥo hxoqarna t'eḥ tesh valiycha?
4:42: Tsu diynaḥ tsateshacharna a‚ elchanna ʿesalla yinacharna a luur du latta shäshtsa nisdalar. Ḥuldiyr dats tsara Delakh /tsḥazhimma a dünenaḥ shäshtsa/ khillarg.
4:43: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Shu lamazna gerga ma ġolash‚ shu dekhna a dolush‚ shäsh düytsurg shayna tsa khaaḥ; shaytsa bökha khi delaḥ a – tsa lüychush, shäsh novq'akhula /khi dotsuchukhula/ lelash datsaḥ, ya /mäzhdiga choḥ tsa sovtsush/ cheqdovlush datsaḥ. Shu khilleḥ tsomgush‚ ya novq'aḥ‚ ya shukh tsḥaʾ ḥashtaġanera (khinarara) veana velaḥ‚ ya shu zudarekh ḥaqadella delaḥ – t'akqa shuna khi tsa karadaḥ – tema de ts'enachu lättatsa /ya ġamartsa/. Shayn yakhḥekh a‚ küygekh ḥaqa i. Bakq'alla a, i Dela khilla q'inkhetame a‚ gechdesh a.
4:44: Ḥuna tsa go i shayna zhaynikh /tsḥa/ dāq'a dellarsh? Shäsh tiladalar ötsu tsara‚ shu a neq'akh tiladala läa tsarna.
4:45: Dalla dika bevza shun mostaġiy. Dala qacho yina /shun/ vali khilartsa, Dala qacho yina /shun/ ġöncha khilartsa.
4:46: Zhügtiyn dineḥ khillacharakh bu shäsh dosh shen mettigera dʿadokqush bersh. Tsara olu: "Khezna tkhuna /ḥan dosh/‚ ʿesa du tkho /ḥan omrana/", "Ladoġa aḥ – khozüytur dats ḥuna /vonig/", "Raʿina" mattatsa k'eda olush, /islam/ dinna ʿittarsh esh. Tsara älleḥara: "Khezna tkhuna‚ müt'aḥ khilla tkho‚ ladoġa‚ ḥazha tkhöga (tkhan ġayġa be)"- tsarna dika khir dara‚ ch'oġa a /khir dara/. Mukhkha delaḥ a, Dala neʿalt älla tsarna üsh tsatesharna. Ma teshash bats üsh tsḥa k'ezzig (bersh) ben.
4:47: Hxay shayga zhayna dellarsh! Shu tesha Okha dossosh khillachukh (Q'urʾanakh)‚ sha baq'desh dolu shütsa derg (Tavrat a‚ Inzhil a) Okha yakhḥash nisyina t'eḥa erzayale‚ ya neʿalt alale‚ shötan diynan dayshna ma-allara. Delan ġullaq qochushkhilla.
4:48: Bakq'alla a, Dala gech tsa do Shetsa naq'ost latsarna‚ Tso gech ma do i dotsurg Shena luʾchunna. Milla a velaḥ a, Delatsa naq'ost lotsush – deza-dokqa q'a qöllina (dina) tso.
4:49: Ḥuna tsa go i shäsh ts'anbesh bersh? Dala ts'anviyr ma vu Shena luurg. Tsürrig a zulam diyr ma dats tsarna.
4:50: Ḥazhal ḥo‚ mukha qullu tsara Dalla t'eḥ khartsderg! Qacho khili tsunakh bilggala q'a khilartsa.
4:51: Ḥuna tsa go shayna zhaynikh dāq'a dellarsh – üsh teshash bu dzhibtekh a‚ t'aġutakh a‚ tsara olu tsateshachärga: "Shu du niysachu novq'aḥ /Muḥammadan Dele/ iyman dillincharal."
4:52: Üsh ma bu Dala shayna neʿalt ällarsh. Dala neʿalt ällachunna ḥuna tsq'a a karor ma vats ġöncha.
4:53: Ya shayna mulkakh dāq'a dolush bu üsh? Tsara lur ma dats nakhana chamkhalg a.
4:54: Ya nakhana ḥaġ yo-te tsara, Dala tsarna Shen komärshallakh dellachunna t'eḥ? Okha delira Ibrahximan dözalna zhayna a‚ ḥeq'alalla a. Deza-dokqa mulk dellera Okha tsarna.
4:55: Tsarakh (zhügtekh) tsunakh (tsu Dala dossiynachu zhaynakh – Q'urʾanakh) teshnarg a vu. Tsarakh tsunna düḥalvällarg a vu. Qacho khilla zhözhakhatitsa /üsh bāgo/ ts'e khilar.
4:56: Bakq'alla a, i Tkhan ayatekh tsatesharsh – t'akqa bokhüytur bu Okha üsh ts'erga. Tseran chq'örnash dägna mel deli Okha üsh khiytsor du qechu chq'örnashtsa tsärga ʿazap ʿovshiytarḥama. Bakq'alla a, i Dela khilla nütsq'ala a‚ ḥukma /niysa / desh a.
4:57: Iyman dillinarsh a‚ dika ʿamalsh yinarsh a – t'akqa üsh chubokhüytur bu Okha boshmashka (yalsamane)‚ shayn bukhakhula khish ökhush dolchu. Üsh tsu choḥ guttar lättar bu. Tsu choḥ tsarna ts'ena zudariy khir bu. Okha chubokhüytur bu üsh düq'achu ʿindaġe.
4:58: Dala omra do shüga‚ shayga teshame ella hxumanash dʿaerzor shayn dayshka‚ nakhana yukq'eḥ shäsh ḥukma desh, i ḥukma dar niysontsa. Bakq'alla a, i Dela – ma khaza du Tso shüga shetsa ḥekham besh derg! Bakq'alla a, i Dela khilla khezash verg a, gush verg a.
4:59: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Shu müt'aḥ khilalash Dalla‚ shu müt'aḥ khilalash elchanna a‚ shukh ġullaq karaḥ dolcharna a. Tsḥana hxumanna t'eḥ shun q'iysam khilaḥ‚ ash i dʿaderzadelash Dele a‚ elchane a‚ shäsh Delakh a‚ t'äḥarchu diynakh a teshash delaḥ. I dika a du‚ khazachu kepara dastar a du.
4:60: Ḥuna tsa go i shäsh ḥöga dossiynachukh a‚ ḥol ḥalkha dossiynachukh a teshash bu möttush bersh? Üsh luush ma bu shayna yukq'eḥ ḥukma doyla t'aġuta. Tsärga omra ma dina tsunakh (t'aġutakh) ma tesha, älla. Shayt'a ma du luush üsh tilo gennarchu tilartsa.
4:61: Tsärga älcha: "T'edüyla Dala dossiynachünga a‚ elchanna a (sḥadüyla‚ ḥukma doytu vay Q'urʾane a‚ elchane a)"‚ ḥuna ma go i munepiq'ash dʿabörzush ḥo volchura /sikhachu/ berzartsa.
4:62: Mukha khir du tsarna t'e tsḥa bāla beʾcha‚ shayn küygasha kechbina bolu‚ t'akqa üsh ḥuna t'e bäkhkicha‚ shäsh Delakh duynash buush: "Tkho ma datsara luush dikanig a‚ qiam khilar a ben"‚ – olush?
4:63: Üsh ma bu Dalla shayn degnashkaḥ derg khuush bersh. Yustakhvala ḥo tsarakh‚ ḥekham be tsarna‚ āla tsärga /üsh/ k'orgga qetosh dolu dosh.
4:64: Tsḥa a elcha tsa vaiytina Okha tsunna /nakh/ müt'aḥ khilarḥama ben, Delan laamtsa. Üsh khilleḥara shäsh shayna zulam dicha, ḥuna t'e boġush, t'akqa Dele gechdar dökhush‚ elchano a gechdar dekhcha, tsarna i Dela karor ma vara shayn tōba q'obaldiyrig a, q'inkhetame verg a.
4:65: Ḥan qiosh-qobush volchu (Delora) ma bats üsh /Delakh/ teshash shayna yuq'adözhnachunna t'era ḥukma ḥöga doytush batsaḥ‚ t'akqa a aḥ yinchu qielana shaygaḥ hxumma novq'arlo tsa karosh‚ shäsh tsunna müt'aḥ khülush batsaḥ.
4:66: Okha tsarna t'edillina khilleḥara, shäsh daya älla ya aradovla shayn ts'enoshkara älla‚ tsarakh k'ezzig bolchara ben i diyr ma datsara. Shayna ḥökhush derg tsara daḥara – i dika a‚ deliltsa ch'oġa a ma dara.
4:67: T'akqa Tkhayna gergara siylaḥ-yokqa yal lur ma yara tsarna Okha.
4:68: Niysachu novq'a bikhkina khir ma bara Okha üsh.
4:69: Dalla a‚ elchanna a müt'aḥ bersh – üsh khir bu Dala shayna niʿmat dellachärtsa tsḥäna: paykhamarshtsa‚ uggar baq'lüychärtsa‚ ġazoteḥ bellachärtsa, dikachärtsa. Ma khaza khili üsh shayna naq'ost khilartsa!
4:70: I dozalla Delera du‚ qacho khilla Dela khuush verg khilar.
4:71: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Larlush khilalash‚ ġazotana aradovlalash tobanashtsa a‚ ya derrige a.
4:72: Bakq'alla a, shukh ma vu sha /ġazotana/ t'äḥavüsush verg. Shuna tsḥa bokham khilcha, olu tso: "Ma niʿmat della suna Dala so tsarna yukq'eḥ (ġazoteḥ) tsakhilarna" (khilleḥara, so laziyna ya vella khir vara).
4:73: Shuna Delera siylalla khilcha‚ bilggala olu tso‚ shuna a, shena a yukq'eḥ bezam botsush sanna: "Ma deq'aza khili-q so‚ tsärtsa khila tsa megara so – beza - bokqa tolam as a bokqur ma bariy t'akqa".
4:74: Delan novq'aḥ t'om boyla shäsh ekhartakh gergara (dünenan) dakhar dukhkuchara. Delan novq'aḥ t'om bina vellarg a‚ ya tolam bäkqinarg a – t'akqa lur yu Okha tsunna siylaḥ-yokqa yal.
4:75: Ash hxunda tsa bo t'om Delan novq'aḥ a, bozharekh a‚ zudarekh a‚ berekh a zäʿap bolchu nekhan düḥa a? Üsh ma buy olush: "Tkhan Qiosh-Qoburg! Aradakha tkho hxokqu yurtara‚ shena chüra nakh zulame bolchu‚ ḥan gergara veras (ġolotsurg) vaiytaḥa tkhuna‚ ḥan gergara ġöncha vaiytaḥa tkhuna"
4:76: Iyman dillinchara t'om bo Delan novq'aḥ‚ tsateshachara t'om bo t'aġutan (shayt'anan) novq'aḥ. Shayt'anan verasash hxallakbe. Bakq'alla a, i shayt'anan mekarlo ledara ma khilla.
4:77: Ḥuna tsa go i shayga ällarsh: "Yukhadakha shayn küygash (t'amakh: t'om bar ma dekha hxintsa a – tsünan khan t'e tsa qächna)‚ lamaz hxottade‚ zakat lo"‚ shayna t'om bar t'edillicha‚ tsarakh tsḥa toba qiyrira nakhakh‚ Delakh qerarkh sanna‚ ya qin a ch'oġa. Tsara elira: "Tkhan Qiosh-Qoburg‚ hxunda t'edillina Aḥ tkhuna t'om bar. Tsḥa gergara zamane t'äḥatättina khilleḥara Aḥ tkho". Aḥ āla: "Dünenan hxuma – k'ezzig hxuma yu. Ekhart du dika sha /Delakh/ qöruchunna. Tsḥa tsürrig a zulam diyr ma dats shuna".
4:78: Shu michchaḥa khilaḥ a, dalar t'eqüur du shukh‚ ch'oġa hxittiyna bʿävnash choḥ shu khilcha a. Shayga dikanig deʾcha, tsara olu: "Hxara Delera du"‚ nagaḥ sanna shayga vonig deʾcha, tsara olu: "Hxara ḥögara du / hxay paykhamar, aḥa düytsu hxumanash baḥaneḥ/". Aḥ āla: "Masso a du Delera". Hxun du-te tsu q'omana? – Qeta tsa tügu-q iza khüluchukh.
4:79: Ḥuna t'edeana dolu dikanig – Delera du ḥuna /hxay adam/‚ ḥuna t'edeana dolu vonig – ḥögara du ḥuna /aḥ desh dolu vonig baḥaneḥ/. Okha vakhiytina ḥo /hxay Muḥammad/ nakhana t'e elcha khilla. Qacho khilla Delatsa tesh khilar.
4:80: Elchanna müt'aḥ khillarg – Dalla müt'aḥ khilla‚ yukhavällarg – ḥo tsa vakhiytina Okha tsarna t'eḥ tergo esh verg khilla.
4:81: Olu tsara: "Müt'aḥ khir du". Ḥo volchüra dʿayirzicha, tsarakh tsḥana tobano busa lelado aḥ ma de ällarg. I Dela dʿayazdesh ma vu i tsara busa lelosh derg. Bita üsh (dʿaq'asta tsarakh)‚ Dalla t'etovzha. Delatsa qacho khilla sha t'etevzhash volchunna.
4:82: Q'urʾanakh oyla tsa yo-te tsara? Iza Dela votschüngara khilcha‚ tsu choḥ dukqa khilpalonash karor ma yariy tsarna.
4:83: Qeramtsakhilarakh a‚ ya qeramakh a tsḥa ġullaq shayga deʾcha – i darzhado tsara. Tsara i derzadaḥara elchane a‚ shayna yukq'era ġullaq karaḥ dolchärga a – t'akqa tsarakh tsünan bukha t'eqüucharna khuur dara /baq'derg/. Delan komärshalla a‚ Tsünan q'inkhetam a shayna tsa khilleḥ‚ tsḥa k'ezzig bersh botsursh shayt'anna t'eḥahxüttur ma dara shu.
4:84: T'om be /hxay Muḥammad/ Delan novq'aḥ. Aḥ zhop lur dats dekq'a ḥaykh a ben. Muʾma nekhan degnash ayde /t'amna/‚ Dala satso tarlo tsateshacheran nitsq'. I Dela ch'oġa ma vu nitsq'atsa a‚ i ch'oġa ma vu beqamtsa a.
4:85: Khazachu ġillaqan aġo lätsnachunna – tsunakh dāq'a du‚ vochu ġillaqan aġo lätsnachunna – tsunakh moḥ khir bu. I Dela khilla masso a hxumanna t'eḥ nitsq' bolush.
4:86: Shayga salam delcha‚ tsul khazchüntsa salam lo ash ya yukhaderzade i. Bakq'alla a, i Dela ma khilla masso a hxumanna tergo esh.
4:87: Allahx ts'e yolu tsḥa Dela vu – qin dela vats I ben. Tso derrige a guldiyr du shu q'ematdiynaḥ‚ tsu choḥ sheko yats. Mila vu tq'a Delal khabar baq'düytsush?
4:88: Hxunda khilla shu munepiq'ashkaḥ shi toba? Dala /shu shena t'eḥ dolchu baq'dolchukh/ dʿaberzina üsh shäsh dinarg baḥaneḥ. Shu luush du nisvan Dala tilavala vitinarg? Dala tilavala vitinarg – ḥuna karor ma bats tsunna neq' /i nisvan/.
4:89: Tsarna diyzira shu iymanakh yukhadovlar, shäsh yukhadovlarkh terra‚ t'akqa shu khir dara tsḥaniysa. Ma letsa tsarakh dottaġiy, üsh Delan novq'aḥ dʿaqalkhkhalts. Nagaḥ sanna üsh düḥalbovlaḥ, sḥaletsa üsh‚ hxallakbe üsh shayna karabäkhkkinchoḥ. Tsarakh dottaġ a‚ ġöncha a ma latsa.
4:90: Shäsh shuna a‚ shayna yukq'eḥ a bart bolchu q'omana t'ebäkhkinarsh botsursh; ya shuna t'ebäkhkinarsh a, shayn dagaḥ dotsush shütsa ya /shuna düḥal dolchu shayn/ q'omatsa t'om ban ġertash botsursh a. /Shütsa a, shuna düḥal a botsursh/. Dalla liʾna khilleḥara‚ Tso shuna t'ehxittor bara üsh – tsara shütsa t'om biyr bara. Üsh shukh dʿaq'astaḥ – tsara shütsa t'om biyr bats‚ shütsa mashar biyr bu tsara. Shuna tsa bina Dala tsarna t'eḥ neq' (tsärtsa t'om ban baq'o yats shun).
4:91: Qin tsḥabersh karor bu shuna, shäsh luush shütsa teshame khila a‚ shayn q'omatsa (kerstanashtsa) teshame khila a‚ shäsh pitane ma-qaykqina, tsu chu bulush. Üsh shukh dʿa tsa berzaḥ (shütsa t'om tsa besh)‚ shütsa mashar tsa baḥ‚ shayn küygash shuna /t'eqiydochukh/ tsa sovtsadaḥ, sḥaletsa üsh‚ hxallakbe üsh shayna karabäkhkkinchoḥ. Tsarna t'eḥ Okha shuna bilggala neq' bina (tsärtsa t'om ban mega shuna).
4:92: Tsa khilla /tsq'a a megash/ muʾma stagana muʾma stag vēr, ġalatvälla ben. Tsḥammo ġalatvälla muʾma stag vēḥ, muʾma lay a parġatvokqur vu (yokqur yu) tso‚ tsünan ohxlanna dʿalush dolu diyat a lur du tso‚ tsara /tsunna gechdina/ saġina tsa ditaḥ. Nagaḥ sanna i (i tsa khuush vellarg) khilleḥ shütsa mostaġalla dolchu q'omakh‚ sha muʾma a volush – muʾma lay parġatvokqur vu (yokqur yu). I khilaḥ shena a, shuna a yukq'eḥ bart (mashar) bolchu q'omakh – dʿalush dolu diyat lur du tsünan ohxlanna‚ muʾma lay a parġatvokqur vu. Shegaḥ (parġatvakqa lay) vatsaḥ (ya i etsa taro a) yatsaḥ, - t'ett'a shina battaḥ markhanash qobur du tso‚ Delera gechdar dökhush. I Dela Sha khuush a‚ ḥukma /niysa/ desh a khilla.
4:93: Tsḥammo, shena khuʾusheḥ, muʾma stag veḥ‚ tsunna beqam – zhözhakhati yu‚ tsu choḥ i guttar lättar volush‚ Dela öġaz a vakhana tsunna‚ neʿalt a älla‚ Tso kechdina tsunna deza-dokqa ʿazap.
4:94: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Shäsh Delan novq'aḥ aradevlla dolush‚ ash bilgaldakqa: shayga salam dellachünga ma āla: "Ḥo muʾma vats"‚ dünenan dakharan bakhame dogdokhush – Dalla gergaḥ yokqa hxons yu. Ishtta khilla shu ḥalkha – Dala shuna niʿmat della. Ash bilgaldakqa. Bakq'alla a, i Dela khilla ash diyrig dika khuush.
4:95: Tsḥaterra bats muʾma nakhakh shäsh ġazotakh tsḥa a baḥana dotsush bukhabüsursh a‚ shäsh shayn ḥolatsa a‚ shayn sinoshtsa a‚ Delan novq'aḥ ġazot desh bersh a. Shayn ḥolatsa a‚ shayn sinoshtsa a ġazot desh bersh darzhatsa bazbina Dala bukhabüsucharal. Hxoranna Dala vaʿda yina khazanig (yalsamane) yala. Ġazot desh bersh bazbina Dala bukhabüsucharal siylaḥ – yokqachu yolatsa (bokqa mēla balartsa).
4:96: Shegarchu darzhashtsa‚ gechdartsa‚ q'inkhetamtsa /bazbina Tso üsh/. Dela khilla Sha gechdesh verg a‚ q'inkhetame verg a.
4:97: Bakq'alla a, shayna zulamash dina, malikasha dʿaetsna bolchärga er ma du: "Shu michaḥ khillera?" Tsara er du: "Tkho khillera lättaḥ (dünenaḥ) dolush qechara tkhuna t'eḥ nitsq' besh". Er du: "Tq'a Delan latta shortta datsara shu qechuḥa dʿaqalkha?" Üsh ma bu shayn chuġoyla zhözhakhati ersh. Ma von khilla-q /tseran/ qollam!
4:98: Bozharekh a‚ zudarekh a‚ berekh a shayna nitsq' khilla /dʿabakha/, taro tsa khillarsh a‚ k'elḥarbovla neq' tsa kariynarsh a botsursh (tsarna gechdan tam bu Dala).
4:99: Tsarna bekhk tsa billa a‚ gechdan a tarlo Dala. I Dela khilla q'inkhetame a‚ gechdesh verg a.
4:100: Delan düḥa dʿaqelkhinchunna lättaḥ karor ma yu dukqa t'etovzhiylash a‚ shorto a. Dalla a‚ elchanna a düḥalvödush shen ts'era aravälcha, tsunakh valar khilcha (i novq'aḥ velcha) – tsünan yal Dalla t'eyözhna. I Dela gechdesh verg a‚ q'inkhetame verg a khilla.
4:101: Shu lättakhula devlla lelash, shuna q'a dats ash lamaz dotstsa dicha‚ nagaḥ shu qörush delaḥ tsateshachara shayna pitana darna (t'elatarna). Bakq'alla a, tsatesharsh khilla shuna bilggala mostaġiy.
4:102: Ḥo (paykhamar) tsarna yukq'eḥ (ġazoteḥ) volush‚ tsarna lamazna ḥalkha hxötticha‚ tsarakh tsḥa toba ḥötsa hxuttiyla, shayn gerz sḥaötsiyla. Üsh suzhude bakhcha (tseran rakaʿat cheqdälcha), shuna t'eḥa qibersh hxüttiyla. T'akqa lamaz daza toba yoġiyla (ḥuna t'eḥaḥ lamaz dan). Tsara lamaz doyla ḥötsa larlush, gerz a sḥaötsiyla tsara. Tsa tesharsh luush bara shu shayn gerzakh a, hxumanekh ġopal (tergo tsa esh) khüliyla – t'akqa üsh shuna t'eqüur bara tsḥa ġulch. Shuna q'a dats, nagaḥ sanna shuna tsatam belaḥ doġa baḥaneḥ, ya shu tsomgush delaḥ, ash shayn gerz oḥadillarkh. Shu larlush khila. Bakq'alla a, Dala kech ma dina tsateshacharna siysaza dolu ʿazap.
4:103: Shäsh lamaz qochushdicha, Dela ḥakhave iraḥ a, oḥakhiʾna a‚ shayn aġoshna t'etevzhina a. Shäsh qeramakh ḥalkhadevlcha, lamaz hxottade (qochchush). Bakq'alla a, lamaz khilla muʾma nakhana khan tökhna t'edillina.
4:104: Shu ledara ma khilalash /shäshtsa mostaġalla yolu/ nakh lakha (ġazot dan). Shu lazosh khilarkh, üsh a lazosh ma bu, shu lazosh sanna. Shu-m Delera tsara dog tsa dokhuchu hxumane dogdokhush a du. I Dela khilla Sha khuush verg a, ḥukma /niysa/ desh verg a.
4:105: Bakq'alla a, Okha dossiyna ḥöga zhayna, baq'ontsa aḥ nakhana yukq'eḥ ḥukma darḥama Dala ḥayna gaytinchüntsa. Ḥo ma khilalaḥ yamartkhoyn düḥa q'üysush.
4:106: Dele gechdar dekha. Bakq'alla a, Dela khilla gechdesh verg a, q'inkhetame verg a.
4:107: Aḥ ma q'iysalaḥ shäsh yamartlo esh bolcheran düḥa. Bakq'alla a, Dalla tsa veza q'inosh dartsa yamartlo esh verg.
4:108: Üsh dʿaḥullush bu nakhakh, dʿaḥullush bats Delakh, tq'a Iza üsh gush vu, tsara busa I reza votsu deshnash düytsush. Dela khilla tsara dinchunna go lotsush verg.
4:109: Hxay, shu ma du tseran düḥa dünenan dakhareḥ q'üysush. Ḥan q'üysur du Delatsa tseran duḥa q'ematdiynaḥ? Ya mila khir vu tsarna t'eḥ vekal /tseran ġarolkho/?
4:110: Milla velaḥ a vonig desh, ya shena zulam desh, t'akqa tso Dele gechdar dekhcha‚ tsunna i Dela karor ma vu gechdesh a, q'inkhetame a.
4:111: Milla velaḥ a q'a desh – i desh du tso shena. Dela khilla khuush verg a‚ ḥukma/niysa/ desh verg a.
4:112: Milla velaḥ a ġalat ya q'a desh, t'akqa i ts'ena volchunna t'etöttush – i ma vu ircha khartsderg a‚ bilggala q'a a shena t'elotsush.
4:113: Delan komärshalla a‚ Tsünan q'inkhetam a ḥuna tsa khilleḥara – tsarakh tsḥa toba ma yara ḥo tilo luush. Tsara-m tilor batsara shäsh ben. Tsḥa hxumma a tsara zen diyr dats ḥuna. Dala ḥöga dossiyna zhayna a, ḥeq'alalla a‚ Tso ʿamiyra ḥuna ḥuna tsa khuush khillarg. Yokqa khilla ḥuna t'eḥ Delan komärshalla.
4:114: Duqadolchu tseran q'aylakhchu q'amelekh payda bats, nagaḥ sanna saġitsa, dikanig dartsa, nakhana yukq'eḥ bart bartsa omra desh üsh batsaḥ. I desh verg milla a velaḥ a, Dela reza khilare dog a dokhush, t'akqa Okha tsunna lur ma yu siylaḥ- yokqa yal.
4:115: Milla velaḥ a, elchanna düḥalvällarg, shena niysa neq' bilgalbällachul t'äḥa, muʾma botsu nekhan neq'ana t'äḥahxöttinarg – i vütur vu Okha sha khärzhinchu novq'aḥ, vokhüytur vu zhözhakhati chu. Ma von khilla i tsünan qollam!
4:116: Bakq'alla a, Dala gechdesh dats Shetsa naq'ost latsar, gechdiyr du i dotsurg /qin q'inosh/ Shena luuchunna. Milla velaḥ a Delatsa naq'ost lotsush – tilavella i genarchu tilavalartsa.
4:117: Iza (Dela) a vitina, üsh qoyqush ma bu stechu hxumanashka, üsh qoyqush ma bu düḥaldällachu shayt'ane.
4:118: Dala neʿalt älla tsunna. Tso (ibliso Dele) ällera: "Ḥan lekh tsḥa bilggala dāq'a saygaḥa dokqur du as.
4:119: Tilor ma bu as üsh, oybur ma bu as tseran /kharts/ laamash, omra diyr ma du as tsarna – bezhniyn lergash khedor ma du tsara, omra diyr ma du as tsarna – khüytsur ma du tsara Delan din" (qollar). Dela a vitina, i shayt'a shena dottaġ lätsnarg – eshna i q'ästinchu eshamtsa.
4:120: Vaʿda yo tso tsarna‚ kharts laamash daga qüssu tsarna. Shayt'ano tsarna vaʿda esh ma yats khartsderg ben.
4:121: Üsh bu shayna chuġoyla zhözhakhati khir ersh‚ karor dats tsarna tsunakh k'elḥardovlar.
4:122: Tq'a iyman dillinarsh a‚ dika ʿamalash yinarsh a – Okha chubokhüytur bu üsh /yalsamanin/ boshmashka, shayn bukhakhula khish ökhush yolchu. Tsigaḥ üsh guttar khir bu – Delan vaʿda baq' khilartsa. Tq'a mila vu Delal dosh baq' olush? (Ḥenan dosh du Delan dashal baq'?) - /tsḥa a vats/.
4:123: Shun laamashtsa a‚ zhaynin ohxlanan laamashtsa a dats iza. Milla velaḥ a, vonig desh – tsüntsa beqam biyr bu tsunna. Karor vats tsunna Dela votsurg veras a, ġöncha a.
4:124: Milla velaḥ a, dika ʿamalsh esh, börsha i velaḥ a‚ ya zuda elaḥ a, sha muʾma (iyman dillinarg) volush – üsh chu ġur bu /yalsamanin/ besha. Tsḥa- tsürrig zulam diyr dats tsarna!
4:125: Mila vu khaza dintsa, sha dika ʿamal a esh, shen yuḥ Dalla müt'aḥ a yina, sha baq'dolchunna t'etevzhina khillachu Ibrahximan millatana t'äḥa hxöttina khillachul sov? Dala dottaġ letsira Ibrahxim.
4:126: Delan du stiglanashkaḥ mel derg a‚ lättaḥ mel derg a. Dela khilla masso a hxuma chulotsush /Shen ʿilmantsa/.
4:127: Ḥöga ḥekham bökhush bu üsh zudariyn ḥoq'eḥ. Aḥ āla: "Dala ḥekham biyr bu shuna tseran ḥoq'eḥ a‚ /dovziytur du shuna/ zudariy ash shayna irsana qachorakh lätsna, Q'urʾana choḥ döshush derg a, /ishtta dovziytur du shuna/ baylaḥ disinchu zudaberekh a, shu shayna üsh bālo luush, tsarna doġu urdo qochchush dala tsa luush bolchu, zäʿap khilla k'elbisinchiyn beriyn ḥoq'eḥ a /ḥekham biyr bu Dala/: ash niyso lattae boberashkaḥ. Ash dikanig daḥ – i Dela i khuush vu".
4:128: Nagaḥ sanna zuda qörush khilaḥ, mayra shekh khervala ġertarkh‚ shega tidam tsakhilarkh – tsarna shinna (mayrachunna a‚ zudchunna a) a q'a dats vovshiy yukq'eḥ maslaḥat darkh‚ maslaḥat tölush du. Bʿärmetsigalla lättash yu sinoshtsa. Shu dika khilaḥ‚ shu Delakh qörush khilaḥ – i Dela ma khilla ash diyrig dika khuush (Tso dikachüntsa beqam biyr bu shuna).
4:129: Shuna tsq'a a nitsq' qochur bats zudarshna yukq'eḥ niyso yan‚ shuna mel liʾcha a. Dʿa ma derza /shayna tsa ezachu zudchukh/ qochchush, ash i yutush /hxavaeḥ/ qazaellarg sanna. Ash maslaḥat daḥ‚ shu Delakh qeraḥ – i Dela khilla gechdesh verg a‚ q'inkhetame verg a.
4:130: I shiʾ (mar a‚ zuda a) q'astaḥ – Dala lur du /tsarakh/ hxoranna Shen shortta dolchukh. I Dela khilla shortta (niʿmat) dolush a‚ ḥukma /niysa/ desh a.
4:131: Tsu Delan du stiglanashkaḥ mel derg a‚ lättaḥ mel derg a. Okha veset dina shul ḥalkha zhayna daiytinchärga a‚ shüga a Delakh qera, älla. Ash kerstadaḥ – tsu Delan du stiglanashkaḥ mel derg a‚ lättaḥ mel derg a. I Dela khilla ḥal dolush verg a‚ Shena /massara a/ khastam besh verg a.
4:132: Delan du stiglanashkaḥ mel derg a‚ lättaḥ mel derg a. Delatsa qacho khilla /Shen layn ʿamalsh/ ʿalash esh verg khilar.
4:133: Shena liʾcha‚ shu dʿadōkhur du Tso‚ hxay nakh‚ qibersh bālor bu. Khilla Dela tsunna t'eḥ nitsq' bolush.
4:134: Dünenan mēla bezash milla velaḥ a‚ Delan bu dünenan mēla a‚ ekhartan mēla a. Dela khilla khezash verg a‚ gush verg a.
4:135: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Shu khilalash ch'oġa dʿahxittina niysontsa teshalla desh Dalla - shena t'eḥ delaḥ a, ya shayn dena-nanna t'eḥ delaḥ a‚ ya gergarcharna t'eḥ delaḥ a. I /shena t'eḥ teshalla desh verg/ ḥal dolush velaḥ a‚ ya peq'ar velaḥ a – Dela vu tsu shinnal /leram ban/ ḥaq' verg (dika khuush vu tsarna shinna paydane derg; üsh shiʾ a ʿalashbiyrig Dela vu). Shu t'äḥa ma hxittalash degan dezarshna – shu /baq'dolchukh/ dʿatovzha qeramna. Ash /teshalla/ khiytsadaḥ ya /i teshalla dan shu/ düḥal khilaḥ – bakq'alla a, i Dela ma khilla ash diyrig dika khuush.
4:136: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Shu tesha Delakh a‚ Tsünan elchanakh a‚ Tso shen elchane dossosh khillachu zhaynikh a‚ Tso ḥalkha dossiynachu zhaynikh a. Delakh a‚ Tsünan malikekh a‚ Tsünan zhaynekh a‚ Tsünan elchanekh a‚ T'äḥarchu diynakh a tsateshnarg – i tila ma vella genarchu (k'orggerachu) tilartsa.
4:137: Bakq'alla a, i teshash khillarsh‚ t'akqa kerstadesh‚ yukha a teshash‚ yukha a kerstadesh‚ t'akqa kerstadartsa sovbüylush bersh – Dela vats tsarna gechdiyr dolush a‚ üsh nisbiyr bolush a /niysachu/ novq'a.
4:138: Aḥ qaʾ bakqa munepiq'ashka tsarna lazosh dolu ʿazap khilartsa.
4:139: Ishttanash bu üsh, muʾma nakh bitina, tsa teshash bersh shayna dottaġiy liytsinarsh. Siylalla lökhu-te tsara tsärgaḥ? Bakq'alla a, siylalla errige a Delan ma yu!
4:140: Tso (Dala) shüga zhayni choḥ masiyttaza dossosh khilla: nagaḥ sanna shuna Delan ayatash khartsdesh a‚ siysazdesh a khazaḥ‚ tsärtsa oḥa ma khovsha‚ älla, – üsh qechu khabarna t'eberzzalts. Vüshta, – shu, bakq'alla a, üsh sanna khir du. Bakq'alla a, tsu Dala gulbiyr bolush ma bu munepiq'ash a‚ tsatesharsh a zhözhakhati choḥ – berrige a.
4:141: Üsh bu shu tergaldesh ʿash. Shuna Delera tolam khilcha‚ tsara olu: "Tq'a tkho a datsara shütsa?" Nagaḥ sanna tsateshacharna (tolaman) dāq'a khilcha‚ olu: "Tkho datsara shuna ġo dan ġertash‚ shu ʿalashdesh muʾma nakhakh?" Dala ḥukma diyr du shuna yukq'eḥ q'ematdiynaḥ. Tsq'a a tsateshacharna muʾma nakhana t'eḥ neq' lur bats Dala.
4:142: Bakq'alla a, i munepiq'ash Dela ʿekho ġerta. I vu üsh ʿekhosh. Shäsh lamazna hxitticha‚ üsh hxüttu malloy (tsa luush), nakhana shäsh gaytarḥama‚ k'ezzig ben Dela tsa ḥekhavo tsara.
4:143: Üsh lestash (dʿasaḥiyzash) bu otsunna (iymanna a, kerstanallina a) yukq'eḥ: hxoqarakh a (muʾma nakhakh a) tsa qeta‚ vuqarakh a (kerstanekh a) tsa qeta. Sha Dala tilvala vitinchunna ḥuna karor ma bats /i nisvan/ neq'.
4:144: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Ash ma letsa tsatesharsh, dottaġiy bay, muʾma nakh bitiy. Shu luush du Dala shayna t'eḥ bilggala delil dan?
4:145: Bakq'alla a, munepiq'ash khir ma bu /zhözhakhatin/ ts'eran uggar bukharchu t'eġanna (ġata) t'eḥ‚ ḥuna karor ma vats tsarna ġöncha.
4:146: Shäsh tōba a dina‚ dikanash a dina‚ Delatsa ch'aġbella, shayn din Dalla ts'andina bersh botsursh. Üsh muʾma nakhatsa bu. T'äḥa lur yu Dala muʾma nakhana siylaḥ-yokqa yal.
4:147: Hxun diyr du Dala shuna ʿazap dina, barkalla olush a, teshash a shu khilcha? I Dela khilla barkalle verg a‚ khuush verg a.
4:148: Dalla tsa deza von khabarsh darzhadar‚ shena zulam dincho ben. I Dela khilla khezash verg a‚ khuush verg a.
4:149: Ash guchudakqaḥ dikanig‚ ya ḥuldaḥ i‚ ya gechdaḥ /shena von dinchunna/ vonig, – /mela bu shuna/. Bakq'alla a, i Dela Sha ma khilla gechdesh verg a‚ nitsq' qochush verg a.
4:150: Bakq'alla a, Delakh a‚ Tsünan elchanekh a tsa teshash bersh‚ shäsh luush bersh Dalla a‚ Tsünan elchaniyn a yuq' eġo‚ shäsh olush bersh: "Tesha tkho tsḥabolcharakh‚ tsa tesha tkho vuqarakh"‚ shäsh luush bersh tsu yukq'eḥ neq' latsa (karaban) –
4:151: Bakq'alla a, üsh ma bu ḥaq'bolu kerstanash. Tsu kerstanashna Okha kech ma dina siysaza dolu ʿazap.
4:152: Shäsh Delakh a‚ tsünan elchanekh a teshnarsh‚ tsarakh tsḥa a tsa q'estosh bersh – üsh bu Okha shayna t'äḥa yal lur ersh. I Dela khilla gechdesh verg a‚ q'inkhetame verg a.
4:153: Ḥöga dökhu zhaynin ohxlano shayga stiglara zhayna dossade‚ bokhush. Musaga tsul dokqanig diykhira tsara‚ elira: "Dela gayta tkhöga guchchaḥ". T'akqa stiglara ts'aro sḥaletsira üsh shayn zulam baḥaneḥ. T'akqa esa sḥaletsira tsara (ʿibadat dan) shayga bilgalonash sḥaeʾnachul t'äḥa. Tsunna a gechdira Okha. Musaga delira Okha bilgala delil.
4:154: Tseran t'ekhula lam aybira Okha, tsärtsa bartbesh /i t'elatsiytarḥama/‚ Okha elira tsärga: "Neʿarekhula chöḥadovla, suzhud desh". Elira Okha tsärga: "/Delan/ dozanekh ma dovlalash shötan diynaḥ". Tsärgara nütsq'ala vaʿda iytsira Okha.
4:155: Tsara i shayn bart bokhorna‚ üsh Delan ayatekh tsatesharna‚ tsara tsḥa a bekhk botsush paykhamarsh bayarna‚ tseran "tkhan degnash muzhult (ḥarchiyna) du", älla, dosh baḥaneḥ /Dala neʿalt älla tsarna/. Dala muhxar tökhna tseran /degnashna/ üsh tsateshar baḥaneḥ. Tsḥa ʿezzig bersh ben /tsarakh/ teshar bolush bats.
4:156: Üsh tsateshar baḥaneḥ‚ tseran Maryamakh lätsna älla dolu dosh – deza-dokqa eladita baḥaneḥ /neʿalt älla tsarna/.
4:157: Tseran: "Bakq'alla a, Okha viyna Masiḥ – Maryaman k'ant Delan elcha ʿiysa", – älla, dosh baḥaneḥ a (i derrige a baḥaneḥ ʿazap dina Okha tsarna). Viyna vats tsara i‚ irkh öllina a vats tsara i. Mukhkha delaḥ a, tsarna /tsḥa qin/ tarvellera tsunakh. Bakq'alla a, tsu choḥ khilpalo yinarsh – tsunakh shekoneḥ bu-q üsh. Tsünan tsḥa a ʿilma dats tsärgaḥ – shayna mottalush dolchunna t'äḥahxottar ben. Tsa viyna tsara i, bakq'alla a,
4:158: Dala Shena gerga ḥalaväkqina i. I Dela khilla veza verg a‚ ḥukma /niysa/ desh verg a.
4:159: Zhaynin ohxlanakh tsḥa a vats tsunakh teshar volush ben i valale‚ q'ematdiynaḥ i khir vu tsarna düḥal tesh.
4:160: Zhügtashkara dälla zulam baḥaneḥ ḥaram dira Okha tsarna dikanash‚ ḥalkha shayna ḥanal khilla dolu‚ Delan neq'akh tsara dukqannash dʿatovzhor baḥaneḥ a.
4:161: Tsara riba etsar baḥaneḥ, shayna dikhkina khilla dolu‚ tsara khartsontsa nekhan däkhni daar baḥaneḥ a. Tsarakh kerstanashna lazosh dolu ʿazap kechdina Okha.
4:162: Mukhkha delaḥ a, tsarakh k'orga ʿilma khuush bersh a‚ muʾmanash a iyman dillina bu ḥöga dössinchünga a (Q'urʾane)‚ ḥol ḥalkha dössinchünga a‚ lamaz hxottosh a bolush, lush bu zakat‚ Delakh a‚ ekhar (t'äkhḥarchu) diynakh a teshash bu. Tsarna t'äḥa Okha lur ma yu siylaḥ – yokqa yal.
4:163: Bakq'alla a, Okha väḥiy daiytira ḥöga‚ Nuḥe a‚ tsul t'äḥa paykhamarshka daiytarkh terra. Väḥiy daiytira Okha Ibrahxime a‚ Ismaʿile a‚ Isḥaq'e a‚ Yaʿq'ube a‚ Yaʿq'uban t'äḥene a‚ ʿiysaga a‚ Ayube a‚ Yunuse a‚ Hxarune a‚ Suleymane a. Davude delira Okha Zabur.
4:164: Elchanashka‚ Okha ḥayga ḥalkha biytsina bolchu‚ Okha ḥayga biytsina botschu a /elchanashka väḥiy daiytira Okha/. Musaga khabar diytsira Dala /sḥadillinchu/ diytsartsa.
4:165: Elchanashka‚ shäsh qaʾ bokqush khilla bolchu a‚ qeram tüysush khilla bolchu a /daiytira Okha väḥiy/ nakhana Dalla t'eḥ delil tsakhiliytarḥama elchanel t'äḥa. Dela veza verg a‚ ḥukma /niysa/ desh verg a vu.
4:166: Mukhkha delaḥ a, Dala teshalla do ḥöga dossinchüntsa – Tso dossiyna i Shen ʿilmantsa. Malikasha a do teshalla. Qacho khilla Delatsa tesh khilar.
4:167: Bakq'alla a, i tsateshnarsh‚ Delan novq'ara /nakh/ yustakhbokhush bersh – üsh tilabella genarchu tilartsa.
4:168: Bakq'alla a, i tsateshnarsh‚ zulam dinarsh – ma vats Dela tsarna gechdan vollush‚ üsh nisban /vollush niysachu/ novq'a‚
4:169: Zhözhakhatin novq'a ben‚ üsh tsu choḥ daima lättash. I khilla Dalla atta.
4:170: Hxay nakh! Shüga veana elcha baq'ontsa shun Qiosh-Qobuchüngara‚ ash iyman dilla – iza dika du shuna. Ash kerstadaḥ – Delan ma du stiglanashkaḥ a‚ lättaḥ a mel derg. Dela khilla khuush verg a‚ ḥukma /niysa/ desh verg a.
4:171: Hxay zhaynin ohxla! Duqa t'ekh ma dovla shayn dineḥ. Ma āla Dalla t'eḥ baq'derg ben. Bakq'alla a, Masūḥ, Maryaman k'ant ʿiysa – Delan elcha vu‚ Tsünan dosh du‚ Tso sha della khilla dolu Maryame‚ Tsüngara sa a du – iyman dilla Dele a‚ Tsünan elchanashka a. Ash ma āla: "Qoʾ". Sovtsa – shuna dika khir du. Allahx – tsḥa Dela vu‚ ts'ena vu i Shen dözalkho khilarkh. Tsünan ma du stiglanashkaḥ a‚ lättaḥ a mel derg. Qacho khilla Delatsa vekal khilar.
4:172: Kuralla yanne a yiyr yatsara Masūḥa Delan lay khila‚ gerga dolchu malikasha a yiyr yatsara. Tsünan ʿibadatna kuralla yinarg, dozalla dinarg – t'akqa Shena t'e gulviyr volush vu Tso masso a.
4:173: Iyman dillinarsh a‚ dikanash dinarsh a – tsarna beqamna lur yu shayn yal‚ Shen komärshallitsa Tso sovbokhur bu üsh. Amma kuralla yinarsh a‚ dozalla dinarsh a – ʿazap diyr du tsarna lazosh dolchu ʿazaptsa‚ tsarna karor vats Dela votsurg doladiyrig a‚ ġöncha a.
4:174: Hxay nakh! Eana shüga shun Qiosh-Qobuchungara bilgalo. Q'egina nur dossiyna Okha shüga.
4:175: Dele iyman dillinarsh‚ Tsüntsa ch'aġbellarsh – t'akqa qachor bu Tso üsh Shegara q'inkhetame a‚ komärshalle a‚ nisbiyr bu Tso üsh Shena t'e niysachu novq'a.
4:176: Ḥöga /hxay Muḥammad/ zhop dökhush bu üsh tsḥatstsa khattarshna. Aḥ āla: "Dala qetor du shu shen dözalkho ya da, bukha a tsa vüsush, vellachun ḥoq'eḥ: nagaḥ sanna tsḥa stag laḥ‚ bukhavüsush shen dözalkho a, /da a/ votsush‚ bukhayusush yu tsḥa yisha – tsunna tso bukhaditinchukh niyssa akh lur du. Vashas ötsu yishin derrig irs‚ nagaḥ sanna tsünan (yishin) dözalkho vatsaḥ. Nagaḥ sanna shi yisha bukha yisina elaḥ – tsu shinna, qo dāq'a dina, shi dāq'a lur du tso bukhaditinchukh. Nagaḥ sanna bukhabisina belaḥ vezhariy a‚ yizhariy a – börshachunna shina zudchunna qochu dāq'a lur du. Shuna i bilgaldesh vu Dela shu tila tsadalarḥama. I Dela masso a hxuma khuush vu.
5:1: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Qochushbe ch'aġamash. Ḥanal dina shuna ḥaybanash, shuna /ḥaram du älla/ diytsina khilla dotsursh a‚ shu iḥram dikhkina dolush, tallar dina eqa dotsurg a. Bakq'alla a, Dela ḥukma desh vu Shena luʾurg.
5:2: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Ash ḥanal ma de Delan ʿadatash (Dala ḥaram dinarg ḥanal ma de)‚ ḥaram bettanash a‚ ḥäzhts'a chu ġurbanna daliyna dolu bezhana a /ma die i/‚ shayn logakh tütesh qaziyna dolu ḥaybanash a‚ Ḥarme bäkhkina nakh‚ shayn Qiosh-Qobuchüngara dozalle a‚ rezakhilare a dogdokhush bolchu /lara üsh‚ tergal de i ḥurmatash/. Shäsh ḥäzhalla dästicha, tallar de shayna aqaroshna. /Ḥalkha/ shu Deza Mäzhdige tsa dütush khilla bolchärga shun khillachu tsabezamo shu ma dügiyla /hxintsa/ tsarna t'elata (Delan dozanekh dovlarna t'e). Ash vovshiyn ġo latsa dikanna t'eḥ‚ Delakh qerarna t'eḥ. Ash vovshiyn ġo ma latsa q'inna t'eḥ‚ t'elatarna t'eḥ. Shu Delakh qera /i tsa dan/. Bakq'alla a, i Dela ch'oġa vu beqam bareḥ.
5:3: Shuna ḥaram yina q'en ella hxuma a‚ ts'iy a‚ ḥaqin zhizhig a‚ Dela votschun ts'e yokqush diyna /bezhana/ a‚ lag taʿiyna (sa düq'na) diynarg a‚ shena hxuma tökhna diynarg a‚ laqara oḥadözhna dellarg a‚ qecho maʿa tökhna diynarg a‚ eqo diynarg a, ash ts'andina dotsurg (eqo lätsnachul täḥa ash ḥaqa dezzachu kepara urs khäqna delaḥ – megar du daa)‚ t'ulgana (ts'ushna)lerina urs ḥäqnarg a‚ ash pkherchashtsapal tesna deq'na khillarg a. I pesaq' hxuma du (Dalla müt'aḥ khilarkh dʿavalar). Takhana dog dillina kerstanasha shun dinakh. Shu tsarakh ma qera. Shu Sokh qera. Takhana cheqdäkqina As shuna shun din‚ qochushdina shuna Sayn niʿmat. Reza khilla So Islam shuna din khilartsa. Nagaḥ sanna tsḥanna ch'oġachu matsalleḥ /tsarakh hxuma/ tsa välla yaaḥ, sha q'a darna t'eġertash votsush‚– bakq'alla a, Dela gechdesh a‚ q'inkhetame a ma vu (tsu ḥaram yolchukh k'ezzig hxuma yaa megar du tsunna matsalla tsa vala).
5:4: Ḥöga /hxay Muḥammad/ khöttu tsara: "Hxun ḥanal yina yu shayna /yaa/?" bokhush. Aḥ āla: "Ḥanal yina shuna ts'ena hxumanash a‚ Dala shayna ʿamiynchukh – ash ʿamiyna khilla dolchu dyinato lätsnarg a. Ash daa tso shayna lätsnachukh‚ Delan ts'e yakqa tsunna t'eḥ‚ Delakh qera shu. Bakq'alla a, i Dela sikha vu ḥesap dareḥ ".
5:5: Takhana ḥanal yina shuna ts'ena hxumanash‚ zhaynin ohxlan qacha a ḥanal bu shuna‚ shun qacha ḥanal bu tsarna a. Muʾma zudarekh ts'ena ġillaqe bersh (nakhatsa tsa lelash bersh)‚ shul ḥalkha shayga zhayna dossiynacharekh ts'ena ġillaqe zudariy (nakhatsa tsa lelash bersh) ḥanal bu shuna /mare balo/‚ ash tseran makh belcha‚ shu bökhanig dan ġertash tsa khilcha‚ dottaġ latsa ġertash datsaḥ. Iyman khartsdesh milla velaḥ a – tsünan ʿamal yayna‚ ekhartaḥ i khir vu eshnacharakh.
5:6: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Shäsh lamazna t'ehxüttush (lamazna kechlush), shayn yakhḥash yila‚ küygash a dila golashka qachchalts‚ shayn körtakh /ḥazh t'era k'esark'agchu qachchalts khitsa t'adiyna shina küygan p'elgash dʿa-sḥa/ ḥaqa‚ kogash bila ḥorkanashka qachchalts. Shayna t'eḥ khi delaḥ – liycha. Nagaḥ sanna shu tsomgush delaḥ‚ ya novq'aḥ delaḥ‚ ya shukh tsḥaʾ ts'anonna vakhanchüra veʾneḥ‚ ya shu zudarekh ḥaqadelleḥ‚ shuna khi tsa karadaḥ – tema de ts'enchu lattatsa. Ash ḥaqa tsunakh (lattakh) shayn yakhḥekh a‚ küygekh a. Shuna khalo yan luush vats Dela‚ mukhkha delaḥ a, shu ts'andan luush vu I Shen niʿmat shuna qochushkhiliytarḥama‚ shu khilaḥara barkalla olush.
5:7: Ash dagadaiyta shayna khilla Delan niʿmat‚ Tsünan bart Sha shütsa bina khilla bolu‚ shäsh ālar /dagadaiyta/: "Laduġush a du, müt'aḥ a du"‚– älla. Shu Delakh qeralash. Bakq'alla a, i Dela Sha khuush ma vu degnashkaḥ derg.
5:8: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Shu khilalash hxittina Dalla teshash khilla niysontsa. Tsḥana nakhe bolchu tsabezamo shu diggane a ma dügiyla niyso tsayarna t'e. Niyso elash‚ i gerga yu Delakh qerarna‚ shu Delakh qeralash. Bakq'alla a, i Dela sov dika khuush vu ash diyrig.
5:9: Dala vaʿda yina iyman dillincharna a‚ dika ʿamalsh yinacharna a – tsarna khir du gechdar a‚ siylaḥ-yokqa yal a.
5:10: /Delakh/ tsateshnarsh a‚ Tkhan ayatash khartsdinarsh a – üsh bu zhözhakhatin day.
5:11: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Ash dagadaiyta shayna t'eḥ khilla dolu Delan niʿmat. Tsḥa q'am ma dariy bala qächna shuna t'e küygash qovdo – Tso dukhatettira shukh tseran küygash. Shu Delakh qeralash‚ Dalla t'etevzhiyla muʾma nakh.
5:12: Dala bart bira Israilan k'entashtsa‚ tsarakh shiytta teshame stag vakhiytira Okha. Dala elira: "So shütsa vu.” Ash lamaz hxottadaḥ‚ zakat laḥ‚ San elchanekh teshaḥ‚ ash tsärgaḥa ġo dakqaḥ, ash Dalla /yukhalurg/ khaza deqar laḥ – shun vonash doyur ma du As‚ boshmashna chu (yalsamane) dokhüytur ma du shu‚ shena bukhakhula khish ökhush yolchu. Tsul t'äḥa shukh kerstanalla dinarg – niysa neq' tiliynarg ma vu i.
5:13: Tsara i shayn vaʿda (bart) yokhorna neʿalt älla Okha tsarna‚ tseran degnash dina q'iza‚ dosh khüytsush bu üsh shen mettigera. Ditsdina tsara /Dala/ shayga /ḥekhamtsa/ dossiyna khillachukh tsḥa dāq'a. Ḥo (hxay Muḥammad) dʿatülur ma vats tsärgara teshnabekhkana t'enisvlarkh‚ tsarakh tsḥa k'ezzig botschucharakh ben. Q'int'era vala tsarna‚ gechde tsarna. Bakq'alla a, Dalla duqabeza dikanig desh bersh.
5:14: Okha vaʿda iytsira tkho nasarash (khristianash) du ällachärgara a - tsara a ditsdira tsḥa dāq'a shetsa shayna ḥekham bina khilla dolchukh. Tsarna yuq'atesira Okha mostaġalla a‚ öġazlo a q'ematde hxottalts‚ t'akqa düytsur du Dala‚ üsh hxun desh khilla, älla.
5:15: Hxay zhaynin ohxla! Veana shüga Tkhan elcha‚ ash zhaynikh ḥuldesh khilla dolu dukqanig shuna bilgaldesh volu‚ duqanig guchu tsa dokqush a dütu tso. Deana shüga Delera nur a‚ bilgala zhayna a.
5:16: Tsüntsa (Q'urʾantsa) nisvo Dala Sha rezakhilarna t'äḥahxöttinarg masharan neq'ashka‚ bodanashkara nüre arabokhu Tso üsh Shen laamtsa‚ nisbo Tso üsh niysachu novq'a.
5:17: Kerstanalla dina shäsh ällachara: "Bakq'alla a, Dela – I ma vu Maryaman k'ant Masūḥ". Aḥ āla: "Delera tsḥanna hxumanna doladalush mila vu, Tsunna liʾcha hxallakvan Maryaman k'ant Masūḥ a‚ tsünan nana a‚ lättaḥ mel verg a?" Delan ma du stigaliyn a‚ lättan a dolalla‚ tsarna yukq'eḥ derg a. Shena luurg qullush vu I. I Dela masso a hxumanna t'eḥ nitsq' qochush ma vu.
5:18: Zhügtasha a‚ nasarasha a elira: "Tkho du Delan k'entiy a‚ Tsünan duqadezarsh a". Aḥ āla /tsärga, hxay Muḥammad/: "Tq'a shuna ʿazap hxunda do Tso shun q'inosh baḥaneḥ? Hxan-hxa‚ shu adamash du Tso qöllincharakh. Shena luuchunna gechdiyr du Tso‚ Shena luuchunna ʿazap diyr du. Delan du stigaliyn a‚ lättan a dolalla‚ tsarna yukq'eḥ derg a‚ Tsünga du /masseran a t'äkhḥara/ dʿaderzar".
5:19: Hxay zhaynin ohxla! Veana shüga Tkhan elcha /Muḥammad/, bilgaladokqush shuna /hxumanash/ elchanash bakhkar satsadella khillachu müreḥ‚ shüga tsa aliytarḥama: "Tsa veana tkhöga qaʾ bokqurg‚ tsa veana tkhöga qeram tosurg". Veana shüga qaʾ bokqurg a‚ veana shüga qeram tosurg a. Dela masso a hxumanna t'eḥ nitsq' qochush ma vu.
5:20: /Ḥakhade/ Musas ma ällera shen q'ome: "Hxay san q'am‚ dagadaiyta shayna t'eḥ khilla dolu Delan niʿmat: Tso shuna yukq'eḥ paykhamarsh khiliytira‚ shukh bira pachchaḥash, shuna delira ʿalamekh tsḥanna tsa dellarg.
5:21: Hxay san q'am! Chu ġo Dala shayna /khila/ yazdina dolchu dezachu lätta (makhka)‚ yukha ma dovla - t'akqa shu eshnachärga dʿadörzur du".
5:22: Tsara elira: "Hxay Musa‚ tsu choḥ tsḥa nütsq'ala q'am du‚ tkho dakhanne a tsu chu ġur ma dats üsh arabovlalts tsu chüra. Üsh arabevlcha tsu chüra – tkho chu ġur du".
5:23: /Delakh/ Qörush bolcharakh Dala shayna niʿmat (baq' din) della volchu shina staga elira: "Chu ġo tsarna neʿarekhula‚ shu tsu chu dakhcha – shu töllarsh du. Dalla t'etovzha‚ shäsh teshash delaḥ".
5:24: Tsara elira: "Hxay Musa‚ tkho tsq'a a tsu chu ġur ma dats‚ üsh tsu choḥ mel bu‚ ḥada ḥo a, ḥan Qiosh-Qoburg a ġo‚ lata shu shiʾ‚ tkho quzaḥ khevshina ʿiyr du".
5:25: Tso (Musas) elira /Dele doʿa desh/: "So qiosh-qobush volu san Dela‚ so doladesh ma vats san sin a‚ san veshin a ben‚ dʿaq'astade tkho hxoqu pesaq' q'omakh /Ḥan niysachu ḥukmatsa/".
5:26: Elira /Dala/: "Tsarna ḥaram yu iza. Shovztq'a sharaḥ bevlla lelar bu üsh lättakhula. Aḥ ġayġa ma e pesaq' q'omakh".
5:27: Diytsa tsarna Ādaman shina k'antakh (Q'abilakh a, Hxabilakh a) lätsna baq'derg. Ḥakhade: tsara shimmo a ġurba diynera‚ tsḥannan (Hxabilan) i q'obal khilira‚ vuqünan (Q'abilan) i q'obal tsa khilira. Tso (Q'abila) elira: "As vüyr vu ḥo". Tso (Hxabila) elira: "Dala q'obaldo /Delakh/ qörush bolcheran.
5:28: Aḥ suna ḥan küg aydaḥ so ven‚ so ma khir vats san küg aydiyrig ḥo ven. Bakq'alla a, so qöru Delakh‚ ʿalamiyn Dekh.
5:29: Suna läa ḥo verza /Dalla t'e/ san q'itsa a‚ ḥan q'itsa a – t'akqa ḥo khir vu (zhözhakhatin) ts'eran daykh (tsḥaʾ). I bu beqam zulamkhoshna".
5:30: Khazdira tsunna shen sino shen vasha ven‚ tso (Q'abila) i (Hxabil) viyra‚ – i khilira eshnacharakh.
5:31: Dala q'ig yakhiytira latta okhkush tsunna gayta‚ mukha ḥuldo shen veshin daq'a. Tso elira: "Ohx‚ ma daq'azvälla so‚ tsu q'iygakh tarvallal‚ ḥuldan /tsa khuush/ sayn veshin daq'a". I khilira dokhkobevllacharakh.
5:32: Tsünan düḥa yazdira Okha Israilan k'entashka: sa (adam) diynarg‚ sina (viynachunna) düḥal a ya lättaḥ lelochu vochu hxumanna düḥal a dotsush‚ masso a nakh bayinarg sanna vu. I dendinarg – masso a nakh denbinarg sanna vu. Tsärga bäkhkina Tkhan elchanash bilgalonashtsa (Delan ayatashtsa)‚ t'akqa, bakq'alla a, duqabersh tsarakh tsul t'äḥa a lättaḥ t'alamza (Delan dozanal t'ekhbovlursh) ma bu.
5:33: Delatsa a‚ Tsünan elchantsa a t'om besh bolcheran a‚ lättaḥ bökhanig darzho ġertacheran a beqam bu üsh bayar‚ ya irkhʾokhkar‚ ya tseran küygash a‚ kogash a khedor düḥ-düḥal dersh ‚ ya makhkara arabakhar. Iza tsarna dünenaḥ a siysaza khilar du‚ ekhartaḥ tsarna deza-dokqa dolu ʿazap khir du.
5:34: Shu shayna t'ederzale (shäsh zhöpe ozadale) tōba dina botsursh. Shuna khaalash, Dela gechdesh verg a‚ q'inkhetame verg a vuyla.
5:35: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Delakh qeralash‚ Tsunna /müt'aḥ khilartsa, ʿibadat dartsa/ gergadalo neq'ash lekhalash‚ Tsünan düḥa q'iysam lattabelash – shu dakqiyde tam bu.
5:36: Bakq'alla a, kerstanashna lättaḥ mel derg a‚ tsüntsa qin i sannarg khilcha a q'ematdiynan ʿazapna düḥal dala /tsunakh k'elḥardovlarḥama/ – q'obaldiyr datsara tsärgara. Tsarna lazosh dolu ʿazap khir du.
5:37: Luur dolush bu üsh ts'ergara arabovla‚ bevr bats üsh tsu chüra ara. Tsarna /guttar/ lättash dolu ʿazap khir du.
5:38: Q'u-börsha stegan a‚ q'u- zudchun a, – dʿakhedade tseran shinnan a küygash tsara lachq'iynachunna düḥal beqamna, Delera taʿzarna. I Dela veza verg a‚ ḥukma /niysa/ desh verg a vu.
5:39: Shen zulamal t'äḥa tōba dinarg a‚ t'akqa dika ʿamalsh yinarg a, – bakq'alla a, Dala tōba q'obaldiyr du tsünan. Bakq'alla a, Dela gechdesh verg a‚ q'inkhetame verg a vu.
5:40: Ḥuna (hxay paykhamar) tsa khiira, i Dela khilar stigaliyn a‚ lättan a dolalla Shegaḥ dolush? Shena luuchunna ʿazap do Tso‚ Shena luuchunna gechdo. I Dela masso a hxumanna t'eḥ nitsq' bolush vu.
5:41: Hxay elcha! Ḥo singattame ma voyla kerstanalleḥ sikhbellachara‚ üsh khilleḥ a shäsh bagaḥ ällacharakh: "Teshna tkho" - teshna dats tseran degnash; üsh khilleḥ a shäsh khartsdolchünga ladöġush khillachu, shäsh ḥo volchu /kuralla esh, tsa beshash / tsa bäkhkinchu qechu nakhe ladöġush khillachu zhügtekh. Üsh bu dosh shen mettigera dʿadokqush‚ qechuḥa hxittosh. Tsara olu: "I shayga delleḥ – sḥalatsa‚ shayga tsa delleḥ – larlo". Dala shena pitana luush volchunna – tsunna Delera tsḥanna hxumanna doladiyr dats aḥ. Üsh bu Dalla shayn degnash ts'andan tsa luush bersh. Tsarna dünenaḥ siysazalla yu‚ ekhartaḥ tsarna deza-dokqa ʿazap du.
5:42: Ladöġursh bu üsh khartsdolchünga‚ yuursh bu üsh ḥaram mel erg. Üsh ḥo volchu bakhkaḥ‚ ḥukma de tsarna yukq'eḥ‚ ya dʿaverza tsarakh. Ḥo tsarakh dʿavirzicha‚ hxumma zen diyr dats tsara ḥuna. Ayḥa ḥukma desh‚ niysontsa ḥukma de tsarna yukq'eḥ. Bakq'alla a, Dalla beza niyso lelorash.
5:43: Ḥöga ḥukma mukha doytu tsara? Tsärgaḥ Tavrat ma duy‚ shena choḥ Delan ḥukma a dolush! T'akqa tsul t'äḥa a dʿabörzu üsh /Delan neq'akh/ – bats üsh muʾma nakh.
5:44: Bakq'alla a, Okha oḥadossiyna Tavrat /Musaga/‚ shena choḥ niysa neq' a‚ nur a dolush. Tsüntsa ḥukma do zhügtashna /Delan ġullaqna/ müt'aḥ khilla bolchu paykhamarasha a‚ /tsüntsa ḥukma do/ rabbanasha a‚ aḥbarasha a Delan zhaynikh shayna ʿalashdina khillachüntsa‚ üsh khilira tsu t'eḥ teshash. Shu nakhakh ma qera‚ shu qera Sokh‚ ma dokhka San ayatash k'ezzigchu mekhakh. Dala dossiynachüntsa ḥukma tsa desh bersh –üsh kerstanash bu (i Delan ḥukma tsa dezash ya niysa tsa lorush belaḥ).
5:45: Okha t'edillina tsarna tsu (Tavrata) choḥ: sa – sitsa‚ bʿärg – bʿärgatsa‚ mara – mertsa‚ lerg – lergatsa‚ tserg – tsergatsa‚ chevnash yöqur yu (ch'ir ötsur yu), älla. Tsḥammo gechdaḥ‚ i tsunna kaparat (q'inoykh ts'anvalar) du. Dala dossiynachüntsa (niysa) ḥukma tsa desh bersh – üsh zulamkhoy bu.
5:46: Tsarna t'äkhḥe vaiytira Okha Maryaman k'ant ʿiysa‚ baq'desh shel ḥalkha khilla Tavrat. Tsünga delira Okha Inzhil‚ shena choḥ niysa neq' a‚ nur a dolush‚ sha baq'desh dolu shel ḥalkha khilla Tavrat‚ sha niysa neq' a, /Delakh/ qörush bolcharna ḥekham a khilla dolu.
5:47: Inzhilan ohxlano ḥukma doyla shayga tsu choḥ dossiynachüntsa. Dala dossiynachüntsa ḥukma tsa desh bersh – üsh pesaq'ash bu (Dalla müt'aḥ tsa khillarsh).
5:48: Ḥöga /hxay Muḥammad/ dossiyna Okha zhayna baq'dolchüntsa‚ sha baq'desh shel ḥalkha khilla zhayna‚ sha iza ʿalashdesh a dolu.
