Aḥ ḥukma de tsarna yukq'eḥ Dala ḥayga dossiynachüntsa‚ tseran sinlaamashna t'äḥa ma hxotta ḥayga deana dolchu baq'dolchukh. Shukh hxoranna Okha sharʿ dina‚ /dineḥ/ bilgala neq' bina (minhxazh). Dalla liʾna khilleḥara, tsḥana ummatakh diyr dara shu‚ mukhkha delaḥ a, shu zerḥama Sha shuna dellachüngaḥ (khiliytina Tso dukqa dinash). Dikanashna t'eḥ ḥalkhe yakqa q'ovsa (vovshashtsa)‚ Dele du shun masseran a dʿaderzar‚ t'akqa düytsur du Tso shüga shun khilpalonash shegaḥ khillarg.
5:49: /I dossiyna Okha ḥöga omra desh/: ḥukma de tsarna yukq'eḥ Dala dossiynachüntsa‚ tseran sinlaamashna t'äḥa ma vaza‚ larlo tsarakh, ḥo tsara dʿatilavarakh tsḥadolchu Dala ḥöga dossiynachukh. Üsh dʿaberzaḥ‚ ḥuna khaalaḥ, Dela luush khilar üsh balane latsa tseran tsḥadolu q'inosh baḥaneḥ. Bakq'alla a, nakhakh duqabersh pesaq'ash ma bu.
5:50: Zhehxallin ḥukmana t'etiyzha üsh tq'a? Mila vu tq'a Delal ḥukma khaza desh teshash bolchu nakhana?
5:51: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Ash ma letsa zhügtiy a‚ nasarash a shayna dottaġiy. Tsarakh tsḥabersh dottaġiy bu vuqarna. Shukh tsarakh shena dottaġiy letsnarg, – bakq'alla a, i tsarakh vu. Bakq'alla a, Dala tsa nisdo zulame q'am.
5:52: Ḥuna gush bu i shayn degnashkaḥ tsamgar ersh (pesaq'ash ya munepiq'ash) sikhlush tsärgaḥ‚ olush: "Tkho qörush du tkhuna /hxara/ ġullaq tsḥana balane dʿaḥovza". Dala tarlo Shegara tolam bala‚ ya tsḥa ġullaq dan – t'akqa üsh ma büsu shäsh ḥuldinchukh shaylaḥ dokhkobevlla.
5:53: Iyman dillinchara olu /zhügtashka, munepiq'iyn ḥolakh tsetsbovliy/: hxorsh bu i shayn ch'oġa duynash Delatsa biʾnarsh, shäsh bakq'alla a, shütsa du‚ bokhush? Yökhna tseran ʿamalsh. Eshnarsh khili üsh.
5:54: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Shukh milla shen (islam) dinera dʿavälcha – t'akqa doüytur du Dala tsḥa q'am‚ Tsunna üsh bezash‚ tsarna Iza vezash‚ muʾma nakhana shäsh atta a bolush‚ kerstanashna khala a bolush‚ Delan novq'aḥ q'üysush‚ t'ekhtokham bechun t'ekhtokhamakh tsa qörush. I Delan dozalla du‚ Shena luuchunna i doüytu Tso. I Dela shorto yolush a vu‚ ʿilma dolush a vu.
5:55: Bakq'alla a, shun dottaġ Dela vu‚ Tsünan elcha vu‚ iyman dillinarsh a bu‚ shäsh lamaz hxottadesh bolu‚ shäsh zakat a lush bolu‚ shäsh/Tsunna/ guorahxüttush a bolu.
5:56: Dela a‚ Tsünan elcha a, iyman dillinarsh a dottaġiy lätsnarg – bakq'alla a, Delan tobanan /nakh bu üsh/ - üsh bu tolam bokqur bersh.
5:57: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Ash ma letsa, shun din belame a‚ lovzare a däkqina, shul ḥalkha shayga zhayna daiytincharakh bersh a‚ kerstanash a dottaġiy. Shu Delakh qera, shäsh iyman dillina delaḥ.
5:58: Ash lamaze qayqicha, i belame a‚ lovzare a ötsu tsara. I du üsh khilarna, shäsh oyla tsa esh dolu q'am.
5:59: Aḥ āla: "Hxay zhaynin ohxla! Ash beqam bo tkhuna dekq'a Okha iyman dillina khilarna Dele‚ tkhayga dossiynachünga a‚ ḥalkha dossiynachünga a‚ shukh duqakhbersh pesaq'ash khilarna a".
5:60: Aḥ āla: "As dʿakhoüytiy shüga tsul a vonig beqam khilartsa Delan gergaḥara? Üsh bu Dala shayna neʿalt ällarsh‚ I shayna öġazvakhnarsh‚ Tso shaykh maymalsh a‚ ḥaqarchiy a yinarsh a‚ t'aġutana shäsh ʿibadat dinarsh a. Üsh bu vonash (shayna khir yolchu) mettigtsa‚ uggar tilabella bersh niysachu neq'akh".
5:61: Shu dolchu bäkhkicha /zhügtiyn munepiq'ash/, tsara olu: "Tkho iyman dillina du"‚ üsh-m /shu dolchu/ bäkhkina ma bara kerstanallitsa‚ – üsh /shu dolchüra/ ara ma bevli tsüntsa. I Dela dika khuush vu-q tsara ḥuldesh khillarg.
5:62: Ḥuna go tsarakh duqabersh sikhlush q'a dareḥ a‚ mostaġalla leloreḥ a‚ ḥaram hxuma daareḥ a. Ma von hxuma du-q tsara desh khillarg!
5:63: Üsh dukha hxunda tsa tukhu rabbanasha a‚ aḥbarasha a q'akhilaran dashakh a‚ ḥaram mel derg a tsara daarkh a? Ma von du tsara desh khillarg!
5:64: Zhügtasha elira: "Delan küg dikhkina du". Küygash dikhkina-q tseran. Neʿalt älla tsarna shäsh düytsurg baḥaneḥ. Tsünan (Delan) shi küg darzhiyna du‚ Shena luuchunna ritsq' lush vu I. Tsarakh duqabersh sovbokhur bu ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchüngara ḥöga dossiynacho /Delan/ dozanekh bovlartsa a, kerstanallitsa a. Tsarna yuq'a mostaġalla a‚ öġazlo a qössina Okha q'ematde qachchalts. Tsara ts'e mel latiy t'amna‚ Dala yayira i. Lättaḥ bökha derg darzhado tsara. Dalla bezats bökhanig desh bersh.
5:65: Zhaynin ohxlano iyman dillina khilleḥara‚ /Delakh/ qörush khilleḥara‚ tseran vonash (q'inosh) dʿadokhur dara Okha tsarakh‚ niʿmatan yalsamanichu bokhiytur bara üsh.
5:66: Tavrat a‚ Inzhil a‚ /qin/ shayn Qiosh-Qobuchüngara shayga oḥadossiynarg (hxara siylaḥ dolu Q'urʾan) hxottadesh üsh belaḥara‚ shayna laqaḥ a‚ kogiy bukhaḥ a derg duur dara tsara. Tsarakh niysa ummat a du. Tsarakh duqabersh von khilla shäsh dechüntsa.
5:67: Hxay elcha! Dʿaqachade ḥayga ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchüngara oḥadossiynarg. Aḥ i tsa daḥ – aḥ qochush tsa dina Tsünan elchalla. Dala larviyr vu ḥo nakhakh. Bakq'alla a, Dala tsa nisdo kersta q'am.
5:68: Aḥ āla /hxay Muḥammad/: "Hxay zhaynin ohxla! Shu tsḥanna a hxumanna deq'aḥ dats ash Tavrat a‚ Inzhil a‚ qin shayn Qiosh-Qobuchüngara shayga dossinarg a hxottadalts". Ḥöga ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchüngara dössincho alsambakhaza bütur ma bats tsarakh duqabersh /Delan / dozanekh bovlareḥ a, kerstanalleḥ a. Ḥo singattame ma khila kersta q'am baḥaneḥ.
5:69: Bakq'alla a, iyman dillinarsh (busalbanash) a‚ zhügtiy a‚ sabiunash a‚ nasarash a – /tsarakh/ Dele a‚ t'äḥarchu diyne a iyman a dillinarsh‚ dika ʿamal a yinarsh /mülsh belaḥ a/ –/q'ematdiynan irchallin/ qeram a khir ma bats tsarna‚ üsh /dünenaḥ bukhadisnarg baḥaneḥ/ singattame a khir ma bats.
5:70: Israilan k'entashtsa bart bira Okha /tsara Dele a‚ tsünan elchanashka a iyman düllur du, älla/‚ tsärga elchanash a bakhkiytira. Shayga elcha mosazza veʾcha a‚ shayn sinoshna dezarg tsa doḥush‚ tsḥabersh khartsbora tsara‚ tsḥabersh boyu tsara.
5:71: Tsarna mötttura pitana khir dats‚ bʿärze a‚ q'ora a khilira üsh‚ t'akqa Dala tsarna gechdira. T'akqa tsarakh duqabersh /yukha a/ bʿärze a‚ q'ora a khilira. Dela gush ma vu tsara diyrig.
5:72: Kerstanalla dina shäsh älla bolchara: "Bakq'alla a, Dela – Maryaman k'ant Masūḥ vu" (ʿiysa). Masūḥa älla: "Hxay Israilan k'entiy! Allahxana ʿibadat de – san Dalla a‚ shayn Dalla a. Bakq'alla a, milla velaḥ a, Delatsa naq'ost lätsna‚ Dala tsunna ḥaram yina yalsamani‚ tsünan chuġoyla (zhözhakhatin) ts'e yu. Zulamkhoshna tsḥa a ġönchiy khir ma bats”.
5:73: Kerstanalla dina shäsh älla bolchara: "Bakq'alla a, Dela vu qaannakh qoalġanig". Tsḥa a qin Dela vats I Sha tsḥa Dela votsurg. Shäsh oluchukh üsh tsa sovtsaḥ – tsarakh shäsh kerstanash khillacharakh lazosh dolu ʿazap ḥaqalur ma du.
5:74: Dele tōba hxunda tsa do tsara‚ Tsünga gechdar a hxunda tsa dökhu? I Dela gechdesh verg a‚ q'inkhetame verg a ma vu.
5:75: Maryaman k'ant Masūḥ ma vats elcha ben‚ tsul ḥalkha a dʿabakhana elchanash‚ tsünan nana yu uggar (Delera mel deʾnarg) baq'desh erg (nütsq'ala Delakh teshash erg). Üsh shiy a khilla qacha buush. Ḥazhal‚ mukha bilgaldesh du Tkho tsarna ayatash‚ t'akqa a ḥazhal‚ mukha ʿekhiyna üsh (shayt'ano)!
5:76: Aḥ āla (hxay Muḥammad): "Ash ʿibadat do tq'a, Dela a vütiy, shen dolaḥ shuna (dan) zen a‚ ya payda a botsuchunna? I Dela Sha khezash verg a‚ khuush verg a ma vu".
5:77: Aḥ āla: "Hxay zhaynin ohxla‚ shayn dineḥ duqa t'ekh ma dovla baq'derg dotsuchoḥ (ʿiysa Delan k'ant vu bokhush, khartsderg qullush – nasarasha, tsünan nana Maryam nakhatsa lelash khilla bokhush, khartsderg qullush – zhügtasha)‚ shu t'äḥa ma hxitta tsḥana sha ḥalkha tiladella khilla dolchu q'oman dezarshna‚ tso duqabersh tiliyna‚ niysachu novq'akh sha a tiladella".
5:78: Israilan k'entekh kerstanalla dinacharna neʿalt älla Davudan a‚ Maryaman k'entan ʿiysan a bagakhula. I – tsara yinchu ʿesallina a‚ üsh dozanekh bovlush khilarna a du.
5:79: Üsh khilla shäsh dinchu vochunna vovshashka nehxi tsa desh. Ma von du-q tsara desh khillarg!
5:80: Ḥuna go tsarakh (zhügtekh) duqabersh bu kerstanalla dinacharakh dottaġiy besh. Ma von du-q tsara shayna ḥalkhadäkqinarg – Dela shayna öġazvakhiytar. ʿazapeḥ üsh guttar büsur ma bu.
5:81: Delakh a‚ paykhamarakh a‚ tsünga dossinchukh a üsh teshash khilleḥara‚ üsh dottaġiy bina lüytsur batsara tsara‚ mukhkha delaḥ a, tsarakh duqabersh pesaq'ash bu.
5:82: Ḥuna karor ma bu iyman dillincharna mostaġallitsa nakhakh uggare ch'oġa bersh zhügtiy a‚ shäsh shirk dinarsh a. Ḥuna karor ma bu tsarakh iyman dillincharna bezamtsa uggare gergara bersh shäsh ällarsh: "Bakq'alla a, tkho nasarash du". Iza tsarakh q'issisash a‚ ruhxbanash a khilarna a‚ tsara kuralla tsa yarna a du.
5:83: Shayna khezcha elchane (Muḥammade) dossiynarg, ḥuna go tseran (Nazhashin a, qechu nasariyn a) bʿärgash bʿärkhiykh büzna shayna devzinchu baq'dolchukh. Tsara olu: "Tkhan Qiosh-Qoburg‚ Okha iyman dillina. Aḥ dʿayazdelaḥ tkho shahxadat dalochärtsa.
5:84: Tkhuna hxun du tsa tesha Dele a‚ tkhöga deʾnachu baq'dolchünga a‚ tkho ch'oġa luush du tkhan Qiosh-Qobucho tkho chudokhüytiyla dikachu q'omatsa /yalsamanichu/ ".
5:85: Dala mēla belira tsarna tsara ällachunna düḥal – (yalsamanin) boshmash‚ shayn bukhakhula khish ökhush yolu‚ guttar lättar bu üsh tsu choḥ. I bu dikacheran beqam.
5:86: Tsateshnarsh a‚ Tkhan ayatash kharts dinarsh a – üsh bu zhözhakhatin day.
5:87: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Ash ḥaram ma elash Dala shayn ḥanal yina ts'ena hxumanash‚ shu /Delan/ dozanekh ma dovlalash (Tso tsa magiynarg desh). Bakq'alla a, Dalla tsa beza /Shen/ dozanekh bovlursh.
5:88: Ash daa Okha shayna dellachu ritsq'anakh ḥanal a, ts'ena a derg‚ shu Delakh qeralush‚ shu Shekh teshash volchu.
5:89: Dala tsa lotsu shu (bekhke) shun duynashkaḥ (tsa khuush) bagakh dällachüntsa‚ amma Tso lotsu shu (bekhke) duynashtsa ash ch'aġdina khillachüntsa. Tsünan kaparat du itt miskachunna qacha baor‚ yuq'ara ash shayn ohxlanna baosh ma khülu, ya tsarna dukhar dalar a‚ ya lay azatvakqar (parġatvakqar) a. I tsa kariynachunna (otsu qaa ġullaqakh tsḥa a qochush dan tsa megnachunna) – qaa diynaḥ markha qabar t'eḥ du. I du, ash biʾcha, shun duyniyn kaparat. Larde shayn duynash. Ishtta bilgaldokhu shuna Dala Shen ayatash, shu khilarḥama barkalla olush.
5:90: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Chaġar a‚ maysir a‚ ts'ush a‚ pkherchiy a – shayt'anan belkhan rizhs (bökha hxuma) yu‚ genadovla tsunna – shu dakqiyde tarlo.
5:91: Shayt'anna läa chaġartsa a‚ maysirtsa a shuna yukq'e mostaġalla a‚ öġazlo a yozho‚ Delan ts'e yakqarkh a‚ lamazakh a shu dukhatokha a. Ash tsa sotsüytu?!
5:92: Shu müt'aḥ khilalash Dalla‚ shu müt'aḥ khilalash elchanna‚ larlolash /vochukh/. Shu dʿaderzaḥ‚ shuna khaalash: Tkhan elchanna t'eḥ du bilgala dʿaqachor.
5:93: Iyman dillincharna‚ dika ʿamalsh yinacharna q'a dats tsara /ḥalkha/ diʾnachunna üsh qörush khilcha‚ iyman a dillicha‚ dika ʿamalsh a yicha‚ t'akqa a qörush khilcha‚ iyman dillicha, yukha a /vochukh/ qörush khilcha, dikanig desh khilcha. Dalla beza dikanig desh bersh.
5:94: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Züyr dolush du shu Dala tallar dechu hxumantsa (ḥoza ya qin aqa delaḥ) shena shun küygash a‚ chömuq'ash a t'eqiʾna dolchu, Dalla /nakhana guchuvokqush/ vovzarḥama Sha gush votstsusheḥ Shekh qörush verg. Tsul t'äḥa dozanakh vällarg – tsunna lazosh dolu ʿazap du.
5:95: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Ash diynatash (aqaroy) ma dayalash shäsh ḥäzhdikhkina dolush. Shukh shena khuʾusheḥ tsḥammo i dieḥ – tsünan beqam bu däkhnekh tso dayinchun baram /saġina dakqar/‚ tsüntsa ḥukma diyr du shukh shina ʿedale volchu staga i ġurbanna kechdina bezhana Kaʿbe qochüytush‚ ya /tsünan beqam bu/ kaparat dar – miskachu nakhana daa hxuma dalar‚ ya tsünan metta (miskacharna dala hxuma datsaḥ) markha qabar‚ shen ġullaqan bāla ʿovsharḥama. Gechdina Dala ḥalkha dällarg. Yukha a tsunna t'everzaḥ (i q'a dan) tsüngara beqam ötsur bu Dala. Dela veza verg a vu‚ beqam ötsush a vu.
5:96: Ḥanal du shuna tallar dan hxordan diynatashna‚ tsünan (hxordan diynatiyn) qacha a shuna a‚ /novq'aḥ/ bölkhuchu nakhana a /ḥanal bu/ paydaetsa. Ḥaram du shuna tallar dan arenan diynatashkaḥ shu ḥazh (ya ʿumrat) dikhkina mel du. Shu qeralash Delakh‚ shu Shena t'e guldiyr dolchu.
5:97: Dala dina Kaʿba – ḥurman ts'a – nakhana ġönna a, paydenna a, /ishtta khiliytina Dala/ ḥurman butt a‚ ġurbanan bezhana a‚ tütesh a (bezhanan logakh tosu hxumanash, i bilgaldarḥama). Iza du shuna khaiytarḥama Dela stiglanashkaḥ a‚ lättaḥ a derg khuush vuyla‚ Dela masso a hxuma khuush verg vuyla.
5:98: Khaalash‚ Dela taʿzareḥ ch'oġanig vuyla a‚ Dela gechdiyrig a, q'inkhetam biyrig a vuyla a.
5:99: Elchanna t'eḥ dʿaqachor a ben dats‚ Dela khuush ma vu ash guchudokqurg a‚ ash q'ayladokqurg a.
5:100: Aḥ āla: "Bökhanig a‚ ts'enanig a tsḥaterra dats‚ bökhanig dukqa khilaro ḥöga tamash baytineḥ a (ḥo tsetsväkqineḥ a). Delakh qeralash‚ hxay ḥeq'al dersh‚ shu dakqiyden mega!"
5:101: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Ma khettalash tsḥatstsa (payda botsu) hxumanekh lätsna‚ üsh shuna guchuyalaḥ – shuna tsatam biyr bu tsara. Ash tsarakh Q'urʾan dussuchu khenaḥ khettaḥ‚ üsh shuna guchuevr yu – Dala gechdina tsarakh. I Dela gechdesh verg a vu‚ duqa sobare verg a vu (shun taʿzar tsa desh).
5:102: Tsarakh khättira shul ḥalkha tsḥana q'omo – t'akqa tsara kerstanalla dira tsüntsa.
5:103: Dala tsa khiliytina (Dala tergal ye tsa bokhu) baḥirat a‚ saibat a‚ vasilat a‚ ḥam a‚ amma kerstanasha Dalla t'equllush du khartsderg‚ tsarakh duqakhbersh qetash ma bats.
5:104: Tsärga elcha: "Sḥadüyla Dala dossiynachunna t'e a‚ elchanna t'e a"‚ tsara olu: "Toam bu tkhuna tkhan day shena t'eḥ kariynarg". Tseran day hxumma khuush tsa khilleḥ a‚ niysachu novq'aḥ tsa khilleḥ a? /T'akqa a t'äḥahxuttu üsh tsarna?/
5:105: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Shuna t'eḥ du ash shayn sinosh shäsh ʿalashdar. Shuna zen diyr ma dats sha tilavellacho, shu niysachu novq'aḥ khilleḥ. Shun masseran a dʿaderzar Dele du‚ t'akqa Tso düytsur du shüga ash desh khillarg.
5:106: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Shukh tsḥanna, valar t'e a deana, veset desh, shuna yukq'eḥ teshalla dan deza shukh ʿedale volchu shimmo‚ ya shukh votschu qechu shimmo‚ nagaḥ sanna shu novq'aḥ dolush, shu ʿozhallin balano sḥalätsneḥ. Üsh shiʾ satsor vu /malkhbuzen/ lamaz dinchul t'äḥa‚ t'akqa tsu shimmo Delakh duy buur bu, shu sheko esh delaḥ: «Tsüntsa makh tsa ötsu okha, i /shena okha teshalla desh verg / gergara velaḥ a. Okha ḥul tsa do Delan teshalla‚ i dineḥ – tkho khir ma du q'inosh decharakh"‚ älla.
5:107: Nagaḥ sanna guchudalaḥ i shiʾ q'ina ḥaq' khilar – qin shiʾ hxuttur vu tseran mettana‚ ḥalkhalerachu shinnal /irs etsareḥ/ gergara volu. Tsara shimmo duy buur bu Delakh: "Tkhan teshalla baq' ma du tsu shinnan teshallal‚ tkho dozanakh devlla ma dats, devlleḥ – tkho zulam dinacharakh khir ma dara".
5:108: I gerga du tsara teshalla darna /niysachu/ kütseḥ‚ ya üsh qörush khilarna /qin/ duynash baiytarkh shayn duynel t'äḥa /t'akqa shäsh siysaza khilarna/. Shu Delakh qeralash‚ laduġush a khilalash‚ Dala nis tsa do pesaq' q'am.
5:109: Otsu (q'emat)diynaḥ Dala gulbiyr bu elchanash‚ Tso er du: "Hxun zhop della shüga". Tsara (elchanash) er: "ʿilma dats tkhan (tkhuna khaats)‚ bakq'alla a, Ḥo ma vu q'aylenash t'ekh dika khuurg".
5:110: Dala ällera: "Hxay Maryaman k'ant ʿiysa‚ aḥ dagadaiyta ḥayna a‚ ḥan nanna a khilla dolu San niʿmat. As ch'aġ ma vira ḥo Dezachu Sitsa‚ āgana choḥ volush nakhatsa khabar düytsura aḥ‚ vokqa khilcha a‚ As ḥuna ma ʿamiyra zhayna a, ḥeq'alalla a‚ Tavrat a‚ Inzhil a‚ aḥ ma qullura popparkh ḥozanan kütsakh tera hxuma, San purbantsa‚ tsu chu sa doʿura aḥ – i ḥoza khülura San purbantsa. Aḥ tavora bʿärsa dotsurg a‚ bars tsamgar erg a San purbantsa. Vellarg denvora aḥ San purbantsa; ḥo lar ma vira As banu Israilekh‚ ḥo tsarna t'e bilgalonashtsa veʾcha. T'akqa tsarakh kerstanasha ma elira: "Iza bilggala kholmachalla (bozbuunchalla) a ben ma dats ",
5:111: As dagchu ma dillira ḥavareshna Söga a‚ San elchane a iyman dilla‚ älla. Tsara elira: "Okha iyman dillina‚ aḥ teshalla de tkho busulbanash khilar ".
5:112: Ḥavaresha ma elira: "Hxay Maryaman k'ant ʿiysa‚ ḥan Elan (Delan) nitsq' qochur bariy tkhuna stiglara /daariyn/ shun oḥadosso?" Tso elira: "Delakh qera, shu iyman dolush khilleḥ ".
5:113: Tsara elira: "Tkhuna laʾa tsu chüra hxuma yaa‚ tkhan degnash ch'aġdan /teshartsa/‚ khaa läa tkhuna ḥo tkhöga baq'liyna khilar (iymanakh a‚ Delakh a lätsna diytsareḥ)‚ tkho tsunna t'eḥ teshash khila a".
5:114: Maryaman k'anta ʿiysas elira (Dele doʿa desh): "Tkhan Dela – tkhan Ela (Dela)‚ oḥadossadeḥa tkhuna stiglara shun‚ tkhuna dezde (ʿiyd) khir dara tsunakh tkhan ḥalkharchunna a‚ tkhan t'äḥarchunna a‚ Ḥögara delil a khir dara. Ritsq' lōlaḥ tkhuna. Ḥo ritsq' lucharakh uggar dikanig ma vu".
5:115: Dala elira: "As oḥadossor du shuna i (shun‚ daarkh düzzina). T'akqa tsul t'äḥa shukh kerstanalla dinchunna – as ʿazap diyr ma du tsunna ʿazaptsa‚ ʿalamashkaḥ tsḥanna tsa dinchu keppara".
5:116: Dala er: "Hxay Maryaman k'ant ʿiysa‚ aḥ ällera nakhe ḥuo a‚ ḥan nana a shi dela vu aliy t'elatsa‚ Allahx vitiy‚ älla?" Tso er: "Ḥo ts'anvo as‚ ma dats suna /tome/ as ālar aysa āla ḥaq' dotsurg. As i älla khilleḥara – Ḥuna i khuush khir ma dara. Ḥuna ma khäa sögaḥ derg, suna ma tsa khäa Ḥögaḥ derg. Bakq'alla a, Ḥo ma vu q'aylenash t'ekh dika khuurg.
5:117: Tsa elira as tsärga Aḥ söga shetsa omra dinarg ben – "ʿibadat delash Dalla‚ san Ela‚ shun Ela khilla volchu". So tsarna t'eḥ tesh vara‚ so tsärtsa mel volu‚ Aḥ so Ḥayga ḥalaväkqinchul t'äḥa Ḥo vu-q tsarna t'eḥozhurg. Ḥo masso a hxumanan tesh ma vu.
5:118: Aḥ tsarna ʿazap daḥ a – üsh Ḥan lesh bu-q‚ Aḥ tsarna gechdaḥ, bakq'alla a, Ḥo veza verg a‚ ḥukma niysa desh verg a vu-q".
5:119: Dala er: "Hxara de du baq'liynacharna shayn baq'khilaro payda biyr bolush‚ tsarna boshmash (yalsamane) khir yu‚ shayn bukhakhula ökhush khish dolush‚ tsu choḥ büsur bu üsh guttar a. Dela reza khülda tsarna‚ üsh a reza khülda Tsunna – iza siylaḥ-bokqa tolam bu-q!".
5:120: Delan du-q stigaliyn a‚ lättan a‚ tsu choḥ dolchun a dolalla‚ I vu-q masso a hxumanna t'eḥ nitsq' berg.
6:1: Khastam bu Dalla‚ Sha stigalsh a‚ latta a qöllinchu‚ Sha bodanash a‚ nur a dinchu. T'akqa a kerstanasha shayn Qiosh-Qobuchüntsa nisbo /qibersh/.
6:2: I vu shu qöllinarg popparkh‚ t'akqa ʿozhalla hxottiyna /shuna dala/. /Qin/ ʿozhalla yu khan tökhna Tsunna gergaḥ /shu ġovto/. T'akqa a shu sheko esh du.
6:3: I – Allahx (ts'e yolu tsḥa Dela) vu‚ Sha stigalshkaḥ a vu‚ lättaḥ a vu. Tsunna khäa shun q'aylakh derg a‚ shun gush derg a. Tsunna khäa ash karadesh derg a.
6:4: Shayn Qiosh-Qobuchun ayatekh tsḥa a ayat tsa deana tsärga‚ üsh tsunakh dʿabörzush ben.
6:5: Khartsdira tsara baq'derg, i shayga deʾnachul t'äḥa. T'äḥa doġur du tsärga khabarsh‚ üsh shaykh tsa beshash khilla dolu.
6:6: Tsarna tsa go-teḥa: mel duqa t'äḥenash hxallakyina Okha tsaral ḥalkha‚ Okha ch'aġbina bara üsh lättaḥ, shu tsa ch'aġdinchu kepara‚ stigal yossiyra Okha tsarna t'e doġitsa‚ tseran bukhakhula lelash khish khiliytira Okha‚ t'akqa Okha hxallakbira üsh shayn q'inosh baḥaneḥ‚ tsaral t'äḥa qecharan t'äḥe qiiyra Okha.
6:7: Okha dossosh delḥara zhayna (Q'urʾan) ḥöga kekhata t'eḥ‚ shayn küygashtsa tsunakh ḥaqalur bara üsh – kerstanasha er ma dara: "Bilggala bozbuunchalla du-q hxara".
6:8: Ma elira tsara: "Malik dossiyna khilleḥara tsunna t'e". Okha malik dossiyna khilleḥara – qochushkhir dara ġullaq‚ t'akqa a üsh ḥözhush lottüytur batsara.
6:9: Okha i khiliytineḥara malik – i dakhiytina khir dara Okha adaman ḥesapeḥ, tsu t'eḥ a kegari (khalo) yiyr yara Okha tsarna, tsara shäsh esh erg.
6:10: Ḥol ḥalkha a elchanash siysazbina. Tsarakh tsa beshash bolcharakh ḥaqa ma delira tsara sha siysazdesh khillarg.
6:11: Aḥ āla: "Dʿasaida lättakhula‚ t'akqa ḥovsal shu‚ mukha khilla /din/ khartsdecharan t'äḥe".
6:12: Aḥ ālal: "Ḥenan du stigalshkaḥ a‚ lättaḥ a derg?" Aḥ āla: "Delan du (ash shäsh a ma bokhkhu, tsundela Tsunna ʿibadat de)". Shena t'edillina Tso q'inkhetam bar. Guldiyr ma du Tso shu q'ematdiyne‚ shena choḥ sheko yotschu. Shayna iesham binarsh – tsara iyman düllur dats.
6:13: Tsünan du büysanna a‚ diynaḥ a tiyna (ya lelash) khillarg. I khezash verg a vu‚ khuush verg a vu.
6:14: Aḥ āla: "Sha stiglaniyn a‚ lättan a qollarkho volu Dela votsurg /qin/ lotsu tq'a as doladiyrig? I vu ritsq' lush‚ Tsunna tsa lo ritsq'". Aḥ āla: "Suna omra dina so khila /Dalla/ müt'aḥ khillacharakh ḥalkharnig, älla‚ ḥo khilanne a ma khilalaḥ mushrikekh "‚ älla.
6:15: Aḥ āla: "So qöru sayn Qiosh-Qobuchunna so ʿesa khilaḥ deza-dokqachu diynan ʿazapakh".
6:16: Tsu diynaḥ sha tsunakh ḥalkhaväkqinarg – Tso tsunakh q'inkhetam bina. I bilggala tolam bu-q.
6:17: Dala ḥo tsḥana zene latsaḥ – vats ḥuna i t'eradokquverg I sha ben. Tso ḥo tsḥana dikane latsaḥ – I masso a hxumanna nitsq' qochush vu.
6:18: I nitsq' bolush vu Shen leshna t'eḥ. I sha ḥukma /niysa/ desh verg a vu‚ sov dika khuush verg a vu.
6:19: Ālal /hxay Muḥammad/: "Hxun du uggar dokqa hxuma teshalla dartsa?" Āla: "Dela vu tesh suna a, shuna a yukq'eḥ‚ söga väḥitsa daiytina hxara Q'urʾan‚ as shetsa qeram tasarḥama shuna a, i /shega/ qächnachünga a. Shu du teshalla desh Delatsa qin delanash bu, bokhush?" Āla: "As teshalla dats". Āla: "Bakq'alla a, i – tsḥa Dela vu‚ so ts'ena vu ash Delatsa naq'ost latsarkh".
6:20: Okha shayna zhayna dellacharna vevza i‚ shayn k'entiy bovzare terra, shayna iesham binarsh – üsh bu tsa teshash‚
6:21: Mila vu zulame Dalla t'e khartsderg qöllinchul‚ ya Tsünan ayatash khartsdinchul? Bakq'alla a, baqiybiyr ma bats zulamkhoy.
6:22: Otsu /q'emat/diynaḥ Okha gulbiyr ma bu üsh masso a‚ t'akqa Okha er du shirk dinachärga: "Michaḥ bu shun naq'ostiy‚ shuna shäsh /delanash bu / möttush khilla bolu?"
6:23: T'akqa tseran /qin/ bekhkazlo ma tsa khilira, tsara alar ben: "Vallahxi‚ tkhan Qiosh-Qobuchukh duy ma bou okha: tkho ma tsa khilira /Delatsa/ naq'ost lotsursh ".
6:24: Ḥazhal! Mukha khartsliyna üsh shäsh shayna t'eḥ! Dʿatilira tsarakh shäsh qullush khilla dolu khartsderg.
6:25: Tsarakh ḥöga laduġush verg vu. Tseran degnashka kirḥa dillina Okha, üsh tsunakh tsa qetiyta‚ tseran lergash choḥ q'oralla yina. Masso a delil shayna daycha a‚ tsa tesha üsh tsunakh, mel dukqa ḥo volchu bäkhkicha a‚ ḥötsa q'üysu tsara‚ tsateshachara olu: "Üsh-m ḥalkhalerachiyn tüyranash dara".
6:26: Üsh otsunakh /nakh/ dukhatukhush bu‚ shäsh a genabovlush bu tsunakh. Tsara hxallakdesh-m dats shayn doġmash ben. Tsa khaalo-q tsarna.
6:27: Ḥuna gicha üsh zhözhakhatina t'ehxittiyna‚ tsara olush: "Ma deq'aza khili tkho! Yukhadakhiytaḥara tkho – ma khartsdiyr datsara Okha tkhayn Qiosh-Qobuchun ayatash‚ teshacharakh khir dara tkho".
6:28: Hxaʾ, guchudälla tsarna shäsh ḥalkha ḥuldesh khillarg. Üsh yukhabakhiyticha a, shayga ma de ällachunna t'ebörzur ma bara üsh‚ bakq'alla a, üsh khartslüysh ma bu.
6:29: Tsara ma olura: "Hxara vayn dünenan dakhar ben qin dakhar ma dats‚ vay dendiyr dolush ma dats".
6:30: Ḥuna üsh gicha shayn Qiosh-Qobuchun ḥalkha hxittiyna! Tso olush: "Baq' dats tq'a hxara?" Tsara olush: "Hxaʾ‚ du tkho qiosh-qobuchu Delora". Tso olush: "ʿovsha ʿazap shayna, shäsh tsa teshash khilarna!"
6:31: Iyshira shäsh Delatsa tsḥänaqetar khartsdinarsh – ts'ekhḥana shayna saḥt hxötticha, elira tsara: "Ma bala bu-q vayna vay sha tergal tsa dinarg baḥaneḥ". Tsara dʿaḥur du shayn q'inosh shayn bakq'ash t'eḥ. Ma von hxuma du-q tsara shayna moḥ binarg!
6:32: Dünenan dakhar ma dats lovzar a, erna khan yayar a ben. Bakq'alla a, ekhartan ts'a (dakhar) dika du /Delakh/ qörush bolcharna. Shu ḥeq'ale tsa khülu?
6:33: Tkho khuush du‚ bakq'alla a, tsara düytsucho ḥo vanne a singattame ma vo. Bakq'alla a, ḥo khartsvesh bats üsh – shäsh zulamkhoy bu, Delan ayatash kerstadesh.
6:34: Ḥol ḥalkha a khartsbina elchanash – sobar dira tsara shäsh khartsdinchunna t'eḥ‚ shäsh lazorna t'eḥ shayga Tkhan ġo qachchalts. Delan deshnash khiytsa tsḥa a vats. Ḥöga ma deʾna elchaniyn khabar.
6:35: Üsh dʿaberzar ḥuna dokqa khetash delaḥ‚ ḥuna magaḥ lättaḥ kheralla‚ ya stigla vala lami karo, t'akqa aḥ daḥar dara tsärga tsḥa ayat (delil). Dalla liʾneḥara‚ Tso gulbiyr bara üsh niysachu novq'a. Ḥo khilanne a ma khilalaḥ zhehxalchu nakhakh.
6:36: /Ḥan qayqarna/ zhop lur du, bakq'alla a, khezash bolchara. Tq'a bellarsh – Dala denbiyr bu üsh‚ t'akqa Tsünga dʿaberzor bu.
6:37: Tsara elira: "Shen Qiosh-Qobuchüngara ayat dossosh khilleḥara tsünga". Aḥ āla: "Bakq'alla a, Dela nitsq' qochush vu ayat dosso‚ delaḥ a, tsarakh duqakhbersh tsa khuush bu".
6:38: Tsḥa a diynat ma dats lättaḥ‚ tsḥa a ḥoza ma dats t'ema dolush shen t'emashtsa – shäsh shu sanna ummatash dolush ben. Hxumma a dits tsa dina Okha qu zhayni choḥ. T'akqa shayn Qiosh-Qobuchünga üsh dʿagulbiyr bu.
6:39: I Tkhan ayatash khartsdesh bersh bu q'ora‚ mott tsa khuush‚ bodaneḥ ʿokhkush. Shena luurg tilavala vütu Dala‚ Shena luurg niysachu novq'a vüllu Tso.
6:40: Aḥ āla: "Shuna goy! Tq'a Delan ʿazap shayga deʾcha‚ ya saḥt shayna t'ehxötticha‚ Dela votsuchünga qoyqur dara Ash, shu khilleḥ baq'lüysh?"
6:41: Hxan-hxa! Tsünga qoyqur dara ash. Aydiyr dara Tso ash shega qayqinarg, Shena laaḥ. Ash ditsdiyr dara shäsh /Delatsa/ naq'ost latsar.
6:42: Ḥol ḥalkha a bakhkiytira Okha khalq'ashka /elchanash/‚ i khalq'ash balanashtsa (miskallitsa)‚ khalonashtsa (tsamgarshtsa) sḥaliytsira Okha‚ üsh /Tkhöga/ ḥastalur batsara-te?
6:43: Tkhan nitsq' shayga beʾcha, ḥasta hxunda tsa belira üsh /Dalla/? Delaḥ a, q'iza khilira tseran degnash. Khazdora tsarna shayt'ano shäsh desh khillarg.
6:44: Tsara shayga shetsa ḥekham bina khillarg (qeram tesna khillarg) ditsdicha, Okha dʿayillira tsarna masso a /dikachu/ hxumanan neʿarsh (shayn q'inoshkaḥ üsh dukqa lattiytarḥama)‚ üsh baqiybesh bolush shayga deʾnachukh‚ /t'akqa/ ts'ekhḥana sḥaliytsira Okha üsh – t'akqa tsara dog dillira masso a dikanakh.
6:45: Khadiyra sha zulam desh khillachu khalq'an t'äḥe. Khastam bu Dalla – ʿalamiyn Dena.
6:46: Aḥ āla /hxay Muḥammad/: "Shu ḥovsal‚ Dala shun lersa a‚ bʿärsa a sḥaetscha‚ shun degnashna Tso muhxar tökhcha‚ Allahx votschu mülkhachu dala shuna i lur dara? Ḥazhal! Mukha bilgaldokhu Okha ayatash – t'akqa a üsh /baq'dolchukh/ dʿabörzu".
6:47: Aḥ āla: "Ḥovsal! Diytsiysha suna‚ Delan ʿazap shayga ts'ekhḥana deʾcha ya gush deʾcha, zulame q'am ben hxallakkhir duy?"
6:48: Okha bokhüytush ma bats elchanash tsara /dika ʿamal yinacharna/ qaʾ bokqush‚ /von ʿamal yinacharna/ qeram tosush ben. Iyman dillinarg a‚ dikanig dinarg a – /ekhartaḥ/ qeram a khir ma bats tsarna‚ üsh singattame a khir ma bats /dünenaḥ bukhadüsachukh/.
6:49: Tkhan ayatash khartsdinarsh – tsarakh ḥaqalur du ʿazap üsh pesaq' khilarna.
6:50: Aḥ āla: "As tsa bokhu shüga: "San gergaḥ Delan khaznash du"‚ suna tsa khäa q'ayle a‚ as tsa bokhu shüga: "So malik du". So t'äḥahxuttush vu sayga lush dolchu väḥashna". Aḥ āla: "Tq'a tsḥabossa vuy-te bʿärsa dotsurg a‚ bʿärsa derg a. Ash oyla tsa yo-te?"
6:51: Aḥ tsüntsa ḥekhambe shäsh shayn Qiosh-Qobuchunna ḥalkha guldiyrig khilarkh qörush bolcharna‚ tsarna vats I votsurg doladiyrig a‚ ġodakqarkho a – üsh khila megara qörush.
6:52: Aḥ (hxay Muḥammad) dʿa ma lelkhabe ʿüyrentsa a‚ süyrentsa a shayn Dele qoyqush bersh‚ Tsünan yuḥ luush /miska bu aliy, ḥaldolcharna tambarḥama/. Tseran ḥesap tsḥana a hxumantsa ḥuna t'eḥ dats‚ ḥan ḥesapan hxumma a tsarna t'eḥ a dats (ḥöga khottur dats tseran q'inoykh ya dagchoḥ derg baḥaneḥ, ishtta tsärga a – ḥo baḥaneḥ). Aḥ üsh dʿalelkhaboy – ḥo zulamkhoykh khülu.
6:53: Ishtta Okha ziyra üsh vovshashtsa, tsärga aliytarḥama: "Hxorsh bu üsh Dala vayna yukq'era shayna dikanash dellarsh?". Tq'a Dela vats dika bevzash shukur diyrash (barkalla olursh)?
6:54: Ḥo volchu bäkhkicha Tkhan ayatekh teshash bersh, aḥ āla: "Märsho yu shuna". Shun Qiosh-Qobucho Sha Shena t'edillina /shen khalq'akh/ q'inkhetam bar: nagaḥ shukh tsḥammo von daḥ tsa khuush‚ t'akqa tsul t'äḥa tōba daḥ‚ dika ʿamal yaḥ – bakq'alla a, I vu-q /tsunna/ gechdesh verg a‚ q'inkhetame verg a.
6:55: Ishtta ma-darra dʿadüytsu Okha ayatash‚ q'inosh letocheran neq' bilgalbaliytarḥama a.
6:56: Aḥ āla: "Suna tsa magiyna ʿibadan dan Dela votschu ash shega qoyquchünga". Āla: "So t'äḥahxuttur ma vats shun dezarshna, /hxöttineḥ/ - so tillavella khir ma vara t'akqa‚ niysachu novq'aḥ bolcharakh khir ma vatsara so".
6:57: Aḥ āla: "Bakq'alla a, so san Qiosh-Qobuchun bilgalonna t'eḥ vu‚ ash i khartsdina (Delera baq'derg). Sögaḥ dats shu shetsa sikhlush derg‚ ḥukma Delan ben dats – Tso düytsu baq'derg‚ Iza dika q'astambiyrig ma vu".
6:58: Aḥ āla: "Sögaḥ delḥara shu shetsa sikhlush derg‚– san a‚ shun a yukq'era ġullaq (q'ovsam) cheqdälla khir dara. Dela dika bevzash vu-q zulamkhoy".
6:59: Tsüngaḥ du-q q'aylenan /khazniyn/ doġanash. Tsunna Shena ben tsa khäa üsh. Arengaḥ derg a‚ hxorda choḥ derg a khuush vu-q I‚ ġa oḥa- duzhur ma dats Tsunna khuush ben‚ bürtig /qüur/ ma bats lättan bodanashkaḥ‚ ya t'unalla a‚ ya yoq'alla a /yuzhur/ ma yats‚ sha bilgalchu zhayni choḥ yolush ben.
6:60: Shu busa dolüyturg vu Iza‚ ash diynaḥ desh derg khuush vu I – t'akqa tsu choḥ (diynaḥ) shu dendo Tso – ts'e tökhna yolu khan qochushkhiliytarḥama. Tsunna t'e du shun dʿaderzar‚ t'akqa Tso düytsur du shüga ash lelosh khillarg.
6:61: Iza nitsq' qochush vu Shen leshna t'eḥ. Shuna t'e boüytu Tso khekhoy. Shukh tsḥanna t'e valar deʾcha – Tkhan elchanash (malikash) qochushdo i – tsara ledarlo tsa yolüytu.
6:62: T'akqa berzabo üsh Dalla t'e‚ tseran baq' Doladiyrig volchu.Tq'a ḥukma Tsünan dats? Uggar sikha vu I ḥesap dareḥ.
6:63: Aḥ āla: "Mila vu i shu arenan a‚ hxordan a bodanakh larden verg‚ ash Shega ḥastadella a‚ q'aylakha a qoyqush verg: "Hxoqunakh Tso tkho k'elḥardakhaḥ‚ tkho khir ma du barkalla olucharakh!?" /olush/.
6:64: Aḥ āla: "Dala k'elḥardokhur du shu tsunakh a‚ masso a balekh a – t'akqa a ash Tsüntsa naq'ost ma lotsu".
6:65: Āla: "Iza /Dela/ nitsq' qochush vu shuna t'ekhula a‚ shun kogiy bukhakhula a shuna ʿazap dosso‚ ya shu tobanashka deq'a‚ tsḥabolchara vuqärga bala ḥegabayta a". Ḥazhal‚ mukha ma-darra düytsu Okha ayatash, üsh khiliyta qetash.
6:66: Khartsdina ḥan q'omo i (Q'urʾan), i baq'derg dollusheḥ. Aḥ āla: "So tsa khili shuna t'eḥ vekal" (shun ġullaqash qochushdan).
6:67: Hxor /Delera/ khabaran shen khan yu /i t'ehxötticha, i qochushkhir dolush/ – t'äḥa khuur du shuna.
6:68: Ḥuna gicha, Tkhan ayatash, siysaz a desh, ḥekhosh bersh – genavala tsarakh‚ üsh qechu khabarna t'ebovllalts. Ya ḥo vitsvolüytur ma vu shayt'ano – t'akqa dagadeʾnachul t'äḥa qin zulam dechu nakhatsa oḥa ma khaalaḥ.
6:69: /Delakh/ qörush bolcharna tseran (Delan ayatash siysaza desh bolcheran) ḥesapakh hxumma khir dats‚ delaḥ a, ḥekham bar du-q /tsarna t'eḥ/ – üsh qörush khir batsara-te?
6:70: Bita i shayn din lovzare a‚ erna khan yayare a däkqinarsh‚ shäsh dünenan dakharo ʿekhiynarsh. Aḥ ḥekham be /nakhana/ tsüntsa (Q'urʾantsa) adam sha karadaiytincho hxallak tsadaytarḥama – vats tsunna Dela votsurg doladiyrig a‚ ġolotsurg a. Mella a /zhözhakhatina/ düḥal makh belcha a – ötsur bats tsüngara i. Üsh bu shäsh dinchüntsa shäsh hxallaqillarsh‚ tsarna du ts'iydina khinan malar a‚ lazosh dolu ʿazap a - üsh khilarna tsa teshash.
6:71: Aḥ āla: "Vay qoyqu tq'a, Dela a vütiy, väshna payda a‚ zen a tsa dechünga? Vay yukhaderzina khir ma du (kerstanalle) Dala vay nisdinchul t'äḥa‚ lättaḥ shayt'ano sha ʿekhiynchukh tera ḥere a khilla‚ shen naq'ostiy bolush shega niysachu novq'a qoyqush: "Sḥavola tkhuna t'e"‚ bokhush. Aḥ āla: "Delan niysa neq' – i bu niysa neq'‚ tkhuna omra dina ʿalamiyn Dena müt'aḥ khila,
6:72: lamaz hxottade‚ Tsunakh (Delakh) qera"‚– älla. I vu shu Shena t'e dʿaguldiyr derg.
6:73: I vu stiglanash a‚ latta a Sha qöllinarg baq'ontsa. Tso "Khila!" ällachu diynaḥ – khülu. Tsünan dosh baq'derg du. Maʿa (zurma) loquchu diynaḥ pachchaḥlla Tsünan du‚ q'aylaḥ derg‚ gushderg khuurg I vu. I Shegaḥ ḥeq'alalla derg vu‚ sov dika khuush verg vu.
6:74: Ibrahxima ällera shen dega Āzare: "Aḥ ts'unash lötsu delanash boy? Ḥo a‚ ḥan q'am a bilggalchu tilar choḥ gush vu-q so".
6:75: Ishtta goytu Okha Ibrahximna stiglaniyn a‚ lättan a pachchaḥalla, i khiliytarḥama a /Delakh/ ch'oġa teshacharakh.
6:76: Shena t'e büysa yölcha‚ tsunna (Ibrahximna) gira seda. Tso elira: "I vu san Dela". I dʿatilcha, tso elira: "Suna tsa beza dʿatülush bersh".
6:77: Shena butt baycha qetash‚ tso elira: "I vu san Dela". Iza a dʿabüzcha‚ tso elira: "San Qiosh-Qobucho so tsa nisvaḥ‚ so bilggala khir ma vu tilabellachu nakhakh".
6:78: Shena malkh gicha qetash‚ tso elira: "Iza vu san Dela‚ iza uggar vokqa vu". Iza a dʿabüzcha‚ tso elira: "Hxay san q'am‚ so ts'ena vu-q ash /Delatsa/ naq'ost latsarkh.
6:79: As dʿaerzi sayn yuḥ stiglanash a‚ lätta a Qöllinchünga‚ doggakh /masso a khartsdinakh baq'dolchu dinna / t'e a virzina‚ so vats mushrikekh".
6:80: Tsünan q'omo q'iysira tsüntsa. Tso elira: "Sötsa q'üysu ash Dela baḥaneḥ? Tso so niysachu novq'a ma väkqina. So tsa qöru ash shetsa shirk dechukh‚ san Qiosh-Qobuchunna luush dolchu hxumanakh ben. Masso a hxuma chulätsna san Qiosh-Qobucho ʿilmantsa. Ash oyla tsa yo?
6:81: So mukha qöru ash shirk dinchukh? Shu a ma tsa qöru shäsh Delatsa naq'ost lätsna khilarkh‚ shetsa shüga dossosh khilla tsḥa a delil dotstsusheḥ. /Tsu/ shinna tobanekh mülkhanig yu uggar ḥaq' qeram tsakhilarna‚ shu khuush khilleḥ?"
6:82: Iyman dillinarsh‚ shayn iyman zulamekh tsa edinarsh – üsh bu shayna qeram botsursh‚ üsh bu niysachu novq'aḥ.
6:83: I du Tkhan delil‚ Okha della i Ibrahximna shen q'omana düḥal. Tkhayna luurg darzhashkaḥ ḥalavokqu Okha. Bakq'alla a, ḥan Qiosh-Qoburg ma vu Shegaḥ ḥeq'alalla derg a‚ khuush verg a.
6:84: Okha tsunna sovġatna velira Isḥaq' a‚ Yaʿq'ub a. Berrige a niysachu novq'a nisbira. Nuḥ a nisvira Okha niysachu novq'a /tsaral/ ḥalkha. Tsünan (Ibrahximan) zürretakh vu Davud a‚ Sulayman a‚ Ayub a‚ Yusuf a‚ Musa a‚ Hxarun a. Ishtta beqam bo Okha dikacharna.
6:85: Zakariya a‚ Yaḥʾya a‚ ʿiysa a‚ Ilyas a – masso a dikacharakh vu.
6:86: T'akqa Ismaʿil a‚ Al-Yasaʿ a‚ Yunus a‚ Lut' a – masso a vazvina Okha ʿalamel.
6:87: Tseran daykh a‚ tseran t'äḥenekh a‚ tseran vezharekh a /bevllacharna a della Okha i niʿmat/, üsh khärzhina Okha‚ nisbira niysachu novq'a.
6:88: Iza – Delan niysa neq' bu‚ tsüntsa nisvo Tso shen lekh Shena luurg. Tsara shirk dineḥara, tsara yina khilla ʿamalsh yovr ma yara.
6:89: Üsh bu Okha shayga zhayna a‚ ḥukma a‚ paykhamaralla a dellarsh. Hxorsh tsunakh tsa teshaḥ – Okha iza t'edüllur du /qechu/ q'omana‚ sha tsüntsa kerstanalla diyr dotsush dolchu.
6:90: Üsh bu Dala nisbinarsh. Tseran niysachu novq'a t'äḥahxotta ḥo. Aḥ āla: "As shügara makh tsa bökhu tsunakh. I ma bats ʿalamashna ḥekham ben".
6:91: Dalla ḥaq' bolu makh tsa khadiyra tsara, shäsh olush: "Dala tsa dossiyna stage hxumma a". Aḥ āla: "Ḥan dossiyna zhayna‚ shetsa Musa veana volu‚ nur a niysa neq' khilla dolu nakhana? Ash tsunna teptarsh do: tsḥaderg gucha a dokqush‚ duqaderg ḥul a desh. Shuna ʿamiyna ma du shuna a‚ shun dayshna a tsakhuurg". Aḥ āla: "Dala" /dossiyna/ T'akqa bita üsh shayn tilarchoḥ lovzush.
6:92: Hxara zhayna a‚ Okha dossiyna i‚ sha berkate a dolush‚ shel ḥalkharnig baq'desh dolush‚ yartiyn nanna a‚ tsunna gonakha dolchunna a qeram tasa. Ekhartakh teshash bersh tesha tsunakh (Q'urʾanakh). Üsh shayn lamazash ʿalashdesh bu.
6:93: Mila vu Dalla t'e khartsderg qöllinchul zulame? Ya ällachul: "Shega väḥiy deana"‚ väḥekh hxumma a tsa deana tsünga, ällachul a: "Asa a dossor du Dala dossiynachukh teranig". Ḥuna gicha i zulamkhoy saüyzush‚ malikash tseran küygash darzhosh /olush/: "Aradakha shayn sinosh‚ takhana siysazallin ʿazaptsa beqam bu shuna ash Dalla t'eḥ baq'dotsurg olush khilarna‚ shu Tsünan ayatekh kuradovlush khilarna”.
6:94: Shu däkhkina Tkhuna t'e tsḥatstsa, Okha shu dükhḥara ma qollara. Ash ditira Okha shayna dellarg shayn t'ēḥaḥ. Tkhuna-m tsa go shütsa shun ġodakqarkhoy‚ shuna möttush khilla bolu shäsh shun naq'ostiy bu. Dʿakhedira shun yuq'‚ dʿatilira shukh shuna möttush khillarg.
6:95: Bakq'alla a, Dela vu hxu a‚ lag a sḥadöllush verg. Diynaderg dellachukh sḥadokqu Tso‚ dellarg diynachukh sḥadokqurg a vu Iza. I vu shun Dela – shu mukha ʿekhosh du /khartsdolcho/!?
6:96: Satasar q'astadiyrig vu I‚ büysa yina Tso tiynalla khilla‚ malkh a‚ butt a qöllina /khanna-zamanna lerina/ ḥesapna. I bu Sha veza volchun‚ Sha khuush volchun dʿahxottam.
6:97: I vu shuna sedarchiy qöllinarg‚ arenan a‚ hxordan a bodaneḥ shuna neq' karaban. Okha bilgaldina ayatash khuush dolchu nakhana.
6:98: I vu shu qiiyna tsḥana sikh (Ādamakh)‚ t'akqa /shena/ ch'aġdalar a‚ ʿalashdalar a khülush. Bilgaldina Okha ayatash oyla echu nakhana.
6:99: I vu stiglara khi dossiynarg‚ tsüntsa kqiira Okha masso a taypa oramat‚ tsunakh khasstömash a q'astiyra Okha‚ qiado tsunakh bürtigash t'ett'a. Khurmanan ditta t'eḥ qüu khurmanan kenash‚ /khülüytu Tso/ kemsiyn a‚ zayt-dittan a‚ nariyn a boshmash‚ tera ersh a‚ tera yotsursh a. Ḥovsal shu stömashka‚ üsh qüush a‚ khülush a. Bakq'alla a, tsu choḥ delilash ma du teshash bolchu nakhana.
6:100: Dalla naq'ostiy khiliytina tsara zhinekh‚ Tso qöllina ma du üsh‚ tsara (teshash botschu nakha) tsḥa a ʿilma dotsush khartso qöllira Tsunna – k'entiy a‚ mekhkariy /bu Tsünan, älla/. Ts'ena vu I vonakh‚ laqaveli I tsara dechu (kharts) sibatekh.
6:101: Stiglaniyn a‚ lättan a yuḥantsa qollarkho, michara khir vu Tsünan dözalkho? Tsünan zuda ma tsa khilla. Tso Sha ma qöllina masso a hxuma. Masso a hxuma Sha khuush verg ma vu Iza.
6:102: I vu shun Dela – shu Qiosh-Qoburg – qin dela vats I votsurg‚ masso a hxuma Sha qöllinarg vu I. Tsunna ʿibadat deysha! I ma vu masso a hxumanna t'eḥ vekal.
6:103: Bʿärsa tsa qüu Tsunakh‚ I qüu bʿärsanakh. I t'ekh qetame a vu‚ dika khuush a vu.
6:104: Shüga eana bʿärserlonash shun Qiosh-Qobuchüngara. Bʿärg billinchunna – tsunna shena du‚ bʿärg ḥabbinchunna – tsunna shena du‚ /aḥ āla‚ Muḥammad/: "So ma vats shuna t'eḥ khekho".
6:105: Ishtta bilgaldokhu Okha ayatash‚ tsara āla tarlo dela: "Aḥ ʿamiyna"‚ Okha i bilgaldakqarḥama khuush bolchu nakhana.
6:106: Ḥo ḥayn Qiosh-Qobuchüngara ḥayn dag chu dülluchunna t'äḥahxotta‚ qin Dela vats I votsurg‚ dʿaverza mushrikekh /ḥan dog tsartsa bala bolush ma khiliyta/.
6:107: Dalla liʾneḥara /Tsüntsa/ naq'ost lotsur vatsara tsara‚ tsarna t'eḥ khekho tsa vina Okha ḥokh‚ tsarna t'eḥ vekal a vats ḥo.
6:108: Ash siysaza ma be Dela a vitina, tsara shayga qoyqush bersh (ts'ush) – t'akqa tsara mostaġallitsa‚ tsḥa a ʿilma dotsush, Dela a siysazviyr vu. Ishtta khazyina Okha hxor ummatana shen ʿamal‚ t'akqa shayn Qiosh-Qobuchünga du tseran dʿaderzar‚ Tso düytsur du tsarna tsara desh khillarg.
6:109: Delakh ch'oġa duynash biira tsara: shayga delil deʾcha‚ tsunakh teshanne a teshaza ʿiyr ma dats shäsh‚ älla. Aḥ āla: "Delilash Dalla gergaḥ du"‚ sten khoüytu shüga? – üsh deʾcha a, tsara iyman düllur dats.
6:110: Tseran degnash a‚ tseran bʿärsa a ḥiyzado Okha‚ üsh tsunakh (Q'urʾanakh) yuḥantsa tsa teshash ma khilla‚ bütu üsh shayn tilarchoḥ dʿasaüydush.
6:111: Okha tsärga malikash dossosh khilleḥara a‚ bellachara tsärga q'amel desh khilleḥara a‚ Okha tsarna masso a hxuma shayn bʿargash ḥalkha gulyina khilleḥara a – t'akqa a teshna khir batsara üsh‚ Dalla liʾcha a ben. Delaḥ a, tsarakh duqakhbersh tsa khuush bu.
6:112: Ishtta masso a paykhamarna mostaġ khiliytira Okha adamiyn a‚ zhiniyn a shayt'anekh‚ tsḥabolchara vuqeran degnashka khazdina deshnash qüssush, üsh ʿekhorḥama. Ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchunna liʾna khilleḥara, i dina khir datsara tsara. Bita üsh a‚ tsara kharts qullushderg a.
6:113: Tsu t'e ekhartakh tsateshacheran degnash dakhiytarḥama a‚ tsunna reza üsh khiliytarḥama a‚ tsärga guldaytarḥama a shäsh desh khilla dolu q'inosh /bitina üsh Dala/.
6:114: /Aḥ āla/: "Dela votschüngara lökhu tq'a as ḥukma? I ma vu shüga q'astosh dolu zhayna dossiynarg". Okha shayna zhayna dellacharna khäa i ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchüngara baq'ontsa dossosh khilar. Ḥo khilanne a ma khilalaḥ sheko esh bolcharakh.
6:115: Qochushkhilla ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchun deshnash baq'odlchüntsa a‚ niysontsa a. Tsünan deshnash khiytsa tsḥa a vats. I sha khezash verg a‚ khuush verg a vu.
6:116: Ḥo müt'aḥ khilaḥ lättaḥ bolcharakh dukqakhbolcharna‚ Delan neq'akh tilor vu ḥo tsara. Üsh t'äḥahxüttush ma bats shayna möttush dolchunna a ben‚ üsh ma bats khartslüysh ben.
6:117: Bakq'alla a, ḥan Qiosh-Qoburg – I ma vu dika khuush (vevzash) Shen neq'akh tilavellarg‚ I dika khuush (bevzash) ma vu niysachu novq'aḥ bersh.
6:118: Ash daa /bezhnekh/ shena t'eḥ /urs ḥoquchu khenaḥ/ Delan ts'e yakqinchukh‚ shäsh Tsünan ayatekh teshash khilla delaḥ.
6:119: Ash hxunda tsa duu shena t'eḥ Delan ts'e yakqichukh? Tso shuna q'asta ma dina Sha shuna ḥaram dinarg. Shu i tsa diʾcha tsa dovlush derg dotsurg. Bakq'alla a, duqabersh /nakh/ niysachu neq'akh tilosh ma bu shayn laamashtsa‚ tsḥa a ʿilma dotstsusheḥ. Bakq'alla a, ḥan Qiosh-Qoburg – I ma vu dika bevzash dozanekh bevllarsh.
6:120: Dita guchudälla q'a a‚ guchu tsa dällarg a. Bakq'alla a, shäsh q'inosh desh bolcharna beqam khir ma bu shäsh desh khillachüntsa.
6:121: Ash ma daalash Delan ts'e shena t'eḥ tsa yakqinchukh. Iza, bakq'alla a, pesaq'alla yu. Bakq'alla a, shayt'anasha dagatüysu shayn dottaġashna, tsärga shütsa q'iysiytarḥama. Nagaḥ sanna shu tsarna müt'aḥ khilaḥ – /t'akqa/ shu khir ma du mushrikash.
6:122: Ya sha khillarg vella‚ t'akqa Okha sha denvina‚ shena Okha nur khiliytina‚ tsüntsa nakhalaḥ lelash verg tera vuy sha bodanashkaḥ volchukh‚ tsu chüra sha araver votschu? Ishtta khazdina tsateshacharna shäsh desh khillarg.
6:123: Ishtta khiliytina Okha masso a yurtaḥ q'inosh letocheran tḥamdanash‚ tsu choḥ tsärga mekarlo yayta. Tsara-m mekarlo tsa yo shayna a ben‚ tsarna khaa tsa lo-q.
6:124: Shayga delil (ayat) deʾcha‚ tsara olu: "Tkho teshar ma dats, Delan elchanashka deʾnarg sannarg tkhayga tsa daġaḥ". Dalla dika khäa Sha elchanalla dala ḥaq' verg. Q'inosh dinacharakh siysazalla qüur ma yu Dalla gergaḥ‚ ch'oġa ʿazap a /qüur du/ shäsh khilarna mekarlo esh.
6:125: Dalla Shena nisvan luuchunna dog parġatdokqu islamana‚ Tso Shena tilavala vita luuchunna dog ch'oġa gatdo, stigla ḥalavoluchukh terra. Ishtta khiliytina Dala rizhs tsateshacharna t'eḥ.
6:126: Hxara bu ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchun neq'‚ niysa khilla bolu. Q'asta ma dina Okha ayatash ḥekham t'elotsuchu nakhana.
6:127: Tsarna masharan ts'a du shayn Qiosh-Qobuchun gergaḥ. I vu tseran dottaġ üsh khilarna /dika/ ʿamalsh esh.
6:128: /Ḥakhade:/ üsh berrige a gulbechu diynaḥ /qoyqur du/: "Hxay zhiniyn toba! Adamekh dokqa dāq'a sḥalätsna ash (dukqa adamash tiliyna ash)". Adamekh tseran dottaġasha er du: "Tkho qiosh-qobush volu, tkhan Dela‚ okha vovshashkara zovq iytsira‚ Aḥ tkhuna hxottiyna yolu tkhan ʿozhalla t'eqechira". Tso (Dala) elira: "/Zhözhakhatin/ ts'e yu shun chuġoyla‚ daima tsu choḥ düsush‚ Dalla ma liʾna". Bakq'alla a, ḥan Qiosh-Qoburg ma vu Sha ḥukma /niysa/ desh verg a‚ khuush verg a.
6:129: Ishtta tsḥabolchu zulamkhoshka vukqeran doladoytu Okha tsara karadesh khilla dolchüntsa.
6:130: "Hxay zhiniyn a‚ adamiyn a toba! Shüga tsa bäkhkina elchanash shuna yukq'era‚ shüga düytsush San ayatash‚ shuna ḥekhosh (qeram tasartsa) hxoqu shun denna düḥalqetar?" Tsara är: "Tkhayna t'eḥ teshalla dina okha". Dünenan dakharo ʿekhiyra üsh‚ shayna t'eḥ teshalla dira tsara, shäsh tsa teshash khilla, älla.
6:131: Ishtta (elchanash bokhüytura Okha) ḥan Qiosh-Qoburg tsa khilla dela zulamtsa yartash hxallakesh, tseran ohxlanna a tsa khuush.
6:132: Hxoranna shen-shen darzh du‚ sha dinchukh. Ḥan Qiosh-Qoburg ma vats tidame ötsur dotsush tsara desh derg.
6:133: Ḥan Qiosh-Qoburg vu /tsḥannekh/ tsa vozush (khalq' a, tsünan ʿibadat a Shena tsa khilcha a megash)‚ q'inkhetam bolush a. Shena laaḥ, shu hxallakdiyr du Tso. Shul t'äḥa Shena luurg vütur vu‚ shu a Tso qiiyna khilare terra qechu q'oman zürretakh.
6:134: Bakq'alla a, shuna khir du ällarg doġur dolush du shuna‚ shun nitsq' qochur ma bats i ġeldan (i dukhatokha).
6:135: Aḥ āla: "Hxay san q'am! Shayn ʿamal ye ash shayn mettigashkaḥ‚ asa a yiyr yu sayn ʿamal‚ t'äḥa khuur du shuna‚ ḥenan khir yu ts'iynan t'äḥe (ekhart). Bakq'alla a‚ bakqiybiyr ma bats zulamkhoy".
6:136: Tsara dira Dalla Tso qöllinchu yaltekh a‚ bezhanekh a dāq'a‚ elira (tsara) "Hxara Dalla du" – tsarna mottareḥ – "hxara vayn naq'ostashna du". Tseran naq'ostashna khillarg Dēle tsa qochu‚ Dalla khillarg tseran naq'ostashka qochu – ma von khilla tsara desh dolu ḥukma.
6:137: Ishtta khazdira duqabolchu mushrikashna tseran naq'ostasha – zhinasha shayn berash dayar (zudaberash, diyna dolush, lättakh dokhkar), üsh hxallakbarḥama a‚ tsarna shayn (Ismaʿilera sḥadoġush khilla dolu) din dokhadaytarḥama a. Dalla liʾna khilleḥara, i diyr datsara tsara‚ bita üsh a‚ tsara /kharts/ qullurg a.
6:138: /Mushrikasha/ elira: "Hxara däkhni a‚ yalta a ḥaram du‚ i duur dats vayna luʾcho ben"‚ – ishtta dovdora tsara‚ däkhni du shayna t'ekhaar ḥaram dolush /tsarna mottareḥ/‚ däkhni du tsara shayna t'eḥ Delan ts'e tsa yokqush Tsunna t'eḥ khartsderg qollarḥama. T'akqa beqam biyr bu Tso tsarna tsara /khartsderg/ t'equllush khilarna.
6:139: Tsara elira: "Hxoqu bezhaniyn gay choḥ derg ts'ena du vayn bozharshna‚ ḥaram du vayn zudarshna. Nagaḥ sanna ella dünena yalaḥ – üsh tsu choḥ /tsḥaniyssa/ deq'akhoy bu". Tso (Dala) beqam biyr bu tsarna shäsh qullush dolchunna t'eḥ. Bakq'alla a, I Shegaḥ ḥeq'alalla derg a vu‚ devzash a vu /Shen khalq'/.
6:140: Eshalleḥ bisi ʿovdallalitsa‚ khuush hxuma a dotsush‚ shayn berash hxallakbinarsh‚ Dala shayna della ritsq' shayna ḥaramdinarsh, Dalla t'e khartsderg qollarḥama. Tilabella üsh‚ niysachu novq'aḥ khila a tsa khilla üsh.
6:141: I vu qiiynarg boshmash‚ qozush yolu a‚ qozush yotsu a‚ khurmanash a‚ oramatash a‚ shayn daar bashkha dolush‚ zayt-ditt a‚ nar a – tera yolu a‚ tera yotsu a. Baa tseran stömash, üsh qiʾcha‚ yalta chuderzochu diynaḥ tsünan ḥaq' (zakat) dʿalo. Qoam tsa besh ma daya /shaygaḥ derg/. Bakq'alla a, Tsunna tsa beza hxumanan qoam tsa besh bersh.
6:142: Bezhanekh du – shuna moḥ qöḥursh a‚ shuna k'eda mott khülursh a. Daa Dala shayna dellachu ritsq'ekh‚ t'äḥa ma hxitta shayt'anan ġulchashna. Bakq'alla a, i shuna bilggala mostaġ ma du.
6:143: /Sḥaetsa/ barhx börshanig a‚ stēnig a: üstaġekh a shishsha‚ gezarekh a shishsha. Ālal (khattal tsärga): "Börshanig shiʾ ḥaram dina Tso (Dala) ya stēnig shiʾ dina‚ ya shinnan a stechiyn kiyraḥ derg dina? Diytsal suna ʿilmantsa‚ shäsh baq'lüysh khilleḥ".
6:144: Emkalekh shiʾ‚ bezhnekh shiʾ – ālal /hxintsa/: shiʾ börshanig ḥaram dina‚ ya shiʾ stēnig dina‚ ya shinnan a stēchiyn kiyraḥ derg dina‚ ya shu dara teshash (dāq'a lotsush) Dala shuna tsüntsa veset desh?" Mila khir vu zulame Dalla t'e khartsderg qulluchul, nakh tilorḥama tsḥa a ʿilma dotstsusheḥ? Bakq'alla a, Dala tsa nisdo zulame q'am.
6:145: Aḥ āla /tsärga, hxay Muḥammad/: "Suna tsa karado sayga daiytinchu väḥiyshkaḥ duuchunna daa ḥaram dinarg q'edellarg dotsurg‚ ya ʿenash dolu ts'iy dotsurg, ya ḥaqin zhizhig dotsurg‚ – t'akqa i rizhs yu, – ya shena t'eḥ /urs ḥoqush/ Dela votschun ts'e yakqina ts'ena yotsu hxuma yotsurg. T'q'a shena nitsq' baḥ /matsallo/‚ q'inakh larlush‚ /Delan/ dozanekh a tsa volush – /yaa mega tsunna ḥaramnig matsalla tsa vallal/. Bakq'alla a, ḥan Qiosh-Qoburg gechdesh verg ma vu‚ q'inkhetame verg a ma vu /ishttachunna/.
6:146: Zhügtashna ḥaram ma dira Okha masso a (yeq'aella) berg yolu /diynat/. Ḥelekh a‚ üstaġekh a, - Okha ḥaram yira tsarna otseran moḥ, shayn buq'akh‚ ya chokokh letta yotsurg‚ ya däʿakhkakh iynarg yotsurg. I beqam bira Okha tsarna üsh tilbalar baḥaneḥ. Bakq'alla a, tkho baq' du /Tkhan ḥukmashkaḥ./
6:147: Ḥo tsara khartsvaḥ‚ āla: "Shun Qiosh-Qoburg vu shortta q'inkhetam bolush‚ bukhatokhalur bats Tsünan nitsq' q'inosh dechu nakhakh".
6:148: Delatsa naq'ost lätsnachara er du: "Dalla liʾneḥara, Delatsa naq'ost lotsur vatsara okha a‚ tkhan daysha a‚ hxumma a ḥaram diyr datsara okha". Ishtta khartsdira /din/ tsaral ḥalkha khillachara a tkhan nitsq' ʿovshshalts. Ālal (khattal tsärga): "Shügaḥ duy ʿilma? Delaḥ, ash i tkhuna guchudakqa. Shu t'äḥahxüttush ma dats mottarna (shayna möttush dolchunna) a ben‚ shu ma dats khartslüysh a ben ".
6:149: Āla: "Deleḥ du qochchush delil. Liʾneḥara, shu derrige a nisdiyr dara Tso".
6:150: Āla: "Balabe shayn teshash‚ shäsh teshalla diyr dolu‚ Dala i ḥaram dina"‚– älla. Tsara teshalla daḥ‚ aḥ ma delaḥ tsärtsa teshalla. Ḥo t'äḥa ma hxottalaḥ Tkhan ayatash khartsdinacheran a‚ ekhartakh tsateshacheran a laarshna – üsh bu shayn Qiosh-Qobuchüntsa /qin naq'ostiy/ nisbesh (mushrikash).
6:151: Āla /tsärga, hxay Muḥammad/: "Sḥadüyla‚ as düytsur du shun Qiosh-Qobucho shuna ḥaram dinarg: (ḥaram dina shuna) ash Tsüntsa tsḥana hxumantsa naq'ost latsar a‚ (shu) detsa-nenatsa von khilar a (tsärtsa dika khilar t'edillina shuna). Shayn dözalsh ma baya matsallakh /qörush/- Okha qobur du shu a‚ üsh a. Bökhachunna gerga ma ġolash – tsunakh guchudällachukh a‚ q'aylakha dolchukh a. Sa ma delash, sha Dala ḥaram dina dolu‚ baq'ontsa ben. I du Tso shüga veset dinarg, shu khillarḥama ḥeq'ale.
6:152: Boberan däkhnina gerga ma ġolash dikachüntsa ben, i qiʾna dallalts. Terza niysa ozalash. Okha t'e tsa düllu sina tsunna nitsq' qochurg ben. Shäsh diytsaḥ‚ niyso elash (baq'derg diytsalash), gergara velaḥ a (tsunna düḥal delaḥ a i baq'derg). Delatsa yina vaʿda qochushʾelash. I du Tso shuna shetsa veset dinarg, shu khiliytarḥama oyla esh.
6:153: Hxara San neq' bu niysa berg – t'äḥahxitta tsunna‚ t'äḥa ma hxitta qechu neq'ashna – tsara dʿaq'astor du shu Tsünan neq'akh. I du shuna Tso (Dala) shetsa veset dinarg, shu khiliytarḥama /Delakh/ qörush.
6:154: T'akqa Musaga delira Okha zhayna‚ sha dikanig dinachunna /Tkhan niʿmat/ qochushdesh khilla dolu‚ hxor hxumanna q'astor khilla dolu‚ niysa neq' a‚ q'inkhetam a khilla bolu- üsh shayn Qiosh-Qobuchüntsa tsḥänaqetarkh teshash khila ma megara.
6:155: Hxara a zhayna /Q'urʾan/ du. Okha dossiyna i sha berkate a dolush‚ t'äḥahxitta tsunna‚ /Delakh/ qera – shukh q'inkhetam ban megara.
6:156: Ash tsa alarḥama: "Tkhol ḥalkha khillachu shina tobane dossiyna zhayna‚ tkho khilla üsh ʿamarkh ġopal (tkhuna tsa ʿema üsh-tkhan mattaḥ dats üsh".
6:157: Ya ash tsa alarḥama: "Tkhöga dossiyna khilleḥara zhayna – tsaral a niysa khilla khir dara tkho". Eana shüga bilgalo shun Qiosh-Qobuchüngara‚ niysa neq' a‚ q'inkhetam a. Mila vu tq'a zulame Delan ayatash khartsdechul‚ tsarakh /nakh/ dʿatilinchul? Beqam biyr bu Okha Tkhan ayatekh /nakh/ dʿatilincharna vochu ʿazaptsa tsara üsh tilosh khilar baḥaneḥ.
6:158: Ḥovsur buy-te üsh shayga malikash dakhkare ya shayna Dela vare‚ ya ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchun tsḥadolu ayatash dakhkare? Ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchun tsḥadolu ayatash däkhkanchu diynaḥ sina payda biyr bats tsünan iymano‚ sha ḥalkha teshna khilla datsaḥ ya shen iyman choḥ guldina dikanig datsaḥ. Aḥ āla: "Ḥovsush ʿe shu – tkho a ḥovsush du".
6:159: Bakq'alla a, shayn din deq'na khillarsh‚ tobanash khillarsh – ḥo tsarakh ma vats ḥuna tsḥanna hxumanna t'eḥ‚ tseran ġullaq Dele du. T'akqa Tso düytsur du tsärga tsara desh khillarg.
6:160: Dikanig deʾnachunna – tsunna itt tsunakh teranig du. Vonig deʾnachunna – beqam khir bats tsunakh terachüntsa ben. Tsarna zulam diyr dats.
6:161: Aḥ āla: "Bakq'alla a, so nisvina san Qiosh-Qobucho niysachu novq'a‚ mekhala (niysa) din khüluytush‚ doggakh /i baq'dina/ t'evirzina khilla volchu Ibrahximan millatakh khülüytush. I /Ibrahxim/ tsa khilla mushrikekh".
6:162: Āla: "San lamaz a‚ san ʿibadat a‚ san denvalar a‚ san valar a – Dalla du‚ ʿalamiyn Da khilla volchu.
6:163: Deq'akho vats tsünan. Tsüntsa omra dina suna‚ so ḥalkhara müt'aḥ verg vu".
6:164: Aḥ āla: "Allahx votsurg /qin/ lokhu as Qiosh-Qoburg (Dela)? I ma vu masso a hxumanan Qiosh-Qoburg. Karor ma dats hxor sinna shena t'eḥ derg ben. Ḥur ma bats ḥocho qechünan moḥ. T'akqa shun dʿaderzar shun Qiosh-Qobuchünga ma du – Tso düytsur ma du shuna shu shena choḥ khilpalo esh khillarg.
6:165: I ma vu shukh khiliytinarg lättan t'äḥe‚ shukh tsḥabersh vuqaral darzhatsa aybinarg, shu zerḥama Sha shuna dellachüngaḥ. Bakq'alla a, ḥan Qiosh-Qoburg sikha ma vu taʿzar dareḥ‚ I gechdiyrig a‚ q'inkhetame verg a ma vu.
7:2: Zhayna (Q'urʾan) du hxara, dossiyna ḥöga /ya Muḥammad/, ḥan dagchoḥ /khalontsa/ ġitto ma khüliyla otsunakh (ḥan q'omo khartsdarna qörush shen mette dʿaqacho) - shetsa aḥ /tsateshacharna/ dʿaḥedo (qeram tasa) a, teshacharna (muʾma nakhana) ḥekham khiliyta a.
7:3: T'äḥahxitta shayn Qiosh-Qobuchüngara shayga dossinchunna‚ t'äḥa ma hxitta Iza votschu /qechu/ dottaġashna (ya ġolotsurshna)‚ k'ezig du-q ash oyla yiyrig.
7:4: Masa yurt Okha hxallakyina! Tkhan ʿazap deara tsärga busa ya tsarna delq'anna nab ozaelcha.
7:5: Tkhan ʿazap shayga deʾcha, tseran qayqar ma tsa khilira alar ben: "Bakq'alla a, tkho khilla - q zulamkhoy."
7:6: T'äḥa khottur ma du Okha shayga elchanash bakhkiytina khillachärga‚ khottur ma du Okha elchanashka.
7:7: Tsärga düytsur ma du Okha ʿilmantsa‚ Tkho dotsush tsa khilla.
7:8: Mizan-terza otsu diynaḥ khirg khilar ḥaq'-baq' du. Shen terza dazdellarsh – üsh bu bakqiybiyrash.
7:9: Shen terza daydellarsh – üsh bu shayn sinosh eshiynarsh Tkhan ayatashtsa shäsh zulam desh khilla khilartsa.
7:10: Lätta t'eḥ Okha ch'aġdira shu‚ Okha shuna tsu t'eḥ bakham khiliytira‚ k'ezzig du-q ash barkalla olurg.
7:11: Okha shu qöllira‚ t'akqa Okha shuna kuts khiliytira‚ t'akqa Okha elira malikashka: "Suzhud de Ādamna!" Tsara suzhud dira‚ Iblis dotscho – i tsa khilira suzhud decharakh.
7:12: Elira /Dala/: "Sten düḥalo yina ḥuna suzhud dan, As ḥayga omra dicha?" Elira /Ibliso/: "So dika du tsul (Ādamal). So qöllina Aḥ ts'arakh‚ i qöllina Aḥ popparkh".
7:13: Elira /Dala/: "Oḥadossa tsigara (yalsamanera). Öshush dats ḥan tsu choḥ dokqader. Aradala! Bakq'alla a, ḥo siysazacharakh du".
7:14: Tso (Ibliso) elira: "Ḥem be sokh üsh yukha denbiyr bolu de t'eqachchalts (q'emat de dallalts tsa dolüytush ditaḥ so)".
7:15: Elira /Dala/: "Bakq'alla a, shekh ḥem binacharakh du ḥo (diti ḥo q'ematde dallalts tsa dolüytush)".
7:16: Elira /Ibliso/: "Aḥ so tilor baḥaneḥ üsh Ḥan niysachu neq'akh tilo k'elonna khuur ma du so.
7:17: T'akqa doġur ma du so tsarna ḥalkhakhula‚ t'eḥakhula‚ ättu aġorkhula‚ ärru aġorkhula‚ tsarakh duqakhbersh karor ma bats ḥuna barkalla olush".
7:18: Elira /Dala/: "Aradala tsu chüra (yalsamanera) bekhke a khilla‚ q'inkhetamna gena a dale. Milla khilaḥ a tsarakh ḥuna t'äḥahxöttinarg – yuzonza yutur ma yats As zhözhakhati shukh massarakh a.
7:19: Hxay Ādam! Vākha ḥo a‚ ḥan zuda a yalsamaneḥ‚ ash shimmo a daa shayna luʾuchüra‚ shu shiʾ gerga ma ġolash hxoqu dittana – t'akqa zulamkhoykh khir du shu shiʾ".
7:20: I shiʾ ʿekho doladelira shayt'a guchuyakharḥama tsarakh shinnakh ḥulyina yolu tseran eḥe mettigash. Elira: "Shun Qiosh-Qobucho tsu dittakh shu shiʾ dukhatökhna ma dats shukh shinnakh malikash tsa khiliyta a, ya shu shiʾ guttar dekhacharakh tsa khiliyta a ben".
7:21: Tsarna shinna duynash biira tso: "Bakq'alla a, so ma du shuna shinna ḥekhamcha"‚– bokhush.
7:22: I shiʾ ʿekho /Delakh kharts/ duynash biira tso tsarna. T'akqa tsu shimma tsu dittakh chambäkqicha, tsarna guchuelira shayn eḥe mettigash‚ üsh büylabelira shayna t'e yalsamanin ġash ʿitta. Tseran Qiosh-Qobucho tsu shinga qayqira: "As tsu dittakh dukhatökhna datsara shu shiʾ? As shüga älla datsara: shayt'a shun bilgala mostaġ ma duy?"
7:23: Tsu shimmo elira: "Tkhan Qiosh-Qoburg‚ tkhan doġmashna zulam ma di okha. Aḥ tkhuna gech tsa daḥ‚ Aḥ tkhokh q'inkhetam tsa baḥ – tkho khir ma du eshnacharakh".
7:24: Elira /Dala/: "Oḥadissa /yalsamani chüra/‚ shu vovshiyn mostaġiy du. Lättaḥ shuna ch'aġam a‚ tsḥa khan t'ekqachchalts bakham a khir bu".
7:25: Elira: "Tsu choḥ shu qüur du‚ tsu choḥ shu liyr du‚ tsu chüra shu aradokhur a du".
7:26: Hxay Ādaman k'entiy! Okha dossiyna shuna ash shetsa eḥe mettigash ḥulye dukhar a, shu shetsa khazlush dolu dukhar a. /Delakh/ qeraran dukhar – i du dika derg. I Delan ayatekh du üsh khilarḥama qetash.
7:27: Hxay Ādaman k'entiy! Shu ʿekha ma doyla shayt'ano‚ tso shun da-naniy yalsamani chüra aradakharkh terra, sḥadokqush tseran shinna t'era dukhar tsarna shinna gaytarḥama shayn eḥe mettigash. Bakq'alla a, tsunna (shayt'anna) shu gush du‚ tq'a iza a‚ tsünan zürret a shuna tsa gucharakh du. Bakq'alla a, Okha shayt'anash khiliytina tsateshacharna dottaġiy (doladiyrash).
7:28: Shäsh bökhanig dicha‚ tsara olu: "Tkhan day kariyna tkhuna tsunna t'eḥ‚ Dala omra dina tkhuna tsüntsa". Aḥ āla: "Bakq'alla a, Dala omra tsa do bökhuchüntsa‚ ash olu tq'a Delakh lätsna shayna tsakhuurg?"
7:29: Āla: "Omra dina san Qiosh-Qobucho /massanḥa/ niyso lelayar. Hxottae shayn yakhḥash /Dalla t'e/ hxor suzhud dechu mettigeḥ a, suzhud dechu khenaḥ a‚ qayqa Tsünga (Dele)‚ Tsünan din ts'andesh /shirkakh/. Tso shu qollarkh terra /lättakh/‚ yukhadörzur du shu dakhare (yukhadendiyr du shu q'ematdiynaḥ)".
7:30: Tsḥa toba nisyina Tso‚ vuqarna t'eḥ tilar baq'khilla. Bakq'alla a, tsara Dela a vitina, shayt'anekh dottaġiy (doladiyrash) lätsna shayna‚ tsarna möttu shäsh niysachu novq'aḥ du.
7:31: Hxay Ādaman k'entiy! Sḥaetsa shayn khaza dukhar hxor suzhud dechu mettigaḥ a, suzhud dechu khenaḥ a (khaza, ts'ena dukhar dukha, shäsh lamaz desh a, t'avaf desh a – ḥazhts'enna go bokqush a)‚ daa‚ mala‚ /shayn hxumanan/ qoam be. Bakq'alla a, Dalla tsa beza /hxumanan/ qoam besh botsursh.
7:32: Aḥ āla /hxay Muḥammad, otsu Makkin kerstanashka, shäsh Kaʿbina t'avaf desh khilla bolchu berzina (t'eḥ dukhar dotsush), Dala ḥanal dinarg shayna ḥaram desh khilla bolchu/: "Ḥan ḥaram dina Delera khaza derg (dukhar)‚ Tso shen leshna sḥadäkqina dolu‚ ritsq'anakh a ts'ena derg?" Āla: "Iza du iyman dillincharna gergarchu (dünenan) dakhareḥ‚ dekq'a tsarna dolush q'ematdiynaḥ. Ishtta q'astado Okha ayatash khuush dolchu q'omana".
7:33: Aḥ āla: "Bakq'alla a, san Qiosh-Qobucho ḥaram dina bökhanig‚ tsunakh guchadällarg a‚ ḥulameḥ derg a‚ q'a a‚ baḥana dotsush ġelo yar a‚ ash /Delatsa/ naq'ost latsar a Tso shetsa tsḥa a delil dossiyna dotschüntsa‚ ash Dalla t'eḥ alar a shayna tsakhuurg".
7:34: Hxor ummatan ʿozhalla yu (tökhna khan). Shen ʿozhalla t'eeʾcha, tsḥa saḥt t'äḥadüsur a dats i‚ ḥalkhader a dats.
7:35: Hxay Ādaman k'entiy! Bakhkaza büsur ma bats shüga elchanash shukh shaykh‚ shuna düytsur du tsara Tkhan ayatash‚ /Delakh/ qiyrinchunna‚ dikanig dinachunna – qeram a khir ma bats tsarna‚ üsh singattame a khir ma bats.
7:36: Tkhan ayatash khartsdinarsh‚ tsarna kuralla yinarsh – üsh bu /zhözhakhatin/ ts'eran day. Üsh tsu choḥ daima lättar bu.
7:37: Mila vu Dalla t'e khartsderg qöllinchul zulame‚ ya Tsünan ayatash khartsdinchul (zulame)? – Tsarna shayn dāq'a qochur du yazdinchukh. Tkhan elchanash shayna t'eboġush sinosh etsa‚ olush: "Michaḥ bu ash, Dela a vitina, ʿibadat desh khillarsh?" Tsara olush: "Dʿatilina üsh tkhokh". Shayna t'eḥ teshalla diyr du tsara shäsh tsatesharsh (kerstanash) khilira, älla.
7:38: Elira /Dala/: "Chuġo shayl ḥalkha /zhözhakhatin/ ts'ergaḥ khillachu zhiniyn a‚ adamiyn a ummatashna". Chöḥa mel dällachu ummato neʿalt er du vuqarna‚ berrige a vovshakhqetcha – t'akqa t'äḥarcho ḥalkharchukh er du: "Tkhan Qiosh-Qoburg‚ hxoqara tiliyra ḥuna tkho‚ /zhözhakhatin/ ts'eran ʿazap deḥa tsarna t'ett'a". Elira /Dala/: "Hxoranna a t'ett'a /ʿazap/ khir du". Delaḥ a, tsa khäa-q shuna.
7:39: Ḥalkharcho vuqünga elira: "Tkhuna t'eḥ dozalla tsa khilira shun‚ ʿovsha shayna ʿazap shäsh karadina khillachüntsa".
7:40: Bakq'alla a, Tkhan ayatash khartsdinarsh‚ tsarna kuralla yinarsh – stigalan neʿarsh dʿayöllur ma yats tsarna‚ yalsamani chu ġur ma bats üsh emkal mekhan ʿürga yollalts – ishtta beqam biyr bu Okha q'inosh dinacharna.
7:41: Tsarna zhözhakhatikh khir bu /vizha/ mott a‚ tsarna t'ekhula ts'eran pardo khir du – ishtta beqam biyr bu Okha zulamkhoshna.
7:42: Iyman dillinarsh a‚ dikanash dinarsh a‚ – sinna t'e tsa düllu Okha tsunna nitsq' qochurg ben‚ – üsh yalsamanin day bu‚ üsh tsu choḥ guttar lättar bu.
7:43: Okha dʿayakqira tseran degnashkara öġazlo; dʿaökhush khir du /yalsamaneḥ/ tseran /ġalaniy/ bukhakhula khish‚ tsara er: "Khastam bu Dalla‚ tkho nisdinchu hxoqunna t'e‚ tkho khir ma datsara nisdella, Dala nisdina tsa khilleḥ. Tkhan Qiosh-Qobuchun elchanash bäkhkira baq'ontsa". Tsärga qayqira: "Hxara yalsamani shuna irsana qächna yu ash ʿamal yina khilartsa".
7:44: Yalsamanin daysha zhözhakhatin dayshka qoyqur: "Tkhuna-m kariyna tkhayn Qiosh-Qobucho tkhuna vaʿda yina khillarg baq'khilla‚ shuna kariyniy shun Qiosh-Qobucho shuna vaʿda yina khillarg baq'khilla?" Tsara er: "Hxaʾ". T'akqa dʿaḥedarkhocho dʿaḥedira tsarna yukq'eḥ: "Delan neʿalt khülda zulamkhoshna"‚ – älla.
7:45: Ishttanash bu üsh shäsh dʿatilabesh /nakh/ Delan neq'akh, i shäsh gamban luush‚ üsh ekhart kerstadesh ma bu.
7:46: Tsarniy, vuqarniy yukq'eḥ düḥalo khir yu. Aʿrafana t'eḥ nakh khir bu, shayna masso a vevzash shayn bilgalonashtsa. Yalsamanin dayshka tsara qoyqur du: "Salamun ʿalaykum"‚ – älla. Otsu /yalsamani/ chu ġur bats üsh‚ üsh ch'oġa luush ma bara.
7:47: Zhözhakhatin day bolchu aġor shayn bʿärsa dʿadirzicha‚ tsara er: "Tkhan Qiosh-Qoburg‚ tkho ma khiliytalaḥ zulame dolchu q'omatsa".
7:48: Aʿrafan daysha qoyqur du nakhe, shayna bevzash bolchu tseran bilgalonashtsa‚ ōlush: "Hxun payda bi shun guldaro a (ash dünenaḥ guldesh khillachu ḥolo)‚ ash kuralla esh khilaro a?"
7:49: "Hxorsh bu üsh, ash duynash buush khillarsh‚ Delan q'inkhetam tsarakh qetar bats‚ bokhush?" "Chuġo yalsamanina. Qeram a khir ma bats shuna‚ shu singattame (poshme) a khir ma dats ".
7:50: Zhözhakhatin daysha yalsamanin dayshka qoyqur du: "Dottiysha tkhuna t'e khi ya Dala shayna dellachu ritsq'anakh /tsḥatstsa hxuma loysha tkhuna/". Tsara er du: "Bakq'alla a, Dala i ḥaram dina ma du tsateshacharna" –
7:51: üsh bu shayn dinakh tsadashar a, lovzar a dinarsh‚ shäsh dünenan dakharo ʿekhiynarsh. Takhana Okha üsh bitsbiyr ma bu‚ tsara hxoqu shayn denna düḥalqetar shäsh ditsdare terra‚ üsh tkhan ayatash kerstadesh khilare terra.
7:52: Tkho däkhkina ma dara tsärga zhaynitsa‚ Okha sha bilgaldäkqina dolchu ʿilmantsa‚ teshash dolchu q'omana sha niysa neq' a‚ q'inkhetam a khilla dolchu.
7:53: I tidare ben ḥovsush buy-te üsh? Tsünan tidar deʾnachu diynaḥ i ḥalkha ditsdinchara er ma du: "Tkhan Qiosh-Qobuchun elchanash ma bäkhkira baq'onna t'eḥ. Hxintsa tkhuna shapaʿat dan tsḥa a vuy‚ i tkhuna diyr dolush volu‚ ya tkho yukhaderzadan‚ t'akqa okha yiyr ma yara tkhäsh yina tsa khilla yolu /dika/ʿamal". Tsara shäsh dina shayna zen‚ dʿatilira tsarakh tsara /kharts/ qullush khillarg.
7:54: Bakq'alla a, shun Qiosh-Qoburg vu /tsḥa Allahx/ Dela‚ Sha stigalsh a‚ latta qöllina volu a yalkh diyna choḥ. T'akqa dʿanisvelira Iza ʿarsha t'eḥ. Büysane de ḥuldoytu Tso‚ /tsarakh/ hxorammo vazha lökhush sikhontsa. Malkh a‚ butt a‚ sedarchiy a bolkh besh du Tsünan omratsa. Tq'a Tsünan dats qollar a‚ omra a? Berkate khili i Dela – ʿalamiyn Da.
7:55: Qayqa (doʿa de) shayn Qiosh-Qobuchünga ḥastaloy a‚ mellasha a (doʿa desh mäḥariy ma betta). Bakq'alla a, Tsunna tsa beza dozanakh bovlursh.
7:56: Bökhanig ma lelade lättaḥ i ts'andellachul t'äḥa‚ qayqa Tsünga /Dele/ qeramtsa a‚ dogdakhartsa a. Bakq'alla a, Delan q'inkhetam gerga bu dikacharna.
7:57: I vu mekhash boüytush, qaʾ khüliy, Shen q'inkhetamal ḥalkha. Tsara /doġikh/ yazʾella markhash yaliycha‚ Okha lokhku üsh bella khillachu makhka (yoq'ana khilla baq'bellachu) – tsüntsa (markhatsa) khi (doġa) dossado Okha. Tsüntsa masso a stom arabolüytu. Ishtta bellarsh a arabokhur bu Okha‚ shu khila megara oyla esh.
7:58: Dika mokhk – tsünan oramatash (lattakh sḥayolu dika hxuma) aradüylu shen Qiosh-Qobuchun purbantsa‚ bekhbella khillarg (mokhk) – tsḥa a paydabotsurg ben ara tsa yokqu tso. Ishtta q'astado Okha ayatash barkalla oluchu q'omana.
7:59: Okha vakhiytira Nuḥ shen q'omana t'e. Tso elira: "Hxay san q'am! ʿibadat deysha Dalla‚ I votsurg qin dela vats shuna. So qöru shuna deza- dokqachu diynan ʿazapakh ".
7:60: Tsünan q'oman elasha elira: "Bakq'alla a, tkhuna ḥo gush ma vu bilggalchu tilar choḥ".
7:61: Tso elira: “Hxay san q'am! Sötsa tilavalar ma dats‚ delaḥ a, so ʿalamiyn Degara elcha ma vu.
7:62: As shüga dʿaqachado san Qiosh-Qobuchun elchalalla‚ as shuna ḥekham bo‚ Delera shuna tsakhuurg khuush vu so.
7:63: Ya shu tsetsdevlira shayga shayn Qiosh-Qobuchüngara shuna yukq'era tsḥana stagekhula ḥekham bārakh, shuna qeram tasarḥama‚ shu qörush khilarḥama. Shukh q'inkhetam ban megara –q”.
7:64: Tsara i (Nuḥ) khartsvira. Okha i k'elḥarväkqira‚ tsüntsa bersh a‚ kemana choḥ‚ Tkhan ayatash khartsdinarsh khi chu bakhiytira. Bakq'alla a, üsh khilira bʿärsa dotsu q'am.
7:65: ʿadashka a /vakhiytira/ tseran vasha Hxýd. Tso elira: "Hxay san q'am! ʿibadat deysha Dalla‚ I votsurg qin dela ma vats shuna. Shu tsa qöru?"
7:66: Tsünan q'oman tsateshnacheran elasha elira: "Bakq'alla a, tkhuna ḥo go ʿovdallina choḥ‚ bakq'alla a, tkhuna ḥo khetash ma vu khartslüycharakh".
7:67: Tso elira: "Hxay san q'am! Sokh ʿovdalalla a ma dats‚ delaḥ a, so ʿalamiyn Degara elcha ma vu.
7:68: As shüga dʿaqachado san Qiosh-Qobuchun elchanalla‚ so shuna teshame volu ḥekhamcha ma vu.
7:69: Ya shu tsetsdevlira shayga shayn Qiosh-Qobuchun shuna yukq'era tsḥana stagekhula ḥekham barakh shuna qeram tasa. Dagadaiytal‚ Tso shukh t'äḥe khiliytira Nuḥan q'omal t'äḥa‚ Tso shu alsamdekhira doġmashkaḥ nitsq'atsa. Dagadayta Delan niʿmatash‚ shu khila megara khazakhetash".
7:70: Tsara elira: "Ḥo tkhuna veana tkhöga vekq'a tsḥana Dalla ʿibadat dayta‚ tkhöga ditiyta tkhan day shena ʿibadat desh khillarg? Hxaʾ‚ daiyta tkhuna ayḥa tkhötsa vaʿda yina khillarg‚ ḥo baq'lüycharakh khilleḥ".
7:71: Tso elira: "Dözhna shuna t'e shayn Qiosh-Qobuchüngara ʿazap a‚ öġazlo a. Sötsa q'üysu tq'a ash‚ shäsh a‚ shun daysha a tikhkina khillachu ts'ershkaḥ‚ shaytsa Dala tsḥa a delil dossiyna tsa khillachu? Ḥözhush ʿe shu /ʿazap doġur du shuna/‚ so a shütsa tsḥäna ḥözhush ʿecharakh vu".
7:72: T'akqa i k'elḥarväkqira Okha /ʿazapakh/‚ tsüntsa khillarsh a‚ Tkhaygara q'inkhetamtsa. Tkhan ayatash khartsdinacheran t'äḥe khadiyra Okha‚ üsh tsa khilira teshash bersh.
7:73: Samudashka a /vakhiytira Okha/ tseran vasha Saliḥ. Tso elira: "Hxay san q'am! Dalla ʿibadat deysha‚ I votsurg qin dela vats shuna. Shayn Qiosh-Qobuchüngara bilgalo ma eana shüga‚ hxara Delan sten emkal yu shuna delil khilla. Yita ash iza yazha Delan lättakhula‚ ma ʿittalolash tsunakh zulamtsa – t'akqa lazosh dolchu ʿazapo sḥalotsur du shu.
7:74: Ash dagadaiyta Tso (Dala) shukh ʿadiyl t'äḥa t'äḥe khiliytar‚ Tso shu dākha khovshiyna khilar lättaḥ‚ tsünan (lättan) niysachu mettigekh ash ġalanash esh‚ tsünan lamanekh ash ts'enosh a desh. Dagadayta Delan niʿmatash. Ma de bökhanig lätta t'eḥ, /shäsh i/ darzhadesh".
7:75: Tsünan q'omakh kurabevllachiyn elasha elira tsarakh iyman dillina bolchu zäʿap nakhe: "Shuna khäiy i Saliḥ shen Qiosh-Qobuchüngara vaiytina vuyla?" Tsara elira: "Bakq'alla a, tkho i shetsa vaiytinchukh teshash du-q".
7:76: Kuralla yinachara elira: "Bakq'alla a, tkho shu shekh teshnarg kerstadesh du-q".
7:77: T'akqa tsu emkalna urs ḥäqira tsara‚ shayn Qiosh-Qobuchun omrana kuralla yira tsara‚ elira: "Hxay Saliḥ! Daiyta tkhuna ayḥa tkhuna vaʿda yina khillarg, nagaḥ ḥo khilleḥ elchanekh".
7:78: Ircha /mokhk/ lastoro sḥaletsira üsh – üsh ʿüyrenga bevlira shayn ts'enoshkaḥ /bella/, shayn golash a, yakhḥash a lättakh a letta.
7:79: Tsarakh yustakhvelira iza (Saliḥ)‚ elira: "Hxay san q'am! As shüga dʿaqachiyra san Qiosh-Qobuchun elchalalla‚ as shuna ḥekham bira‚ amma shuna ḥekhamchash tsa beza-q".
7:80: /Dagavaiyta ḥayn q'omana/ Lut'‚ tso ma ällera shen q'ome: "Sel bökhanig lelado tq'a ash‚ ʿalamel tsḥa a shetsa shul ḥalkha välla votsu?
7:81: Bakq'alla a, shu du shovq'atsa bozharshna t'eġertash, zudariy a bütiy. Ma t'alamza q'am du-q shu".
7:82: Tsünan q'oman zhop ma tsa khilira, tsara ālar ben: "Arabākha üsh shayn yurtara – shäsh ts'ena bu möttush nakh bu üsh".
7:83: Okha k'elḥarväkqira iza a‚ tsünan dözal a‚ tsḥa zuda yissalts – i khilla bukhayisincharakh /ʿazapana choḥ/.
7:84: Tsarna t'e doġa delkhiytira Okha – ḥazhal‚ mukha khilla q'inosh dinacheran t'äḥe!
7:85: Madyanashka a tseran vasha Shuʿayb /vakhiytira Okha/. Tso elira: "Hxay san q'am! Dalla ʿibadat de‚ I votsurg qin dela vats shuna. Shüga eana shun Qiosh-Qobuchüngara bilgalo: dustar a‚ terza ozar a niysa khiliyta‚ nakhana hxumanash ma eshae‚ ma darzhade lätta t'eḥ vonig i ts'andinchul t'äḥa. Iza shuna dika du, shu teshash khilleḥ.
7:86: Ma khovsha (k'elonna) hxor neq' t'e, /nakhana/ qeramash a tüysush, Delan neq'akh dʿatöttush sha Tsunakh teshna khillarg‚ ch'oġa i ganban a ġertash. Ash dagadaiyta shäsh k'ezzig ben tsakhilar – Tso (Dala) debiyra shu. Ḥovsal shu! Mukha khilla telkhina mel derg darzhocheran t'äḥe!
7:87: Shukh tsḥa toba iyman dillina khilleḥ söga dossiynachünga‚ vazha toba iyman tsa düllush khilleḥ – ash sobar de Dala vayna yukq'eḥ tsḥa ḥukma dalts. – Iza ḥukma decharakh uggar dikanig ma vu"
7:88: Tsünan q'omakh kurabevlacheran elasha elira: "Okha aravokqur ma vu ḥo‚ hxay Shuʿayb‚ ḥötsa tsḥäna iyman dillinarsh a tkhan yurtara‚ ya shu tkhan dine yukhadörzur ma du". Tso elira: "Tkho khilleḥ bezam botsush?
7:89: Dalla t'e khartsderg qöllina khir ma dara Okha, nagaḥ sanna tkho shun dine yukhadirzicha (hxintsa)‚ Dala tkho tsunakh ḥalkhadäkhnachul t'äḥa. Tkhuna Tsunna t'e dukhaderzar khir ma dats Dalla‚ tkhan Qiosh-Qobuchunna‚ laaḥ ben. Masso a hxuma ʿilmantsa (khaartsa) shorta dina tkhan Qiosh-Qobucho. Dalla t'etevzhina tkho. Tkhan Qiosh-Qoburg! Niysontsa dastaḥ tkhuna a‚ tkhan q'omana a yukq'eḥ derg‚ Ḥo /ġullaq/ dostucharakh dika verg ma vu-q".
7:90: Tsünan q'oman tsateshnacheran elasha elira: "Nagaḥ shu Shuʿaybana t'äḥahxittaḥ, bakq'alla a, shu t'akqa /shayna / zen desh du-q!"
7:91: T'akqa /latta/ lastaro sḥaletsira üsh – ʿüyrenga ma bevlira üsh shayn ts'enoshkaḥ /bella/, shayn golash a, yakhḥash a lättakh a letta.
7:92: Shuʿayb khartsvinarsh /bisira shäsh/ bäkhna a khilliy-teḥa /shayn ts'enoshkaḥ/ älla khetash. Shuʿayb khartsvinarsh khilla-q shäsh /shayna / zen desh.
7:93: I dʿavirzira tsarakh‚ elira: "San q'am! San Qiosh-Qobuchun elchanalla shüga dʿaqachina-q as‚ shuna ḥekham a bina-q. As mukha sintem boyur bu tsateshachu q'omana düḥa?"
7:94: Okha tsa vakhiytina /tsḥanna/ yurta tsḥa a paykhamar shen ohxla balanashtsa a‚ khalonashtsa a sḥalüytsush ben‚ üsh ḥastlur batsara-te /Dalla/?
7:95: T'akqa vochunna metta dikanig khiytsira Okha üsh sovbüylush‚ tsara elira: "Vayn daykh a ḥaqadella khalakhetarsh a, khazakhetarsh a". T'akqa Okha ts'ekhḥana sḥaletsira üsh /ʿazapatsa/, tsarna khaa tsa lush.
7:96: Yartiyn ohxlano iyman dillineḥara‚ /Delakh/ qiyrineḥara – tsarna stiglara a‚ lättara a niʿmatash sḥadillina khir ma dara Okha‚ delaḥ a, khartsdina-q tsara /din/. T'akqa Okha sḥaliytsira üsh shäsh karadesh khillachüntsa.
7:97: Teshna buy-te yartiyn bakharkhoy Tkhan ʿazap shayna t'e busa tsadarna, shäsh nab esh lättash bolush?
7:98: Ya teshna buy-te yartiyn bakharkhoy Tkhan ʿazap shayna t'e tsadarakh ʿüyranna, shäsh lovzush bolush?
7:99: Delan mekarlonakh (qeram tsakhilarakh) teshna bu-te üsh? Delan mekarlonakh (qeram tsakhilarakh) teshna khir ma dats /shena/ zen desh dolu q'am ben.
7:100: I latta, shen day /shayn q'inosh baḥaneḥ Dala hxallakbinchul/ t'äḥa, shayna irsana qächnacharna bilgal tsa dälla-te, Okha Tkhayna liʾcha, shayn q'inosh baḥaneḥ shayna taʿzar diyr duyla? Tseran degniy t'e muhxar tukhu Okha – tsarna tsa kheza.
7:101: Üsh yu i yartash (Okha ḥalkha hxallakyina yolu) - tseran khabarekh düytsu Okha ḥöga. Tsärga bäkhkira Tkhan elchanash bilgalonashtsa‚ üsh tsa khilira teshar bolush shäsh ḥalkha khartsdinchukh. Ishtta muhxar tukhu Dala tsateshacheran degnashna t'e.
7:102: Tsarakh duqakhbolcheran Tkhuna tsa kariyra vaʿda qochushʾyar‚ Tkhuna ma kariyra tsarakh duqakhbersh pesaq' nakh.
7:103: T'akqa tsaral t'äḥa Firʿavnna a‚ tsünan elashna a t'e Musa vakhiytira Okha Tkheshan ayatashtsa – tsärtsa zulam dira tsara. Ḥazhal‚ mukha khilla /hxuma/ talkhocheran t'äḥe!
7:104: Musas elira: "Hxay Firʿavn! Bakq'alla a, so vu ʿalamiyn Qiosh-Qobuchüngara elcha.
7:105: Ḥaq' vu so Dalla t'eḥ baq'derg ben tsa āla. So veana shüga shun Qiosh-Qobuchüngara bilgalontsa‚ sötsa dʿabakhkiyta Israilan k'entiy".
7:106: Tso elira: "Ḥo veana khilleḥ delilatsa‚ sḥalo i, ḥo baq'lüycharakh khilleḥ".
7:107: T'akqa /Musas/ shen ʿasa oḥaqössira – tsunakh bilgala teqarg khilira.
7:108: T'akqa tso shen /kisanara/ küg sḥadäkqira – i ḥözhucharna shurul- k'ayn khilira.
7:109: Firʿavnan q'oman elasha elira: "Bakq'alla a, hxara vu govza bozbuuncha.
7:110: Shu shayn lättara aradākha luush vu iza – hxun omra do ash?"
7:111: Tsara elira: "Bukhasatsave iza a‚ tsünan vasha a (tsḥa zhimma)‚ bakhiyta ġalanashka gulamkhoy.
7:112: Ḥuna t'e valoyla tsara masso a govza bozbuuncha".
7:113: Firʿavnan bozbuunchash bäkhkira‚ tsara elira: "Bakq'alla a, tkhuna makh khir buy, tkho khilaḥ töllarsh?"
7:114: Tso (Firʿavna) elira: "Hxaʾ‚ bakq'alla a, shu khir du-q (suna) gergarcharakh".
7:115: Tsara elira: "Hxay Musa! Aḥ qussu (ḥalkha ḥan ʿasa)‚ ya tkho khir du qussursh (ḥalkha)?"
7:116: Tso elira: "Ash qossa". Tsara qössicha (shayn ʿasanash a, mashshash a), nekhan bʿärgashna bozbuunchalla khilira‚ ch'oġa qeriyra tsara üsh‚ deza dokqa bozbuunchalla deara tsara".
7:117: Musaga khaiytira Okha ḥayn ʿasa qossa‚ älla. T'akqa tso sikhkha qällina dʿayakhiytira tsara surt hxottiynarg.
7:118: Guchudelira baq'derg‚ kharts khilira tsara desh khillarg.
7:119: Tsigaḥ eshiyra üsh‚ siysazkhilla dʿaḥvzira üsh.
7:121: Tsara elira: "Okha iyman dilli masso a ʿalaman Qiosh-Qobuchünga‚
7:123: Firʿavna elira: "Ash iyman dilli tsünga, as shayna purba dalale ?! Bakq'alla a, iza mekarlo yu-q‚ ash shäsh yina ġalina chüra nakh arabākharḥama‚ t'äḥa khuur du shuna.
7:124: Shun küygash a‚ kogash a khedonza bütur ma bats as düḥ-düḥala‚ t'akqa shu derrige a irkhʾukhkur du as".
7:125: Tsara elira: "Bakq'alla a, tkho tkhan Qiosh-Qobuchünga dʿadörzur du.
7:126: Aḥ tkhögara beqam ötsush ma bats tkho tkhan Qiosh-Qobuchun ayatekh teshna älla ben, üsh tkhöga deʾnachul t'äḥa. Tkhan Qiosh-Qoburg! Tkhuna sobar lolaḥ‚ tkho Aḥ daliytalaḥ (ḥuna) müt'aḥ khilla".
7:127: Firʿavnan q'oman elasha elira /tsünga/: "Musa a‚ tsünan q'am a dütu aḥ lättaḥ telkhina hxumanash dan‚ tso ḥo a‚ ḥan delanash a dʿatasa?" Tso elira: "T'äḥa vay boyur bu tseran k'entiy‚ diyna bütur bu tseran zudariy‚ bakq'alla a, vay tsarna t'eḥ nitsq' bolush ma du".
7:128: Musas shen q'ome elira: "Delatsa ġo lakha ash‚ sobar delash‚ lätta Delan du – Tso irsana lo i Shen lekh Shena luuchunna, t'äḥe /Delakh/ qörucharna yu".
7:129: Tsara elira: "Lazarsh (bokhamash) dina tkhuna ḥalkha ḥo tkhöga vāle a‚ ḥo tkhöga veʾnachul t'äḥa a". Tso elira: "Shu qiosh-qobush Volcho shun mostaġ hxallakvan mega‚ lättaḥ verasash shu a khülüytush – t'akqa Iza ḥozhur vu, shu mukha ʿamal esh khir du ".
7:130: Firʿavnan dözal sḥaletsira Okha sherashkaḥ /yoq'antsa/ a‚ stömash eshortsa a – tsara oyla yan tam bara.
7:131: Shayga dikanig deʾcha‚ tsara olura: "Hxara tkhuna du". Shaykh vonig ḥaqadelcha‚ Musana a, tsüntsa bolcharna a t'e von tüdura tsara i. Sema khilalash: bakq'alla a, tsarakh ḥaqalush derg (dikanig a, vonig a – derrige a) Delera ma du. Delaḥ a, tsarakh duqakhbersh tsa khuush bu.
7:132: Tsara (Farʿavnan nakha) elira: "Mülkhkha a delil aḥ tkhuna dāladaḥ a, tkhuna shetsa bozbuunchalla darḥama‚ tkho ḥokh teshar dolush dats ḥuna".
7:133: Okha tsarna t'eḥazhiyra khi t'edalar a‚ ts'oz a‚ meziy a‚ pḥidash a‚ ts'iy a q'egina delilash a khilla – t'akqa a kuralla yira tsara‚ tsarakh khilira q'inosh desh dolu q'am.
7:134: Shayna t'e ʿazap dözhcha‚ tsara elira: "Hxay Musa! Dekha tkhuna ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchünga ḥötsa Shen vaʿda khillarg (ʿazap ayde, tkho ḥokh teshcha). Nagaḥ aḥ tkhuna t'era hxara ʿazap aydaḥ‚ ḥokh teshanza a ʿiyr ma dats tkho‚ ḥötsa Israilan k'entiy a bokhküytur ma bu Okha".
7:135: Okha shayna t'era ʿazap shäsh /hxorda bukhabokhüytu/ khan t'eqachchalts aydicha, tsara shaytsa bina khilla bolu bart bokhabo.
7:136: T'akqa Okha tsärgara beqam iytsira. Okha üsh hxorda bukhabakhiytira üsh khilarna Tkhan ayatash khartsdesh‚ üsh khilarna üsh tergal tsa desh.
7:137: Okha irsana elira zäʿap khillachu q'omana shayna choḥ/dakha/ berkate khiliytina yolu dünenan malkhbalenash a‚ tsünan malkhbuzenash a. Israilan k'entashna t'eḥ qochushkhilira ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchun khaza dosh tsara sobar darna. Okha dokhiyna dʿadakhiytira Firʿavna a‚ tsünan q'omo a desh khillarg a‚ tsara ḥalahxittosh khillarg a.
7:138: Okha Israilan k'entiy hxorda deḥabekhira. T'akqa üsh qechira tsḥana shayn ts'ushna (zhaʿarshna) ʿibadat desh dolchu q'omana t'e‚ tsara (Israilan k'entasha) elira: "Hxay Musa! Tkhuna Dela khiliyta, tseran delanash sanna". Tso (Musas) elira: "Bakq'alla a, ma zhehxal q'am du-q shu.
7:139: Bakq'alla a, hxorsh shäsh khillachoḥ hxallaqir bu‚ kharts du tsara desh khillarg".
7:140: Tso (Musas) elira: "Allahx (tsḥa Dela) votsurg qin dela lokhu tq'a as shuna? Tso shu daz ma dina /niʿmatashtsa masso a/ ʿalamel.
7:141: Dagadaiyta /hxay Israilan k'entiy/: Tso k'elḥar ma dekhira shu Firʿavnan dözalkh‚ shuna bökha ʿazap lattosh khilla bolchu. Tsara boyura shun k'entiy‚ diyna bütura /shayna batso/ shun zudariy. Shuna tsu choḥ shun siylaḥ-veza volchu Qiosh-Qobuchüngara zer ma du.
7:142: T'akqa Okha Musatsa vaʿda yira tq'e itt büysantsa‚ üsh qochushkhiliytira Okha ittantsa. Tsünan Qiosh-Qobuchun tökhna khan qochushkhilira shovztq'a büysantsa. T'akqa Musas elira shen veshiga Hxarune: "San metta visa san q'omatsa‚ maslaḥat (dikanig) de‚ telkhina mel derg darzhocheran novq'a ma hxottalaḥ".
7:143: Okha bilgalʾyakqinchu mettige veʾcha‚ shen Qiosh-Qobucho shetsa q'amel dicha‚ Musas elira: "San Qiosh-Qoburg‚ suna Ḥuo gaytaḥ – Ḥöga ḥozhur vara so!". Tso elira: "So gur ma vats ḥuna (dünenan dakhareḥ)‚ delaḥ a, ḥazhaḥ dʿo lamane‚ i shen mettigeḥ ch'aġlaḥ – t'akqa So gur vu ḥuna". Tsünan Qiosh-Qoburg lamanna guchuvälcha‚ Tso i ätta dʿabakhiytira‚ Musa, esakh a välla, vüyzhira. T'akqa sha mettaveʾcha‚ tso elira: "Ḥo vonakh ts'anvo as‚ as tōba di Ḥöga (ishttanig qin tsa dekha)‚ so vu-q teshacharakh ḥalkharnig".
7:144: Tso (Dala) elira: "Hxay Musa! Bakq'alla a, As ḥo khärzhina nakhal San elchallitsa‚ San q'amelatsa‚ dʿalatsa As ḥayga dellarg‚ ḥo khila /Suna/ shukur decharakh (barkalla olucharakh)".
7:145: Okha yazdira tsunna änniy choḥ hxor hxumanakh ḥekham a‚ hxor hxumanna q'astor a, /olush/: "Dʿaetsa i nitsq'itsa‚ ḥan q'ome a omra de, dʿalatsa aliy tsünan uggar khazanig. As t'äḥa goytur du shüga pesaq' nekhan ts'a".
7:146: T'äḥa As San ayatekh dʿaberzor bu lättaḥ, bovla ḥaq' botsush, kurabevlla khillarsh. Mülkhkha a delil gicha a – tsunakh tsa tesha üsh‚ niysonan neq' gicha a – i neq' boy t'e tsa lotsu tsara‚ tilaran neq' gicha – i neq' boy t'elotsu tsara‚ iza tsara Tkhan ayatash khartsdina dela du‚ üsh tsarakh ġopal khilla dela du.
7:147: Tkhan ayatash a‚ ekhartatsa tsḥänaqetar a khartsdinarsh – tseran ʿamalsh hxallaqilla. Shäsh esh khillachu ʿamalashtsa a ben beqam khir buy tsarna?!
7:148: Musan q'omo i /Delatsa q'amel dan/ vakhanchul t'äḥa ġozarekh a‚ muhxarekh esa dira shen deġ a‚ az a dolush. Tsarna tsa go teḥa‚ tso tsärtsa q'amel ma tsa doy‚ /niysachu/ novq'a a nis ma tsa bo tso üsh? Tsara i letsira / Dela a vitina, ʿibadat dan/, – üsh zulamkhoy khilira.
7:149: T'akqa üsh dokhkobevlla‚ hxun diyr du tsa khuush bolush‚ tsarna gicha shäsh tiladella khilar‚ tsara elira: "Vay Qiosh-Qobucho vaykh q'inkhetam tsa baḥ‚ Tso vayna gech tsa daḥ – vay khir ma du eshnacharakh".
7:150: Musa shen q'omana t'e yukhavirzicha‚ sha öġazvakhana‚ ch'oġa poshme khilla‚ elira: "Ma von hxuma du-q ash suna qöllinarg sol t'äḥa (so votsush). Sikhloy tq'a shayn Qiosh-Qobuchun ġullaqeḥ?" Shegara annash oḥaqissira tso‚ shen veshin korta (-n mesash) shena t'e oziyra tso. Elira /Hxaruna/: "Hxay san nenan k'ant! Tsu q'omo so zäʿap ma vi‚ so ven gerga ma khilla üsh‚ mostaġiy bakqiy ma belaḥ suna‚ zulame q'omatsa ma khiliytalaḥ so".
7:151: Elira /Musas/: "So Qiosh-Qoburg! Gechdelaḥ suna a‚ san veshina a‚ Ḥan q'inkhetamna chudokhkalaḥ tkho. Ḥo vu-q uggar q'inkhetame verg".
7:152: Bakq'alla a, esa lätsnarsh /shayn dela vina/ – shayn Qiosh-Qobuchüngara öġazlo qüur ma yu tsarakh‚ siysazalla a /yu tsarna/ dünenan dakhareḥ. Ishtta beqam bo Okha khartsderg qullucharna.
7:153: Vonig (q'inosh) dinarsh‚ t'akqa tsul t'äḥa tōba a dina, iyman dillinarsh, – bakq'alla a, ḥan Qiosh-Qoburg tsul t'äḥa /tsarna/ sov gechdesh verg ma vu‚ q'inkhetam besh verg ma vu.
7:154: Musa öġazallakh vastavelcha, annash sḥaiytsira tso‚ tseran yozaniy choḥ bara niysa neq' a‚ q'inkhetam a shen Qiosh-Qobuchukh qörush bolcharna.
7:155: Musas shen q'omakh quztq'e itt stag khärzhira Tkhötsa tsḥänaqetarna. T'akqa ch'oġachu lattalastaro üsh sḥaletscha‚ tso elira: "So Qiosh–Qoburg‚ Ḥayna liʾna khilleḥara, Aḥ ḥalkha hxallakbina khir bara üsh a‚ so a. Tkho hxallakdo Aḥ tkhokh /tsḥabolchu/ ʿovdalsha leliynachüntsa? Iza ḥan pitana ma duy‚ Aḥ shetsa Ḥayna luurg tilosh‚ Ḥayna luurg nisvesh dolu. Ḥo vu-q tkhan doladiyrig (vali)‚ gechdeḥa tkhuna‚ q'inkhetam beḥa tkhokh‚ Ḥo vu-q gechdecharakh uggar dika verg.
7:156: Yazdeḥa tkhuna hxoqu dünenaḥ dikanig‚ ekhartaḥ a /dikanig/‚ bakq'alla a, tkho nisdella-q Ḥöga".
