Tso /Dala/ elira: "San ʿazap As qior du Sayna luuchukh‚ San q'inkhetamo masso a hxuma shena chulätsna – t'äḥa As dʿayazbiyr bu i /q'inkhetam/ shäsh /q'inakh/ qörush bolcharna‚ zakat lush bolcharna‚ shäsh Tkhan ayatekh teshash bolcharna.
7:157: Ishttanash bu üsh shäsh t'äḥahxüttush elchanna-paykhamarna yoza-deshar tsa khuush volchu‚ shekh lätsna yazdina shayna karosh shayn gergaḥ Tavrata choḥ‚ Inzhila choḥ‚ sha tsarna "Dikanig de!" olush volu‚ vochukh üsh dukhatukhush volu‚ ts'ena derg tsarna ḥanal desh volu‚ bökhanig shayna ḥaram desh volu‚ tsarna t'era deza hxumanash a‚ burzholash a sha dʿadokhush volu. Tsunakh teshnarsh‚ i liyrinarsh‚ tsunna ġo dinarsh‚ tsüntsa dossiyna dolchu nürana (Q'urʾanna) t'äḥahxittinarsh – üsh bu bakqiybüyr bersh.
7:158: Aḥ āla /hxay Muḥammad/: "Hxay nakh! Bakq'alla a, so Delan elcha vu shüga massärga a‚ Iza vu stigaliyn a‚ lättan a pachchaḥlla Shen dolaḥ derg. Qin dela vats I votsurg‚ /masso sa dolu hxuma a, nakh a/ denbo Tso‚ bolüytu Tso. Tesha shu Delakh a‚ Tsünan elcha-paykhamarakh a‚ yoza-deshar tsa khuush volchu‚ sha teshash volchu Delakh a‚ tsünan deshnekh a. T'äḥahxitta tsunna – shu niysachu novq'a dovla tam bara".
7:159: Musan q'omakh a du tsḥa ummat‚ sha baq'dolchunna t'e nisdella dolu‚ sha tsüntsa niyso esh dolu.
7:160: Okha üsh (Israilan k'entiy) biyq'ira shiytta neq'ene. Musaga khaiytira Okha, iza shen q'omana khi dökhush volchu khenaḥ, "ḥan ʿasa tokha t'ulgakh"‚ älla. T'akqa shiytta ḥosta sḥadelira tsunakh. Hxor neq'enna (tobanna) shen khi molu mettig khiira. Okha tsarna ʿindaġ (salqa) dira markhatsa‚ dossiyra tsarna Manna a‚ Salva a – daa Okha shayna dellachu ritsq'ikh ts'enaderg. Tkhuna zulam tsa dina tsara – üsh khilla-q shäsh shayna zulam desh.
7:161: Dagadaiyta tsärga älla khilar: "Hxoqu yurtaḥ dākha sovtsa‚ daa tsu chüra shayna luʾuchoḥ‚ ash āla: "/Tkhan q'inosh/ dʿadayar /dökhu okha Dele/!"‚ neʿarekhula chöḥadovla, suzhud desh‚ Okha gechdiyr du shuna shun ġalatash. T'äḥa Okha alsambokhur bu dikanig desh bersh".
7:162: Tsarakh zulam dinachara khiytsira dosh shayga älla dotschüntsa. T'akqa Okha tsarna t'e stiglara ʿazap dossiyra üsh zulam desh khilarna.
7:163: Khattal tsärga hxordana ulloḥ khillachu yurtakh latsiy: üsh /Delan/ dozanekh bevlira shotdiynaḥ‚ tsarna ch'eriy doġura guchudovliy tseran shotdiynaḥ‚ tseran shotde dotsush tsarna tsa doġura üsh (ch'eriy) – ishtta balane letsira Okha üsh shäsh pesaq' khilarna.
7:164: Tsarakh tsḥana tobano ällera /ḥekham bechärga/: “Ash hxunda ḥekham bo nakhana‚ shäsh Dala hxallakbiyr bolchu‚ ya Tso shayna ch'oġachu ʿazaptsa ʿazap diyrig dolchu?” Tsara elira: "Shun Qiosh-Qobuchünga bekhkazadovlarḥama‚ üsh khilarḥama a /Dalla ʿesalla yarakh / qörush".
7:165: Tsara shayga ḥekhiynarg ditsdicha‚ Okha k'elḥarbekhira shäsh /nakh/ vochukh dukhatukhush bersh. Zulam dinarsh Okha sḥaletsira irchachu ʿazaptsa üsh pesaq' khilarna.
7:166: Tsara tergal tsa dicha Okha shäsh shekh dukhatökhnarg‚ Okha elira tsärga: "Khila shukh siysaza maymalsh".
7:167: Ḥan Qiosh-Qobucho dʿakhaiytira Sha tsarna (zhügtashna) t'e bakhkiytaza bütur ma bats bu q'ematde qachchalts tsarna lüra ʿazap desh bersh‚ bakq'alla a, ḥan Qiosh-Qoburg sikhanig vu taʿzar dareḥ‚ Iza – t'ekh gechdiyrig a‚ q'inkhetame verg a vu.
7:168: Okha biyq'ira üsh (zhügtiy) lättaḥ tobanashka – tsarakh dikanash a bu‚ tsarakh üsh botsursh a bu. Okha üsh tellira khazachüntsa a‚ vochüntsa a: üsh yukhabörzur batsara-te /Dalla t'e/.
7:169: Tsaral t'äḥa qin t'äḥe khilira‚ zhayna irsana qechira tsärga‚ hxoqu dünenan bakham ötsura tsara‚ olura: "Vayna-m gechdiyr ma du". Tsünga terra qin bakham shayga beʾcha – iza a ötsur bara tsara. Tq'a zhaynin ch'aġo tsa khillera tsarna t'eḥ‚ tsara Dalla t'eḥ baq'derg ben er dats älla‚ tsu choḥ derg tsara ʿamiyna ma dara? Ekhartan ts'a tölush ma du shäsh /Delakh/ qörush bolcharna‚ shu ḥeq'ale tsa khülu?
7:170: Shäsh zhaynitsa khülush bersh (tso bokhurg desh)‚ lamaz hxottiynarsh, – bakq'alla a, Okha esha ma tsa bo dikacheran mēla.
7:171: Tsarna t'eḥ lam aybira Okha‚ sha t'eyozha yollu laba sanna lättash‚ tsarna möttura i shayna t'eyuzhush yu. /Okha elira/: "Dʿalatsa Okha shayna dellarg nitsq'itsa‚ ḥekhade tsu choḥ derg‚ shu khila megara /Delakh/ qörush!"
7:172: Ḥakhade ḥan Qiosh-Qobucho Ādaman k'entekh – tseran bakq'ekh tseran zürret sḥadakqar‚ t'akqa shayna t'eḥ üsh teshash hxottor: "So vats tq'a shun Qiosh-Qoburg"‚– älla. Tsara ma elira: "Hxaʾ! Okha teshalla dina". /Iza du/ ash q'ematdiynaḥ erig khilarna: "Bakq'alla a, tkho tsunakh ġopal ma khili".
7:173: Ya ash erig khilarna: "Tkhan daysha shirk dira ḥalkha‚ tkhokh khilira tsaral t'äḥa zürret‚ Aḥ hxallakdiyr du tkho khartsbolchara dinarg baḥneḥ?"
7:174: Ishtta q'astado Okha ayatash – üsh yukhabörzur batsara-te /q'inosh darakh/.
7:175: Diytsal tsarna Okha shena Tkheshan ayatash della, t'akqa üsh dʿatesnachun khabar‚ t'akqa shayt'ano shena t'äḥavaziyra i‚ tilabellacharakh khilira iza.
7:176: Tkhuna liʾneḥara, Okha tsärtsa ayvira vara iza‚ delaḥ a, dünena t'e tevzhira iza‚ shen dezarshna t'äḥavezira. Tsünan masal zhʿälin masalkh tera du: ḥo shena t'äḥa välcha (ekqo), mott araqussu tso‚ ya aḥ sha diticha a, mott araqussu tso. I du tkhan ayatash khartsdinchu q'oman masal. Diytsa diytsarsh‚ oyla yan tam bara tsara.
7:177: Tkhan ayatash khartsdina q'am von khilla masaltsa – shayna zulam desh khilla üsh.
7:178: Sha Dala nisvesh verg niysavellarg vu‚ Tso tilavala vütush verg, – üsh bu eshnarsh.
7:179: Okha qiina zhözhakhatina dukqa zhinash a‚ adamash a. Tseran degnash du – tsärtsa tsa qeta üsh‚ bʿärgash bu – tsärtsa tsa go tsarna‚ lergash du – tsärtsa tsa kheza tsarna‚ üsh bezhanekh tera bu. Hxaʾ! Tsaral a tilabella bu! Üsh bu-q ġopal khillarsh (tergo tsa esh bersh).
7:180: Delan yu khaza ts'ersh – qayqa ash Tsünga tsärtsa. Bita Tsünan ts'ersh khartsʾesh bersh. T'äḥa /ekhartaḥ/ beqam khir bu tsarna shäsh /dünenaḥ/ desh khillachüntsa .
7:181: Okha qöllincharakh du tsḥa ummat‚ sha baq'dolchunna t'e /nakh/ nisbesh dolu‚ sha tsüntsa niyso esh dolu (ts'ena busalba ummat du iza).
7:182: Tkhan ayatash khartsdinarsh – t'äḥa zhim-zhimma taʿosh, oḥataʿor bu Okha üsh, shayna a tsa khuush.
7:183: T'äḥatottu As üsh – San /kerstaniyn mekarlonna düḥal/ mekarlo ch'oġa yu.
7:184: Oyla tsa yo-teḥa tsara? Zhinekh ma vats tseran naq'ost (Muḥammad-paykhamar; tsateshachara olush khilla zhinekh vu iza). Iza bilggala qeramcha ma vu.
7:185: Üsh tsa ḥovsu stigaliyn a‚ lättan a pachchaḥalle‚ Dala qöllinchu hxumanashka‚ shayn azhal (ʿozhalla) gergaqächna khila magare? Tsul (Q'urʾanal) t'äḥa mülkhachu /bossiynachu/ ḥekhamakh üsh teshar bu?
7:186: Dala tilavala vütush volchunna – i nisvan tsḥa a vats. Tso bütu üsh shayn tilarchoḥ, dʿay-sḥay üydush.
7:187: Ḥöga khöttu tsara /hxay Muḥammad/ saḥtakh (q'ematdiynakh) lätsna – tsünan hxottar matsa khir du, bokhush. Aḥ āla: "Tsünan ʿilma san Qiosh-Qobuchüngaḥ du. Shen khennaḥ i bilgaldokqur du vekq'a Tso‚ dazlur i stiglanashkaḥ a‚ lättaḥ a (khala de khir du i tsigaḥ bolcharna). Ts'ekhḥana ben doġur dats iza shuna". Ḥöga khöttu tsara – ḥo iza dika khuush verg volush sanna. Aḥ āla: "Tsünan ʿilma Deleḥ du". Delaḥ a‚ nakhakh duqakhbolcharna /i/ tsa khäa-q.
7:188: Aḥ āla: "As dola tsa do san deġan - paydeḥa a‚ ya zeneḥa a, Dalla liʾnarg ben. So khilleḥara khuush q'aylakha derg‚ as sovdäkhna khir dara dikanash‚ khalono sḥalätsna khir ma vatsara so. So vekq'a qeramcha a (shuna Delan ʿazaptsa qeram tosush, ash Tsünan din kerstadaḥ)‚ khaamcha a vu teshash dolchu q'omana".
7:189: I vu shu qöllinarg tsḥana sinakh‚ tsunna zuda a qöllina, i tsüntsa vakhiyta. I tsunna ullo vakhcha – bayn bolchu moḥtsa yazlo i‚ i dʿaqöḥu tso. T'akqa iza yazʾelcha, tsara shimmo (maro a‚ zudcho a) shayn qiosh-qobuchu Dele dökhu: "Aḥ tkhuna dika dözalkho laḥ, tkho barkalla bokhucharakh khir dara-q".
7:190: T'akqa tso shäsh-shinna dika dözalkho velcha‚ Tso shayna dellachüngaḥ Tsunna naq'ost (deq'akho) khiliytina tsu shimmo. Laqaveli Dela tsara naq'ost latsarakh (ts'ena vu Dela Shena deq'akho khilarakh).
7:191: Tsara khülüytu tq'a Tsunna naq'ost (deq'akho) sha hxumma tsaqullurg‚ shäsh qecho (Dala) qullush bersh?
7:192: Tsarna ġodan tsa mogu tsarna‚ shäsh shayna a ġo tsa do tsara.
7:193: Ash üsh niysachu novq'a qayqaḥ‚ shuna t'äḥa a tsa hxüttu üsh. Tsḥaterra du shuna: ash üsh qayqaḥ a‚ ya shu sevtstsa /ʿad/ ʿaḥ a.
7:194: Ash, Dela a vitina, shayga qoyqush bersh – shukh terra /Delan/ lesh bu. Qayqa tsärga‚ shuna zhop loyla tsara‚ shu baq'lüysh khilleḥ.
7:195: Tq'a tseran kogash bu, shäshtsa üsh dʿasalelash‚ ya tseran küygash du, tsara shäsh dettash‚ ya tseran bʿärgash bu, shäshtsa tsarna gush‚ ya tseran lergash du, shäshtsa tsarna khezash? Aḥ āla: "Qayqa shayn naq'ostashka‚ mekarlo ye suna‚ t'äḥa ma tatta so.
7:196: Bakq'alla a, san dottaġ (doladiyrig) – Dela vu‚ Sha zhayna dossosh khilla volu‚ I vu dikacharakh ʿunalla desh verg".
7:197: Ash, I (Dela) a vitina, shayga qoyqush bersh, – shuna ġo dan lush bats üsh‚ shayna ġo diyr dolush a bats.
7:198: Ash shäsh niysachu novq'a qayqicha – tsa kheza tsarna. Ḥuna go üsh ḥayga ḥözhush tsarna /ḥo/ tsa guchu ḥoleḥ.
7:199: Q'int'era vala‚ dikanig ḥekha‚ duqa tergal ma be zhehxal nakh.
7:200: Shayt'anera talkhor ḥo talkho ġertaḥ, – Delatsa larvalar dēkha. Bakq'alla a, Iza khezash verg a‚ khuush verg a vu.
7:201: Bakq'alla a, /Delakh/ qörush bersh shäsh shayt'anan balano sḥalätscha, /Dela/ ḥekhavo (zikr do) tsara - üsh gush khülu /niysa neq'/.
7:202: Amma tseran vezhariy (q'inosh desh bersh) – tsarna-m tilarchoḥ ġo do ḥuna tsara (shayt'ano a, tsünan naq'ostasha a)‚ t'akqa a ledarlo tsa yolüytu tsara (üsh tilosh q'aḥegareḥ).
7:203: Aḥ shayga ayat tsa deʾcha‚ olura: "Ayḥa khärzhina khilleḥara aḥ /ayat/". Aḥ āla: "Sayga san Qiosh-Qobuchüngara doġuchu väḥina ben so t'äḥahxuttush vats. Hxara /Q'urʾan/ – shun Qiosh-Qobuchüngara bilgalonash yu‚ niysa neq' a‚ q'inkhetam a bu, sha teshash dolchu q'omana".
7:204: Q'urʾan döshush dolush – ladoġa tsünga‚ ġovġa ma ye‚ shukh q'inkhetam ban tarlo.
7:205: Ḥekhave ḥan Qiosh-Qoburg ḥaygaḥ (mellasha), /Tsünga/ ḥastaloy‚ /Tsunakh/ qörush‚ ch'oġa dotschu ozatsa ʿüyranna a‚ süyranna a. Ḥo ma khilalaḥ i tergam tsa becharakh.
7:206: Bakq'alla a, ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchun gergaḥ dersh Tsunna ʿibadat darna kuralla esh dats‚ masso a vochukh I ts'anvesh du, Tsunna suzhud desh du.
8:1: Tsara ḥöga khöttu /hxay Muḥammad/ hxonsakh lätsna‚ aḥ āla: "Hxons Delan a‚ elchanan a yu". Shu Delakh qera‚ vovshiy yukq'eḥ maslaḥat a de‚ müt'aḥ khila Dalla a‚ Tsünan elchanna a‚ shäsh khilleḥ teshash dersh (muʾma nakh).
8:2: Bakq'alla a, teshash bersh (muʾma nakh) bu Dela ḥekhiycha, shayn degnash k'adlush bersh‚ shayna t'eḥ Tsünan ayatash deshcha, iymantsa sovbüylush bersh‚ shayn Qiosh-Qobuchunna t'etevzhash bersh.
8:3: Ishttanash bu üsh shäsh lamaz a hxottosh‚ Okha shayna dellachu ritsq'anakh /Delan novq'aḥ/ kharzhash a esh.
8:4: Üsh bu ḥaq'-baq' bolu teshash bersh (muʾma nakh)‚ tsarna shayn Qiosh-Qobuchunna gergaḥ (ḥalara) darzhash du‚ gechdar du‚ toqe ritsq' a du (yalsamaneḥ).
8:5: Ḥan Qiosh-Qobucho ḥo baq'ontsa ḥayn ts'a chüra aravakqare terra‚ teshash bolchekh (muʾma nakhakh) tsḥa toba ch'oġa tsa luush ma yu /ġazot dan/.
8:6: Ḥötsa q'üysush bu üsh baq'dolchüngaḥ i bilgaldällachul t'äḥa‚ shäsh ʿozhallina t'e lökhkush sanna, shäsh ḥözhush a lättash.
8:7: Dala shütsa vaʿda yo: shina tobanakh tsḥaʾ shun yu, oliy. Shuna dezash du gerz dotsurg shayna khüliyla‚ Dalla luush du baq'derg ch'aġdan a Shen deshnashtsa‚ tsateshacheran t'äḥe khadon a,
8:8: baq'derg ch'aġdarḥama a‚ khartsderg dʿatilorḥama a, q'inosh decharna /i mel/ tsa dezaḥ a.
8:9: Ash shayn Qiosh-Qobuchünga ġo dökhura. Tso shuna zhop delira: "As shu ch'aġdiyr du ezar vovshashna t'eḥa-t'eḥaḥ lättachu malikashtsa"‚– älla.
8:10: I tsa dira Dala qaʾ khilla a ben‚ shetsa shun degnash parġatdakharḥama a ben. Ġo dats Delera a ben. Bakq'alla a, Dela veza verg‚ ḥukma niysa desh verg vu.
8:11: Dagadaiyta: Tso shuna t'etesira nab ozor, shuna Shegara saparġato khilla‚ dossadora shuna t'e stiglara khi (doġa), shetsa shu ts'andarḥama‚ shayt'anan vas-vasal shukh dʿayakqarḥama‚ shun degnash satsorḥama (sobartsa a‚ baq'dolchüntsa a)‚ shun kogash tsüntsa ch'aġbarḥama.
8:12: Dagadaiyta: ḥan Qiosh-Qobucho khaiytira malikashka, Sha shütsa vu, älla‚ ch'aġbe iyman dillinarsh. As t'äḥa tsateshnacheran degnashka qeram tosur bu – tokha legashna t'ekhula /kortosh dakha/‚ khadaye tseran masso a p'elgan yuḥig.
8:13: Iza du üsh Dalla a‚ Tsünan elchanna a düḥal khilla khilarna. Dalla a‚ Tsünan elchanna a düḥal khillachunna Dela beqam etsa ch'oġa vu.
8:14: Iza (ʿazap) du shuna (hxay kerstanash): "ʿovsha i shayna – tsateshacharna ts'eran ʿazap du".
8:15: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Shäsh tsateshacharna düḥalqetcha (t'am t'eḥ eskarsh vovshakhqetcha) moġarshtsa, /shayn/ bakq'ash ma tokha tsarna (tsarakh qeraloy ma dovda).
8:16: Otsu diynaḥ tsarna shen buq' tökhnarg‚ sha t'amna ḥävzash vatsaḥ ya qechu tobanakh dʿaüysh vatsaḥ, Delera öġazallina yuq'avälla i‚ tsünan chuġoyla zhözhakhati yu‚ ma von bu i qollam!
8:17: Ash tsa bayina üsh‚ delaḥ a, Dala bayina üsh. Aḥ tsa qössina /gerz/ ayḥa qussush, delaḥ a, – Dala qössina (Dela vara i shun ġazot dʿaḥosh verg) muʾma nakhana Shegara khaza yal (tolam‚ hxons) yalarḥama. Bakq'alla a, Dela khezash verg a, khuush verg a vu.
8:18: Iza (ḥekhiynarg: mushrikash eshor, busalbanashna Badreḥ tolam khilar – Delera dara shuna)! (Shuna khaalash:) Dela tsateshacheran mekarlo eshor yolush vu.
8:19: Ash tolam bekhcha – tolam beana shüga. Shu sovtsaḥ – i dika du shuna‚ shu yukha a t'amna yuq'a daġaḥ – Tkho a doġur du, shun tobano shu tsḥana a hxumanakh k'elḥardokhur dats, i yokqa khilaḥ a. Dela muʾma nakhatsa vu.
8:20: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Müt'aḥ khila Dalla a‚ Tsünan elchanna a‚ i (paykhamar) vitiy dʿa ma ġo, shu khezash dolush /tso düytsurg/.
8:21: Shu tar ma lo ällacharakh: "Ladöġna okha"‚ shäsh laduġush a botsush.
8:22: Bakq'alla a, Dalla gergaḥ uggar bökha ḥayba du q'oranig a, mott tsakhuurg a. Üsh bu ḥeq'ale botsursh (Delakh tsa teshash bolu kerstanash).
8:23: Dalla tsärgaḥ dikanig liʾna khilleḥara, Tso ladoġüytur dara tsärga. Tso shayga ladoġiyticha a, t'akqa a dʿaġur bara üsh (ġazotera bovdur bara), /iymanakh/ yustakh a bevlla.
8:24: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Zhop lo Dalla a‚ elchanna a Tso shayga qayqicha Sha shuna dakhar lush dolchünga. Shuna khaalash i Dela stagana a‚ tsünan dagana a yuq'avulush vuyla a /shena luurg tsünga tsa doytush/‚ shu a Tsunna t'e dʿaguldiyr duyla a.
8:25: Pitanakh qeralash: q'ästtina shukh zulam dinacharna zen dina ʿanne a tsa ʿa iza (massarna a zen do tso). Shuna khaalash, i Dela beqam bartsa (taʿzar dartsa) ch'oġa vuyla.
8:26: Ash dagadaiytal shäsh, k'ezzig a dolush, lättaḥ zäʿap khilar‚ shäsh nakha sḥaletsarna a qörush. T'akqa Tso t'eletsira shu‚ Shen ġöntsa ch'aġdira shu‚ ts'enchukh ritsq' a delira shuna, – shu khila megar-qa barkalla olush.
8:27: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Ash teshnabekhk ma belash Dalla a‚ elchanna a‚ ash teshnabekhk ma belash shayga khillachu teshamna (deqar delaḥ a‚ ya qin hxuma delaḥ a), shäsh khuush a dolush.
8:28: Shuna khaalash, shayn bakham a, shayn dözalsh a pitana duyla‚ bakq'alla a, Dela Shegaḥ siylaḥ-yokqa yal yolush vuyla.
8:29: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Shu Delakh qeraḥ‚ Tso qetam biyr bu shuna (dovzüytur du baq'derg‚ khartsderg)‚ shayn q'inoykh ts'andiyr du shu‚ shuna gechdiyr du Tso, – i Dela siylaḥ-yoqa komärshalla yolush ma vu.
8:30: Ḥuna mekarlo ma yora tsateshachara ḥo latsa‚ ya ven‚ ya ḥo aravakqa /Makki chüra/. Mekarlo yo tsara, – Dala a yo mekarlo /tseran mekarlo yokhosh/. I Dela /mekarlonna düḥal/ mekarlo echarakh dikanig vu.
8:31: Shayna t'eḥ Tkhan ayatash deshcha, tsara olu: "Khezna tkhuna‚ tkhayna liʾcha, tsunakh teranig okha a er dara‚ üsh-m ḥalkhalerachiyn tüyranash dara".
8:32: Tsara ma elira /dagadaiytal, hxay elcha/: "Veza Dela‚ hxara khilleḥ Ḥögara baq'derg‚ doġitsa t'ulgash delkhiyta tkhuna stiglara‚ ya lazosh dolu ʿazap daiyta tkhuna".
8:33: Dela tsa khilira tsarna ʿazap desh, ḥo tsarna yukq'eḥ volush. Tsa khilira Dela tsarna ʿazap desh verg, üsh shayna gechdar dökhush a bolush.
8:34: Dala ʿazap hxunda tsa do tsarna, üsh Dezchu Mäzhdige / busalba nakh/ tsa bütush khilcha? Üsh tsa khilla tsünan doladiyrsh. Tsünan doladan ḥaq' bersh bekq'a /Delakh/ qörursh bu‚ delaḥ a, tsarakh duqakhbolcharna tsa khäa-q.
8:35: Tseran lamaz (Kaʿbin) ts'iyna ḥalkhaḥ ma tsa khilira shok ettar a‚ t'arash dettar a ben. /Tsarna zhop dats/ "ʿovsha shayna ʿazap, shäsh tsakhilarna teshash" /alar ben/.
8:36: Bakq'alla a, tsateshachara kharzhash yo Delan neq'akh /nakh/ dʿatilaban. T'äḥa a yiyr yu tsara üsh‚ t'akqa yüsur yu ḥuna üsh tsarna shayna dokhkobovlar a, ġayġa a khilla.T'akqa üsh eshor bu. Tsateshash bersh zhözhakhate gulbiyr bu
8:37: Dala q'astorḥama bökhanig ts'enchukh‚ bökhanig bökhachunna t'edillarḥama‚ t'akqa tsarakh massarakh a barz barḥama‚ t'akqa i zhözhakhateḥ khiliytarḥama. Üsh bu-q eshnarsh.
8:38: Aḥ dʿakhaiyta /hxay Muḥammad/ tsateshnachärga, üsh sovtsaḥ, tsarna gechdiyr du ḥalkha dällachunna‚ üsh yukha a büylalaḥ /busalbanashtsa t'om ban/ – ḥalkhaleracharna khillarg khir du (hxallakbiyr bu), āliy.
8:39: T'om be tsärtsa pitana tsa khiliyta‚ derrige a din Dalla khiliyta. T'akqa üsh sovtsaḥ (maslaḥate bäkhkina – sovtsa shu a), – bakq'alla a, Dela tsara diyrig gush vu.
8:40: Üsh dʿaberzaḥ (maslaḥte tsa boġush)‚ shuna khaalash, Dela vuyla shun ġöncha (t'akqa t'om be ash) – dika ġöncha vu‚ dika tolam lush verg vu Iza.
8:41: Shuna khaalash, shäsh hxonsakh hxuma yakqicha, otsunakh pkhöalġa dāq'a du Dalla a‚ elchanna a‚ tsünan gergarcharna a‚ boberashna a‚ miskacharna a‚ neq'akhochunna a‚ shu khilleḥ teshash Delakh a‚ Okha Tkhayn lega, q'astaman diynaḥ shi toba vovshashna düḥ-düḥal nisʾellachu diynaḥ, dossiynachukh a (malikashka a, qin Delan bilgalonashka a). Dela masso a hxumanna t'eḥ nitsq' bolush vu.
8:42: Dagadaiyta, shu /Madinatan/ gergarchu aġor a dolush‚ üsh genarchu aġor a bolush, i q'epal shuna lakhaḥ a yolush ma dara. Ash vovshashtsa vaʿda yina khilleḥara‚ galdevr dara shu tökhnachu khenatsa (mettigtsa), delaḥ a, Dala qochushkhiliytarḥama i khilla dälla ġullaq‚ hxallakvan sha bilggal hxallaqillarg‚ vākhiyta sha bilggal diyna visnarg. Bakq'alla a, Dela khezash verg a‚ khuush verg a ma vu.
8:43: Dagadaiyta: ḥöga gaytira Dala üsh ġenakh k'ezzig khilartsa /aḥ diytsira i ġan ḥan naq'ostashka/‚ Tso ḥöga üsh gaytineḥara duqa khilartsa – dýkhur dara shu‚ ġullaqeḥ q'üysur dara ash‚ delaḥ a, Dala lardina /shu iesharakh/. Bakq'alla a, Iza khuush vu degnashkaḥ derg.
8:44: Dagadaiyta! Shuna gaytira Tso üsh‚ shu /tsarna/ düḥalqetcha‚ shun bʿärgashkakhula üsh k'ezzig bolush‚ shu k'ezzig dolush gaytira tseran bʿärgashkakhula, Dala qochushdarḥama khilla dälla dolu ġullaq (shu a, üsh a t'amakh yukha tsa dovliyta). Dele dʿadörzu ġullaqash.
8:45: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Shayna /mostaġiyn/toba düḥalqetcha, ch'aġlolash‚ Dela ḥekhavelash dukqa‚ shu dakqiyden tarlo.
8:46: Müt'aḥ khilalash Dalla a‚ Tsünan elchanna a‚ vovshashtsa ma q'iysalash – t'akqa ozalur du shu /mostaġchukh/‚ shun nitsq' dʿaber bu. Sobare khilalash. Bakq'alla a, Dela sobare bolchärtsa vu (tsarna ġodartsa).
8:47: Shu ma khilalash shayn ts'enoshkara arabevllacharakh tera kurallitsa‚ nakhana gaytarḥama, Delan neq'akh /nakh/ dʿatilabesh. I Dela ash dechunna guo besh ma vu /khaartsa/.
8:48: Dagadaiyta, shayt'ano khazyira tsarna shayn ʿamalsh‚ elira: "Takhana nakhakh tsḥa a vats shu esho‚ so shuna lulakho du". T'akqa, shena shi toba gicha, dʿadedira iza‚ elira: "Bakq'alla a, so ts'ena du shukh‚ bakq'alla a, so gush du (tsunna malikash gush dara busalbanashna ġo desh) shuna tsagurg‚ so qöru Delakh – i Dela taʿzar dartsa ch'oġa vu".
8:49: Dagadaiyta! Munepiq'asha a‚ shayn degnashkaḥ tsamgar yolchara a olura: "Hxorsh shayn dino ʿekhiyna". Dalla t'etevzhinarg – /Delan ḥesapeḥ vu/. Bakq'alla a, i Dela veza verg a‚ ḥukma /niysa/ desh verg a vu.
8:50: Ḥuna gineḥara i tsateshnarsh malikasha shayn sinosh sḥadokhush, shayn yakhḥekh a‚ t'eḥashkha a ettash: "ʿovsha shayna zhözhakhatin ʿazap‚– olush.-
8:51: Iza du shun küygasha ḥalkha -däqinarg baḥaneḥ (ash dina q'inosh baḥaneḥ)‚ Dela leshna zulamash desh verg vats".
8:52: Firʿavnan dözalan a‚ tsaral ḥalkha khillacheran a ʿadatakh terra‚ tsa tiyshira üsh Delan ayatekh – t'akqa Dala shayn q'inoshtsa sḥaletsira üsh. Bakq'alla a, i Dela nütsq'ala vu‚ ch'oġa vu taʿzar dartsa.
8:53: Iza du – Dela tsakhilarna sha tsḥana a q'omana della khilla dolu niʿmat khüytsush verg, tsara shäsh khiytstsalts shaytsaderg, i du Dela khilarna khezash verg a‚ khuush verg a.
8:54: Firʿavnan dözalan a‚ tsaral ḥalkha khillacheran a ʿadatakh terra‚ khartsdira tsara shayn Delan ayatash – t'akqa Okha üsh, shayn q'inosh baḥaneḥ, hxallakbira. Firʿavnan dözal Okha hxorda bukhabakhiytira - masso a khilira üsh zulamkhoy.
8:55: /Dala mel qöllinchu/ lättakhula lelachu hxumanekh uggar bökhanig Dalla gergaḥ – tsatesharsh bu‚ tsara iyman tsa düllu.
8:56: Aḥ shaytsa bart bina (t'om biyr bats, älla) khillarsh bu üsh‚ t'akqa masso a khenaḥ i shayn bart bokhabo tsara‚ üsh tsa qöru /Delakh i bart bokho/.
8:57: Ḥo tsarna t'ameḥ düḥal nisvelcha, lüra taʿzar de tsarna, tsaral t'eḥaḥ bolcharna qeram tasa - tsara oyla yan megara /ḥuna shäsh teshnabekhk tsa ban, ḥötsa khilla bart tsa bokho /.
8:58: Ḥo qeraḥ tsḥana /ḥan shetsa bart bolchu/ q'oman teshnabekhkakh‚ bokhabe aḥ /bart/ tsärtsa niyssa. Bakq'alla a, Dalla tsa beza teshnabekhk biyrash.
8:59: /Badreḥ tsa boyush k'elḥarbevllachu/ kerstanashna mattanne a ma möttiyla shäsh /Tkhol/ ḥalkhadevli (Tkhan shayna t'eḥ nitsq' qochur bats). Bakq'alla a, tsara k'eldütur dats /Delan ġullaq a, busalbanashna ġo khilar a/.
8:60: Kechbe tsarna düḥal shayn tar mallo nitsq': t'eman ġirs a, kiycha govrash shetsa ash qero Delan mostaġ a‚ shayn mostaġ a‚ üsh botsursh qibersh a‚ shuna shäsh tsa bevzash bolu - Dalla bevza üsh. Ash Delan novq'aḥ mel kharzh yaḥ a – i /qochchush/ yukhayörzur yu shuna‚ shuna zulam diyr dats (Dala ash dinarg tidame tsa ötsush dütur dats).
8:61: Nagaḥ sanna üsh mashare qovdaḥ‚ – t'akqa ḥo a qovda tsünga (mashare)‚ Dalla t'etovzha‚ bakq'alla a, Iza khezash verg a‚ khuush verg a vu.
8:62: Tsarna laaḥ ḥo ʿekho (teshnabekhk ban) – ḥuna qachoyiyrig Dela vu. I vu Sha Shen ġöntsa a, muʾma nakhatsa a ḥo ch'aġvina khillarg.
8:63: Tso bartadalira tseran degnash (bezam tesira vovshashna yukq'eḥ)‚ aḥ lättaḥ mel derg dökhkicha a, ḥöga bartadalalur datsara tseran degnash‚ delaḥ a, Dala bartabaliyra üsh. Bakq'alla a, Iza veza verg a‚ ḥukma /niysa/ desh verg a vu.
8:64: Hxay paykhamar! Ḥuna qachoen erg Dela vu‚ muʾma nakhakh ḥuna t'äḥahxöttinarg a vu.
8:65: Hxay paykhamar! T'amna t'eberzabe muʾma nakh! Shukh sobare tq'a khilcha – eshor vu tsara shi bʿe‚ shukh bʿe khilcha – eshor vu tsara tsateshacharakh ezar‚ hxunda älcha, üsh tsa qetash q'am du.
8:66: Hxintsa Dala daydira shuna /t'eman ḥal/‚ Tsunna khiira shütsa ledarlo yuy (k'ezzig khilar‚ t'amna kiycha tsakhilar)‚ shukh sobare bʿe khilcha – shi bʿe eshor vu tsara (sobare bolchara), shukh ezar khilcha – shi ezar eshor vu tsara Delan purbantsa‚ Dela sobare bolchärtsa vu.
8:67: Tsḥanna paykhamarna tsa öshura shen yiysaroy khila lättaḥ qochchush sha ch'aġvallalts‚ shu dezash du dünenan hxuma‚ Dalla dezash du ekhart. Dela veza verg a‚ ḥukma /niysa/ desh verg a vu.
8:68: Delera yoza ḥalkha tsa dälleḥara ash etsnachunna, dokqachu ʿazapo sḥalotsur dara shu.
8:69: Yaa shäsh yäkqinchu hxonsakh ḥanal yerg‚ ts'ena yerg‚ Delakh qera (ḥaram derg tsa dan). Bakq'alla a, Dela gechdesh verg a‚ q'inkhetame verg a vu.
8:70: Hxay paykhamar! Āla shayn küyga k'el bolchu yiysarkhoshka: "Dalla khaaḥ shun degnashkaḥ dikanig‚ shügara däkqinchul sov dikanig lur du Tso shuna‚ gechdiyr du Tso shuna‚ i Dela gechdesh verg a‚ q'inkhetame verg a vu".
8:71: Tsarna laaḥ ḥuna teshnabekhk ban‚ ḥalkha Dalla a teshnabekhk bina tsara‚ Tso (ḥuna tsarna t'eḥ taʿzar dan) nitsq' bella. I Dela khuush verg a‚ ḥukma /niysa / desh verg a vu.
8:72: Bakq'alla a, iyman a dillina, dʿaqelkhinarsh a (dinan düḥa paykhamartsa Makkara Medinate dʿabakhanarsh)‚ shayn bakhamtsa a‚ sinoshtsa a Delan novq'aḥ q'aḥegnarsh a‚ shäsh üsh t'elätsnarsh a‚ ġo dinarsh a – üsh vovshiyn verasash (dottaġiy‚ ġönchiy) bu. Iyman a dillina, dʿa tsa qelkhinarsh – tsḥanna hxumantsa tsärtsa gergarlo dats shun, üsh dʿaqalkhkhalts. Dinan ḥoq'eḥ tsara shüga ġo dekhaḥ‚ – shuna t'eḥ (tsarna) ġo dar du, shuna a, shayna a yukq'eḥ bart bolchu q'omana düḥal datsaḥ. I Dela ash diyrig gush ma vu.
8:73: Tsatesharsh vovshiyn gergarnash bu. Ash i (ġo) tsa daḥ‚ lättaḥ pitana khir du‚ dokqa bökhanig därzhar du.
8:74: Iyman a dillina‚ /Madinate/ dʿaqelkhinarsh a‚ Delan novq'aḥ q'aḥegnarsh a‚ üsh t'elätsnarsh a‚ ġo dinarsh a – üsh bu ḥaq'-baq' muʾma nakh‚ tsarna gechdar a‚ shortta ritsq' a khir du.
8:75: T'äḥa iyman a dillina‚ /Madinate/ dʿaqelkhinarsh‚ shütsa tsḥäna q'aḥegnarsh – üsh shukh bu. Gergarlonash dersh – tsarakh tsḥabersh vuqaral gerga bu Delan zhayni choḥ. Bakq'alla a, Dela masso a hxuma khuush verg vu.
9:1: Delera a‚ Tsünan elchanera a, ash shäsh bart bina khilla bolchu mushrikashtsa deq'eḥ tsakhilar, khaam bu.
9:2: Lela lättakhula bea battaḥ‚ t'akqa shuna khaalash, Dela ġorasiz van shun nitsq' qochur botsiyla‚ i Dela vuyla tsatesharsh siysazabiyr bolush.
9:3: Delera a‚ Tsünan elchanera a qayqar du nakhe Dokqa ḥazh dökhkuchu diynaḥ: I Dela ts'ena vu mushrikekh‚ Tsünan elcha a /ts'ena/ vu. Ash tōba daḥ – i shuna dika du‚ shu düḥaldovlaḥ, shuna khaalash, Dela ġorasiz van shayn nitsq' qochur- botsiyla. Qaʾ bakqa tsateshacharna lazosh dolchu ʿazapatsa,
9:4: Ash shaytsa bart bina khilla bersh botscharna‚ t'akqa shuna tsḥanna a hxumantsa esham bina khilla botschu‚ shuna t'eḥ tsḥanna a ġo dina khilla botscharna – tsärtsa bina bart qochushbe shen khan cheqʾyallalts‚ Dalla beza /Shekh/ qörush bersh.
9:5: Deza /ḥazh dökhku/ bettanash cheqdevlcha /i shaytsa mashare tsa boġu, teshnabekhk besh bolu/ mushrikash baya, shayna üsh karabäkhkinchoḥ‚ sḥaletsa üsh‚ guo be tsarna‚ k'elonna oḥakhovsha tsarna massanḥa a. Üsh dokhkobovlaḥ‚ tsara lamaz hxottadaḥ‚ zakat laḥ – tseran neq' märsha be. Bakq'alla a, Dela gechdiyrig a vu‚ q'inkhetame verg a vu.
9:6: Mushrikekh tsḥammo ḥöga shena marsho ekhaḥ – qochushʾe iza, tsunna Delan dosh khazzalts‚ t'akqa dʿaqachave iza qeram botschu mettige (shen daymakhka‚ tsunna laaḥ), – iza üsh tsa khuush q'am khilarna du.
9:7: Mukha khir bu mushrikashtsa bart Dalla gergaḥ a‚ Tsünan elchanna gergaḥ a‚ Deza mäzhdigan gergaḥ ash shaytsa bart binarsh botschärtsa? Üsh shaytsa niysa ma khillara‚ shu tsärtsa a niysa khila. Bakq'alla a, Dalla beza /Shekh/ qörursh.
9:8: Mukha..? Shäsh shuna t'eḥ tolam bäkqicha‚ tsara tergal tsa do shuna yukq'eḥ khilla dolu gergarlo a‚ bart a. Shu reza do tsara shayn bagenashtsa‚ tq'a tseran degnash düḥal du /shäsh bagenashtsa düytsachunna/, tsarakh duqakhbersh pesaq' (Dalla müt'aḥ khilarkh dʿakhädda nakh) bu.
9:9: Delan ayatash dökhkina tsara k'ezzigchu mekhakh‚ Tsünan neq'akh /dukqa a nakh/ dʿatiliyna tsara. Bakq'alla a, ma von khilla-q tsara desh khillarg!
9:10: Tergame tsa do tsara muʾma stagatsa gergarlo a‚ bart a. Üsh dozanekh bevllarsh bu.
9:11: Nagaḥ sanna tsara tōba daḥ‚ lamaz hxottadaḥ‚ zakat laḥ – t'akqa shun vezhariy bu üsh dineḥ, /ishtta/ q'astado Okha ayatash khuush dolchu q'omana.
9:12: Nagaḥ sanna tsara shayn duynash q'arbaḥ, shayn bart khillachul t'äḥa‚ ʿittarsh yaḥ shun dinna – kerstananiyn körteḥ bolchärtsa t'om be ‚ – bakq'alla a, tseran duynash ban a bats‚ – üsh sovtsa magara /shayn körteḥ bersh bayicha/.
9:13: Ash t'om tsa bo shäsh shayn duynash q'arbinchu q'omatsa‚ elcha aravakqa ġayġa besh khilla dolchu‚ shäsh yuḥantsara shütsa i (t'om) boliyna khillachu? Tsarakh qöru shu? Dela ma vara shu Shekh qera tam bolush‚ shu muʾma nakh khilleḥ!
9:14: T'om be tsärtsa‚ Dala shun küygashtsa ʿazap diyr du tsarna‚ siysazbiyr bu üsh‚ tsarna t'eḥ shuna ġo diyr du‚ todiyr du muʾma nekhan degnash.
9:15: Dʿayokqur yu tseran degniyn öġazlo‚ Dala gechdo Shena luuchunna. Dela khuush verg a‚ /niysa/ ḥukma diyrig a vu.
9:16: Shu möttush dara shäsh dütur du (balane a tsa lüytsush)? Dalla hxintsa a shukh ġazot dinarsh a‚ Dela a, elcha a vitina‚ muʾma nakh a bitina, qin dottaġiy tsa liytsinarsh a tsa bevzina (nakhana guchubokhush)? Dela sov dika khuush verg vu ash diyrig.
9:17: Öshush dats mushrikash Delan mäzhdigashkaḥ ʿen, kerstanash shäsh khilarna teshalla a desh. Tseran ʿamalsh dʿatili‚ üsh /zhözhakhatin/ ts'ergaḥ guttar lättar bu.
9:18: Delan mäzhdigashkaḥ ʿiyr bu Delakh a‚ t'äkhḥarchu diynakh a teshna bersh‚ lamaz hxottiynarsh‚ zakat dellarsh‚ Dela votschukh tsa qörursh – üsh khila tam bu nisbellacharakh.
9:19: Ash khiliyti ḥäzhina khi dalar a‚ Deza mäzhdigeḥ ʿar a Delakh a‚ t'äkhḥarchu diynakh a teshnachukh a‚ Delan novq'aḥ q'aḥegnachukh a tera? Tsa nislo üsh Dalla gergaḥ‚ Dala tsa nisdo zulame q'am.
9:20: Iyman dillinarsh‚ dʿaqelkhinarsh (paykhamartsa Makkara Madinate islam ʿalashdarḥama)‚ Delan novq'aḥ shayn bakhamtsa a‚ shayn sinoshtsa a q'aḥegnarsh dukqa beza bu darzhatsa Dalla gergaḥ‚ üsh bu töllarsh.
9:21: Tsarna shayn Qiosh-Qobucho qaʾ bokqu Shegara q'inkhetam khilartsa a‚ rezakhilartsa a‚ (yalsamanin) boshmash khilartsa a‚ shayna tsunna (yalsamani) choḥ satsadella lättash dolu niʿmat dolush.
9:22: Tsu choḥ üsh guttar lättar bu‚ bakq'alla a, Dela Shegaḥ siylaḥ-eza yal yolush vu (tsarna yala).
9:23: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Ma liytsalash shayn day a‚ shayn vezhariy a dottaġiy, (ma be tsarakh doladiyrash) tsarna iymanal kerstanalla duqadiyzina delaḥ. Shukh tsarakh dottaġiy binarsh – üsh bu zulamkhoy.
9:24: Aḥ āla /hxay Muḥammad, iyman dillinchärga/: "Nagaḥ sanna shun day‚ shun k'entiy‚ shun vezhariy‚ shun zudariy‚ shun gergarnash‚ däkhni‚ ash guldina khilla dolu‚ yokhka-etsar‚ sha (sa yotsush) yisarkh shu qörush yolu‚ ts'enosh, shayna shu reza dolu‚ shuna /duqa/ dezaḥ Delal a‚ Tsünan elchanal a‚ Delan novq'aḥ q'aḥegaral (dzhihxadal) a, – ḥovsush ʿe Dela valts Shen ġullaqtsa (tsünan ʿazap‚ öġazlo yoġur yu shuna). Dala tsa nisdo pesaq' q'am.
9:25: Dala ġo dira shuna dukqachu mettigashkaḥ‚ Ḥunayn diynaḥ a. Shu tsetsdekhira shun duqallo‚ tso (shu dukqa khilarna, Delan ġönakh oyla esh datsara shu) shun hxumma k'elḥar tsa däkqira‚ sel shortta khilla dolu latta gatdelira shuna (dovda mettig yotsush disira shu)‚ t'akqa shu yukhadevlira.
9:26: T'akqa Dala Shen sintem bossiyra Shen elchanna a‚ muʾma nakhana a; eskar dossiyra‚ shuna gush dotsu; tsateshacharna ʿazap dira‚ tsateshacheran beqam i bu.
9:27: Yukha a tōba q'obaldiyr du Dala tsul t'äḥa a Shena luuchunna. I Dela sov gechdesh verg a‚ q'inkhetame verg a vu.
9:28: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Mushrikash nazhs (bökha hxuma) yu‚ hxoqu sharal t'äḥa Deza mäzhdigna gerga ma ġoyla üsh. Shu qeraḥ miskallakh (mushrikash tsa bäkhkicha yokhka-etsar setsna), – t'äḥa Dala ḥole diyr du shu Shen komärshallakh, Shena laaḥ. Bakq'alla a, Dela khuush verg a‚ ḥukma /niysa/ desh verg a vu.
9:29: T'om be shayga zhayna dellacharakh Delakh a‚ t'äkhḥarchu diynakh a tsa teshash bolchärtsa‚ Dala a‚ Tsünan elchano a ḥaram dinarg ḥaram tsa desh bolchärtsa‚ ḥaq'-baq' dolu din (Islam) q'obal tsa desh bolchärtsa shayn küygatsa (muk'ar khilla) zhizyat lush, üsh /shun küyga/ k'el sovtstsalts.
9:30: Zhügtasha elira: "ʿuzayr – Delan k'ant vu"‚ nasarasha elira: "Masūḥ – Delan k'ant vu". Iza – tseran dosh du, shayn bagara (sḥadälla)‚ tardesh bu üsh ḥalkha /Delan din/ kerstadinacheran dashakh. Dala hxallakboyla üsh! Ma baq'dolchukh dog dälla bu üsh!
9:31: Shayn aḥbarash a‚ ruhxbanash a delanash letsira tsara (tsarakh delanash bira tsara), Allahx-Dela a vitina. Maryaman k'ant Masūḥ a (dela letsira tsara). Tsärga omra dina datsara tsḥanna Dalla ʿibadat de älla ben‚ qin Dela votschu I sha ben – ts'ena vu Iza tsara Shetsa naq'ost latsarakh.
9:32: Üsh luush bu Delan nur daya shayn baganashtsa‚ Dela luush vats Shen nur qochush khiliytar ben‚ /mel i/ kerstanashna tsa dezaḥ a.
9:33: I vu vaiytinarg Shen elcha niysachu neq'atsa a‚ baq'onan dintsa a, i masso dinna t'eḥ toliytarḥama, /mel i/ mushrikashna tsa dezaḥ a.
9:34: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Bakq'alla a, aḥbarekh a‚ ruhxbanekh a duqabersh khartsontsa nekhan däkhni duush bu ḥuna‚ Delan neq'akh (shayna t'äḥahxüttu nakh) dʿatöttush a bu. Deshiy a‚ detiy a guldesh bolchärga‚ Delan novq'aḥ tsüntsa kharzh tsa esh – tsarna aḥ qaʾ bakqalaḥ shayna lazosh dolu ʿazap khirg khilartsa.
9:35: Tsḥana diynaḥ (q'ematdiynaḥ) zhözhakhatin ts'ergaḥ lalor du i (tsara dünenaḥ guldina khilla dolu deshi a, deti a)‚ t'akqa tsüntsa hxost diyr du tseran ḥäzhashna a‚ tseran aġonashna a‚ tseran bakq'ashna a: "Hxara du ash shayna guldinarg‚ ʿovsha shäsh guldesh khillarg"‚– (olush malikasha).
9:36: Bakq'alla a, bettaniyn duqalla Dalla gergaḥ – shiytta butt bu /sharna choḥ/ Delan Zhayni choḥ yazbina Tso stiglanash a‚ latta a qöllinchu diynaḥ‚ tsarakh biʾ beza bu (zul-q'aʿda‚ zul-ḥidzha‚ muḥarram‚ radzhab). I du mekhala (niysa) dolu din. Tsu choḥ shayna zulam ma de. T'om be masso mushrikashtsa tsara shütsa massärtsa a t'om bare terra‚ shuna khaalash, i Dela (Shekh qöruchärtsa) vuyla.
9:37: (Tsḥa beza butt qechu battal) t'äḥatattar kerstanalleḥ sovdiylar du‚ shetsa tsatesharsh tilosh, tsḥana sharaḥ ḥanal besh i (beza butt‚ tsu choḥ t'om ban magosh)‚ vuqu sharaḥ – ḥaram besh, Dala dazdinchiyn (bettaniyn) duqallitsa i tsḥänaboġush khiliytarḥama – ḥanal do tsara Dala ḥaram dinarsh. Khazyina tsarna shayn von ʿamalsh. Dala tsa nisdo kersta q'am.
9:38: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Shuna hxun khilla, shayga Delan novq'aḥ (ġazotana) aradovla älcha, /lättaḥ/ dazloy ma ʿa shu (ġazote tsa dölkhush)? Ekhartal dünenan dakharna reza khilla-te shu? Ma k'ezzig hxuma yu-q i, dünenan dakhar, ekhartatsa yusticha!
9:39: Shu ġazotana ara tsa dovlaḥ – Tso shuna lazosh dolu ʿazap diyr du‚ khüytsur du shu qechu q'omatsa‚ ash Tsunna zen diyr dats tsḥanna hxumantsa a. Dela masso a hxumanna t'eḥ nitsq' bolush vu.
9:40: Ash tsunna (vay paykhamarna Muḥammadana ġazote hxuttush) ġo tsa daḥ – Dala ġo dira tsunna kerstanasha iza /Makkara/ araväkqinchu khenaḥ‚ tsu shinnakh tsḥaʾ i volush. Üsh shiʾ ḥekhaḥ volush‚ tso (paykhamara) elira shen naq'oste (Abu-Bakre): "Ḥo ġayġane ma vozhalaḥ‚ vaytsa Dela vu ḥuna". Dala sinparġato yossiyra tsunna t'e‚ Tso ch'aġvira i eskartsa‚ shuna sha gush tsa khilla dolchu‚ tsateshacheran dosh bukhaḥ khiliytira. Delan dosh – i du laqaḥ derg‚ Dela Sha veza verg a‚ ḥukma /niysa/ desh verg a vu.
9:41: Aradovla shäsh dayn dersh a‚ deza dersh a‚ q'aḥega (ġazot de) shayn däkhnitsa a‚ shayn sinoshtsa a Delan novq'aḥ. I dika du shuna, shu khuush khilleḥ.
9:42: ʿalasho gergaḥ khilaḥ‚ neq' atta a khilaḥ – ḥuna t'äḥahxüttu üsh‚ hxette a (neq') gena khilartsa khilla tsarna /khalo/. Delakh duynash buur bu tsara: "Shayn nitsq' qachaḥara, shütsa aradevr dara shäsh" (ġazotana)‚– bokhush. Shäsh- shayn hxallakdo tsara. Dalla khäa üsh khartslüysh buyla.
9:43: Dela q'int'eraver ḥuna! Aḥ hxunda purba della tsarna ḥayna baq'lüysh bersh bilgalbovllalts‚ khartslüysh bersh bovzzallts?
9:44: Ḥöga purba dökhur dats ḥuna Delakh a‚ t'äkhḥarchu diynakh a teshash bolchara shayn däkhnitsa a‚ shayn sinoshtsa a ġazot tsa dan. Dela khuush vu (Shekh) qörush bersh.
9:45: Ḥöga purba dökhu Delakh a, t'äkhḥarchu diynakh a tsateshachara‚ shayn degnasha sheko echara‚ – üsh shayn shekona choḥ oylanash kerchosh bu.
9:46: Shäsh /ġazotana/ arabovla luush khilleḥara‚ tsunna kecham bina khir bara tsara‚ delaḥ a, Dalla tsa deza tseran guchubovlar /ġazotana/. Tso üsh bukhabütush bu /shütsa ġazotana arabovlarkh, malo yartsa/‚ elira /tsärga/: "Oḥakhovzhiy ʿie oḥakhevshina ʿachärtsa" (zudarshtsa a‚ berashtsa a‚ q'enachu nakhatsa a).
9:47: Shütsa üsh arabevlleḥara a‚ shu sovdokhur ma datsara tsara nizam dokhortsa a ben‚ shun yuq'amettig eġor ma yara tsara, shuna pitana lökhush. Shuna yukq'eḥ ma bu tsärga ladöġush bersh. Dela bevzash vu-q zulame bersh.
9:48: Ḥalkha a pitana lekhira tsara‚ ḥuna mekarlonash yira baq'derg dallalts. Delan ġullaq guchudelira, üsh (i) tsa dezarsh a bolush.
9:49: Tsarakh vu sha olush verg: "Purba loḥa suna /ġazotana ara tsa vāla/‚ pitana ma de suna". Tq'a pitanna chuegna bats üsh? Bakq'alla a, zhözhakhati guo biyr bolush ma yu kerstanashna.
9:50: Ḥuna dikanig khilaḥ‚ tso von khötüytu tsarna. Ḥuna khalo khilaḥ‚ tsara olu: "Okha ḥalkha t'eiytsira tkheshan ġullaq" (ġazote tsa dakha satsam bira okha ḥalkha‚ tsundela tkhuna von tsa khili). Üsh dʿabirzira, shäsh bakqiybesh.
9:51: Aḥ āla: "Tkhuna khilanne a khir ma dats Dala tkhuna yazdinarg ben. I vu tkhan ġöncha"‚ Dalla t'etevzhiyla muʾma nakh.
9:52: Aḥ āla: "Shina dikanakh tsḥannan a ben ḥözhiyla dariy shun tkhuna? Tkho ḥözhush du shuna Dala shegara ya tkhan küygashtsa ʿazap qachorig khilare. Ḥözhush ʿe‚ tkho a shütsa tsḥäna ḥözhush ʿiyr du".
9:53: Āla: "Saġa lo shayna laaḥ a‚ tsa laaḥ a‚ shügara danne a q'obaldiyr dats i. Bakq'alla a, shu khili-q pesaq' q'am".
9:54: Tsärgara saġa q'obaldar dukhatökhna üsh Delakh a‚ elchanakh a tsa teshash khilaro‚ shäsh malo esh ben tsara lamaz tsadaro‚ tsa luush, khalla ben tsara saġa a tsadakqaro.
9:55: Aḥ tamasha ma boyla tseran däkhnekh a‚ tseran dözalekh a. Dalla luush du tsärtsa tsarna ʿazap dan dünenan dakhareḥ (guldesh, ʿalashdesh q'aḥegartsa, tsärtsa tsḥatstsa balanash ḥegartsa)‚ tseran sinosh dāla, shäsh kersta ḥoleḥ a bolush.
9:56: Tsara Delakh duynash buu shäsh shukh du‚ bokhush‚ shukh bats üsh‚ hxette a q'ästash q'am du üsh.
9:57: Shayna lachq'a mettig karayaḥ‚ lättakh bola mettig karayaḥ ya chudovla mettig karayaḥ – tsiga sikhlur bu üsh chekhka /q'äkhkina govr sanna/.
9:58: Tsarakh bu ḥuna ircha bekhkash bokhush bersh saġadakqareḥ‚ tsunakh shayna delcha, reza khülu üsh‚ tsunakh shayna tsa laḥ – üsh öġazʾökhu.
9:59: Üsh reza khilleḥara Dala a‚ Tsünan elchano a shayna dellachunna‚ älleḥara tsara: "Tkhuna qacham bolush vu-q Dela‚ t'äḥa lur du tkhuna Dala Shen komärshallakh. Tsünan elchano a /lur du tkhuna/‚ bakq'alla a, tkho Dele dogdokhush du-q" /dika khir dara-q tsarna/.
9:60: Saġanash lo Dala t'edakhkartsa peq'arshna a‚ miskacharna a‚ tsarna t'eḥ bolkh becharna a‚ degnash k'addarḥama a‚ lesh azatbakhareḥ a‚ deqarshna k'elbisincharna a‚ Delan novq'aḥ a‚ neq'an naq'ostana a. Dela khuush a vu‚ /niysa/ ḥukma desh a vu.
9:61: Tsarakh bu paykhamarna khalakhötüytush bersh‚ shäsh olush: "Iza (paykhamar) – lergash du" (masso a hxuma khezash du-q tsunna). Aḥ āla: "Dikallin lergash du-q shuna‚ teshash vu i (Muḥammad-paykhamar) Delakh a‚ teshash vu i muʾma nakhakh a‚ shukh iyman dillincharna q'inkhetam a bu i". Delan elchanna khalakhötüytush bersh – tsarna (kechdina) du lazosh dolu ʿazap.
9:62: Shuna Delakh duynash buu tsara shu rezadarḥama. Dela a‚ Tsünan elcha a ḥaq' bara-q tsara rezaban, shäsh muʾma nakh khilleḥ.
9:63: Tsarna tsa khäa-te Dalla a‚ Tsünan elchanna a düḥalo yinchunna zhözhakhatin ts'e khir yuyla, i tsu choḥ guttar lättash? Ma eza-yokqa siysazalla yu-q i!
9:64: Qörush bu munepiq'ash tsärga (busalba nakhe) shayn degnashkaḥ derg düytsush surat dossarakh. Aḥ āla: "Ma dāsha shu" (ma lara ash din a‚ Dela a‚ busalbanash a). Bakq'alla a, Dela aradokqurg vu shu qörush (larlush) derg.
9:65: Aḥ tsärga khätticha‚ tsara er ma du ḥuna: "Tkho-m zabar esh‚ lovzush dariy". Aḥ āla: "Delakh a‚ Tsünan ayatekh a‚ Tsünan elchanakh a qärdash khilla shu?"
9:66: Bekhkazlonash ma ye ash. Kerstanalla deana ash shayn iymanal t'äḥa‚ shukh tsḥana tobanna Tkho q'int'era dovlaḥ a‚ qechu tobanna Okha ʿazap diyr du üsh khilarna q'inosh desh bersh.
9:67: Munepiq' bozhariy a‚ munepiq' zudariy a – üsh tsḥabersh vuqarakh bu. Vonig omra do tsara‚ dikanig ma de olu‚ shayn küygash dʿaq'ovlu tsara (saġa tsa lush‚ Delan novq'aḥ kharzh tsa esh). Dela vitsvina tsara – Tso a bitsbina üsh /Shen q'inkhetamakh/. Bakq'alla a, munepiq'ash – üsh bu-q pesaq'ash.
9:68: Dala vaʿda yina munepiq' bozharshna a‚ munepiq' zudarshna a‚ kerstanashna a zhözhakhatin ts'artsa‚ tsu choḥ üsh guttar lättar a bolush. I yu tsarna qacho yiyrig‚ Dala neʿalt älla tsarna‚ tsarna dʿahxöttina dolu ʿazap (kechdina) du.
9:69: Shul ḥalkha khillacharakh tera /du iza, hxay munapiq'ash/. Shul ch'oġa bara üsh nitsq'antsa‚ alsam bara däkhnitsa a‚ dözalshtsa a. Shayn deq'akh zovq ḥiygira tsara‚ shayn deq'akh zovq ḥiygira asha a‚ shul ḥalkha khillachara a zovq ḥegarkh terra shayn deq'akh‚ /khartsonna a, tilarna a/ chu dakhara shu, /shul ḥalkha/ üsh tsu chu bakharkh terra. Üsh bu-q shayn ʿamalsh yaynarsh dünenaḥ a‚ ekhartaḥ a‚ üsh bu-q shäsh eshnarsh.
9:70: Tsärga tsa deana-te shayl ḥalkha khillachu Nuḥan‚ ʿadiyn‚ Samudan q'ämniyn khabar‚ Ibrahximan q'oman‚ Madʾyanan dayn‚ Muʾtafikatiyn khabar? Tsärga shayn elchanash ma bäkhkira bilgalonashtsa. Dela tsa khilla tsarna zulam desh‚ hxette a, shäsh khilla üsh shayna zulam desh.
9:71: Muʾma bozhariy‚ muʾma zudariy – tsḥabersh vovshiyn dottaġiy (verasash) bu‚ dikachüntsa omra desh‚ /von derg ma de olush/ vochukh dukhatukhush‚ lamaz hxottadesh‚ zakat lush‚ Dalla a‚ Tsünan elchanna a müt'aḥ a bolush. Tsarakh t'akqa q'inkhetam biyr bu Dala. Bakq'alla a, Dela ma vu veza verg a‚ ḥukma /niysa/ desh verg a.
9:72: Dala vaʿda yina muʾma bozharshna a‚ muʾma zudarshna a /yalsamanin/ boshmash, shayn bukhakhula khish ökhush yolu‚ tsu choḥ üsh guttar lättash‚ ʿadn (yalsamanin) boshmashkaḥ ts'ena ġishlosh a. Delera rezakhilar vuno dokqa du – iza siylaḥ-bokqa tolam bu-q!
9:73: Hxay paykhamar! Q'iysam lattabe kerstanashtsa a‚ munepiq'ashtsa a‚ k'orshame khila tsärtsa. Tseran choḥʿoyla zhözhakhati yu, – von dʿaderzar du-q iza.
9:74: Tsara (munepiq'asha) duynash buu Delakh‚ tsa älla /paykhamarna vonig/ shäsh‚ bokhush. Älla tsara kerstanallin dosh‚ tsarakh kerstanash khilla shäsh busalbanash khillachul t'äḥa‚ shayna karkh tsa dällarg dan ḥävsira üsh. Beqam tsa bira tsara bekq'a Dala a‚ Tsünan elchano a shayna Shen komärshallakh ḥal dalarna a ben. Tsara tōba dineḥara, dika khir dara tsarna. Üsh dʿaberzaḥ–lazosh dolchu ʿazaptsa ʿazap diyr du Dala tsarna dünenaḥ a‚ ekhartaḥ a. Ma vats tsarna lättaḥ veras a‚ ġöncha a!
9:75: Tsarakh bu shäsh Delatsa vaʿda yinarsh: "Tso tkhuna Shen komärshallakh /niʿmat/ laḥ‚ /shortta/ lur ma du shäsh /dala dezachunna/ saġa, khir ma du shäsh dikacharakh"‚– älla.
9:76: Tso Shen komärshallakh shayna delcha‚ üsh tsüntsa bʿärmatsig khilira‚ dʿabirzira, shäsh düḥal a khülush.
9:77: Tseran degnashka Tso dossiyra munepiq'alla, üsh Tsunna düḥalqetar bolchu /q'emat/de t'eqachchalts‚ tsara shäsh Delatsa yina vaʿda yokhiyna khilarna a‚ üsh shäsh khartslüysh khilarna a.
9:78: Tsarna tsa khäa-te Dalla khuush khilar shayn q'ayle a‚ shayn q'aylakha khabarsh a‚ i Dela Sha ḥulameḥ dolu hxumanash dika khuush verg khilar a?
9:79: Muʾma nakhakh saġanashkaḥ müt'aḥ bolcharakh a‚ shayna /saġina dala/ khalla ben hxuma tsakariynacharakh a lüysh bersh‚ t'akqa tsarakh qärdash bersh, – Dala siysazabiyr bu üsh‚ tsarna (kechdina) du lazosh dolu ʿazap.
9:80: Aḥ gechdar dekha tsarna ya gechdar ma dekha tsarna. Aḥ tsarna quztq'e üttazza gechdar dekhcha a – Dala danne a gechdiyr dolush dats tsarna. I du tsara Dalla a‚ Tsünan elchanna a kerstanalla darna. Dala nis tsa do pesaq' q'am.
9:81: Bakqiybera shäsh bukhabitinarsh Delan elchanna t'eḥaḥ khevshina bisarna (ġazote tsa bölkhush)‚ tsarna tsa diyzira Delan novq'aḥ shayn däkhnitsa a‚ shayn sinoshtsa a q'aḥega (ġazot dan)‚ tsara elira: "Ma dovla /ġazotana ara/ hxoqu yovkhoneḥ". Aḥ āla: "Zhözhakhatin ts'e yovkha khilartsa qin a nütsq'ala yu"‚ üsh qetash khilleḥ.
9:82: Böliyla üsh k'ezzig‚ bölkhiyla üsh dukqa a shayna karadesh khillachun /vochun/ beqamna.
9:83: Dala ḥo yukhaverziycha tsarakh tsḥana tobanna t'e, ḥöga purba dökhu tsara ara dovla / qechu ġazotana/. T'akqa aḥ āla: "Tsq'a a sötsa aradevr dats shu‚ sötsa tsḥammo a mostaġtsa t'om biyr bats ash. Shu reza khilla dükhḥara khevshina ʿen – khovshiy ʿie hxintsa a bukhabisinchärtsa".
9:84: Tsarakh tsḥaʾ velcha, tsq'a a /doq'an/lamaz ma de /tsunna t'eḥ/‚ tsünan kosha t'e ma hxotta. Bakq'alla a, tsara kerstanalla dina Dalla a‚ Tsünan elchanna a‚ üsh bella, shäsh pesaq' ḥoleḥ a bolush.
9:85: Ḥöga tamasha ma boytiyla tseran bakhamo a‚ tseran dözalsha a. Dalla läa tsüntsa tsarna ʿazap dan dünenaḥ a‚ tseran sadāla (bala) a, üsh kerstanash a bolush.
9:86: Surat dössicha, Delakh a tesha‚ Tsünan elchantsa ġazot a de‚ älla‚ tsarakh ḥaldolchara ḥöga purba diykhira‚ tsara elira: "Ditaḥ tkho‚ khevshina ʿächärtsa khir dara tkho".
9:87: Reza khilla üsh bukhabisinchärtsa khila‚ tseran degnashna muhxar tökhna, – üsh tsa qeta.
9:88: Hxette a, elchano a‚ tsüntsa iyman dillinchara a ġazot dira shayn bakhamtsa a‚ shayn sinoshtsa a‚– üsh bu shayna dikanash desh bersh‚ üsh bu shäsh bakqiybiyr bersh.
9:89: Tsarna Dala boshmash kechyina‚ shayn bukhakhula khish ökhush‚ tsu choḥ üsh guttar lättar bu. I bu-q siylaḥ-bokqa tolam!
9:90: Dʿasaqelkhash lelachu ʿärbekh bekhkazlonash esh bersh bäkhkira shayna purba daliytarḥama. Bukhabisira shäsh Delatsa a‚ Tsünan elchantsa a kharts khillarsh‚ t'äḥa qochur du tsarakh kerstanalla dinachärga lazosh dolu ʿazap.
9:91: Zäʿapkhoshna a‚ tsomgush bolcharna a‚ yan kharzh tsa karocharna a q'a dats /ġazote tsa bakhcha a/, üsh Delatsa a‚ Tsünan elchantsa a dog ts'ena khilcha. Dikanig desh bolcharna neq' bats /bekhk billa/. Dela sov gechdesh verg a‚ q'inkhetame verg a vu.
9:92: Ḥo volchu bäkhkincharna a dats /q'a/ aḥ shäsh kechdaḥara, bokhush‚ aḥ älcha: "Shu shetsa kechdan hxuma tsa karado suna"‚ dʿabirzina bolchu, shayn bʿärgash khikh a büzna, von khetash shayna kharzhʾyan hxuma tsa karorna (shayna ġazote bakha taro tsa khilarna/.
9:93: Neq' bu /bekhk billa/ ḥöga purba dökhucharna, shäsh ḥaldolush a bolush. Üsh reza khilla bukhabisinchärtsa (zudarshtsa, berashtsa, zäʿapkhoshtsa) khila‚ tseran degnekh Dala muhxar tökhna, – tsarna tsa khäa.
9:94: Shüga bekhkazlonash yo tsara, shu tsarna t'e yukhadirzicha. Aḥ āla: "Bekhkazlonash ma ye! Teshshane a shukh teshar dats tkho. Dala diytsina tkhuna shun khabarekh. Gur yu Dalla a‚ Tsünan elchanna a shun ʿamal‚ t'akqa shu dʿaderzor du ḥulameḥ derg a‚ guchaḥ derg a khuush volchunna (Dalla) t'e – Tso düytsur du shüga ash desh khillarg".
9:95: Shuna Delakh duynash buur bu tsara, shu tsarna t'edirzicha, shu shaykh dʿaderzorḥama. Dʿaderza tsarakh! Bakq'alla a, üsh rizhs yu‚ tseran chuġoyla zhözhakhati yu – beqam a khilla tsarna karadesh khillachunna (düḥal).
9:96: Duynash buu shuna shu shayna reza khiliytarḥama. Shu tsarna reza khilaḥ a, – Dela reza khir vats pesaq' q'omana.
9:97: Dʿasaqelkhash lela ʿärbiy kerstanallitsa a‚ munepiq'allitsa a melkho a ch'oġa bu (qecharal)‚ Dala Shen elchane dossiyna dozanash tsakhaareḥ a sov bu. Dela khuush verg a‚ ḥukma /niysa/ desh verg a vu.
9:98: Dʿasaqelkhash lelachu ʿärbekh bu shäsh saġina lush derg ġuda lorush bersh‚ shuna bālanash khilare ḥözhush bersh. Tsarna bu-q vochun bāla. Dela khezash verg a, khuush verg a vu.
9:99: Dʿasaqelkhash lelachu ʿärbekh bu shäsh Delakh a‚ t'äkhḥarchu diynakh a teshash bersh a, shäsh lush dolu saġa Dalla gergaḥ ġurba a‚ elchanna /shayna/ doʿa dan /neq'/ lorush bersh a. Tsarna ġurba dats tq'a i?! Dala Shen q'inkhetamna chubukhkur bu üsh. Bakq'alla a, Dela sov gechdesh verg a‚ q'inkhetame verg a vu.
9:117: Dʿaqelkhincharakh a‚ (tsarna) ġo lätsnacharakh a dükhḥara (islam din t'eötsush) ḥalkha khillarsh‚ dikachüntsa tsarna t'äḥahxittinarsh – Dela reza khilla tsarna. Üsh a reza khilla Tsunna. Tso tsarna boshmash kechyina, bukhakhula khish ökhush yolu. Üsh tsu choḥ guttar khir bu. I siylaḥ- bokqa tolam bu-q!
9:100: Shuna gonaḥ bolchu dʿasaqelkhash lelachu ʿärbekh munepiq'ash a bu‚ Madinatan bakharkhoykh a bu üsh (munepiq'ash). Munepiq'allina chu k'orga bakhana üsh. Ḥuna tsa bevza üsh‚ Tkhuna bevza üsh. Okha shozza ʿazap diyr du tsarna (dünenaḥ)‚ t'akqa deza-dokqachu ʿazape dʿaberzor bu.
9:101: Qibersh q'era khilira shayn q'inoshna‚ tsara ieyira dika ʿamal qechu vochüntsa‚ Dala tōba q'obaldan mega tseran. Bakq'alla a, Dela vu gechdiyrig a‚ q'inkhetame verg a.
9:102: Tseran (dika a, von a ʿamalsh yolucharakh – q'ästtina, qecheran a) bakhamakh saġa etsa – tsüntsa doġmash a‚ sinosh a ts'andiyr du aḥ tseran (q'inoykh)‚ /Dele/ doʿa a de tsarna‚ bakq'alla a, ḥan doʿa tsarna sintem bu. I Dela khezash verg a‚ khuush verg a vu.
9:103: Tsarna tsa khäa-te Dala q'obaldesh khilar Shen leshkara tōba a‚ saġa ötsush khilar a‚ i Dela sha tōba sov q'obaldesh verg a‚ q'inkhetame verg a vuyla?
9:104: Aḥ āla /hxay Muḥammad/: "ʿamal ye! Dalla a‚ Tsünan elchanna a‚ muʾma nakhana a t'äḥa gur yu shun ʿamal‚ t'äḥa dʿaderzor du shu ḥulameḥ derg a‚ guchaḥ derg a khuush volchunna t'e – (Dalla t'e). T'akqa Tso shüga düytsur du ash desh khillarg".
9:105: Tsḥa qibersh Delan ġullaqe dogdokhüytush khir bu: ya ʿazap diyr du Tso tsarna‚ ya tseran tōba q'obaldiyr du Tso. I Dela khuush verg a‚ ḥukma /niysa/ desh verg a vu.
9:106: Tsḥa /qin/ bersh bu shäsh zulamna a‚ kerstanallina a‚ muʾma nakhana yukq'eḥ bart eġorna a‚ ḥalkha Delatsa a‚ Tsünan elchantsa a t'om besh khillacharna kechamna a mäzhdig dina bersh – baʾanne a duynash tsa buush ʿiyr bats üsh shayna dikanig ben luush ma datsara ḥuna‚ bokhush. Dala teshalla do: "Bakq'alla a, üsh bu khartslüysh"‚– älla.
9:107: Ḥo ma hxottalaḥ tsu /mäzhdiga/ choḥ /lamaz dan/ tsq'a a. Dükhḥarlerchu diynaḥ düyna /Delakh/ qerarna t'eḥ hxottiyna dolu mäzhdig melkho a ḥaq' du ḥo shena choḥ (lamazna) hxotta – tsu choḥ bu shäsh ts'anbala luush bolu bozhariy. Dalla beza shäsh ts'anlush bersh.
9:108: Shen ġirs Delera qerarna a‚ rezallina a t'eḥ hxottiynarg vu dika‚ ya shen ġirs yökhna‚ oḥaögush yolchu (berdan) yisteḥ hxottiynarg vu‚ tso shetsa zhözhakhatin ts'erga vozhiyna volu? Dala tsa nisdo-q zulame dolu q'am.
9:109: Tsa büsu tseran ġirs‚ tsara shäsh bina bolu‚ tseran degnashkaḥ sheko khilla a ben‚ tseran degnash lilkhina kiysakash khillalts. Dela khuush verg a‚ ḥukma /niysa/ desh verg a vu.
9:110: Bakq'alla a, Dala etsna muʾma nakhera tseran sinosh a‚ tseran bakham a tsarna yalsamani yalartsa. Üsh Delan novq'aḥ t'om besh bu‚ tsara a boyu‚ üsh a boyu. I Tsünan vaʿda yu - Tavrata choḥ a‚ Inzhila choḥ a‚ Q'urʾan choḥ a ḥaq'-baq' khilla yolu vaʿda. Mila vu shen vaʿda Dala yechul a dika qochushʾesh verg? Shu dakqiyde shayn yokhka-etsartsa‚ shäsh Tsüntsa qochushyina yolchu /vaʿditsa/. Iza – siylaḥ-bokqa tolam bu-q!
9:111: Tōba desh bersh‚ ʿibadat desh bersh‚ /Dalla/ khastam besh bersh‚ /lättakhula ġazotana ya ʿilma lökhush/ dʿasalelash bersh‚ rukuʿe-suzhude ökhush bersh‚ dikachüntsa omra desh‚ vochukh /nakh/ bukhatukhush bersh‚ Delan dozanash ʿalashdesh bersh /üsh baqiyber bu shayna yalsamani khilartsa/, – qaʾ bakqa muʾma nakhana.
9:112: Tsa khilla /öshush/ paykhamarna a‚ iyman dillincharna a mushrikashna gechdar dekhar‚ üsh shayn gergara khilleḥ a‚ shayna üsh zhözhakhatin day khilar bilgaldällachul t'äḥa.
9:113: Ibrahximan shen dena gechdar dekhar tsa khilla ekq'a tso tsüntsa yina vaʿdina düḥa a ben. Shena i Delan mostaġ khilar bilgaldälcha, ts'anvelira i tsunakh. Bakq'alla a, Ibrahxim ma vu ḥastalush verg a‚ dukqa sobare verg a.
9:114: Tsa khilla Dela q'am tilosh, Tso Sha nisdinchul t'äḥa üsh Shekh larbala dezarg tsarna bilgaldakqalts. Bakq'alla a, Dela masso a hxuma khuush verg vu.
9:115: Bakq'alla a, Dela stiglaniyn a‚ lättan a pachchaḥalla Shegaḥ dolush vu‚ dendolüytush a vu I‚ dolüytush a vu – I votsurg veras a vats shuna‚ ġöncha a vats.
9:116: Dala tōba q'obaldira paykhamaran a‚ dʿaqelkhincheran a‚ ansariyn a‚ khalachu soḥteḥ tsunna(toba q'obaldarna paykhamara) t'äḥahxittina khilla bolchu‚ tsarakh tsḥana tobanan degnash dʿatiladellachul t'äḥa‚ t'akqa Tso tōba q'obaldira tseran. Bakq'alla a, I tsarakh dog lozush a‚ q'inkhetam bolush a vu.
9:118: Qaannan a /toba q'obaldira Dala/‚ shäsh t'aḥatättina khilla bolchu (paykhamaro, gechdar tsa dökhush, Delera ḥukma dalts), (üsh duqa poshme khilira) shayna latta gattadallalts‚ sha shortta khilla dolu‚ shayn sinosh a tsarna gattadelira‚ tsarna khiira Delakh dovdiyla dotsiyla, Tsunna Shena t'e a ben. T'akqa tsarna t'evirzira Iza (tseran tōba q'obaldesh), tsärga (nakhe) tōba daytarḥama. Bakq'alla a, Dela tōba sov q'obaldiyrig a‚ q'inkhetame verg a vu.
9:119: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Delakh qeralash‚ baq'lüychärtsa khilalash.
9:120: Tsa dezara Madinatan bakharkhoshna a‚ tsunna gonaḥara dʿasaqelkhash lelachu ʿärbashna a Delan elchanakh bukhabisa a‚ i (paykhamar) vitina shayn sinosh deza a. Iza du – tsarakh tsa ḥaqayaliyta Delan novq'aḥ ḥogalla a‚ khalo a‚ matsalla a‚ üsh tsa bissiyta kerstanashna qeram tosuchu mettige‚ üsh tsa qiiyta mostaġchüngara tsḥanna a qiame, tsüntsa shayna dika ʿamal yazʾesh ben. Bakq'alla a, Dala tsa eshayo dikacheran yal.
9:121: Zhima a‚ yoqa a kharzh yiyr ma yats tsara‚ tsḥa a toġe khador ma yats tsara (neq' besh)‚ i shayna yazdina dolush ben‚ Dala tsarna beqam balarḥama tsara desh khillachukh khazachüntsa.
9:122: Tsa khilla /öshush/ muʾma nakhana masso a /ġazotana/ ġatta. Tsarakh hxora taypanakh tsḥa toba ġätticha /töar du/‚ /bisinchara/ dineḥ ġullaqash q'astor du‚ nakhana, üsh shayna t'e bukhabirzicha, ḥekham a biyr bu, – üsh /vochukh/ larbala /ʿama/ megara.
9:123: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! T'om be kerstanekh shayna gergaḥ bolchärtsa‚ shügaḥ lüralla karayoyla tsarna‚ shuna khaalash‚ Dela /Shekh/ qörush bolchärtsa vuyla.
9:124: Tsarakh bu surat dössicha, olursh: "Shukh mila sovvokqu hxoqo iymantsa?" Iyman dillinarsh – üsh sovbokhu tso iymantsa‚ üsh bakqiybö.
9:125: Shayn degnashkaḥ tsamgar ersh – üsh sovbokhu bökha lelarna t'e a bökha lelartsa‚ üsh bella shäsh kerstanash bolush.
9:126: Tsarna tsa go-teḥa shäsh hxor sharaḥ tsq'a ya shozza pitane lotsush khilar? T'akqa a tōba tsa do tsara‚ oyla a tsa yo tsara.
9:127: Suratakh hxuma dössicha, tsḥabersh vovshashka ḥovsu‚ tsḥanna a shu gush duy-te bokhush‚ t'akqa dʿabölkhu /i tsakhazarḥama/. Dala tseran degnash dʿaderziyna /serlonakh/, üsh tsa qetash q'am dolu dela.
9:128: Shüga veana elcha‚ shukh shaykh a volu‚ shuna khala khillarg shena dazlush a volu‚ shu /iymane dar, shu dünenaḥ a, ekhartaḥ a deq'alkhilar/ sha ch'oġa luush a volu‚ muʾma nakhakh dog lozush a‚ q'inkhetame a volu.
9:129: Üsh dʿaberzaḥ‚ aḥ āla /hxay Muḥammad/: "Qacho yu san Allahx, tsḥa Dela‚ qin dela vats I ben‚ Tsunna t'etevzhina so. I vu siylaḥ-yokqachu ʿarshan Da".
10:1: Alif-la-m-ra. Ḥikmate dolchu zhaynin ayatash du hxorsh.
10:2: Tamashe khilla-te nakhana, Okha tsarakh tsḥana stage (väḥitsa) khaiytar nakhana qeram tasa a‚ iyman dillinacharna qaʾ bakqa a, tsarna shayn Qiosh-Qobuchunna gergaḥ shäsh ḥalkha yina khillachu dika ʿamaliyn düḥa dokqa dikanig du‚ aliy? Kerstanasha ma elira: "Bakq'alla a, hxara bilggala bozbuuncha ma vu".
10:3: Bakq'alla a, shu Qiosh-Qoburg Dela vu‚ Sha stiglanash a‚ latta a qöllina volu yalkh diynaḥ‚ t'akqa dʿanisvelira I ʿarsha t'eḥ. Urkhalla do Tso (ġullaqashna t'eḥ). Tso purba dellachul t'äḥa a ben tsḥa a ġodakqarkho ma vats. I vu shun Dela‚ shun Qiosh-Qoburg‚ Tsunna ʿibadat de. Ash oyla tsa yo?
10:4: Tsünga du shun masseran a dʿaderzar Delan baq' yolchu vaʿdatsa. Bakq'alla a, Tso qollar dolado‚ t'akqa i karladokqu iyman dillincharna a‚ dika ʿamalsh yinacharna a niysontsa beqam barḥama. Kerstanash-m – tsarna qekhkash dolu khikh malar a du‚ lazosh dolu ʿazap a du shäsh /din/ kerstadesh khilarna.
10:5: I vu Sha malkh bina serlo khilla‚ butt a bina nur khilla‚ tsünan (bettan) baram a hxottiyna – manzalash‚ shuna sheriyn teraḥ a‚ ḥesap a khaiytarḥama. Baq'ontsa a ben tsa qöllina Dala i. Q'astado Tso ayatash /oyla yan/ khuuchu nakhana.
10:6: Bakq'alla a, büysa a‚ de a khiytsadalareḥ‚ Dala stiglanashkaḥ a‚ lättaḥ a mel qöllinchoḥ /i Dela tsḥaʾ khilar, I nütsq'alla khilar goytush dolu/ delilash ma du /Delakh/ qöruchu nakhana.
10:7: Bakq'alla a, Tkhuna düḥalqetare dog tsa dokhush bersh a‚ shäsh gergarchu dakharna (dünenna) reza khilla bersh a‚ tsüntsa sa-parġat bevlla bersh a‚ Tkhan ayatashna ġopal khillarsh a‚–
10:8: üsh bu shayn chuġoyla /zhözhakhatin/ ts'e ersh shäsh karadesh khillachüntsa.
10:9: Bakq'alla a, iyman dillinarsh a‚ dika ʿamalsh yinarsh a – shayn Qiosh-Qobucho (Dala) nisbiyr bu üsh shayn /ts'ena/ iyman khilar baḥaneḥ /yalsamanin novq'a/. Niʿmatiyn /yalsamanin/ boshmashkaḥ tseran /ġalaniy/ bukhakhula khish khir du ökhush.
10:10: Tseran doʿa tsu choḥ (yalsamaneḥ): "Vezan Dela‚ vonakh ts'ena vu Ḥo" khir du‚ tseran marshalla tsigaḥ "Salam" khir du. Tseran t'äḥara doʿa khir du: "Khastam bu Dalla – ʿalamiyn Dena".
10:11: Dala nakhana vonig sikhdineḥara dikane tseran sikhbalartsa – shayn ʿozhalla tsarna t'eqächna khir yara. Okha bütu Tkhuna düḥalqetare dog tsa dokhush bersh, shayn tillar choḥ bʿärze dʿay-sḥay üdush.
10:12: Adamo, shekh tsḥa bāla ḥaqabelcha, Tkhöga qoyqu shen aġonna t'eḥ ʿüllush‚ ya oḥakhiʾna, ya ḥalaġättina. Okha sha otsu bālekh ḥalkhadäkqicha – dʿadolalo /shen ḥalakhalerachu novq'a –Dalla ʿesalla yan/, shekh ḥaqabellachu bālane Tkhöga tsa qayqicha sanna. Ishtta khazdina /Delan/ dozanekh bovlucharna shäsh desh khillarg.
10:13: / Mel duqa/ t'äḥenash hxallakyina Okha shul ḥalkha tsara zulamash dicha‚ shayn elchanash bäkhkira tsarna t'e bilgalonashtsa‚ – üsh tsa khilira iyman düllush. Ishtta beqam bo Okha q'inosh dechu q'omana.
10:14: T'akqa shu khiliytira Okha tsaral t'äḥa lättaḥ t'äḥe, Tkho ḥazharḥama, ash mukha ʿamal yo (shu mukha lela).
10:15: Tkhan bilgala ayatash shayna t'eḥ deshcha‚ Tkhuna düḥalqetare dog tsa dokhuchara elira: "Hxara dotsurg qin deshar lo‚ ya i khiytsa". Aḥ āla: "San i khüytsiyla dats sayggara‚ so dekq'a sayga dussush dolchu väḥina t'äḥavozush vu. So qöru san Qiosh-Qobuchunna ʿesa khila siylaḥ-dokqachu /q'emat/diynan ʿazapakh".
10:16: Āla /tsärga, hxay Muḥammad/: "Dalla liʾneḥara‚ as shuna döshur ma datsara i‚ Tso shuna ʿamor a ma datsara i‚ as shuna yukq'eḥ tsul ḥalkha a tsḥa ömar ma eḥna. Ash oyla tsa yo?”
10:17: Mila vu-te zulame sha Dalla t'e khartsderg qulluchul‚ ya Tsünan ayatash khartsdechul? Bakq'alla a, q'inosh desh bersh bakqiybiyr ma bats.
10:18: Tsara ʿibadat do, Dela a vütiy, shayna zen a‚ shayna payda a tsabechunna. Tsara olu: "Hxorsh bu tkhan ġodakqarkhoy Dalla gergaḥ". Aḥ āla: "Ash düytsu Dele Tsunna Shena stiglanashkaḥ a‚ lättaḥ a tsakhuurg?" Vonakh ts'ena vu Iza‚ laqaveli I tsara Shetsa naq'ost latsarkh.
10:19: Ma tsa khilla nakh tsḥa ummat ben, – t'äḥa beq'abelira üsh. Ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchüngara dosh ḥalkha tsa dälleḥara, tsarna yuq'aḥ qiel yina khir yara Tso, tsara shetsa khilpalo yechoḥ.
10:20: Tsara olu: "Shen Qiosh-Qobuchüngara delil dössineḥra tsünga". Aḥ āla: "Ḥulameḥ derg Delan du‚ shu ḥovsush ʿe‚ bakq'alla a, so a shütsa tsḥäna ḥovsucharakh vu".
10:21: Okha nakhe q'inkhetamakh cham bakqiyticha, üsh zeno sḥalätsnachul t'äḥa, – tseran mekarlo khülu Tkhan ayatashkaḥ. Aḥ āla: "Dela melkho a sikha vu /mekarlona düḥal/ mekarlo yartsa (mekarlo yokhortsa)". Bakq'alla a, Tkhan elchanasha dʿayazʾesh yu ash esh yolu mekarlo.
10:22: I vu shu dʿasalelosh arengaḥ a‚ hxorda t'eḥ a. Shu kemana t'eḥ dolush, i dʿadödu tsärtsa khazchu makhtsa‚ üsh bakqiybina tsunakh. Ch'oġa mokh boġu tsunna t'e‚ tsarna yoġu masso a mettigera tulġe‚ tsarna mottalo tso shäsh yuq'aḥarchado. Dele qoyqu tsara, Tsünan din ts'andesh bersh a khüliy: "Aḥ tkho hxoqunakh k'elḥardakhaḥ‚ tkho barkalla olucharakh khir ma du"‚– bokhush.
10:23: Tso üsh k'elḥarbäkhnachul t'äḥa tsara lättaḥ bökhanig lelado tsḥa a baq'o yotsush. Hxay nakh! Shun bökhanig shuna shayna du shuna. Dünenan dakharan /k'ezzig/ hxuma du iza. T'akqa shun dʿaderzar Tkhöga du – Okha düytsur du shüga ash desh khillarg.
10:24: Dünenan dakharan masal Okha stiglara daiytinchu khikh tera du: tsunakh iyra nakha a‚ bezhanasha a yuuchekh lättan oramat. Lätto tsünan zaza etscha (i oramat khaza qiʾcha)‚ khazdicha‚ tsünan dayshna shäsh tsunna t'eḥ nitsq' qochush du (payda etsa)‚ älla khaadelcha, busa ya diynaḥ Tkhan bolkh qochu tsunna t'e – Okha khiliyti tsunakh /ḥäqna oḥadillina/ yalta – selkhana tsakhillarg sanna – ishtta q'astado Okha ayatash oyla esh bolchu nakhana.
10:25: Dala qoyqu masharan ts'a chu‚ nisvo Shena luurg niysachu novq'a.
10:26: Dika khillacharna dika du – /yalsamani/‚ qin sovderg khir du /q'ematdiynaḥ–Delan yuḥ gar/‚ tseran yakhḥekh chan letar yats‚ siysazalla a /letar yats/. Üsh – yalsamanin day bu‚ tsu choḥ shäsh guttar a khir bolush.
10:27: Vonig dinacharna beqam i sanna vonig du‚ siysazalla letar yu tsarakh. Ma vats tsarna Delera i dukhatukhur verg. Shayn yakhḥash büysanan bodane kiysigashtsa ḥulyinacharakh tera bu üsh. Üsh ts'eran day bu‚ tsu choḥ guttar a khir bolush.
10:28: Otsu /q'emat/diynaḥ Okha üsh berrige a gulbiyr bu‚ /Delatsa/ naq'ost lätsna khillachärga er du: "Dʿalatsa shayn mettig asha a‚ shun naq'ostasha a". Tseran yuq'amettig khadiyra Okha. Tseran naq'ostasha elira: "Shu tsa khilla tkhuna ʿibadat desh‚
10:29: Dala qacho yira tesh khilla tkhuna a‚ shuna a yukq'eḥ: bakq'alla a, tkho khilla ash tkhuna ʿibadat darkh ġopal".
10:30: Tsigaḥ bāla qechira masso a sinan sha ḥalkha dinchüntsa. Üsh dʿaberziyra Dele‚ shayn ḥaq'-baq' veras khilla volchu‚ tsarakh dʿatilira tsara /kharts/ qullush khillarg.
10:31: Aḥ āla /hxay paykhamar otsu mushrikashka/: "Mila vu shuna ritsq' lush verg stiglara a‚ lättara a? Ya mila vu dōladesh lersikh (khazarkh) a‚ bʿärsikh a‚ mila vu diyna verg vellachukh sḥavokqush‚ vellarg diynachukh sḥavokqush‚ mila vu dʿaḥosh ġullaqash?" Tsara er du ḥuna: "Dela vu-q". T'akqa aḥ āla: "Shu tsa qöru /Tsunakh/?"
10:32: I vu Dela – shun ḥaq'-baq' volu Ela. Hxun du tq'a baq'dolchul t'äḥa tilar ben? T'akqa a ma dʿaderzosh du shu!
10:33: Ishtta baq'khilira ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchun dosh pesaq' nakhana t'eḥ, üsh teshar bolush bats älla dolu.
10:34: Aḥ āla: "Shun naq'ostekh vuy sha qollar yuḥantsa dʿadolosh verg‚ t'akqa i karladokqush verg?" Āla: "Dala dʿadolado qollar‚ t'akqa i karladokqu. Ma talkhosh du-q shu (baq'dolchukh)!"
10:35: Āla /tsärga, hxay Muḥammad/: "Shun naq'ostekh vuy sha baq'dolchunna t'e nisbesh verg?" Āla: "Dala nisbo baq'dolchunna t'e". Tq'a sha baq'dolchunna t'e /nakh/ nisbesh verg ḥaq' vats shena t'äḥahxotta‚ ya sha a tsa nislush verg vu, sha /tsḥammo/ nisvaḥ ben? Tq'a shuna hxun khilla? Ash mukha ḥukma do?!
10:36: Tsarakh duqakhbersh mottadalarna a ben t'äḥahxüttush ma bats. Bakq'alla a, mottadalaro baq'dolchukh hxumma a k'elḥar tsa dokqu (bakq'alla a, mottalush derg baq'dolchunna düḥal hxumma paydane ma dats). Bakq'alla a, Dela khuush vu tsara desh derg.
10:37: Hxara Q'urʾan tsa khilla qolladala /tarlush/ Dela votschüngara‚ delaḥ a, niysa doġush du i shel ḥalkha khillachüntsa‚ shen choḥ sheko yotstsush ʿalamiyn Degara zhayna (Muḥammadan ummatana t'edikhkina deqarsh) bilgaldakqar a du i.
10:38: Ya tsara olu: "Tso /sha/ qöllina i /Q'urʾan/"? Ash daiytal tsunakh tera tsḥa surat‚ qayqa Dela votschünga shayga qayqaluchünga /qechu ġönchashka/‚ shäsh baq'lüysh khilleḥ.
10:39: Hxaʾ, khartsdira tsara (Makkin kerstanasha) i (Q'urʾan) shäsh i dika dovza a qiale‚ shen taʾvil a hxintsale shayga tsa qächna dolu. Ishtta khartsdira tsaral ḥalkha khillachara a. Ḥazhal‚ mukha khilla zulamkhoyn chaqe!
10:40: Tsarakh (Makkin ohxlakh) tsunakh teshash bersh a bu‚ tsarakh tsunakh tsa teshash bersh a bu. Ḥan Qiosh-Qoburg dika bevzash vu ḥuna /hxuma/ talkhosh bersh.
10:41: Ḥo tsara khartsvaḥ‚ aḥ āla (hxay Muḥammad): "Suna sayn ʿamal yu‚ shuna shayn ʿamal yu. Shu ts'ena du as dechukh‚ so ts'ena vu ash dechukh".
10:42: Tsarakh ḥöga laduġush bersh a bu. Aḥ khozüytur dara q'oracharna, tsu t'e a üsh ḥeq'ale a tsa khilcha?
10:43: Tsarakh ḥöga ḥözhush verg a vu (amma tsarna tsa go iymanan nur). Aḥ nisbiyr bara bʿärsadotsursh, tsu t'e a üsh gan ġertash a tsa khilcha?
10:44: Bakq'alla a, Dala zulam tsa do nakhana tsḥana a hxumantsa‚ delaḥ a, nakha shäsh do shayna zulamash.
10:45: Tsḥana /q'emat/ diynaḥ Tso üsh gulbiyr bu‚ shäsh /dünenaḥ/ diynan tsḥana soḥteḥ a ben tsa ʿiynarsh sanna‚ vovshashna bevzar bu üsh – t'akqa iyshira shäsh Dalla düḥalqetar khartsdinarsh. Tsa khilira üsh nisbella.
10:46: Ya Okha goytur ma du ḥuna (hxay Muḥammad) Tkhäsh tsarna vaʿda yechukh tsḥaderg (ʿazap)‚ ya Okha volüytur ma vu ḥo /tsarna ʿazap dale/. Tkhöga du tseran dʿaderzar – tsul t'äḥa Dela tesh ma vu tsara desh dolchunna.
10:47: Hxor (ḥalkhadakhanchu) ummatan elcha vu. Shayn elcha veʾcha, qiel yiyr yu tsarna yukq'eḥ niysontsa‚ tsarna zulam diyr dats.
10:48: Tsara olu: "Matsa qochushkhir yu i vaʿda, shu baq'lüysh khilleḥ?"
10:49: Aḥ āla: "As dola tsa do sayna zenna a‚ paydenna a (san karaḥ dats sayna ze dar a, payda bar a), Dalla ma luʾu ben. Hxor ummatna tökhna khan yu‚ i shayn khan t'eqächcha – tsḥa saḥt t'äḥabüsur a bats üsh‚ / tsḥa saḥt/ ḥalkhabevr a bats".
10:50: Āla (tsu mushrikashka, hxay Muḥammad): "Diytsal ash suna: Tsünan ʿazap shayga busa ya diynaḥ deʾcha‚ otsunakh hxun sikhdan luur dara q'inosh desh bolcharna?
10:51: T'akqa iza (ʿazap shuna) hxötticha, teshar dara shu tsunakh? Hxintsiy? Shu ma dariy i sikhdala luush /ḥalkha/."
10:52: T'akqa er du zulamash dinachärga: "ʿovsha shayna guttarenan ʿazap. Beqam khir buy shuna tq'a ash karadesh khillachüntsa a ben?"
10:53: Ḥöga dökhu tsara (tsunakh lätsna) khaiytar: "Baq' duy i?" Aḥ āla: "Hxaʾ‚ san Qiosh-Qobuchukh (duy bou as), baq' du-q i! Shüga daydalur dats iza".
10:54: Hxor zulam dinchu sinna (adamna) lättaḥ mel derg shen khilcha – i dʿalur dara tso‚ ḥuldira tsara dokhkodovlar, shayna ʿazap gicha. Tsarna yukq'eḥ niysontsa qiel yina. Tsarna zulam diyr dats.
10:55: Shuna khaiyla bakq'alla a, stiglanashkaḥ a‚ lättaḥ a mel derg Delan duyla! Shuna khaiyla Delan vaʿda ḥaq'-baq' yuyla! Delaḥ a, tsarakh duqakhbolcharna tsa khäa-q.
10:56: Tso dendolüytu‚ Tso dolüytu‚ Tsunna t'e shu dʿaderzor dolush du.
10:57: Hxay nakh! Shüga beana shun Qiosh-Qobuchüngara ḥekham a‚ degnashkaḥ dolchunna darba a – muʾma nakhana niysa neq' a‚ q'inkhetam a.
10:58: Āla (tsärga, hxayMuḥammad): "Delan kömärshallitsa‚ Tsünan q'inkhetamtsa – Tsüntsa bakqiyber üsh – iza melkho a dika du tsarna shäsh guldechul".
10:59: Aḥ āla: "Ḥovsal shu‚ hxun dossiyna Dala shuna (Shen) ritsq'anakh! Ash tsunakh ḥaram derg a‚ ḥanal derg a dira (tsḥaderg shayna ḥaram dira, tsḥaderg – ḥanal dira". Āla: "Dala purba delira shuna (i dan)‚ ya shu Dalla t'eḥ khartsderg qullush du?"
10:60: Hxun du teḥa Dalla t'eḥ khartsderg qullucharna mötturg q'ematdiynaḥ? Bakq'alla a, Dela q'inkhetam bolush vu nakhana t'eḥ‚ delaḥ a, tsarakh duqakhbolchara barkalla tsa olu.
10:61: Ḥo (paykhamar) khir vats tsḥana a ġullaqeḥ a‚ aḥ döshur dats tsunakh tsḥa a deshar a‚ ash yiyr yats tsḥa a ʿamal a Tkho shayna t'eḥ teshash dolush ben‚ shu tsu choḥ a düsush. Ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchukh q'aylader dats misq'alzarrat (hxuma) lättaḥ a‚ stiglaḥ a‚ tsul zhimanig‚ dokqanig – bilgalchu zhaynaḥ dolush ben.
10:62: Tidame etsa! Bakq'alla a, Delan dottaġiy –qeram a khir ma bats tsarna /ekhartaḥ Delan ʿazapakh/‚ üsh singattame a khir ma bats /shaykh dʿatillachu dünenan ḥolakh/.
10:63: (I Delan dottaġiy bu) Shäsh iyman dillinarsh‚ /Delakh/ qörush khillarsh (Tso bokhurg desh, ma de bokhurg tsa desh) –
10:64: tsarna qaʾ bu dünenan dakhareḥ a‚ ekhartaḥ a. Delan deshnashna khiytsadalar dats. Iza – siylaḥ-bokqa tolam bu.
10:65: Tseran /kerstanallin/ dasho singattame ma voyla ḥo (hxay Delan elcha), – bakq'alla a, errige siylaḥalla Delan yu. I khezash verg a vu‚ khuush verg a vu.
10:66: Tidame etsa! Bakq'alla a, Delan bu stiglanashkaḥ a‚ lättaḥ a bersh. Stenna t'äḥahxüttush bu Dela votschu /qechu/ naq'ostashka qoyqush bersh? Üsh t'äḥahxüttush ma bats dekq'a mottadalarna ben‚ üsh ma bats khartslüysh a ben.
10:67: I vu shuna büysa yinarg, tsu choḥ shüga sadaʿiyta‚ de a /dinarg/, tsu choḥ /shuna hxumanash/ gan (ash shayn dakharan ġullaqash qochushdan). Bakq'alla a, tsu choḥ delilash du khezash dolchu nakhana.
10:68: Tsara (mushrikasha) elira: "Dala dözalkho lätsna (vina)". Vochukh ts'ena vu Iza! I ḥal dolush verg vu. Tsünan du stiglanashkaḥ a‚ lättaḥ mel derg. Tsüntsa (tsu ḥoq'eḥ) tsḥa a delil dats shun! Dalla t'eḥ shayna tsakhuurg düytsu ash?
10:69: Aḥ āla /hxay Muḥammad/: "Bakq'alla a, Dalla t'eḥ khartsderg qullush bersh bakqiybiyr bats".
10:70: Dünenan (tsḥa k'ezzig) marzo yu /tsara payda ötsush erg/‚ t'akqa tseran dʿaderzar Tkhuna t'e du‚ t'akqa Okha ʿovshüytur du tsärga ch'oġa ʿazap üsh tsa teshash khilarna.
10:71: Diytsa tsarna Nuḥan khabar‚ tso shen q'ome ma elira: "Hxay san q'am! Nagaḥ sanna shuna khala khilleḥ san /shütsa/ ʿar a‚ as Delan ayatash ḥekhadar a – so Dalla t'etevzhina. Vovshakhtokha shayn ġullaq a, shayn naq'ostiy a‚ tsul t'äḥa shun ġullaq shuna ma khüliyla singattame. T'akqa suna shayn qiel ye‚ khan t'äḥa ma tattalash suna (i tsa yesh).
10:72: Shu dʿaderzaḥ /sokh/ – as shüga tsḥa a makh tsa bekhna‚ san makh Deleḥ ben bats. Suna omra dina busalbanekh tsḥaʾ khila"‚– älla.
10:73: Tsara i khartsvira‚ t'akqa Okha iza a‚ tsüntsa bersh a k'elḥarbekhira kemanna choḥ‚ Okha khiliytira tsarakh t'äḥe‚ Tkheshan ayatash khartsdinarsh khina bukhabakhiytira Okha. Ḥazhal‚ mukha khilla shayna /elchanasha/ qeram tosucheran t'äḥe!
10:74: T'akqa tsul t'äḥa Okha bakhiytira elchanash shayn q'ämnashka‚ üsh bäkhkira tsarna t'e bilgalonashtsa – üsh (elchanash shayna t'ebäkhkinarsh) tsa khilira (hxintsa a) teshar bolush shäsh ḥalkha khartsdinchukh. Ishtta muhxar tökhna Okha /Delan/ dozanekh bevlacheran degnashna.
10:75: T'akqa tsaral t'äḥa Musa a‚ Hxarun a vakhiytira Okha Firʿavnna a‚ tsünan elashna a t'e Tkhan ayatashtsa – tsara kuralla yira‚ üsh khilira q'inosh desh dolu q'am.
10:76: Tkhögara baq'derg shayga deʾcha‚ tsara elira: "Bakq'alla a, hxara bilggala bozbuunchalla ma du".
10:77: Musas elira: "Baq'dolchunna, i shayga deʾcha, /ishtta/ olu ash? Bozbuunchalla du hxara? Bozbuunchash bakqiybiyr ma bats".
10:78: Tsara (Firʿavna a, tsünan elasha a) elira: "Ḥo veana tkhuna tkhan day shena t'eḥ tkhuna kariynachukh tkho dʿaderzo /dekq'a/ shu- shinna khiliytarḥama lättaḥ siylalla? Tkho shushinnakh a teshash ma dats".
10:79: Firʿavna elira: "Suna t'e valave hxora govza mel volu bozbuuncha".
10:80: Bozbuunchash bäkhkicha, Musas tsärga elira: "Qissa shäsh qüssush erg".
10:81: Tsara qössicha‚ Musas elira: "Ash shaytsa deana derg bozbuunchalla du. Bakq'alla a, Dala doyur du iza. Bakq'alla a, Dala tsa toyo /hxuma/ talkhosh bolcheran ʿamal.
10:82: Baq'derg baq'khülüytu Dala Shen deshnashtsa‚ q'inosh decharna i mel tsa dezaḥ a".
10:83: Musakh tsa tiyshira tsünan q'omakh tsḥa zürret ben, Firʿavna a‚ tsünan elasha a shäsh pitane latsarkh qerarna. Bakq'alla a, Firʿavn laqavälla lättaḥ /zulamash desh/. Bakq'alla a, i /Delan niʿmatakh/ qoam tsabecharakh vu.
10:84: Musas elira: "Hxay san q'am‚ shu khilleḥ Delakh teshna – Tsunna t'etovzha‚ shäsh (Tsunna) müt'aḥ dersh delaḥ".
10:85: T'akqa tsara (Musana t'äḥahxöttinchara) elira: "Dalla t'etevzhina tkho. Veza volu Tkho Qiosh-Qoburg‚ tkho ma khiliytalaḥ zulame q'omana pitana.
10:86: K'elḥardakhalaḥ tkho Ḥayn q'inkhetamtsa kersta q'omakh".
10:87: Musaga a‚ tsünan veshe (Hxarune) a Okha khaiytira väḥitsa ashshimmo a shäshshinnan q'omana Misraḥ hxusamash a latsa, shayn hxusamekh q'ilba a khiliyta‚ lamaz a hxottade‚ qaʾ a bakqa muʾma nakhe‚ älla.
10:88: Musas elira: "Veza volu tkho Qiosh-Qoburg‚ Firʿavnna a‚ tsünan elashna a dünenan dakhareḥ khazalla a‚ bakham a bella Aḥ, tkhan Qiosh-Qoburg, üsh tilabaliytarḥama Ḥayn neq'akh. Veza volu tkho Qiosh-Qoburg‚ baya tseran bakham a‚ q'iza de tseran degnash a - üsh teshar bolush bats shayna lazosh dolu ʿazap tsa gicha".
10:89: Tso (Dala) elira: "Shushinnan doʿina zhop della‚ niysa khila shushiʾ‚ t'äḥa ma hxittalash tsa khuush bolcheran novq'a".
10:90: Okha hxorda deḥa bekhira Israilan k'entiy. Tsarna t'äḥa bevlira Firʿavn a‚ tsünan bʿo a ḥoġatsiy‚ mostaġallitsiy. /Hxorda/ bukhavakhar shena t'eqiʾcha‚ tso (Firʿavna, sha hxorda bukha vödush) elira: "So tiyshi qin Dela tsakhilarkh, Shekh Israilan k'entiy teshnarg ben‚ so müt'aḥ bolcharakh (busalba nakhakh) vu-q".
10:91: Hxintsiy? Ḥalkha-m ʿesalla ma yira aḥ‚ ḥo ma khilira /nakh Delan dinakh/ talkhocharakh.
10:92: Takhana Okha k'elḥarvokqur vu ḥo ḥayn deġatsa ḥol t'äḥa boġucharna delil khiliytarḥama. Bakq'alla a, nakhakh duqabersh Tkhan ayatekh ġopal ma bu.
10:93: Okha oḥakhovshiyra Israilan k'entiy /bākha/ tölash yolchchu mettige‚ ts'enchukh ritsq' a delira tsarna‚ /din baḥaneḥ/ khilpalo tsa yüyzhira tsarna yuq'a shayga ʿilma qachchalts. Bakq'alla a, ḥan Qiosh-Qobucho qiel yiyr yu tsarna yukq'eḥ q'ematdiynaḥ üsh shetsa khilpalo esh khillachoḥ.
10:94: Ḥuo (hxay paykhamar) sheko yolush khilaḥ Okha ḥayga dossiynachukh‚ aḥ khattal ḥayl ḥalkha zhayna döshush bolchärga. Ḥöga deana ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchüngara baq'derg‚ ḥo khilanne a ma khilalaḥ sheko yecharakh.
10:95: Ḥo khilanne a ma khilalaḥ Delan ayatash khartsdesh bolcharakh – t'akqa ḥo khir vu eshnacharakh.
10:96: Bakq'alla a, shayna t'eḥ ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchun dosh baq' khillarsh teshar bats
10:97: Shayga masso a delil deʾcha a‚ shayna lazosh dolu ʿazap gallats.
10:98: /Okha hxallakyinchu yartekh/ tsḥa a yurt khilliy shena /ʿazap ginachul t'äḥa/ iyman dillicha – tsu iymano shen payda bina, dekq'a Yunusan /yurtan/ q'am ben? Okha dʿaaydira tsarakh dünenan dakhareḥ siysazallin ʿazap (tsara i shayna gerga deʾcha, qera a bella, iyman dillina, toba dicha)‚ bakham belira tsarna tsḥana khanna.
10:99: Ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchunna liʾneḥara, iyman dillina khir dara masso a lättaḥ mel volcho. Tq'a ḥöga iyman dilliytalur dariy nakhe /tsarna tsa luusheḥ/?
10:100: Tsa khilla sinna (adamna) iyman dillar Delan purbantsa a ben. Oyla tsa esh bolcharna rizhs (taʿzar) khülüytu Tso.
10:101: Aḥ āla /tsu ḥayga Dela tsḥaʾ khilaran delilash gayta bokhuchu mushrikashka/: "Ḥovsal! Hxun du stiglanashkaḥ a‚ lättaḥ a?/mel duqa Dela tsḥaʾ khilaran delilash du tsigaḥ – malkh, butt...!/ Ḥalkhadokqur ma dats /ʿazapakh/ ayatasha a‚ qeramash tüysuchara a teshash dotsu q'am".
10:102: Üsh ḥovsur buy shayl ḥalkha bakhancheran denoshka sanna a ben? Aḥ āla: "Ḥovsa‚ so a shütsa tsḥäna ḥovsucharakh vu".
10:103: T'akqa Okha k'elḥarbokhur bu Tkhayn elchanash a‚ iyman dillinarsh a. Ishtta ḥaq' khilla Tkhuna: Okha k'elḥarbokhur bu muʾmanakh.
10:104: Aḥ āla /hxay Muḥammad/: "Hxay nakh! Shu khilleḥ shekoneḥ san dinakh‚ as ʿibadat diyr dats Dela votschu ash ʿibadat decharna‚ delaḥ a, as ʿibadat diyr du Dalla‚ shu a dolüytush volchu. Suna omra dina so muʾmanakhakh khila‚ älla.
10:105: Ḥayn yuḥ hxottae dinna t'e dogts'ena‚ ḥo khilanne a ma khilalaḥ mushrikekh‚ älla.
10:106: Aḥ ma qayqalaḥ Dela votschu ḥayna payda a‚ zen a tsa dechünga‚ aḥ i daḥ – t'akqa, bakq'alla, ḥo khir ma vu zulamkhoykh"‚– älla.
10:107: Dala zenatsa ḥo sḥalatsaḥ – i dʿaaydenderg vats ḥuna I sha votsurg. Ḥuna dikanig Tsunna laaḥ – Tsünan q'inkhetam bukhatukhurg a vats ḥuna. I qachado Tso Shen lekh Shena luuchunna. I sov gechdesh verg a vu a‚ q'inkhetame verg a vu.
10:108: Aḥ āla (hxay Muḥammad): "Hxay nakh! Shüga deana baq'derg shun Qiosh-Qobuchüngara: nisvellarg – shena nisvella vu‚ tilavellarg – shena tilavella vu. So shuna t'eḥ vekal a vats".
10:109: Ḥayga väḥitsa khaiytinchunna t'äḥahxotta ḥo‚ sobar de Dala ḥukma dallats. I – ḥukma /niysa/ decharakh dikanig vu.
11:1: Alif-lam-ra. Shen ayatasha ḥukma /niysa/ desh dolu‚ t'akqa /üsh khaza/ q'astosh dolu zhayna (Q'urʾan) du /hxara/ - Sha ḥukma /niysa/ desh a, sov dika khuush a volchüngara (Delera).
11:2: Ash ʿibadat tsadarḥama /tsḥana/ Dalla a ben. "Bakq'alla a, so shuna Tsüngara qeramcha a‚ khaamcha a vu‚– älla.
11:3: Ash shayn Qiosh-Qobuchünga gechdar dekharḥama‚ t'akqa ash tōba de Tsünga – Tso shuna khaza bakham lur bu ts'etökhna (bilgalʾyakqina) khan t'eqachchalts‚ hxor ḥaq' dolchunna shena doġu ḥaq' a dʿalur du. Shu yukhadovlaḥ – so qöru shuna dokqachu /q'emat/diynan ʿazapakh.
11:4: Dele du shun dʿaderzar. I masso a hxumanna t'eḥ nitsq' bolush vu".
11:5: Ḥazhaḥ! Bakq'alla a, üsh bats shayn degnash q'üylush Tsunakh ḥuldarḥama. Ḥazhaḥ! Tq'a tsara shayn bedar t'eyukhush Tsunna tsa khäa tsara q'ayladokqurg a‚ tsara dʿaḥediyrig a? Bakq'alla a, I khuush ma vu degnashkaḥ derg.
11:6: Tsḥa a diynat dats lättaḥ Dalla t'eḥ shen ritsq' dolush ben‚ Tsunna khäa tseran lattam a‚ tseran dʿaġoyla a, – masso a bilgalchu /Lavḥ maḥfuz/ zhayna choḥ du.
11:7: I vu Sha qöllina stiglanash a‚ latta a yalkh diynaḥ, Tsünan ʿarsh khina t'eḥ yara‚ shu zerḥama‚ mülkha vu-te shukh ʿamaltsa vuno a dikanig. Aḥ älcha: "Bakq'alla a, shu dendiyr dolush du dellachul t'äḥa"‚ kerstanasha allane a er ma du: "Iza-m bilggala bozbuunchalla ma duy!"
11:8: Okha tsarakh ʿazap t'äḥatetticha tsḥa yagaryinchu khanna‚ tsara allane a er ma du: "Steno satsiyna i (ʿazap)?" Ḥazhal! Tq'a i tsärga deʾnachu diynaḥ tsarakh dʿatilar ma dats! Üsh shekh tsa bēshash khillarg tsarakh dʿa ma ḥärchira.
11:9: Okha adame Tkhaygara q'inkhetam ʿovshiyticha‚ t'akqa Okha tsunakh i dʿabäkqicha – i dogdüllurg a‚ /Delan niʿmatana/ kersta a ma khülu.
11:10: Okha tsünga niʿmat ʿovshiyticha, i sḥalätsnachu bālanal t'äḥa‚ tso allane a er ma du: "Q'inosh dʿadakhna suna t'era". Bakq'alla a, i khazakhetash‚ kuralla esh ma khülu.
11:11: Sobar dinarsh‚ dika ʿamalsh yinarsh botsursh. Tq'a hxoqarna gechdar a‚ yokqa yal a yu.
11:12: Ḥo khila tarlo ḥayga della tsḥatstsa väḥiy dütush‚ tsärtsa ḥayn dog q'üylush tsara olush khilarna: "Khazna yössina khilleḥara tsünga‚ ya malik deʾneḥara tsärtsa". Bakq'alla a, ḥo qeramcha vu. Dela masso a hxumanna t'eḥ vekal vu.
11:13: Ya tsara ālarna: "I tso qöllina". Aḥ āla: "Ash daladel, delaḥ, tsunakh tera itt surat‚ shäsh qöllina dolu. Qayqa Dela votschu shayna megachärga‚ shäsh baq'lüysh khilleḥ.
11:14: Tsara shayna zhop tsa laḥ‚ shuna khaalash, i Delan ʿilmantsa dössina duyla a‚ I votsurg qin dela votsiyla a. Shu khüliy busalbanash ?"
11:15: Dünenan dakhar a‚ tsünan khazalla a yezash khillachunna – tseran /dikachu/ ʿamalshna tsu (dünena) choḥ qochchush beqam biyr bu Okha‚ üsh tsu (dünena) choḥ /ritsq'anakh/ eshor bats.
11:16: Üsh bu shayna ekhartaḥ /zhözhakhatin/ ts'e ben khir yotsursh. Hxallaqili tsara tsu /dünena/ choḥ dinarg‚ khartsderg du tsara desh khillarg (payda bats tsara dünenaḥ desh khillachu dikachukh, Delakh qörush üsh khilla batsaḥ).
11:17: Tq'a shen Qiosh-Qobuchüngara bilgalonna t'eḥ khillarg‚ shena t'äḥavozush Tsüngara tesh a volush‚ tsul ḥalkha /tesh/ – Musan zhayna khilla /nakhana/ imam a‚ q'inkhetam a - /tera vu dekq'a düne dezachärga?/ – üsh tsunakh (Q'urʾanakh) teshash bu. Tobanekh tsunna kerstanalla decharna vaʿda khillarg /zhözhakhatin/ ts'e yu. Ḥo tsunakh shekoneḥ ma khilalaḥ. Bakq'alla a, i ḥan Qiosh-qobuchüngara baq'derg du ḥuna. Delaḥ a, duqakhbolu nakh tsa tesha.
11:18: Mila vu tq'a zulame sha Dalla t'eḥ khartsderg qöllinchul? Üsh shayn Dalla ḥalkha hxittor ma bu‚ teshasha er ma du: "Hxorsh bu i shayn Dela khartsvinarsh. Delan neʿalt dats tq'a zulamkhoshna?!
11:19: Shäsh Delan neq'akh /nakh/ dʿatilosh bolchu‚ shäsh i bokho luush bolchu‚ – ekhartana üsh kerstanash ma bu ".
11:20: Üsh tsa khilira nitsq' qochush lättaḥ /hxumma khiytsa/, Dela votsurg ġönchiy (doladiyrash) tsa khilira tsarna. T'ett'a ʿazap du tsarna. Ladoġa nitsq' qochush tsa khilira üsh‚ gush tsa khilira üsh.
11:21: Üsh bu shäsh shayna zen dinarsh‚ tsarakh dʿatilira tsara qullush khillarg.
11:22: Sheko yotstsush, üsh bu ekhartaḥ shäsh ch'oġa eshame khir bersh.
11:23: Bakq'alla a, iyman dillinarsh a‚ dika ʿamalsh yinarsh a‚ shayn Qiosh-Qobuchunna müt'aḥ khillarsh a,– üsh bu yalsamanin day‚ üsh tsu choḥ guttar khir bu.
11:24: Shina tobanan masal tera du bʿärzechun a, q'orachun a‚ - gush volchun a, khezash volchun a masalakh. Nisloy üsh shiʾ /toba/ masalitsa? Shu tsa qeta? /Dera tsa nislo!/
11:25: Okha vakhiytinera Nuḥ shen q'omana t'e /olush/: "Bakq'alla a, so shuna bilggala qeramcha vu.
11:26: /Tsḥanna /Dalla ben ash ʿibadat ma doyla‚ bakq'alla a, so qöru shuna lazosh dolchu diynan ʿazapakh".
11:27: Tsünan q'omakh tsateshnacheran elasha elira: "Tkhuna-m tsa go ḥo, tkhäsh sanna, adam ben‚ tkhuna tsa go, shäsh oyla a tsa yesh, ḥuna t'äḥahxittinarsh, tkhokh uggar siysaza bersh ben‚ tkhuna tsa go shun tkhäshna t'eḥ tsḥa a dozalla‚ hxette a, tkhuna kheta shu khartslüysh dersh".
11:28: Tso (Nuḥas) elira: "Hxay san q'am‚ goy shuna, so khilcha sayn Qiosh-Qobuchüngara bilgalonna t'eḥ‚ Tso Shegara q'inkhetam a belcha suna‚ tq'a shu tsüntsa bʿärze khilcha, okha shuna t'edüllur du iza, shuna tsa luusheḥ? (Tkhan nitsq' qochur bats shüga nütsq'akh din t'elatsiyta).
11:29: Hxay san q'am! As shüga tsunna t'eḥ bākham tsa bökhu‚ san yal Dalla t'eḥ a ben yats‚ so vats q'akhkor bolush iyman dillinarsh. Bakq'alla a, üsh düḥalqetar bolush bu shayn Qiosh-Qobuchunna‚ delaḥ a, suna shu kheta tsa qetash q'am.
11:30: Hxay san q'am! Ḥan larviyr vara so Delakh, as üsh q'akhkiycha? Ash oyla tsa yo?
11:31: As shüga tsa bokhu: "Sögaḥ Delan khaznash yu"‚ ḥulameḥ derg a tsa khäa suna; as tsa bokhu: "So malik du"‚ as tsa olu shun bʿärgash shaykh tsa beshacharakh: "Dala dikanig lur dats tsarna". Dalla dika khäa tsärgaḥ derg – iza dicha, so khir vara, bakq'alla a, zulamkhoykh".
