11:32: Tsara elira: "Hxay Nuḥ‚ tkhötsa q'iysi aḥ‚ tkhan q'iysam a alsambäkqi aḥ‚ daiyta tkhuna ayḥa tkhuna khir du ällarg‚ ḥo baq'lüycharakh khilleḥ".
11:33: Tso elira: "I shuna doüytur du Dala, Shena laaḥ‚ shun nitsq' qochur bats /i ʿazap dukhatokha/.
11:34: San ḥekhamo a shuna payda biyr bats‚ suna shuna ḥekham ban liʾcha a, Dela luush khilleḥ shu tildala dita. I vu shu Qiosh-Qoburg‚ Tsünga shu dʿaderzor dolush a du".
11:35: Ya tsara olu: "I tso sha qöllina". Aḥa āla: "Nagaḥ i aysa qöllineḥ – suna t'eḥ du-q sayn q'inosh‚ so ts'ena vu-q ash dechu q'inoykh".
11:36: Nuḥe väḥitsa khaam bira‚ ḥan q'omakh tsḥammo a iyman düllur dats ḥuna‚ shäsh hxintsale iyman dillinchara a ben‚ ḥo ġayġane ma vozhalaḥ tsara desh khillarg baḥaneḥ.
11:37: Kema de Tkhan tergamtsa a‚ Tkhan väḥitsa a‚ q'amel ma delaḥ Söga zulam dinacharakh latsiy‚ bakq'alla, üsh khi bukha bokhüytur bolush bu.
11:38: Tso kema dora‚ Tsünan q'oman eliy, shäsh ullokhula cheq mossazza bovlu, tsunakh bölura. Tso elira: "Shu tkhokh dölu‚ t'äḥa tkho shukh dölur du, shu delare terra.
11:39: T'äḥa khuur du shuna‚ ḥanna t'e ʿazap doġur du‚ tso sha siysazvesh dolu‚ /guttar/ lätta dolu ʿazap shekh ḥärcha derg mila vu".
11:40: Tkhan omra deʾcha, pesh qekhka yolaelcha‚ Okha elira: "Tsunna t'e- khaae hxor /diynatakh/ shishsha‚ ḥan dözalkh a shena t'eḥ dosh ḥalkhadällarg votsurg‚ /masso a/ iyman dillinarg a". Iyman tsa dillira tsüntsa k'ezzigchara ben.
11:41: Tso (Nuḥas) elira: "T'ekhovsha tsunna‚ Delan ts'artsa du tsünan lelar a‚ satsar a. Bakq'alla a, san Qiosh-Qoburg sov gechdiyrig a vu‚ q'inkhetame verg a vu".
11:42: I (kema) lelara tsärtsa tulġenashkaḥ, shäsh lämnash sanna yolchu. Nuḥas qayqira shen k'ante‚ i vara yustakh lättash: "Hxay san k'antalg! T'e khaa tkhötsa‚ ma khila kerstanashtsa".
11:43: Tso elira: "As k'elḥarvalar lokhur du lamana t'eḥ– tso larviyr vu so khikh". Tso (Nuḥas) elira: "Takhana tsḥammo a larviyr vats Delan omrakh, Tso shekh q'inkhetam binarg ben". Tsu shinna yukq'e tulġe ḥävzira – iza khina bukhabakhancharakh khilira.
11:44: Elira /Dala/: "Hxay latta! Dʿakhudal ḥayn khi‚ va hxay stigal! Dʿasatsade /doġa/". Khi dʿadelira‚ /Delan/ omra qochushkhilira. I setsira Dzhudiyaḥ. Elira: "Deq'aza khülda zulame q'am".
11:45: Nuḥa qayqira shen Qiosh-Qobuchünga‚ elira /tso/: "San Qiosh-Qoburg! I san k'ant san dözalkh ma vu‚ Ḥan vaʿda baq' ma yu‚ Ḥo ḥukma decharakh uggar ḥukma /niysa/ desh verg a ma vu!"
11:46: Elira /Dala/: "Hxay Nuḥ! I ḥan dözalkh vats. Iza vu /shen/ ʿamal dika yotsurg. Söga ma dekha shegaḥ ḥan ʿilma dotsurg. As ḥekham bo ḥuna ḥo tsa khiliyta tsakhuucharakh".
11:47: Tso elira: "San Qiosh-Qoburg! So Ḥötsa larlo sayna ʿilma shetsa dotsurg Ḥöga dekharkh. Aḥ suna gech tsa daḥ‚ sokh q'inkhetam tsa baḥ – so khir vu-q eshnacharakh".
11:48: Ällera: "Hxay Nuḥ! Oḥavossa Tkhögara qeramazallitsa a‚ berkattsa a ḥayna a‚ ḥaytsa tsḥäna /kemana t'eḥ/ khillachu ummatashna a. Okha shayna t'äḥa bakham a lur bolush /tsḥa qin ummatash khir du/‚ t'akqa Tkhögara lazosh dolchu ʿazapo sḥalotsur bu üsh".
11:49: Üsh q'aylenan diytsarsh du‚ Okha ḥöga düytsush dolu väḥishtsa. Üsh khuush vatsara ḥo a /hxay Muḥammad/‚ ḥan q'am a hxoqul ḥalkha. Sobar de aḥ. Bakq'alla a, t'äḥe /Delakh/ qörucharna yu.
11:50: ʿadashka a tseran vasha Hxud /vakhiytira Okha/. Tso elira: "Hxay san q'am‚ ʿibadat de /tsḥana/ Dalla – Allahxana‚ I votsurg qin dela vats shuna‚ shu ma dats khartsderg qullush ben.
11:51: Hxay san q'am! Tsunna t'eḥ shüga sayna makh tsa bökhu as. Suna makh balar Sha so qöllina volchunna t'eḥ ben dats. Shu ḥeq'ale tsa khülu?
11:52: Hxay san q'am! Gechdar dēkha shayn Qiosh-Qobuchünga‚ t'akqa Tsünga tōba de - Tso stigal yoüytur shuna shortta doġitsa (shortta doġa doüytur du shuna)‚ shun nitsq'ana t'e a nitsq'atsa sovdokhur du Tso shu. Shu dʿa ma derzalash q'inosh desh a dolush."
11:53: Tsara elira: "Hxay Hxud! Ḥo tsa veana tkhöga bilgalontsa‚ tkho ma dats tkhayn delanash dʿatosur bolush ḥan dosh baḥaneḥ‚ tkho khir dats ḥokh tesharsh.
11:54: Okha olu: "Tkhan tsḥabolchu delanasha zulam dina ḥuna". Tso elira: "Bakq'alla a, as Dela hxottavo tesh‚ ash teshalla de so ash /Delatsa/ naq'ost latsarkh ts'ena vu aliy
11:55: I Sha /Dela/ votschukh. Mekarlo ye suna massara a‚ tsa yesh t'äḥa ma tattalash so.
11:56: Bakq'alla a, so Dalla t'etevzhi‚ san a‚ shun a Ela volchu. Tsḥa a diynat ma dats Tso shen k'uzh lotsur bolush ben. Bakq'alla a, san Qiosh-Qoburg niysachu novq'aḥ ma vu (niysa beqam besh vu).
11:57: Shu dukhadovlaḥ /as deʾnachukh/ – as shüga dʿaqachiyna so shüga daḥash vaiytinarg. San Qiosh-Qobucho t'äḥe shu dotschu /qechu/ q'omana khülüytur yu‚ ash Tsunna tsḥana a hxumantsa zen diyr dats. Bakq'alla a, san Qiosh-Qoburg – masso a hxumanan lardarkho vu!"
11:58: Tkhayn omra deʾcha‚ Okha k'elḥarbekhira Hxud a‚ tsüntsa bolu iyman dillina khillarsh a Tkhaygarchu q'inkhetamtsa. Okha üsh k'elḥarbekhira lürachu ʿazapakh.
11:59: Vüysh ʿadash bu – shayn Qiosh-Qobuchun ayatashna inkarlo yira tsara‚ Tsünan elchanashna ʿesa khilira‚ hxor tsa q'arluchu, q'izachu ʿazapkhochun (ʿazapechu pachchaḥan) omrana t'äḥahxittira üsh.
11:60: /Delan a, malikiyn a, masso a nekhan a /neʿalt ḥärchira tsarakh hxoqu dünenaḥ a‚ q'ematdiynaḥ a. Ḥovsal! Bakq'alla a, ʿadasha kerstanalla ma dina shayn Qiosh-Qobuchunna. Ḥovsal! Bella bovliyla i ʿadash‚ Hxudin q'am!
11:61: Samudashna a tseran vasha Saliḥ /t'evakhiytira Okha/. Tso elira: "Hxay san q'am! ʿibadat deysha /tsḥana/ Dalla-Allahxana‚ I votsurg qin dela ma vats shuna. Tso qiiyna shu lättakh‚ tsu t'eḥ dākhiytina shu‚ Tsünga gechdar dekha‚ t'akqa Tsünga tōba de. Bakq'alla a, san Qiosh-Qoburg gergaḥ a vu‚ zhop lush a vu".
11:62: Tsara elira: "Hxay Saliḥ! Ḥo ma variy tkhuna yukq'eḥ hxoqul ḥalkha ḥokh /tkhayna t'eḥ ela khilare okha/ dogdokhush verg. Aḥ tkhuna tsa magado okha ʿibadat dar tkhan daysha ʿibadat dechunna. Bakq'alla‚ tkho ch'oġachu shekoneḥ ma du aḥ tkho shega qoyquchukh".
11:63: Tso elira: "Hxay san q'am! Goy shuna‚ so sayn Qiosh-Qobuchüngara bilgalonna t'eḥ khilcha‚ Tso suna shegara q'inkhetam a belcha‚ ḥan ġo diyr dara suna Dalla düḥal‚ so Tsunna ʿesa khilcha? Ash suna sov tsa bokqu esham a ben.
11:64: Hxay san q'am! hxara Delan emkal yu shuna delil khilla‚ yitalash i Delan lättaḥ yazha. Vonig ma delash tsunna - t'akqa gergarchu ʿazapo sḥalotsur du shu".
11:65: Tsara tsunna (Dala yaiytinchu emkalna) urs ḥäqira. Tso (Saliḥa) elira: "Zovq ḥega shayn hxusamashkaḥ qaa diynaḥ. I kharts dotsu vaʿda du!"
11:66: Tkhayn omra deʾcha, Okha k'elḥarväkqira Saliḥ a‚ tsüntsa iyman dillina khillarsh a Tkhaygara q'inkhetamtsa, tsu diynan siysazallakh /ʿalash a bira/. Bakq'alla a, ḥan Qiosh-Qoburg nütsq'ala verg a‚ veza verg a ma vu.
11:67: Zulam dinarsh /nütsq'alchu/ mäḥaro sḥaletsira – shayn hxusamashkaḥ /bella/ bertal egna ʿüyranga bevlira üsh,
11:68: Shäsh tsarna choḥ tsa ʿiynarsh sanna. Ḥovsal! Bakq'alla a, samudasha kerstanalla dina shayn Qiosh-Qobuchunna. Ḥovsal! Bella bovliyla i samudash!
11:69: Tkhan elchanash (malikash) bäkhkira Ibrahxime qaʾ bokqush‚ tsara elira: "Salam!". Tso elira: "Salam!"‚ sikho yira tso qärzinchu esantsa /ḥeshashna/ t'e van.
11:70: Tsunna gicha tseran küygash tsunna (esanna) t'e tsa qochush‚ iza tsarakh shekone velira‚ qera a velira. Tsara elira: "Ma qera! Bakq'alla a, tkho dakhkiytina Lut'in q'omana t'e" /üsh hxallakban/.
11:71: Tsünan (Ibrahximan) zuda (Sarat) yara irahxöttina lättash‚ i yelaelira. Okha tsunna (Saratana) qaʾ bäkqira Isḥaq'atsa‚ Isḥaq'ana t'äkhḥe – Yaʿq'ubatsa.
11:72: Tso (Sārata) elira: "Daq'aza ma yala so! Ber do tq'a as‚ so-kh q'ena zuda ma yu‚ hxara san mayra a q'ena stag ma vu?! Ma tamashe hxuma du hxara!?"
11:73: Tsara (malikasha) elira: "Ḥo tsetsyolu Delan ġullaqakh? Delan q'inkhetam a‚ Tsünan berkat a khülda shuna t'eḥ‚ hxay ts'iynan ohxla! Bakq'alla a, Iza khastame verg a‚ siylaḥ verg a ma vu".
11:74: Ibrahximakh qeravalar dʿadälcha‚ tsünga qaʾ a beʾcha‚ Tkhötsa (Tkhan malikashtsa) q'iysa volavelira i Lut'in q'am baḥaneḥ (tsarna ʿazap t'äḥatattaḥara bokhush, iyman dilla magara tsara).
11:75: Bakq'alla a, Ibrahxim esala a‚ /nakhana khüluchu vonashna /lazame verg a‚ /toba dartsa Dele/ dʿavirzinarg a ma vu".
11:76: Ibrahxim! Dita i‚ Ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchun omra deana‚ dukhatokhalur dotsu ʿazap tsarna doġush du.
11:77: Tkhan elchanash (malikash) Lut'ina t'ebäkhkicha‚ tsarna singattame khilira iza‚ üsh baḥaneḥ dog gatdelira tsünan (shen q'omo tsarna zen dan qörush)‚ tso elira: "Hxara khala de du!"
11:78: Tsunna t'edeara tsünan q'am (tsünan q'oman nakh)‚ sikhkha tsunna t'ebirzira üsh /ḥeshashtsa irchanig leladayta shayga, bokhush/‚ ḥalkha a bara üsh q'inosh desh. Tso (Lut'as) elira: "Hxay san q'am! Quzaḥ san mekhkariy bu‚ üsh melkho a ts'ena bu shuna /mare biga/. Delakh qeriysha‚ siysaza ma veysha so san ḥeshashna gergaḥ! Shukh tsḥa a qetame stag vats?!"
11:79: Tsara elira: "Ḥuna khuush ma dara‚ ḥan mekhkarshtsa tkhan ġullaq dats‚ ḥuna ma khäa‚ tkhuna hxun deza".
11:80: Tso elira: "Shütsa /q'ovsa/ nitsq' belar-qa san‚ onda ġortor elar-qa t'etovzha".
11:81: Tsara (malikasha) elira: "Hxay Lut'! Tkho ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchun elchanash du‚ tsq'a a ḥuna /zen dan/ t'eqochur bats üsh. Ḥayn dözaltsa büysa daq'oshka yirzicha, novq'a vāla. T'eḥa ma ḥozhiyla shukh tsḥa a (i ircha ʿazap tsagarḥama), ḥan zuda yotsurg. Bakq'alla a, tsünga a qochur du tsärga qächnarg. Tsarna tökhna khan – ʿüyre yu. Gergaḥ yats tq'a ʿüyre?"
11:82: Tkhan omra qächcha‚ Okha tsünan (Lut'in yurtan) laqenakh lakhe yira‚ Okha tsarna t'e dagiynachu lättan t'ulgash t'edelkhiyra,
11:83: bilgaldäkhna khilla dolu ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchun gergaḥ. /Masso a/ zulamkhoshna gena dats i (ishtta taʿzar khila). (Ḥan q'omana genaḥ ma yats i tseran Dala yokhiyna yartash, hxay Muḥammad).
11:84: Madʾyanashka a tseran vasha Shuʿayb /vakhiytira Okha/. Tso elira: "Hxay san q'am! tsḥana Dalla – Allahxana ʿibadat de‚ I votsurg qin dela vats shuna. Yustar a‚ ozar a esha ma de. Suna gush du shu dikaneḥ‚ so qöru shu /erchallitsa/ yuq'aozor dolchu diynan ʿazapakh.
11:85: Hxay san q'am! Qochushde yustar a‚ ozar a niysontsa‚ lakha ma ye nakhana shayn hxumanash‚ ma lelalash lättakhula, bökhanig darzhosh.
11:86: Delana gergaḥ bukhadüsursh dika du shuna, shu muʾma/nakh/ delaḥ‚ so ma vats shuna lardarkho".
11:87: Tsara elira: "Hxay Shuʿayb! Ḥan dino (lamazo) omra do ḥöga tkhan daysha shena ʿibadat diyrig tkhöga ditiyta ya tkhayn bakhamekh tkhayna luurg dan? Bakq'alla a, ḥo sobare a‚ niysachu qetameḥ a ma vu".
11:88: Tso elira: "Hxay san q'am! Goy shuna‚ so khilleḥ san Qiosh-Qobuchüngara bilgalonna t'eḥ‚ Tso Shegara t'ekhdika ritsq' della suna. Suna tsa läa shukh q'asta aysa shuna magosh dotschunna t'eḥ. So dekq'a todan luush /shun ḥal/ vu sayn nitsq' ma - qochchu. San qiam Delatsa ben bats. Tsunna t'etevzhina so. Tsunna t'e a vörzu so /toba dartsa/.
11:89: Hxay san q'am! Sötsa eġaro dallane a t'e ma doüytiyla shuna Nuḥan q'omana a‚ ya Hxudin q'omana a, ya Saliḥan q'omana a t'edeʾnarg. Lut'in q'am a shuna duqa genaḥ a ma dats.
11:90: Shayn Qiosh-Qobuchünga gechdar dekha‚ t'akqa tōba de Tsünga. Bakq'alla a, san Qiosh-Qoburg q'inkhetame verg a‚ Shena /Shen khalq'/ dezash verg a ma vu".
11:91: Tsara elira: "Hxay Shuʿayb! Aḥ düytsuchukh duqadolchukh tkho qetash ma dats‚ tkho ḥo tkhaylaḥ ledara khetash ma du. I ḥan gergarnash batsaḥara, Okha t'ulgash dittina khir ma dara ḥuna‚ ḥo tkhuna /qin etstsara/ ḥomsara a ma vats".
11:92: Tso elira: "Hxay san q'am! Tq'a san gergarnash bezo bu shuna Delal? Ash Iza-m shayn buq'a t'eḥaḥ ma viti?! Bakq'alla a, san Qiosh-Qoburg ash diyrig /Shen ʿilmantsa/ yuq'alotsush ma vu.
11:93: Hxay san q'am! Shayga dalurg de ash‚ asa a diyr du /sayga dalurg/. T'äḥa khuur du shuna‚ mülkhachunna t'edoġur du i siysazvesh dolu ʿazap‚ mila vu khartslüysh verg! Ḥezha! So a shütsa tsḥäna ḥözhush verg vu".
11:94: Tkhan omra deʾcha‚ Okha k'elḥarväkqira Shuʿayb a‚ tsüntsa iyman dillinarsh a Tkhaygarchu q'inkhetamtsa. Zulam dinarsh mäḥaro sḥaletsira‚ shayn ts'enoshkaḥ bertal- bettabella ʿüyrenga bevlira üsh.
11:95: Tsigaḥ tsa bäkhcha sanna /bisira üsh/. Ḥovsal! Bella bovla i madʾyanash‚ Samudash bella bovlare terra!
11:96: Musa vakhiytira Okha Tkhayn ayatashtsa a‚ bilgalchu delilatsa a
11:97: Firʿavna a‚ tsünan elashna a t'e – Firʿavnan ġullaqna t'äḥahxittina bara üsh. Firʿavnan omra niysa ma datsara!
11:98: Shen q'omana ḥalkhaver vu i q'ematdiynaḥ‚ tso bügur bu üsh ts'erga. Ma von chuġoyla yu üsh /shena/ chulokhkurg!
11:99: Quzaḥ (dünenaḥ) a neʿalt ḥärchira tsarakh‚ q'ematdiynaḥ a /ḥärchar du/. Ma von "sovġat" du-q i sha qochuchunna!
11:100: Üsh – yartiyn khabarekh du‚ Okha düytsu üsh ḥöga. Tsarakh lättash erg yu‚ /yalta sanna/ ḥäqnarg a yu.
11:101: Okha zulam tsa dina tsarna‚ hxette a, shäsh shayna zulam dina tsara. Dela a vitina, shayga qoyqush bolchu delanasha hxummanakh a k'elḥar tsa bekhira üsh ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchun omra deʾnachul t'äḥa. Tsara sov tsa bekhira üsh hxallaqilartsa ben.
11:102: Ishtta du ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchun /zulamkhoy ʿazapatsa/ sḥalatsar‚ Sha zulame yolu yartash /ʿazapatsa/ sḥalotsush. Bakq'alla a, Tsünan sḥalatsar – ch'oġa lazosh du-q.
11:103: Bakq'alla a, tsu choḥ delil ma du sha ekhartan ʿazapakh qiyrinchunna‚ i de du shena t'e nakh gulbiyr dolu‚ i de du sha gun dolu.
11:104: Okha t'äḥatottur ma dats i yagaryinchu (q'astiynachu) khanna ben.
11:105: I de deʾcha, sino q'amel diyr dats Tsünan purbantsa ben. Tsarakh deq'aznig a khir vu‚ irsenig a khir vu.
11:106: Daq'azabevllarsh – üsh ts'ergaḥ khir bu‚ tsarna tsigaḥ uzarsh a, moḥ ḥeqar a du.
11:107: Guttar lättar bolush bu üsh tsu choḥ, stiglanash a, latta a mel du‚ ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchunna luʾuchulla. Bakq'alla a, ḥan Qiosh-Qoburg /daima/ desh ma vu Shena luurg.
11:108: Amma irse khillarsh – beshaḥ khir bu‚ tsu choḥ guttarenna büsur bolush bu üsh, stiglanash a‚ latta a mel du‚ ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchunna luʾuchulla‚ sha khedar dotsu sovġat a khilla.
11:109: Ḥo shekoneḥ ma khilalaḥ hxoqara ʿibadat dechukh. Tsara ʿibadat desh ma dats ḥuna ḥalkha shayn daysha ma-darra ben. Bakq'alla a, Okha tsarna qachor ma du shayn /ʿazapan/ dāq'a, tsa eshadesh.
11:110: Musaga zhayna delira Okha‚ tsu choḥ a khilpalonash khilira tseran. Ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchüngara dosh ḥalkha tsa dälleḥara, tsarna yukq'eḥ qiel yina khir yara. Bakq'alla a, üsh otsunakh ch'oġachu shekoneḥ ma bu.
11:111: Bakq'alla a, hxoranna ḥan Qiosh-Qobucho beqam biyr ma bu shen ʿamalashka ḥäzhzhina. Bakq'alla a, Iza tsara diyrig dika khuush verg vu.
11:112: Nislo‚ ḥayga omra ma- ddi‚ ḥo a, ḥötsa tsḥäna sha tōba dinarg a‚ /Delan dozanekh/ t'ekh ma dovla. Bakq'alla a, Iza ash diyrig gush ma vu.
11:113: Zulam dinacharna t'e ma tiyzha – /zhözhakhatin/ ts'aro sḥalotsur du shu‚ Dela votsurg doladiyrash bats shuna‚ t'akqa shuna ġo diyr dats.
11:114: Lamaz hxottade diynan shina yuḥeḥ /ʿüyranna a, süyranna a/‚ büysanakh tsḥadolchu saḥtashkaḥ a. Bakq'alla a, dikchu ʿamalsha dʿayokhu von ʿamalsh. Iza – dagadaiytar du dagadoüytucharna.
11:115: Sobar de‚ bakq'alla a, Dala esha tsa yo dika ʿamalsh yecheran yal.
11:116: Khilleḥara-qa shul ḥalkha khillachu t'äḥenakh bukhadüsuchun day‚ shäsh /nakh/ dukhatukhush lättaḥ dechu büykhachukh. Okha shäsh tsarakh k'elḥarbäkhnacharakh tsḥa k'ezzig bersh ben batsara-qa üsh. Zulam dinarsh t'äḥabezira shayna della khillachu /khazchu/ ḥolana‚ üsh khilira q'inosh desh bersh.
11:117: Ḥan Qiosh-Qoburg tsa khilira zulamtsa yartash hxallakesh, tseran bakharkhoy dika ʿamalsh esh a bolush.
11:118: Ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchunna liʾneḥara‚ nakh tsḥana /busalba/ ummatakh khiliytina khir bara Tso. Üsh (duqa bolu nakh) dʿa tsa tülu /busalba dinna/ khilpalo yecharakh
11:119: Ḥan Qiosh-Qobucho shaykh q'inkhetam binarsh ben. Otsünan (q'inkhetaman) düḥa Tso üsh qöllina. Qochushkhili ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchun dosh: "Yuzur ma yu As zhözhakhati /shayt'anna t'äḥahxittinchu/ zhinekh a‚ nakhakh- massarekh a"‚– älla dolu.
11:120: Derrig a düytsu Okha ḥöga elchaniyn khabarekh ḥan dog shetsa Okha ch'aġdesh derg. Tsu choḥ deana ḥöga baq'derg a‚ ḥekham a‚ muʾma nakhana dagadaiytar a.
11:121: Aḥ āla tsateshachärga: " Ash ye shayn ʿamal shayna ma khettara, Okha a yiyr yu /tkheshan ʿamal tkhayna ma khettara/.
11:123: Delan yu stiglaniyn a‚ lättan a q'ayle. Tsünga dʿadörzu masso a ġullaq‚ Tsunna ʿibadat de‚ Tsunna t'etovzha. Ḥan Qiosh-Qoburg tergal tsa desh vats ash diyrig.
12:1: Alif-lam-ra. Hxorsh q'eginchu zhaynin ayatash du.
12:2: Bakq'alla a, Okha dossiyna i Q'urʾan ʿärbiyn /mattaḥ/‚ shu ḥeq'ale khila tam bara.
12:3: Okha düytsu ḥöga uggar khaza khabarsh ḥöga väḥitsa hxara Q'urʾan daiytartsa, tsul ḥalkha ḥo tsakhuucharakh khilleḥ a.
12:4: Ḥakhade: Yusufa ma elira shen dega /Yaʿq'ube/: "Dada‚ suna gi tsḥaytta seda a‚ malkh a‚ butt a‚ suna gi üsh sayna suzhud desh".
12:5: Tso (Yaʿq'uba) elira: "Hxay san zhima k'ant, i ḥayna ginarg ma diytsalaḥ ḥayn vezharshka – mekarlo yiyr yu ḥuna tsara. Bakq'alla a, shayt'a adamna bilgala mostaġ ma du.
12:6: Ishtta ḥan Qiosh-Qobucho khorzhur volush vu ḥo‚ ḥuna ʿamor dolush du Tso khillarsh tidan‚ Shen niʿmat ḥuna qochushdiyr dolush du Tso‚ Yaʿq'uban dözalna a‚ Sha ḥalkha ḥan dayshna Ibrahximna a‚ Isḥaq'na a qochushdina khilare terra. Bakq'alla a, ḥan Qiosh-Qoburg khuush verg a vu‚ Shegaḥ ḥeq'alalla derg a vu".
12:7: Yusufeḥ a‚ tsünan vezharshkaḥ a delilash ma khilira khottucharna.
12:8: Tsara ma elira: "Yusuf a‚ tsünan vasha a duqabeza vayn dena vayl‚ tq'a vay tsḥa toba ma yuy‚ bakq'alla a, i vayn da bilggalchu tilar choḥ vu-q.
12:9: Vē Yusuf ya /qechu genarchu/ mettige dʿaqossa – shun den yuḥ shuna t'eyörzur yu‚ tsul t'äḥa dika q'am khir shu" (tōba diyr du ash-t'akqa gechdiyr du shuna Dala).
12:10: Tsarakh olucho elira: "Ma vē Yusuf‚ ġu chu qossa i – dʿabölkhush bolcharakh tsḥabolchara sḥavokqur vu‚ shäsh desh khilleḥ" /i ġullaq de/.
12:11: Tsara elira: "Hxay tkhan da! Aḥ hxunda tsa vütu Yusuf tkhokh teshna‚ tkho tsunna ḥekhamchash ma duy!
12:12: Vaiytaḥ i tkhötsa qana – samuq'adokqur shena‚ lovzur shena‚ okha i ʿalashviyr ma vu".
12:13: Tso (Yaʿq'uba) elira: "San sagatlur ma du ash i dʿavigcha‚ so qöru i barzo vaarna, ash tsünan tergo a tsa esh".
12:14: Tsara elira: "I barzo vaaḥ – tkho tsḥa toba ma yuy‚ t'akqa tkho, bakq'alla a, eshnarsh khir ma dara".
12:15: T'akqa tsara i dʿavigcha‚ tseran bart khilira i ġu chu qossa. Okha khaiytira tsünga (Yusufe) väḥitsa: aḥ düytsur ma du tsärga i tsara dinarg, tsarna i dagaḥ a dotsush.
12:16: Üsh bäkhkira shayn da volchu saraḥ, belkha a bölkhush.
12:17: Tsara elira: "Hxay tkhan da! Tkho dakhara /dovdareḥ ya ʿad qossareḥ/ q'iysa a lush, Yusuf tkheshan hxumanashna ulloḥ vitira okha‚ t'akqa i barzo viira. Ḥo tkhokh teshar volush-m vats, tkho baq'lüysh khilleḥ a".
12:18: Üsh bäkhkira tsünan (Yusufan) kucha t'eḥ kharts ts'iy a dolush. Tso (Yaʿq'uba) elira: "Shayn sinosha tsḥa vonig khazdina shuna. Sobar du-q khaza derg. Dela vu-q Shega ġo dēkha ḥaq' verg /qu/ ash hxottochu surta t'eḥ".
12:19: Tsḥa lelash yolu toba eara‚ tsara vakhiytira shayn khi qöḥush verg‚ tso shen vedar oḥadakhiytira- elira: "Qaʾ bu! Hxara k'ant vu!" Tsara (Yusufan vezharsha) ḥuldira i (Yusufan ġullaq – i shayn vedda lay vu älla), tsunakh yokhka-etsaran hxuma a yina. Dela khuush verg ma vu tsara lelosh derg.
12:20: Tsara (vezharsha) vökhkira i k'ezzigchu mekhakh – tsḥa massiyta dirhxamakh. Tsunakh üsh khilira k'ezzig hxumanakh toam becharakh.
12:21: Misrarchu i etsnacho shen zudchünga elira: "Khazdelaḥ tsünan ʿar‚ vayna payda ban mega tso‚ ya vay väshna k'ant viyr vu tsunakh". Ishtta Okha ch'aġvira Yusuf lätta t'eḥ‚ tsunna khillarsh tida ʿamadarḥama a. Dela Shen ġullaqa t'eḥ tolam bokqush vu‚ delaḥ a, duqakh bolchu nakhana tsa khäa-q.
12:22: Iza ġemettahxötticha, Okha tsunna ḥeq'alalla a‚ ʿilma a delira. Ishtta (khaza) beqam bo Okha dikacharna.
12:23: Iza (Yusuf) shen hxusameḥ volu zuda i ʿekho ġörtira‚ tso neʿarsh dʿaq'evlina‚ elira: "Sḥavola!" Tso (Yusufa) elira: "Dala larvoyla! Bakq'alla a, iza (ḥan mayra) san ela vu‚ tso san ʿar khazdina‚ bakqiybiyr bats zulamkhoy".
12:24: Tsünan otsünga (Yusufe) bezam bakhnera, tq'a tsünan a otsünga (zudchünga) bezam bakhnera, shen Qiosh-Qobuchüngara delil tsa gineḥara /zina diyr dara tso/. Ishtta /dira Dala/ tsunakh vonig a‚ bökhanig a dʿadakqarḥama. Bakq'alla, i Tkhan ts'enchu lekh vu.
12:25: I shiy a ḥalkhadāla q'üysush, neʿare sikhdelira‚ tso (Zuleykhas) tsünan (Yusufan) koch yat'iyra t'eḥakhula‚ neʿareḥ i shiʾ t'eʿottabelira tsünan (Zudchun) elana. Tso (Zuleykhas) elira: "Hxun beqam bu ḥan dözalna vonig luuchunna: ya i nabakhti chu tsa völlicha‚ ya lazosh dolu ʿazap ben (tsa dicha)?"
12:26: Tso (Yusufa) elira: "I ġörtira so ʿekho". Tsünan (Zuleykhin) gergarcharakh tsḥana tesho teshalla dira: "Nagaḥ sanna tsünan koch ḥalkhakhula yatt'a elaḥ – i baq' yu‚ tq'a iza khartslüycharakh vu.
12:27: Nagaḥ sanna tsünan koch t'eḥakhula yatt'a elaḥ – i kharts yu‚ tq'a iza baq'lüycharakh vu".
12:28: Shena tsünan koch t'eḥakhula yatt'a gicha‚ tso (mayracho) elira: "Shun (zudariyn) mekarlonakh du-q hxara‚ bakq'alla a, shun mekarlo eza-yokqa yu-q.
12:29: Yusuf‚ ḥo dʿaverza hxoqunakh. Tq'a aḥ /hxay Zuleykha/ ḥayn q'inna /düḥal/ gechdar dekha‚ bakq'alla a, ḥo galʾyallacharakh khili".
12:30: Ġalaḥ zudarsha elira: "Elan zuda tsḥa q'onakh (shen lay) shetsa ʿekho ġirtira‚ tsünga bolu bezam ch'oġa dagchu bakhna tsünan. Bakq'alla a, vayna ma go i bilggalchu tilar choḥ khilar".
12:31: Shena tseran mekarlo khezcha‚ tso tsarna t'e /tsḥaʾ/ vakhiytira. Tsarna dʿatevzhiylash a kechyira‚ tsarakh hxoranga urs a delira‚ t'akqa elira /Yusufe/: "Guchuvala tsarna!" Shayna i gicha, tsara i vazvira‚ shayn küygash khediyra‚ elira: "Dala lardoyla! Hxara adam a dats! Hxara siylaḥ malik du!"
12:32: Tso (Zuleykhas) elira: "I vu-q shuna ash suna sha baḥaneḥ bekhkash dekhkinarg! So i ʿekho ma ġörtira – i ch'aġvelira. As shega omra desh derg tso tsa daḥ‚ nabakhti chu vullur vu i‚ i khir vu siysaza bolcharakh".
12:33: Tso (Yusufa, Dele dökhush) elira: "So qiosh-qobush volu Dela‚ nabakhti duqakho eza suna tsara so shena (q'inna) t'eqoyquchul‚ tseran mekarlo Aḥ sokh dʿa tsa yakqaḥ‚ so tsarna t'evörzur vu – t'akqa so zhehxal nakhakh khir ma vu".
12:34: Shen Qiosh-Qobucho zhop delira tsunna‚ tsunakh dʿayakqira tseran (zudariyn) mekarlo. Bakq'alla a, Iza khezash verg a vu‚ khuush verg a vu.
12:35: Shayna delilash ginchul t'äḥa, tseran oyla khilira i tsḥana khanna nabakhti chu volla.
12:36: Tsüntsa tsḥäna nabakhti chöḥavelira shi q'onakh. Tsu shinnakh tsḥammo elira: "Suna suo go aysa chaġar dokqush". Vuqo elira: "Suna suo go sayn körta t'eḥ aysa qallar qöḥush‚ i olkhazarsha duush. Diytsa tkhuna i tidarkh. Bakq'alla a, tkhuna ḥo go dikacharakh".
12:37: Tso elira: "Shushinna t'e shuna baosh bolu qacha qochur ma bats as shuna tsünan tidarkh düytsush ben i shüga qachale. I du shuna san Qiosh-Qobucho suna ʿamiynachukh. As ditina sha Delakh tsateshachu‚ sha ekhartana kersta dolchu q'oman din.
12:38: So t'äḥaväzna san dayn Ibrahximan‚ Isḥaq'an‚ Yaʿq'uban dinna. Tkhan tsa khilla tsḥana a hxumantsa Delatsa naq'ost latsar. I Delan komärshallakh du tkhuna a‚ nakhana a. Delaḥ a, duqakhbolchu nakha barkalla tsa olu.
12:39: Hxay san nabakhtin shi naq'ost! Tayp-taypana delanash bu dika ya Sha tsḥaʾ volu‚ nütsq'ala volu Allahx-Dela vu?
12:40: I votschunna ash shayna ʿibadat diyrig ekq'a ts'ersh ma yu‚ ash shäsh a, shun daysha a tekhkina yolu‚ tsärtsa tsḥa a delil Dala dossiyna ma dats. Ḥukma Delan ben ma dats. Tso omra dina, Shena ben ʿibadat ma de‚ älla. I du niysa din‚ delaḥ a, duqakhbolchu nakhana tsa khäa-q.
12:41: Hxay san nabakhtin shi naq'ost! Shushinnakh tsḥamma shen elana chaġar malor du‚ tq'a vazha irkhʾullur vu‚ tsünan körta t'era /mezhenash/ olkhazarsha yuur yu. Qochushkhili ġullaq‚ ash shekh lätsna khöttush dolu".
12:42: Tso elira shena tsarakh k'elḥarver vu khetachünga: "Ḥayn elana gergaḥ so ḥakhavelaḥ". Shayt'ano ditsdaliytira tsunna shen ele i ḥakhavar. T'akqa i visira nabakhti choḥ tsḥa masiytta sharaḥ.
12:43: /Misran/ pachchaḥo elira: "Suna go vorhx berstina ett vorhx ozachara buush‚ vorhx bätstsara kan‚ qibersh - baq'abella. Hxay eliy! Tidal suna san ġan, shäsh ġenash tüdush khilleḥ".
12:44: Tsara elira: "Vovshakh iyna ġenash dara üsh-m. Tkho /ishtta/ ġenash tida khuush dats".
12:45: Tsu shinnakh k'elḥaravällacho elira‚ tsḥa khan yalcha dagadeara tsunna: "As düytsur du shuna iza tidarkh‚ so vakhiyta /ġenash tüdurg valo/".
12:46: "Yusuf! Hxay baq'lüysh verg! Satsam be tkhuna /ġan tidartsa/ vorhx berstinchu attakh‚ vorhx ozacho shäsh buush bolchu‚ vorhx bätstsarchu kenakh a‚ qibolchu baq'abellacharakh a. So yukhaverza magara nakhana t'e‚ tsarna khaa a magara".
12:47: Tso (Yusufa, ġan tüdush) elira: "Vorhx sharaḥ t'ett'a ash dika yalta düyr du‚ shäsh chuderziynarg – ditalash iza kenashkaḥ, shäsh duur dolu /tsḥa/ k'ezzig dotsurg.
12:48: T'akqa tsul t'äḥa vorhx khala (sho) doġur du: tsara duur du ash tsarna ḥalkha kechdinarg, ash ʿalashder dolchukh /tsḥa/ k'ezzig dotsurg.
12:49: T'akqa tsul t'äḥa tsḥa sho doġur du‚ shena choḥ nakhana alssam doġa doġur dolush‚ shena choḥ tsara (nakha) dokqur dolush /chaġar a, mutt a, dätta a/".
12:50: Pachchaḥo elira: "Suna t'evalave iza (Yusuf)". Shena t'evakhiytinarg veʾcha‚ tso (Yusufa) elira: "Ḥada, yukhaverza ḥayn elana t'e‚ khatta tsünga: "Hxun bāla bu shayn küygash khediynchu zudariyn (hxun khilira shchayn küygash khediynachu zudarekh)? Bakq'alla a, san Qiosh – Qoburg tseran (tsu zudariyn) mekarlonash khuush ma vu".
12:51: Tso (elo) elira /zudarshka/: "Hxun ġullaq dara shun‚ shu i Yusuf ʿekho ġertar?" Tsara elira: "Dala lardoyla! Tkhuna tsa khii tsunakh tsḥa a vonig". Elan zudcho elira: "Hxintsa guchadälla baq'derg. So ġörtira i ʿekho‚ i baq'lüycharakh vu.
12:52: Iza /olu as/ – tsunna khaarḥama as shena q'aylakha teshnabekhk bina tsakhilar, Dela a vuyla nis tsa esh teshnabekhk besh bolcheran mekarlo.
12:53: As ts'an tsa do san sa‚ bakq'alla a, sino vonig ḥökhu san Qiosh-Qobucho q'inkhetam binarg dotsurg‚ bakq'alla a, san Qiosh-Qoburg sov gechdiyrig a vu‚ q'inkhetame verg a vu".
12:54: Pachchaḥo elira: "Suna t'evalave iza. As sayna /ġöncha/ vütur vu iza". Tsüntsa shen q'amel khilcha‚ tso elira: "Ḥo takhana tkhuna gergaḥ ch'oġa verg a vu‚ teshame verg a vu".
12:55: Tso (Yusufa) elira: "So makhkan khaznashna t'ehxottave‚ so ʿalashdiyrig a vu‚ khuurg a vu".
12:56: Ishtta ch'aġvira Okha Yusuf makhkaḥ‚ shena luuchoḥ vakha oḥa a khuush. Tkhan q'inkhetamakh qiavo Okha Tkhayna luurg‚ dikacheran yal tsa eshayo Okha.
12:57: Tq'a bakq'alla a, ekhartan yal tölush ma yu iyman dillincharna‚ /Delakh/ qörush khillacharna.
12:58: Yusufan vezhariy bäkhkira‚ i volchu chöḥa bevlira üsh‚ tsunna üsh bevzira‚ tsarna iza tsa vevzira.
12:59: Sha üsh shayn ġirsatsa kechbinchul t'äḥa‚ tso elira: "Shayn den aġorḥara /qechu nanas vina/ volu shayn vasha valave suna t'e. Shuna tsa go: as niysa qochushbo baram‚ so shena /shu/ t'edussucharakh dikanig vu.
12:60: Ash suna i tsa valavaḥ – shuna baram bats san gergaḥ‚ suna gerga ma düylalash".
12:61: Tsara (Yusufan vezharsha) elira: "Okha shen degara, ʿekhiyna, valor vu iza. Bakq'alla a, okha /qochush/diyr du".
12:62: Shen yalkhoshka tso (Yusufa) elira: "Tseran hxumanash shayn kiraniy chu dʿaekhka: shayn dözalna t'ebirzicha, tsarna üsh yovza megara‚ üsh yukha sḥa ban megara".
12:63: Shayn dena t'e yukhabirzicha, tsara elira: "Hxay dada! /K'an/ baram dukhatökhna tkhokh‚ i tkhan vasha vaiyta tkhötsa – baram biyr bu okha‚ tkho tsunna lardarkhoy khir du".
12:64: Tso (Yaʿq'uba) elira: "I shukh teshna vütur variy as‚ ḥalkha tsünan vasha shukh teshorakh terra? Dela vu-q dika lardarkho. I vu-q uggar q'inkhetame verg".
12:65: Shayn kiranash sḥadillicha‚ tsarna kariyra shayn hxumanash shayga yukhayaiytina. Tsara elira: "Hxay dada! Hxun lökhu vay? Vayn hxumanash yukhayaiytina vayga! Vayn ts'iynan ohxla a qobur yara yuuchüntsa‚ tkhan vasha a ʿalashviyr vara‚ alsambokqur bara okha baram tsḥana emkalna. I baram atta bu-q".
12:66: Tso (Yaʿq'uba) elira: "As vanne a voüytur ma vats i shütsa‚ ash suna Delatsa ch'aġo tsa yaḥ, shäsh suna sḥavalor vu iza‚ älla‚ shaykh tsḥa hxuma tsa khilaḥ". Tsara shena duy biʾcha‚ tso elira: "Dela vu-q vay düytsuchunna vekal (tesh)".
12:67: /Yaʿq'uba/ elira: "Hxay san k'entiy! Tsḥana neʿarekhula chu ma ġolash. Tayp-taypana neʿarshkakhula chu ġolash. Shu hxumma k'elḥardakha tsa lo suna Delera. Ḥukma Tsüngaḥ ben dats. Tsunna t'etevzhina so. Tsunna t'etevzhiyla shäsh tevzhash bersh".
12:68: Üsh chu bäkhkicha, shayn das shayga omra dinchukhula, i tsa khillera tsarakh Delera hxumma k'elḥaradakqa‚ dekq'a Yaʿkuban shegaḥ tsḥa ḥasht ben – tso i qochushdira. Bakq'alla a, i ʿilma dolush verg vu Okha shena ʿamiynachunna. Delaḥ a, duqakhbolchu nakhana tsa khäa-q.
12:69: Üsh Yusuf volchu chu bäkhkicha‚ tso shen vasha shena t'eiytsira‚ elira: "Bakq'alla a, so ḥan vasha vu. Aḥ sa ma ḥiyzade tsara desh khillachüntsa".
12:70: Sha tsarna kechbinchul t'äḥa tseran kecham‚ shen veshin moḥa chu kad billira tso. T'akqa qoyqucho qayqira: "Hxay kovra (q'epal)! Shu q'uy du!"
12:71: Tsara (vezharsha) elira‚ shäsh tsarna t'ebäkhkina: "Hxun yayna shun?"
12:72: Tsara elira: "Pachchaḥan kad bayna tkhan‚ i sḥabeʾnachunna tsḥana emkalan moḥ bu. As dosh lo tsunna t'era".
12:73: Tsara (vezharsha) elira: "Vallahxi‚ shuna ma-khaʾara‚ tkho lättaḥ vonig dan däkhkina ma datsara‚ q'uy ma datsara tkho".
12:74: Tsara elira: "Hxun beqam khir bu tsünan‚ nagaḥ sanna shu khartslüysh khilleḥ?"
12:75: Elira /vezharsha/: "Tsünan beqam – shen moḥa choḥ i kariynarg – i sha vu tsünan beqam. Ishtta beqam bo okha zulamkhoshna".
12:76: I volavelira /yayna hxuma lakha/ tseran kiranashkara shen veshin kiranal ḥalkha‚ t'akqa i /kad/ sḥabäkqira tso shen veshin kiranna chüra. Ishtta hxilla ʿamiyra Okha Yusufna. Shen vasha sḥalotsiyla (bukhasatsoyla) datsara tsünan /ishtta a ben/ pachchaḥan dineḥ, Dalla liʾcha a ben. Tkhayna luurg darzhashkaḥ laqavokqu Okha. Masso shegaḥ ʿilma dolchunna t'eḥ a (tsul sov) ʿilma derg vu (Dalla t'eqachchalts – Iza vu masso a hxuma Shena khuurg).
12:77: Tsara elira: "Tso lachq'iyna belaḥ‚ ḥalkha tsünan vashas a lachq'iyra". I shegaḥ ḥuldira Yusufa‚ tsarna guchu tsa däkqira‚ elira /sha-shega/: "Shu du-q /tkhol/ vuno vochu ḥoleḥ. Dela dika khuush vu-q ash hxottosh dolu surt".
12:78: Tsara elira: "Hxay veza ela! Tsünan da vu vokqa q'ena stag‚ tkhokh tsḥaʾ bukhasatsaveḥa tsünan metta‚ tkhuna ḥo dikacharakh gush ma vu".
12:79: Tso elira: "Dala lardoyla okha tkheshan hxuma shegaḥ kariynarg ben satsatsavarkh! T'akqa tkho zulamkhoy khir ma dariy".
12:80: Shäsh tsunakh dog dillicha‚ vovshashtsa dagabüylush shäsh bisira üsh. Tsarakh vokqacho elira: "Shuna khäiy shayn das shayga Delatsa ch'aġo yaytina khilar‚ ash ḥalkha Yusufan ḥoq'eḥ ledarlo yaliytira. So hxoqu lättara (makhkara) dʿaġur vats san das suna purba laḥ ben‚ ya Dala suna ḥukma daḥ ben. Iza ḥukma decharakh dikanig vu.
12:81: Shu yukhaderza shayn dena t'e‚ ash āla: "Dada! Ḥan k'anta q'ola dina‚ okha teshalla dina ma dats tkhayna khuush khillachukh ben‚ tkho tsa khilla q'aylakh derg ʿalashdesh a (tkhuna tsa khäa q'aylakh derg).
12:82: Khatta ḥayna tkho khillachu yurte a‚ tkho shetsa däkhkinchu kovre a. Bakq'alla a, tkho baq'lüysh dersh ma du-q".
12:83: Tso (Yaʿq'uba) elira: "Hxaʾ! Shun sinosha tsḥa ġullaq khazdina shuna. Sobar du-q /suna/ t'ekh dika. Dala üsh berrige a sḥabalo mega suna. Bakq'alla a, Iza – khuush verg a vu‚ ḥukma /niysa / desh verg a vu-q".
12:84: Tsarakh dʿavirzira iza‚ elira: "Ma lazam bu-q sögaḥ Yusuf baḥaneḥ". Singattamna k'aybelira tsünan bʿärgash. I satukhush vara.
12:85: Tsara (Yaʿq'uban gonaḥ bolchara) elira: "Vallahxi‚ Yusuf vüytsuchura ḥo sotsur ma vats ḥuo tsomgush khillalts ya hxallaqillalts".
12:86: Tso (Yaʿq'uba) elira: "As Dele balkhabo sayn bāla a‚ sayn ġayġa a‚ suna khäa Delera shuna tsakhuurg a.
12:87: Hxay san k'entiy! Ġo‚ t'eqialash Yusufakh a, tsünan veshikh a /khillachunna/. Delan q'inkhetamakh dog ma dillalash. Delan q'inkhetamakh dog düllur ma dats /Delakh/ tsateshachu q'omo a ben".
12:88: Shäsh i (Yusuf) volchu bäkhkicha‚ tsara elira: "Hxay veza ela! Tkho a‚ tkhan /ts'iynan/ ohxla a ġayġano lätsna. Tkho däkhkina tsḥa k'ezg-mezg /yokhka/ hxumanash yoḥush – qacham bollush baram loḥa tkhuna‚ saġa a loḥa tkhuna. Dala yal lur ma yu saġa lucharna".
12:89: Tso (Yusufa) elira: "Shuna khiʾniy‚ shäsh hxun dira Yusufana a‚ tsünan veshina a‚ shäsh zhehxal dolush?"
12:90: Tsara elira: "Bakq'alla a, ḥo vuy Yusuf?!". Tso elira: "So Yusuf a vu, hxara san vasha a vu. Dala q'inkhetam bina tkhokh. Bakq'alla a, /Delakh/ qörush verg a‚ sobar desh verg a /deq'al vu-q/. Bakq'alla a, Dala tsa eshayo dikacheran yal".
12:91: Tsara elira: "Vallahxi‚ Dala tkhol vazvina ḥo‚ tkho khilla-q ġalatdevllarsh!"
12:92: Tso elira: "Bekhk tsa bokqu shüga takhana. Dala gechdiyr du shuna. Iza uggare q'inkhetame verg ma vu.
12:93: Dülo‚ dʿaġo hxara san koch a etsiy, san den yuḥ t'e tasa i – bʿärsa yukhadoġur du tsünan. Berrige shayn dözal balosh, suna t'e düyla".
12:94: Kovra (q'epal) arayalcha‚ tseran das (Yaʿq'uba) elira: "Bakq'alla a, Yusufan ḥozha yoġush vu-q so‚ ash so ʿovdal ma laraḥara".
12:95: Tsara elira: "Vallahxi‚ ḥayn ḥalkhalerchu tilar choḥ vu-q ḥo!"
12:96: Qaʾ bokqurg veʾcha, tso i (Yusufan koch) tesira tsünan (Yaʿq'uban) yuḥ t'e – tsünan bʿärsa yukhadeara‚ tso elira: "As tsa ällera shüga: suna Delera shuna tsakhuurg a khäa".
12:97: Tsara (Yusufan vezharsha) elira: "Tkhan da! Tkhan q'inoshna (Dele) gechdar dekhaḥa tkhuna‚ tkho khilla-q ġalatdevlla".
12:98: Tso elira: "T'äḥa dökhur du as san Qiosh-Qobuchünga shuna gechdar. Bakq'alla a, Iza – sov gechdiyrig a vu‚ sov q'inkhetame verg a vu".
12:99: Üsh Yusuf volchu chubäkhkicha‚ shen da-nana maradöllira tso‚ elira: "Chöḥa dovla Misra‚ Dala muq'alaḥ‚ märsha (tsḥa a qeram a botsush)!"
12:100: Shen da-nana pachchaḥan ġanta t'e /shena ullo/ ḥalabekhira tso‚ üsh tsunna /siy desh/ suzhude bakhara. Tso elira: "Dada‚ hxara du-q suna ḥalkha ginchun (ġenan) tidar‚ san Qiosh-Qobucho baq'dina iza‚ sötsa dika khili Iza– so araväkqi nabakhti chüra‚ shu sḥadaliyna ġum-arara shayt'ano suna a, san vezharshna a yuq'a dov tesnachul t'äḥa. Bakq'alla a, san Qiosh-Qoburg t'ekh t'ekare vu-q Shena luuchüntsa. Iza khuush verg a vu‚ ḥukma /niysa / desh verg a vu".
12:101: (T'akqa Dele doʿa dan vüylira Yusuf): "So Qiosh-Qobush volu san Dela‚ Aḥ pachchaḥalla a della suna‚ khillarsh-khindersh (ġenash) tida a ʿamiyna Aḥ so. Stiglanash a‚ latta a qöllinarg – Ḥo vu-q san doladiyrig dünenaḥ a‚ ekhartaḥ a. Aḥ so valiytalaḥ busalba (Ḥayna müt'aḥ) a volush‚ Aḥ so tokhalaḥ dikacharakh!"
12:102: I ḥulameḥ dolchu khabarekh du‚ Okha ḥöga /hxay Muḥammad/ khoüytush väḥitsa. Ḥo vatsara tsärtsa tsara shayn ġullaqna t'eḥ bart besh, shäsh /Yusuf shen dekh dʿaq'asto / mekarlo esh bolush.
12:103: Duqakhbolu nakh, ḥuna mel liʾcha a, teshar bats /Delakh/.
12:104: Aḥ tsärga tsu t'eḥ makh tsa bökhu. Iza bekq'a ḥekham bu–q ʿalamashna!
12:105: Stiglanashkaḥ a‚ lättaḥ a mel duqa ʿalamatekh t'ekhbovlu üsh‚ tsarakh dʿabörzush /oyla a tsa esh/!
12:106: Tsarakh duqakhbersh Delakh tsa tesha, shäsh /Tsüntsa/ naq'ost lotsush a ben.
12:107: Üsh teshna bu-te shayna t'e Delan ʿazapan sharshu t'equllurg tsakhilarkh‚ ya ts'ekhḥana shayna t'e saḥt hxottarkh‚ shayna khaa a tsa lush?
12:108: Aḥ āla: "Hxara bu san neq'‚ as Dele qoyqu‚ bilgala dolchu ʿilmanna t'eḥ vu so a‚ suna t'äḥahxöttinarg a‚ vochukh ts'ena vu i Dela‚ so ma vats /Delatsa/ naq'ost lotsucharakh".
12:109: Ḥol ḥalkha a yartashkarchu nakhakh bozhariy ben tsa bakhiytira Okha‚ shayga väḥitsa Okha khaam lush. Tq'a üsh tsa lelara lättakhula‚ üsh tsa ḥävsira‚ mukha khilla shayl ḥalkha khillacheran t'äḥe? Ekhartan ts'a tölush ma du /Delakh/ qiyrincharna. Shu ḥeq'ale tsa khülu?
12:110: Elchanasha dog dillinchul t'äḥa‚ tsarna shäsh khartsbina bevlla möttinchul t'äḥa‚ Tkhan ġo doġura tsärga‚ k'elḥarbovlura Tkhuna /k'elḥarabakha/ luursh. Tkhan nitsq' bukhatukhur ma bats q'inosh dinchu nakhakh.
12:111: Tsarakh lätsna diytsar choḥ ḥekham khilla ḥeq'al dolcharna. I khilla dats qöllina khabar – i du shel ḥalkha khillarg baq'dar a‚ masso a hxumanan q'astadar a‚ niysa neq' a‚ q'inkhetam a teshash bolchu nakhana.
13:1: Alif-lam-mim-ra. Hxorsh zhaynin ayatash du. Ḥöga ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchüngara dossinarg – baq'derg du‚ delaḥ a, duqakhbolu nakh tsa tesha.
13:2: Dela vu sha stiglanash ayyinarg shuna gush ġortorash a yotsush‚ t'akqa sha dʿanisvella Iza ʿarsha t'eḥ. Malkh a‚ butt a müt'aḥ bina Tso /Shen len ġullaqashna/ – derrige dʿasalela /shen/ tökhnachu khene. Ġullaqna urkhalla do Tso‚ ayatash bilgaldokhu Tso. Shu shayn Qiosh-Qobuchunna düḥalqetarkh /doggakh/ tesha megar-qa.
13:3: Iza vu latta darzhiynarg‚ tsu t'eḥ lämnash a‚ khish a khiliytinarg‚ masso a stömekh tsunna (lätta) t'eḥ Tso khiliytina shishsha taypa. Büysane de ḥuldoytu Tso. Bakq'alla a, tsu choḥ delilash du oyla echu nakhana.
13:4: Lättaḥ ul-ulloḥ daq'osh du‚ kemsiyn boshmash yu‚ yalta du‚ khurmanash yu tsḥana oraman a‚ tsḥana oraman yotsursh a‚ tsḥa khi du tsarna düllush derg. Tsarakh tsḥaersh vuqaral yazʾyina Okha yaareḥ. Bakq'alla a, tsu choḥ delilash du-q ḥeq'al dolchu nakhana.
13:5: Ḥo tsetsvalaḥ‚ tsetsvokqush du tseran deshnash: "Tkhokh latta khilcha, kerlachu qollarna choḥ khir du tkho (yukha a denlur du tkho)?" Üsh bu shayn Qiosh-Qobuchunna kerstanalla dinarsh‚ tseran logekh /tesna q'ematdiynaḥ/ ġömash (burzhalsh) khir du‚ üsh /zhözhakhatin/ ts'eran day bu‚ tsu choḥ üsh guttar lättar bu.
13:6: Ḥo sikhvesh vu tsara vochüntsa dikachul ḥalkha. Tsaral ḥalkha a dʿadakhna masale taʿzarsh. Bakq'alla a, ḥan Qiosh-Qoburg Shegaḥ nakhana gechdar dolush vu, tseran zulamashka a tsa ḥözhush. Bakq'alla a‚ ḥan Qiosh-Qoburg ch'oġanig a vu beqamtsa.
13:7: Tsateshachara olu: "Shen Qiosh-Qobuchüngara tsḥa delil dossiyneḥara tsünga!" Ḥo dʿakhoüyturg vu. Hxor q'oman ḥekhamkho vu.
13:8: Dalla khäa hxor stechu diynato /kiyraḥ/ lelorg‚ beran ts'iynan gatdalar a‚ shordalar a. Masso a hxuma Tsunna gergaḥ /shen/ baramtsa du.
13:9: Ḥulameḥ derg a‚ guchoḥ derg a khuush verg a‚ vokqa verg a‚ laqavällarg a vu Iza.
13:10: /Tsu Dalla/ tsḥabossa vu shukh dosh q'ayladäkqinarg a‚ i guchoḥ ditinarg a‚ sha busa ḥullush verg a‚ diynaḥ dʿasalelash verg a.
13:11: Tsunna (adamna) ḥalkhakhula a‚ t'eḥakhula a tsüntsa tsḥäna dʿasalelash dersh du‚ shäsh i ʿalashvesh Delan omratsa. Bakq'alla a, Dala nakhakh dolchukh hxumma a tsa khüytsu, tsara shäsh shaykh derg khiytstsalts. Dalla nakhana vonig liʾcha, tsunna dukhatokhar dats‚ I votsurg urkhalcha ma vats tsarna.
13:12: I vu shuna qeramtsiy‚ dogdakhartsiy tq'es goytush verg‚ Tso qiayo eza markhash.
13:13: Tsunna khastam bartsa tasbiḥ do stigal q'ovq'aro. Malikasha a /do Dalla tasbiḥ/ Tsunakh qerartsa. Stelakhäshtigash ökhüytu Tso‚ üsh Shena luuchunna t'etukhu, üsh Delan ḥoq'eḥ q'üysush a bolush. Iza – nitsq'atsa ch'oġanig vu.
13:14: Tsünga du baq'dolchun qayqar. I votschünga qoyqush bersh – tsḥanna a hxumantsa tsarna zhop lur dats tsara‚ üsh tera bu khi t'e genara küygash qovdinchukh i shen baga qachiyta – tq'a iza tsa qochu tsünga. Tsateshacheran /shayn delashka/ qayqar ma dats tilar choḥ ben.
13:15: Dalla suzhud desh vu stiglanashkaḥ a‚ lättaḥ a mel verg, luush a, tsa luush a. Tseran ʿindaġash a /du Tsunna suzhud desh/ ʿüyranna a‚ süyranna a.
13:16: Āla /hxay Muḥammad/: "Mila vu stigaliyn a‚ lättan a Ela?" Āla: "Dela vu". Āla: "Tq'a, Iza a vütiy, /ʿibadat dan qin/ naq'ostiy lötsu ash‚ shayn doġmashna a payda a‚ ya zen shaygaḥ dotsu?" Āla: "Tsḥaterra vuy tq'a bʿärzenig a‚ bʿärsaderg a‚ ya tsḥaterra duy tq'a bodanash a‚ nur a?" Ya tsara Dalla naq'ostiy khiliytina‚ shäsh /khalq'/ qöllina, Tso qollarkh terra - tsarna i khalq'akh tardella? Aḥ āla: "Masso a hxumanan qollarkho vu Dela. I sha tsḥaʾ verg a‚ nitsq' alssam berg a vu".
13:17: Tso dossiyna stiglara khi – ʿovrash ikhira khershanashkakhula shayn barameḥ‚ ʿovrasha dʿayaḥira ayyella chopa. Tsara ts'ergaḥ khazallash ya qin hxumanash esh yagaechukh a chopa yu tsunakh terra. Ishtta dalado Dala baq'dolchun a‚ khartsdolchun a masal. Chopa erna dʿaġo‚ tq'a nakhana payda besh derg lättaḥ düsu. Ishtta dalado Dala masalsh.
13:18: Shen Qiosh-Qobuchunna zhop dellacharna khazanig du - (yalsamani). Tsunna zhop tsadellacharna lättaḥ mel derg khilcha a‚ tsüntsa qin tsul a‚ i tsunakh (Delan ʿazapakh k'elḥardovla) dʿalur ma dara tsara. Ma von ḥesap du-q tsarna! Tseran chuġoyla zhözhakhati yu. Von (dʿavüzhu) mott bu i!
13:19: Tq'a ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchüngara ḥöga dossinarg baq'derg duyla khuush verg bʿärsa dotsuchukh tera vu? Bakq'alla a‚ dagadoüytu ḥeq'al dolchara‚
13:20: shäsh qochushʾesh bolchara Delan vaʿda‚ tsa bokhosh bolchara bart‚
13:21: shäsh vovshakhtosush bolchara Dala vovshakhtasa älla omra dinarg a‚ shayn Delakh qöruchara a‚ vochu ḥesapakh larluchara a.
13:22: Shäsh sobar dinachara a shayn Qiosh-Qobuchun yuḥ ezash‚ lamaz hxottiynachara a‚ Okha shayna dellachu ritsq'akh a q'aylakha a‚ guchaḥ a kharzh yinachara‚ shäsh vonig dikachüntsa dukhatukhush bolchara a‚– tsarna yu-q dakharan t'äḥe -
13:23: ʿadnan boshmash. Tsarna chuġur bu üsh a‚ tseran daykh a‚ zudarekh a‚ zürretakh a dika ʿamal mel yinarg a. Malikash t'edoġur du tsarna masso a neʿarekhula /olush/:
13:24: "Marsho yu shuna ash sobar darna". Ma dika yu dakharan t'äḥe!
13:25: Shäsh Delatsa khilla vaʿda, i ch'aġdinchul t'äḥa, dokhosh bolcharna‚ Dala vovshakhtasa ällarg khedosh bolcharna‚ lättaḥ bökhanig darzhosh bolcharna – tsarna neʿalt du‚ tsarna von ts'a du.
13:26: Dala ritsq' qovdado Shena luuchunna /shortta/‚ baram a bo. Bakqiybe üsh dünenan dakharkh. Dünenan dakhar ma dats, ekhartatsa düsticha, tsḥa hxümalg ben.
13:27: Tsateshnachara olu: "Tsünga (Muḥammade) dossiyna khilleḥara shen Qiosh-Qobuchüngara tsḥa delil". Aḥ āla: "Bakq'alla a, Dala tilavala vütu Shena luurg‚ Tso nis ma vo Shena t'e sha virzinarg.
13:28: Iyman dillinarsh a‚ shayn degnashna Dela ḥekhavartsa sintem khillarsh a /nisbo Dala niysachu novq'a/‚ tq'a Dela ḥekhavartsa tsa khülu degnashna sintem?
13:29: Iyman dillincharna‚ dika ʿamalsh yincharna – zovq ḥegar a du‚ khaza chuġoyla a yu".
13:30: Ishtta vakhiytira Okha ḥo ummatna yukq'e – tsul (shun ummatal) ḥalkha a dʿadakhara ummatash – aḥ tsarna desharḥama Okha ḥayga väḥitsa dellarg, üsh Q'inkhetam bolchunna kerstanalla desh a bolush. Aḥ āla: "Iza san Qiosh-Qoburg vu‚ I votsurg qin dela vats‚ Tsunna t'etevzhina so‚ Tsünga du san tōba dar".
13:31: Q'urʾantsa lämnash lelleḥara‚ ya latta khediyneḥara‚ ya tsüntsa bellarsh bistkhilleḥara /iza Delan omra khir dara – t'akqa a iyman düllur datsara tsara/. Hxaʾ. Delan du-q ġullaq derrige a. Tq'a iyman dillincharna (hxintsa a) tsa khäa‚ Dalla laaḥara, nakh berrige a Tso nisbina khirg khilar? Tsateshachara shäsh dinarg baḥaneḥ tsarna t'e tsa bussush tsa sotsu bāla‚ ya tseran ts'iynan ulloḥ /bussu/ i Delan vaʿda dallalts. Bakq'alla a, Dala tsa dokhado /Shen/ vaʿda.
13:32: Ḥol ḥalkha a (hxay Muḥammad) siysazbina elchanash‚ As khan ella bitira tsatesharsh‚ t'akqa As /ʿazaptsa/ sḥaletsira üsh. Mukha khilira San taʿzar?!
13:33: Tq'a I Sha hxor sinna tso shena karadinchüntsa T'ehxöttinarg /tera vu qecharakh/? Dalla naq'ostiy khiliytina tsara. Aḥ āla: "Ts'ersh yakha tseran! Ya ash Tsünga düytsur du Tsunna lättaḥ tsakhuurg ya t'ekhula (desa) dolu dosh du /i ash düytsurg/?" Hxaʾ‚ khazdina tsateshacharna shayn hxilla‚ /niysachu/ neq'akh bäkhna üsh. Dala tilavala vitinchunna tsḥa a bächcha vats /i nisvalur volush/.
13:34: Tsarna dünenan dakhareḥ a ʿazap du‚ tq'a ekhartan ʿazap qin a khala du. Ma vats tsarna shäsh Delakh (Tsünan ʿazapakh) lardan tsḥa a.
13:35: /Delakh/ qörucharna vaʿda dina dolchu /shen ġalaniyn/ bukhakhula khish ökhush yolchu beshan surt du: tsünan daar guttar a du‚ tsünan ʿindaġa a /guttar du/. I du /Delakh/ qörush khillacharna khinderg. Tsateshacharna khinʾerg /zhözhakhatin/ ts'e yu!
13:36: Okha shayga zhayna dellarsh baqiybesh bu ḥöga dossiynachukh. (Ḥuna düḥalyevllachu mushrikekh a, zhügtekh a lättash khillachu) tobanekh yu tsünan (Q'urʾanan) tsḥadolchunna inkarlo esh yerg a. Aḥ āla: "Suna omra dina as Dalla ʿibadat dan a‚ Tsüntsa naq'ost tsa latsa a. As Tsünga qoyqu‚ Tsünga du san dʿaverzar a".
13:37: Ishtta dossiyra Okha i (Q'urʾan) ʿärbiyn /mattaḥ/ ḥukma khilla. Ḥo tseran dezarshna t'äḥahxottaḥ ḥayga ʿilma deʾnachul t'äḥa – Deleḥara tsḥa a vali a vats ḥuna‚ tsḥa a lardarkho a vats.
13:38: Ḥol ḥalkha a (hxay Muḥammad) elchanash bakhiytira Okha‚ tsarna zudariy a‚ zürret a khiliytira Okha. /Tarlur/ datsara tsḥanna elchanna ayat daiyta Delan purbantsa a ben. Hxor khanna a shen zhayna du.
13:39: Dala Shena luurg doyʾu‚ /Shena luurg/ ch'aġ a do. Tsüngaḥ zhaynin nana yu.
13:40: Ya Okha gayticha a ḥöga Okha tsarna vaʿda dinchukh tsḥadersh‚ ya Okha ḥo valiyticha a /üsh gaytale/ – ḥuna t'eḥ /ḥayga Dala dellarg nakhe/ dʿakhaiytar du‚ Tkhuna t'eḥ ḥesap dar du.
13:41: Tsarna tsa go-te Okha latta zhim-zhimma eshosh khilar shen yistashkara /busalbanasha mushrikiyn mekhkash sḥabokhush shaynacharekh tukhush/? Dala do ḥukma‚ Tsünan ḥukmana novq'arlo en yerg ma vats. I vu ḥesapeḥ sikha verg.
13:42: Tsaral ḥalkha khillachara a mekarlo yira‚ Deleḥ yu mekarlo errige a /nekhan mekarlonash yokho nitsq'/. Tsunna khäa hxor sinna karadesh derg. T'akqa khuur du kerstanashna‚ ḥanna qochur yu /ekhartaḥ khir yolu khastame/ hxusam.
13:43: Tsateshachara olu: "Ḥo vaiytinarg vats (ḥo elcha vats)"‚ aḥ āla: "Qachame du Dela tesh khilar a suna a, shuna a yukq'eḥ‚ shegaḥ zhaynin ʿilma derg a".
14:1: Alif-lam-ra. Zhayna du /hxara/‚ Okha sha ḥöga dossiyna dolu, ḥöga nakh bodanashkara serlonga arabakhiytarḥama shayn Qiosh-Qobuchun purbantsa, Sha veza volchun‚ Sha khastame volchun novq'a‚
14:2: Delan /novq'a/‚ stiglanashkaḥ a‚ lättaḥ a mel derg Shen dolchu. Bāla bu-q tsateshacharna ch'oġachu ʿazapakh.
14:3: Ishttanash bu üsh shayna dünenan dakhar ekhartal t'ekh duqa dezash‚ Delan neq'akh /nakh/ dʿatöttush, i gamban ġertash, – üsh genarchu tilar choḥ ma bu.
14:4: Okha tsa vaiytina tsḥa a elcha shen q'oman mattaḥ ben tsünga tsarna bilgaldakqiytarḥama. Shena luurg tilavala vütu Dala‚ Shena luurg niysachu novq'a vüllu. I veza verg a‚ Shegaḥ ḥeq'alalla derg a vu.
14:5: Okha Musa vakhiytira Tkheshan ayatashtsa: "Aradakqa ḥayn q'am bodanashkara serlonga‚ dagadaiyta tsarna Delan /niʿmat shayna duqa khilla/ denosh"‚– älla. Bakq'alla a, tsu choḥ delilash du hxor t'ekh sobare volchunna a‚ sov barkalla olush volchunna a.
14:6: Ḥakhade: Musas ällera shen q'ome: "Ash dagadaiyta shayna khilla Delan niʿmat! Tso k'elḥardekhira shu Firʿavnan dözalkh‚ bökha ʿazap shuna t'eḥ hxottosh khilla bolchu‚ shun k'entiy boyʾush‚ shun zudariy diyna bütush (shayna üsh batsorḥama). Tsu choḥ shun Qiosh-Qobuchüngara siylaḥ-dokqa zer du shuna".
14:7: Dagadaiyta: shun Qiosh-Qobucho dʿaqayqira: "Shu barkalle khilcha‚ As sovdokhur du shu /niʿmatashkaḥ/‚ ash /San niʿmatashna/ kerstadicha, San ʿazap ch'oġa du!"
14:8: Musas elira: "Asha a‚ lättaḥ mel volcho a – massara a kerstadaḥ a, – bakq'alla a, i Dela ḥal dolush a vu (hxumma öshush vats)‚ khastame a vu".
14:9: Shüga tsa qächna shul ḥalkha khillacheran – Nuḥan q'oman‚ ʿadiyn‚ Samudiyn a khabar‚ tsaral t'äḥa khillacheran a /khabar/? Dalla a ben tsa khäa üsh. Tsärga bäkhkira shayn elchanash bilgalonashtsa – küygash shayn baga a dukhkiy, tsara olura: "Okha kerstadina shu shetsa daiytinchunna‚ tkho ch'oġachu shekoneḥ du ash tkho shena t'eqoyquchukh".
14:10: Tseran elchanasha elira: "Tq'a Deleḥ /I tsḥaʾ khilareḥ a, derrig ʿibadat Tsunna dareḥ a/ sheko yu‚ stiglanash a‚ latta a qöllina volchu? Tso qoyqu shu shun q'inosh Sha gechdare‚ tökhnachu khanna shu t'äḥatattare". Tsara elira: "Shu ma dats tkho sanna adamash ben‚ shuna läa tkho dʿatatta tkhan day shena ʿibadat desh khillachukh‚ dalade tkhuna bilgala delil".
14:11: Tseran elchanasha tsärga elira: "Tkho-m shu sanna adamash dara‚ delaḥ a, Dala Shen lẽkh Shena luuchunna niʿmat lo. Shuna tsḥa a delil daloyla tsa khilla tkhuna Delan purbantsa a ben‚ Dalla t'etevzhiyla muʾma nakh.
14:12: Tkho hxunda tsa tevzha Dalla t'e – Tso tkho nis ma dina tkheshan neq'ashna t'e‚ okha sobar diyr ma du ash tkhuna yechu khalonashkaḥ‚ Dalla t'etevzhiyla shäsh t'etevzhash bersh! "
14:13: Tsateshachara elira shayn elchanashka: "Okha aradokhur ma du shu tkhan lättara (makhkara) ya shu t'edörzur ma du tkhan dinna ". Tsärga /paykhamarshka/ tseran Qiosh-Qobucho väḥitsa khaiytira: "Hxallakbiyr ma bu Okha zulamkhoy‚
14:14: Okha dākha khovshor ma du shu /paykhamarsh a, tsarna t'äḥabäznarsh a/ lättaḥ tsaral t'äḥa‚ iza du Suna ḥalkha sha dʿahxottarkh qörush volchunna a‚ San taʿzarkh qörush volchunna a".
14:15: Tsara tolam biykhira – iyshira masso a yukhaḥaravälla ʿazapkho.
14:16: Tsünan t'eḥakhula zhözhakhati yu‚ natq'aran khi malor du tsunna.
14:17: Tso q'urdash biyr bu tsunakh‚ amma i khalla ben kiyra dakhiytalur dats tsünga – masso a aġora tsunna t'e valar doġu‚ i vala tsa le‚ tsunna t'eḥakhula lüra ʿazap du.
14:18: Shayn Qiosh-Qobuchukh tsateshnacheran masal du: tseran ʿamalsh ch'oġa mokh bällachu diynaḥ tsu makho barzhiynachu chimakh tera yu. Shayna karadeanchu hxumanna t'eḥ nitsq' bolush bats üsh. Iza du-q genara tilar!
14:19: Ḥuna tsa khiʾna Dala stiglanash a‚ latta a baq'ontsa qöllina khilar? Shena liʾcha, Tso shu dʿadokhur du, kerla khalq' dalor du.
14:20: Dalla deza a (khala hxuma a) dats i.
14:21: Dalla guchubevr bu berrige a /q'ematdiynaḥ/. Ledara khillachara er du kura khillachärga: "Bakq'alla a, tkho dara /dünenaḥ/ shuna t'äḥahxüttush. Shüga dʿayakqaloy tkhuna t'era Delan ʿazapakh hxumma a?" Tsara er du: "Dala tkho nisdineḥara – okha shu a nisdina khir dara. Tkhuna tsḥaterra du: tkhäsh sintem bayna ḥiyzicha a‚ ya tkhäsh sobar desh ʿiycha a, – tkhuna k'elḥardovlar dats".
14:22: Shayt'ano er du /q'ematdiynaḥ/, ġullaq qochush khilcha: "Bakq'alla a, Dala yinera shütsa baq' vaʿda‚ asa a vaʿda yinera shütsa – as teshnabekhk bina shuna. Shuna t'eḥ tsḥa a ḥäkamalla ma datsara san, as shüga qayqar ben – ash suna zhop delira. Suna bekhkash ma bakhka – shayna bekhkash bakhka. San shuna dan ġo a dats‚ shun suna dan ġo a dats. As kerstdina ash so ḥalkha naq'ost lätsna khilar". Bakq'alla a, zulamkhoy - tsarna lazosh dolu ʿazap khir ma du.
14:23: Teshash khillarsh a‚ dika ʿamalsh yinarsh a chubakhiytina khir bu /yalsamanin/ boshmashka‚ shayn bukhakhula khish ökhush dolchu‚ shäsh guttar tsu choḥ khir bolush shayn Delan purbantsa. Tseran marshalla tsu choḥ "Salam" khir du.
14:24: Ḥuna tsa khiʾna‚ mukha masal daliyna Dala khazchu dashtsa? I khazchu dittakh tera du: tsünan oram ch'oġa bu‚ tsünan ga stiglaḥ du.
14:25: Shen daar lo tso masso a khenaḥ shen Qiosh-Qobuchun purbantsa. Dala masalsh dalado nakhana – tsara oyla yiyr yatsara-te!
14:26: Bökhachu deshan masal – bökhachu dittakh tera du‚ sha sḥadäkqina dolchu /oramashtsa/ lätta t'era – ch'aġo yats tsünan.
14:27: Dala ch'aġbo iyman dillinarsh /Dela tsḥaʾvaran/ ch'oġachu dashtsa dünenan dakhareḥ a‚ ekhartaḥ a. Dala tilabala bütu zulamkhoy. Dala do Shena luʾurg.
14:28: Ḥo tsa ḥäzhna /hxay Muḥammad/ shäsh Delan niʿmat kerstanallakh khiytsinchärga? Tsara oḥakhai shayn khalq' hxallaqilaran ts'a chu,
14:29: Zhözhakhati chu, shena choḥ üsh bogur bolu? Ma von yu-q üsh qochu bolu mettig!
14:30: Dalla naq'ostiy khiliytira tsara Tsünan neq'akh /nakh/ tilorḥama. Aḥ āla /tsärga, hxay Muḥammad/: "Zovq ḥega shayna – shun dʿadakhar /zhözhakhatin/ ts'erga du".
14:31: Aḥ āla /hxay Muḥammad/ San iyman dillinchu leshka: lamaz hxottadoyla tsara‚ Okha shayna dellachu ritsq'anakh q'aylakh a‚ guchoḥ a /dikchu aġor/ kharzhash yoyla /Delan novq'aḥ/ shena choḥ yokhka-etsar a‚ dottaġalla a dotsu /q'emat/de dale ḥalkha.
14:32: Dela vu Sha qöllina stiglanash a‚ latta a. Tso daiytina stiglara khi‚ tsüntsa sḥadäkqira Tso (tayp-taypana) stömekh shuna ritsq'. Shuna müt'aḥ dina Tso kemanash leliyta hxorda choḥ Shen omratsa‚ shuna müt'aḥ dina Tso khish.
14:33: Tso müt'aḥ bina shuna malkh a‚ butt a‚ i shiy a, khaddaza (shayn neq'ashkakhula lelash) bolush. Tso müt'aḥ dina shuna büysa a‚ de a.
14:34: Ash Shega dekhnachukh derrige a della Tso shuna. Delan niʿmatash ash dagardaḥ – dagardalur dats üsh shuna. Bakq'alla a, adam t'ekh zulame a‚ barkalla tsa olush a ma du.
14:35: Ḥakhade: Ibrahxima ma ällera: "So Qiosh-Qoburg‚ Aḥ khiliytalaḥ hxara mokhk märsha‚ Aḥ genavakqalaḥ so a, san k'entiy a okha zhaʿarshna ʿibadat darkh.
14:36: So Qiosh-Qoburg‚ bakq'alla a, tsara tila ma bina nakhakh duqabersh. Suna t'äḥahxöttinarg – sokh vu‚ suna ʿesa khillarg, – bakq'alla a, Ḥo t'ekh gechdesh verg a‚ t'ekh q'inkhetame verg a vu-q.
14:37: Tkhan Qiosh-Qoburg! As dākha khaiy san zürretakh tsḥabersh yalta dotschu arengaḥ Ḥan siylaḥ dolchu ts'iyna ulloḥ tsara tsigaḥ, tkhan Qiosh-Qoburg, lamaz hxottorḥama. (Tsḥabolchu) nekhan degnash tsarna t'etevzhash khiliytalaḥ‚ stömekh ritsq' lolaḥ tsarna – tsara barkalla āla tarlora.
14:38: Tkhan Qiosh-Qoburg! Ḥo khuush vu-q okha q'ayladokqurg a‚ okha guchudokqurg a. Delakh q'aylaer yats hxumma lättaḥ a‚ stiglaḥ a.
14:39: Dalla bu khastam‚ suna vokqalleḥ Ismaʿil a‚ Isḥaq' a vellachu! Bakq'alla a, san Qiosh-Qoburg doʿa khezash verg vu-q.
14:40: San Qiosh-Qoburg‚ sokh khiliytalaḥ lamaz hxottosh verg‚ san zürretakh a /khiliytalaḥ dika ʿamalsh esh bersh/. Tkhan Qiosh-Qoburg‚ san doʿa q'obaldelaḥ.
14:41: Tkhan Qiosh-Qoburg‚ gechdelaḥ suna a‚ san dena-nanna a‚ muʾma nakhana a ḥesap hxuttur dolchu /q'emat/ diynaḥ".
14:42: Ḥuna /tsq'a a/ ma mottalaḥ Dela ġopal vu (tergo esh vats) zulamkhosha dechukh. Tso t'äḥatottush bu üsh /ʿazap tsa desh/ shena choḥ bʿärgash q'ärzarbolchu /q'emat/ diyne.
14:43: Sikha ġur bu üsh shayn kortosh aybina‚ shayn bʿäraḥazhar yukhadörzur dats tsärga‚ tseran degnash dassadella khir du/Delan ʿazapakh ch'oġa qerabella/.
14:44: Aḥ qeram tasa /hxay Muḥammad/ nakhana shayga ʿazap doġur dolchu diynatsa‚ shäsh zulam dinachara erig khilar: "Tkhan Qiosh-Qoburg‚ t'äḥatattaḥ tkho yotstsachu khanna – Ḥan qayqamna zhop lur dara okha‚ elchanashna a t'äḥahxüttur dara tkho". Tq'a shu datsara ḥalkha duynash buush shayna dayna dʿadovlar dats, bokhush?
14:45: Shu oḥakhevshira shäsh shayna zulamash dinacheran ġishloshkaḥ‚ shuna guchudelira‚ hxun dina Okha tsarna‚ shuna masalsh daliyra Okha.
14:46: Shayn mekarlo yira tsara. Dalla gergaḥ yu tseran /mekarlo yokho/ mekarlo‚ i tseran mekarlo khilleḥ a shetsa lämnash dokhosh.
14:47: Ḥuna tsq'a a ma mottalaḥ‚ Dela Shen elchanashtsa yolu vaʿda yokhor yolush vu, aliy. Bakq'alla a, Dela veza verg a vu‚ beqam Shegaḥ berg a vu.
14:48: Otsu diynaḥ latta khiytsor du qechu lättatsa‚ stiglanash a /khiytsor yu qechärtsa/ – üsh Sha tsḥaʾ volchu‚ t'ekh nütsq'ala volchu Dalla ḥalkha dʿahxuttur bu.
14:49: Ḥuna gur bu otsu diynaḥ q'inosh dinarsh zʿenashtsa (zʿaynashtsa) dʿabikhkina.
14:50: Tseran bedarsh silamakh /khir yu/‚ tseran yakhḥash ts'ero dʿaḥulyiyr yu.
14:51: Dala beqam barḥama hxor sinna sha karadiynachüntsa. Bakq'alla a, Dela ḥesap dareḥ sikha verg ma vu.
14:52: Hxara khaam bu nakhana‚ tsüntsa tsarna qeram tasarḥama a‚ tsarna khaarḥama a Iza khilar tsḥa Dela‚ ḥeq'aldolchärga oylayaytarḥama a.
15:1: Alif-lam-ra. Üsh /Delan/ zhaynin a, q'eginchu Q'urʾanan a ayatash du.
15:2: Ma luur du tsateshnacharna shäsh busalbanash khilla belḥara älla.
15:3: Bita üsh /hxuma/ yaa a‚ zovq ḥega a, /dakhare/ dogdakharo iymanakh yuq'akhbakha a. T'äḥa khuur du tsarna.
15:4: Tsḥa a yurt /ḥalkha a/ hxallak tsa yina Okha tsunna /hxallaq'yan/ ḥalkhkhe tökhna bilgala khan yolush ben.
15:5: Tsḥa a ummat shena /tökhnachu/ khenal ḥalkhader ma dats‚ t'äḥadüsur a ma dats.
15:6: Tsara elira: "Hxay ḥayga dagadaiytar dossosh khillarg! Ḥo zhinekh ma vu!
15:7: Malikash hxunda tsa dalado aḥ tkhuna‚ ḥuo baq'lüycharakh khilleḥ?"
15:8: Malikash tsa dissado Okha baq'dolchüntsa ben‚ t'akqa üsh /tsateshash bersh ʿazapakh/ t'äaḥatettinarsh khir bats.
15:9: Okha bossiyna i ḥekham (Q'urʾan). Okha i ʿalashbiyr a bu.
15:10: Ḥol ḥalkha a bakhiytina Okha ḥalkhalerachiyn tobanashkaḥ /elchanash/.
15:11: Tsḥa a elcha tsa veana tsärga, tsara iza siysazvesh ben.
15:12: Ishtta düllu Okha iza q'inosh desh bolcheran degnashka.
15:13: Tsunakh tsa tesha üsh. Ishtta dʿadakhna ḥalkhalerachiyn ʿadat a.
15:14: Okha tsarna stiglara neʿ elleḥara‚ üsh büsush tsu chukhula ḥalabovlush,
15:15: Tsara er ma dara: "Tkhan bʿärsa dakhiyna‚ tkho shayna bozbuunchalla dina nakh du".
15:16: Stiglaḥ ġalanash yina Okha, üsh khazyina Okha ḥözhucharna.
15:17: Masso a t'ulgashtsa ekqosh dolchu shayt'anakh i ʿalash a yina Okha.
15:18: Sha q'aylakh laduġush dotsuchukh – tsunna a t'äḥabolu bilgal bolu seda.
15:19: Latta a darzhina Okha‚ tsunna t'eḥ ch'oġa lämnash a döġna, tsunna t'eḥ daliytina Okha hxor baram binchu hxumanakh.
15:20: Okha tsunna t'eḥ bakham khiliytina shuna a‚ ash shayna ritsq' tsa lush khillacharna a /akqaroy, olkhazarsh.../
15:21: Tsḥa a hxuma yats Tkhögaḥ shen khazna yolush ben‚ Okha i oḥa tsa yossayo khuush bolchu baramtsa a ben.
15:22: Okha dakhiytina yalta ḥöq'üytu mekhash‚ stiglara khi dossiyna Okha – i maliyna Okha shuna – shu dats i /dʿadillina/ lattosh.
15:23: Bakq'alla a, Okha den a do‚ Okha dala a dolüytu‚ Tkho du verasash.
15:24: Shukh ḥalkha dʿabevllarsh a bevzina Tkhuna, t'äḥabüsubersh a bevzina.
15:25: Bakq'alla a, ḥan Qiosh-Qoburg – I vu-q üsh gulbiyr bolush. Bakq'alla a, Iza Shegaḥ ḥeq'alalla derg a‚ khuush verg a vu /Shen khalq'eḥ derg/.
15:26: Okha adam qöllira beq'achu (zevnechu), t'edachu popparkh, (bastsa a, ḥozhantsa a) khiytsaluchu.
15:27: Zhinash qöllira Okha qin a /Ādamal/ ḥalkha t'ekh yovkhachu ts'arakh.
15:28: Dagadaiyta: ḥan Qiosh-Qobucho malikashka ällera: "So vollu adam qolla beq'achu (zevnechu), t'edachu popparkh, (bastsa a, ḥozhantsa a) khiytsaluchu.
15:29: As i nisdicha‚ Saygara sikh tsunna chu sa a dillicha, shu iegalash tsunna suzhude".
15:31: Iblis dotscho – i düḥaldelira suzhud dechärtsa khila.
15:32: Tso (Dala) elira: "Hxay Iblis, ḥuna hxun du suzhud dechärtsa tsa khila?"
15:33: Tso (Ibliso) elira: "So tsa khilla suzhud dan adamna‚ Aḥ sha qöllina dolchu beq'achu (zevnechu), t'edachu popparkh, (bastsa a, ḥozhantsa a) khiytsaluchu».
15:34: Tso (Dala) elira: "Aradala tsu /yalsamani/ chüra! Ḥo t'ulgash dettash ekqo dezarg du.
15:35: Ḥuna t'eḥ neʿalt du beqaman de qachchalts".
15:36: Tso (Ibliso) elira: "San Qiosh-Qoburg‚ t'äḥatattaḥ so üsh denbiyr bolchu diyne qachchalts".
15:37: Tso (Dala) elira: "Bakq'alla a, ḥo (dalarkh) t'äḥatettincharakh du
15:39: Tso elira: "San Qiosh-Qoburg‚ Aḥ so tilorna‚ as khazdiyr ma du tsarna (Adaman t'äḥenna) lättaḥ derg /q'inosh dar/‚ as tilor ma bu üsh berrige a
15:41: Tso (Dala) elira: "Hxara bu Suna t'eboġu niysa neq'.
15:42: Bakq'alla a, San lesh – tsarna t'eḥ baq'o yats ḥan! Tilabellacharakh ḥayna t'äḥahxittincharna t'eḥ ben.
15:43: Bakq'alla a, zhözhakhati yu-q tsarna massarna khin yolu (q'astiyna) mettig.
15:44: Tsünan vorhx neʿ yu‚ hxor neʿarna tsarakh q'astiyna dāq'a du / chu bakha/.
15:45: Bakq'alla a, /Delakh/ qörush bersh – boshmashkaḥ a‚ shovdanashkaḥ a khir bu".
15:47: Tseran degnashkaḥ yolu q'izalla dʿayakqira Okha‚ vezhariy khilla‚ mettanashna t'eḥ vovshashna düḥ-düḥal birzina /khir bu üsh/.
15:48: Tsarakh ḥaqalur yats tsu choḥ khalo‚ üsh tsu chüra arabokhur bats.
15:49: Dʿakhaiyta San leshka: "Bakq'alla a, So t'ekh gechdiyrig a vu‚ q'inkhetam biyrig a vu.
15:50: San ʿazap – iza lazosh dolu ʿazap du".
15:52: I volchu bäkhkira üsh‚ elira: "Marshalla". Tso (Ibrahxima) elira: "Bakq'alla a, tkho shukh qörush du".
15:53: Tsara elira: "Ma qera. Okha ḥuna qaʾ bokqu qetame khir volchu k'antatsa".
15:54: Tso elira: "Ash suna qaʾ bäkqina, so q'anallo sḥalätscha? Stentsa qaʾ bokqu ash?"
15:55: Tsara elira: "Baq'dolchüntsa qaʾ bäkqina Okha ḥöga‚ dogdillincharakh ma khilalaḥ".
15:56: Tso elira: "Mülsh bu tq'a shayn Qiosh-Qobuchun q'inkhetamakh dog düllu bersh, shäsh tilabellarsh ben? "
15:57: Elira /Ibrahxima malikashka/: "Hxun du shun ġullaq‚ hxay dakhkiytinarsh? (Hxun ġullaq daḥash dakhkiytina shu Dala?"
15:58: Tsara elira: "Tkho dakhkiytina q'inosh dechu nakhana t'e /tsarna ʿazap dan/,
15:59: Lut'in dözal botsurg – üsh berrige a Okha k'elḥarbokhur bolush bu,
15:60: tsünan tsḥa zuda yotsurg. Okha qiel yina: i bukhabüsucharakh (hxallakben bolcharakh khir) yu".
15:61: I bakhkiytinarsh Lut'in nakhana t'e bäkhkicha,
15:62: tso (Lut'as) elira: "Bakq'alla a, shu (suna) tsa devza nakh du-q".
15:63: Tsara elira: "Amma, tkho ḥo volchu däkhkina üsh shayn sheko khillachüntsa.
15:64: Tkho däkhkina ḥo volchu baq'dolchüntsa – bakq'alla a, tkho baq'lüysh dersh ma du.
15:65: Dʿaġuo ḥayn dözaltsa büysanakh tsḥa daq'a dälcha‚ ḥo a ġuo tsarna t'äkhḥe. Tsḥa a yukha ma ḥozhiyla shukh /zulamkhoshna den dolu ʿazap shayna tsa garḥama i ginchunna a shena i tsa khiliytarḥama/‚ shayga omra dinchu dʿaġuo".
15:66: I ġullaq (Tkhan qiel) tsunna (Lut'ina) dʿakhaiytira Okha: hxoqeran t'äḥe khador yolush yu ʿüyrenga bovlartsa (üsh berrige a hxallakbiyr bolush bu ʿüyranna).
15:68: Tso (Lut'as) elira: "Hxorsh san ḥeshiy bu‚ so siysaza ma velash.
15:69: Delakh qeralash‚ so yuḥʿärzha ma hxottavelash".
15:70: Tsara elira:"Okha bekhkam bina batsara ḥuna masso a nakhakh /khiyra nakh t'e ma latsa, älla ?".
15:71: Tso elira: "Hxorsh san yoʿariy bu shuna‚ shu /bökhanig/ tsa desh tsa ʿaḥ /üsh balabeysh shayna, san ḥeshiy a bitiy/".
15:72: Ḥan dakharora /hxay paykhamar/‚ bakq'alla a, üsh shayn bekhna khilareḥ dʿay-sḥay üydush ma bu.
15:73: Malkh qetash, ts'oġano sḥaletsira üsh (ch'oġachu ġovġano hxallakbira üsh).
15:74: Tsünan laqenakh lakhe yira Okha‚ tsarna t'e dagiynachu lättan t'ulgash /doġa sanna/ delkhiytira Okha.
15:75: Bakq'alla a, tsu choḥ delilash ma du, oyla esh, ḥözhucharna.
15:76: Bakq'alla a, i ma yu /niyssa Makkara Shama böduchu/ novq'aḥ.
15:77: Bakq'alla a, tsu choḥ (Lut'in q'am hxallakdareḥ) delil ma du muʾma nakhana.
15:79: Tsarna beqam bira Okha‚ bakq'alla a, i shiʾ bilgalchu mettigeḥ ma yu.
15:80: Ḥizhran bakharkhosha a kharts ma bira elchanash.
15:81: Okha Tkhayn ayatash daliyra tsarna‚ tq'a üsh tsarakh dʿabörzush khülura.
15:82: Üsh khilla, lämnash ogush, ts'enosh desh, shäsh qeramazalleḥ a bolush /tsarna choḥ bakha/.
15:84: Shayna karadesh khillacho üsh k'elḥara tsa bekhira /Delan ʿazapakh/.
15:85: Okha tsa qöllina stiglanash a‚ latta a‚ tsarna yukq'eḥ mel derg a baq'dolchüntsa ben. Saḥt/sheko yotstsush/ doġur dolush du. Ḥo khazachu kepara q'int'eravalalaḥ /tsarna/.
15:86: Bakq'alla a, ḥan Qiosh-Qoburg vu khuush volu /derrige a/ qollarkho.
15:87: Okha delira ḥöga kest-kesta dalocharakh vorhx /ayat/ a‚ siylaḥ-deza dolu Q'urʾan a.
15:88: Ḥayn bʿärgash ma ḥezhabe Okha tsarakh (kersta nakhakh) tayp-taypana bolcharna dellachu niʿmatashka‚ tsarna t'eḥ sa a ma gatta de‚ ḥayn /q'inkhetaman/ t'am t'etovzhabe muʾma nakhana.
15:89: Aḥ āla: "Bakq'alla a, so bilggal volu qeramcha vu".
15:90: Okha /khöga/ dossiyna /Q'urʾan, hxay Muḥammad, zhaynash dissorakh/ terra /din/ döq'uchärga.
15:91: Ishttanash bu üsh shäsh Desharkh (Q'urʾanakh) dāq'osh dina bolu.
15:92: Ḥan qiosh-qobuchu Delora, Okha khattaza dütur ma dats tsärga massärga a
15:94: Dʿaqayqade /khozüytush/ ḥayga omra dinarg‚ /Delatsa/ naq'ost lotsucharakh dʿaverza.
15:95: Bakq'alla a, Okha k'elḥarväkqira ḥo /ḥokh/ qärdacharakh‚
15:96: Shäsh Delatsa qin dela a khülüytush bolchu. Kesta khuur du tsarna /shäsh desh khillachun zhamʿ/.
15:97: Tkho khuush du ḥan dog ʿävdash khilar tsara /mushrikasha ḥan dinakh lätsna/ düytsuchukh.
15:98: Tasbiḥ de ḥayn Qiosh-Qobuchunna khastambartsa‚ suzhud decharakh khila.
15:99: Ḥayn Qiosh-Qobuchunna ʿibadat de ḥayga baq'derg qachchalts.
16:1: Delan omra qächna (gergadeana q'ematde hxottar)‚ i sikhdar ma lekhalash. Vonakh ts'ena vu Iza‚ laqaveli Iza tsara /Shetsa/ naq'ost latsarkh.
16:2: Malikash dissado Tso sitsa Shegara omratsa Shen lekh Shena luuchünga "Ash dʿaḥede: So votsurg qin dela tsakhilar‚ Sokh qeralash"‚– oliy.
16:3: Tso qöllina stiglanash a‚ latta a baq'dolchüntsa. Laqaveli I tsara /Shetsa/ naq'ost latsarkh.
16:4: Adam qöllina Tso t'adamakh‚ tq'a iza bilggal mostaġ vu-q (kersta, Dalla inkarlo esh volu).
16:5: Däkhni a – Tso qöllina üsh. Tsärgaḥ shuna yovkho a yu, paydanash a bu‚ tsarakh ash dou.
16:6: Shuna tsärgaḥ khazalla yu, ash /üsh/ chulokhkuchu khenaḥ a‚ ash dazha aradokhush a.
16:7: Shun makhḥash dʿaqöḥu tsara (däkhnino) shu ch'oġa khala ben dʿaqochur dotschu makhka (mettigashka). Bakq'alla a, shun Qiosh-Qoburg /shukh/ dog lozush a vu‚ q'inkhetame a vu.
16:8: Govrash a‚ bʿärzanash a‚ varrash a shu shayna t'eḥ leliyta a‚ khazallina a yu. Tso qullu shuna tsa khuurg a.
16:9: Dalla t'eḥ du /adam / niysachu novq'a ḥazhor‚ tsunakh (neq'akh) bu /baq'dolchukh/ dʿaverzosh berg a. Shena liʾneḥara, shu derrige a niysachu novq'a nisdina khir dara Tso.
16:10: I vu Sha stiglara khi (doġa) daiytinarg‚ shuna tsunakh (khikh) malar a du (ash molush dolu khi)‚ tsunakh ash shen choḥ bezhnash dazhosh dolu buts a yu (doġantsa Dala yolüytu buts shun bezhnash dazhiyta).
16:11: Tsüntsa Tso shuna sḥadolüytu yalta a‚ zayt-dittash a‚ khurmanash a‚ kemsash a‚ masso a taypa stömash a. Bakq'alla a, tsu choḥ Dela /tsḥaʾ khilaran a, nitsq' bolush khilaran a / delil ma du oyla echu nakhana.
16:12: Shuna müt'aḥ dina Tso büysa a‚ de a‚ malkh a‚ butt a. Sedarchiy a /shuna busa neq' goytush/ müt'aḥ dina Tsünan omrantsa. Bakq'alla a, tsu choḥ delilash ma du ḥeq'ale bolchu nakhana.
16:13: Tso shuna lättaḥ tayp-taypanan besashkaḥ qiiyna hxumanash (diynatash, oramatash…) /müt'aḥ yina shuna/. Bakq'alla a, tsu choḥ delil du-q dagadoytush bolchu nakhana.
16:14: I vu /shuna/ müt'aḥ binarg hxord, shüga tsu chüra kerla zhizhig (ch'eriy…) daiyta‚ shüga tsu chüra ash shäsh t'eukhkush dolu zhovhxarsh dakhiyta. Ḥuna go kemanash dʿasalelash tsu chukhula, Tsünan komärshallekh /hxumanash/ shüga lakhiyta a (hxordan niʿmatash a, yokhka-etsar lelorna a)‚ shu barkalla olush khiliyta a.
16:15: Lätta t'eḥ lämnash döġna Tso, iza shütsa tsḥäna tsa lestiytarḥama‚ khish a‚ neq'ash a /khiliytira/, – shu nislur datsara te niysachu novq'a (shayna ʿalashonashna t'e).
16:16: (Qin dolu) ʿalamatash a /qöllina Tso shuna neq'ash bilgaldakha/‚ tq'a sedantsa (sedarchashtsa) tsarna karabo niysa neq' /busa shäsh dʿabakha bezachu mettige/.
16:17: Sha qullurg tsaqulluchukh tera vu te? Ash oyla tsa yo te?
16:18: Ash Delan niʿmat dagardaḥ – ḥesap dalur dats shüga tsünan. Bakq'alla a, Dela t'ekh gechdesh verg a vu‚ q'inkhetame verg a vu.
16:19: Dalla khäa ash q'ayladokqurg a‚ ash dʿaḥediyrig a.
16:20: Dela a vitina, üsh shayga qoyqush bersh – tsara hxumma a tsa qullu‚ üsh shäsh a qullush bu.
16:21: Bella bu üsh‚ diyna botsush. Tsarna tsa khäa‚ matsa denbiyr bu üsh (shayna ʿibadat desh khillarsh).
16:22: Shun dela Sha tsḥaʾ volu Dela vu (Shena ʿibadat dan masso a ḥaq' volu). Shäsh ekhartakh tsa teshash bersh – tseran degnash inkarlo esh du‚ shäsh kurabevlla a bu üsh (baq'derg t'e tsa lotsush).
16:23: Sheko yotstsush, Dalla ma khäa ash q'ayladokqurg a‚ ash dʿaḥediyrig a. Bakq'alla a, Tsunna tsa beza kurabovllursh.
16:24: Tsärga (mushrikashka) älcha: "Hxun dossiyna shun Qiosh-Qobucho?"‚ tsara olu: "Ḥalkhalerachiyn (ḥalkha bäkhnachu nekhan) tüyranash ".
16:25: Tsara dʿaḥoyla shayn /q'inoyn/ moḥ qochchush q'ematdiynaḥ‚ tsḥa a khaar dotsush shäsh tiliynacheran moḥ a. Von tsa khili tsara dʿaḥosh erg!? /Khili!/
16:26: Tsaral ḥalkha khillachara a mekarlo yira – dʿayakqira Dala tseran ġishlo (tseran mekarlo) bakhkhashkara düyna‚ tkhov t'ebüyzhira tsarna t'ekhula. ʿazap deara tsarna t'e, shayna khaa tsa luchukhula.
16:27: T'akqa q'ematdiynaḥ Tso siysazbiyr bu üsh‚ er du (tsärga): "Michaḥ bu San "naq'ostiy" (ash Sötsa nisbesh khilla bolu kharts delanash)‚ shäsh baḥaneḥ ash /baq'dolchüntsa/ q'üysush khilla bolu?" Shayna ʿilma dellachara er: "Bakq'alla a, takhana siysazalla a‚ von a du-q kerstanashna‚
16:28: malikasha bolüytush (shayn sinosh sḥaötsush) bolu shäsh shayna zulam dechu ḥoleḥ". T'akqa /shayn sinosh sḥaötsuchu khenaḥ/ müt'aḥ khilira üsh: "Tkho datsara vonig desh". Hxaʾ! Bakq'alla a, Dela khuush verg vu ash desh khillarg.
16:29: "Zhözhakhati chu ġuo neʿarshkakhula‚ daima a tsu choḥ düsush".Ma von yu-q kurabovllucheran chuġoyla!
16:30: /Delakh/ qiyrinchärga elira: "Hxun dossiyna shun Qiosh-Qobucho?"‚ tsara elira: "Dikanig". Dikanig dinacharna hxoqu dünenaḥ a dikanig du‚ ekhartan hxusam tölush yu. Ma dika yu-q /Delakh/ qörucheran hxusam!
16:31: Shayna bukhakhula khish ökhush yolu ʿadnan boshmash – tsarna chu ġur bu üsh. Tsarna tsu choḥ shayna (mel) eznarg khir yu. Ishtta yal lo Dala /Shekh/ qörucharna.
16:32: Shäsh malikasha (sinosh ötsush), (q'inoykh) ts'ena a bolush, bolüytush bolchu (Delakh qörush khillachu muʾma nakhe), olu: "Marshalla du shüga! Chuġuo yalsamanina, shäsh /dika/ ʿamal esh khilarna".
16:33: Üsh (kerstanash) ḥovsush bu te shayga (sinosh ietsa) malikash dakhkare‚ ya ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchun (shayna ʿazap dan) omra dare? Ishtta dira ḥuna tsaral ḥalkha khillachara a. Dala zulam tsa dira tsarna‚ delaḥ a shäsh shayna zulam desh khilira üsh.
16:34: Shäsh dina vonash (beqam khilla) shaykh dakhara tsarakh‚ shäsh tsa dēshash khillarg shaykh dakhara tsarakh.
16:35: /Delatsa/ naq'ost lätsnachara elira: "Dalla liʾneḥara, I votschu tsḥana a hxumanna ʿibadat dina khir datsara okha – okha a‚ tkhan daysha a‚ Tso tsa yinarg, tsḥa a hxuma ḥaram yina khir yatsara okha". Ishtta /ḥukma/ dora tsaral ḥalkha khillachara a. Elchanashna t'eḥ duy tq'a (Dala dellarg nakhe) q'eggina dʿaqachor ben?
16:36: Hxor ummate Okha vaiytira elcha‚ Dalla ʿibadat de‚ t'aġutakh genadovla älla. Tsarakh (otsu ummatekh) Dala nisbinarsh a bu‚ tsarakh shayna t'eḥ (niysachu neq'akh) dʿatilar qochushkhillarsh a bu. Lela shu lättakhula‚ ḥovsa‚ mukha khilla /Delan ts'ena din/ khartsdinacheran chakqe!
16:37: Üsh nisbala ḥuna mel ch'oġa liʾchi a (hxay Muḥammad), Dala nis ma tsa vo Sha tilavala vitinarg. Tsarna (Delan ʿazapakh k'elḥarabakha) ġönchiy ma bats.
16:38: Delakh ch'oġa duynash ma biʾna tsara "Denviyr vats Dala vellarg"‚– bokhush. Melkho a, iza baq' khilla yolu vaʿda yu-q Tsüngara! Delaḥ a, duqakhbolchu nakhana tsa khäa-q;
16:39: Bilgaldakqarḥama tsarna shena choḥ tseran khilpalo erg‚ kerstanashka khaiytarḥama shäsh khartslüysh dersh duyla.
16:40: Bakq'alla a, Tkhan dosh du tsḥana hxumane, Tkhuna i /khila/ liʾcha, tsünga "Khila!" alar. T'akqa i khülu.
16:41: Shayna zulam dinchul t'äḥa Delan düḥa (qechu makhkashka) dʿaqelkhinarsh – Okha üsh bissor ma bu dünenaḥ a dikachunna t'e‚ ekhartan yal-m melkho a yokqa yu‚ tsarna (i) khuush khilleḥ.
16:42: Üsh bu shäsh sobar dinarsh a‚ shayn Qiosh-Qobuchunna t'etevzhinarsh a.
16:43: Ḥol ḥalkha a tsa bakhiytina Okha bozhariy ben, Okha shayga väḥiy a lush. Ash khattal ḥekham (khaam) shegaḥ bolchu ohxlane, shäsh khilleḥ tsa khuush.
16:44: Bilgalonashtsa a‚ zhaynashtsa a /bakhkiytira Okha elchanash/. Ḥöga bossiyna Okha ḥekham, ḥöga nakhana bilgaldakqiyta a tsärga dossosh khillarg (Delan ḥukmanash)‚ üsh oyla esh khiliyta a.
16:45: Vochüntsa mekarlo yinarsh teshna bu-te Dala shäsh lätte dʿa tsa khudabaytarkh‚ ya shayga ʿazap doġur tsakhilrkh, shayna khaa tsa luchukhula?
16:46: Ya Tso shäsh sḥatsalatsarkh shayn dʿay-sḥay idarshkaḥ? Tsara k'eldütur ma dats /Delan ġullaq/.
16:47: Ya Tso shäsh sḥalotsurg khilarkh, shäsh qerameḥ a bolush? Bakq'alla a, shun Qiosh-Qoburg /shukh/ dog lozush a vu‚ q'inkhetame a vu.
16:48: Üsh tsa ḥovsu-te Dala qöllichu hxumanashka, shayn ʿindaġ Dalla suzhud dartsiy ättu aġorḥa a‚ ärru aġorḥa a teʿash yolchu, shäsh /Delan nitsq'ana/ müt'aḥ a yolush?
16:49: Dalla suzhud do stiglanashkaḥ mel dolcho a‚ lättaḥ mel dolcho a‚ diynatekh /dolchara a/‚ malikasha a, shäsh kuralla a tsa esh.
16:50: Üsh qörush du shayna t'eḥ volchu shayn Qiosh-Qobuchukh‚ desh du shayga de bokhurg.
16:51: /Diytsa tsärga, hxay Muḥammad/ Dala elira: "Ash ma letsa shi dela. Iza tsḥa Dela vu. Sokh (tsḥannakh) qeralash!"
16:52: Tsünan du stiglanashkaḥ a‚ lättaḥ a mel derg. Tsünan du daima dolu din‚ tq'a Dela votschukh qöru shu?
16:53: Shütsa mel dolu niʿmat Delera du-q. T'akqa shäsh tsḥana bokhamo sḥalätscha – Tsünga dökhu ash, moḥ bettash.
16:54: T'akqa Tso i bala shukh dʿabäkqicha, shukh /tsḥana/ tobano shen Qiosh-Qobuchüntsa naq'ost lotsu
16:55: Okha shayna dellachu /niʿmatna/ inkarlo yarḥama. Zovq ḥega shayna! T'äḥa khuur du shuna /shäsh dinchukh khinderg/.
16:56: Okha shayna dellachu ritsq'anakh shayna /hxun yu/ tsa khuucharna dāq'a do tsara. Tallahxi‚ shüga khattaza dütur ma dats ash /Dalla düḥal/ kharts qullush khillachukh.
16:57: Dalla mekhkariy khülüytu tsara – vonakh ts'ena vu Iza - tq'a shayna – shayna dezarg /k'entiy/ khülüytu.
16:58: Tsarakh tsḥanna yoʿ khilla älla, qaʾ bäkqicha‚ yuḥ ʿarzhalo tsünan, kiyraḥ khalla setsayo shen öġazlo.
16:59: I lech'q'a nakhakh shega qaʾ bäkqina bolu tsatam baḥaneḥ. "Siysazallitsa t'elotsu-te sha i /yoʿ/‚ ya lättakh dʿaḥulyo-te?" Ma von du-q tsara desh dolu ḥukma!
16:60: Ekhartakh tsateshacharna von masal du‚ tq'a Deleḥ ma du vuno laqara masal. Iza veza verg a‚ Shegaḥ ḥeq'alalla derg a vu.
16:61: Dala nakh shayn zulam baḥaneḥ /bālane/ lotsush khilleḥara‚ tsunna (lätta) t'eḥ tsḥa a diynat (Delakh teshash votsu kersta) dütur ma datsara Tso‚ delaḥ a, t'äḥatottu Tso üsh bilgal yakqina khan t'eqachchalts. Shayn /bilgal yakqina/ khan t'eʾcha – tsḥa saḥt t'äḥa a büsur bats üsh‚ ḥalkha a bevr bats.
16:62: Dalla shayna tsadezarg khülüytu tsara‚ khartsdolchünan surt hxottado tseran mettanasha, shayna dikanig du‚ bokhush. Sheko yotstsush, tsarna /zhözhakhatin/ ts'e yu‚ üsh /tsu choḥ/ bitsbiyr bu.
16:63: Tallahxi‚ ḥol ḥalkha a ummatashka bakhkiytira Okha /Tkhayn elchanash/‚ shayt'ano shayn ʿamalsh khazyira tsarna. Takhana a tseran doladiyrig (naq'ost) i du‚ tsarna (kechdina) lazame dolu ʿazap du.
16:64: Ḥöga zhayna dossiyna ma dats Okha, dekq'a aḥ tsarna bilgaldakqa a ben tseran shena choḥ khilpalo khillarg, niysa neq' a‚ q'inkhetam a khila a ben teshash dolchu q'omana.
16:65: Dala stiglara khi dossiyna‚ tsüntsa latta dendina Tso i dellachul t'äḥa. Bakq'alla a, tsu choḥ /Dela tsḥaʾ khilaran a, nitsq' bolush khilaran a/ delil ma du laduġuchu nakhana.
16:66: Bakq'alla a, shuna ḥaybanashkaḥ a mäʿna du: Okha shuna malayo tseran kiyraḥ yolchukh bökhallina a‚ ts'iyna a yukq'era shura‚ ts'ena a‚ cham bolush a yolush molcharna.
16:67: Khurmaniyn a‚ kemsiyn a stömekh ash dokqu vakhosh dolu malar a‚ khaza ritsq' a. Bakq'alla a, tsu choḥ delil ma du ḥeq'ale bolchu nakhana.
16:68: Ḥan Qiosh-Qobucho naqarmozan dag chu tesira: ḥayna ġishlosh ye lämnashkaḥ a‚ dittash t'eḥ a‚ tsara (nakha) dechu ts'enosh choḥ a (tkhevnashna t'eḥ) älla.
16:69: T'akqa daa ḥayna masso a stömekh ritsq'‚ ḥayn Qiosh-Qobuchun, ḥayna müt'aḥ dinchu, neq'ashkakhula lela, älla. Tseran (naqarmoziyn) kiyrara malar dolu‚ shen bos tayp-taypana a bolush‚ shena choḥ nakhana darba a dolush. Bakq'alla a, tsu choḥ /Delan nitsq' khilaran/ delil du-q shäsh oyla echu nakhana.
16:70: Dala qöllina shu‚ t'akqa Tso dolüytur du shu. Shukh vu dakharan uggar irchachu ḥole verzosh verg a, tsunna /q'ona volush/ khuush khillachul t'äḥa /qin/ hxumma a tsa khaiyta. Bakq'alla a, Dela khuush a vu‚ nitsq' qochush a vu.
16:71: Dala shukh tsḥabersh vukqaral bazbina /shayna/ ritsk dalareḥ. Ma bats i bazbinarsh shayn ritsq' lur dolush shayn ättu küygasha doladinacharna (leshna‚ yalkhoshna), shäsh tsu choḥ (ritsq'aneḥ), üsh shaytsa nis a besh. Delan niʿmat a kharts do tq'a tsara?
16:72: Dala shuna shukh shaykh a zudariy bina‚ Tso shuna shun zudarshkakhula k'entiy a‚ k'entiyn k'entiy a khiliytina. Tso shuna dikachukh ritsq' della. Tq'a khartsdolchukh tesha üsh‚ Delan niʿmatana kerstanalla do?
16:73: Tsara ʿibadat do Dela votschu‚ shayn dolaḥ tsarna yala stiglanashkara a‚ lättara a ritsq'ekh hxumma a yotsucharna‚/yala liʾcha a/ nitsq' tsa qochucharna.
16:74: Dalla masalsh ma dalade. Bakq'alla a, Dela khuush vu‚ shu tsa khuush du.
16:75: Dala daliyna shuna masal: tsḥaʾ shekh /qechara/ doladesh volu lay vu‚ shen hxumanna nitsq' a tsa qochush volu‚ /vazha/ Okha shena Tkhaygara dika ritsq' dellarg vu‚ tso tsunakh kharzh a yo /saġa lo/ q'aylakha a‚ guchaḥ a. Tsḥaterra buy üsh? Khastam Dalla bu. Delaḥ a, tsarakh duqakhbersh tsa khuush bu.
16:76: Dala /qin/ masalina valiyna shi stag: otsu shinnakh tsḥaʾ mott tsa khuush vu‚ tsḥanna a hxumanna nitsq' tsa qochu tsünan‚ i verrig shen elan (shena t'ehxöttinchu stegan) kōchaḥ vu‚ sha michchaḥa a ḥazhiycha a‚ tso dikanig tsa doḥu. Tq'a tsḥaterra vuy iza a‚ niysontsa omra desh verg a‚ sha niysachu novq'aḥ a volush?
16:77: Delan yu stiglaniyn a‚ lättan a q'ayle. Ma dats saḥtan ġullaq (q'ematde hxottar) bʿärneġar tokhar sanna a ben‚ ya qin a gergaḥ. Bakq'alla a, Dela masso a hxumanna t'eḥ nitsq' qochush vu.
16:78: Dala sḥadäkhna shu shayn nanoyn kiyrara‚ hxumma khuush datsara shu. Tso shuna lersa a‚ bʿärsa a‚ degnash a khiliytira (delira)‚ shu khila megar-q barkalla olush.
16:79: Tsarna tsa go-te olkhazarsh‚ stiglan hxavaeḥ /t'emadovla Dala/ ätto bina dolu? Üsh tsa setsado /stiglaḥ/ Dala ben. Bakq'alla a, tsu choḥ delilash du teshash bolchu nakhana.
16:80: Dala shuna khiliytina shun ġishloykh /parġat choḥ ʿen/ hxusamash‚ Tso khiliytina shuna ḥaybaniyn ts'okanekh hxusamash‚ shäsh shuna eza a yotsush shu dʿa-sḥadölkhuchu diynaḥ a‚ shu /sadaʿa/ sevtsinchu diynaḥ a; tseran (üstaġiyn) t'arġanakh a‚ /emkaliyn/ t'arġanakh a‚ /gezariyn/ chokh (t'arġanakh) a shuna yiybar (salpal) a yu‚ tsḥana khanna paydaetsa hxumanash a yu.
16:81: Dala khiliytina shuna Sha qöllinchukh ʿindaġ‚ Tso khiliytina shuna lämnekh loch'q'iyla‚ Tso khiliytina shuna dukhar, shu lardesh yovkhonakh‚ khiliytina dukhar (t'eman dukhar) a shu lardesh vovshiyn nitsq'akh (derallakh). Ishtta qochushdo Dala Shen niʿmat shuna t'eḥ, shu khilarḥama müt'aḥ khilla.
16:82: Üsh dʿaberzaḥ – ḥuna t'eḥ /hxay Muḥammad/ bilgala dʿaqachor du /Tkhan elchalalla/.
16:83: Delan niʿmat devza tsarna‚ t'akqa a inkarlo yo tsara tsunna‚ tsarakh duqakhbersh kerstanash bu.
16:84: Otsu (q'emat) diynaḥ Okha vokhüytur vu hxor ummatakh tesh‚ t'akqa kerstanashna (dokhkobovla) purba lur dats‚ tsärga bekhkazlonash a yalayoytur yats.
16:85: Zulamkhoshna (Delakh tsateshnacharna) ʿazap gicha‚ tsarna i daydiyr a dats‚ t'äḥatottur a bats üsh (tsunakh).
16:86: /Delatsa/ naq'ost lätsnachara shayn "naq'ostiy" gicha‚ er du: "Tkho Qiosh-Qoburg‚ hxorsh bu tkhan naq'ostiy‚ Okha shayga, Ḥo a vitina, qoyqush khilla bolu". Tsara tsärga dosh qussur du: "Bakq'alla a, shu khartslüysh dersh du-q"‚– älla.
16:87: Dele qovdor yu tsara otsu diynaḥ muk'arlo‚ dʿaq'ästar du tsarakh tsara (kharts) qullush khillarg.
16:88: Tsateshnacharna a‚ Delan neq'akh /nakh/ dʿatilincharna a Okha t'etukhur du ʿazapa t'e a ʿazap üsh telkhina mel derg desh khilarna.
16:89: Otsu diynaḥ hxor ummatna t'e Okha vokhüytur vu (shaygaḥa volu a-teshash khillacharna) shayna düḥal volu a – tsateshacharna) tesh tsarakh shaykh‚ ḥo (hxay Muḥammad) valor vu Okha hxoqarna /shaygaḥa volu a, shayna /düḥal volu a tesh khilla. Ḥöga zhayna dossiyna Okha sha masso a hxumanan bilgalo khilla dolu‚ sha busalbanashna niysa neq' a‚ q'inkhetam a‚ qaʾ a khilla dolu.
16:90: Bakq'alla a, Dala omra do niyso‚ dikanig /lelade oliy/ a‚ gergarcharna /saġa/ dalar a; tsa magado /Dala/ bökhanig a‚ vonig a‚ ḥaġ a. Tso shuna ḥekham bo, ḥekham t'elotsur batsara-te ash.
16:91: Delatsa yina ch'aġo qochushʾye‚ shäsh ch'aġo yinchul t'äḥa‚ duynash ma q'arbe, shäsh üsh ch'aġbinchul t'äḥa: ash Dela ma vina shayna t'eḥ tesh. Bakq'alla a, Dalla khäa ash diyrig.
16:92: Shu ma khilalash shen üyrig bästinchu zudchukh tera, sha i khala binchul t'äḥa‚ shayn duynekh vovshashna yukq'eḥ paydaötsush‚ tsḥabersh vuqaral ḥal sov dolush khiliytarḥama. Dala shu tsüntsa (vaʿda qochushʾe alartsa) züysh du. Tso shuna q'ematdiynaḥ bilgaldiyr du shu shena choḥ khilpalo esh khillarg.
16:93: Dalla liʾneḥara, Tso shu tsḥa ummat khülüytur dara‚ delaḥ a, Tso tilavala vütu Shena luurg‚ Tso nisvo Shena luurg. Shüga /q'ematdiynaḥ/ khattanza dütur ma dats ash /dünenaḥ/ lelosh khillachukh.
16:94: Shayn duynekh vovshashna yukq'eḥ khartsonash ma yelash – shayn kog tsa sharshiyta i ch'aġbella lättash khillachul t'äḥa‚ /ash i hxumanash daḥ/ vonig ʿovshur du ash shäsh Delan neq'akh /nakh/ tilorna‚ shuna deza- dokqa ʿazap a khir du.
16:95: Ma etsa Delan vaʿdanakh k'ezzig makh! Bakq'alla a, Dalla gergaḥ derg dika du shuna‚ shu khuush khilleḥ.
16:96: Shügaḥ derg qachalur du‚ Dalla gergaḥ derg bukhadüsur du. Sobare khillacharna dʿayalaza yutur ma yats Okha shayn yal tsara desh khillachukh uggar khazachüntsa.
16:97: Dika ʿamal yinarg‚ börsha stag velaḥ a‚ zuda yelaḥ a‚ shäsh muʾma bolush – üsh denbiyr ma bu Okha khazachu dākhartsa‚ tseran yal dʿalur ma yu Okha tsara desh khillachukh uggar khazachüntsa.
16:98: Ayḥa Q'urʾan döshush‚ Dele larvalar dekhalaḥ, t'ulgash qüssush, ekqochu shayt'anakh.
16:99: Bakq'alla a, tsünan baq'o yats, iyman a dillina, shayn Qiosh-Qobuchunna t'etovzhush bolcharna t'eḥ.
16:100: Tsünan baq'o yu shekh /shayna/ verasalla lelocharna t'eḥ a‚ shäsh tsunakh (Delatsa) naq'ost lotsucharna t'eḥ a.
