16:101: Okha ayat /qechu/ ayatatsa khiytsicha, – Dela dika khuush vu Sha dossosh derg‚ – tsara olu: "Bakq'alla a, ḥo qullush verg vu". Hxaʾ‚ tsarakh dukqakhbersh khuush bats.
16:102: Aḥ āla: "I /Q'urʾanan ayat/ dossiyna dezachu sino ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchüngara baq'dolchüntsa, sha ch'aġbarḥama iyman dillinarsh‚ sha niysa neq' a‚ qaʾ a khilla busalba nakhana".
16:103: Tkhuna khuush du‚ tsara olu: "Iza ʿamavesh vu adamo". Üsh shena t'eqiydash berg ʿazham mott ma bu‚ tq'a hxara bilgala ʿärbiyn mott ma bu.
16:104: Bakq'alla a, Delan ayatekh tsa teshash bersh – Dala nisbiyr bats üsh (niysachu novq'a)‚ tsarna lazosh dolu ʿazap khir du.
16:105: Bakq'alla a, /Delan sibatash t'eḥ/ khartsderg qullu Delan ayatekh tsa teshash bolchara - tq'a üsh ma bu khartslüysh bersh.
16:106: Sha iyman dillinchul t'äḥa Dalla kerstanalla dinarg‚ shen dog iymantsa ch'aġdella a dolush, shena nitsq' binarg votsush‚ kerstanallina shen dog dʿadellinarg – tsarna Delera öġazlo a yu‚ tsarna deza-dokqa ʿazap a du.
16:107: Iza (ʿazap) - tsarna ekhartal dünenan dakhar sov dezarna a du‚ Dala kersta q'am (niysachu novq'a) nisbesh tsakhilarna a du.
16:108: Üsh bu Dala shayn degnashna a‚ khazarna a‚ bʿärsinna a muhxar tökhnarsh - üsh bu shäsh ġopal bersh!
16:109: Sheko yats ekhartaḥ üsh eshnarsh khilaran.
16:110: T'akqa, bakq'alla a, ḥan Qiosh-Qoburg /gechdesh vu/ hxizhar dinacharna, shäsh pitane lätsnachul t'äḥa q'aḥegna bolchu‚ sobar dina bolchu, – bakq'alla a, ḥan Qiosh-Qoburg tsul t'äḥa sov gechdesh verg a vu‚ q'inkhetame verg a vu.
16:111: Otsu /q'emat/diynaḥ hxor sa doġur du sha q'üysush (shen bolkh balkhosh)‚ masso a sinna /qochchush/ lur du tso sha /dünenaḥ/ dinarg. Tsarna zulam diyr dats (tsarna khartso yiyr yats)!
16:112: Dala masallina yaliyna tsḥa yurt (Makka). I khilla märsha a‚ parġat a: tsunna (yurtarchu nakhana) shortta shen ritsq' doġura masso a mettigera. T'akqa tso (Makkin ohxlano) Delan niʿmatashna kerstalla dira. T'akqa Dala tsünga ʿovshiytira matsallin a‚ qeraman a dukhar tsara desh khillarg baḥaneḥ.
16:113: Tsärga veara elcha, tsarakh a volush – tsara iza khartsvira. T'akqa üsh sḥaletsira ʿazapo‚ shäsh zulamkhoy a bolush (khartsonna t'eḥ a bolush).
16:114: Ash daa Dala shayna dellachu ritskikh ḥanal derg a‚ ts'ena derg a‚ Delan niʿmatashna shukur de‚ shäsh Tsunna ʿibadat desh delaḥ.
16:115: Bakq'alla a, Dala ḥaram yina shuna ekq'a q'eella hxuma a‚ ts'iy a‚ ḥaqin zhizhig a‚ Dela votsush /qechun/ ts'e yakqinarg a (shena urs ḥoquchu khenaḥ). Sha (yaaza) tsa vällarg/matsalla tsa vala/‚ q'a desh votsush (i yaar magosh dotsush), baramal t'ekh tsa volush(vuzzalts a tsa yuush)‚ – t'akqa Dela gechdiyrig a vu‚ q'inkhetame verg a vu (tsa välla i ḥaram yina hxuma yiʾnachunna).
16:116: Ash ma ālalash shayn mettanasha düytsuchu khartsderg baḥaneḥ: "Hxara ḥanal du‚ hxara ḥaram du"‚ Dalla t'e khartsderg qollarḥama. Bakq'alla a, Dalla t'e khartsderg qullush bersh bakqiybiyr bolush bats.
16:117: K'ezzig zovq ḥegar du /i tsarna/ - lazosh dolu ʿazap du tsarna /kechdina/.
16:118: Zhügtiyn dineḥ khillacharna a ḥaram dina Okha ḥöga ḥalkha diytsinarg. Okha tsarna zulam tsa dira‚ delaḥ a‚ üsh khilira shäsh shayna zulam desh.
16:119: T'akqa, bakq'alla a, ḥan Qiosh-Qoburg tsa khuush vonig dinacharna‚ t'akqa tsul t'äḥa tōba desh, dika ʿamalsh yinacharna, – bakq'alla a, ḥan Qiosh-Qoburg tsul t'äḥa /tsarna/ gechdiyrig a‚ q'inkhetame verg a ma vu.
16:120: Bakq'alla a, Ibrahxim khilla Dalla müt'aḥ imam‚ ts'ena din derg‚ i tsa khilla shirk decharakh.
16:121: Tsünan niʿmatashna shukur diyrig a /khilla iza/. Tso (Dala) khärzhira iza‚ nis a vira niysachu novq'a.
16:122: Okha tsunna delira dünenaḥ a dikanig‚ iza ekhartaḥ a dikacharakh vu.
16:123: T'akqa Okha ḥöga /hxay Muḥammad/ väḥitsa khaiytira ts'ena din dolush khillachu Ibrahximan millatna t'äḥahxotta älla. I (Ibrahxim) tsa khilla shirk decharakh.
16:124: Shötan de /dazdar/ khiliytina tsüngaḥ khilpalo khillacharna. Bakq'alla a, ḥan Qiosh-Qoburg ḥukma diyr dolush vu q'ematdiynaḥ tsarna yukq'eḥ üsh khilpalo yesh khillachunna.
16:125: Aḥ qayqa ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchun novq'a ḥeq'altsiy‚ khazachu ḥekhamtsiy‚ tsärtsa (ḥayna düḥalbolchärtsa) q'iysa khazachu kepara. Bakq'alla a, ḥan Qiosh-Qoburg vuno dika vevzash vu Shen neq'akh tilavellarg. Iza vuno dika bevzash vu niysachu novq'aḥ bersh a.
16:126: Nagaḥ sanna ash /mostaġchunna/ taʿzar daḥ‚ taʿzar de shayna taʿzar dinchukh terra‚ ash sobar daḥ – iza sobar decharna dika du-q.
16:127: Aḥ sobar dēlaḥ /hxay Muḥammad/‚ ḥan sobar Delatsa a ben dats‚ tsarna poshme ma khila‚ ḥo ma khila sagatlush tsara echu mekarlonakh.
16:128: Bakq'alla a, Dela vu /Shekh/ qiyrinchärtsa‚ Iza vu dikachärtsa /üsh ʿalash a besh, tergo a ʿesh/.
17:1: Masso a vonakh ts'ena vu Iza (Dela)‚ Sha Shen lay busa /qarsta/ väkqina volu Dezachu mäzhdigera Genarchu mäzhdige‚ Okha shen gonakha derg berkate dina dolchu‚ tsunna gaytarḥama Tkhan ayatash. Bakq'alla a, Iza vu khezash verg a‚ gush verg a.
17:2: Okha delira Musaga zhayna‚ tsunakh khiliytira niysa neq' Israilan k'entashna‚ Sha votsurg, qin vekal (doladiyrig) ma latsa‚ älla.
17:3: Hxay Okha shäsh Nuḥatsa leliynacheran zürret /Israilan k'entiy! Dagadaiyta Okha shayn day khina bukhabakharkh k'elḥarbakhar; shukur de Dalla/. Bakq'alla a, iza (Nuḥ-paykhamar) khili barkale lay.
17:4: Okha khaam bira Israilan k'entashka zhayni choḥ: "Telkhina derg tsa desh ʿiyr ma dats shu lätta t'eḥ shozza‚ kuradevr du shu t'ekh kurallitsa"‚– älla.
17:5: Tsu shinnakh ḥalkhara vaʿda eʾcha‚ Okha shuna t'e bakhkiytira Tkhayn lesh‚ shaygaḥ ch'oġa nitsq' bolu‚ cheqbevlira üsh hxusamash chukhula- vaʿda qochushkhilira.
17:6: T'akqa /ash toba dinachul t'äḥa/ Okha shüga yukhabakqiytira tsarna t'eḥ tolam‚ ġo dira shuna ḥolatsa a‚ k'entashtsa a‚ shukh khiliytira vuno yokqa toba (duqa khalq').
17:7: Ash dikanig dicha – i dikanig dina shayna‚ ash vonig dicha – iza a shuna shayna (zulame) du. /Delan/ sholġa vaʿda qochushkhilcha – /Dala qin mostaġiy t'etesira shuna/ tsara shun yakhḥash erchayakha‚ mäzhdiga üsh chu bakha‚ dükhḥara shäsh bakhare terra‚ dokho shayna dola mel deʾnarg.
17:8: Shun Qiosh-Qobucho shukh q'inkhetam ban mega. Shu dukhaderzaḥ /q'inosh darna/‚ Tkho a dukhadürzur du /shuna taʿzar darna/. Okha khiliytina zhözhakhati kerstanashna nabakhti /üsh tsu chüra ara tsa bovlalush/.
17:9: Bakq'alla a, hxoqu Q'urʾano nisvo sha uggar niysadolchunna t'e‚ qaʾ bokqu shäsh dikanash desh bolchu muʾma nakhana tsarna yokqa yal khilartsa.
17:10: Ekhartakh tsa teshash bersh – Okha tsarna kechdina lazosh dolu ʿazap.
17:11: Adamo /shena ya shen dözalkhochunna, sha öġazvakhcha/ vonig dökhush doʿa do, sha dikanig dökhush doʿa dare terra. Adam /shen qollameḥ/ khilla sikha /amal yolush /.
17:12: Okha khiliytina büysa a‚ de a shi bilgalo khilla. Büysanan bilgalo dʿayokqu Okha‚ diynan bilgalo gush yoy, shüga lakhiytarḥama shayn Qiosh-Qobuchun komärshonakh /ritsq'/‚ sheriyn baram a, ḥesap a shuna khaiytarḥama. Masso a hxuma q'astiyna Okha qochchush bolchu q'astamtsa.
17:13: Masso a adamna logakh ḥarchiyna Okha shen qollam. Okha tsunna q'ematdiynaḥ zhayna guchudokqur du – tsunna gur du iza sḥadillina (dünenaḥ sha dina dikanig a, vonig a tsunna ḥalkhaḥ khir du q'ematdiynaḥ).
17:14: "Desha ḥayn zhayna. Ḥuo ḥayna qacho khili ḥuna takhana ḥesap dan" /er du tsünga/.
17:15: Nisvellarg – shena nislush vu. Tilavellarg a – shena tilalush vu. Ḥur bats ḥush volcho qechünan moḥ. Tkho tsa khilla ʿazap desh, Okha elcha vakhiyttalts.
17:16: Tkhuna tsḥa yurt hxallakyan liʾcha‚ Okha /elchanashkakhula/ omra do tsünan /yurtakhoyn/ ḥoladayshka /Dalla müt'aḥ khila, oliy/‚ – tsara tsu choḥ (yurtaḥ) ʿesalla yo (Dalla)‚ t'akqa otsunna t'eḥ /Delera ʿazap dussur du, älla dolu/ dosh baq'khülu – t'akqa Okha iza yokhayo qochchush.
17:17: Masa t'äḥe hxallakyina Okha Nuḥal t'äḥa! Qacho yu ḥan Dela Shen len q'inosh sov dika khuush a‚ gush a khilar.
17:18: Milla a khilleḥ dezash sikhanig – sikhdina /lur du/ Okha tsunna tsu choḥ (dünenaḥ) Tkhayna luurg Tkhayna luuchunna‚ t'akqa Okha khiliytina tsunna zhözhakhati – chuġur vu iza tsunna /vaga/ bekhke a khilla‚ siysaza a volush (Delan q'inkhetamakh genaväkqina).
17:19: Milla a velaḥ dezash t'äḥarnig‚ tsunna t'eqacha sikhvellarg shen q'aḥegartsa, sha teshna a volush, – üsh bu shayn q'aḥegar barkalle (deq'ala) khillarsh.
17:20: Hxoranna a lo Okha – hxoqarna a (düne lökhucharna)‚ vuqarna a (ekhart lökhucharna) – ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchun niʿmatakh. Ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchun niʿmat tsa khilla dikhkina.
17:21: Ḥazhal‚ mukha bazbina Okha tsarakh tsḥabersh vuqaral (dünenan dakhareḥ)! Tq'a ekhart – darzhekh uggare dokqanig a du‚ dozallakh uggare dokqanig a du (Delakh qörush khillacharna kechdina dolu).
17:22: Delatsa qin dela ma ve – /i vaḥ/ ḥo oḥakhuur vu bekhke a khilla‚ (Delera) ġo dotsush a visina.
17:23: Ḥan Qiosh-Qobucho omra dina: ash ʿibadat ma delash Sha votschunna‚ detsa-nenatsa dika a khilalash‚ älla. Ḥuna gergaḥ tsarakh tsḥaʾ ya shiy a q'anallina t'eqachaḥ‚ aḥ tsu shinga ma alalaḥ: "Uffay!"‚ dʿa ma q'akhkadelaḥ i shiʾ‚ aḥ alalaḥ tsu shinga khaza dosh.
17:24: Aḥ oḥabakhiyta tsu shinna q'inkhetamakh müt'aḥ khilaran t'am‚ āla: "San Qiosh-Qoburg‚ q'inkhetam beḥa tsu shinnakh‚ tsu shimmo zhima volush (tergo yesh) so qiorakh terra".
17:25: Shun Qiosh-Qoburg dika khuush vu shun degnashkaḥ derg. Shu dika khilaḥ – bakq'alla, Iza khilla /daggara tōba dartsa/ Shena t'ebörzucharna gechdesh.
17:26: Gergarchunna shen ḥaq' dʿalo‚ miskachunna a‚ neq'akhochunna a /dʿalo tseran ḥakq'ash/‚ daya ma daya /ḥayn hxuma/ erna.
17:27: Erna doyush bersh khilla shayt'aniyn vezhariy‚ tq'a shayt'a shen Qiosh-Qobuchunna kersta khilla.
17:28: Nagaḥ ḥo tsarakh (gergaracharakh, miskacharakh, neq'akhoykh - tsarna saġina dala hxuma dotsush) dʿavirzineḥ, ḥayn Qiosh-Qobuchun q'inkhetam bezash (Delan q'inkhetamakh ritsq' dezash), i khilare satüysush a volush, /t'akqa otsunakh tsarna saġina dala dagaḥ/, aḥ tsärga alalaḥ k'eda-merza dosh.
17:29: Ma khiliyta ḥayn küg ḥayn logakh dikhkina‚ darzha a ma de i derrig darzhortsa– t'akqa (i daḥ) oḥakhuur vu ḥo bekhkame a khilla‚ ġayġane a vakhana.
17:30: Bakq'alla a, ḥan Qiosh-Qobucho ritsq' darzhado Shena luuchunna /shortta/‚ baram a bo. Bakq'alla a, Iza khilla Shen lesh dika bevzash a‚ gush a.
17:31: Ma daya shayn berash miskallakh qörush – Okha qobur bu üsh a‚ shu a. Bakq'alla a, üsh bayar khilla dokqa ġalat.
17:32: Zinana gerga ma ġolash‚ bakq'alla a, i du irchanig‚ i bu bökha neq' /zhözhakhate vügush/.
17:33: Ma delash Dala /den/ ḥaram dina dolu sa baq'ontsiy ben. Shena t'eḥ zulam a desh viynarg – Okha tsünan verasna (irs ötsuchunna) baq'o yella /ch'ir etsa/‚ bayareḥ t'ekh ma voliyla iza. Bakq'alla a, iza (vellachun veras) khir vu (Dala) shena (ch'ir etsa) ġo dinarg.
17:34: Shu gerga ma ġolash boberan däkhnina uggar dikachüntsa (tsunna paydeḥ) ben i /qochchush/ ġemettahxottalts. ʿalashbe bart (shayn qechärtsa khilla ch'aġonash). Bakq'alla a, bart zhöpalle khilla. (Dala zhop dökhur du tsunakh).
17:35: Niyso ye (shäsh nakhana hxumanash) yustareḥ, shäsh yustuchu khenaḥ)‚ ozalash niysachu terzantsa. Iza dika a du‚ melkho a khaza a du t'äḥengaḥ (ekhartaḥ mela khilartsa).
17:36: Ḥo t'äḥa ma hxottalaḥ ḥaygaḥ ʿilma dotschu hxumanna. Bakq'alla a, lersa a‚ bʿärsa a‚ dog a – üsh derrig khir du tsunakh zhop dökhur dolush (q'ematdiynaḥ).
17:37: Ma lelalaḥ lätta t'eḥ kurallitsa – bakq'alla a, aḥ lättan bukh okhkur ma bats‚ lamanan loqalle a qochur ma vats ḥo!
17:38: Otsu derrigenan vonig ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchunna gergaḥ tsa dezash khilla (du).
17:39: I du ḥan Qiosh-Qobucho ḥöga väḥitsa khaiytinchu ḥikmatakh (ḥeq'alallakh). Ma khiliyta Delatsa qin dela – t'akqa zhözhakhati chuqussur vu ḥo bekhkame a khilla (khir volush)‚ /masso a dikanakh/ yukha a tökhna.
17:40: Tq'a shu khärzhina shun Qiosh-Qobucho k'entashtsa‚ Shena malikekh yoʿariy bina? Bakq'alla a, shu olush ma du (shen irchallitsa) deza-dokqa dosh.
17:41: Okha /masso a hxuma/ bilgaldina hxoqu Q'urʾan choḥ tsarna (adamashna) dagadaiytarḥama – tso-m (otsu bilgaldaro) üsh alsam tsa bokhu /baq'dolchukh/ dʿaq'akhkartsiy ben.
17:42: Aḥ āla: "Tsüntsa qin delanash khilcha‚ tsara ma-bokhkhu, – ʿarsh yolchunna (Dalla) t'e neq' lokhur ma bara tsara (i ʿarsh dʿalatsa ġertash, derrige pachchaḥalla shayn karaderzo luush)".
17:43: Vonakh ts'ena vu Iza‚ t'ekh lakqaveli Iza tsara (kerstanasha) düytsuchukh.
17:44: Tsunna tasbiḥ desh yu vorhx stigal a‚ latta a‚ tsarna choḥ mel bersh a (Dala mel qöllina hxuma). Tsünan khastamtsa tasbiḥ tsa desh hxumma a yats‚ delaḥ a, shu (hxay adamash) tsa qeta tseran tasbiḥakh. Bakq'alla a, Iza khilla t'ekh sobare a‚ gechdiyrig a.
17:45: Aḥ Q'urʾan döshush‚ Okha ḥuna a‚ ekhartakh tsateshacharna a yukq'eḥ khiliytina ḥuldina kirḥa.
17:46: Okha yina tseran degnashna t'eḥ ġat (t'eqöllina hxuma), üsh tsunakh (Q'urʾanakh) tsa qetiyta‚ tseran lergashna choḥ a q'oralla yu. Aḥ Q'urʾana choḥ vekq'a Sha tsḥaʾ ḥayn Qiosh-Qoburg ḥekhiycha‚ üsh yukhabovlu, /baq'dolchukh/ q'äkhkash.
17:47: Tkho dika khuush du tsara stenga laduġu, ḥöga shäsh laduġuchu khenaḥ, /t'akqa/ q'aylakha vovshashka khabarsh düytsush, zulamkhosha olu: "Shu t'äḥahxüttush ma du shena bozbuunchalla leliynachu stagana".
17:48: Ḥazhal‚ mukha daliyna tsara ḥuna masalsh‚ tilabella üsh‚ nitsq' tsa qochu tseran /niysa/ neq' /karo/.
17:49: Tsara elira: "Tkhokh däʿakhkash a‚ chim a khilcha‚ tkho dendiyr du, kerla khalq' a khilla?"
17:51: ya /mülkhkha/ qöllina hxuma khilcha a, sha yokqa khülush yolu shun degnashkaḥ /iza a denyiyr yu/." T'akqa tsara er ma du: "Ḥan /dendina/ dukhaderzor du tkho?" Aḥ āla: "Dükhḥara shu qöllincho". T'akqa tsara shayn kortosh lestosh ḥo volchuḥa‚ er ma du: "Matsa /khir/ du iza?" Aḥ āla: "Iza kesta khila tarlo".
17:52: Otsu /q'emat/diynaḥ Tso shüga qoyqur ma du‚ ash Tsunna khastambartsa zhop lur du‚ shuna möttur du shäsh k'ezzig ben tsa ʿiyna (dünenaḥ ya koshaḥ).
17:53: Aḥ āla San leshka‚ tsara oliyla (shäsh q'amelash desh) uggare dikanig. Bakq'alla a, shayt'ano tsarna yukq'e dov tüssu. Bakq'alla a, shayt'a adamna bilgala mostaġ khilla.
17:54: Shun Qiosh-Qoburg shu dika devzash vu. Shena laaḥ, q'inkhetam biyr bu Tso shukh‚ ya Shena laaḥ, Tso shuna ʿazap diyr du. Okha tsa vakhiytina ḥo tsarna t'eḥ vekal a khilla.
17:55: Ḥan Qiosh-Qoburg dika bevzash vu stiglanashkaḥ a‚ lättaḥ a bersh. Okha bazbina tsḥabolu paykhamarash vuqaral‚ Okha della Davude Zabur.
17:56: Aḥ āla /hxay Muḥammad/: "Ash qayqa shäsh, I /Allahx-Dela/ vitina, delanash bu bokhuchärga /shayna ġo de aliy/". Tseran dōlaḥ ma dats shuna t'era zen dʿaaydar a‚ /ya i qecharna t'e/ derzor a.
17:57: Tsara shayga qoyqush bersh shäsh a bu shayn Dele /gerga khila/ neq' lökhush‚ tsarakh vuno /Dalla/ gerga verg mülkhanig vu-te /ḥözhush/. Dog dokhush bu üsh Tsünan q'inkhetame‚ qörush bu Tsünan ʿazapakh. Bakq'alla a, ḥan Qiosh- Qobuchun ʿazap khilla shekh lardala dezash.
17:58: Ma yats tsḥa a yurt Okha hxallakyiyr yotsush q'ematde dale‚ ya Okha shena ch'oġa ʿazap diyr dotsush. I khilla /Lavḥ maḥfuz/ zhayni choḥ yazdina /khiytsalur dotsush/
17:59: Tkho dukha tsa tökhna Okha ayatash dissorakh üsh ḥalkhalerachara khartsdaro ben. Okha yelira samudashna emkal, gush a yolush‚ tsara tsüntsa zulam dira. Okha tsa bossabo ayatashtsa qeram ben.
17:60: Dagadaiyta: Okha ma elira ḥöga: "Bakq'alla a, ḥan Qiosh-Qobucho nakhakh guo billina". Okha tsa khiliytira Okha ḥuna gaytina khilla dolu gar a, Q'urʾan choḥ shena neʿalt älla dolu ditt a nakhana pitana ben. Okha tsarna qeram qüssu‚ tso üsh alsam tsa bokhu dokqachu tilartsa ben.
17:61: Ḥakhade, (hxay paykhamar): Okha elira malikashka: "Suzhud de Ādamna". Tsara suzhud dira, Iblis dotscho. Tso elira: "As suzhud do tq'a Aḥ popparkh qöllinchunna?"
17:62: Elira /Ibliso/: "Ḥazhaḥ! Hxara vu Aḥ suna t'eḥ vazvinarg? Aḥ so t'äḥatattaḥ q'ematde dallats‚ tsünan zürret tilor ma du as‚ tsḥa k'ezzig bersh botsursh".
17:63: Tso (Dala) elira: "Dʿadala! Tsarakh ḥuna t'äḥa milla hxottaḥ a,– bakq'alla a, zhözhakhati yu-q shuna qochchush beqam.
17:64: Qeram tasa tsarakh ḥayn nitsq' qochucharna ḥayn ozatsa‚ gulbe (t'ekhetsa) tsarna düḥal ḥayn doshloy a‚ ġashloy a‚ deq'ashkho khila tsärtsa (tseran) ḥoleḥ a, dözalshkaḥ a‚ vaʿda ye tsarna!” Shayt'ano vaʿda ma tsa yo tsarna (üsh) ʿekhabar ben.
17:65: "Bakq'alla a, San /dog ts'ena, teshame bolu/ lesh, - tsarna t'eḥ baq'o yats ḥan". Qachame du ḥan Qiosh-Qoburg (üsh shayt'anakh ʿalashbareḥ) vekal khilar.
17:66: Shun Qiosh-Qoburg vu shuna hxorda chukhula kemanash lelosh verg shüga lekhiyta Shen komärshallakh (ritsq'). Bakq'alla a, Iza khilla shuna q'inkhetame.
17:67: Shukh zen-zulam ʿottadelcha hxorda choḥ‚ dʿa ma tüliy üsh, ash Iza votschünga, shayga qoyqush bersh. T'akqa Tso shäsh k'elḥardäkhcha lätta t'e – shu dukhadevli. Bakq'alla a, adam khili barkalle dotsush.
17:68: Shu teshna khili-te Tso shu lättan tsḥana deq'ana bukhadokhüturg tsakhilarkh ya Tso shuna t'e darts ḥovzor tsakhilarkh? T'akqa shuna karor ma vats shayna vekal.
17:69: Ya shu teshna dara-te Tso shu tsunna (hxorda) chu /tsq'a shun doʿa baḥaneḥ Okha aradäkhnachul t'äḥa/ yukha a derzorig tsakhilarkh, t'akqa shuna t'e mekhan darts ḥavziyna, tso shu khi bukha dokhüytur dolush, shu tsa teshash khilarna? T'akqa shuna karor vats shayna Tkhuna t'eḥ tsüntsa /beqam etsa/ t'äḥavällarg.
17:70: Okha siydina (leram bina) Ādaman k'entekh‚ Okha leliyna üsh arentsa a‚ hxorda chukhula a‚ ritsq' della tsarna ts'enchukh‚ Okha bazbina üsh Tkhäsh qöllinchu /khalq'ekh/ dukqacharakh bazbartsa.
17:71: Otsu /q'emat/diynaḥ Okha qoyqur du derrige a adamashka shayn imamatsa. Shen zhayna shen ättu küyga dellarg milla velaḥ a i, tsara shayn zhayna döshur ma du‚ tsarna tsürrig zulam diyr ma dats.
17:72: Quzaḥ bʿärsa dotsush milla khilleḥ a, – iza ekhartaḥ a bʿärsa dotsush khir vu‚ neq'atsa uggar tilavellarg a vu.
17:73: Üsh gerga khilira Okha ḥöga väḥitsa dossiynachukh ḥo dʿatilavan ḥöga Tkhuna t'eḥ qiderg qolliyta. T'akqa ḥo dottaġ lätsna khir ma vara tsara!
17:74: Okha ḥo (hxay Muḥammad, baq'dolchunna t'eḥ) tsa satsiyneḥara‚ ḥo gerga vara zhimma tsarna t'etovzha.
17:75: T'akqa /ḥo mushrikashna tsḥa zhimma a gergavakhana khilleḥ/ Okha ḥöga /ʿazap/ ʿovshiytina khir dara shozza dakhareḥ a‚ shozza valareḥ a‚ t'akqa ḥuna Tkhuna düḥal ġöncha karor ma vatsara.
17:76: Üsh gerga bara ḥo otsu lättara (Makkara) khervan‚ ḥo tsu chüra (Makkara) aravakqarḥama. T'akqa ḥol t'äḥa üsh k'ezzig ben ʿiyr ma batsara (Dala ʿazap diyr dara tsarna).
17:77: Okha ḥol ḥalkha bakhkiytinchu Tkhan elchaniyn ʿedaleḥ du iza. Ḥuna karor ma dats Tkhan ʿedalan khiytsdalar.
17:78: Aḥ lamaz hxottade malkh dʿakerchachu khenera büysanan bodane qachchalts‚ satasaran Q'urʾan a desha (ʿüyr-lamaz de). Bakq'alla a, satasaran Q'urʾan khilla shena teshallash dolush.
17:79: Büysanakh a (tsḥana deq'eḥ) aḥ q'aḥega ayḥa tsüntsa (Q'urʾan deshartsa) sovnakha lamazashkaḥ – ḥan Qiosh-Qobucho ḥo vakhiyta tarlo khastame mettige.
17:80: Aḥ āla /hxay Muḥammad/: "San Qiosh-Qoburg! San chuġoyla khiliytalaḥ baq'dolchun a, siylallin a neʿarekhula, san aravoliyla a khiliytalaḥ baq'dolchun a, siylallin a neʿarekhula. Khiliytalaḥ suna ġönna Ḥaygara baq'o a, nitsq' a (Ḥan mostaġekh so larvesh, Ḥan din dazdesh)".
17:81: Aḥ āla: "Baq'derg deana‚ khartsderg dʿadälla. Bakq'alla a, khartsderg dʿadala dezash khilla".
17:82: Okha dossado Q'urʾan chüra (ayatekh) muʾma nakhana /degnashna a, doġmashna a) darba derg a‚ q'inkhetam berg a. Zulamkhoshna – tso darash (zen) ben sov tsa dokhu.
17:83: Okha adamna niʿmat delcha, – i yukhavolu‚ genavolu /Tkhuna ʿibadat darkh/‚ sha bokhamo sḥalätscha, i khülu /Delan q'inkhetamakh/ dogdillina.
17:84: Aḥ āla: "Masso a vu ʿamal esh shen-shen kepara". Shun Qiosh-Qoburg diko khuush vu novq'atsa /massaral/ nisvellarg milla velaḥ a.
17:85: Tsara ḥöga khöttu /hxay Muḥammad/ sikh /lätsna/. Aḥ āla: "Sa san Qiosh-Qobuchun ġullaqakh du. Shuna ʿilma k'ezzig ben tsa della".
17:86: Tkhuna liʾneḥara‚ Okha dʿadäkqina khir dara ḥöga Tkhäsh väḥitsa dellarg – t'akqa ḥuna karor vats ḥayna tsüntsa Tkhuna t'eḥ vekal (i dukhaderzo nitsq' berg)
17:87: Ḥo Qiosh-Qobuchüngara q'inkhetam a ben. Tsünan komärshalla ḥuna t'eḥ yokqa khilla.
17:88: Aḥ āla: "Adamash a‚ zhinash a guldelcha hxoqu Q'urʾanakh teranig dan‚ diyr datsara tsara tsunakh teranig‚ tsarakh tsḥabersh vuqarna naq'ostiy khilcha a".
17:89: Okha hxoqu Q'urʾan choḥ nakhana bilgaldäkqina masso a hxuma. T'akqa a duqakhbolu nakh kerstanalla dotschunna düḥal khilira.
17:90: Tsara elira: "Tkho tsq'a a teshar ma dats ḥokh aḥ tsa dakqaḥ tkhuna lättakh ḥast (shovda),
17:91: Ya ḥuna khurmaniyn a‚ kemsiyn a besh tsa khilaḥ‚ tsunna yukq'ekhula aḥ khin tatolash tsa dakhkaḥ.
17:92: Ya stigal aḥ tkhuna t'e, aḥ ch'aġ ma-darra, keskashtsa tsa yozhayaḥ‚ ya ḥo tkhuna düḥal Dela a‚ malikash a dalosh tsa vaġaḥ‚
17:93: Ya ḥan khazyinchu hxumaniyn (dasho) ts'a tsa khilaḥ‚ ya ḥo stigla tsa valaḥ. Tsq'a a teshar dats tkho ḥan /stigal/ valarkh a, aḥ tkhuna zhayna dossadalts‚ okha sha döshush a dolush". Aḥ āla: "Vonakh ts'ena vu san Qiosh-Qoburg‚ tq'a so adam - elcha ben ma vats."
17:94: Nakh (kerstanash) tsa sovtsiyna tesharkh (iyman dillarkh) shayga niysa neq' beʾcha a‚ "Adam doüytu tq'a Dala elcha khüliy?" shäsh alaro ben.
17:95: Aḥ āla: "Lättaḥ parġat lelash malikash khilleḥ‚ tsärga dossiyna khir dara Okha stiglara malik, elcha a khilla".
17:96: Aḥ āla: " Qacham bu Dela tesh khilar suna a‚ shuna a yukq'eḥ. Bakq'alla a, Iza khilla Shen lesh /sov dika/ bevzash a‚ gush a".
17:97: Dala nisvesh verg – iza vu niysachu novq'aḥ verg‚ Dala tilabala bütush bersh – ḥuna karor ma bats tsarna ġönchiy, I Sha votsurg. Okha gulbiyr bu üsh q'ematdiynaḥ shayn yakhḥash t'eḥ bʿärsa dotsush‚ mott tsa khuush‚ q'ora. Tseran chuġoyla – zhözhakhati /-n ts'e/ yu. I ma yayneḥ‚ Okha tsarna alu sovyokqu.
17:98: Iza tsarna beqam bu üsh Tkhan ayatekh tsa teshash khilarna a‚ tsara alarna a: "Tkho däʿakhkash a‚ chim a khilcha‚ kerla khalq' khilla dendiyr du, tq'a?"
17:99: Tsarna tsa go-teḥa i stiglanash a‚ latta a qöllina volu Dela nitsq' qochush khilar i sannarg yukhaqolla? Tso tsarna shegaḥ sheko yotsu ʿozhalla yillira, - t'akqa a zulamkhosha kerstanalla ben q'obal tsa dira.
17:100: Aḥ āla: "Shu khilcha a san Qiosh-Qobuchun q'inkhetaman khazniyn doladesh‚ bʿärmetsig khir ma dara shu, üsh (i khaznash) shaygara dʿadovlarna qörush. Adam khilla pis (sutara).
17:101: Okha delira Musaga iss bilgala dolu delil. Aḥ khattal Israilan k'entashka: iza (Musa) tsarna t'e veʾcha‚ Firʿavna tsünga ma elira: "Suna kheta ḥo‚ Musa‚ /nakha/ ḥayna bozbuunchalla dina verg vu".
17:102: Tso elira: "Ḥuna khiʾna: hxorsh tsa dissiyna stiglaniyn a‚ lättan a Elo ben‚ gush yolu bilgalonash a yolush. Suna kheta‚ hxay Firʿavn‚ ḥo hxallaqir vu".
17:103: T'akqa tsunna (Firʿavnna) liira üsh (Israilan k'entiy) lättara (Misrara) dʿalakhka‚ Okha iza a‚ tsüntsa mel verg - masso a khina bukhavakhiytira.
17:104: Okha elira tsul t'äḥa Israilan k'entashka: "(Hxoqu) lättaḥ dākha‚ ekhartan (q'ematde hxottaran) vaʿda deʾcha‚ Okha shu dʿadügur du /Dalla ḥalkha/ vovshashtsa iyna /iyman dillinarg – kersta, dikanig – vonig/".
17:105: Baq'dolchüntsa dossiyna Okha iza /Q'urʾan/‚ baq'dolchüntsa dössina iza /Dalla gergara/. Ḥo tsa vaiytina Okha khaamcha a‚ qeramcha a volchu ḥoleḥ ben.
17:106: Q'urʾanan a daq'osh a dina Okha ḥöga i parġat deshiyta nakhana. Okha i dossiyna k'ez-k'ezzig dossortsa.
17:107: Aḥ āla: "Tesha tsunakh‚ ya ma tesha (Q'urʾanakh)! Bakq'alla a, shayna tsul ḥalkha ʿilma dellarsh i (Q'urʾan), shayna döshush, ch'enigishna t'e guora ögu".
17:108: Tsara (ʿilma dellachara) olu: "Vonakh ts'ena vu tkhan Qiosh-Qoburg‚ tkhan Qiosh-Qobuchun vaʿda qochushkhilla".
17:109: Ch'enigashna t'e iega üsh, bölkhush‚ tso (Q'urʾan desharo) üsh sovbokhu /Dalla/ müt'aḥ khilartsa.
17:110: Aḥ āla: "Shu qayqa /Dele/ Allahx aliy‚ ya Q'inkhetame verg aliy. Shu mülkhachüntsa (ts'artsa) qayqaḥ a – /dika du/‚ Tsünan khaza ts'ersh yu". Ḥayn lamaz duqa ch'oġa (az aydina) a ma de‚ sov mellasha (az laġdina) a ma de‚ tsu yukq'eḥ neq' lakha ḥayna (yukq'erchu barameḥ).
17:111: Aḥ āla: "Khastam bu Dalla, dözalkho (Shena) tsa lätsnachu‚ Shena pachchaḥalleḥ /mulkeḥ/ naq'ost (öshush) tsa khillachu. Siysazallakh /larvan/ ġöncha a tsa eshna Tsunna". Vokqa vie Iza vokqavartsa!
18:1: Khastam bu Dalla‚ Sha Shen lega zhayna dossiynachu‚ tsu choḥ (Q'urʾan choḥ) niysa dotsurg tsa daliyna Tso.
18:2: Niysa khilla dolu /zhayna du iza/, tsunakh /tsateshacharna/ qeram khiliyta Shegara ch'oġachu nitsq'atsa‚ shäsh dikanash desh bolchu muʾma nakhana qaʾ bakqiyta tsarna khaza yal khilartsa.
18:4: Qeram tasa shäsh ällacharna: "Dala dözalkho lätsna".
18:5: Tsarna tsüntsa tsḥa a ʿilma dats‚ tseran dayshna a (tsa khilla i). Inzare dokqa khili tseran bagakhula dolurg (dokqa q'a khilaran) dashtsa. Khartsderg ben ma dats tsara olush derg.
18:6: Ḥo khila mega /hxay Muḥammad/ ḥayn dog dokhosh tseran larshtsa (üsh baḥaneḥ singattame a khilla)‚ khalakhetash hxoqu khabarekh a üsh tsa tiyshicha.
18:7: Okha lätta t'eḥ mel derg khazdina tsunna (lättana), üsh zerḥama: mülkha vu-te ʿamaltsa uggar dikanig?
18:8: Okha khülüytur yu tsu t'eḥ mel yerg deq'a latta (t'eḥ hxumma a yotsush).
18:9: Ya ḥo möttush vara-te i ḥekhan a‚ raq'iman a day Tkhan ayatashna /yukq'eḥ/ tamashe hxuma khilla?
18:10: Ḥakhade /tsärga, hxay Muḥammad/: tsḥa q'onakhiy dʿa ma lechq'ira ḥekha chu‚ tsara elira: "Tkhan Qiosh-Qoburg‚ Ḥaygara q'inkhetam lolaḥ tkhuna‚ atta delaḥ tkhuna tkhan ġullaqeḥ nisdalar".
18:11: Okha tseran lergash dʿaq'evlira ḥekha choḥ masiytta sharna.
18:12: T'akqa Okha üsh denbira (samabekhira) Tkhayna khaarḥama /nakhana guchudokqush/, shina tobanakh mülkhanig yu tsara yakqina khan dika yagarʾesh.
18:13: Okha düytsu ḥöga tseran khabar baq'dolchüntsa. Bakq'alla a, üsh q'onakhiy bara shayn Qiosh-Qobuchukh teshna‚ Okha sovbekhira üsh niysachu neq'atsa.
18:14: Okha ch'aġdira tseran degnash, üsh ḥalaġevticha. Tsara elira: "Tkhan Qiosh-Qoburg‚ stiglaniyn a‚ lättan a Ela vu Ḥo‚ okha qoyqur ma dats I votschu Dele, – t'akqa okha ġalat derg er ma dara!
18:15: Hxoqu tkhan q'omo Iza votsurg /qin/ delanash lätsna. Tsara deʾneḥara tsarna t'eḥ bilgala delil! Mila vu tq'a vuno zulame sha Dalla t'eḥ khartsderg qöllinchul?"
18:16: "Shu tsarakh a‚ tsara, Dela a vitina, ʿibadat dechukh a dʿaq'ästi‚ ḥekha chu dʿalovchq'iysha – shuna barzhor bu shun Qiosh-Qobucho Shen q'inkhetamakh /q'inkhetam/‚ Tso shuna ätto biyr bu shun ġullaqashkaḥ".
18:17: Ḥuna go, malkh sḥaqetachu khenaḥ tseran ḥekhana ättu aġorkhula dʿaḥävzash, dʿabuzuchu khenaḥ – tsarakh dʿatülush ärru aġorkhula, üsh tsünan (ḥekhan) parġatchu mettigeḥ a bolush. Iza Delan delilekh du. Dala nisvesh verg – iza niysa verg vu‚ Dala tilavala vütush verg – ḥuna tsq'a a karor ma vats tsunna niysa neq' ḥökhu ġöncha.
18:18: Ḥuna möttu üsh sema bu‚ tq'a üsh nab yesh bu‚ Okha berzabo üsh ätto aġor a‚ ärru aġor a /latte tseran doġmash tsa daiyta/. Tseran zhʿäla, shen shi kog a barzhiyna, neʿsaġeḥ du. Tsarna t'eqiʾneḥ, – yukhaver vara ḥo vedda‚ t'ekhder ma dara ḥan tsarakh qerar.
18:19: Ishtta denbira (samabekhira) Okha üsh, tsärga vovshashka khattiytarḥama. Tsarakh olucho elira: "Mel lättira shu (otsu ḥoleḥ)?" Tsara elira: "Tkho lättira tsḥana diynaḥ ya diynan deq'aḥ?" Tsara elira: "Shun Qiosh-Qoburg dika khuush vu shu mel lättineḥ a. Ash vakhiyta shaykh tsḥaʾ hxoqu kekhatashtsa ġala. Lokhiyla tso uggar ts'ena qacha – tsunakh ritsq' doḥiyla tso shuna‚ sema khüliyla iza‚ tsḥänga ma khoüytiyla tso shukh derg.
18:20: Bakq'alla a, üsh shuna t'enislaḥ, tsara t'ulgash dettar du shuna‚ ya shu dukhaderzor du shayn dine – t'akqa tsq'elliga tsq'a a dakqiyder dats shu!"
18:21: Ishtta Okha tsarna t'e /nakh/ nisbaliytira, tsarna khaiytarḥama Delan vaʿda baq' yuyla‚ saḥt– tsu choḥ sheko yotsiyla (q'ematde hxuttur khilarna). Tseran ġullaqeḥ vovshashtsa galmorzakhbevlira üsh. Elira (tsḥabolchara): "Ġishlo ye tsarna t'ekhula (ḥekhana gonakhula). Tseran Qiosh-Qoburg dika khuush vu tsarakh derg". Tseran ġullaqna t'eḥ töllachara elira: "Tsarna t'eḥ mäzhdig (lamaz den mettig) diyr du vay".
18:22: Tsara er du: "Qoʾ vu (üsh)‚ tseran döalġanig – tseran zhʿäla du". Olu /tsḥa qechara/: "Pkhiʾ vu (üsh)‚ tseran yolkhalġanig – tseran zhʿäla du"‚ guchaḥ dotsurg khaa ġertash. Olu /vuqara/: "Vorhx vu‚ tseran borhxalġanig – tseran zhʿäla du". Aḥ āla: "San Qiosh-Qoburg dika khuush vu tseran teraḥ (üsh masa khilleḥ)‚ üsh tsa bevza k'ezzigcharna ben". Tsärtsa ma q'iysa bilgaldolchüntsa ben. Tsarakh lätsna hxoqarakh tsḥänga ma khetta.
18:23: Aḥ allane a ma alalaḥ tsḥana hxumanna t'eḥ: "As diyr du iza qana,
18:24: Dalla laaḥ"‚– olush ben. Ḥayn Qiosh-Qoburg dagavaiytalaḥ ḥuo vitsvelcha‚ ālalaḥ: "Hxoqul a niysachunna gerga vakhiyta mega so sayn Qiosh-Qobucho".
18:25: Shayn ḥekha choḥ üsh lättira qaa bʿe sharaḥ‚ /qin/ iss /sho/ t'etüykhira tsarna (sherashna).
18:26: Aḥ āla: "Dela dika khuush vu üsh mel lättira‚ Tsüngaḥ yu stiglaniyn a‚ lättan a q'ayle". Ma dika gush vu Iza (gan mel dezarg)! Ma dika khezash vu Iza (khaza mel dezarg)! I votsurg tsḥa a doladiyrig ma vats tsarna‚ Sha bechu satsameḥ tsḥänga a naq'ostalla tsa doytu Tso.
18:27: Aḥ diytsa (ʿamade) ḥayga väḥitsa dellachu ḥayn Qiosh-Qobuchun zhaynakh. Vats Tsünan deshnash khüytsuverg‚ ḥuna tsq'a a karor yats Tsunna Shena t'e yotsurg dʿavada mettig.
18:28: Ḥo sobare khila shayn qiosh-qobuchu Delan yuḥ ezash, Tsünga ʿüyranna a, süyranna a qoyquchärtsa (Tsunna ʿibadat dechärtsa). Ḥan shi bʿärg dʿa ma börziyla tsarakh, ḥuna dünenan khazalla ezash. Ḥo müt'aḥ ma khila Okha shen dog Tkho ḥekhorna ġopal 1 dinchunna a‚ shen dezarshna t'äḥahxöttinchunna a‚ – tsünan ġullaq erna khilla.
18:29: Aḥ āla: "Baq'derg du shun Qiosh-Qobuchüngara. Shena liʾnarg teshiyla‚ shena liʾnarg kersta khüliyla". Bakq'alla a, Okha kechyina zulamkhoshna /zhözhakhatin/ ts'e‚ tsünan penasha gobiyr bu tsarakh. Tsara ġo dekhaḥ‚ tsarna ġo diyr du khitsa‚ sha laliynachu echigakh tera dolchu, yakhḥash a yagaesh. Ma von malar du-q! Von khilla /tseran/ chuġoyla (zhözhakhati)!
18:30: Bakq'alla a, iyman dillinarsh a‚ dika ʿamalsh yinarsh a, – bakq'alla a, Okha eshor ma yats khaza ʿamal yinchun yal.
18:31: Üsh bu shayna ʿadn(yalsamanin) boshmash yersh‚ shayn /kogash/ bukhakhula khish ökhush‚ khazbiyr bu üsh tsu choḥ dasho hxazarshtsa‚ tsara t'edukhur du atlasan a, deza dariyn bätstsara dukhar a‚ tsu choḥ shäsh mängeshna t'etevzhina lättash. Ma dika mēla bu-q! Khaza khili (tseran) chuġoyla (yalsamani)!
18:32: Masalna valave tsarna shi stag. Tsu shinnakh tsḥanna Okha kemsiyn shi besh khiliytina‚ tsu shinna (beshana) go bira Okha khurmanashtsa‚ tsu shinna yukq'eḥ yalta khiliytira.
18:33: Shina a besho shayn daar delira‚ tsunakh (stömekh) hxumma a tsa telkhira. Tsarna yukq'ekhula khi digira Okha.
18:34: Tsunna khilira stömash, t'akqa tso shen naq'oste elira, i shetsa q'amel desh a volush: "San ḥaychul alsamo bu bakham a‚ so ḥol siylaḥo vu naq'ostiy khilartsa a".
18:35: I shen besha velira‚ shena zulam desh a volush‚ tso elira: "Suna tsa möttu tsq'elliga tsq'a a dʿaer yu /hxara besh/.
18:36: Suna tsa möttu saḥt hxuttur du. So sayn Qiosh-Qobuchünga dʿaverzavaḥ, suna karoza düsur ma dats dʿaverzartsa tsul dikanig".
18:37: Elira tsünga tsünan /busalba/ naq'osta, sha tsünga q'amel desh volush: "Aḥ kerstanalla do tq'a ḥo qöllinchunna popparkh‚ t'akqa t'adamakh‚ t'akqa ḥo Sha nisvina volchu /onda/ stag a khilla?
18:38: Delaḥ a, saykh lätsna älcha‚ Iza Allahx vu – san Qiosh-Qoburg‚ sayn Qiosh-Qobuchüntsa tsḥa a naq'ost lotsur vats asa-m!
18:39: Ḥuo ḥayn besha vakhcha‚ aḥ älleḥara: "MashaAllahx! Delatsa ben nitsq' ma bats". "Ḥuna so gush velaḥ ḥayl ledaro ḥolatsa a‚ dözalshtsa a,
18:40: san Qiosh-Qobucho suna dala a mega ḥan beshal a dikanig‚ dossadan tsünan (ḥan besha) t'e stiglara ḥesap – t'akqa tsunakh shera a mettig khülush (lättatsa dʿasharyina)‚
18:41: ya tsünan khi (lättakh) dʿakhudush‚ ḥan tsq'a a nitsq' qochur botsush i karadan".
18:42: Gobira tsünan stömekh (hxallaqilaro)‚ i volavelira shen küygash vovshekh detta, sha tsunna (beshana) kharzh yarna‚ tq'a iza (besh) shen bukh t'eḥ esa yolush. Tso olu: "As tsa lätsna khilleḥara sayn Qiosh-Qobuchüntsa tsḥa a naq'ost!"
18:43: Tsa khilira tsunna /ġönchiyn/ toba, sha tsunna ġo desh Dala dinchunna düḥal. I sha tsa khilira shena ġo dalush!
18:44: Tsigaḥ ġo – ḥaq' volchu Delan du. I vu dika verg mēla balartsa a‚ dika verg /khaza/ t'äḥe khiliytartsa a.
18:45: Dālade tsarna masalna dünenan dakhar: Okha stiglara dossiyna khi (doġa) sanna du iza – tsunakh iyra lättan oramatash. T'akqa tsarakh daq'adella asarsh khilira, shäsh mekhasha dʿasa a darzhadesh. Khilira Dela masso a hxumanna t'eḥ nitsq' bolush.
18:46: Bakham a‚ k'entiy a – dünenan dakharan khazalla yu. Bukhadüsush dolu dikanash tölu ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchun gergaḥ mēlatsa a‚ tölu dogdakhartsa a.
18:47: Okha lämnash düyladolüytuchu (dʿa-sḥadarzhochu) /q'emat/ diynaḥ‚ ḥuna gur du latta shardella. Okha sḥagulbiyr bu üsh (berrige a)‚ bukhavütur vats tsarakh tsḥa a.
18:48: Ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchun ḥalkha dʿahxittor bu üsh moġara: shu däkhkina Tkho dolchu, Okha shu dükhḥara ma-qollara. Shuna-m mottara Okha shayna /Tkhuna düḥalqetaran/ khan yullur yats‚ älla.
18:49: Oḥadüllur du teptar (adamasha dünenaḥ mel yina dika a, von a ʿamal dʿayazyina dolu)‚ t'akqa ḥuna gur bu q'inosh dinarsh tsu choḥ dolchukh qörush‚ shäsh olush: "Ma bāla bu vayna! Hxun du hxoqu teptarna? Tso -m bukha tsa ditina zhimanig a‚ ya dokqanig a tergal tsa desh!” Tsarna kariyra shäsh /dünenaḥ dolush/ dinarg (shayna) ḥalkhadillina. Zulam tsa do ḥan Qiosh-Qobucho tsḥanna a.
18:50: Dagadaiyta! Okha ma ällera malikashka: "Suzhud de Ādamna". Tsara suzhud dira, Iblis dotscho – i dara zhinekh‚ tso la tsa düyġira shen Qiosh-Qobuchun omrane. Tq'a ash lotsu iza a‚ tsünan zürret a dottaġiy‚ So a vütiy‚ – üsh shuna mostaġiy ma-bu?! Ma von bu-q zulamkhoshna /shäsh bina/ khiytsam!
18:51: As üsh stiglanash a‚ latta a qollaran a ‚ üsh shäsh qollaran a‚ teshash tsa hxittiyna. So tsa khilira /i San khalq'/ tilosh bersh ġönchiy lotsurg a.
18:52: Otsu /q'emat/diynaḥ Tso er du: "Qayqa ash shäsh San naq'ostiy bu‚ bokhush‚ ch'aġbesh khillachärga!" Üsh qayqira tsärga. Tsara otsarna zhop tsa delira‚ Okha khiliytira tsarna yukq'eḥ hxallaqilar (zhözhakhati bakhiytar).
18:53: Gira q'inosh dinacharna /zhözhakhatin/ ts'e‚ tsarna khiira shäsh tsu chu qochur duyla‚ tsa kariyra tsarna tsunakh dʿasaḥovziyla.
18:54: Okha /q'astosh/ daliyna hxoqu Q'urʾan choḥ nakhana masso a taypa masal. Adam khilira vuno duqa hxumanashtsa q'üysush.
18:55: Tsḥa a düḥalo tsa yina nakhana /Delakh/ tesha shayga niysa neq' beʾcha‚ shayn Qiosh-Qobuchünga gechdar dekha a – tsärga ḥalkhalerachiyn masal daro ben‚ ya shayna ḥalkha ʿazap hxottaro ben.
18:56: Okha tsa bokhküytu elchanash qaʾ bokqush a‚ qeram tosush a ben. Tsateshachara khartsdolchüntsa q'üysu baq'derg k'elditarḥama. San ayatash a‚ shayna qeram tesnarg a siysazadesh t'elätsna tsara.
18:57: Mila vu sov zulame, shena shen Qiosh-Qobuchun ayatash ḥekhiycha‚ tsarakh yukhavällachul a‚ shen küygasha ḥalkhadäkqinarg (sha dünenaḥ dina khillarg) ditsdiynachul a? Bakq'alla a, Okha tseran degnash t'e kirḥa tesna – t'akqa üsh tsunakh (Q'urʾanakh) tsa qeta‚ tseran lergash chu /yillina/ q'oralla. Aḥ üsh niysachu novq'a qayqicha a‚ tsq'a a nislur bats üsh.
18:58: Ḥan Qiosh-Qoburg gechdiyrig vu‚ /Shegaḥ/ q'inkhetam (bokqa) bolush. Tsarna /dünenaḥ/ karadinachunna Tso üsh /ʿazape ya bālane/ lötsush belaḥara‚ tsarna ʿazap sikhdiyr dara Tso. Tsarna tökhna khan yu‚ tsul t'ekhbevlla bovda mettig tsq'a a karor ma yats tsarna.
18:59: I yartash - Okha hxallakyira üsh‚ tsara zulam dicha‚ üsh hxallakbaran khan yillira Okha.
18:60: Dagadaiyta! Musas ällera shen ġullaqkhochünga: "So sotsur vats shi hxord vovshakhqetachu mettige qachchalts‚ ya lelar vu ekhkhachu zamanaḥ".
18:61: I shiʾ /shi hxord/ vovshakhqetachu mettige qächcha‚ tsarna shayn ch'ara bitsbelira‚ tq'a iza bolabelira hxorda chukhula neq' ban, lätta bukhakhula sanna.
18:62: T'akqa shäsh - shiʾ /otsu mettigakh/ cheqvälcha‚ tso elira shen ġullaqkhochünga: "Sḥaba vayna vayn qacha. Vay layna hxoqu vayn neq'eḥ khalo".
18:63: Tso (Musatsa khillachu k'anta) elira: "Ḥazhaḥ! Vay tarkh yolchu q'ayladevlicha, suna bitsbelira ch'ara‚ shayt'ano a ben suna i bits tsa baliyti‚ suna i daga a tsa boytush‚ tq'a tso shen neq' tsḥa tamashe kepara hxorda chu bäḥira".
18:64: Tso (Musas) elira: "I dara vayna dezash khillarg". T'akqa i shiʾ shayn lorakh yukhavirzira.
18:65: Tsu shinna kariyra Tkhan lekh tsḥa lay‚ Okha shena Tkhaygara q'inkhetam bella volu‚ Okha shena Tkhaygara ʿilma ʿamiyna volu.
18:66: Musas tsünga elira: "Ḥuna t'äḥahxuttiy so‚ ḥöga suna ʿamabayta ḥayna ʿamiynachukh niysa neq'?"
18:67: Tso (Khidzara) elira: "Ḥan nitsq' qochur bats sötsa sobare khila.
18:68: Mukha khir vu ḥo sobare ḥo shekh ʿilmantsa t'e tsa qiʾnachüntsa?"
18:69: Tso (Musas) elira: "Ḥuna karor vu so‚ Dala muq'alaḥ‚ sobar desh‚ ḥuna ʿesa khir vats so omra qochushdartsa".
18:70: Tso elira: "Ḥo suna t'äḥahxottaḥ‚ söga ma khattalaḥ tsḥana a hxumanakh latsiy‚ as ḥuna shekh derg dʿadiytstsalts".
18:71: T'akqa i shiʾ (Musa a, Khidzar a) dʿavolavelira. Shäsh shiʾ kemanna t'e khiʾcha, tso (Khidzara) tsunna (kemanna) ʿürg däkqira. Tso (Musas) elira: "ʿürg däkqi aḥ tsu t'era nakh khi bukha bakhiytarḥama? - Tsḥa ircha hxuma ma di aḥ!"
18:72: Tso elira: «As tsa elira, ḥan nitsq' qochur bats sötsa sobare khila?»
18:73: Tso (Musas) elira: "Aḥ suna bekhk ma billa so vitsvalarna‚ daz ma de suna /hxara/ san ġullaqakh".
18:74: T'akqa i shiʾ qin dʿavolavelira (dʿavakhara) tsḥana k'antana t'eʿottavallalts. Tso (Khidzara) i viyra. /Musas/ elira: "/Vanakh/ aḥ ts'ena sa diy-qa, sina düḥal a dotsush! Ma von hxuma di-qa aḥ!"
18:75: Tso elira: "As tsa ällera ḥöga ḥan nitsq' qochur bats sötsa sobare khila?"
18:76: Tso (Musas) elira: "Nagaḥ sanna as ḥöga hxoqul t'äḥa hxuma khattaḥ, suna naq'ostalla ma de: sögara bekhkazlo yu ḥuna".
18:77: T'akqa i shiʾ dʿavolavelira (qin dʿavakhara) tsḥana yurtarchu nakhana t'eqachchalts. Tsara tsu nakhe yaahxuma yiykhira, tq'a üsh tsu shinna ḥoshalla dan reza tsa khilira. Tsu shinna kariyra (gira) tsigaḥ t'ekhartsa bollu pen – tso (Khidzara) iza dʿanisbira. Elira /Musas/: "Ḥayna liʾneḥ, tsunakh makh ötsur bara aḥ".
18:78: Tso elira: "Hxara suniy‚ ḥuniy yuq'ara dʿaq'astar du. As tüdur du ḥuna ḥan sobar dan nitsq' tsa qächnarg:
18:79: kemanakh derg – iza hxorda t'eḥ bolkh besh bolchu miskachu nekhan dara. Suna liira iza dokho – tsarna t'eḥaḥ lättash vara pachchaḥ‚ masso a /dökhna dotsu/ kema nitsq'atsa sḥadokqush.
18:80: Tq'a k'ant – tsünan da-nana muʾma nakh bara‚ tkho qörura tso tsarna ġelo yarna /Delan/ dozanekh valartsa (Dala bokhurg tsadartsa) a‚ kersta khilartsa a.
18:81: Tkhuna liira tseran Qiosh-Qobucho tsu shinna, khiytsina‚ tsul dikanig /dözalkho/ loyla‚ ts'ena a‚ q'inkhetamtsa mella a gerga a volush.
18:82: Tq'a pen‚ i bara ġalaḥ volchu shina k'entan - boberan. Tsunna (otsu pena) bukhaḥ tsu shinnan khazna yara. Tsu shinnan da vara dika ʿamal yolush stag. Ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchunna liira i shiʾ ġemetta a hxottiytina‚ tsu shinga shayn khazna sḥayakqiyta ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchüngara q'inkhetamtsa. Iza as tsa dina san laameḥ. I du ḥan shena t'eḥ sobar dan nitsq' tsa qechnarg tidar".
18:83: Tsara ḥöga khöttu Shi maʿa yolchun ḥoq'eḥ. Aḥ āla: "As düytsur du shuna tsunakh lätsna khabar".
18:84: Bakq'alla a, Okha ch'aġvira iza (Zul-Q'arnayn) lättaḥ‚ belira tsunna /shen laame qacha/ masso a hxumanan neq' (nitsq', ʿilma).
18:86: Malkhbuze qächcha‚ tsunna kariyra (khaadelira) i (malkh) dʿabuzush ʿärzha khottan /dovkhachu/ shovdana chu‚ tsunna ulloḥ tsḥa nakh kariyra tsunna. Okha elira: "Hxay Shi maʿa erg (Zul-Q'arnayn)! Ya ʿazap diyr du aḥ (tsarna)‚ ya tsarna dikanig diyr du aḥ".
18:87: Tso (Zul-Q'arnayna) elira: "Zulam dinarg milla velaḥ a, – tsunna ʿazap diyr du okha. T'akqa shen Qiosh-Qobuchunna t'e dʿaverzor vu iza – t'akqa Tso ʿazap diyr du tsunna, ircha ʿazap.
18:88: Tq'a iyman dillinarg a‚ dika ʿamal yinarg a milla velaḥ a – tsunna beqamna melkho khazanig khir du (yalsamane). Okha tsünga er du Tkhan omranakh atta derg".
18:90: Malkh sḥaqetachu mettige qächcha‚ tsunna (Zul-Q'arnaynna) kariyra i sḥaqetash tsḥana nakhana t'ekhula‚ Okha shayna tsünan (mälkhan) düḥal tsḥa a düḥalo tsa yinchu.
18:91: Ishtta dʿaletsira Okha tsüngaḥ derg khaamtsa.
18:93: Shina /lamanan/ düḥalonna yukq'e qächcha‚ tsunna kariyra tsarna bukhaḥ /qechu nekhan/ q'amelakh qeta gerga botsu nakh.
18:94: Tsara elira: "Hxay Shi maʿa erg! Bakq'alla a, Yaʾzhuzh a‚ Maʾzhuzh a bökhanig darzhosh bu lättaḥ. Okha ḥuna – kharzh yoy (makh loy)‚ aḥ tkhuna a‚ tsarna a yukq'eḥ düḥalo yiyrig?"
18:95: Tso elira: "San Qiosh-Qobucho so shena choḥ ch'aġvinarg dika du (shun ḥolal). Suna nitsq'atsa ġo de‚ yiyr yu as shuna a‚ tsarna a yukq'eḥ ch'aġo.
18:96: Lo suna echigan ġorzanash (keskash)". Sha üsh shina lamanan yistoshkaḥ nisyicha (tseran yuq' yuzcha)‚ tso elira: "/Ts'e/ marsayakqa!" Tso tsunakh ts'e khiliyticha (i echig ts'are derzicha)‚ elira: "Sḥalo söga‚ as tsunna t'e laliyna ts'asta duttur du".
18:97: Nitsq' tsa qechira tsarna tsunna t'e bovla a‚ nitsq' tsa qechira tsarna tsunna ʿürg dakqa a.
18:98: Tso elira: "Hxara san Qiosh-Qobuchüngara q'inkhetam bu. San Qiosh-Qobuchun vaʿda eʾcha‚ Tso lättatsa dʿanisyiyr yu iza. San Qiosh-Qobuchun vaʿda baq' khilla".
18:99: Okha bütur bu üsh otsu /q'emat/ diynaḥ vovshashna t'ett'a- bettalush. Zurma (Israpil maliko, q'ematde hxuttush) loqur yu‚ Okha üsh (Dala mel qöllina sadolu hxuma) gulbiyr bu berrige a (beqamna).
18:100: Otsu diynaḥ tsateshacharna ma yarra goytur yu Okha zhözhakhati.
18:101: Üsh bara shayn bʿärgashna düḥal pardu dolush So ḥekhorakh /üsh kherabokhush/‚ üsh bara ladoġa nitsq' tsa qochush.
18:102: Tsateshnacharna möttu-te shäsh‚ So votsurg‚ San lesh ġönchiy lötsur bu? Okha kechyina zhözhakhati tsateshacharna choḥbakhka.
18:103: Aḥ āla: "As biytsiy shuna ʿamalashtsa uggare duqa shayna esham khillarsh‚
18:104: dünenan dakhareḥ shayn q'aḥegar /erna/ dayina khillarsh, shäsh dika bolkh besh bu a möttush?"
18:105: Üsh bu shäsh shayn Qiosh-Qobuchun ayatashna a‚ Tsunna Shena a düḥalqetarna kerstanalla dinarsh. Erna khilla tseran ʿamalsh‚ hxottor dats Okha tsarna q'ematdiynaḥ terza.
18:106: I - tsarna beqam bu zhözhakhati, shäsh kerstanalla darna a‚ San ayatash a‚ San elchanash belame barna a.
18:107: Bakq'alla a, iyman dillinarsh a‚ dikanash dinarsh a – tsarna khir yu Firdavsan boshmash choḥʿayla –
18:108: tsu choḥ guttarenna a büsur bu üsh‚ tseran mettana (tsu boshmiyn) (qin shayna) khiytsam tsa bezash.
18:109: Aḥ āla /hxay Muḥammad/: "Hxord san Qiosh-Qobuchun deshnashna sheq'a khilcha a, – hxord qachalur bara san Qiosh-Qobuchun deshnash qachadalale‚ tsunakh teranig Okha alssam deʾcha a /qin hxord khiliyticha a/".
18:110: Aḥ āla: "So adam du shu sanna‚ suna väḥitsa khaiytina shun Dela tsḥa Dela vuyla. Shen Qiosh-Qobuchunna düḥalqetare dog dokhush khillacho – dika ʿamal yoyla‚ shen Qiosh-Qobuchun ʿibadat dareḥ tsḥa a naq'ost ma lotsiyla tso".
19:2: Shen lekh Zakariyyakh ḥan Qiosh-Qobucho /bina bolu/ q'inkhetam ḥekhor /du hxara/.
19:3: Ḥakhade! Iza qayqira shen Qiosh-Qobuchünga q'aylakha.
19:4: Elira: "San Qiosh-Qoburg (san veza Dela)! Bakq'alla, san däʿakhkiyn ġora dayna /so q'anvalartsa/‚ /san/ korta q'özhallo dʿalätsna‚ so tsa khilira Ḥöga qayqareḥ‚ /veza/ Dela‚ deq'aznig (Aḥ san doʿina zhop tsa lush tsa vütura so – zhop lōḥa suna hxintsa a).
19:5: So qöru sol t'äḥa büsuchu sayn gergarnash baḥaneḥ /tsara Ḥan din dʿatasarna/‚ zuda a khili san ber tsa khülush‚ lōḥa suna Ḥaygara /dika/ dözalkho.
19:6: San irs ötsur tso‚ Yaʿq'uban dözalan irs a ötsur tso‚ Aḥ khiliytalaḥ iza‚ so qiosh-qobush volu san Dela‚ /Ḥo shena/ reza volush".
19:7: "Hxay Zakariyya! Okha khazakhetartsa qaʾ bokqu ḥöga k'ant vartsa‚ shen ts'e Yaḥya yolchu. Tsa khiliytina Okha tsul ḥalkha i ts'e erg".
19:8: Tso elira: "So Qiosh-Qoburg‚ mukha khir vara suna k'ant?! San zuda a ber tsa khülush ma yu‚ so a vokqalleḥ duqa tish vella a ma vu".
19:9: Elira /Delan maliko/: "Ishtta älla ḥan Qiosh-Qobucho: "I Suna /duqa/ atta du‚ ḥalkha ḥo a ma qöllina As‚ ḥo khila a tsa khillasheḥ".
19:10: Tso (Zakariyyas) elira: "So qiosh-qobush volu san Dela‚ tsḥa bilgalo khiliytaḥ suna!" Elira: "Ḥuna bilgalo yu-q aḥ nakhe qaa büysanna q'amel tsadar, ḥo /i dan/ mogush a volush".
19:11: T'akqa shen nakh bolchu aravelira iza miḥraba chüra‚ tso tsärga khaiytira ishar yartsa: "Tasbiḥ delash /Dalla/ ʿüyranna a‚ süyranna a".
19:12: /Dala elira/: "Hxay Yaḥya! Dʿalatsa zhayna (Tovrat) nütsq'ala (tsünan chulatsamakh a qetash, tso bokhurg a desh)!" Okha belira tsunna dika qetam i zhima k'ant vollusheḥ.
19:13: Tkhaygara (Okha delira tsunna nakhakh) q'akhetar a‚ ts'enalla a. I khilira /Delakh/ qörush a,
19:14: dena-nanna dika a; i vatsara /nakhana/ nitsq' besh verg a‚ ʿesa verg a.
19:15: Salam-marshalla du tsunna i dünen chu vällachu diynaḥ a‚ i liyr volchu diynaḥ a‚ i yukha /ġattiyna/ denviyr volchu diynaḥ a.
19:16: Aḥ ḥakhae zhayni (Q'urʾan) choḥ Maryam. Shen nakh bolchura i dʿayakhara malkhbaleḥarchu mettige.
19:17: T'akqa tso letsira sheniy, tsarniy düḥal kirḥa. Okha dakhiytira tsunna t'e Tkhan Sa‚ i tardelira tsunna niysa dolchu adamakh.
19:18: Tso (Maryama) elira: "So Q'inkhetam bolchüntsa /Delatsa) larlo ḥokh‚ ḥo /Delakh/ qörush velaḥ".
19:19: Tso (Dzhabrail-maliko) elira: "So ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchun elcha du‚ ḥuna ts'ena k'ant vala deana".
19:20: Tso (Maryama) elira: "Mukha khir vu suna k'ant! Sokh stag a tsa ḥaqa - vella‚ so nakhatsa lelash a tsa khilla".
19:21: Tso elira: "Ishtta älla ḥan Qiosh-Qobucho: "I suna atta du". I (ʿiysa-paykhamar dünen chu vāliytar) khülüytur du Okha nakhana delil a‚ Tkhaygara q'inkhetam a. I ġullaq qochushkhilladälla du".
19:22: I tsunakh berakh yisira‚ t'akqa i tsüntsa dʿayakhara genarchu mettige.
19:23: Ber daran lazaro i yaliyra khurman dittan ġad dolchu. Tso elira: "Ella elaḥara so hxoqul ḥalkha (hxara ḥal hxottale), – yitsʾella yalla khir yara so (nakhana)!"
19:24: Tso (ʿiysas ya Dzhabrail maliko) tsünga qayqira tsunna k'elara: "Ġayġane ma yozha‚ ḥan Qiosh-Qobucho ḥuna bukhaḥ /khin/ tatol khiliytina.
19:25: Lastade ḥayna t'e khurmanan dittan ġad‚ ḥuna t'eögur yu madʾella khilla khurmanash.
19:26: Yaa a yaa‚ mala a mala‚ yokqa a ye! Ḥayna adamekh milla a gaḥ‚ āla: "As Q'inkhetame volchünga nuzar dina (tsḥanga a) yist khir yats älla‚ so takhana yist khir yats tsḥanna adame ".
19:27: T'akqa i eara tsüntsa (beratsa) shen nakh bolchu‚ /shen karaḥ/ iza a daḥash. Tsara elira: "Hxay Maryam‚ ma tamashiyna hxuma du aḥ dinarg!"
19:28: "Hxay Hxarunan yisha! Ḥan da ma tsa khilla von stag‚ ḥan nana a ma tsa khilla nakhatsa lelash".
19:29: Tso (Maryama) tsüngaḥa (shen k'anteḥa) ishar yira (tsünga khatta älla). Tsara (tsünan gergarchu nakha) elira: "Tkho mukha dist khir du agan choḥ dolchu bere?"
19:30: Tso (zhimchu bero - ʿiysas) elira: "So Delan lay vu. Tso söga zhayna (Inzhil) della‚ Tso sokh paykhamar a vina.
19:31: Tso so berkate vina, michchaḥ so velaḥ a. Söga veset dina Tso lamaz a‚ zakat a (qochushde, älla), so diyna mel vu,
19:32: Sayn nanna dika khilar a (veset dina Tso). Tsa khiliytina Tso so /nakhana/ kuralla esh verg a‚ deq'aznig a.
19:33: Salam-marshalla du suna dünen chu vällachu diynaḥ a‚ liyr volchu diynaḥ a‚ yukha /ġattiyna/ denviyr volchu diynaḥ a!"
19:34: Iza vu i - ʿiysa‚ Maryaman k'ant, baq'dolchun dashtsa (olu As tsunakh derg)‚ tsara (zhügtasha a, nasarasha a) shena choḥ sheko esh dolchu.
19:35: Dalla tomeḥ dats (Shena) tsḥa a dözalkho lātsa. Vonakh ts'ena vu Iza. Sha tsḥa ġullaq qochushdesh‚ Tso tsünga olu: "Khila!" – iza khülu.
19:36: " Bakq'alla a, Allahx – Dela san Qiosh-Qoburg a vu‚ shun Qiosh-Qoburg a vu‚ Tsunna ʿibadat deysha. Hxara bu i niysa neq'".
19:37: Tsarna yukq'erachu tobanashna yuq'aḥ khilpalonash khilira: bokqa bāla bu tsa teshash khillacharna deza-dokqachu /q'emat/ diynaḥ gur dolchukh.
19:38: Ma bilggala khezar du tsarna, ma q'eggina gur du tsarna shäsh Tkhuna t'edäkhkinchu /q'emat/ diynaḥ! Amma zulamkhoy takhana bilgalchu tilar choḥ ma bu.
19:39: Dʿaḥede tsärga balanan /q'emat/ diynakh latsiy ġullaq qochushkhilla dälla khir dolchu, tq'a üsh (qu dünenaḥ) ġayġa-bala a a botsush‚ tsa teshash a bolush.
19:40: Bakq'alla a, Okha verasallina ötsu latta a‚ tsunna t'eḥ mel bersh a (admash a‚ zhinash a…). Tkhuna t'e yukhaberzor bolush bu üsh.
19:41: Ḥakhave zhaynaḥ (Q'urʾan) choḥ Ibrahxim. Bakq'alla a, iza khilla t'ekh baq'lüysh verg a‚ paykhamar a.
19:42: Ḥakhade! Tso ällera shen dega: "Dada‚ aḥ ʿibadat hxunda do shayna /hxumma a/ khezash dotscharna‚ shayna /hxumma a/ gush dotscharna‚ shäsh ḥo tsḥana a hxumanakh k'elḥarvokqur votscharna (ts'ushna)?
19:43: Dada‚ söga deana ʿilmanakh ḥöga tsadeʾnarg‚ suna t'äḥahxotta – as niysachu novq'a vügur vu ḥo.
19:44: Dada‚ shayt'anna ʿibadat ma deḥa. Bakq'alla a, shayt'a Q'inkhetam bolchunna (Dalla) ʿesa khilla.
19:45: Dada‚ so qöru Q'inkhetam bolchüngara ʿazap ḥokh ḥaqadalarna – t'akqa ḥo shayt'anan gergarnig khir ma vu".
19:46: Tso (Ibrahximan das) elira: "Tq'a ḥo dʿaq'ekhka san delekh‚ hxay Ibrahxim? Ḥo tsa satsaḥ (tkhan delanash yemal bechura)‚ as, t'ulgash tökhna, viyr ma vu ḥo. Dʿavala suna guchura tsḥana ekhkhachu khanna!"
19:47: Tso (Ibrahxima) elira: "Salam-marshalla du ḥuna. As gechdar dökhur du ḥuna sayn Qiosh-Qobuchünga. Bakq'alla a, Iza khilla sötsa duqa dika.
19:48: Shukh a‚ ash‚ Dela a vitina‚ shena ʿibadat dechukh a dʿaq'ästa so. Sayn Qiosh-Qobuchünga dökhu as‚ so tsa khila tarlo sayn Qiosh-Qobuchunna ʿibadat dartsa deq'aznig".
19:49: Iza tsarakh a‚ Dela a vitina‚ tsara shena ʿibadat dechukh a dʿaq'ästicha‚ Okha tsunna sovġatna velira (k'ant) Isḥaq' a‚ (k'entan k'ant) Yaʿq'ub a – (tsarakh) hxorannakh vira Okha paykhamar.
19:50: Okha delira tsarna Tkhan q'inkhetamakh /däkhni a‚ dözal a/‚ Okha khiliytira tsarna lakqara baq'dolu ḥekhabar.
19:51: Ḥakhave zhaynaḥ (Q'urʾan choḥ) Musa. Bakq'alla a, iza vara /Dala Shena/ q'astiynarg‚ iza vara elcha a‚ paykhamar a.
19:52: Okha tsünga qayqira lamanan ättu aġorḥara‚ gergavaliyra iza q'aylakhchu q'amelana.
19:53: Okha Tkhayn q'inkhetamakh /sovġatna/ velira tsunna shen vasha Hxarun, paykhamar a khilla.
19:54: Ḥakhave zhaynaḥ (Q'urʾan choḥ) Ismaʿil. Bakq'alla a, iza vara (sha yina) vaʿda baq'yesh verg‚ i vara elcha a‚ paykhamar a.
19:55: Iza khülura shen dözalna omra desh lamaztsiy (lamaz de, olush)‚ zakattsiy (zakat lo, olush)‚ i vara shen Qiosh-Qobuchunna gergaḥ shena /Iza/ reza verg (Dela tsunna reza vara).
19:56: Ḥakhave zhaynaḥ (Q'urʾan choḥ) Idris. Bakq'alla a, iza vara t'ekh baq'lüysh verg a‚ paykhamar a.
19:58: Üsh bu Ādaman zürretakh bolu Okha Nuḥatsa (kemana t'eḥ) leliynacharakh a‚ Ibrahximan a‚ Israilan a zürretakh a‚ Okha shäsh nisbincharakh a‚ khärzhincharakh a bolchu paykhamarekh Dala shayna niʿmat dellarsh. Shayna Q'inkhetam bolchun ayatash deshcha, guorabölkhura üsh, suzhud a desh, belkha a bölkhush.
19:59: Tsaral t'äḥa tsḥa t'äḥe eara sha lamaz dütush‚ /deġan/ shovq'ashna t'äḥahxüttush. T'äḥa t'eqüur bu üsh eshamna,
19:60: (tsarakh) tōba dinarsh a‚ iyman dillinarsh a‚ dika ʿamal yinarsh a botsursh. Üsh yalsamani chu ġur bu‚ tsarna tsḥa a zulam khir dats,
19:61: ʿadnan boshmashna chu‚ Q'inkhetam bolcho Shen leshna /tsara i shayna/ gush a yotsush /tsunna ʿamal yarna/ lur yu älla yolu. Bakq'alla a, Iza vara Shen vaʿda qochushkhir yolush (Dala yina vaʿda qochushkhir yu).
19:62: Tsarna tsu choḥ desa q'amel khezar dats‚ "Salam - marshalla" ben‚ tsu choḥ tsarna shayn ritsq' khir du ʿüyranna a‚ süyranna a.
19:63: I yalsamani yu Okha irsana lush Tkhan lekh /Delakh/ qörush khillacharna.
19:64: "Tkho oḥa tsa düssu ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchun omratsa ben. Tsünan du vayn ḥalkhaḥ derg a‚ vayn t'eḥaḥ derg a‚ otsarna yukq'eḥ derg a. Tsa khilla ḥan Qiosh-Qoburg vitslush".
19:65: Stiglaniyn a‚ lättan a‚ tsarna yukq'eḥ mel dolchun a Qiosh-Qoburg vu iza‚ Tsunna ʿibadat de‚ Tsunna ʿibadat darna t'eḥ sobar a de. Ḥuna vevziy Tsünan ts'erkho?
19:66: Adamo olu: "So velcha, t'äḥa denvina aravokqur vu?"
19:67: Oyla tsa yo-te adamo Okha sha qöllina khilarkh ḥalkha – i hxumma ma yatsara?
19:68: Ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchukh duy bou /As/‚ Okha gulbiyr ma bu üsh a‚ shayt'anash a‚ t'akqa zhözhakhatina gonakha balor ma bu, gorhxöttina.
19:69: T'akqa Okha sḥavokqur ma vu hxor tobanakh Q'inkhetam bolchunna düḥalo yartsa uggar ch'oġa verg.
19:70: T'akqa Tkho dika khuush du shäsh tsu choḥ bāga tam bersh.
19:71: Shukh ma vats tsu chu ġush verg ben. Ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchun i khilla satsam bollush qochushkhillarg.
19:72: T'akqa Okha k'elḥarbokhur bu shäsh /Delakh/ qörush khillarsh‚ zulamkhoy bütur bu Okha tsu choḥ gorabakhana.
19:73: Shayna bilgala dolu Tkhan ayatash deshcha‚ tsateshachara elira iyman dillinchärga: "/Vaykh/ shinnakh mülkha toba yu dika bakhamtsa‚ vovshashtsa tsḥänaqetartsa khaza?"
19:74: Mel hxallakyina Okha tsaral ḥalkha t'äḥenash‚ otsaral vuno khaza yolush ḥolatsa a‚ gartsa a!
19:75: Aḥ āla /hxay Muḥammad/: "Milla khilleḥ a tilar choḥ‚ Q'inkhetambolcho yakhyo tsunna khan /balane tsa lotsush/ i shena vaʿda yinarg: /dünenan/ ʿazap‚ ya saḥt shen bʿärgiy ḥalkha hxottalts – t'akqa khuur du tsarna‚ mila vu von verg mettigatsa‚ uggar ledar verg eskartsa".
19:76: Sovbokhu Dala nisbalaġertarsh niysachu neq'atsa. Bukhayusush yolu dika ʿamalsh tölu ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchun gergaḥ mēlatsa‚ tölu dukhaderzor dolchüntsa a.
19:77: Ḥuna giriy i Tkhan ayatekh tsateshnarg? Tso elira: "Suna lur ma bu bakham a‚ dözal a".
19:78: Q'aylakhdolchunna t'eqiʾna-te iza, ya Q'inkhetambolchüngara vaʿda etsna-te tso?
19:79: Hxan-hxa! Okha yazdiyr du tso bokhurg‚ yakhyiyr yu tsunna ʿazapan khan yakhyartsa.
19:80: Okha sḥaötsur du irsana tso bokhurg (tsünan bakham a, tsünan dözal a i hxallakvinchul t'äḥa)‚ Tkhuna t'e voġur vu iza tsḥa /däkhni a‚ dözal a botsush/.
19:81: Tsara lätsna Dela votsurg /qin/ delanash‚ shayna tsarakh siy khilarḥama.
19:82: Hxan-hxa! Tseran ʿibadatna kerstanalla diyr du tsara‚ tsarna mostaġiy khir bu tsarakh /q'ematdiynaḥ/.
19:83: Ḥuna tsa khiʾna‚ Okha shayt'anash dakhiytina kerstanashna t'e tsara üsh lüyra q'inoshna t'eqoyqush (üsh tsarna khazdesh)?
19:84: Sikh ma lo tsarna. Okha tsarna dagardesh du /denosh/ dagardartsa.
19:85: Otsu /q'emat/diynaḥ Okha gulbiyr bu /Delakh/ qörursh Q'inkhetambolchunna t'e t'ekhevshina 1 .
19:86: Okha dʿalokhkur bu q'inosh dinarsh zhözhakhate ġash 2 .
19:87: Shapaʿatan 3 da khir vats sha Q'inkhetambolchüngara vaʿda etsnarg a ben.
19:90: Stiglanash et'arna gerga du tsunakh‚ latta dadarna‚ lämnash dökhna degarna /gerga du/
19:92: Öshush dats Q'inkhetam bolchunna dözalkho lātsa.
19:93: Masso a stiglanashkaḥ a‚ lättaḥ a mel verg ma vats Q'inkhetam bolchunna t'e lay khilla voġur volush ben.
19:94: Tso tseran ḥesap dina‚ bagarbina üsh bagarbartsa.
19:95: Üsh masso a Tsunna t'e boġur bu q'ematdiynaḥ shäsh-shäsh.
19:96: Bakq'alla a, iyman dillinarsh a‚ dika ʿamalsh yinarsh a – tsarna Q'inkhetambolcho bezam khülüytur bu.
19:97: Bakq'alla a, Okha atta dina i (Q'urʾan), ḥan mattaḥ ḥöga /Delakh/ qörucharna tsüntsa qaʾ bakqiyta‚ lürachu q'omana tsüntsa qeram tasiyta.
19:98: Mel hxallakyina Okha tsaral ḥalkha t'äḥenash! Khaaloy ḥuna tsarakh tsḥa a‚ ya kheziy ḥuna tseran tata a?
20:2: Okha tsa dossiyna ḥöga Q'urʾan ḥo daq'azavakqa (ḥöga balanash ḥegiyta),
20:3: ḥekham khilla ben sha /Delakh/ qörush volchunna.
20:4: Sha latta a‚ leqa stiglanash a qöllinchüngara dossosh dolchu ḥoleḥ /du hxara Q'urʾan/.
20:5: Sha sov Q'inkhetame verg vu I – ʿarsha t'eḥ dʿanisvella (ch'aġvella) I.
20:6: Tsünan du stiglanashkaḥ derg a‚ lättaḥ derg a‚ tsu shinnan yukq'eḥ derg a‚ lätta bukhaḥ derg a.
20:7: Aḥ dosh ch'oġa ālaḥ a, – bakq'alla a, Iza khuush vu q'ayle a‚ vuno ḥulameḥ derg a.
20:8: /Tsḥa Allahx/ Dela vu – qin dela vats I ben. Tsünan yu khaza ts'ersh.
20:10: Tsq'a tsunna gira ts'e‚ t'akqa tso elira shen dözale: "Shu sovtsa /hxoqu metteḥ/‚ suna ts'e khaaella‚ so van mega shuna tsunakh tsḥa ālu yaḥash‚ ya suna karor bu ts'arna gergaḥ niysa neq'".
20:12: Bakq'alla a, So vu ḥan Ela‚ dʿayakha ḥan machash – ḥo vu T'uva oluchu ezachu ataġaḥ (arengaḥ).
20:13: As ḥo khärzhina – ladoġa väḥitsa düytsuchünga.
20:14: Bakq'alla a, So Dela vu‚ qin Dela vats So votsurg‚ Suna ʿibadat de‚ lamaz a hxottade So ḥekhavan.
20:15: Bakq'alla a, saḥt t'eqochur du‚ So vollu i ḥuldesh‚ hxor sinna sha t'eġertash dolchüntsa beqam khiliyta.
20:16: Ḥo tsunakh (q'ematdiynakh tesharkh) yukha ma vokqiyla, sha tsunakh tsa teshash, shen dezarshna t'äḥahxöttincho – (vakqaḥ) t'akqa hxallaqir vu ḥo.
20:17: I hxun yu ḥan ättu küygaḥ erg‚ hxay Musa?"
20:18: Tso elira: "I san ʿasa yu‚ so tsunna t'etevzha‚ as tsüntsa sayn zhana ġash egado‚ suna tsu choḥ qin paydanash a bu".
20:20: Tso i oḥaqössira – tsunakh chekhka teqash yolu teqarg khilira.
20:21: Tso elira: "Sḥaetsa i‚ qera a ma qera!" Shen ḥalkhalerrachu kütse erzor yu i Okha.
20:22: Ḥayn küg ḥan aġonna t'etaʿade – k'aydella, sḥader du iza, tsḥa a khalo yotsush – qin tsḥa delil du ḥuna
20:23: Okha (i delil dali ḥuna) ḥuna gaytarḥama Tkhayn dakqiychu delilekh (qin tsḥaʾ).
20:24: Ḥada Firʿavnna t'e ġo‚ – bakq'alla a, i t'ekhvälla /Delan dozanekh/".
20:25: Tso elira: "San Qiosh-Qoburg‚ sḥabellaḥ suna san kiyra /suna t'edokhku deqarsh qochushdan atta khiliyta/‚
20:27: Aḥ bastaḥa san matta t'era shad -
20:29: Veḥa suna ġöncha san ts'iynan ohxlakh-
20:32: Suna deq'ashkho veḥa tsunakh san ġullaqeḥ.
20:35: Bakq'alla a, Ḥo khilla-q (vu-q) tkho gush verg".
20:36: Tso (Dala) elira: "Ḥuna della aḥ dökhurg‚ hxay Musa.
20:37: Okha qin /ḥalkha a/ ma binera ḥokh q'inkhetam‚
20:38: Okha väḥitsa khaiytira ḥan nene khaiyta dezarg:
20:39: "t'orkaza chu villa i‚ t'akqa (Nil) khi chu qossa. Khino yustakh qussur vu iza – San a‚ tsünan a mostaġcho sḥaötsur vu i". As ḥuna sovġat dira Saygara bezamtsa‚ ḥo qiavayta San bʿärgashna ḥalkhaḥ.
20:40: Ḥan yisha ma yödu (khi yistekhula, ḥo choḥ volu t'orkaz tergal a desh)‚ t'akqa tso olu: "As t'eḥazhadey shu i qobur volchunna?" Okha ḥo yukhaverziyra ḥan nene, tsünan bʿärg buzo a‚ i ġayġane tsa yozhiyta a. Aḥ tsḥa stag viyra – Okha ḥo k'elḥarväkqira singattamakh. Okha ziyra ḥo ch'oġachu kepara. Ḥo visira tsḥana sherashkaḥ Madyanan nakh bolchoḥ. T'akqa ḥo sḥaveara shekhennaḥ /elchanalla ḥuna t'edilla Dala bilgalyinchu khenaḥ/‚ hxay Musa.
20:42: Ḥada‚ ġuo ḥo a‚ ḥan vasha a San delilashtsa‚ ash shimmo a ledarlo ma yelash So ḥekhavareḥ,
20:43: dʿaġo shiy a Firʿavnna t'e‚ bakq'alla a‚ i t'ekhvälla /Delan dozanel/.
20:44: Ash shimmo āla tsünga k'eda dosh‚ oyla yan tarlo tso‚ ya qeravala tarlo iza.
20:45: Tsu shimmo (Musas a‚ Hxaruna a) elira: "Tkhan Qiosh-Qoburg‚ tkho qöru tso tkhayna vas yarna‚ ya i t'ekhvālarna".
20:46: Tso (Dala) elira: "Shüshiʾ ma qera‚ So shütsa vu‚ khezash vu‚ gush vu.
20:47: Dʿaġo tsunna t'e‚ ash shimmo āla: "Bakq'alla a, tkho ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchun elchanash du. Dʿabakhkiyta tkhötsa Israilan k'entiy‚ ʿazap ma de tsarna. Tkho däkhkina ḥuna t'e ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchüngara delilatsa. /Delan ʿazapakh/ marsho yu niysachu novq'a t'äḥahxöttinchunna.
20:48: Tkhuna väḥitsa khaiytina: ʿazap khir du‚ älla‚ /ts'ena Delan din/ khartsdinchunna a‚ /otsunakh/ yukhavällachunna a".
20:49: Tso (Firʿavna) elira: "Mila vu shüshinnan Qiosh-Qoburg‚ hxay Musa?"
20:50: Elira /Musas/ : "Tkhan Qiosh-Qoburg vu‚ Sha masso a hxumanna sibat dellarg a‚ t'akqa /i/ niysachu novq'a dillinarg a".
20:51: Tso (Firʿavna) elira: "Ḥalkha khillachu t'äḥeniyn ġullaq mukha (khir) du?"
20:52: Elira /Musas/: "Tsarakh dolu ʿilma san Qiosh-Qobuchunna gergaḥ Zhayni (Lavḥul Maḥfuz) choḥ du‚ tila a tsa lo san Qiosh-Qoburg‚ vits a tsa lo.
20:53: I vu Sha khiliytinarg shuna latta aga khilla‚ Tso shuna tsu t'eḥ neq'ash dekhkina‚ Tso daiytina stiglara khi". Okha sḥadäkhna (qiina) tsüntsa (khitsa) shina kepara tayp-taypana oramatash.
20:54: Daa shayna (lättakh sḥadolu ritsq')‚ shayn däkhni a dazhade. Bakq'alla a, tsu choḥ delilash ma du ḥeq'al dolcharna.
20:55: Tsunakh Okha qöllina shu‚ tsu chu Okha shu yukhaderzor du‚ tsu chüra Okha shu aradokhur du (dendina) qin tsq'a (q'ematdiynaḥ).
20:56: Okha tsünga (Firʿavne) gaytira Tkhayn derrige a delilash – tso khartsdira‚ tso t'e tsa iytsira /üsh/.
20:57: Tso (Firʿavna) elira: "Ḥo veana tkho tkhayn lättara(Misran makhkara) aradakha ḥayn bozbuunchallitsa‚ hxay Musa?
20:58: Okha a goytur ma du ḥuna tsunakh terra bozbuunchalla. (Vovshakhqeta) khan yilla tkhuna a‚ ḥayna a yukq'eḥ‚ okha a, aḥa a khüytsur yotsu‚ – niysa mettig (massarna a t'ebakhka atta yolu mettig kharzha vayna q'ovsa)".
20:59: Tso (Musas) elira: "Khan yu shuna – khazdaran de a‚ ʿüyre delq'eḥa yörzush /ya malkh ġekhḥa ḥalabälcha, tsiga/ nakh sḥa a gulbesh".
20:60: Firʿavn dʿavirzira (baq'dol- chunna t'era), shen mekarlonash gul- yira‚ t'akqa (bilgalyinchu khenaḥ) veara.
20:61: Tsärga Musas elira: "Ma bala bu shuna (bale lotsur du shu)! Ma qolla Dalla t'eḥ khartsderg – Tso ʿazap doüytur du shuna. Hxallaqilla (Dalla t'eḥ) khartsderg qöllinarg".
20:62: Tsara q'iysira shayn ġullaq vovshashlaḥ‚ shäsh düytsush derg (q'üysush derg) q'ayladäkqira.
20:63: Tsara elira: "Hxara shiʾ bozbuuncha ma vu. Tsu shinna luush du shäshshinnan bozbuunchallitsa shu shayn lättara (makhkara) aradakha‚ shun masalin neq' shäsh dʿabaḥa (ash lelosh dolu dakqiyn bozbuanchallash shäsh dʿadaḥa).
20:64: Vovshakhtokha shayn mekarlonash‚ t'akqa tsḥana moġara dʿahxitta. Vokqaver vu takhana töllarg".
20:65: Tsara elira: "Hxay Musa‚ ya aḥ qussu (ḥayn ʿasa)‚ ya tkho khülu ḥalkha qüysursh?"
20:66: Tso elira: "Hxan-hxa‚ qissa ash!" T'akqa tseran mashshash a‚ tseran ʿasanash a tsunna tarlora tseran bozbuunchallitsa mettakhʾyuylush.
20:68: Okha elira: "Ma qera‚ bakq'alla a, ḥo vu vuno laqaḥ verg (ḥo tsaral tölur vu).
20:69: Qossa ḥayn ättu küygaḥ erg (ʿasa)‚ tso qollur yu tsara yinarsh. Bakq'alla a, tsara yina bozbuunchiyn mekarlo. Vokqaver vats bozbuuncha, michchaḥa a i veʾcha a".
20:70: Bozbuunchash suzhdane iygira. Tsara elira: "Okha iyman dilli Hxarunan a‚ Musan a Qiosh-Qobuchunga".
20:71: Tso (Firʿavna) elira: "Ash iyman dilli Tsünga as shayna purba dalale ḥalkha? Bakq'alla a, shun vokqanig vu iza (Musa) sha shuna bozbuunchalla ʿamiynarg. As dakhaza dütur ma dats shun küygash a‚ shun kogash a düḥ-düḥal (ättu küg, ärru kog)‚ as irkhʾukhkur ma du shu khurmanan dittiyn ġaddash t'eḥ‚ shuna khaaza düsur ma dats‚ mülkhanig vu tkhokh (sokh a, Musan Delakh a) ʿazaptsa nütsq'ala verg a‚ i dakhden verg a".
20:72: Tsara elira: "Tkhuna tska a ḥo ġole khetar ma vats tso (Musas) tkhuna yaliynachu bilgalonel a‚ tkho Qöllinchul a (tkhan Delal a). Qochushde ayḥa satsambinarg: aḥ qochushdiyr du-q dekq'a hxoqu dünenan dakhar (-an ġullaq).
20:73: Bakq'alla a, Okha iyman dilli tkhan Qiosh-Qobuchünga, Tsünga tkhayn q'inoshna gechdaytarḥama a‚ aḥ tkhöga nütsq'ala leladaytinchu bozbuunchallina a. Dela – dika a vu‚ /ḥol a, massaral a/ bukhavüsuverg a vu".
20:74: Bakq'alla a, shen Qiosh-Qobuchunna t'e zulamash dina voġush verg – tsunna khir yu zhözhakhati‚ liyr vats i tsu choḥ‚ vekhar a vats.
20:75: Tsunna (Dalla) t'e iymaneḥ a bolush, dika ʿamalsh a yina bäkhki- narsh – üsh bu shayna vuno lakqara darzhash (t'eġanash) kechdina dersh –
20:76: ʿadn (ts'e yolu yalsamanin) boshmash‚ shayn bukhakhula khish ökhush, tsu choḥ üsh guttarenna büsur bolush. I bu beqam shäsh (shirkakh a, q'inoykh a) ts'anbellacharna.
20:77: Okha väḥitsa khaiytira Musaga: "Novq'a vala /Misrara/ San lesh etsiy busa‚ billa tsarna /ḥan ʿasa tokhartsa / hxorda chukhula beq'a neq', ḥo qörur votsush /Firʿavnan eskar ḥayna/ t'eqiarkh‚ ḥo qörur votsush /shäsh khina bukhadakharkh a /.
20:78: Tsarna t'äḥavelira Firʿavn shen eskartsa – üsh dʿaḥulbiyra hxorda choḥ sha ḥulbecho(yokqachu tulġeno Firʿavn a, tsünan eskar a hxorda bukhabakhiytira).
20:79: Tilar chu bakhiytira Firʿavna shen nakh‚ niysachu novq'a tsa bigira.
20:80: Hxay Israilan k'entiy! Okha k'elḥardekhira shu shayn mostaġakh (Firʿavnakh)‚ vaʿda yira shütsa loman ättu aġorgaḥ‚ Okha dossiyra shuna manna a‚ salva a.
20:81: Daa Okha shayna dellachu ritsq'akh ts'enaderg‚ t'ekh ma dovlalash /dozanekh/ tsu t'eḥ (qoame khilalash) – t'akqa /t'ekhdovlaḥ/ San öġazlo ḥärchar yu shukh. Shekh San öġazlo ḥärchinarg – hxallaqilla.
20:82: Bakq'alla a, So vu t'ett'a gechdiyrig sha tōba dinachunna‚ iyman dillinchunna‚ dika ʿamal yinachunna- t'akqa niysachu novq'a vällachunna.
20:83: "Ḥo sten sikhvi ḥayn q'omakh‚ hxay Musa?".
20:84: Tso elira: "Üsh bu san lorakh /suna t'äḥa boġush/‚ so-m sikhvelira Ḥuna t'eqacha‚ san Qiosh-Qoburg‚ Ḥo reza khiliytarḥama".
20:85: Tso (Dala) elira: "Bakq'alla a, Okha pitane lätsna ḥan q'am ḥol t'äḥa (aḥ iza ḥayl t'äḥaditcha)‚ iza tiladina Samiriys".
20:86: Musa shen q'omana t'e yukhavirzira, öġaz a vakhana‚ ġel a vella. Tso elira: "Hxay san q'am! Shun Qiosh-Qobucho shütsa khaza vaʿda tsa yinera tq'a? Yakhʾeli shuna vaʿda ya shuna lii shaykh shayn Qiosh-Qobuchun öġazlo ḥarcha – ash yokhiy san vaʿda?!"
20:87: Tsara elira: "Okha tsa yokhiyra ḥan vaʿda tkhayn laamtsa‚ amma tkhöga sḥabaiytira /tsu Firʿavnan/ q'oman khazniyn makhḥash‚ Okha üsh /ts'erga/ qissira. Ishtta qössira Samiyriys".
20:88: Tso tsarna esan kütseḥ dina surt hxottiyra, ʿäkhash a dolush. T'akqa tsara (tilabellachara vuqärga) elira: "Hxara shun a Dela vu‚ Musan a Dela vu. Amma tso (Musas) vitsvina /i shen Dela /".
20:89: Tsarna tsa go-te tso (eso) shayna düḥal q'amel tsadar a‚ tsüngaḥ (shena ʿibadat tsa dicha) shayna zene derg a‚ (shena ʿibadat dicha) payde derg a tsakhilar a?
20:90: Hxaruna a ma ällera tsärga ḥalkha (Musa vukhaverzale): "Hxay san q'am‚ shu tsüntsa pitane lätsna. Bakq'alla a, shun Qiosh-Qoburg Ar- Raḥman vu. Suna t'äḥahxitta‚ san omrana müt'aḥ khila".
20:91: Tsara elira: "Tkho sovtsur dats tsunna ʿibadat dechura, tkhayna t'e Musa vukhaverzzalts".
20:92: Tso(Musas, sha yukhavirzicha) elira: "Hxay Hxarun‚ ḥuna sten novq'arlo yi, üsh tilabella gicha,
20:93: suna t'äḥahxotta? San omrana ʿesa khili ḥo?"
20:94: Tso (Hxaruna) elira: "Hxay san nenan k'ant! Ma latsa san mazh a‚ san korta a. So qiyrira aḥ ālarna: "Israilan k'entiy beq'na aḥ, san dosh a tergal tsa di aḥ".
20:95: Tso elira: "Tq'a aḥ hxun er du, hxay Samiriy (Ḥan daytina i ḥöga)?".
20:96: Tso elira: "Suna gira tsarna tsa ginarg: as sḥaiytsira elchanan lora t'era tsḥa kana /chan/‚ i qössira as /esan sürta t'e/‚ ishtta khazdira suna /i/ san sino".
20:97: Tso (Musas Samiriychünga) elira: "Dʿaġo! Aḥ /dünenan/ dakhareḥ bakha dezar du: «Ḥaqavala megar dats!". Ḥuna tökhna khan yu‚ yokhor yotsush. Ḥazhal ḥayn dele‚ ḥo shena ʿibadat desh lättash volchu‚ okha i vagavo‚ t'akqa okha i varzhor vu, chim a bina, hxorda choḥ".
20:98: Shun Dela Allahx vu‚ Sha votsurg qin dela a votsush‚ masso a hxuma chulätsna Tso ʿilmantsa".
20:99: Ishtta Okha düytsu ḥöga ḥalkha khillachu khaamekh lätsna‚ Okha delira ḥöga Tkhaygara /hxara Q'urʾan qeta luuchunna/ ḥekham a khilla.
20:100: Tsunakh dʿabirzinarsh‚ mülsh belaḥ a‚ – bakq'alla a, tsara ḥur ma bu q'ematdiynaḥ /q'inoyn/ moḥ.
20:101: Guttarenna a büsur bu üsh tsu /zhözhakhati/ choḥ – von khir bu tsarna q'ematdiynaḥ i moḥ.
20:102: Otsu diynaḥ (Israfil maliko) zurma loqur yu‚ Okha gulbiyr bu otsu diynaḥ q'inosh dinarsh, senbella/shayn besnash a, bʿärgash a/.
20:103: Vovshashka shabar-shibar diyr du tsara: "Asha-m tsa däkqira /dünenan dakhareḥ/ itt /de/ ben".
20:104: Tkho dika khuush du tsara düytsur derg. Tsarakh (dakharan) neq'a t'eḥ lelartsa uggar töllachara er du: "Asha-m tsḥa /de/ ben tsa däkqina".
20:105: Tsara khöttu ḥöga lämnekh lätsna‚ aḥ āla: "Dokhiyna (ätta), darzhor du üsh san Qiosh-Qobucho".
20:106: Dütur du Tso üsh shera are a khilla.
20:107: Ḥuna gur yats tsigaḥ täʿna a, ayaella a mettig.
20:108: Otsu diynaḥ üsh t'äḥahxüttur bu qayqambechunna‚ shekh yustakhbovliyla dotsush‚ dʿatiyna khir du äznash Sov Q'inkhetame volchunna (Dalla) müt'aḥ a khilla‚ ḥuna khezar dats shabar-shibar ben.
20:109: Otsu diynaḥ payda biyr bats shapaʿato Sha Sov Q'inkhetame volcho shena purba dellachunna ben‚ shen dashna Iza (Dela) reza khillachunna ben.
20:110: Tsunna (Dalla) khäa tseran khinderg a‚ tseran khillarg a‚ üsh t'äḥaqüur bats Tsunna (Dalla) ʿilmantsa.
20:111: Yakhḥash müt'aḥ khir yu Sha Diyna Volchunna, Sha /ʿalamiyn ġullaqashna/ Dʿahxöttiyna Volchunna (Dalla), dog dillina vüsur vu zulam dinarg (Delatsa naq'ost lätsnarg).
20:112: Sha dikanash dinarg‚ sha muʾma a volush – i qörur vats zulamakh a‚ eshamakh a.
20:113: Ishtta dossiyra Okha i ʿärbiyn Deshar a dina‚ tsu choḥ qeramash bilgalbekhira Okha, üsh qörur batsara-te‚ älla‚ ya tso tsarna /shayl ḥalkha khillarsh hxallaqilar/ dagadoytur datsara-te‚ älla.
20:114: Leqa vu Dela – Sha baq'volu pachchaḥ! Sikh ma lo /hxay Muḥammad/ Q'urʾantsa (Dzhabrail-malikana t'äkhḥe döshush, ditsdalarna qörush) ḥayga Tsünan väḥiy cheqdallalts‚ āla: "So Qiosh-Qobushverg‚ sovvakqa so ʿilmaneḥ".
20:115: Okha vaʿda yinera ḥalkha Ādamtsa a – tso yitsyira i. Tkhuna tsa kariyra tsüngaḥ ch'oġalla (sobar tsa töira Delan omra qochushdan).
20:116: Ḥakhade! Okha ällera malikashka: "Suzhud de Ādamna". Tsara suzhud dira, Iblis dotscho – i düḥaldelira /suzhud dan/.
20:117: Okha elira: "Hxay Ādam‚ bakq'alla a, hxara /Iblis/ mostaġ du ḥan a‚ ḥan zudchun a. Tso yalsamani chüra ara ma dokqiyla shüshiʾ – t'akqa (tso dakqaḥ) daq'azaver vu ḥo.
20:118: Bakq'alla a, ḥo tsu /yalsamani/ choḥ metsa a vüsur vats‚ verzina (berq'a) a vüsur vats.
20:119: Ḥo tsu choḥ ḥaglur a vats‚ /mälkhan/ yovkhono vagor a vats".
20:120: Shayt'a t'edirzira tsunna /Adamna i tilavan/‚ tso elira: "Hxay Ādam‚ as t'enisvey ḥo guttarenan a‚ tsq'a a cheqder dotschu pachchaḥallin a ditta t'e?"
20:121: Tsu shimmo tsu (ditta) t'era /stom/ qällira – t'akqa tsu shinna shäshshinnan ieḥe mettigash guchuevlira – üsh büylabelira shayna t'e yalsamanin (dittan) ġash letadan. Ādama ʿesalla yira shen Qiosh-Qobuchunna – i tilavelira.
20:122: T'akqa shen Qiosh-Qobucho khärzhira iza (Adam, paykhamar vira tsunakh)‚ tōba q'oboldira tsünan‚ niysachu novq'a a väkqira i.
20:123: Tso (Dala) elira: "Oḥadissa shu shiʾ tsu /yalsamani/ chüra /Iblisatsa/ tsḥäna, shun zürretakh tsḥabersh (Adaman a, Ḥavan a t'äḥe a), vuqarna (Iblis a, tsünan bʿo a) mostaġiy a khillachu ḥoleḥ. Shüga qachchane a qachaḥ Sögara niysa neq'‚ tsu San neq'ana t'äḥaväznarg – i tilalur vats (dünenaḥ)‚ i daq'azaver vats (ekhartaḥ).
20:124: So ḥekhorakh yukhavällarg – sov gotta bakham bu tsünan (koshan gottalla khir yu tsunna). Okha ġattor (denviyr) vu i q'ematdiynaḥ, bʿärze a volush.
20:125: Tso er du: "So Qiosh-Qoburg‚ Aḥ hxunda ġatti so, bʿärsa a dotsush‚ so bʿärsa dolush ma vara-q (dünenaḥ)?"
20:126: Tso (Dala) er du: "Ishtta (ḥo bʿärze ġattor sanna) däkhkira ḥöga Tkhan ayatash – aḥ üsh ditsdira (tsarakh dʿa a virzina). Ishtta (aḥ üsh dünenaḥ ditsdare terra) takhana ḥo a vitsviyr vu (zhözhakhate a vakhiytina)".
20:127: Ishtta beqam bo Okha t'alam tsa binachunna‚ shen Qiosh-Qobuchun ayatekh tsa teshnachunna. Ekhartan ʿazap vuno ch'oġa a du‚ /khanna/ dekha a du.
20:128: Üsh (Makkin mushrikash) niysachu novq'a t'e tsa bäkhna -te Okha shayl ḥalkha mel hxallakyinchu t'äḥenasha? – tseran hxusamashkakhula dʿasalelash ma bu üsh (tsarna gush ma yara üsh hxalaqilaran larash)! Bakq'alla a, tsu choḥ delilash ma du ḥeq'al dolcharna.
20:129: Dosh ḥalkha tsa dälleḥara ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchüngara, i khinderg dara, ts'e tökhna khan a /tsa khilleḥara/.
20:130: (Tsundela) sobare khila ḥo tsara düytsuchunna t'eḥ‚ ḥayn Qiosh-Qobuchunna tasbiḥ (lamaz) de malkh sḥaqetale a‚ i dʿabuzale a. Büysanna a tasbiḥ (lamaz) de‚ diynan dozanashkaḥ a‚ – ḥo reza khila tam bu.
20:131: Ḥan bʿärgash ḥezhane a ma ḥiyzhade Okha tsarakh (mushrikekh) shayna (dünenan) daq'a dellachärga– dünenan dakharan zazadakqar du iza‚ üsh tsüntsa Okha zerḥama. Ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchun ritsq' dika a‚ vuno khanna dekha a du.
20:132: Omra de ḥayn dözale (ohxlane) lamaz de‚ aliy‚ ḥo a tsu t'eḥ (lamaz dareḥ) sobare a khila. Okha tsa dökhu ḥöga ritsq'. Okha lur du ḥuna ritsq'. T'äḥe – /Delakh/ qerar (dolcharna) yu!
20:133: Tsara (tsateshachara) elira: "Tso (paykhamara) deʾneḥara vayga shen Qiosh-Qobuchüngara tsḥa /bilgala/ delil?" Tsärga tsa eana tq'a bilgalo ḥalkhalerchu zhaynashkaḥ?
20:134: Okha üsh hxallakbineḥara ʿazaptsa tsul (paykhamar vaiytale) ḥalkha‚ tsara er ma dara: "Tkho Qiosh-Qoburg‚ Aḥ vaiytineḥara tkhöga elcha, – tkho t'äḥahxüttur ma dara Ḥan ayatashna‚ tkhäsh siysaza khilale‚ tkhäsh yuḥʿärzha hxittale?"
20:135: Aḥ āla (hxay paykhamar, otsu tsateshachärga): "Masso a ḥözhush vu (ḥenan khir bu tolam)‚ ḥözhush ʿe shu a‚ t'akqa, t'äḥa, khuur du shuna‚ mülsh bu niysachu neq'an day, mülsh bu nisbellarsh".
21:1: Gergadeana nakhana shaytsa ḥesap dar, amma üsh, tergo a tsa esh (ben tsa khetash)‚ /ekhartan ʿamal yarkh/ dʿabirzina ma bu.
21:2: Tsärga tsa boġu shayn Qiosh-Qobuchüngara tsḥa a kerla ḥekham tsara tsünga lovzuchu ḥoleḥ (tsabashartsa) laduġush ben. (Shayga bäkhkinchu kerlachu ḥekhamashka tsara laduġu, basha a tsa beshash),
21:3: Shayn degnasha /ḥekhaman mäʿna/ tidame a tsa ötsush, q'aylakh khabarsh düytsura zulamash desh bolchara: "Shu sanna adam dats hxara a? Bozbuunchalla q'obaldo ash‚ shayna gush a dolush /i bozbuunchalla duyla/?"
21:4: Tso (paykhamara) elira: "San Qiosh-Qobuchunna khäa stiglaḥ a‚ lättaḥ a /desh dolu/ q'amel. Iza khezash verg a‚ khuush verg a vu".
21:5: Hxaʾ‚ tsara elira: "(Üsh) vovshakh iedella(tsḥa a mäʿna dotsu) ġenash du. Hxaʾ‚ tso sha qöllina üsh. Hxaʾ‚ iza illancha vu. Vayna tsḥana deliltsa voġiyla i‚ ḥalkhalernash bakhkiytare terra".
21:6: Iyman tsa dillira tsaral ḥalkha a Okha hxallakyinchu tsḥana a yurto. Hxoqara düllur dara iyman?
21:7: Okha tsa bakhkiytira ḥol ḥalkha a bozhariy (elchanash) ben‚ Okha tsärga väḥiy a lush. Khattal ḥekhame bolchu nakhe‚ shäsh tsa khuush delaḥ.
21:8: Okha tsa qöllira tsarakh (elchanekh) qacha tsa bou doġmash‚ üsh daima a büsur batsara (dünenaḥ).
21:9: T'akqa Okha baq'khiliytira (qochushyira) tsärtsa (elchanashtsa khilla) vaʿda. Okha k'elḥarabekhira üsh a‚ Tkhayna luursh a‚ Okha hxallakbira /Delan dozanel/ t'ekhbevllarsh (elchanash khartsbinarsh).
21:10: Okha dossiyna shüga zhayna /hxay ʿärbiy/‚ shena choḥ shu ḥekhor /shukh siydar/ dolush /i shun mattaḥ a dolush/‚ shu ḥeq'ale tsa khülu (shu qetame tsa doġu)?
21:11: Mel yokhiyna Okha zulame khilla yolu yartash! Qiiyra Okha tsaral t'äḥa qin q'ämnash.
21:12: Shayna Tkhan nitsq' khaabelcha‚ üsh tsigara (yartashkara) sikha bovdu.
21:13: "Ma dovda! Yukhaderza shu shena choḥ /ḥalkha/ niʿmat khillachu /dakharna/‚ shayn hxusamashka - shüga dekharsh dan (nakha tsḥatstsa hxumanash ekha) tarlo".
21:14: Tsara elira: "Ma bala bu-q tkhögaḥ! Bakq'alla a, tkho khilla-q zulamkhoy!"
21:15: I tseran tiyzhamash (qayqamash) tsa sevtsira Okha shäsh ḥäqna yaltin are sanna khiliyttalts‚ shäsh dʿabayna a (mettakhʾḥer a, bistkhilar a dotsush) bisna.
21:16: Okha tsa qöllina stigal a‚ latta a‚ tsärshinna yukq'eḥ erg a begashiyna.
21:17: Tkho khilleḥara sinq'eram bezash /zudarshtsa a, dözalshtsa a/‚ Okha sḥaötsur bara i Tkhäshkara (Tkhäshna gergaḥ bolchu hxürlaʿanan mekhkarshkara a, malikashkara a, shügara tsa ötsush)‚ nagaḥ sanna Okha i diyrig khilcha.
21:18: Hxaʾ‚ Okha baq'derg tukhu khartsdolchunna – tso i daya‚ i (khartsderg) hxallakkhülu. Bāla khir bu shuna shäsh /Tkhuna / qullush dolchu /kharts/ sibatekh.
21:19: Tsünan bu stiglanashkaḥ a‚ lättaḥ a mel bersh. Tsunna gergaḥ bersh kura a tsa bovlu Tsunna ʿibadat dan‚ k'ad a tsa lo.
21:20: Tsara tasbiḥ do busa a‚ diynaḥ a‚ shäsh ġel tsa lush.
21:21: Tq'a tsara bina-te delanash lättakh, tsara (tsu delanasha bellarsh) den a besh?
21:22: Tsu shinnaḥa a Allahx votsurg /qin/ delanash khilleḥara – üsh shiy a hxallakkhilla khir yara. Ts'ena vu i Dela‚ ʿärshan Da‚ tsara /Shena t'e/ qulluchu kharts sibatekh.
21:23: Tsünga (Dele) khottur dats Tso deshdolchukh‚ tsärga (Dala mel qöllinchu hxumane) khottur du /tsara dünenaḥ dinachukh lätsna/.
21:24: Tq'a tsara letsna I votsurg /qin/ delanash? Aḥ āla /hxay Muḥammad/: "Dālade shayn teshallash! Hxara (Q'urʾan) ḥekham bu sötsa bolcharna a‚ sol ḥalkha khillacharna a (Tavrat a, Inzhil a, qin zhaynash a – tsarna choḥ massanḥa a Dela tsḥaʾkhilar ch'agʾdesh du, Q'urʾana choḥ sanna). Hxaʾ‚ duqakhbolcharna tsa khäa baq'derg‚ üsh düḥalbevlla".
21:25: Okha tsa vakhiytina ḥol ḥalkha tsḥa a elcha‚ Okha shega väḥitsa khoüytush ben qin dela vats So ben‚ Suna ʿibadat deysha‚ älla.
21:26: Tsara elira: "Lätsna Q'inkhetam bolcho dözalkho". Vonakh ts'ena vu Iza! Üsh-m siylaḥ bolu lesh bay!
21:27: Üsh (paykhamarash) Tsul ḥalkha tsa bovlu dashtsa‚ üsh Tsünan omratsa ʿamal esh bu.
21:28: Tsunna khäa tseran ḥalkhaḥ derg a‚ tseran t'eḥaḥ derg a, tsara shapaʿat diyr dats Iza shena reza khillachunna ben‚ üsh Tsunakh qörush, egosh bu.
21:29: Milla velaḥ a‚ tsarakh olush: "So vu dela‚ Iza a votsush"‚– tsunna beqam biyr bu Okha zhözhakhatitsa. Ishtta beqam bo Okha zulamkhoshna.
21:30: Tsateshacharna tsa go-teḥa stiglanash a‚ latta a khilla khilar vovshakhkhottadella? Okha üsh q'astiyra! Okha qöllira khikh masso a diyna (sa dolu) hxuma. Üsh tsa tesha-te?
21:31: Okha khiliytira lättaḥ lämnash‚ iza tsärtsa ch'aġdaliytarḥama. Okha khiliytira tsu choḥ toġin neq'ash – üsh niysachu novq'a bakha megar-q.
21:32: Okha khiliytira stigalakh sha ʿalashbesh bolu tkhov‚ tq'a üsh tsünan (stiglan) ayatekh dʿabörzush bu /oyla tsa esh/.
21:33: Iza vu Sha büysa a‚ de a‚ malkh a‚ butt a qöllinarg. Masso a (üsh) shen metteḥ neka desh yu.
21:34: Okha tsa khiliytina adamna ḥol ḥalkha a abade. Tq'a ḥo velcha, üsh guttarenna a büsur bolush bu-te?
21:35: Masso a sino ʿovshur du dalar. Okha züyr du shu vonatsa a‚ dikantsa a pitanna . Tkhuna t'e yukhaderzor dolush a du shu.
21:36: Tsateshacharna ḥo gicha /hxay Muḥammad/‚ ḥo siysazvesh ben t'e tsa lotsu tsara: "Hxara vu shun delanash ḥekhosh verg?" Tq'a üsh Q'inkhetamenig ḥekhorna kerstanash bu.
21:37: Adam qöllina sikhonakh (hxumanna t'eḥ sikhlush). Goytur du As shuna Sayn delilash‚ ash So sikh ma ve!
21:38: Tsara olu: "Matsa khir yu i vaʿda /qochush/‚ shu baq'lüysh khilleḥ?"
21:39: Khaaḥara tsateshacharna shäsh shayn yakhḥashna a, shayn bakq'ashna a t'era ts'e dʿatettalur yotsu a‚ shayna ġo khir dotsu a khan! /Ma sikh diyr datsara tsara t'akqa i Delan ʿazap/!
21:40: Hxaʾ‚ tsarna t'e doġur du i /q'ematde/ ts'ekhḥana‚ üsh ḥere biyr bu tso‚ tseran nitsq' qochur bats i dukhatokha‚ üsh /tsunakh/ t'äḥatottur a bats.
21:41: Siysazbina elchanash ḥol ḥalkha a. Tsarakh (elchanekh) tsa bēshash khillacharakh shaykh ḥaqadelira shäsh siysazdesh khillarg.
21:42: Aḥ āla /tsärga, hxay Muḥammad/: "Ḥan lardiyr du shu busa a‚ diynaḥ a Q'inkhetam bolchukh /Delan ʿazapakh/?" Hxaʾ‚ üsh shayn Qiosh-Qoburg ḥekhorakh dʿabörzush ma bu.
21:43: Ya tseran /qin/ delanash bu-te, shäsh üsh ʿalashbiyr bolush Tkhokh /Tkhan ʿazapakh/? Tseran (deliyn) nitsq' qochur bats shayna ġo dan a‚ üsh Tkhokh /Tkhan ʿazapakh/ larbiyr a ma bats.
21:44: Hxaʾ‚ Okha niʿmatash dellera hxoqarna (Makkarchu kerstanashna) a‚ tseran dayshna a, tseran dakharan khan yakh a yesh. Tsarna tsa go-te, Okha latta esha- desh shen yistashkakhula? Üsh bu tq'a töllarsh?
21:45: Aḥ āla: "Bakq'alla a, as shu lardo väḥitsa (Dala dag chu tosuchu khaamtsa). Tsa kheza-q q'oracharna qayqam, (tsüntsa) shäsh (qeramakh) lardesh dollusheḥ".
21:46: Ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchun ʿazapan hxo shaykh ḥaqadelcha, tsara alaza dütur ma dats: "Ma /bokqa/ bāla bu-q tkhuna! Tkho khilla-q zulamkhoy!"
21:47: Okha hxottor du q'ematdenna niysonan terzanash‚ zulam diyr dats sinna /tsḥana a/ hxumantsa (aḥ tsa dina vonig ḥuna qullur dats). K'ollan bürtigan barameḥ erg a dʿalur yu Okha (mel zhima dikanig dineḥ a, iza a tidame ötsur du). Qachame du ḥesap diyrash Tkho khilar.
21:48: Okha belira Musaga a‚ Hxarune a q'astam a‚ serlo a‚ ḥekham a /Delakh/ qörush bolcharna.
21:49: Ishttanash bu üsh‚ shäsh qörush shayn Qiosh-Qobuchukh‚ I /dünenaḥ shayna/ gush votstsusheḥ‚ üsh bu saḥtakh begabesh /qörush/.
21:50: Hxara /Q'urʾan/ berkate ḥekham bu‚ Okha sha bossiyna bolu. Ash tsunna inkarlo yo?
21:51: Okha qin ḥalkha Ibrahxime a belira tsünan niysachu novq'e bolu qetam‚ Tkho i vevzash dara.
21:52: Ḥakhade! Tso ällera shen dega a‚ tsünan q'ome a: "Hxorsh hxun dina sürtash 1 du‚ shu shayna guora ökhush dolu?"
21:53: Tsara elira: "Tkhuna kariyna tkhayn day tsarna ʿibadat desh".
21:54: Tso (Ibrahxima) elira: "Shu a‚ shun day a khilla-q gan a guchu tilar choḥ".
21:55: Tsara elira: "Ḥo tkhuna veana-te baq'dolchüntsa‚ ya ḥo /tkho/ lovzocharakh vu-te?!"
21:56: Tso elira: "Hxaʾ‚ shun Qiosh-Qoburg vu stiglaniyn a‚ lättan a Qiosh-Qoburg‚ Sha üsh qöllina a vu /hxumma yotschu hxumanakh/‚ so otsunna t'eḥ teshalla decharakh vu-q.
21:57: /Ibrahxima sha-shega elira/: Delakh duy buu as, shun ts'ushna (zhaʿarshna) mekarlo 2 yanza yutur ma yats as, shu /tsarakh/ bakq'ash berziyna, genadevllachul t'äḥa ".
21:58: T'akqa tso tsarakh keskash yira‚ tseran körtanig yotschekh – üsh tsunna t'e berza megara.
21:59: Tsara /shäsh yukhabäkicha, üsh ätta gicha/ elira: "Ḥan dina hxara vayn delekh? Bakq'alla a, i zulam dinacharakh vu-q!"
21:60: Elira /tsarakh Ibrahxima ällarg kheznachara/: "Tkhuna khezira tsḥa k'ant üsh (vay delanash) ḥekhosh‚ tsunakh Ibrahxim olura".
