21:61: Elira /pachchaḥa Namruza a, tsünan ḥoldaysha a/: "Sḥavalave iza nekhan bʿärgashna ḥalkha – tsara teshalla dan megara".
21:62: Tsara elira: "Aḥ dina hxara tkhan delashna t'eḥ‚ hxay Ibrahxim?"
21:63: Tso elira: "Hxan-hxa. I dina hxoqu tsarakh vokqucho. Ash tsärga khattiysha‚ üsh bistkhülush khilleḥ!"
21:64: Üsh shäsh shayna t'ebirzira‚ tsara elira: "Bakq'alla a, shu du-q zulamkhoy!"
21:65: T'akqa tseran kortosh oḥabakhiytira /eḥkhetaro/, /olush/: "Ḥuna ma khäiy hxorsh bist tsa khüliy".
21:66: Tso (Ibrahxima) elira: "Tq'a ash ʿibadat do‚ Dela a vütiy‚ shayna hxumma a payda a tsa bechunna‚ zen a tsa dechunna?
21:67: Tuf! Shuna a‚ Dela a vitina‚ ash ʿibadat decharna a! Shu ḥeq'ale tsa khülu-te?"
21:68: Tsara elira: "Vāgave i (Ibrahxim)‚ ġo de shayn delashna‚ shäsh /ġullaq/ desh khilleḥ!"
21:69: Okha elira: "Hxay ts'e! Ḥokh khilalaḥ Ibrahximna shelo a‚ marsho a".
21:70: Tsarna yiyzira tsunna düḥal mekarlo– Okha üsh khiliytira dokqa zen khillacharakh.
21:71: Okha k'elḥarväkqira iza a‚ Lut' a‚ Okha sha ʿalamashna berkate dinchu latta t'e /Shama dʿaḥazhiyra/.
21:72: Okha tsunna velira Isḥaq' a‚ qin sovġatana Yaʿq'ub a. /Üsh/ berrige a khiliytira dikanash.
21:73: Okha tsarakh khiliytira tḥamdanash, Tkhan omratsa shäsh /nakhana/ niysa neq' goytush. Okha tsärga khaiytira dikanash dar a‚ lamaz hxottadar a‚ zakat dalar a. Üsh khilira Tkhuna ʿibadat desh.
21:74: Lut'ana a delira Okha ḥukma a‚ ʿilma a. Okha i k'elḥarväkqira sha bökhanash desh khilla yolchu yurtara. Bakq'alla a, üsh khilira vonan nakh‚ pesaq'ash.
21:75: Okha iza (Lut'-paykhamar) völlira Tkhan q'inkhetam chu. Bakq'alla a, iza dikacharakh vu.
21:76: Nuḥ a‚ tso qayqira ḥalkha. Okha tsunna zhop delira: k'elḥarväkqira iza a‚ tsünan dözal a bokqachu bālanakh.
21:77: Okha larvira iza Tkhan ayatash khartsdinchu nakhakh. Bakq'alla a, üsh bara vochu hxumanan nakh‚ Okha üsh berrige a /khina/ bukhabakhiytira.
21:78: Davudana a‚ Suleymanna a‚ shäshshimmo ḥukma dechu khenaḥ /yaltin/ arenakh lätsna‚ sha nekhan üstaġasha ḥäshna khilla yolchu. Tkho khilira tseran ḥukmanan teshash.
21:79: Okha tsunakh (ḥukmanakh) qetiytira Suleyman a. /Tsu shinnakh/ hxoranna a Okha delira ḥukma a‚ ʿilma a. Okha müt'aḥ dira Davudana lämnash – tsara tasbiḥ a desh, olkhazarsh a /dira Okha tsunna müt'aḥ/‚ tkho khilira /ġullaq/ diyrash.
21:80: Okha tsunna ʿamiyra shuna bedarsh yar‚ tsara shu ʿalashdarḥama shun /mostaġiyn/ nitsq'akh. Ash barkalla tsa olu?
21:81: Suleymanna a /müt'aḥ bira Okha/ nütsq'ala mokh - dʿasalelash Tkhan omratsa Okha sha berkate dina khillachu lättakhula. Tkho khilla masso a hxuma khuush dersh.
21:82: Shayt'anekh a khilla tsunna /hxorda/ chu lelkhash‚ i dotsurg a‚ qin belkhash a besh‚ Tkho khilira üsh ʿalashdiyrash.
21:83: Ayyub a /ḥakhave/. Tso qayqira shen Qiosh-Qobuchünga: "So bālano lätsna‚ Ḥo q'inkhetam bolcharakh a uggar q'inkhetame verg vu-q".
21:84: Okha tsunna zhop delira‚ aybira tsüntsa khilla bāla‚ belira tsunna shen dözal a‚ tsärtsa tsḥäna qin ishttal‚ Tkhan gergara q'inkhetam a khilla‚ ʿibadat decharna ḥekham a khilla.
21:85: /Ḥakhave/ Ismaʿil a‚ Idris a‚ Zul-Kifl a‚ masso a sobare khillacharakh bu.
21:86: Tkhan q'inkhetam chu bakhiytira Okha üsh. Bakq'alla a, üsh dikacharakh bu.
21:87: Zun-Nun a‚ dʿavakhara iza öġazvakhana‚ tsunna khaalora Okha sha gatviyr votsiyla taʿzar dartsa. T'akqa tso qayqira bodaneḥ: "Ḥo votsurg qin Dela vats‚ vonakh ts'ena vu-q Ḥo‚ so khilla-q zulam decharakh".
21:88: Okha tsunna zhop delira‚ i k'elḥarväkqira singattamakh. Ishtta k'elḥarbokhu Okha muʾma nakh.
21:89: Zakariyya /ḥakhave/, tso qayqira shen Qiosh-Qobuchünga: "So Qiosh-Qoburg‚ ma vitaḥ so tsḥa‚ Ḥo irs lucharakh uggar dikanig ma vara!"
21:90: Tsunna a zhop delira Okha‚ velira tsunna /k'ant/ Yaḥya‚ Okha tsunna toyaliytira tsünan zuda. Bakq'alla a, üsh khilira sikhlush dikanash dareḥ‚ Tkhöga qoyqura, dog dokhush /Tkhan dikane/‚ qörush /Tkhan ʿazapakh/. Üsh khilira Tkhokh qörush.
21:91: I shen yoʿstagalla ʿalashdinarg a /ḥekhaye/‚ Okha tsunna Tkhan sikh sa chudillira. Tsunakh a‚ tsünan k'antakh a /masso a/ ʿalamna delil khiliytira Okha.
21:92: Bakq'alla a, hxara (masso a paykhamarashka Dala della din) - shun din (islam) du, sha (masso a paykhamariyn) tsḥa din khilla dolu‚ So shun Qiosh-Qoburg a vu‚ Suna ʿibadat deysha.
21:93: Tsara (t'äḥaboġuchara) diyq'ira shayn ġullaq vovshashna yukq'eḥ. Masso a Tkhuna t'e yukhabörzu.
21:94: Dikanash desh verg‚ sha muʾma volush – khir yats tsünan q'aḥegarna inkarlo‚ bakq'alla a, Tkho tsunna yazdesh du.
21:95: Ḥaram du Okha sha hxallakyinchu yurta (-n day) yukhaberza
21:96: Yaʾzhuzh a‚ Maʾzhuzh a guchubovllalts. Üsh masso a aġorḥara, laqarchu mettigashkara oḥakhetsalur bu.
21:97: Gergaeana baq'yolu vaʿda‚ tsa teshash khillacheran bʿärgash t'ebälla: "Ma bāla bu-q vayna‚ vay dara-q hxara tergal tsa desh‚ vay khilla-q zulam dinarsh"/er du tsara/.
21:98: Bakq'alla a, shu a‚ Dela a vitina‚ ash shayna ʿibadat desh bersh a‚ zhözhakhatin yagorig yu‚ shu tsu chu ġur dolush a du.
21:99: Üsh delanash khilleḥara, – tsu chu ġur batsara. Masso a /tsarakh/ tsu choḥ guttar lättar vu.
21:100: Tsarna tsu choḥ khala sa iyzar a du‚ tsarna tsu choḥ khezar a dats.
21:101: Bakq'alla a, shayna Tkhögara dikanig ḥalkhadällarsh – üsh tsunna (zhözhakhatina) genaḥ khir bu.
21:102: Tsarna khezar dats tsünan (zhözhakhatin) shakh-shikh a‚ üsh shayn sinoshna deznachoḥ guttar lättar bu.
21:103: Üsh singattame biyr bats boqachu qeramo‚ tsarna düḥalqetar du malikash /olush/: "Hxara du shun de‚ shuna khir du ällarg".
21:104: Otsu diynaḥ Okha t'egulyiyr yu stigal‚ zhaynin kekhatash t'eguldare terra. Okha dükhḥara qollar dolore terra‚ karladokqu Tkhuna t'eḥ khilla yolchu vaʿditsa. Bakq'alla a, Tkho khilla /ġullaq/ desh dersh.
21:105: Okha yazdinera Zabura choḥ ḥekhamal t'äḥa: "Lättakh irs ötsur du San dikachu lesha".
21:106: Bakq'alla a, hxoqu choḥ qochchush qetam bu ʿibadat dechu nakhana.
21:107: Okha tsa vakhiytina ḥo /hxay Muḥammad/ masso a ʿalamashna q'inkhetam khilla a ben.
21:108: Aḥ āla: "Suna väḥitsa khaiytina shun Dela tsḥaʾ vuyla. Shu müt'aḥ khüliy?"
21:109: Üsh dʿaberzaḥ‚ aḥ āla: "As dʿaqayqiyna shüga tsḥaterra‚ suna tsa khäa, gerga du ya gena du shuna vaʿda yinarg.
21:110: Bakq'alla a, Tsunna (Dalla) khäa dashakh khezash derg a‚ Tsunna khäa ash q'ayladokqush derg a.
21:111: Suna tsa khäa i /shuna taʿzar tsa desh t'äḥatattar/ khila tarlo shuna pitana /zer/ a‚ tsḥa khan yallalts bakham a".
21:112: Elira /Muḥammad-paykhamaro/: "San Qiosh-Qoburg‚ Aḥ de-q baq'ontsa ḥukma /suna a, hxara din khartsdecharna a yukq'eḥ/. Tkhan Qiosh-Qoburg vu sov q'inkhetame verga‚ ash sibat dechunna t'eḥ Shegara ġo etsa dezash verg a ".
22:1: Hxay nakh! Qera shayn Qiosh-Qobuchukh. Bakq'alla a, saḥt dēgar dokqa-deza hxuma du.
22:2: Otsu diynaḥ‚ shuna shayna gush‚ masso a /ber/ daqosh erg yitslur yu sha daqiynachukh‚ oḥabüllur bu shen /kiyraḥ/ moḥ bolcho shen moḥ /khenaza/‚ ḥuna gur bu nakh bekhna – bekhna bats üsh‚ delaḥ a, Delan ʿazap ch'oġa du.
22:3: Nakhakh vu sha Deleḥ q'üysush verg /tsḥa a/ ʿilma dotsush‚ sha t'äḥahxuttush verg hxor ärkhadällachu shayt'anna.
22:4: Tsunna (shayt'anna) yazdella shetsa dottaġalla leliynarg sha tilor a vu‚ ts'eran ʿazape dʿanisviyr a vu‚ älla.
22:5: Hxay nakh! Shu khilleḥ yukha dendina /ġovtorakh/ shekona choḥ – Okha shu qöllina popparakh‚ t'akqa t'adamakh‚ t'akqa ts'iynan ulkhakh‚ t'akqa zhizhigan kiysakakh‚ kep yolush dolchukh a‚ kep yotsush dolchukh a shuna bilgaldakqarḥama /Tkho nitsq' bolush duyla/. Okha dʿanisdo /shu/ beran ts'iyna choḥ Tkhayna ma luʾu ts'e tökhna khan t'ekqachchalts‚ t'akqa Okha aradokhu shu ber khüliy‚ t'akqa shu t'eqiarḥama shayn nitsq'ina. Shukh lesh verg a vu‚ shukh /q'anvalartsa/ uggar siysazchu dakharna t'everzosh verg a vu‚ shena /dukqa a hxumanash / khuush khillachul t'äḥa hxumma a tsa khaiytarḥama. Ḥuna go latta daq'adella. Okha shena t'e khi dossiycha, i dettalo‚ desta‚ /tsüntsa/ qüu masso a khaza shishsha taypa /yarash/.
22:6: Iza du – Dela khilarna baq'derg‚ Tso denbiyrig khilarna bellarsh‚ Iza khilarna masso a hxumanna t'eḥ nitsq'berg.
22:7: /Iza du/ – saḥt doġurg khilarna‚ tsu choḥ sheko yats‚ Dela khilarna, denbina, ġovtor bolush keshniy choḥ bersh.
22:8: Nakhakh vu sha Deleḥ q'üysush verg‚ shegaḥ ʿilma a dotsush‚ niysa neq' a botsush‚ nüre dolu zhayna a dotsush.
22:9: /Kuralla yartsa/ shen lag dʿaġertosh Delan novq'akh /nakh/ tilabarḥama. Tsunna dünenaḥ a siysazalla yu‚ Okha ʿovshüytur du tsünga q'ematdiynaḥ ts'eran ʿazap.
22:10: /Tsünga er du/: "I du ḥan shina küygo ḥalkhadäkqinarg baḥaneḥ a‚ Dela tsakhilarna a zulamash diyrig leshna".
22:11: Nakhakh vu sha Dalla ʿibadat desh verg ürallin yuḥiga t'eḥ volchukh tera: shekh qiʾcha dikanig, tsüntsa parġatvolu iza‚ shekh pitana (bāla) qiʾcha, shen yuḥ t'e dʿavörzu i /tsatesharna t'e/ – düne a‚ ekhart a dayina tso. Iza bilggala esham bu-q!
22:12: Tso qoyqu Dela votsuchünga‚ shena zen tsa dechünga‚ shena payda tsa bechünga. Iza du-q genara tilar!
22:13: Tso qoyqu shena /khüluchu/ paydanal shena zen gerga dolchünga– ma von ela vu-q‚ ma von naq'ost vu-q /tso lätsnarg‚ Dela a vitina/!
22:14: Bakq'alla a, Dala chubokhüytur bu iyman dillinarsh a‚ dika ʿamalsh yinarsh a boshmashna‚ shayn bukhakhula khish ökhush yolchu. Bakq'alla a, Dala do Shena luurg.
22:15: /Shen elchanna/ Dala dünenaḥ a‚ ekhartaḥ a ġo diyr dats möttush khillarg – tso mush dʿatosiyla tkhov t'e irkhqazvala, t'akqa khadadoyla /shen lag/‚ t'akqa ḥozhiyla shena‚ dʿadeḥniy-te tsünan mekarlos i öġazvokhüyturg.
22:16: Ishtta dossiyra Okha i /Q'urʾan/ bilgala ayatash khilla‚ Dela khilarna a nisvesh Shena luurg /niysachu novq'a/.
22:17: Bakq'alla a, iyman dillinarsh a‚ zhügtiyn dineḥ bersh a‚ sabiinash a‚ nasarash a‚ ts'eran ġullaq desh bersh a‚ /Delatsa/ naq'ost lätsnarsh a... Bakq'alla a, Dala q'astor du tsarna yukq'eḥ q'ematdiynaḥ. Bakq'alla a, Dela masso a hxumanna t'eḥ tesh vu.
22:18: Ḥuna tsa go Dalla suzhud ma doy stiglanashkaḥ volcho a‚ lättaḥ volcho a‚ malkho a‚ batto a‚ sedarchasha a‚ lämnasha a‚ dittasha a‚ diynatasha a‚ nakhakh duqabolchara a? Duqabolcharna ʿazap ḥaq' khilla. Dala siysazvinarg‚ milla velaḥ a‚ – ma vats tsunna siy aydan tsḥa a. Bakq'alla a, Dala do Shena luurg.
22:19: Hxoqu shina mostaġcho shayn Qiosh-Qobuchüngaḥ q'iysira. Tsateshnarsh – tsarna bedarsh khador yu ts'arakh‚ tseran kortoshna t'e duttur du ts'iydina khi.
22:20: Dāgor du tsüntsa tseran gaysh choḥ derg a‚ chq'or a.
22:21: Tsarna (Delakh tsa teshash khillacharna) ächkan chḥonkarsh yu (kechyina tsigaḥ – zhözhakhateḥ).
22:22: Tsarna tsu /zhözhakhati/ chüra bālaḥēgarkh arabovla mel lii‚ tsu chu yukhaberzor bu üsh /er du/: "ʿovsha shayna ts'eran ʿazap!"
22:23: Bakq'alla a, Dala chubukhkur bu iyman dillinarsh a‚ dika ʿamalash yinarsh a /yalsamanin/ boshmashna‚ shayn bukhakhula khish ökhush yolchu‚ khazbina khir bu üsh tsu choḥ dashochu ch'agarshtsa a‚ zhovhxarshtsa a‚ tseran dukhar tsu choḥ khir du dari.
22:24: Üsh nisbina /dünenaḥ/ dashakh khazachünga /Q'urʾanakh/‚ üsh nisbina khastamechu novq'a.
22:25: Bakq'alla a, tsateshnarsh a‚ shäsh /nakh/ dʿatottush bersh a Delan neq'akh a‚ Dezachu mäzhdigakh a‚ Okha sha nakhana tsḥanissa /siylaḥ/ khiliytina dolchu shena choḥ volchunna a‚ arara /ziyarate/ veʾnachunna‚ tsu choḥ zulamtsa baq'dolchukh dʿaḥavzar /Delakh tsateshar/ dezash verg a – Okha ʿovshüytur du tsärga lazosh dolu ʿazapakh.
22:26: Ḥakhade: Okha bilgalʾyakqira Ibrahximna /Ḥäzh/ts'iynan mettig, olush: "Ma latsa Sötsa naq'ost tsḥana a hxumantsa‚ ts'ande San ts'a go bokqucharna a /t'avaf desh/‚ hxöttina lättacharna a‚ ruk'e bakhancharna a‚ suzhdane bakhancharna a.
22:27: Qayqa nakhalaḥ ḥäzhalla: üsh (muʾma nakh) boġur bu ḥuna ġash a‚ hxor ezachunna t'eḥ a‚ shäsh yoġush khilla yolchu hxor tüpara börara
22:28: Teshalla dan shayna paydanashna‚ Delan ts'e ḥekhayan a tsḥana bilgalchu denoshkaḥ‚ Tso shayna ritsq'ina dellachu bezhanna t'eḥ. Daa tsunakh‚ daade bālakhöguchunna a, peq'arna a.
22:29: T'akqa dʿayokhiyla tsara /Ḥäzh dekhkartsa/ shayn bökhallash (ġurban bezhna dinchul t'äḥa korta basha ya larga, maʿarsh teda…)‚ qochushdoyla shayn nuzarsh‚ gobokqiyla Shirchu Ts'iynna".
22:30: /Ġullaq ishtta du/. Delan ḥurmatash dazdesh verg – i tsunna shena dika du shen Qiosh-Qobuchunna gergaḥ. Ḥanal dina shuna bezhanash /daa/‚ shuna t'eḥ döshush dotsursh. Genadovla ts'uyn (zhaʿariyn) rizhsakh‚ genadovla kharts dashakh
22:31: Dalla t'edirzinarsh a khilla‚ Tsüntsa naq'ost lätsnarsh tsa khülush. Tq'a Delatsa naq'ost lotsurg - i tera vu stiglara vözhnachukh‚ t'akqa olkhazarsh sḥalotsush‚ ya mekho genarchu mettige dʿavügush volchukh.
22:32: /Ġullaq ishtta du/. Delan ʿedalash dazdesh verg‚ – bakq'alla a, iza degnash /Delakh/ qerarkh du.
22:33: Shuna tsärgaḥ (ġurbanna dalosh dolchu bezhnashkaḥ) paydanash bu ts'etökhna khan t'eqachchalts (shura a, t'arġa, t'ekhaa ġirs a – shayna payda etsa urs ḥakqalts)‚ t'akqa tseran /urs ḥaqa ḥanal yolu/ mettig Shirchu Ts'iynan gergaḥ yu.
22:34: Hxor ummatana a ʿibadat daran kep khiliytina Okha tsärga Delan ts'e yakqiyta Tso shena ritsq'ina dellachu däkhnin bezhanna t'eḥ. Shun Dela tsḥa Allahx - Dela vu‚ Tsunna müt'aḥ khila. Aḥ qaʾ bakqa müt'aḥ bolcharna.
22:35: Üsh bu Dela ḥakhavicha, shayn degnash qörush bersh‚ shayna t'edeʾnachu vochunna sobar desh bersh‚ lamaz hxottadesh bersh‚ Okha shayna dellachu ritsq'ekh /Dela reza volchu novq'a/ kharzhash esh bersh.
22:36: I erstana emkal khiliytina Okha shuna Delan din guchudokquchu bilgalonekh‚ shuna tsu choḥ dikanig du. Ḥekhae tsarna t'eḥ‚ tsḥana moġara hxöttinchu ḥoleḥ‚ Delan ts'e. Üsh shayn aġonashna t'edegcha‚ daa tsarakh‚ daade dökhuchunna a‚ tsa dökhuchunna a. Ishtta Okha müt'aḥ dina üsh (bezhanash) shuna‚ – shu khir datsara-te barkalla olush.
22:37: Dalla tsa qochu tseran zhizhig a‚ tseran ts'iy a‚ delaḥ a, Tsünga qochu shügara /Delakh/ qerar. Ishtta Tso üsh (bezhanash) müt'aḥ dina shuna ash Dela vazvarḥama Tso shu /niysachu novq'a/ nisdarna. Aḥ qaʾ bakqa dikadecharna.
22:38: Bakq'alla a, Dala larbo iyman dillinarsh. Bakq'alla a, Dalla tsa veza masso a teshnabekhk besh verg, /Delan niʿmatna/ sha t'ekh inkarlo esh volu.
22:39: Magiyna shaytsa t'om besh bolcharna /t'om ban/‚ tsarna zulam dina khilarna. Bakq'alla a, Dela tsarna (tsu busalbanashna) ġodarna t'eḥ nitsq' bolush vu‚
22:40: Shayn ts'enoshkara arabäkhna bolchu‚ tsḥa a baq'o yotsush‚ dekq'a tsara alarna: "Tkhan Qiosh-Qoburg Allahx-Dela vu". Dala nakh vovshashtsa larbesh tsa khilleḥara, yokhiyna khir yara /nasariyn mozġariyn/ ʿibadat den mettigash a‚ kilsash a‚ /zhügtiyn/ lamazan mettigash a‚ mäzhdigash a‚ shayna choḥ dukqa Delan ts'e ḥekhosh yolu. Ġo danza dütur ma dats Dala Shena /ġullaqna/ ġo desh volchunna. Bakq'alla a, Dela nitsq' berg ma vu, veza verg a ma vu.
22:41: Üsh bu Okha shäsh lättaḥ ch'aġbicha‚ lamaz hxottosh bersh‚ zakat lush bersh‚ dikanig de‚ älla‚ omra desh bersh‚ vochukh /nakh/ dukhatukhush bersh. Delan yu ġullaqiyn chaqe.
22:42: Ḥo tsara khartsvaḥ, – khartsbina tsaral ḥalkha Nuḥan a‚ ʿadiyn a‚ Samudiyn a q'ämnasha‚
22:43: Ibrahximan q'omo a‚ Lut'in q'omo a,
22:44: Madyan daysha a. Khartsvira Musa a. As khanna t'äḥatettira tsa teshash bersh. T'akqa As sḥaletsira üsh. Mukha khilira San tsalarar /üsh shayna ʿazap dartsa/!
22:45: Masa yurt hxallakyina Okha‚ shäsh zulame khilla yolu! Üsh shayn bukha t'eḥ yassa yu. Masa shovda dässa disina! Masa yöġna ġala /yassa yisina/!
22:46: Lättakhula tsa lela üsh? – khir dara tsarna degnash‚ shaytsa tsara oyla esh‚ ya lergash‚ shaytsa tsara laduġush. Bʿärsa dats bʿärze – kiyraḥ dolu degnash du bʿärze!
22:47: Ḥo sikhvo tsara ʿazapatsa. Dala yokhor yats Shen vaʿda. Tsḥa de ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchun gergaḥ ezar sho sanna du ash dagardechukh.
22:48: Masa yurt /khanna/ t'äḥatettira /ʿazap tsa desh/ As‚ üsh zulame a yolush?! T'akqa sḥaletsira üsh As‚ Suna t'e du t'eqachar.
22:49: Aḥ āla /hxay Muḥammad/: "Hxay nakh! Bakq'alla a, so shuna bilgala dʿakhoüyturg vu-q".
22:50: Iyman dillinarsh a‚ dika ʿamal yinarsh a – tsarna gechdar a‚ siylaḥ ritsq' a du.
22:51: Tkhan ayatashna düḥal, üsh dokho ġertash q'aḥegnarsh – üsh zhözhakhatin day bu.
22:52: Okha tsa vakhiytina ḥol ḥalkha tsḥa a elcha a‚ tsḥa a paykhamar a tso satüysuchu khenaḥ tsünan satiysamiyn chu shayt'a tsa ökqush‚ t'akqa Dala dʿadokqush ben shayt'ano qössinarg. T'äḥa Dala ḥukam doytur du Shen ayatashka. I Dela khuush verg a‚ ḥukam /niysa/ desh verg a vu.
22:53: /I du/ shayt'ano qössinchukh pitana khilarḥama shayn degnashkaḥ tsamgar yolcharna‚ shayn degnash q'iza dolcharna. Bakq'alla a, zulamkhoy genarchu mostaġallina choḥ ma bu.
22:54: ʿilma dellachärga khaiytarḥama‚ iza ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchüngara baq'derg khilar‚ tsunakh teshiyla üsh‚ muk'ar khüliyla Tsunna tseran degnash. Bakq'alla a, Dela ma vu nisbesh verg iyman dillinarsh niysachu novq'a.
22:55: Dʿatilar bats tsateshnarsh tsunakh shekoneḥ lattarkh‚ shayna t'e ts'ekhḥana saḥt qachchalts‚ ya shayna t'e ʿakhar diynan ʿazap qachchalts.
22:56: Pachchaḥalla otsu diynaḥ Delan du‚ Tso ḥukam diyr du tsarna yukq'eḥ. Tq'a iyman dillinarsh a‚ dika ʿamalsh yinarsh a – niʿmatan boshmashkaḥ khir bu.
22:57: Tsateshnarsh a‚ Tkhan ayatash khartsdinarsh a – üsh bu shayna siysaza dolu ʿazap khir dersh.
22:58: Delan novq'aḥ dʿaqelkhinarsh‚ t'akqa bayinarsh ya bellarsh – dalanza dütur ma dats tsarna Dala khaza ritsq'. Bakq'alla a, Dela – I vu-q ritsq' lucharakh uggar dikanig.
22:59: Tso chubukhkur ma bu üsh shäsh shayna reza dolchu chuġoylina (yalsamani chu). Bakq'alla a, Dela ma vu khuurg a‚ duqa sobare verg a /tsarna ʿazap tsa desh/.
22:60: Ishtta du iza. Milla velaḥ a /muʾma nakhakh/ sha shena /kerstanasha/ dinchul /tsarna/ taʿzar a dina‚ t'akqa shena /tsara yukha a/ zulam dina – danza dütur ma dats tsunna Dala ġo. Bakq'alla a, Dela q'int'eravolurg a vu‚ gechdiyrig a vu.
22:61: I /ġo du/ Dela khilarna büysa denna chuyalosh‚ de – büysanna chudalosh‚ Dela khilarna khezash verg a‚ gush verg a.
22:62: I /ġo du/ Dela – Iza khilarna baq'derg‚ I vitina, tsara /shega/ qoyqurg – i khilarna khartsderg‚ Dela – Iza khilarna leqa verg a‚ vokqa verg a.
22:63: Ḥuna tsa go Dala dossiyna stiglara khi – t'akqa lätta khülu sendella. Bakq'alla a, Dela vu /Shen leshna ritsq' dalareḥ/ dika qetash verg a‚ /tseran degnashkaḥ dolu hxumanakh sikha dogdillar/ dika devzash verg a.
22:64: Tsünan du stiglanashkaḥ derg a‚ lättaḥ derg a. Bakq'alla a, Dela – I vu ḥole verg a‚ khastame verg a.
22:65: Ḥuna tsa khiʾna Dala shuna bolkh boytush khilar lättaḥ mel dolchünga a‚ kemane a – lela i hxorda chukhula Tsünan omratsa. Tso satsayo stigal lätta t'e yozharkh‚ Shen purbantsa a ben. Bakq'alla a, Dela nakhana dikanig luush verg a (i yollu hxuma shuna müt'aḥ yartsa)‚ q'inkhetame verg a vu.
22:66: I vu shuna dakhar dellarg‚ t'akqa dolüytu Tso shu‚ t'akqa /yukha/ dendiyr du. Bakq'alla a, adam – ch'oġa kersta du-q.
22:67: Hxor ummatana Okha khiliytina ʿibadat den mettig‚ tsara shena ʿibadat a desh. Ḥötsa ma q'üsiyla tsara ġullaqeḥ. Ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchünga qayqa /üsh/. Bakq'alla a, ḥo /hxay Muḥammad/ niysachu novq'aḥ ma vu.
22:68: Tsara ḥötsa q'iysaḥ‚ aḥ āla: "Dalla dika khäa ash desh derg.
22:69: Dala ḥukam diyr du shuna yukq'eḥ q'ematdiynaḥ shuna shegaḥ khilpalo khillachoḥ".
22:70: Ḥuna tsa khäa Dela khuush vuyla stiglaḥ a‚ lättaḥ a mel derg? Bakq'alla a, iza /Lavḥ maḥfuz/ zhayni choḥ du. Bakq'alla a, iza Dalla atta du.
22:71: Tsara ʿibadat do‚ Dela a vütiy‚ Tso shetsa tsḥa a delil tsa dossiynchunna‚ shayna shekh lätsna tsḥa a ʿilma dotsuchunna. Ma vats zulamkhoshna tsḥa a ġöncha!
22:72: Shayna t'eḥ Tkhan bilgala dolu ayatash deshcha‚ ḥuna khaalo tsateshacheran yakhḥashkaḥ inkarlo. Lata kiycha bu üsh shayna t'eḥ Tkhan ayatash döshuchärtsa. Aḥ āla /tsärga, hxay Muḥammad/: "As düytsiy shuna tsul vochukh? – Ts'e yu, Dala tsateshnacharna vaʿda yina yolu‚ ma von t'eqachar du-q!"
22:73: Hxay nakh! Masal daliyna‚ ladoġa tsünga. Bakq'alla a, Dela a vitina‚ ash /shega/ qoyqucho tsḥälliga tsḥa moza a qullur bats‚ üsh tsunna gulbelcha a. Mozano shaygara tsḥa hxuma yakqicha, – iza tsüngara yukha tsa yakqalo tsarna. Ledara välla lökhurg a‚ shegara lökhurg a.
22:74: Tsara tsa vazvira Dela sha vazvan ma-vezzara. Bakq'alla a, Dela nütsq'ala verg a vu‚ veza verg a vu.
22:75: Dala khorzhu malikekh a /paykhamarshka/ elchanash‚ nakhakh a /nakhe elchanash/. Bakq'alla a‚ Dela khezash verg a vu‚ gush verg a vu.
22:76: Tsunna khäa tsaral ḥalkha khillarg a‚ tsaral t'äḥa khinderg a. Dele dʿadörzu ġullaqash.
22:77: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Rukuʿe ġo‚ suzhdane ġo‚ ʿibadat de shayn Qiosh-Qobuchunna‚ dikanig de – shu dakqiyden tam bu.
22:78: Q'aḥega Deleḥ sha q'aḥega ma-dezzara‚ Tso shu khärzhina‚ tsa yina shuna dineḥ tsḥa a khalo‚ shun den Ibrahximan millatakh /du i shun din/‚ Tso (Dalla) älla shukh busalbanash ḥalkha a‚ hxoqu /Q'urʾan/ choḥ a‚ elcha shuna t'eḥ tesh khiliytarḥama‚ shu a teshash khiliytarḥama nakhana t'eḥ. Lamaz hxottade‚ zakat lo‚ Delatsa ch'aġlo. I vu shun vali – dika vali a vu‚ dika ġöncha a vu.
23:2: Üsh bu shayn lamazashkaḥ /Delakh qörush, Tsünan vazzallina/ müt'aḥ bersh.
23:3: Üsh bu dässachu khabarekh yustakhbovlush bersh.
23:5: Üsh bu shayn evḥe mezhenash laryesh bersh,
23:6: shayn zudarshna a‚ ya shayn ättu küygasha doladinacharna a ben /t'e tsa ġertash bersh/ – t'akqa üsh bekhke bats.
23:7: Tsaral deḥa qiydinarsh – üsh /Delan/ dozanekh bevlarsh bu.
23:8: Üsh bu shaykh teshna ditina hxuma a‚ shaytsa khilla bart a ʿalashbesh bersh.
23:9: Üsh bu shayn lamazash lardesh bersh.
23:11: Shayna irsana Firdavs qochur ersh‚ üsh tsu choḥ guttar lättar bolush.
23:12: Okha qöllina adam (dükhḥara stag Ādam) ts'enachu popparkh (topparkh).
23:13: T'akqa khiliytina Okha tsunakh t'adam ch'oġachu mettigeḥ.
23:14: T'akqa t'adamakh deq'a ts'iy qöllira Okha‚ deq'achu ts'iykh qöllira Okha zhizhigan kiysak‚ zhizhigan kiysakakh qöllira däʿakhkash‚ t'akqa däʿakhkiy t'e zhizhig dükhiyra (dillira) Okha, t'akqa Okha qiiyra qin qollar. Berkate khilla Dela – qollarkhoykh uggar dikanig.
23:15: T'akqa‚ bakq'alla a, shu tsul t'äḥa liyr du.
23:16: T'akqa‚ bakq'alla a, shu q'ematdiynaḥ dendiyr du.
23:17: Okha qöllira shuna t'ekhula vorhx ġatt /stigal/ – Tkho tsa khilira /masso a Tkhash qöllinchu/ khalq'akh ġopal (tidam botsush).
23:18: Okha dossiyra stiglara khi baramtsa‚ i satsiyra Okha lättaḥ‚ Tkho i dʿadakhiyta a nitsq' bolush du.
23:19: Okha qiiyra shuna tsüntsa (doġitsa) khurmanan a‚ kemsiyn a boshmash‚ shuna tsu choḥ dukqa stömash a bu‚ ash tsarakh bou.
23:20: Saynaʾ lamanakh sḥadolush dolu zayt-ditt a /qöllina Okha/‚ tsunakh dolu zaytdätta a‚ chambiyrig a yuucharna.
23:21: Bakq'alla a, shuna bezhnashkaḥ /qin sa dolchu hxumnashkaḥ a/ masal ma du: Okha shuna malayo tseran kiyraḥ yolchukh‚ shuna tsärgaḥ dukqa paydanash a bu‚ tsarakh ash dou.
23:22: Tsarna (bezhnashna) t'eḥ a‚ kemanna t'eḥ a shu dʿasalelado.
23:23: Okha vakhiytira Nuḥ shen q'omana t'e. Tso elira: "Hxay san q'am! Ash ʿibadat de Dalla‚ shuna vats I votsurg qin dela‚ shu tsa qöru?"
23:24: Tsünan q'omakh tsa teshash khillacheran elasha elira: "Hxara-m adam ben dats‚ shu sanna‚ iza luush vu shuna t'eḥ ḥalavala. Dalla liʾneḥara, Tso malikash dokhküytur dara. Tkhuna tsa khezna otsunakh (Nuḥas düytsuchukh – tsḥana Dalla ʿibadat dan deza bokhuchukh) tkhan ḥalkhalerchu dayshkaḥ a.
23:25: Iza (Nuḥ) zhinekh volu stag ben ma vats‚ shu ḥovsal tsünga tsḥa khan yallalts".
23:26: Tso (Nuḥas, Dele dökhush) elira: "So Qiosh-Qobush volu san Dela‚ Aḥ ġo delaḥ suna tsara so khartsvarna".
23:27: Okha khaam bira tsünga väḥitsa: "Kema de Tkhan bʿärgiy ḥalkhaḥ, Tkhan ḥekhamtsa. Tkhan ġullaq deʾcha‚ pesh qekhkicha‚ tsu chu (kemanna t'e) lakhka hxorannakh shishsha taypa a‚ ḥan dözal a‚ tsarakh shayna t'eḥ dosh ḥalkhadällarsh botsursh. Söga ma ḥekhabelaḥ zulam dinarsh. Üsh khina bukhabokhüytur bu".
23:28: Ḥo a‚ ḥötsa verg a kemanna t'eḥ dʿanisvelcha‚ aḥ alalaḥ: "Khastam bu Dalla‚ tkho ḥalkhadäkhnachu zulamechu q'omakh".
23:29: Aḥ ālalaḥ: "So Qiosh-Qobush volu san Dela‚ oḥavossavelaḥ so berkatechu mettigeḥ‚ Ḥo uggar dika oḥavossorig vu-q."
23:30: Bakq'alla a, tsu choḥ delilash du-q‚ Tkho khilla-q züysh dersh.
23:31: T'akqa Okha qiiyra tsaral t'äḥa qin t'äḥe.
23:32: Okha vakhiytira tsärga (ʿadashka) tsarakh elcha (Hxud)‚ ʿibadat de Dalla‚ shuna vats Iza votsurg qin dela‚ älla. Shu tsa qöru?
23:33: Tsünan q'oman tsa teshash khillachu‚ ekhartatsa tsḥänaqetar khartsdesh khillachu‚ Okha dünenan dakhareḥ shayga zovq ḥegiytinchu (Hxudan q'omakh) elasha elira: "Hxara-m adam ben dats‚ shu sanna‚ ash yuuchukh yuu tso‚ ash moluchukh molu tso.
23:34: Shu müt'aḥ khilaḥ shäsh sannachu adamna‚ t'akqa‚ bakq'alla a, ma eshnarsh du-q shu.
23:35: Tso vaʿda do shuna‚ shu delcha‚ shukh latta a‚ däʿakhkash a khilcha‚ shu aradokhur du‚ älla?
23:36: Ma gena du-q‚ ma gena du-q shuna desh dolu vaʿda!
23:37: Hxara vayn dünenan dakhar ben qin dakhar dats‚ le vay (q'anbelcha, tsḥabersh)‚ dekha vay (vaykh q'ona bersh bekha) – vay yukha dendiyr dats.
23:38: I vu vekq'a Dalla t'e khartsderg qöllina stag‚ vay tsunakh teshar dats".
23:39: Tso (Hxud-elchano) elira: "San Qiosh-Qoburg‚ Aḥ suna ġo delaḥ tsara so khartsvarna".
23:40: Tso (Dala) elira: "Tsḥa k'ezzigchu /khenaḥ/ üsh dokhkobevlla khir bu ḥuna".
23:41: Üsh sḥaletsira ts'oġa tokharo‚ latsa ḥaq' bolush‚ Okha nekhash yira tsarakh. Della dala zulame q'am!
23:42: T'akqa‚ tsaral t'äḥa‚ qiiyra Okha qin t'äḥenash.
23:43: Ḥalkhader dats tsḥa a ummat shen ʿozhallal‚ t'äḥabüsur a bats üsh.
23:44: T'akqa t'ett'a bakhiytira Okha Tkhan elchanash. Matstsa a ummatana t'e shen elcha veʾcha – tsara i khartsvora‚ Okha tsarakh tsḥabersh vuqarna t'äḥabakhiytira. Okha tsarakh khiliytira diytsarsh. Della dāla tsa teshash dolu q'am!
23:45: T'akqa Okha vakhiytira Musa a‚ tsünan vasha Hxarun a Tkhan ayatashtsa a‚ bilgalchu delilatsa a
23:46: Firʿavnna a‚ tsünan elashna a t'e – üsh kurabevlira‚ tsarakh khilira laqadala ġerta q'am.
23:47: Tsara elira: "Tkho teshar du tq'a tkho sannachu shina stagakh‚ tsu shinnan nakh tkhuna /lesh khilla/ ġullaq desh a bolush?"
23:48: Tsara i shiʾ khartsvira‚ t'akqa shäsh hxallaqillacharakh khilira.
23:49: Okha delira Musaga zhayna‚ üsh nislur batsara-te‚ älla.
23:50: Okha khiliytira Maryaman k'antakh a‚ tsünan nenakh a delil. Okha /tsḥana khanna bakha/ oḥakhovshiyra i shiʾ leqachu mettige‚ shen ch'aġo a‚ shovda a dolchu.
23:51: Hxay elchanash! Daa ts'enachukh‚ ʿamal ye dikanig! Bakq'alla a, So ash desh derg khuush vu shuna.
23:52: Bakq'alla a, hxara - shun ummat du (hxay elchanash), (masso a paykhamariyn a) khilla dolu tsḥa ummat (tsḥa din – Islam)‚ So shun Qiosh-Qoburg vu‚ Sokh qeralash.
23:53: Tsara khadiyra shayn ġullaq vovshiy yukq'eḥ tobanashtsa. Masso a toba shegaḥ dolchüntsa yakqiyesh yu.
23:54: Bita üsh shayn kegari choḥ /üsh liyr bolu/ khan t'ekqachchalts.
23:55: Tsarna möttu-teḥa Okha shayna shetsa bakham a‚ k'entiy a lush khilar
23:56: Okha shayna dikanash sikhdar du? Hxette a, tsa khaalo-q tsarna.
23:57: Bakq'alla a, shäsh shayn Qiosh-Qobuchukh qörush egna bersh‚
23:58: shäsh shayn Qiosh-Qobuchun ayatekh teshash bersh‚
23:59: shäsh shayn Qiosh-Qobuchüntsa naq'ostiy tsa lüytsush bersh‚
23:60: shäsh shayn Qiosh-Qobuchunna t'e dʿadörzur duyla a khuush, /Tsunakh/ shayn degnash qörush a dolush‚ shayna /Dala/ dellachu ritsq'ikh /saġa/ lush bersh -
23:61: üsh bu dikanashna t'e sikhbellarsh - üsh tsarakh (shayn dikanekh) ḥalkhkhe t'eqüur bu!
23:62: Okha t'e tsa düllu sinna (tsḥanna adamna) tsünan nitsq' qochurg ben. Tkhögaḥ du zhayna‚ sha baq'derg düytsush dolu‚ tsarna zulam diyr dats (nakhana, tsara tsa dina q'a tsarna t'eyazdesh).
23:63: Tseran (kerstaniyn) degnash otsunakh (baq'dolchukh) dʿatilar choḥ du‚ tsarna üsh yotsursh a /qin von/ ʿamalash yu, shäsh yesh yolu.
23:64: Tsarakh niʿmat dellarsh Okha ʿazapatsa sḥalätscha‚ üsh moḥ ḥöqush bisira.
23:65: /Tsärga er du q'ematdiynaḥ/: "Moḥ ma ḥeqa takhana – shuna Tkhögara ġo khir dats!"
23:66: Khilla San ayatash shuna t'eḥ döshush – khilla shu tsarakh yukhadovlush.
23:68: Tsara oyla tsa yo dashakh‚ ya tsärga deana tseran ḥalkhalerchu dayshka tsa deʾnarg?
23:69: Ya tsarna tsa vevzira shayn elcha‚ tsara tsunna inkarlo a esh?
23:70: Ya tsara olu: "Tsüntsa zhinash du?" I veana tsärga baq'dolchüntsa‚ tsarakh duqakhbersh baq'derg tsa dezash bu.
23:71: Baq'derg tseran dezarshna t'äḥa dälleḥara‚ stiglanash a‚ latta a‚ tsu choḥ mel derg a hxallaqir dara. Okha tsärga belira /shena choḥ/ shayna siy a, dozalla a dolush ḥekham (Q'urʾan). Üsh shayna /bechu/ ḥekhamakh dʿabörzura.
23:72: Ya aḥ tsärga kharzh yökhu? Ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchun kharzh tölush yu. Iza ritsq' lucharakh uggar dikanig vu.
23:73: Bakq'alla a, aḥ /hxay Muḥammad/ üsh qoyqu niysachu novq'a.
23:74: Bakq'alla a, ekhartakh tsatesharsh /niysachu/ neq'akh dʿatülush ma bu.
23:75: Okha q'inkhetam bineḥara tsarakh‚ aydineḥara tsarakh dolu zen‚ üsh qerstash chuḥovdur ma bara shayn tilarna.
23:76: Okha ʿazapatsa sḥaliytsira üsh‚ amma üsh muk'ar tsa khilira shayn Qiosh-Qobuchunna‚ /Tsünga/ ḥasta tsa belira.
23:77: Okha shayna t'e ch'oġa ʿazap dolu neʿ sḥaellalts – üsh tsigaḥ (masso a dikanakh) dog dillina büsu.
23:78: Iza (Dela) vu qöllina shuna lersa a‚ bʿärsa a‚ degnash a – ma k'ezig barkalla olu-q ash!
23:79: Iza vu qiiyna shu lättaḥ – Tsunna t'e shu dʿaguldiyr dolush a du.
23:80: Iza vu dendesh verg a‚ dolüytush verg a‚ Tsünan du büysa a‚ de a ḥiyzar‚ shu ḥeq'ale tsa khülu?
23:81: Hxaʾ‚ tsara elira ḥalkhalerchara ällachukh teranig.
23:82: Tsara elira: "Tkho delcha‚ tkhökh latta a‚ däʿakhkash a khilcha‚ tkho yukha a dendiyr du?
23:83: I vaʿda dinera tkhuna a‚ tkhan dayshna a ḥalkha‚ iza-m ḥalkhalerachiyn tüyranash ben dats".
23:84: Aḥ āla /tsärga, hxay Muḥammad/: "Ḥenan du latta a‚ tsu choḥ mel derg a‚ shu khuush khilleḥ?"
23:85: Tsara er du: "Delan du". Aḥ āla: "Ash oyla tsa yo?"
23:86: Aḥ āla: "Mila vu vorhx stigalan Qiosh-Qoburg‚ siylaḥ-yokqachu ʿarshan Qiosh-Qoburg?"
23:87: Tsara er du ḥuna: "/Üsh/ Delan yu-q". Aḥ āla: "Shu tsa qöru /Delakh/?"
23:88: Aḥ āla: "Mila vu shen karaḥ masso a hxumanan pachchaḥalla derg‚ sha /qibersh/ larosh verg‚ shena düḥal /qechara/ laron yish yotsurg‚ shu khuush khilleḥ?"
23:89: Tsara er du: "(I derrig) Delan du-q". Aḥ āla: "Ma bozbuunchalla desh du-q shuna!"
23:90: Hxaʾ‚ Okha tsärga delira baq'derg. Bakq'alla a, üsh khartslüysh bersh ma bu.
23:91: Dala tsa letsira tsḥa a dözalkho‚ tsa khilira tsüntsa tsḥa a dela. T'akqa-m masso a delas sha qöllinarg dʿaḥur ma dara‚ tsarakh tsḥabersh (delanash) vuqaral laqabevr ma bara. Ts'ena vu i Dela tsara Shekh qulluchukh.
23:92: Ḥulameḥ derg a‚ guchaḥ derg a khuush volu‚ laqavälla Iza tsara shetsa naq'ost lotsuchukh.
23:93: Aḥ āla: "So Qiosh-Qoburg‚ nagaḥ Aḥ suna gaytaza tsa ditaḥ tsarna khir du ällarg (ʿazap),
23:94: so Qiosh-Qoburg‚ t'akqa so ma khiliytalaḥ zulame nakhana yukq'eḥ".
23:95: Bakq'alla a, Tkho ḥöga gayta Okha tsarna vaʿda dinarg nitsq' bolush du ḥuna‚
23:96: Aḥ dukhatokhalaḥ vonig sha dikokh dolchüntsa. Tkho dika khuush du ḥuna tsara /Dalla t'e/ qullurg.
23:97: Aḥ alalaḥ: "So Qiosh-Qoburg‚ so larlo Ḥötsa shayt'aniyn t'ehxusdechu /vochu/ hxumanekh.
23:98: So larlo Ḥötsa‚ san Qiosh-Qoburg‚ üsh (shayt'anash) suna gergadakhkarkh".
23:99: Tsarakh tsḥanna t'e valar deʾcha‚ er du: "San Qiosh-Qoburg‚ yukhaverzave-ḥa so /dünena/:
23:100: Dika ʿamal yan megara as‚ aysa tsa yesh yitinarg". Hxan-hxa! I dosh du tso (shayt'ano‚ tsateshachu staga) sha älla dolu. Tseran t'eḥaḥ düḥalo yu üsh yukha denbiyr bolchu diyne qachchalts.
23:101: Sur (Israfil-maliko zurma) leqcha, – gergarlonash khir dats tsarna yukq'eḥ otsu diynaḥ‚ vovshashka khöttur dats tsara.
23:102: Shayn mizan-terza dazdellarsh – üsh khir bu bakqiybüyrash.
23:103: Shen miza-terza daydellarsh – üsh shäsh hxallakbinarsh bu‚ guttar zhözhakhati choḥ khir bu üsh.
23:104: Shayn yakhḥash ts'aro yagaesh‚ shäsh tsu (zhözhakhati) choḥ qölina (yuḥ khabiyna) khir bu üsh.
23:105: /Tsärga er du/ San ayatash tsa khilira shuna t'eḥ döshush? Shu ma khilira üsh khartsdesh!
23:106: Tsara elira (er du q'ematdiynaḥ): "Tkhan Qiosh-Qoburg‚ tkhan deq'azalla tüylira tkhuna t'eḥ‚ tkho khili-q tiladella q'am.
23:107: Tkhan Qiosh-Qoburg‚ aradākhaḥ tkho tsu (zhözhakhati) chüra‚ tkho yukha a t'ederzaḥ /q'inoshna/‚ – t'akqa tkho khir ḥuna zulamkhoy".
23:108: Tso (Dala) er du: "Dʿasovtsa tsu choḥ‚ q'amel ma de Söga!"
23:109: Bakq'alla a, San lekh tsḥa toba khilira olush: "Tkhan Qiosh-Qoburg‚ iyman dillina okha‚ gechdeḥa tkhuna‚ q'inkhetam beḥa tkhokh‚ Ḥo vu-q q'inkhetam becharakh uggar dikanig".
23:110: Ash tsarakh belar dira otso shüga San ḥekham bitsbayttalts‚ shu khilira tsarakh dölush.
23:111: Bakq'alla a, As yal yeli tsarna takhana tsara sobar darna‚ bakq'alla a, üsh bu-q tolam bäkqinarsh.
23:112: Tso (Dala) er du /zhözhakhate bakhiytinchärga/: "Mel lättira shu lätta t'eḥ sheriyn barameḥ?"
23:113: Tsara elira (er du q'ematdiynaḥ): "Tkho lättira diynaḥ‚ ya diynan tsḥana deq'eḥ‚ khattal dagardechärga".
23:114: Tso elira: "Shu k'ezzig ben tsa lättira‚ shu khilleḥara khuush".
23:115: Shuna möttina-te Okha shu qöllina erna‚ shäsh Tkhuna t'e dʿaderzor a dats?
23:116: Laqaveli Dela – baq'volu pachchaḥ‚ vats qin dela Iza votsurg – siylaḥ yolchu ʿarshan Da /vu Iza/.
23:117: Milla velaḥ Delatsa tsḥäna qechu dele qoyqush‚ shena tsüntsa tsḥa a teshalla a dotsush – tsünan ḥesap shen Qiosh-Qobuchun karaḥ du. Bakq'alla a, bakqiybüyr ma bats tsateshnarsh.
23:118: Aḥ āla /hxay paykhamar/: "So Qiosh-Qoburg‚ gechdeḥa‚ q'inkhetam beḥa‚ Ḥo vu-q q'inkhetam becharakh uggar dikanig".
24:1: Surat du Okha sha dossiyna dolu‚ Okha /shen ḥukamash qochushdar/ parz dina dolu‚ Okha dossiyna tsu choḥ bilgala dolu ayatash – ash oyla yiyr yatsara-te!
24:2: Qaḥpa lela zuda a‚ qaḥpa lela stag a – tokha tsu shinnakh hxoranna bʿe ġazh. Shun ma khüliyla tsu shinnakh doglazar Delan dineḥ‚ nagaḥ sanna shu khilleḥ teshash Delakh a‚ ekhar /doġur dolchu/ diynakh a. Tseran shinnan a taʿzar goyla muʾma nakhakh tsḥana tobanna.
24:3: Qaḥpa lelachu staga yalor yats qaḥpa lela zuda ya /Delatsa/ naq'ost lotsu zuda a ben‚ qaḥpa lela zuda yugur yats qaḥpa lelachu staga ya /Delatsa/ naq'ost lotsuchu staga a ben‚ – ḥaram dina iza muʾma nakhana.
24:4: Özdachu zudarshna t'e bekhk qüssush bersh /üsh nakhatsa lela älla/‚ t'akqa tsara viʾ tesh tsa valavaḥ – tokha tsarna ezt'q'a ġazh. Qin tseran teshalla q'obal ma delash tsq'a a. Üsh – pesaq'ash bu.
24:5: Shäsh tsul t'äḥa tōba a dina‚ dika ʿamalsh yinarsh botsursh – t'akqa‚ bakq'alla‚ Dela t'ekh gechdiyrig a vu‚ q'inkhetame verg a vu.
24:6: Shayn zudarshna bekhk qüssush bersh‚ shayna teshash botsush‚ shäsh ben‚ – tsarakh tsḥammo teshalla doyla Delatsa döazza‚ bakq'alla a‚ sha baq'lüycharakh ma vu‚ älla.
24:7: Pkhöazlaġa Delan neʿalt khülda shena‚ nagaḥ sanna sha khilleḥ khartslüycharakh‚ älla.
24:8: Tsunakh (zudchukh) taʿzar dukhatukhur du tso teshalla dartsa Delatsa diʾ teshallitsa‚ bakq'alla a‚ iza (i shen mar) khartslüycharakh ma vu‚ älla.
24:9: Pkhöazlaġa Delan öġazlo khüliyla shena t'eḥ‚ nagaḥ sanna i khilleḥ baq'lüycharakh‚ älla.
24:10: Delan komärshalla a, Tsünan q'inkhetam a tsa khilleḥara shuna t'eḥ‚ I Dela tōba t'ekh/duqa/ q'obaldiyrig a‚ ḥukma /niysa/ diyrig tsa khilleḥara /hxallaqir dara shu/.
24:11: Bakq'alla a, i eladita deʾnarsh – shukh tsḥa toba ma yu. Shuna ma mottalash i shuna von du. Hxaʾ‚ i shuna dika du. Tsarakh hxor stagana q'inakh sha karadinarg du. Tsarakh shena t'e tsünan (q'inan) dokqanig lätsnarg – tsunna dokqa dolu ʿazap khir du.
24:12: I shayna khezcha, hxunda tsa möttura muʾma bozharshna a‚ muʾma zudarshna a shayn degnashkaḥ dikanig‚ tsara hxunda tsa elira: "Hxara bilggala eladita du-q?"
24:13: Viʾ tesh valiyneḥara tsara tsunna t'eḥ. Tsara teshash tsa balabaḥ, – üsh bu Dalla gergaḥ shäsh khartslüysh bersh.
24:14: Delan komärshalla a‚ Tsünan q'inkhetam a tsa khilleḥara shayna t'eḥ dünenaḥ a‚ ekhartaḥ a‚ shu lätsna khir dara ash t'ekh diytsinchoḥ deza-dokqachu ʿazapo.
24:15: Ash t'e ma lotsu i shayn mattatsa‚ ma düytsu shayn baganashtsa shayna shetsa tsḥa a ʿilma dotsurg‚ shuna möttu i atta du‚ iza Dalla gergaḥ deza-dokqa du.
24:16: Shayna iza khezcha, ash hxunda tsa elira: "Tkhuna megar dats iza diytsa. Vonakh ts'ena vu Ḥo‚ ma deza-dokqa eladita du-q hxara".
24:17: Dala ḥökhu shuna ishttachunna t'e shu tsq'a a tsaderzar‚ shu muʾma nakh delaḥ.
24:18: Dala bilgaldo shuna ayatash. Dela khuush verg a‚ ḥukma /niysa/ desh verg a vu.
24:19: Bakq'alla a, iyman dillinchärgaḥ bökhanig darzha luush bersh – tsarna lazosh dolu ʿazap khir du dünenaḥ a‚ ekhartaḥ a. Dalla khäa‚ shuna khaats.
24:20: Delan kömärshalla a‚ Tsünan q'inkhetam a shayna tsa khilleḥara, i Dela dikanig luush a‚ q'inkhetame a vatsaḥara /hxallaqir dara shu/.
24:21: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Shayt'anan ġulchashna t'äḥa ma hxittalash. Shayt'anan ġulchashna t'äḥahxöttinarg – bakq'alla tso ḥökhu bökhanig a‚ inkarlo a. Shayna t'eḥ Delan kömarshalla a‚ Tsünan q'inkhetam a tsa khilleḥara, shukh tsḥa a tsq'a a ts'anlur ma vatsara. Delaḥ a, Dala ts'anvo Shena luurg. Dela khezash verg a‚ khuush verg a vu.
24:22: Duy ma boiyla shukh shegaḥ kömärshalla a‚ ḥal a dolcho gergarcharna a‚ miskacharna a‚ Delan novq'aḥ dʿaqelkhinacharna a /saġa/ lur dats, aliy. Q'int'era boliyla üsh‚ bekhkazbokhiyla tsara. Shuna tsa deza Dala shayna gechdar? Dela t'ekh gechdiyrig a vu‚ q'inkhetame verg a vu.
24:23: Bakq'alla a, özdachu‚ /shayna bökhanig/ tsa devzachu muʾma zudarshna bekhk qüssush bersh – dünenaḥ a‚ ekhartaḥ a neʿalt älla tsarna‚ tsarna deza-dokqa ʿazap a khir du.
24:24: Otsu /q'emat/diynaḥ teshalla diyr du tsarna t'eḥ tseran mettanasha‚ tseran küygasha a‚ tseran kogasha a tsara lelosh khillachüntsa.
24:25: Otsu diynaḥ Dala biyr bu tsarna ḥaq'-baq' bolu beqam. Tsarna khuush du i Dela Sha vuyla bilgala baq'derg.
24:26: Bökha /lela/ zudariy – bökhachu bozharshna‚ bökha /lela/ bozhariy – bökhachu zudarshna. Ts'ena /lela/ zudariy – ts'enachu bozharshna‚ ts'ena /lela/ bozhariy – ts'enachu zudarshna. Üsh /ʿaishat i sannarsh/ ts'ena bu tsara düytsuchukh. Tsarna gechdar a du‚ siylaḥ ritsq' a du.
24:27: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Shu chu ma ġolash shayn dotschu ts'enoshka baq'o a tsa yökhush‚ tseran dayshka salam tsa lush. Iza shuna dika du /shu ts'ekhḥana tsarna chu ġochul/. Ash oyla yiyr yatsara-te?
24:28: Shuna tsa karavaḥ tsu choḥ (tsu nekhan ts'enoshkaḥ) tsḥa a – chu ma ġolash shayna purba dallalts. Shayga "Yukhaderza" alaḥ – yukhaderzalash /chu tsa ġosh/. Iza vuno a ts'ena du shuna. I Dela ash diyrig khuush vu.
24:29: Q'a dats shuna nakh bēkhash botschu, shuna öshu hxumanash / ya payda bolchu/ ts'enoshna chu shu dakha. I Dela khuush vu ash guchudokqurig a‚ ash dʿaḥuldiyrig a.
24:30: Aḥ āla /hxay Muḥammad/ muʾma nakhe oḥatukhiyla tsara shayn ḥēzhar‚ shayn evḥe mezhenash laryoyla tsara. Iza vunō a ts'ena du tsarna. Bakq'alla a, Dela dika devzash vu tsara diyrig.
24:31: Aḥ āla muʾma zudarshka oḥatukhiyla tsara shayn ḥēzhar‚ laryoyla tsara shayn evḥe mezhenash‚ ma goytiyla tsara shayn khaznash tsunakh guchaḥ erg ben‚ tsara t'e qussiyla shayn qollar shayn neqiyn gonaḥa. Tsara ma goytiyla shayn khaznash shayn maroshka‚ ya shayn dayshka‚ ya shayn maroyn dayshka‚ ya shayn k'entashka‚ ya shayn maroyn k'entashka /qechu zudarsha bina bolu/‚ ya shayn vezharshka‚ ya shayn vezhariyn k'entashka‚ ya shayn yizhariyn k'entashka‚ ya shayn /ḥalkhaḥ ġullaq desh bolchu/ zudarshka‚ ya shayn ättu küygasha doladinachärga‚ ya t'eḥözhush bolu shayn shovq' dʿayalla bolu bozharshka‚ ya zudariyn evḥe mezhenashka tsa ḥözhuchu berashka a ben. Shayn kogash ma bettiyla tsara shäsh ḥuldina shayn khazalla dovziytarḥama. Tōba de Dele massara a‚ hxay muʾma nakh‚ shu dakqiyden tarlo.
24:32: Zudariy bālabe shaykh zhera-bozharshna a‚ shayn lēkh dikacharna a‚ mare lo shayn lay-zudariy. Nagaḥ üsh miska khilaḥ, – Dala ḥal lur du tsarna shen kömarshallakh. Dela t'ekh komärsha vu /Shen luuchunna shortta ritsq' lush/‚ khuush vu.
24:33: Yukhaozalush khüliyla /nakhatsa lelarkh/ shayna zuda yalor /mare bakhar/ tsa nisbellarsh Dala shayna Shen komärshallakh ḥal dallalts. Shun ättu küygasha doladinacharakh azat bāla yazbala luush bersh – yazbe üsh, nagaḥ sanna shuna khaalaḥ tsu choḥ dikanig. Dʿalo tsarna Delan bakhamakh‚ Tso shuna bella bolchu. Ma teʿabelash shayn mekhkariy qaḥballina t'e‚ tsarna liʾneḥ ts'ena khila‚ ash dünenan dakharan khilamash (bakham) lökhush. Üsh t'eteʿosh verg /qaḥballina - tsunna taʿzar diyr dolush du Dala/... Dela üsh /nitsq'a/ t'eteʿabinachul t'äḥa /tsu zudarshna/ gechdesh a vu‚ q'inkhetame a vu.
24:34: Ōkha dossina shüga /masso hxuma/ bilgaldokhu ayatash a‚ shul ḥalkha bakhancheran /dākharan/ masal a‚ /Delakh/ qörucharna ḥekham a.
24:35: Dela–stiglaniyn a‚ lättan a nur du. Tsünan nur penan yuq'akh tera du, shena choḥ chirq bolchu. Chirq shishana choḥ bu. Shisha /nur/ lepachu sedakh tera du. Berkatechu zayt-dittan /dättanakh/ latabo i (chirq). Malkhbaleḥ a‚ malkhbuzeḥ a dats i (ditt-yassachu araḥ du, guttar malkh qetartsa shen stömash sikha a, khaza a madlush). Dätta gerga du q'aga shekh ts'e ḥaqaella yatsaḥ a. Nur t'eḥ a nur du. Nisvo Dala Shen nur t'e Shena luurg. Dālado Dala masalsh nakhana. I Dela masso a hxuma khuush verg vu.
24:36: /I nur du Delan/ ts'enoshkaḥ (mäzhdigashkaḥ), Dala shäsh /siydesh/ ayda a, shayna choḥ Tsünan ts'e ḥekhayan a magiyna dolchu. Tsarna choḥ Dalla tasbiḥ (lamazash) do ʿüyranna a‚ süyranna a -
24:37: /muʾma/nakha, shäsh yokhk-etsaro yuq'akhbokhur botsush Dela ḥekhorakh a‚ lamaz hxottorakh a, zakat dalarakh a. Üsh qöru /q'emat/diynakh‚ shen /irchallikh nekhan/ degnash a‚ bʿärsa a dettalur dolchu.
24:38: Dala shayna beqam barḥama shäsh diynachukh uggar khazachüntsa‚ Tso shayna sovdakqarḥama Shen komärshallakh. I Dela ritsq' lush vu Shena luuchunna, ḥesap a dotsush.
24:39: Tsateshnarsh – tseran ʿamalsh sherachu araḥ /hxuttuchu/ yilbazġalakh tera yu: ḥogakh volchunna i khi du metta‚ i tsunna t'evakhcha, – i hxumma tsa karayo tsunna. Tsunna karavo Dela shena gergaḥ – Tso qochushdo tsünan ḥesap (shen ʿamalashka ḥozhiy Dala beqam bo tsunna). I Dela ḥesap dareḥ sikha verg vu.
24:40: Ya /Delakh tsateshacheran ʿamalash/ tera yu k'orgachu hxörda choḥ bolchu bodanakh‚ sha ḥulbesh bolchu tolġano. Tsunna t'ekhula tolġa yu‚ tsunna t'ekhula markha yu. Bodanash du tsḥadersh vuqarna t'eḥ‚ tso shen küg aradekqicha, – tsunna i gan tsa tügu. Dala shena nur tsa dinachunna tsḥa a nur dats.
24:41: Ḥuna tsa khiʾna i Dela khilar Shena tasbiḥ desh stiglanashkaḥ a‚ lattaḥ a mel volcho‚ moġarshtsa /t'ama dellachu/ olkhazarsha a? Hxoranna khiʾna shen lamaz a‚ shen tasbiḥ a. I Dela khuush ma vu tsara diyrig.
24:42: Delan du stiglaniyn a‚ lättan a pachchaḥalla. Dele du dʿaderzar a.
24:43: Ḥuna tsa gina Dala dʿalokhku markhash‚ t'akqa t'egulyo üsh‚ t'akqa Tso üsh khülüytu t'ett'a /barz/‚ ḥuna go doġa tseran yukq'ekhula sḥadolush‚ Tso dossado stiglara /markhiyn/ lämnash‚ shayna choḥ t'q'es yolush. Shena luuchunna tukhu Tso i‚ Shena luuchukh yukha dʿaḥavzayo. T'q'esan nuro /nekhan/ bʿärsa dʿaḥosh lätta.
24:44: Khartsayo Dala büysa a‚ de a. Bakq'alla a, tsu choḥ ḥekham ma bu bʿärsa dolcharna.
24:45: Dala qöllina masso a diynat khikh. Tsarakh shen gay t'eḥ lelarg du‚ tsarakh shina koga t'eḥ lelarg a du, tsarakh dea koga t'eḥ lelarg du. Qullu Dala Shena luurg. Bakq'alla a, Dela masso a hxumanna t'eḥ nitsq' qochurg vu.
24:46: Ōkha dossina may bilgala dolu ayatash. Dala nisvo Shena luurg niysachu novq'a.
24:47: Tsara (munepiq'asha) ōlu: "Teshna tkho Delakh a‚ elchanakh a‚ müt'aḥ a khilla tkho". T'akqa dʿayörzu /baq'dolchu dinakh/ tsarakh tsḥa toba tsul t'äḥa – üsh muʾma nakh bats!
24:48: Shäsh Dalla a‚ elchanna a t'e qayqicha shayn yukq'eḥ ḥukma dan – tsarakh tsḥa toba düḥalyolu.
24:49: Shayna khilaḥ baq'o – tsunna t'e boġu üsh, müt'aḥ khüliy.
24:50: Tseran degnashkaḥ tsamgar yu-te‚ ya shekbevla-te üsh‚ ya qöru-te üsh Dala a‚ Tsünan elchano a shaytsa niyso tsa yan? Hxaʾ! Üsh zulamkhoy bu!
24:51: Bakq'alla a, muʾma nekhan dosh khili shäsh Dalla a‚ Tsünan elchanna a t'e qayqicha shayna yukq'eḥ ḥukma dan, tsara ālar: "Ladöġna ōkha‚ müt'aḥ khilla tkho". Üsh bu bakqiyben bersh!
24:52: Dalla a‚ Tsünan elchanna a müt'aḥ verg‚ Delakh qörush verg‚ Tsüntsa vochukh larlush verg – üsh bu tolam bäkqinarsh!
24:53: Delakh biira tsara shayn ch'oġa duynash aḥ shayga omra dicha, aradovlur du shäsh‚ bokhush. Aḥ āla: "Ash duynash ma baa! Müt'aḥ khilar dika dara /shügara/. Bakq'alla a, Dela dika khuush vu ash diyrig".
24:54: Aḥ āla /tsärga, hxay Muḥammad/: "Müt'aḥ khila Dalla‚ müt'aḥ khila elchanna!" Üsh dʿaberzaḥ, tsunna shena t'e dillinarg du‚ shuna – shayna t'e dillinarg du. Tsunna /elchanna/ müt'aḥ shu khilaḥ – shu niysachu novq'aḥ du. Elchanna-m t'eḥ dats bilgala dʿaqachor ben.
24:55: Dala vaʿda dina shukh iyman dillincharna a‚ dika ʿamalsh yinacharna a Sha t'äḥe lur yu tsarna lättaḥ‚ älla‚ Sha tsaral ḥalkha khillacharna yalarakh terra‚ Sha ch'aġdiyr du tsarna shayn din‚ Sha tsunna tsarna reza khilla volu‚ Sha tsarna tseran qeramal t'äḥa tesham lur bu (qeramazalla lur yu)‚ älla. Tsara Suna ʿibadat diyr du‚ tsḥa a hxuma khülüytur yats Suna naq'ostalla dan. Tsul t'äḥa kersta khillarg – üsh bu pesiq'ash!
24:56: Ash hxottade lamaz‚ lo zakat‚ shu müt'aḥ khila elchanna – shukh q'inkhetam ban megara.
24:57: Ḥuna ma mottalaḥ i tsatesharsh /Tkhan shayna t'eḥ/ nitsq' botsush bu lättaḥ (dünenan dakhareḥ). Tseran chuġoyla – ts'e yu. Ma von dʿaderzar du-q i!
24:58: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Shüga purba dökhiyla quzza shun ättu küygo doladinachara a‚ shukh qiʾna tsa vällacho a‚ satasaran lamazal ḥalkha a‚ shäsh delq'aḥ bedar yokquchu khenaḥ a‚ pḥüyr-lamazal t'äḥa a – shun qo ʿovrat /yolu khan yu iza/. Shuna a‚ tsarna a q'a dats tsaral (tsu khenal) t'äḥa /chu ban/. T'eḥözhush bu shuna shukh tsḥabersh vukqarna. Ishtta bilgaldokhu Dala shuna ayatash. I Dela khuush verg a‚ ḥukma /niysa/ desh verg a vu.
24:59: Shun berasha qiʾna bälcha, purba dökhiyla tsara shayl ḥalkhalerachara dekharakh terra. Ishtta bilgaldokhu Dala shuna Shen ayatash. Dela khuush verg a vu‚ ḥukma /niysa/ desh verg a vu.
24:60: Zudarekh q'anbellarsh‚ mare bakha dog dokhush botsu – tsarna q'a dats shayn /t'ekhula yolu/ bedarsh dʿayakharakh‚ khazalla guchudokqush batsaḥ. Üsh özda khilcha, – tsarna dika du. Dela khezash verg a vu‚ khuush verg a vu.
24:61: Bʿärsa dotschunna q'a dats‚ astaġ volchunna q'a dats‚ tsomgush volchunna q'a dats‚ shuna shayna a /q'a/ dats ash /hxuma/ yaarakh shayn ts'enoshkara‚ ya shayn dayn ts'noshkara‚ ya shayn nanoyn ts'enoshkara‚ ya shayn vezhariyn ts'enoshkara‚ ya shayn yizhariyn ts'enoshkara‚ ya shayn den vezhariyn ts'enoshkara‚ ya shayn den yizhariyn ts'enoshkara‚ ya shayn nenan vezhariyn ts'enoshkara, ya shayn nenan yizhariyn ts'enoshkara‚ ya shayn /ts'enoyn/ doġanashna ash doladecheran /ts'enoshkara/‚ ya shayn dottaġchun /ts'enoshkara/. Dats shuna q'a ash /hxuma/ yaarakh tsḥäna‚ ya shäsh-shäsh. Shäsh ts'enoshna chu dödush, salam lo vovshashka Delan gergara berkate a‚ ts'ena a khillachu marshallitsa. Ishtta bilgaldokhu Dala shuna ayatash – shu khila megara qetame.
24:62: Bakq'alla a, muʾma nakh bu shäsh teshnarsh Delakh a‚ Tsünan elchanakh a‚ shäsh tsüntsa (Delan elchantsa) dolush tsḥana yuq'ara ġullaqna t'eḥ dʿa tsa bödush bersh tsünga purba dekhna a ben. Bakq'alla a, i ḥöga purba dökhursh – üsh bu Delakh a‚ Tsünan elchanakh a teshash bersh. Tsara ḥayga purba dekhcha shayn tsḥatstsa ġullaqna‚ purba lo tsarakh ḥayna luuchunna‚ gechdar a dekha tsarna Dele. Bakq'alla Dela gechdiyrig a vu‚ q'inkhetam biyrig a vu.
24:63: Ash ma de elchane qayqar shayna yukq'eḥ shaykh tsḥabolcheran vuqarga qayqarakh tera. Dalla bevzash bu shukh lach'q'a büylursh. Larloyla i tsünan (elchanan) omrana khilpalo yesh bersh pitana (dünenan bala) shaykh ḥarcharakh‚ ya /ekhartan/ lazosh dolu ʿazap shaykh ḥarcharakh.
24:64: Tq'a Delan dats stiglanashkaḥ a‚ lättaḥ a mel derg?! Tsunna khäa shu Shena t'eḥ derg. Üsh Shena t'eberzinchu /q'emat/ diynaḥ Tso tsärga düytsur du tsara diynarg. I Dela masso a hxuma khuush verg vu.
25:1: Berkate khili Sha q'astor dossosh khillarg Shen lega i khiliytarḥama ʿalamashna qeramcha.
25:2: Iza /Allahx-Dela/ vu stiglaniyn a‚ lättan a pachchaḥalla Shegaḥ derg‚ Tso tsa lätsna dözalkho‚ vats Tsunna naq'ost pachchaḥalleḥ. Tso qöllina masso a hxuma‚ baram bina tsunna (masso a hxumanna) baramtsa.
25:3: Tsara letsira‚ Iza a vitina‚ delanash‚ tsara hxumma tsa qullu‚ üsh shäsh qullush bu /Dala/. Tsara dola tsa do shayn sinoshna zenna a‚ paydenna a‚ tsara dola tsa do dalarna a‚ dakharna a‚ dendarna a.
25:4: Elira tsateshachara: "Hxara /Q'urʾan/ khartsderg du‚ sha tso (paykhamara) qöllina dolu‚ tsunna ġo dina tsu t'eḥ qechu nakha a". Tsara deana zulam a‚ khartsderg a.
25:5: Tsara (tsateshachara) elira: "Ḥalkhalerancheran tüyranash du. Tso (Muḥammada) yazdaytina üsh‚ üsh tsunna döshush du ʿüyranna a‚ süyranna a".
25:6: Aḥ āla /tsärga, hxay Muḥammad/: "Iza /Q'urʾan/ dossiyna Sha stiglanashkaḥ a, lättaḥ a q'ayle khuush volcho. Bakq'alla a, Iza khilla t'ekh gechdesh verg a‚ q'inkhetame verg a".
25:7: Tsara elira /kerstanasha Muḥammad-paykhamarakh, tsa beshash/: "Hxara hxun elcha khülu, daar a doush, bazarshkakhula a lelash? Dössina khilleḥara tsünga malik, t'akqa i khülush tsüntsa tsḥäna qeramcha.
25:8: Ya yelleḥara tsünga khazna‚ ya khilleḥara tsunna besh, tso tsu chüra yuush". Elira zulamkhosha: "Shu t'äḥahxittina ma du shena bozbuunchalla dinchu stagana".
25:9: Ḥazhal /ḥo, hxay elcha/‚ mukha daliyna tsara ḥuna masalsh – tilabella üsh‚ /baq'dolchunna t'e/ neq' /lakha/ tsa mega tsarna.
25:10: Berkate khili Iza‚ Shena liʾcha, khülüytur yolu ḥuna /hxoqu dünenaḥ a/ tsul dikanig – boshmash‚ shena bukhakhula khish ökhush‚ khülüytur yolu ḥuna ġalanash /ḥan Dalla liʾna ḥuna üsh khiliyta ekhartaḥ/.
25:11: Hxaʾ‚ tsara khartsdira saḥt. Okha kechyina saḥt khartsdinchunna /zhözhakhatin/ ts'e.
25:12: Tsunna (zhözhakhatina) üsh gicha genarchu mettigera‚ tsarna khezar du tsünan deralla a‚ uġar a.
25:13: Tsu chüra gottachu mettige shäsh qissicha‚ dʿadikhkina a dolush /küygash logekh/‚ tsara qoyqur dara hxallaqilare.
25:14: /Er du tsärga/: "Ash ma qayqa takhana tsḥana hxallaqilare‚ qayqa dukqa a hxallaqilarshka!"
25:15: Aḥ āla /tsärga, hxay elcha/: "Hxara tölu‚ ya guttarenna a yolu /yalsamanin/ besh /tölu/‚ sha /Delakh/ qörucharna khir yu ällarg, sha khir yolu tsarna sovġatna a‚ /guttarenna/ ʿen mettig khilla a?"
25:16: Tsarna tsu choḥ shayna luurg yu‚ guttar /shäsh tsu choḥ/ lättash. I khili ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchunna t'eḥ zhöpallin vaʿda.
25:17: Sha üsh a‚ tsara, I vitina, shayna ʿibadat dinarsh a gulbinchu diynaḥ‚ Tso er du: "Ash tiliyra hxara San lesh‚ ya shäsh /niysachu/ novq'akh bevlira üsh?"
25:18: Tsara er: "Vonakh ts'ena vu Ḥo‚ tkhuna öshush tsa khilira Ḥo votsurg verasash liytsa‚ delaḥ a, Aḥ zovq ḥegiytira tsärga a‚ tseran dayshka a tsarna ḥekham bitsballalts‚ üsh khilira hxallaqilla q'am".
25:19: /Er du Dala/: "Tsara shu khartsdira ash düytsuchüntsa‚ shuna tsa mega dukhatokha a /shaykh ʿazap/‚ ġo khiliyta a. Shukh milla velaḥ a zulam desh‚ – tsünga ʿovshüytur du Okha dokqa ʿazap".
25:20: Okha tsa vakhiytina ḥol ḥalkha a elchanekh /tsḥa a/, tsara qacha boush a, üsh bazarshkakhula lelash a ben. Okha khiliytira shukh tsḥabersh vuqarna pitana. Ash sobar doy? Khilira ḥan Qiosh-Qoburg gush verg.
25:21: Elira Tkhuna düḥalqetare dog tsa dokhuchara: "Vayna dossineḥara malikash‚ ya vayna gush velaḥara vayn Qiosh-Qoburg". Üsh kurabevlira shäshlaḥ‚ /Delan/ dozanekh bevlira üsh bālaral a sov.
25:22: Shayna malikash ginchu diynaḥ – qaʾ khir bats otsu diynaḥ q'inosh dinacharna‚ tsara (malikasha) er du: "Ḥaram bina ḥaram bu".
25:23: Tkho t'edirzira tsara (kerstanasha dünenaḥ) yinchu ʿamalna‚ tsunakh khiliytira Okha bärzhina chim (tsa lerira Okha tseran ʿamalsh).
25:24: Yalsamanin day otsu diynaḥ dika khir bu ch'aġbalaran mettigtsa a‚ vuno dika khir bu /delq'aḥ/ sadaʿaran mettigtsa a.
25:25: Tsu diynaḥ et'ar yu stigal markhashtsa‚ oḥadossor du malikash /moġarshtsa/ oḥadossortsa.
25:26: Ḥaq'-baq' dolu pachchaḥalla tsu diynaḥ Q'inkhetam bolchunna (Dalla) du. I khilira tsateshacharna khala /de/.
25:27: Tsu diynaḥ zulam dincho tsergash yukhkur yu shen küygekh‚ er du: "Ma daq'azvälla-q so. Elchantsa neq' lätsna khilleḥara as.
25:28: Ma bala bu-q suna! Ma lätsneḥara-q as ḥenekh dottaġ.
25:29: Tiliyra tso so ḥekhamakh‚ i söga beʾnachul t'äḥa. Shayt'a khilira adamna yamartkho".
25:30: Elira elchano /Dele dalkhosh shen ġullaq/: "San Qiosh-Qobush volu Dela‚ bakq'alla a, san q'omo hxara Q'urʾan dʿatesna ma diti!"
25:31: Ishtta hxora paykhamarna a Okha khiliytira mostaġ q'inosh dinacharakh. Töur du ḥuna ḥan Qiosh-Qoburg khilar nisvesh verg a‚ ġöncha a.
25:32: Elira tsateshachara: "Dössineḥara tsünga /hxara/ Q'urʾan tsḥana teptartsa". Ishtta /dossiyna Okha i/ shetsa ḥan dog ch'aġdarḥama‚ Okha diyshira i t'ett'a".
25:33: Ḥöga daḥar dats tsara tsḥa a masal (khattar), Okha ḥuna lush /i dukhatukhush/ baq'derg a, vunō khaza tidar a ben.
25:34: Shäsh gulbiyr bersh shayn yakhḥash t'eḥ /teqosh/ zhözhakhatina t'e – üsh bu von bersh mettigatsa‚ uggar tilabellarsh neq'atsa.
25:35: Okha delira /ḥalkha/ Musaga zhayna‚ vazir khiliytira tsüntsa tsünan vasha Hxarun.
25:36: Okha elira: "Dʿaġo shu shiʾ shäsh Tkhan ayatash khartsdinchu /Firʿavnan/ q'omana t'e". T'akqa Okha üsh bokhiyra /ch'oġachu/ bokhortsa.
25:37: Nuḥan q'am a‚ tsara elchanash khartsbicha‚ khin bukhabakhiytira Okha üsh. Okha khiliytira tsarakh nakhana delil. Okha kechdira zulamkhoshna lazosh dolu ʿazap.
25:38: ʿadash a‚ Samudash a‚ Rassan day a, tsarna yukq'eḥ t'äḥenash dukqa a /hxallakyira Okha/.
25:39: Hxoranna Okha daliyra shen masalsh‚ hxora a Okha hxallakvira hxallakvartsa.
25:40: Üsh (Makkin kerstanash) ma bakhariy yurta t'e‚ shena t'e vonan doġa dilkhina khillachu. Tq'a üsh khilira i tsa gush? Hxan-hxa! Üsh khilira yukhadendare dog tsa dokhush.
25:41: Ḥo shayna gicha‚ ḥokh belar do tsara: "Hxara vu Dala vaiytinarg, elcha vina?
25:42: Vay vayn delekh dʿatiladarakh tsa sotsu-q iza‚ vay tsarna t'eḥ sobar tsa daḥ". T'äḥa khuur du tsarna shayna ʿazap gicha‚ mila khilla uggar tilavellarg neq'atsa.
25:43: Ḥuna gini-y /hxay Muḥammad/ i shen ch'oġa dezachu hxumanakh shena dēla lätsnarg? Tq'a ḥo khir vara tsünan t'eḥ vekal? (Ḥan nitsq' qochur ma bats i nisvan).
25:44: Ya ḥuna möttu tsarakh duqakh bersh khezash ya oyla esh bu? Üsh-m bezhnash sanna a ben batsiy. Hxaʾ‚ üsh vuno a tilabellarsh bu neq'atsa.
25:45: Ḥo tsa ḥozhu ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchünga‚ mukha darzhina Tso ʿindaġ? Shena liʾneḥara‚ Tso i khüliytara dara /parġat/ setstsa. T'akqa Okha malkh khiliytira tsunna t'eḥ delil.
25:46: T'akqa Okha Tkhayna t'e ozadira i (ʿindaġ) dayn ozadartsa (k'ez-k'ezzig dokqush dʿa däkqira Okha i ʿindaġ, t'akqa k'ez-k'ezzig yukhakhülüytu).
25:47: Iza vu Sha khiliytinarg shuna büysa dukhar khilla‚ nab – sintem khilla. Tso khiliytina de yukhadendalar khilla.
25:48: Iza vu baiytinarg mokh qaʾ khilla Shen q'inkhetamal ḥalkha‚ Okha oḥadossira stiglara t'ekh ts'ena khi.
25:49: Tsüntsa Okha denbarḥama bella mokhk‚ i malado Okha /shortta/ Tkhash qöllinchukh bezhnashna a‚ dukqa nakhana a.
25:50: I (doġin khi) darzhiyra Okha tsarna yukq'eḥ tsarna dagadaytarḥama /Delan niʿmat/. T'akqa a nakhakh duqakhbersh düḥal khilira kerstanalla dotsuchunna.
25:51: Tkhuna liʾneḥara‚ Okha vaiytina khir vara hxor yurtaḥ qeramcha.
25:52: Ḥo müt'aḥ ma khilalaḥ tsateshacharna‚ q'iysam lattabe tsärtsa tsüntsa (Q'urʾantsa) bokqa q'iysam.
25:53: Iza vu shi hxord khetsna bitinarg /ya ökhuchu khin shi aġo khetsna yitinarg/: hxara: teza – merza‚ hxara: düra-chemaza. Tso khiliytina tsu shinnan yukq'eḥ /dokqa/ pardo a‚ ch'oġa düḥalo a üsh /vovshakh tsa en /.
25:54: Iza vu qöllinarg khikh adam‚ Tso tsunna khiliytina shen taypan aġorḥara gergarlo a, zudariyn aġorḥara (zakhallin) gergarlo a. Khilira ḥan Qiosh-Qoburg nitsq' qochush.
25:55: Tsara ʿibadat do, Dela a vütiy, shayna payda a‚ zen a tsa dechunna. Khili tsatesharg shen Qiosh-Qobuchunna düḥal ġöncha.
25:56: Ḥo tsa vakhiytina Okha qaʾ bokqurg a‚ qeram tosurg a khilla a ben.
25:57: Aḥ āla /hxay elcha/: "As shüga tsa bökhu tsunakh tsḥa a makh‚ shena luucho shen Qiosh-Qobuchünga neq' latsar ben".
25:58: Ḥo t'etovzha sha diynavolchunna (Dalla)‚ liyrig votsuchu‚ tasbiḥ de Iza khastortsa. Qacho yu Tsüntsa Shen leyn q'inosh dika dovzartsa.
25:59: Ishttannig vu Iza Sha qöllina stiglanash a‚ latta a‚ tsu shinnan yukq'eḥ mel derg yalkh diynaḥ‚ t'akqa dʿanisvella Iza ʿarsha t'eḥ. Q'inkhetame verg vu Iza. Khatta tsünakh dika khuush volchünga.
25:60: Shayga älcha: "Suzhud de Q'inkhetame volchunna"‚ tsara elira: "Hxun du i Q'inkhetame verg bokhurg? Tq'a okha suzhud do aḥ tkhuna omra dechunna?" Tso sovbekhira üsh /Delan neq'akh/ dog dalartsa.
25:61: Berkate vu /Dela/, Sha stiglaḥ /sedarchiyn/ ġalanash yinarg‚ Tso bina tsu choḥ chirq a‚ nüre bolu butt a.
25:62: Iza vu khiliytinarg büysa a‚ de a khiytsalush shena luuchunna oyla yan‚ ya barkalla āla.
25:63: Q'inkhetame volchun lesh bu – shäsh esala (kura botsush) lättakhula lelash bersh, shaytsa zhehxal nakha q'amel desh‚ olush bersh: "Salam! "
25:64: /Dalla/ suzhdane bakhanchu ḥoleḥ a, irahxöttina lättash a lamazash dartsiy büysanash den esh bersh a /bu/.
25:65: Olush bersh /a bu/: "Tkhan Qiosh-Qoburg! Dʿadakqalaḥ tkhokh zhözhakhatin ʿazap. Bakq'alla a, tsünan ʿazap khilla t'edözhna (q'inosh decharakh tsa q'ästash).
25:66: Bakq'alla a, ma von khili-q iza (zhözhakhate) /choḥ/ ʿarna a‚ /sadaʿa/ mettig khilarna a".
25:67: Shʿäsh /saġa dokqush, qin yolu/ kharzhash esh, qoam a besh‚ pis a tsa khülush‚ tsu (shina) yukq'eḥ nisbella bersh a /bu Tsu Delan dika lesh/.
25:68: Delatsa qin dele tsa qoyqush bersh a /bu Delan dika lesh/. Tsara tsa dö sa (sa mel dolu hxuma), Dala sha /den/ bekhkame dina dolu‚ /den/ ḥaq' dolush ben. Zina tsa do tsara. I desh verg q'inna düḥalqetar vu (q'ematdiynaḥ, tsüntsa shena beqam a khir bolush).
25:69: Shozza alsam dokqur du tsunna (Delatsa naq'ost lätsnachunna) ʿazap q'ematdiynaḥ‚ guttarenna a vüsur vu iza tsu choḥ, siysaza khilla.
25:70: Shäsh tōba dinarsh a‚ iyman dillinarsh a‚ dika ʿamal yinarsh a botsursh – üsh bu Dala shayn vonash dikanashtsa khiytsür dersh. Dela t'ekh gechdesh verg a‚ q'inkhetame verg a vu .
25:71: Tōba dinarg a‚ dika ʿamal yinarg a – bakq'alla a, tso tōba do Dele /q'inoshna/ dokhko valartsa (tsunna Dala gechdiyr du).
25:72: Kharts teshalla tsa desh bersh a‚ shäsh dässachu khabarna ullokhula t'ekhbovlush – (tsa sovtsush) özda cheqbovlush bersh a /bu tsarakh/.
25:73: Shayn Qiosh-Qobuchun ayatash shayna ḥekhiycha, q'ora khüliy a, bʿärze khüliy a tsa ögu üsh.
25:74: Üsh bu /shayn doʿanashkaḥ/ olush bersh a: "Tkhan Qiosh-Qoburg‚ lōlaḥ tkhuna tkhan zudarekh a‚ dözalakh a bʿärg beqabalar (khazakhetar a, sintem a)‚ tkhokh khiliytalaḥ /Delakh/ qörucharna masal (üsh tkhuna t'äḥabozush)".
25:75: Tsarna yal lur yu /yalsamanin/ hxusamtsa üsh /iymaneḥ/ sobare khilarna. Tsigaḥ tsarna düḥaldoġur du /malikash/ marshallitsa a‚ salamtsa a.
25:76: Guttarenna a büsur bu üsh tsu choḥ. Ma khaza khili i satsavala mettig khilartsa a, /ḥoshalġa/ vossa mettig khilartsa a /sha Delakh qöruchunna/!
25:77: Aḥ āla (hxay Muḥammad, tsu mushrikashka): "Shütsa bala khir batsara san Qiosh – Qobuchun shun /khalonashkaḥ a, balanashkaḥ a Shega/ qayqar tsa khilleḥara. Ash khartsdina /Tsünan din/ – t'äḥa khir du shuna sha khilaza tsa dōlush derg(beqam)".
26:2: Hxorsh bilgala dolchu zhaynin (Q'urʾanan) ayatash du.
26:3: Aḥ ḥuo hxallakvesh khila mega (ġayġane a khilla) üsh tsa teshash khilarna.
26:4: Tkhayna laaḥ‚ Okha dossor du tsarna stiglara ayat - t'akqa düsur du tseran legash tsunna (Delan ayatana‚ delilna) müt'aḥ khilla.
26:5: Tsa boġu tsärga Q'inkhetam- bolchüngara tsḥa a kerla ḥekham, üsh tsunakh dʿabörzush ben.
26:6: Khartsdira tsara (mushrikasha) i (Q'urʾan) - t'äḥa boġur bu tsärga khaamash‚ üsh shaykh tsa beshash khilla bolu.
26:7: Tsarna tsa gora-te latta: mel duqa dika hxumanash yaliytina Okha tsunna t'eḥ shish-shishsha!
26:8: Bakq'alla a, tsu choḥ delil ma du. Tsa khili-q tsarakh duqakhbersh teshash.
26:9: Bakq'alla a, ḥan Qiosh-Qoburg - Iza vu-q, sheko yotstsush, veza verg a‚ q'inkhetame verg a.
26:10: Ḥakhade (hxay Muḥammad)! Qayqam bira ḥan Qiosh-Qobucho Musaga: “Dʿaġo zulamechu q'oma t'e,
26:11: Firʿavnan q'oma t'e. Üsh qörur batsara-te (Delan taʿzarakh)?”
26:12: Tso (Musas) elira: “San Qiosh-Qoburg‚ bakq'alla a, so qöru-q tsara so khartsvarna (so Ḥan elcha khilarakh tsatesharna).
26:13: Gattalo-q san dog‚ tsa bastalo-q san mott a. Hxarunna t'e dakhiytaḥ /Dzhibril i sötsa vaiyta/.
26:14: Tseran suna t'eḥ q'a du (ch'ir yu) - so qöru tsara so verna”.
26:15: Tso (Dala) elira: “Hxan-hxa (vüyr vats)! Dʿaġo shu shiʾ Tkhan ayatashtsa. Bakq'alla a, Tkho shütsa du, laduġush.
26:16: Shu shiy a ġo Firʿavna t'e‚ ash shimmo dʿaala: “Tkhoyshinnakh hxor a ʿalamiyn Den elcha vu.
26:18: Tso (Firʿavna) elira: “Okha tsa qiira ḥo /hxay Musa/ tkhayna yukq'eḥ ber dolush düyna‚ ḥo tsa ʿiyra tkhuna yukq'eḥ ḥayn dakharan sherashkaḥ?
26:19: Aḥ ma dira ḥayn ġullaq‚ ayḥa dina dolu (tkhokh tsḥa stag viyr aḥ – dokqa q'a latiyra) - barkalla tsa olucharakh vu-q ḥo”.
26:20: Tso (Musas) elira: “I dira as suo tilabellacharakh volchu khenaḥ.
26:21: So vedira shukh (Madyane)‚ suo shukh qeravelcha /ash verna/. T'akqa delira suna san Qiosh-Qobucho ḥeq'alalla (paykhamaralla a, ʿilma a)‚ Tso khiliytira so elchanekh.
26:22: Hxara niʿmat (berkat) du-q aḥ suna t'ekhdettash, ayḥa Israilan k'entekh, lesh bina, batsorna”
26:23: Firʿavna elira: “Hxun du ʿalamiyn da bokhurg?”
26:24: Tso (Musas) elira: “Stiglaniyn a‚ lättan a‚ tsu shinna yukq'eḥ mel dolchun a Da vu-q‚ shu /baq'dolchukh/ teshash delaḥ”.
26:25: Tso (Firʿavna) elira shena gonaḥ bolchärga: “Shu laduġush dats?”
26:26: Tso (Musas) elira: “Shun Dela a vu I‚ shun ḥalkharchu dayn a Dela a vu”.
26:27: Tso (Firʿavna) elira: “Bakq'alla a, /hxara/ shun elcha‚ shüga vaiytina volu‚ zhinekh ma vu”.
26:28: Tso (Musas) elira: “Malkhbalen a‚ malkhbuzen a tsu shinna yukq'eḥ dolchun a Dela vu Iza‚ shu qetame delaḥ”.
26:29: Tso (Firʿavna) elira: “Aḥ so votsurg /qin/ dela latsaḥ‚ as ḥo nabakhti choḥ bolchärtsa vallora ma vu”. (“As ḥo nabakhti chu vullur ma vu”).
26:30: Tso (Musas) elira: “So ḥuna tsḥa bilgala dolush derg daḥash veʾnekhḥiy?”
26:31: Elira /Firʿavna/: “Sḥalo i /ayḥa deʾnarg/, ḥuo khilleḥ baq'lüycharakh”.
26:32: T'akqa tso (Musas) shen ʿasa qössira - tsunakh q'egna läḥa khilira.
26:33: Tso aradäkqira shen küg /chöḥara/ - iza shurul k'ayn khilira ḥözhucharna.
26:34: Tso (Firʿavna) elira shen gonaḥ bolchu elashka: “Bakq'alla a, hxara govza volu bozbuuncha vu.
26:35: Luush vu i shu aradakha shun lättara shen bozbuunchalltsa - ash hxun omra do?”
26:36: Tsara elira: “Khan lo tsunna a‚ tsünan veshina a‚ bakhiyta ġalanashka /nakh/ gulbiyrash.
26:37: Ḥuna t'e boġiyla üsh masso a govza volchu bozbuunchitsa”.
26:38: T'akqa gulbiyra bozbuunchash bilgalchu diynaḥ /tökhnachu/ khenaḥ.
26:40: Vay t'eḥadaza mega bozbuunchashna, nagaḥ üsh khilaḥ töllarsh”.
26:41: Bozbuunchash bäkhkicha‚ tsara elira Firʿavne: “Tkhuna, bakq'alla a, makh khir buy, tkho khilaḥ töllarsh?”
26:42: Tso (Firʿavnas) elira: “Hxaʾ‚ bakq'alla a, shu t'akqa /suna/ gerga- daliynacharakh khir du”.
26:43: Elira tsärga Musas: “Qissa shäsh qüssush erg”.
26:44: Tsara qissira shayn mushash a‚ ʿásanash a‚ elira: “Firʿavnan vozzalitsa‚ bakq'alla a, vay tölur ma du”.
26:45: T'akqa qössira Musas shen ʿása - tso yudu (qollu) tsara mel qullurg.
26:47: Tsara elira: “Okha iyman dillina ʿalamiyn Qiosh-Qobuchünga‚
26:49: Tso (Firʿavnas) elira: “Iyman dilli ash as shayna purba a dalale? Bakq'alla a, iza (Musa) shun vokqanig vu‚ sha shuna bozbuunchalla ʿamiynarg‚ t'äḥa khuur du shuna. As khaddane a dʿakhador du shun küygash a‚ kogash a düḥ-düḥal‚ as irkhʾukhkur ma du shu derrige a”.
26:50: Tsara elira: “Bokhame dats. Bakq'alla a, tkho tkhayn Qiosh-Qobuchünga dʿadörzur du.
26:51: Bakq'alla a, tkho /ch'oġa/ luush du tkhäsh Qiosh–Qobucho (Dala) tkhuna gechdan tkhan ġalatashna tkho khilarna ḥalkha iyman dillinarsh”.
26:52: Okha Musaga khaam bira väḥitsa: “San leshtsa büysana aravala‚ älla‚ bakq'alla a, /Firʿavnan nakh/ shuna t'äḥbevr bolush ma bu”.
26:54: /Olush/: “Hxorsh-m (Israilan k'entiy) k'ezzig yolu tsḥa ledara toba yu.
26:56: Bakq'alla a, vay derrige a sema khila dezash ma du”.
26:57: Okha arabekhira üsh (Firʿavn a, tsünan eskar a) boshmashkara a‚ shovdanashkara a.
26:59: Ishtta Okha i (bakhamash) irsana belira Israilan k'entashna.
26:60: Üsh (Firʿavn a, tsünan eskar a) tsarna t'äḥabevlira malkh qetash (malkh qetachu khenaḥ).
26:61: Shina tobanna vovshiy gicha‚ Musan naq'ostasha elira: “Bakq'alla a, /Firʿavnan eskar/ vayna t'äḥaqüush du”.
26:62: Tso (Musas) elira: “Hxan-hxa! Bakq'alla a, sötsa san Qiosh-Qoburg vu‚ Tso nisviyr vu so”.
26:63: Okha väḥitsa khaiytira Musaga ḥayn ʿasa tokha hxordakh‚ älla. T'akqa iza beq'abelira‚ khilira hxor dāq'a bokqachu lamanakh tera.
26:64: Okha gergabalira tsiga (hxordana gerga) vüysh a.
26:65: Okha k'elḥarväkqira Musa a‚ tsüntsa bersh a – berrige a.
26:67: Bakq'alla a, tsu choḥ delil du-q. Tsa khilira tsarakh (Firʿvna t'äḥhxittincharakh) duqakhbersh iyman dillina.
26:68: Bakq'alla a, ḥan Qiosh-Qoburg - Iza vu veza verg a‚ q'inkhetame verg a.
26:70: Tso ma ällera shen dega a‚ shen q'ome a: “Stenna ʿibadat desh du shu?”
26:71: Tsara elira: “Tkho ʿibadat desh du tkhayn ts'ushna, tseran daima siy desh ʿa tkho".
26:72: Tso (Ibrahxima) elira: “Tsarna (ts'ushna) kheziy ash shayga qoyqush?
26:73: Ya shuna payda bo tsara‚ ya zen do?”
26:74: Tsara elira: “Delaḥ a, tkhuna kariyra tkhan day ishtta /ġullaq/ desh”.
26:75: Tso (Ibrahxima) elira: “Shuna tsa gina‚ shäsh stenna ʿibadat desh khilla‚
26:76: ash a shun ḥalkhalera daysha a?
26:77: Bakq'alla a, üsh (shun delanash) mostaġiy bu-q suna‚ ʿalamiyn Da votsurg,
26:78: Sha so qöllina volu‚ Tso so niysachu novq'a a vügu.
26:79: Iza vu suna daa a‚ mala a lush verg.
26:80: So tsomgush khilcha‚ Tso suna darba do.
26:81: Tso so volüytur vu‚ t'akqa denviyr vu.
26:82: Iza vu, suna ch'oġa luush verg, Tso san ġalatashna gechdoyla beqaman diynaḥ.
26:83: So Qiosh-qobush volu san Dela‚ lo suna ḥeq'alalla (paykhamaralla a, qetam a)‚ tokha so baq'ona t'eḥ bolcharakh.
26:84: So baq'dolchunna t'eḥ ḥekhavar khiliytalaḥ t'äḥaboġuchärgaḥ.
26:86: Aḥ gechdelaḥ san dena‚ bakq'alla a, iza khilla-q tilabellacharakh.
26:87: Siysaza ma velaḥ so /Ḥan taʿzartsa/ üsh (nakh) denbiyr bolchu diynaḥ,
26:88: ḥolo a‚ k'entasha (dözalo) a payda biyr botschu diynaḥ
26:89: sha ts'enchu dagtsa Dalla t'e veʾnarg votsuchunna”.
26:92: Er du tsärga: “Michaḥ yu üsh shu shena ʿibadat desh khillarsh‚
26:93: Dela vitina? Shuna ġo doy tsara? Ya shayna ġo doy tsara?”
26:94: Qüssur bu üsh tsu (zhözhakhati) chu, üsh a‚ tilabällarsh a‚
26:95: Iblisan eskar a – berrige a (zhözhakhate bakha ḥaq' mel bersh).
26:96: Er du tsara‚ shäsh tsu choḥ q'iysameḥ a bolush:
26:97: “Tallahxi‚ tkho ma khilla bilgalchu tilar choḥ‚
26:98: okha shu nisdechu khenaḥ ʿalamiyn Detsa.
26:99: Tkho tila ma tsa dina q'inosh dinachara ben.
26:100: Ma vats tkhuna shapaʿat decharakh tsḥa a,
26:102: Tkho yukha /dünen chu/ dovlüytush khilcha - tkho khir ma dara iyman dillincharakh”.
26:103: Bakq'alla a, tsu choḥ delil ma du. Tsarakh duqakhbersh tsa khilira muʾma nakh (teshash bersh).
26:104: Bakq'alla a, ḥan Qiosh-Qoburg - Iza vu veza verg a‚ q'inkhetame verg a.
26:106: Tseran vashas Nuḥas ma ällera tsärga: “Shu tsa qöru /Delakh/?
26:107: Bakq'alla a, so shuna /vaiytina/ teshame elcha ma vu.
26:108: Qera Delakh‚ suna müt'aḥ a khila.
26:109: As shüga tsunakh makh tsa bökhu. Suna makh balar ʿalamiyn Degaḥ ben dats.
26:110: Qera Delakh‚ suna müt'aḥ a khila!”
26:111: Tsara elira: “Tkho mukha teshar du ḥokh‚ ḥuna t'äḥahxittina /tkhokh/ uggare a ledarnash khilcha”.
26:112: Tso elira: “Suna khaats, üsh hxun lelosh khilla.
26:113: Tseran (tsara lelosh khillachun) ḥesap (dar) san Qiosh-Qobuchüngaḥ du‚ shu qetash delaḥ.
26:115: So (Delera) qerame derg qetosh dʿakhoüyturg ben vats”.
26:116: Tsara elira: “Ḥo tsa satsaḥ (ayḥa bechu qayqamakh)‚ hxay Nuḥ‚ ḥo khir ma vu shayna /okha/ t'ulgash dittincharakh”.
26:117: Tso elira /Dele doʿa desh/: “San Qiosh-Qoburg‚ san q'omo so kharts ma vina.
26:118: Aḥ qiel eḥa suna a‚ tsarna a yukq'eḥ‚ k'elḥarvakqalaḥ so a‚ teshash bolcharakh sötsa mel verg a”.
26:119: Okha k'elḥarväkqira iza a‚ tsüntsa mel verg a düzzinchu kemanaḥ.
26:120: T'akqa Okha /hxorda/ bukha- bakhiytira bisnarsh (tsa teshash khillarsh).
26:121: Bakq'alla a, tsu choḥ (Nuḥakh lätsna diytsareḥ) delil ma du. Tsa khili-q tsarakh (otsu diytsarakh laduġush bolcharakh) duqakhbolchekh muʾma nakh.
26:122: Bakq'alla a, ḥan Qiosh-Qoburg - Iza ma vu Sha veza verg a‚ q'inkhetame verg a.
26:124: Tsärga ma elira tseran vashas Hxudas: “Shu tsa qöru /Delakh/?
26:125: Bakq'alla a, so shuna teshame elcha ma vu.
26:126: Shu qera Delakh‚ suna müt'aḥ a khila.
26:127: As tsa bökhu shüga tsunakh makh. Suna makh balar ʿalamiyn Dena t'eḥ ben dats.
26:128: Shu besh du hxor ayellachu mettigeḥ erna ġirs /dozallina, kurallina bilgalo khülu/?
26:129: Shu yesh du /yaqiy/ ġalanash a, ch'aġonash a, shäsh (dünenaḥ) daimanna düsur du möttush.
26:130: Shäsh (nakhana) taʿzar desh, ash taʿzar do, q'inkhetamza bolchara sanna.
26:131: Shu qera Delakh‚ suna müt'aḥ a khila.
26:132: Shu qera Sha shuna khuush derg (ritsq' a, nitsq' a) shortta dellachukh.
26:133: Tso shuna dukqa däkhni a della‚ k'entiy (dözalsh) a bella,
26:135: Bakq'alla a, so qöru shuna Dezachu diynan ʿazapakh”.
26:136: Tsara (Hxudin q'oman tsateshachara) elira: “Tsḥabossa du tkhuna, aḥ ḥekham bicha a‚ ya ḥo ḥekham becharakh tsa khilcha a.
26:137: Hxara (okha lelosh derg) ḥalkhalerachiyn ġillaq ben dats.
26:139: Tsara iza (Hxud) khartsvira‚ t'akqa Okha üsh hxallakbira. Bakq'alla a, tsu choḥ delil ma du. Tsa khili-q tsarakh, duqakh bersh, muʾma nakh.
26:140: Bakq'alla a, ḥan QioshQoburg - Iza vu-q Sha veza verg a‚ q'inkhetame verg a.
26:142: Tseran vashas Saliḥa ma elira tsärga: “Shu tsa qöru?
26:143: Bakq'alla a, so shuna (vaiytina) teshame elcha vu.
26:144: Qera Delakh a‚ suna müt'aḥ a khila.
26:145: As tsa bökhu shüga tsunakh makh. Suna makh balar ʿalamiyn Dena t'eḥ ben dats.
26:146: Shu dütur dolush du tq'a quzaḥ, shäsh dolchchoḥ (hxoqu dünenaḥ guttar niʿmatashkaḥ), qeram a botsush,
26:148: yaltanashkaḥ a‚ khurmanashkaḥ a - shen stom k'eda-merza bolchu?
26:149: Ash lämnash a ogush ġishlosh yo, kura a dovlush.
26:150: Qeralash Delakh‚ suna müt'aḥ a khilalash!
26:151: Shu müt'aḥ ma khilalash /Delan dozanekh/ t'ekhbüylucheran omrana,
26:152: shäsh lätta t'eḥ bökhanig darzhosh bolchu - tsḥa a dikanig desh bats üsh".
26:153: Tsara (Samudasha shayn paykhamare Saliḥe) elira: “Bakq'alla a, ḥo ḥayna nütsq'ala bozbuunchalla dincharakh vu-q.
26:154: Ḥo ma dats tkho sanna adam a ben. Dālade delil, ḥuo velaḥ baq'lüycharakh (tsḥaʾ)”.
26:155: Tso (Saliḥ-paykhamara) elira: “Hxara sten emkal yu (ash ekhna yolu). Tsunna khi malar (khir) du‚ shuna a khi malar (khir) du bilgaldinchu diynaḥ.
26:156: Ma ḥaqalolash tsunakh (emkalakh) vonig dartsa, (ash tsunna vonig daḥ), Siylaḥ - deza dolchu diynan ʿazapo sḥalötsur du shu”.
26:157: Tsara tsunna urs ḥäqira – üsh, dokhko a bevlla, ʿüyranga bevlira.
26:158: ʿazapo sḥaletsira üsh. Bakq'alla a, tsu choḥ delil ma du. Tsa khilla-q tsarakh duqakhbersh muʾma nakh.
26:159: Bakq'alla a, ḥan Qiosh-Qoburg - Iza vu-q Sha veza verg a‚ q'inkhetame verg a.
26:161: Tseran vashas Lut'as ma elira tsärga: “Shu tsa qöru?
26:162: Bakq'alla a, so shuna teshame elcha ma vu.
26:163: Shu qeralash Delakh‚ suna müt'aḥ a khilalash.
26:164: As tsa bökhu shüga tsunakh tsḥa a makh. Suna makh balar ʿalamiyn Dena t'eḥ ben dats.
26:165: Shu lela tq'a bozharshna t'e derrige a ʿalamashkara?
26:166: Ash dʿatesna dütu i shäsh Qiosh-Qobucho shuna shayn zudarshtsa qöllinarg? Hxaʾ‚ shu du-q (Delan) dozanekh t'ekhdälla q'am”.
26:167: Tsara elira: “Ḥo tsa satsaḥ‚ hxay Lut'‚ ḥo khir ma vu arabäkhnacharakh (tsḥaʾ)”. (“Okha makhkakh vokqur vu ḥo”.)
26:168: Tso elira: “Bakq'alla a, so ash lelosh derg ch'oġa yemaldecharakh vu-q.
26:169: So Qiosh-Qoburg‚ k'elhxarvakqaḥ so a‚ san dözal a tsara dechukh”.
26:170: Okha k'elḥarbäkhira iza a, tsünan dözal a – üsh berrige a,
26:171: tsḥa q'ena (Lut'in) zuda yotsurg bukhabisincharakh yolu.
26:173: Okha delkhira tsarna t'e (t'ulgiyn) doġa. Ma von khilira shayna qeram tesnacharna i doġa!
26:174: Bakq'alla a, tsu choḥ delil du-q. Tsa khilira tsarakh duqakh bersh muʾma nakh.
26:175: Bakq'alla a, ḥan Qiosh-Qoburg - Iza vu-q sha veza verg a‚ q'inkhetame verg a.
26:177: Elira tq'a tsärga Shuʿayba (paykhamara): “Shu tsa qöru?
26:178: Bakq'alla a, so shuna (vaiytina) teshame elcha ma vu.
26:179: Shu qeralash Delakh‚ suna a müt'aḥ khilalash.
26:180: As tsa bökhu shüga tsunakh (i baq'derg shüga dʿaqachorakh) tsḥa a makh. Suna makh balar ʿalamiyn Dena t'eḥ ben dats.
26:181: Niysa khiliytalash /terzan/ baram‚ shu ma khilalash /terza/ eshocharakh.
26:183: Ash ma eshaelash nakhana tseran hxumanash‚ ma lelalash lätta t'eḥ, bökhanig darzhadesh.
26:184: Shu qeralash‚ Sha shu a‚ /shul/ ḥalkhalerachiyn ummatash a qöllinchukh".
26:185: Tsara (Shuʿayban q'omo) elira: “Ḥo ḥayna bozbuunchalla dinacharakh (tsḥaʾ) vu-q.
26:186: Ḥo a ma dats adam ben‚ tkho sanna dolu. Tkho teshna ma du‚ ḥo khartslücharakh vu älla.
26:187: Aḥ egae tkhuna keskash stiglara‚ ḥo khilleḥ baq'lüycharakh”.
26:188: Tso elira: “San Qiosh-Qoburg dika khuush vu-q ash diyrig”.
26:189: Tsara iza (Shuʿayb) khartsvira‚ t'akqa üsh sḥaletsira bodanan diynan ʿazapo. Bakq'alla a, iza khilira deza – dokqachu diynan ʿazap.
26:190: Bakq'alla a, tsu choḥ delil ma du. Tsa khilira-q tsarakh duqakh bersh muʾma nakh.
26:191: Bakq'alla a, ḥan Qiosh-Qoburg - Iza vu-q veza verg a‚ q'inkhetame verg a.
26:192: Bakq'alla a, iza (Q'urʾan) - ʿalamiyn Degara dossar du.
26:194: Ḥan dag chu ḥo khiliytarḥama qeram tosucharakh.
26:196: Bakq'alla a, iza ḥalkha khillacheran zhayniyn (Tavrat, Zabur, Inzhil…) choḥ a du.
26:197: Tsarna tsa khilla-te delil i (Q'urʾan Delan zhayna khilar a, Muḥammad Tsünan elcha khilar a) khuush khilar Israilan k'entiyn ʿelamnakhana?
26:198: Okha iza /Q'urʾan/ dossiyna khilleḥara qechu q'ämniyn tsḥabolchärga‚
26:199: Tsara (ʿärbiy botsuchara) iza tsarna (q'urayshashna) döshura dara - khir batsara üsh tsunakh (Q'urʾanakh) a teshash.
26:200: Ishtta dillina Okha i (Q'urʾan khartsdar) q'inoshdecheran degnashka.
26:201: Teshar bats üsh tsunakh shayna lazame dolu ʿazap gallats.
26:202: Iza doġur du tsarna ts'ekhḥana‚ shayna khaa tsa lush.
26:203: Tsara t'akqa er du: “Vayna tsḥa /k'ezzig/ khan tsa lo /ʿazap tsa desh/?”
26:204: Tkhan ʿazapatsa sikhlo üsh? (Okha ʿazap sikhdar dökhu tsara?)
26:205: Ḥuna tsa khäa, Okha üsh sherashkaḥ /dünenan niʿmatashkaḥ/ bākhiyticha a,
26:206: t'akqa tsärga deʾcha tsärga doüytur du ällarg,
26:207: k'elḥarbokhur ma bats üsh /Delan ʿazapakh/ tsarna bella khillachu bakhamo.
26:208: Okha hxallak tsa yira tsḥa a yurt shena qeramchash botsush
26:209: /tsarna/ khaam ban (shayna, paykhamar khartsvicha, ʿazap khirg khilar). Tkho tsa khilira zulamkhoy (khaam tsa besh nakh hxallakbesh).
26:210: Tsa dissira tsüntsa (Q'urʾantsa Muḥammade) shayt'anash (tsḥabolchu kerstanasha ma bokhkhu).
26:211: Tarlush dats tsarna (shayt'anashna baq'derg daḥash dakhka)‚ tseran nitsq' tsa qochu (i dan).
26:213: Ma qayqa /hxay Muḥammad/ Allahx-Delatsa qechu dele - t'akqa ḥo khir vu ḥayna ʿazap diyrdolcharakh.
26:214: Aḥ larbe (Delan taʿzarkh) ḥayn yukhkhera gergara nakh.
26:215: Ḥayn t'am oḥabakhiyta muʾma nakhakh ḥayna t'eḥahxittincharna (k'eda-merza khila tsärtsa).
26:216: Tsara ḥayna ʿesalla yaḥ‚ aḥ āla: “So ts'ena vu-q ash dechukh”.
26:217: Ḥo t'etovzha Sha Veza volchunna a‚ Q'inkhetame volchunna a,
26:218: Shena ḥo gush volchunna ḥo (büysanan lamazashna) hxuttuchu khenaḥ a,
26:219: suzhud decheran yukq'eḥ aḥ lamaz teḥ lelosh derg a.
26:220: Bakq'alla a, Iza vu-q khezash verg a‚ khuush verg a.
26:221: As diytsiy shuna /hxay Makkin kerstanash/‚ shena t'e shayt'anash düssuchukh?
26:222: Üsh düssu hxor khartslüchunna a‚ q'inosh dechunna a t'e.
26:223: Tsara /shayt'anasha stiglaḥ shayna/ kheznarg /bozbuunchashka/ qüssu‚ tsarakh (bozbuunchekh) duqakh bersh khartslüysh bu.
26:225: Ḥuna tsa gina üsh masso a toġenashkakhula qerstash (dʿasa - üdush)? /Mülkhkhachu a hxumanakh lätsna baytash yokhu tsara/.
26:227: Iyman dillina‚ dika ʿamalsh yina‚ dukqa Dela ḥekhiyna (shayn baytashkaḥ), shayna zulamash dina khilla bolchu (busalbanashna) ġo dina bersh botsursh (üsh bats tsu kharts nazmanchekh). T'äḥa khuur du zulam dinacharna‚ stenga shäsh qochur du.
27:1: T'a. Sūn. Hxorsh du Q'urʾanan – bilgalchu zhaynin ayatash,
27:2: shäsh niysa neq' a‚ muʾma nakhana qaʾ a khilla bolu.
27:3: Üsh bu shäsh lamaz a hxottadesh (shäsh dan ma-dezzara lamaz desh)‚ zakat a lush‚ üsh ekhartakh /ch'oġa/ teshash bu.
27:4: Bakq'alla a, ekhartakh tsa teshash bersh – Okha khazyina tsarna shayn ʿamalsh, t'akqa üsh /shayn tilar choḥ/ bʿärze dʿasaüdush bu.
27:5: Üsh bu shayna /dünenaḥ – bayartsa, yiysare bartsa/ ch'oġa taʿzar khin dersh, ekhartaḥ-m üsh khir bu vuno t'ekh eshame khillarsh.
27:6: Bakq'alla a, /hxay Muḥammad/ ḥöga lush du Q'urʾan Sha ḥeq'ale a‚ khuush a volchüngara.
27:7: Musas ma elira shen dözale: "Suna khaaeli-q ts'e‚ so shuna t'evoġur vu tsunakh tsḥa khabar ya dogush dolu khäshtig daḥash shu dokhdaliyta".
27:8: Iza (Musa) tsiga veʾcha‚ tsünga qayqam khilira: "Deq'ala khili ts'ergaḥ verg a‚ tsunna gonaḥ verg a‚ vonakh ts'ena vu Dela – ʿalamiyn Da.
27:9: Hxay Musa! Bakq'alla a, So siylaḥ-veza a, Shegaḥ ḥeq'alalla dolu a Dela vu.
27:10: Oḥaqossa ḥayn ʿasa". Shena iza (ʿasa) gicha ettalush, teqarg sanna‚ i (Musa) dʿavedira‚ yukha a tsa virzira. "Hxay Musa! Ma qera. Tsa qöru Suna gergaḥ elchanash
27:11: zulam dinarsh a ben. T'akqa tso sha dinchu vonan metta dikanig daḥ, – t'akqa bakq'alla a, So t'ekh gechdiyrig a‚ q'inkhetam biyrig a vu-q.
27:12: Che dilla ḥayn küg – aḥ sḥadokqur du iza k'aydella, tsḥa a lazam a botsush‚ Firʿavne a‚ tsünan q'ome a lun dolchu iss /ʿalamatekh/ /tsḥaʾ du i/. Bakq'alla a, üsh khili pesiq' q'am".
27:13: Shayga q'eggina gush dolu Tkhan ayatash däkhkicha‚ tsara (Firʿavna a, tsünan nakha a) elira: "Hxara bilgala bozbuunchalla du!"
27:14: Zulam dartsa a‚ kurallitsa a kerstadira tsara (pesiq'asha) tsarna (ayatashna)‚ shäsh /dagtsa/ teshneḥ a, /üsh Delera khilarakh/. Ḥazhal‚ mukha khilla telkhina hxumanash desh bolcheran chaqe?
27:15: Okha delira Davude a‚ Suleymane a ʿilma. Tsu shimmo elira: "Khastam bu Dalla‚ Sha tkho dazdinchu duqa bolchu Shen teshash bolchu lekh".
27:16: Suleymana iytsira Davudan irs‚ tso elira: "Hxay nakh! Tkhuna ʿamiyna olkhazariyn mott‚ tkhuna della masso a hxumanakh /niʿmatash/. Bakq'alla a, iza bilgala dozalla du-q".
27:17: Guldira Suleymanna t'e zhinekh a‚ adamekh a‚ olkhazarekh a dolu tsünan eskar – üsh (eskarsh) ch'oġachu nizamtsa dʿanisdira.
27:18: Üsh zingatiyn toġene qächcha‚ nana-zingato elira: "Hxay zingatash! Chudovlalash shayn hxusamashka (bannashka)‚ shu ḥesha ma ḥeshaḥara Suleymana a‚ tsünan eskaro a‚ shayna khaa tsa lush".
27:19: Iz (Sulayman) velaq'ezhira tsünan (zingatan) dashakh, elira: "San Qiosh-Qoburg‚ Aḥ suna taro lolaḥ Ayḥa suna a‚ san dena - nanna a della dolchu Ḥayn niʿmatna kham ban a‚ Ḥo shena reza volu dika ʿamal yan a. So dʿatokhalaḥ Ḥayn q'inkhetamtsa Ḥayn dikachu lekh".
27:20: Iza volavelira olkhazarshka ḥēzha‚ t'akqa elira: "Suna hxun khilla? Hxuttut tsa go suna‚ ya yotsucharakh khili iza?"
27:21: "As ʿazap danza dütur ma dats tsunna, ch'oġa ʿazap‚ ya as urs ḥoqur ma du tsunna‚ ya suna /sha bekhke tsakhilaran/ tsḥa bilgala delil dalor ma du tso".
27:22: Zhimma khan yalcha, tso /eʾnachu hxuttuto/ elira: "Suna khiira ḥuna tsa khiʾnarg‚ as beana ḥuna Sabaʾara baq'bolu khaam.
27:23: Bakq'alla a, suna kariyna /tsḥa/ zuda‚ sha tsarna (tsigarchu nakhana) t'eḥ pachchaḥalla desh yolu‚ tsunna della masso a hxumanekh (pachchaḥalla‚ niʿmat‚ berkat‚ khazalla…), tsünan siylaḥ-yokqa ʿarsh a yu.
27:24: Suna kariyna iza a‚ tsünan q'am a‚ Dela a vitina, malkhana suzhud desh. Khazyina tsarna shayt'ano tseran ʿamalsh‚ tso dʿatilina üsh /niysachu/ neq'akh – üsh nis tsa lo (üsh niysachu novq'a tsa bovlu).
27:25: (I do Ibliso) tsärga suzhud tsa dayta Sha stiglanashkaḥ a‚ lättaḥ a ḥuldellarg ʿoradokqush volchu Dalla‚ Shena khuush volchu ash q'ayladokqurg a‚ ash guchudokqurg a.
27:26: Allahx (ts'e yolu tsḥa) Dela vu‚ qin dela vats‚ Iza votsurg‚– siylaḥ-yokqachu ʿarshan Da vu/Iza/".
27:27: Tso (Suleymana) elira (hxuttute): "Vay ḥovsur du‚ baq' liyna-teḥa ḥo‚ ya khartslüycharakh khilla – te ḥo?
27:28: Ḥada‚ hxara san kekhat etsiy dʿaġo (sabiinashna t'e)‚ tsarna ḥalkha qossa iza‚ t'akqa tsarna yustakhʾyala (yustakh a yaliy, dʿahxotta)‚ ḥazha‚ tsara hxun yukhaderzado(hxun zhop lo tsara)".
27:29: Tso (zuda-pachchaḥa) elira: "Hxay eliyn toba! Bakq'alla a, söga qössinera (qächna) siylaḥ dolu kekhat.
27:30: Bakq'alla a, iza du Suleymanera‚ tso /düytsu-q/: "Sha sov q'inkhetame a‚ q'inkhetame a volchu Delan ts'artsa.
