27:31: Shu sol laqadovla ma ġerta‚ suna t'e düyla, müt'aḥ a khiliy (Dela tsḥaʾ vesh)".
27:32: Tso (Bilq'is-pachchaḥa) elira: "Hxay eliyn toba! Satsam be suna san ġullaqa t'eḥ. So tsa khilla-q tsḥanna a ġullaqa t'eḥ (saygara) satsam besh‚ shu teshash dolush ben (shukh dagayolush ben)".
27:33: Tsara (eliyn tobano, tsunna zhop a lush) elira: "Vay nitsq' bolush a du‚ ch'oġa ḥünar dolush a du‚ tq'a ġullaq ḥögaḥ du-q. Ḥazhaḥ tq'a‚ hxun omra do aḥ -/okha qochushdiyr du iza/".
27:34: Tso (Bilq'isa) elira: "Bakq'alla a, pachchaḥasha shäsh yurtana (makhkana) chubäkhkicha‚ yokhayo iza‚ tsünan ohxlakh siylaḥ bersh siysazbokhu tsara. Ishtta do tsara.
27:35: Bakq'alla a, as doḥüytu tsarna (Suleymanġarna) sovġat‚ t'akqa ḥozhur yu‚ stentsa yukhabörzu bakhiytinarsh (hxu daḥash yukhaboġu üsh)".
27:36: Iza (Bilq'isa vaiytinarg) Suleyman volchu veʾcha‚ tso (Suleymana) elira: "So däkhnitsa ḥal dolush vo ash? Dala suna dellarg tölush du Tso shuna dellachul a‚ delaḥ a, shu shayn sovġatatsa dakqiydesh du-q!
27:37: Yukhaverza tsarna t'e‚ tkho doġur du tsarna t'e eskartsa‚ shetsa üsh laralur botschu‚ Okha arabokhur bu üsh tsu chüra (shayn makhkara), siysaza a khilla‚ üsh k'elbüsur bu".
27:38: Tso (Suleymana) elira: "Hxay eliyn toba! Shukh mülkha voġur vara suna t'e tsünan (Bilq'isan) ʿarsh yaḥash, üsh suna t'e bakhkale, müt'aḥ a khilla?"
27:39: Zhinekh uggar /nütsq'ala/ dolchu ʿifrito elira: "So doġur du ḥuna t'e tsüntsa (ʿarsh daḥash)‚ ḥo ḥayn mettigera ḥalaġattale. So tsu t'eḥ nütsq'ala a‚ teshame a du".
27:40: Shegaḥ zhaynin ʿilma dolcho elira: "So voġur vu ḥuna t'e tsüntsa (ʿarshatsa)‚ aḥ bʿärganeġar tokhale". Shena iza (Bilq'isan ʿarsh) gicha‚ shena ḥalkhaḥ lättash‚ tso (Suleymana) elira: "Hxara san Qiosh-Qobuchun dozallakh du‚ Tso so zerḥama‚ barkalla olu as ya inkarlo yo (Delan niʿmatana). Barkalla olucho – tso shena (paydenna) olush du‚ inkarlo yecho - bakq'alla a, san Qiosh-Qoburg ḥal dolush a vu‚ kömarsha a vu (tsḥangara a hxumma a öshush vats)".
27:41: Tso (Sulaymana) elira: "Khiytsam be tsunna (Bilq'isana) tsünan ʿarsheḥ (pachchaḥan ġanta t'eḥ)‚ vay ḥovsur‚ evziy tsunna iza (ʿarsh)‚ ya khir yu-te iza i tsa evzacharakh".
27:42: Iza (Bilq'is) eʾcha, elira /tsünga/: "Ishtta yuy ḥan ʿarsh?" Tso elira: "Iza yolchukh tera yu hxara". /Suleymana elira shena Bilq'iseḥ ʿilma duyla khiʾnachul t'äḥa/: "Tkhuna ʿilma dellera tsunchul (Bilq'isnachul) ḥalkha‚ tkho müt'aḥ a khilira /Dalla/".
27:43: Iza (Bilq'is) satsiyra /tsḥana Dalla ʿibadat dechukh/ tso, Iza a vitina, qechunna ʿibadat daro. Bakq'alla a, iza ma yara tsateshachu q'omakh.
27:44: Elira tsünga: "Chöḥayala ġalina!" Shena iza (ġala) gicha‚ tsunna mottadelira iza alssam khi du‚ t'akqa tso shen nastarsh guchuekhira. Tso (Suleymana) elira: "Bakq'alla a, iza ġala yu q'eginchu ängalekh yina". Tso (Bilq'isa, Sulaymanan nitsq' bokqa buy a khiʾna) elira: "So Qiosh-Qoburg‚ baq'alla a, as zulam dina ma khilla sayna. /Hxintsa/ müt'aḥ khili so Suleymantsa tsḥäna /tsunna t'äḥayazartsa tsḥaʾ volchu/ Dalla – ʿalamiyn Dena".
27:45: Okha vakhiytira Samudashka tseran vasha Saliḥ‚ Dalla ʿibadat de‚ älla – üsh‚ shi toba a khilla‚ q'iysa büylabelira.
27:46: Tso (Saliḥa) elira: "Hxay san q'am! Shu hxunda sikhlo vonig /dartsa/ dikanig /daral/ ḥalkha? Gechdar dekhaḥara ash Dele‚ shukh q'inkhetam ban tam bara".
27:47: Tsara elira: "Ḥo a‚ ḥötsa tsḥäna (teshash) bersh a baḥaneḥ tkhuna von bilgalonash khaaella". Tso (Saliḥa) elira: "Shun dāq'a (dikanig ya vonig) Deleḥ du. Hxaʾ‚ shu du-q (Dala dikantsa a, vochüntsa a) züysh dolu q'am".
27:48: Tsu ġalaḥ khillera iss stag‚ lättaḥ bökhanig darzhadesh volu‚ dikanig a tsa desh.
27:49: Tsara (tsu issammo) elira: "Vovshashna Delakh duynash baa: vay büysana (ts'ekhḥana) t'eletar du tsunna (Saliḥna) a‚ tsünan dözalna a (boyʾur bu üsh berrige a)‚ t'akqa er du vay tsünan verase: "Tkho datsara tsünan dözal hxallaqüluchoḥ‚ tkho baq'derg düytsush ma du".
27:50: Mekarlo yira tsara‚ Okha yira /tseran mekarlonna düḥal/ mekarlo‚ tsarna khaa a tsa yelira (iza).
27:51: Ḥazhal‚ mukha khilla tseran mekarlonan t'äḥe: Okha hxallakbira üsh (isse) a‚ tseran q'am a – berrige.
27:52: Hxorsh du tseran ts'enosh‚ dökhna lättash‚ tsara zulam dina khilarna. Bakq'alla a, tsu choḥ delil du-q shäsh khuush bolchu nakhana.
27:53: Okha k'elḥarbekhira iyman dillina khillarsh a‚ shäsh /Delakh/ qörush khillarsh a.
27:54: Lut' a /vakhiytira Okha shen q'omana t'e/‚ tso shen q'ome ma elira: "Bökhanig lelor du tq'a ash, shayna gush dolushsheḥ? (I bökha khilar).
27:55: Shu ökhu tq'a bozharashna t'e bezamtsa‚ zudariy bütiy? Hxaʾ‚ shu du-q (Delan dozanash tsa devzash) bodane (özda dotsu) q'am".
27:56: Tsa khilira tsünan q'oman dala zhop‚ shäsh ālar ben: "Arabakha Lut'in dözal shayn yurtara. Bakq'alla a, üsh ma bu ts'anbala ġertash bolu nakh".
27:57: Okha k'elḥarväkqira iza a‚ tsünan dözal a‚ tsünan /tsḥa/ zuda yotsurg – tsünan qollam /ʿazapeḥ/ bukhabüsuchärtsa khiliytira Okha.
27:58: Okha delkhira tsarna t'e (t'ulgiyn) doġa – ma von khilira shayna qeram tesnacharna i doġa.
27:59: Aḥ āla /hxay Muḥammad/: "Khastam bu Dalla‚ salam du Tsünan leshna‚ Tso khärzhina khillacharna. I (Allahx ts'e yolu tsḥa) Dela tölu‚ ya tsara /Tsüntsa/ lätsna naq'ostiy tölu?
27:60: Ya mila vu Sha stiglanash a‚ latta a qöllinarg‚ shuna stiglara khi a daiytinarg? Okha yovliytina tsüntsa (doġantsa) boshmash‚ shaytsa khazalla a yolush‚ ash ma dolüytur datsara tsüntsa (tsu doġantsa) tsu choḥ (boshmashkaḥ) dittash. Tʾa qin dela vuy /tsu/ Allahxatsa tsḥäna? Hxaʾ‚ üsh bu nakh‚ /Delatsa shäsh qöllina bolu delanash/ nisbesh.
27:61: Ya mila vu Sha latta khiliytinarg (admashna a, qiyolchu hxumanashna a) ʿen mettig khilla‚ yukq'ekhula khin tatolash dakhiytinarg‚ tsu t'eḥ lämnash hxittiynarg‚ shina hxorda yukq'eḥ düḥalo yinarg? Qin dela vu Allahxatsa tsḥäna? Hxaʾ‚ tsarakh duqakhbersh tsa khuush bu-q.
27:62: Ya mila vu Sha zhop lush verg ġorasiz volchunna, tso Shega dekhcha‚ i zulam dʿadokqush verg‚ shukh khülüytush verg lättan day? Qin dela vu Allahxatsa tsḥäna? Ma k'ezzig oyla yo-q ash!
27:63: Ya mila vu Sha shu nisdesh verg arenan a‚ hxordan a bodanashkaḥ‚ Sha mekhash ökhüytush verg qaʾ baḥash /doġa doüytur du, älla/ Shen q'inkhetamal (doġanal) ḥalkha? Qin dela vu Allahxatsa tsḥäna? Laqaveli Dela tsara /Shetsa/ naq'ost latsarkh.
27:64: Ya mila vu Sha (yuḥantsa) qollar dolosh verg‚ t'akqa iza karladokqurg‚ mila vu shuna ritsq' lush verg stiglara a‚ lättara a? Qin dela vu Allahxatsa tsḥäna? Aḥ āla: "Dalade shayn delil‚ shäsh khilleḥ baq'lüysh".
27:65: Āla /tsärga, hxay elcha/: "Tsa khäa stiglaḥ volchunna a‚ lättaḥ volchunna a q'aylaḥ derg, Sha Dela votschunna". Tsarna khaalur dats, shäsh matsa dendiyr du.
27:66: T'eqiʾniy tseran khaarsh ekhartana? Hxaʾ‚ üsh shekoneḥ bu tsunakh. Hxaʾ‚ üsh tsunakh bʿärsa dayna bu.
27:67: Elira tsateshnachara: "Tkhokh a‚ tkhan daykh a latta khilcha‚ tkho aradokhur dolush du /keshnashkara, den a dina/?
27:68: Vaʿda yinera qüntsa tkhuna a‚ tkhan dayshna a ḥalkha a. Iza-m ḥalkhaleracheran tüyranash ben dats".
27:69: Aḥ āla /tsärga, hxay Muḥammad/: "Dʿasalela lättakhula‚ ḥovsa‚ mukha khilla q'inosh dinacheran t'äḥe".
27:70: Aḥ sa ma gattade tsarna‚ ma khila khaloneḥ tsara yechu mekarlonekh (tsara lelochu vonekh).
27:71: Tsara olu: "Matsa khir yu i vaʿda, shu baq'lüysh khilleḥ".
27:72: Aḥ āla: "Shuna t'eḥaḥ khila tarlo tsḥatstsa ash sikhdesh dersh".
27:73: Bakq'alla a, ḥo Qiosh-Qoburg Shegaḥ komärshalla yolush ma vu nakhana‚ delaḥ a, tsarakh duqakhbolchara barkalla tsa olu-q.
27:74: Bakq'alla a, ḥo Qiosh-Qoburg Sha khuush vu-q tseran degnasha ḥuldesh derg a‚ tsara guchudokqush derg a.
27:75: Dats tsḥa a q'aylakha derg stiglaḥ a‚ lättaḥ a bilgalchu zhayni choḥ /yazdina/ dolush ben.
27:76: Bakq'alla a, hxoqu Q'urʾano düytsu Israilan k'entashna shayn shena choḥ khilpalo yolchukh duqakhdersh.
27:77: Bakq'alla a, iza niysa neq' a‚ q'inkhetam a bu muʾma nakhana.
27:78: Bakq'alla a, ḥan Qiosh-Qobucho qiel yiyr yu tsarna yukq'eḥ Shen ḥukmatsa. Iza veza verg a vu‚ khuush verg a vu.
27:79: Ḥo t'etovzha Dalla. Bakq'alla a, ḥo bilggalchu baq'dolchunna t'eḥ ma vu.
27:80: Bakq'alla a, aḥ /hxumma a/ khozüytur dats bellacharna‚ aḥ qayqar khozüytur dats q'ora bolcharna, üsh yukhabevlicha.
27:81: Ḥo ma vats bʿärzenash shayn tilarkh nisbesh verg. Aḥ khozüytur du dekq'a Tkhan ayatekh teshash bolcharna – t'akqa üsh bu (Dalla) müt'aḥ bersh.
27:82: Tsarna dosh t'edözhcha (iyman tsa dillicha, shayna ʿazap khir du älla vaʿda qochushkhilcha)‚ Okha lättan kiyrara sḥadokqur du tsarna tsḥa diynat‚ tso tsärtsa q'amel diyr du, nakh Tkhan ayatekh teshash tsa khilla, älla.
27:83: /Aḥ ḥakhade/: otsu (Q'emat) diynaḥ Okha gulyiyr yu hxor ummatakh Tkhan ayatash khartsdesh khillacharakh tsḥatstsa toba–t'akqa üsh sovtsor bu(t'äḥarnash ḥalkharcharna t'eqiʾalts, t'akqa berrige a ḥesap dan dʿalokhkur bu).
27:84: T'akqa üsh /ḥesap dechu mettige/ bäkhkicha‚ /Dala/ er du: "Ash khartsdira San ayatash? Shu ma datsara shaygaḥ /üsh khartsdan/ ʿilma dolush a. Ya hxun ʿamal yesh khillera shu?"
27:85: T'edüyzhira tsarna /ʿazap baq'khilaran/ dosh tsara shaygara zulam daliytarna‚ üsh bist tsa khülush büsur bu.
27:86: Tsarna tsa gina-te Okha qöllina khilar büysa‚ shena choḥ tsärga sadaʿiyta‚ de a serlonna? Bakq'alla a, tsu choḥ bilgalonash ma yu teshash bolchu nakhana.
27:87: Otsu diynaḥ zurmana chu hxup er du (Israfil-maliko) – ʿador vu (qeravella) stiglanashkaḥ mel verg a‚ lättaḥ mel verg a, Dalla liʾnarg votsurg. Berrige a Tsunna t'e boġur bu, müt'aḥ a khilla.
27:88: Ḥuna gur du lämnash‚ ḥuna shäsh mettakhdovlush dats älla khetash dolu, dʿasalelash, markhash sanna – Delan qollartsa du iza‚ Sha masso a hxuma qacham bollush qöllinchu. Bakq'alla a, Iza ash diyrig dika khuush verg vu-q.
27:89: Dikachüntsa veʾnarg– tsunna tsul dikanig /sha deʾnachukh/ khir du‚ üsh qeramakh otsu (q'emat) diynaḥ märsha khir bu.
27:90: Vonash daḥash bäkhkinarsh– yakhḥash ts'are erziyna khir yu tseran. Shäsh yesh khillachu ʿamalashtsa ben beqam khir buy shuna?
27:91: /Aḥ ala, hxay Muḥammad/: «Söga omra dina hxoqa /Makka/ ġalin Dena ʿibadat de älla‚ Sha iza ḥaram yina yolchu. Tsünan du masso a hxuma a. Söga omra dina so müt'aḥ khillacharakh khila‚ älla.
27:92: Q'urʾan desha älla a». Nisvellarg /tsu K'urʾana t'e/ iza nislush vu shena. Tilavellarg - aḥ tsünga āla: "So qeram tosucharakh vu".
27:93: Aḥ āla: "Khastam bu Dalla. Tso goytur du shuna Shen ayatash – t'akqa shuna üsh devzar du. Ḥan Qiosh-Qoburg ma vats ash diyrig tidame tsa ötsush".
28:3: Okha düytsur du ḥuna Musan a‚ Firʿavnan a khabarekh tsḥadersh baq' ma-ddu teshachu nakhana /paydane khiliyta/.
28:4: Bakq'alla a, Firʿavn kuravelira /Misran/ lättaḥ‚ tsünan nakhakh tobanash yira tso‚ tsarakh tsḥa toba ġel a yesh. Tso boyura tseran (Israilan k'entekh) k'entiy‚ diyna bütura tseran zudariy. Bakq'alla a, iza khilira telkhina mel derg lelocharakh.
28:5: Tkhuna liira shäsh /Misran/ lättaḥ ġelbina khillacharakh (Israilan k'entekh) q'inkhetam ban a‚ tsarakh imamash ban a‚ üsh irs ötsursh ban a,
28:6: üsh ch'aġban a lättaḥ, Firʿavnna a‚ Hxamanna a‚ tsu shinnan eskarna a gayta a üsh qörush khillarg.
28:7: Okha khaam bira Musan nene - vaqave iza‚ älla. Nagaḥ ḥo qeraḥ tsunakh (Musana bokham khilarakh)‚ aḥ qossa iza hxorda chu – qera ma qera‚ sa ma gatde – Okha yukhaverzor vu iza ḥöga‚ khülüytur vu iza elchanekh.
28:8: Iza sḥaväkqira /Nil khi chüra/ Firʿavnan dözalo (tsünan gono) tsunakh shayna mostaġ a‚ singattam a khiliyta. Bakq'alla a, Firʿavn a‚ Hxaman a‚ tsu shinnan eskar a khilira ġalatbevlarsh.
28:9: Firʿavnan zudcho elira: "Suna a‚ ḥuna a bʿärgiyn marzo yu-q! Ma ve iza‚ vayna payda ban mega tso‚ ya vay dözalkho lotsur tsunakh" – tsarna khaalush datsara…/otsunakh khinderg/.
28:10: Musan nenan dog dasdelira. Iza gergayara tsüntsa guchuyala Okha tsünan dog ch'aġdina tsa khilleḥara iza (Musan nana) khiliytarḥama /Delan vaʿdikh/ teshacharakh.
28:11: Tso elira tsünan yishiga: "Ḥada‚ tsunna(Musana) t'äḥa ġo". Iza ḥözhura tsünga genara‚ tsarna khaa tsa lush (i Musa tergalvesh khilar).
28:12: Okha ḥaram bira tsunna (Musana) i vaqon zudariy (tsḥanna a zudchukh veqash vatsara iza) ḥalkha (iza shen nanna t'evalavale). T'akqa tso elira: "As t'eḥazhadey shu tsḥana ts'iynan dözalna, shuna iza qobur volchu‚ shäsh tsunna dikanig khila a luush".
28:13: T'akqa Okha yukhaverzira iza (Musa) shen nene‚ tsünan (Musan nenan) bʿärg sinteme khiliyta a‚ i singattame tsa khiliyta a, tsunna khaiyta a Delan vaʿda baq' khilar a‚ delaḥ a, tsarakh (mushrikekh) duqakhbolcharna tsa khäa-q.
28:14: Iza (Musa) ġemettahxötticha‚ nisvelcha‚ Okha tsunna delira ḥeq'alalla a‚ ʿilma a. Ishtta (sovġattsa) beqam bo Okha dikanig decharna.
28:15: (Misran) ġalin chöḥavelira iza (Musa) tsünan bakharkhoy tergame (samone) botschu khenaḥ. Tsunna kariyra tsu choḥ shi stag vovshakh letash: hxara (tsḥaʾ) shen tobanakh‚ tq'a vazha – shen mostaġekh (Firʿavnan nakhakh). Tsünga (Musaga) ġo diykhira tsünan tobanekh volcho tsünan mostaġekh volchunna düḥal. Musas tsunna buy tüykhira – tso iza (viyna) dʿaväkqira. Tso (Musas) elira: "Hxara (i stag ver) shayt'anan ġullaqekh du. Bakq'alla a, iza bilgala (nakh niysachu neq'akh) tilabesh mostaġ du".
28:16: Tso (Musas, ḥastavella Dele) elira: "San Qiosh-Qoburg‚ as aysa sayna zulam ma dina‚ gechdeḥa suna". Tso tsunna gechdira. Bakq'alla a, Iza t'ekh gechdiyrig a‚ q'inkhetame verg a vu.
28:17: Tso (Musas) elira: "San Qiosh-Qoburg‚ Aḥ suna niʿmat dalartsa (suna nitsq' a bella, suna gech a dina) sokh tsq'a a khir ma vats q'inoshdecharna ġöncha (naq'ost)".
28:18: Iza ġalaḥ ʿüyranga velira, qörush a‚ samo a yesh. Ts'ekhḥana selkhana tsünga (Musaga) ġo dökhush khillarg (takhana) yukha a tsünga moḥ bettash, ġo dökhush vu. Musas tsünga elira: "Bakq'alla a, ma qochchush tilavellarg vu-q ḥo!"
28:19: T'akqa shäshshinnan mostaġ volchunna tokha tsunna (Musana) liʾcha‚ tso elira: "Hxay Musa‚ so vēn luush vu-q ḥo‚ ayḥa selkhana stag vērakh terra‚ ḥo luush ma vats lättaḥ nitsq' besh verg khilla /ʿen / ben‚ ḥo luush ma vats /nakhana yukq'eḥ/ maslaḥat decharakh khila".
28:20: Tsḥa stag veara ġalin yistera vedda‚ tso elira: "Hxay Musa! /Ġalin/ day bart besh bu ḥo vēn‚ aravalalaḥ /hxoqu makhkara/. Bakq'alla a, so ḥuna dika ḥekham besh bolcharakh vu".
28:21: Iza tsigara (Firʿavnan makhkara) aravelira qeramtsa‚ samo a yesh (shena t'eḥa boġush buy a ḥözhush). Tso elira: "San Qiosh-Qoburg‚ k'elḥarvakqaḥ so zulame bolchu nakhakh".
28:22: Sha Madyanan aġorḥa dʿavolavelcha‚ tso elira: "San Qiosh-Qobucho so niysachu novq'a vakqa tarlo".
28:23: Madyanarchu khina körte dʿaqächcha‚ tsunna tsigaḥ tsḥa nakh kariyra (shayn dokhnana) khi malosh. Tsunna (Musana) kariyra tsarna t'eḥaḥ lättash shi zuda /shayn üstaġiy/ dʿalökhkush /khina t'e tsa dokhüytush/. Tso elira: "Hxun ġullaq du shushinnan (i üstaġiy dʿalekhka)?" Tsu shimmo elira: "Okha tsa malado (tkheshan üstaġashna khi) tsu zhaʿusha (shayn üstaġiy, tsarna khi a maliyna, khina gonaḥara) dʿalakhkkalts‚ tq'a tkhan da vokqa stag vu (i tsa lelalo)".
28:24: Tso (Musas) khi maliyra tsu shinna (tsu shinnan üstaġashna)‚ tsul t'äḥa dʿavirzira ʿindaġe‚ t'akqa elira: "San Qiosh-Qoburg‚ so Aḥ suna dossiyna mülkhkha a niʿmat öshush ma vu (metsa vu)".
28:25: Tsu shinnakh tsḥaʾ tsunna t'e eara eḥ khetachu bolartsa‚ tso elira: "San das qoyqu ḥöga ḥuna makh bala, aḥ tkhuna (tkhan üstaġashna) khi malorna". Iza (Musa) tsunna t'e veʾcha‚ tsünga khabar (shen ḥal) a diytsicha‚ tso (Shuʿayba) elira: "Ḥo ma qera! Ḥo k'elḥarvälla otsu zulamechu nakhakh".
28:26: Tsu shinnakh (shina yoʿakh) tsḥammo elira: "Dada‚ mekhakh bolkh ban latsaḥ iza‚ aḥ mekhakh bolkh ban lotsu bolchekh uggare dikanig vu iza – nitsq' bolush a‚ teshame a vu".
28:27: Tso (Shuʿayba) elira: "Suna läa hxoqu sayn shina yoʿakh tsḥaʾ ḥöga mare yala aḥ suna borhx sharaḥ bolkh biyrig. Ḥo itt sharenga valaḥ (i bolkh besh) – i ḥögaḥara khir du‚ ḥuna khalo yan luush vats so. Ḥuna karor vu so‚ Dalla laaḥ‚ dikacharakh".
28:28: Tso (Musas) elira: "Hxara suna a‚ ḥuna a yuq'aḥ du. Tsu shinnakh mülkhkha a khan as qochushʾyaḥ‚ ġelo yiyr yats suna. I Dela vay düytsuchunna t'eḥ vekal (tesh) ma vu".
28:29: Musa shen khan (itt sho) cheq a yakqina, shen dözaltsa dʿavödush‚ tsunna khaaelira T'ýr lamanan aġorḥara ts'e. Tso elira shen dözale: "Shu /quzaḥ/ sovtsa‚ suna ts'e khaaella‚ as shuna tsigara tsḥa khaam ban a‚ ya ts'erakh tsḥa dogush dolu khäshtig dan a mega‚ shu dokhdaliyta".
28:30: Iza tsunna (ts'arna) t'e veʾcha, tsünga qayqam beara toġin ättu aġorḥara berkate yolchu mettigeḥ dolchu ditt dolchüra: "Va Musa! Bakq'alla a, So Dela vu‚ ʿalamiyn Da.
28:31: Oḥaqossa ḥayn ʿasa!" Tsunna iza gicha settash, teqarg sanna‚ iza dʿavedira, yukha a tsa ḥozhush. (Dala elira tsünga) "Va Musa! Gergavola‚ ma qera! Bakq'alla a, ḥo qeram botsucharakh vu.
28:32: Ḥayn küg che dolla‚ /t'akqa sḥadakqa i/ - sḥader du k'ayn khilla tsḥa a zen dotsush. T'etaʿade /ḥayn ättu küg/ ḥan /dagna/ t'e – dʿader du ḥan /teqargakh/ qerar. I shi bilgalo yu ḥuna ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchüngara Firʿavnna a‚ tsünan elashna a. Bakq'alla a, üsh khili-q teshash botsu (daq'azabevlla) nakh".
28:33: Tso (Musas) elira: "San Qiosh-Qoburg‚ as tsarakh stag ma viyna‚ so qöru-q tsara suo vierna.
28:34: I san vasha Hxarun‚ iza sol melkho a govza ma vu mattatsa‚ vaiytaḥ iza sötsa, ġöncha a khilla‚ so baq'khilar ch'aġdiyr dara tso. Bakq'alla a, so qöru tsara so khartsvarna".
28:35: Tso (Dala) elira: "Okha ch'aġviyr vu ḥo ḥan veshitsa‚ Okha khülüytur yu shuna shinna baq'o‚ shuna shinna t'eqochur bats üsh. Tkhan ayatashtsa shu shiʾ a‚ shuna shinna t'äḥa mel väznarg tölur vu".
28:36: Shayga veʾcha Musa Tkhan bilgalchu ayatashtsa‚ tsara elira: "Hxara ma dats /nakha/ qöllina bozbuunchalla ben‚ tkhuna-m tsa khezna otsunakh tkhan ḥalkhalerchu dayshkaḥ".
28:37: Elira tq'a Musas: "San Qiosh-Qoburg vu-q dika khuush Shegara niysachu neq'atsa mila veana a‚ /dakharan/ hxusaman t'äḥe ḥenan khir yu a. Bakq'alla a, zulamkhoy bakqiybiyr ma bats".
28:38: Firʿavnas elira: "Hxay eliy! Suna tsa khiʾnera shuna so votsurg /qin/ dela. Ts'e latae suna‚ hxay Hxaman, popparakh (kibarchigash yotta), t'akqa /leqa/ ġala ye suna, so mega Musan Dalla t'eqacha. Bakq'alla a, suna iza khetash vu khartslüycharakh".
28:39: Kuravelira iza a‚ tsünan eskar a lättaḥ kurabovla ḥaq' botsush‚ tsarna mettara shäsh Tkhuna t'e yukhaderzor a dats.
28:40: Okha sḥaletsira iza a‚ tsünan eskar a‚ t'akqa Okha qössira üsh hxorda chu. Ḥazhal ḥo‚ mukha khilla zulamkhoyn t'äḥe!
28:41: Okha khiliytira tsarakh /nakh/ ts'erga qoyqush imamash. Q'ematdiynaḥ tsarna ġo diyr dats.
28:42: Tsarna t'äḥaḥazhiyra Okha hxoqu dünenaḥ a neʿalt‚ q'ematdiynaḥ üsh ma bu /Delan q'inkhetamakh/lelkhosh genabäkhnacharakh.
28:43: Ḥalkhalera t'äḥenash hxallakyinchul t'äḥa Okha delira Musaga zhayna, sha nakhana gaytame dolu delilash a‚ niysa neq' a‚ q'inkhetam a khilla dolu‚ tsarna dagadaiyta.
28:44: Ḥo vatsara /hxay Muḥammad/ malkhbuzen aġongaḥ Okha Musatsa satsam bechu khenaḥ‚ ḥo vatsara /tsigaḥ/ khillacharakh.
28:45: Delaḥ a, Okha qiira t'äḥenash‚ yakhʾelira tsarna ömar. Ḥo vatsara Madyanan bakharkhoshna yuq'aḥ tsarna Tkhan ayatash a döshush‚ delaḥ a, Tkho dara bokhküytursh /elchanash/.
28:46: Ḥo vatsara T'ýr lamanan aġongaḥ Okha /Musaga/ qayqam bicha‚ delaḥ a, ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchun q'inkhetamtsa /vakhiytina ḥo, hxay Muḥammad/ aḥ qeram tasa q'omana‚ shena t'e ḥol ḥalkha /tsḥa a/ qeramcha tsa veana dolchu‚ tsärga oyla yayta.
28:47: /Okha q'urayshashka elcha tsa vakhiytineḥara/ shayna bokham khilcha shayn küygasha ḥalkha kechdiynarg baḥaneḥ‚ tsara er ma dara: "Tkhan Qiosh-Qoburg! Aḥ vaiytina khilleḥara tkhöga elcha‚ tkho t'äḥahxuttur ma dara Ḥan ayatashna‚ tkho khir ma dara (Ḥokh) teshacharakh".
28:48: Shayga Tkhögara baq'derg deʾcha‚ tsara elira: "Tsünga (Muḥammad- paykhamare) della khilleḥara Musaga dellarg". Tq'a tsara kharts tsa dira Musaga dellarg ḥalkha? Tsara ma elira: "Shi bozbuunchalla (Q'urʾan a‚ Tavrat a) du, vovshashna ġo a desh". Ma elira tsara: "(Tsu) derrigenakh a tsa tesha /tkho/".
28:49: Aḥ āla /tsärga, hxay Muḥammad/: "Sḥalo Delera zhayna, sha tsu shinnal (Q'urʾanal a‚ Tavratal a) niysa a dolush‚ so tsunna t'äḥahxuttur vu, shu baq'lüysh khilleḥ".
28:50: Tsara ḥuna zhop tsa laḥ‚ ḥuna khaalaḥ üsh dekq'a shayn dezarshna t'äḥabevla buyla. Mila vu tq'a tilame, Delera niysa neq' a botsush, shen dezarna t'äḥavällachul? Bakq'alla a, Dala nis tsa do zulame q'am.
28:51: Okha dʿaqachiyra tsärga dosh shayga oyla yaytarḥama.
28:52: Okha shayna tsul (Q'urʾanal) ḥalkha zhayna (Tavrat, Inzhil…) dellarsh – üsh tsunakh (Q'urʾanakh) teshash bu.
28:53: Iza shayna deshcha, tsara elira: "Tkho tsunakh teshna‚ bakq'alla a, iza baq'derg du vayn Qiosh-Qobuchungara‚ tkho khilira tsul ḥalkha busalbanash."
28:54: Üsh bu üsh – shayna lur bolush shalkha makh shäsh sobar darna a‚ shäsh vonig dikachüntsa dukhatukhush khilarna a‚ Okha shayna dellachu rits'q'ekh shäsh /dikanna t'eḥ/ kharzhash yarna a.
28:55: Shayna dässa khabar khezcha‚ tsunakh dʿabörzu üsh‚ olush: "Tkhuna tkhan ʿamalsh yu‚ shuna shayn ʿamalsh yu‚ salam khülda shuna‚ tkho tsa ġerta zhehxal nakhana t'e".
28:56: Bakq'alla a, aḥ nisviyr vats ḥayna veznarg‚ delaḥ a, Dala nisvo Shena luurg. Iza dika bevzash vu nisbellarsh.
28:57: Tsara (Makkara mushrikasha-duqa delanekh teshachara) elira: "Tkho niysachu neq'ana t'äḥahxitticha ḥötsa tsḥäna‚ tkho tkheshan lättara (Makkara) araqüssur ma du /qechu ʿärbasha/". Okha ch'aġ tsa yira tq'a tsarna teshame Ḥaram‚ tsiga masso a hxumanan stömash qöḥush Tkhögara ritsq' khilla dolu? Delaḥ a, tsarakh duqakh bolcharna tsa khäa-q (iza).
28:58: Masa yurt hxallakyira Okha shayn dakhartsa kuralla yina khilla yolu! Hxorsh yu tseran ġishlosh‚ /shayna choḥ/ tsḥa k'ezzig bersh ben ʿash botsu tsaral t'äḥa. Tkho khilira irs ötsursh (tsarakh disnarg Tkhuna qechira).
28:59: Ḥan Qiosh-Qoburg tsa khilira yartash hxallakyesh tseran bakharkhoshka elcha tsa vokhüytush‚ tso tsarna Tkhan ayatash a döshush. Tkho tsa khilira yartash hxallakyesh‚ tseran bakharkhoy zulam desh bolush ben.
28:60: Shuna della hxuma – iza dünenan dakharan /k'ezzig/ hxuma a du‚ tsünan khazalla a yu /cheqder dolush a du i derrige a/. Dalla gergaḥ derg – dikakho a‚ /zamanaḥ/ dekho a du. Shu ḥeq'ale tsa khülu /i dikanig a, bukhadüsurg a kharzha/?
28:61: Okha shena /yalsamane ġur vu älla/ khaza vaʿda yinarg, iza tsunna t'eqüḥur a volush, tera vuy tq'a Okha shena dünenan dakharan ḥal della, t'äḥa sha q'ematdiynaḥ /zhözhakhate/ bakhiytincharakh khir volchukh?
28:62: Otsu diynaḥ Tso tsärga qayqor du‚ olush: "Michaḥ bu San naq'ostiy‚ shuna /shäsh Sötsa/ khilla möttush khilla bolu?"
28:63: Er du shayna t'eḥ /zhözhakhate ġur bu älla/ dosh baq'khillachara (tsateshachara shayna delanash bina letsnachara): "Tkho Qiosh-Qoburg‚ hxorsh bu okha tilinarsh‚ okha üsh tilira tkhäsh tiladalarkh terra. Tkho ts'andeli /tsarakh/ Ḥöga /derzartsa/. Üsh tsa khilla tkhuna ʿibadat desh (üsh bara shayn laamashna t'äḥabäznarsh)".
28:64: Er du (tsärga): "Sḥaqayqa shayn naq'ostiy /shayna ġo dan/". Üsh qoyqur bu tsärga, amma tsara zhop lur dats tsarna. Tsarna gur du ʿazap. Niysachu novq'aḥ khilleḥara üsh (t'akqa khir ma datsara tsarna ʿazap)!
28:65: Otsu diynaḥ Tso tsärga qayqam besh, er du: "Hxun zhop delira ash (As bakhkiytinchu) elchanashka?"
28:66: Qölina (q'aylabäkhna) khir bu tsarna khaamash otsu diynaḥ‚ tsara vovshashka khöttur a dats.
28:67: Amma tōba dinarg (dokhkovällarg) a‚ iyman dillinarg a‚ dika ʿamal yinarg a – iza khila tarlo deq'alkhillacharakh.
28:68: Ḥan Qiosh-Qobucho qullu Shena luurg‚ kharzha a khorzhu. Tsarna-m datsara kharzhar. Ts'ena vu Dela /masso a qachambatsarekh/‚ leqa vu Iza tsara /Shetsa/ naq'ost latsarkh.
28:69: Ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchunna khäa‚ hxun dʿaḥuldina tseran degnasha‚ hxun tsara guchudokqush du.
28:70: Iza Allahx-Dela vu‚ qin dela vats Iza votsurg. Tsunna khastam bu ḥalkharchoḥ(dünenan dakhareḥ) a‚ t'äḥarchoḥ(ekhartaḥ) a. Tsünan bu satsam a‚ Tsünga dʿaderzor du shu a.
28:71: Aḥ āla (hxay paykhamar): "Hxun kheta shuna‚ Dala shuna büysa khiliytineḥara guttarenna a, q'ematde qachchalts‚ Allahx-Dela votschu mülkhachu dala shuna serlo yoüytur yara? Shuna tsa kheza-te?"
28:72: Aḥ āla: "Hxun kheta shuna‚ Dala shuna de khiliytineḥara guttarenna a, q'ematde qachchalts‚ Allahx-Dela votschu mülkhachu dala shuna büysa yoüytur yara‚ ash shena choḥ sadoʿush? Shuna tsa go-te?"
28:73: Tsünan q'inkhetamakh du-q Tso shuna büysa a‚ de a khiliytar ash shena choḥ (busa) sadaʿa a‚ Tsünan niʿmat lakha a (diynaḥ, q'aḥögush) – shu barkalla olush khir datsara teḥa (Tso dellachu niʿmatashna)".
28:74: Otsu diynaḥ Tso tsärga qayqor du‚ olush: "Michaḥ bu San naq'ostiy‚ shuna /shäsh Sötsa/ khilla möttush bolu?"
28:75: Okha sḥavalor vu (q'ematdiynaḥ qelana) hxor ummatakh tesh (tsärga vakhiytina khilla volu paykhamar)‚ Okha er du: "Sḥadalade shayn delilsh". Tsarna khiira baq'derg Delan duyla. Tsarakh dʿatilira tsara /Tsunna t'eḥ kharts/ qöllina khillarg.
28:76: Bakq'alla a, Q'ārýn vara Musan q'omakh, tsarna (nakhana) ġelo yora tso. Okha ellera tsunna otstsul duqa khaznash (bakhamash)‚ tseran doġanash nitsq' bolchu nekhan tobanna a (dʿasḥalelo) khala khilla yolu. Tsünga ma elira tsünan q'omo: "Ḥo vokqa ma ve (kura ma vala). Bakq'alla a, Dalla tsa beza bakqiybesh bersh (kuralla esh bersh).
28:77: Aḥ lakha Dala ḥayna dellachüntsa guttarenan hxusam (yalsamani)‚ dits ma de dünenakh ḥayn dāq'a a! Dikanig de‚ Dala ḥayna dikanig ma darra. Ma ġerta lättaḥ telkhina hxumanash (q'epe dotsu) darzho. Bakq'alla a, Dalla tsa beza telkhina hxumanash darzhosh bersh".
28:78: Tso (Q'ārýna) elira: "Iza (ḥal‚ däkhni) suna della sögara ʿilma baḥaneḥ". Tsunna tsa khäa-te Dala hxintsale mel /dukqa/ t'äḥenash hxallakyina tsul ḥalkha‚ tsul nitsq'atsa vuno ch'oġa a yolush‚ guldartsa (ḥal‚ däkhni) alsam a yolush. Shayn q'inoykh lätsna khöttur a dats q'inoshdechärga (Dalla i dika khäa dela).
28:79: Iza (Q'ārýn) aravälira shen q'omana t'e shen khazalleḥ(khazachu dukharshtsa). Dünenan dakhar dezachara elira: "Ehx! Tkhuna a delleḥara Q'ārýnna dellarg! Bakq'alla a, ma deza-dokqa dāq'a dolush vu-q iza!"
28:80: Shayna ʿilma dellachara elira: "Daq'aza ma dovla shu! Delera yal ġole yu iyman dillinchunna a‚ dika ʿamal yinachunna a. Iza qochur ma yats sobar dinicharna a ben" /i khaza yal/.
28:81: Okha latte khudavaytira iza a, tsünan hxusam a. Tsa khilira tsunna tsḥa a ġo desh toba Delan mettana‚ i sha tsa khilira shena ġodecharakh.
28:82: Selkhana tsünan metteḥ shäsh khila luush khillarsh ʿüyrenga bevlira, olush: "Ohx! Dala ritsq' darzhosh (shortta lush) du Shen lekh Shena luuchunna‚ baram a bo /k'ezzig lush/. Dala vaykh q'inkhetam tsa bineḥara‚ latte khudadaytina khir dara vay a. Ehx! Bakqiy tsa bie /Delakh/ tsatesharsh".
28:83: I ekhartan hxusam Okha khülüytur yu lättaḥ laqalla a‚ telkhina hxumanash darzhora tsa dezacharna. T'äḥe /Delakh/ qörucharna yu.
28:84: Dikachüntsa veʾnarg, milla a velaḥ a – tsunna tsul a dikanig khir du. Vochüntsa veʾnarg, milla velaḥ a – vonash dinacharna beqam khir bats shäsh desh khillacharal ben.
28:85: Bakq'alla a, ḥuna Q'urʾan t'e dillincho (Dala) ḥo yukhaverzor ma vu yukhavörzuchu mettige. Aḥ āla: "San Qiosh-Qobuchunna khäa-q nischu novq'a veʾnarg a‚ gushdolchu tilarchoḥ verg a".
28:86: Ḥo ma vatsara, /hxay elcha/, satesna ḥayga Zhayna dalare ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchüngara q'inkhetam khilla a ben. Ḥo khillane a ma khilalaḥ /Delakh/ tsateshacharna ġöncha.
28:87: Ḥo yukha ma vokqiyla (otsu mushrikasha) Delan ayatekh üsh ḥöga dissiytanachul t'äḥa. Ḥayn Qiosh-Qobuchünga qayqa! Ḥo khillane a ma khilalaḥ /Delatsa/ naq'ost lotsucharakh (mushrikekh)!
28:88: Aḥ ma qayqalaḥ Delatsa qechu dele, qin dela vats ḥuna Iza ben! Masso a hxuma hxallaq'khir yu ḥuna, Tsünan yuḥ yotsurg‚ Tsünan bu satsam‚ Tsunna t'e yukhaderzor dolush du shu a.
29:2: Nakhana möttina-te, shäsh "Okha iyman dillina" älchaḥana‚ zen a tsa züysh, dütur du älla?
29:3: Okha zen ma ziyna tsaral ḥalkha khillarsh a. Dalla khuush ma bu ḥuna baq'lina khillarsh a‚ Tsunna khuush ma bu ḥuna khartslüysh bersh a (Dala q'astor bu iymantsa baq'khillarsh khartskhillacharal).
29:4: Vonig desh bersh möttush bara-te shäsh Tkhol ḥalkhadevr du (Tkhan ʿazapakh k'elḥaradevr du)? Ma von ḥukma desh bu-q üsh!
29:5: Milla khilleḥ Dalla düḥalqetare dog dokhush – Dala tökhna khan (sheko yotstsush) yoġur yolush ma yu! Iza khezash verg a‚ khuush verg a ma vu!
29:6: Milla velaḥ a /Delan neq'a t'eḥ/ q'aḥögush – tso q'aḥögu shena. Bakq'alla a, Dela ma vats Shena ḥashtash dolush ʿalamashkaḥ (Shena tsḥa a hxuma öshush vats Iza).
29:7: Iyman dillina bersh a‚ dika ʿamal yinarsh a – tsarakh dʿadokhur ma du Okha tseran vonash‚ lur du (sovġatna) tsarna shäsh desh khillachul a dikokh derg.
29:8: Okha veset dina adamna shen detsa-nenatsa dika khilar. Nagaḥ sanna i shiʾ ḥöga Sötsa naq'ost latsiyta ġertaḥ‚ tsunakh ḥögaḥ tsḥa a khaar dotsush‚ – t'akqa aḥ tsu shinga la ma doġalaḥ! Suna t'e du shun dʿaderzar‚ t'akqa As shüga düytsur du ash desh khillarg.
29:9: Iyman dillinarsh a‚ dika ʿamalsh yinarsh a – üsh bokhüytur bu Okha dikacharna yuq'a (yalsamane).
29:10: Adamashna yuq'aḥ bu, shäsh olush bersh /bagakhula/: "Okha iyman dillina Dele". T'akqa Dele iyman dillar baḥaneḥ shayna /tsḥana nakhera/ bokham khilcha, tsara loru nekhan pitna (nakhera shayna khilla tsatam) Delera ʿazapakh tera. Ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchüngara tolam beʾcha, tsara olu: "Bakq'alla a, tkho shütsa ma dara". Tq'a Dela vats dika khuush ʿalamiyn degnashkaḥ derg?
29:11: Bevzar ma bu ḥuna Dalla iyman dillinarsh a‚ bevzar ma bu ḥuna Tsunna munepiq'ash a (Dala guchudokqur du nakhana shina a tobanan ḥelash).
29:12: Tsateshnachara elira iyman dillinchärga: "Tkhan novq'a dovla‚ okha dʿaḥur du shun q'inosh". Dʿaḥur ma dats tsara tseran q'inoykh tsḥa a hxuma. Bakq'alla a, üsh khartslüysh ma bu!
29:13: Tsara ḥur ma bu shayn moḥ a‚ shayn mäḥtsa /qin/ moḥ a. Tsärga khottur ma du q'ematdiynaḥ tsara /kharts/ qullush khillachukh (Delakh lätsna tsara kharts mel diytsinchukh) .
29:14: Okha vakhiytira Nuḥ shen q'omana t'e. Iza lättira tsarna yukq'eḥ ezar sharaḥ, shovztq'e itt sho t'etökhcha. Üsh sḥaletsira t'ovfano, shäsh zulamkhoy a khülush!
29:15: Okha k'elḥarväkqira iza a‚ kemanna t'eḥ khillarsh a‚ khiliytira tsunakh (kemanakh) ʿalamashna (adamashna) delil.
29:16: Ibrahxima /dagavaiyta/‚ tso ma elira shen q'ome: "Dalla ʿibidat de‚ Tsunakh qera. Iza dika du shuna, shu khuush khilleḥ.
29:17: Bakq'alla a, shu ʿibadat desh du-q, Dela a vitina, zhaʿarshna‚ qullush du eladita. Bakq'alla a, i Dela a vitina, ash ʿibadat decheran dolaḥ ma dats shun ritsq'. Ash lakha Delera ritsq'‚ Tsunna ʿibadat de‚ Tsunna barkalla a āla. Tsunna t'e yukhaderzor du shu".
29:18: Ash i khartsdaḥ – (shuna khaiyla) shul ḥalkha khillachu ummatasha a kharts ma dinera iza. Elchanna t'eḥ-m ma dats bilgala dʿaqachor ben.
29:19: Tsarna tsa khiʾna-te‚ mukha dolado Dala (yuḥantsa) qollar‚ t'akqa karladokqu iza. Bakq'alla a, iza Dalla atta ma du.
29:20: Aḥ āla /hxay elcha/: "Lela lättakhula‚ ḥazha‚ mukha doliyna Tso /yuḥantsa/ qollar‚ t'akqa Dala qullur du t'äkhḥara qollar (q'ematdiynaḥ khalq' yukhadendiyr du). Bakq'alla a, Dela masso a hxumanna t'eḥ nitsq' qochush ma vu.
29:21: ʿazap do Tso Shena luuchunna‚ q'inkhetam a bo Shena luuchukh‚ Tsunna t'e dʿaderzor dolush du shu a.
29:22: Shu ma dats ġorasiz valur volush /Dela, Tsünan qelakh k'elḥaradovlalur dolush/ lättaḥ a‚ stiglaḥ a. Ma vats shuna Dela votsurg /tsḥa a/ doladiyrig a‚ ġöncha a."
29:23: Delan ayatekh a‚ Tsunna düḥalqetarkh a tsateshnarsh – tsara dog dillina San q'inkhetamakh‚ üsh bu shayna lazosh dolu ʿazap khir dersh.
29:24: Tsa khilira tsünan q'oman zhop tsara alar ben: "Ve iza‚ ya vagave iza!" Okha k'elḥarväkqira /Ibrahxim/ ts'arakh. Bakq'alla a, tsu choḥ ayatash (delilash) ma du teshash bolchu nakhana.
29:25: Tso (Ibrahxima) elira: "Bakq'alla a, ash letsi-q, Dela a vitina, zhaʿarsh (ts'ush) bezam khilla vovshiy yukq'eḥ dünenan dakhareḥ. T'äḥa q'ematdiynaḥ shukh tsḥabolchara vuqarna kerstadiyr ma du‚ tsḥabolchara vuqarna neʿalt er ma du‚ shun chuġoyla (zhözhakhatin) ts'e ma yu. Ma bats shuna tsḥa a ġönchiy".
29:26: Tsunakh tiyshira Lut'. Tso elira: "So dʿaqelkha san Qiosh-Qobuchünga‚ bakq'alla a, Iza vu veza verg a‚ Shegaḥ ḥeq'alalla derg a".
29:27: Okha velira tsunna (Ibrahximna) Isḥaq' a‚ /k'entan k'ant/ Yaʿq'ub a‚ khiliytira tsünan zürreteḥ paykhamaralla a‚ zhayna a, elira tsunna shen yal dünenaḥ. Bakq'alla a, iza ekhartaḥ a dikacharakh ma vu.
29:28: Lut' a /ḥakhave/‚ tso ma elira shen q'ome: "Bakq'alla a, ash daḥash ma du bökhanig‚ shetsa ʿalamashkara tsḥa a shul ḥalkha tsa vällarg.
29:29: Shu ökhu tq'a bozharshna t'e‚ ash q'ülu tq'a neq'ash? Ash lelado shayn gulamashkaḥ irchanig." Tsa khilira tsünan q'oman qin zhop, shäsh ālar ben: "Daiyta tkhuna Delan ʿazap‚ ḥo baq'lüycharakh khilleḥ".
29:30: Tso elira /Dele dökhush/: "San Qiosh-Qoburg‚ Aḥ ġo delaḥ suna pasad hxuma lelochu q'omana t'eḥ".
29:31: Tkhan elchanash (malikash)bäkhkicha Ibrahximna t'e (khazachu) qoʾtsa‚ tsara elira: "Bakq'alla a, tkho du hxoqu yurtara adamash hxallakdan dokhkush. Bakq'alla a, tsigara adamash khili zulamkhoy".
29:32: Tso (Ibrahxim-paykhamara) elira: "Tq'a tsarna yukq'eḥ Lut' ma vu"! Tsara elira: "Tkhuna dika khäa, tsu choḥ mila vu! Okha k'elḥarvokqur ma vu iza a‚ tsünan dözal a‚ tsünan zuda yotsurg – iza khili /khallaqilla/ baynacharakh".
29:33: Tkhan elchanash (gelanchash-malikash) bäkhkicha Lut' volchu, üsh baḥaneḥ ġayġane khilira iza‚ dog gatdelira /kiyraḥ – üsh shen q'omo lelochu bökhachu hxumanakh larbalur bats shega mottadella/. Tsara /shäsh Delan elchiy duy khaiytina/ elira: "Ḥo ma qera‚ aḥ sa ma gattade. Bakq'alla a, tkho du ḥo a, ḥan dözal a k'elḥarbokhur dersh‚ ḥan zuda yotsurg – iza khili /hxallaqilla/ baynacharakh.
29:34: Bakq'alla a, Okha dossor du hxoqu yurtarchu nakhana t'e stiglara ʿazap üsh /Dalla/ ʿesa khilarna".
29:35: Okha ditira tsunakh (Lut' q'oman ättachu yartekh) q'eggina bilgalo ḥeq'alechu nakhana.
29:36: Madyane (Madyanerchu bakharkhoshka) /Okha vakhiytira/ tseran vasha Shuʿayb. Tso elira: "Hxay san q'am‚ Dalla ʿibadat de‚ dog dakha ekharchu diyne‚ ma darzhade lättaḥ telkhina derg".
29:37: Tsara iza khartsvira. Üsh sḥaletsira mokhkbegaro – t'akqa üsh ʿüyranga bevlira shayn hxusamashkaḥ bertalʾegna (bala a bella).
29:38: ʿadash a‚ Samudash a /hxallakbira Okha/. Shuna bilgaldelira iza tseran hxusamashkakhula. Khazyira tsarna shayt'ano shayn ʿamalsh‚ tso galabekhira üsh /niysachu/ neq'akh‚ üsh khilleḥ a qetam bolush.
29:39: Q'arun a‚ Firʿavn a‚ Hxaman a /hxallakbira Okha/. Veara tsärga Musa bilgalonashtsa‚ kuralla yira tsara lätta t'eḥ‚ üsh tsa khilira ḥalkhabevllarsh /Tkhan ʿazapakh/.
29:40: (Tsarakh) hxor a sḥaletsira Okha shen q'a baḥaneḥ. Tsarakh bu Okha shayna t'e /t'ulgashtsa tsḥäna/ darts ḥavziytinarsh a‚ tsarakh bu ts'oġa tokharo sḥaletsnarsh a‚ tsarakh bu Okha shäsh lätta bukhabakhiytinarsh a‚ tsarakh bu Okha shäsh khina bukhabakhiytinarsh a. Tsa khilira Dela tsarna zulam desh‚ delaḥ a, shäsh khilira üsh shayna zulam desh.
29:41: Dela votsurg /qin/ ġönchiy letsnacheran masal /shena/ masha buzush gezgo yinchu hxusamakh tera du. Bakq'alla a, uggar ledara hxusam gezgan hxusam yu-q, üsh khuush khilleḥ.
29:42: Bakq'alla a, Dalla khäa tsara (mushrikasha), Sha a vitina, shayga qoyqu hxumanash (tsḥanna a paydane yotsu hxumanash yuyla). Iza veza verg a vu‚ Shegaḥ ḥeq'alalla derg a vu.
29:43: Hxara masalsh Okha dalado nakhana. Tseran oyla-m tsa yo ʿelamnakha ben.
29:44: Dala qöllina stiglanash a‚ latta a baq'ontsa. Bakq'alla a, tsu choḥ delil du muʾma (teshash bolchu) nakhana.
29:45: Aḥ desha ḥayga väḥitsa (Delan khaamtsa) daiytinchu zhayni t'era‚ lamaz hxottade. Bakq'alla a, lamazo dukhatukhu bökhanig a‚ irchanig a. Dela ḥekhor vuno dokqa du. Dela khuush vu ash diyrig.
29:46: Ash (hxay iyman dillinarsh) ma q'iysa zhaynin ohxlantsa, uggare dikachu aġor ben, tsarakh zulam dinarsh botsuchärtsa (busalba dinna a, busalbanashna a zulamash desh bolchärtsa q'iysa ma-torru lüra). Ash āla: "Okha iyman dilli tkhöga dossinchünga a (Q'urʾane)‚ shüga dossinchünga a (Tavrate a, Inzhile a)‚ Tkhan Dela a‚ shun Dela a tsḥaʾ vu‚ tkho Tsunna müt'aḥ du".
29:47: Ishtta Okha dossiyra ḥöga /hxay Muḥammad/ zhayna (Q'urʾan). Okha shayga /ḥalkha/ zhayna (Tavrat) dellarsh (tsarakh tsḥabersh) tsunakh (Q'urʾanakh) teshash bu. Hxoqarakh a (ʿärbekh) tsunakh teshash bersh bu. Tkhan ayatekh tsa teshash bats kerstanash ben.
29:48: Ḥo a ma vatsara /hxay Muḥammad/ tsul ḥalkha (Q'urʾan dossale) tsḥa a zhayna döshush a‚ yazdesh a ḥan /ättu/ küyga – (ḥo döshush a, yazdesh a) khilleḥara, tsu khartsbolchara sheko yiyr ma yara.
29:49: Hxaʾ‚ üsh – qetash dolu ayatash du shayna ʿilma dellacheran degnashkaḥ dolu. Tkhan ayatekh tsa teshash bats zulamkhoy ben.
29:50: Tsara elira: "Hxunda tsa dissiynera tsünga delilash shen Qiosh-Qobuchüngara?" Aḥ āla: "Delilash Delan du‚ so bilgala volu (qeramtsa) dʿakhoüyturg vu".
29:51: Tsarna qacho tsa yo-te Okha ḥöga shayna döshush dolu zhayna dossiyna khilaro? Bakq'alla a, tsu choḥ q'inkhetam a‚ ḥekham a ma bu teshash bolchu nakhana.
29:52: Aḥ āla /hxay Muḥammad/: "Qacho yo suniy shuniy yukq'eḥ Dela tesh khilaro. Tsunna khäa stiglanashkaḥ a‚ lättaḥ a mel derg. Khartsdolchukh teshnarsh‚ Dalla kerstanalla dinarsh – üsh bu eshnarsh".
29:53: Ḥo sikhvo tsara ʿazap daiytareḥ. Tökhna khan tsa khilleḥara, tsärga doġur dara i ʿazap‚ tsärga tsa doġush düsur dats iza ts'ekhḥana, tsarna khaa tsa lush.
29:54: Ḥo sikhvo tsara ʿazap daiytareḥ – amma zhözhakhati go biyr bolush ma yu tsateshacharna.
29:55: Otsu (q'emat)diynaḥ ʿazapo ḥulbiyr bu üsh shayna t'ekhula a‚ shayn kogiy bukhakhula a. Tso(Dala) er du: "ʿovsha shäsh (dünenan dakhareḥ) desh khillarg!"
29:56: Hxay San iyman dillina lesh! San latta shortta du‚ /dekq'a/ Suna ʿibadat deysha.
29:57: Hxor sino (adamo, sa mel dolchu hxumano) valar ʿovshur du. T'akqa Tkhuna t'e shu yukhaderzor du (q'ematdiynaḥ bart khättina, dʿanisdan yalsamane ya zhözhakhate).
29:58: Iyman dillinarsh‚ dika ʿamalash yinarsh – üsh Okha yalsamanerachu hxusamashka bokhüytur bu‚ shayna bukhakhula khish ökhush yolchu. Tsu choḥ üsh daima a khir bu – dika yal yu iza ʿamal yinacheran‚
29:59: shäsh sobare a‚ shayn Qiosh-Qobuchunna t'etevzhash a khillachu!
29:60: Mel diynat du shen ritsq' tsa qöḥush– Dala ritsq' lo tsarna a‚ shuna a! Iza khezash verg a vu‚ khuush verg a vu.
29:61: Aḥ tsärga khätticha‚ ḥan qöllina stiglanash a‚ latta a‚ ḥan bolkh boytu malkhe a‚ batte a‚ älla‚ tsara alanza dütur dats ḥuna: "Dala". Tq'a mukha ʿekhiyna /dʿaḥovziyna/ üsh /baq'dolchukh/!
29:62: Dala shortta lo ritsq' Shen lekh Shena luʾchunna‚ Tso tsḥana barameḥ a lo tsunna (Shekh lekh Shena luʾchunna). Bakq'alla a, Dela masso a hxuma khuush verg vu.
29:63: Aḥ tsärga khätticha‚ ḥan dossado stiglara khi‚ tsüntsa latta a dendo i dellachul t'äḥa, älla‚ tsara alanza dütur dats ḥuna: "Dala". Aḥ āla: "Khastam bu Dalla". Hxaʾ‚ tsarakh duqakhbersh qetash bats.
29:64: Hxara dünenan dakhar-m dats erna khan yayar a‚ lovzar a ben. Bakq'alla a, ekhartan ts'a (dakhar) – iza du dakhar, üsh khuush khilleḥ!
29:65: Shäsh kemana t'e khevshicha, üsh Dele qoyqu, shäsh Tsunna din ts'andesh (vekq'a i Dela tsḥaʾ vesh). Tso üsh lätta t'e k'elḥarbäkhcha, tsara /Tsüntsa/ naq'ost lotsu
29:66: Okha shayn dellachunna inkarlo yarḥama a‚ (dünenan) niʿmatekh payda etsarḥama a. T'äḥa khuur du tsarna!
29:67: Tsarna tsa gina-te‚ Okha ma yina Ḥaram qeram botsush (teshame)‚ tq'a tsarna (Makkin bakharkhoyn) gonaḥ /yolchu qechu yartashkaḥ/ nakh lötsush (zulamash desh)? Tq'a khartsdolchukh tesha üsh‚ Delan niʿmat khartsdo?!
29:68: Mila vu vuno zulame Dalla t'eḥ khartsderg qulluchul‚ ya baq'derg, shega i deʾnachul t'äḥa, khartsdesh volchul? Tq'a zhözhakhati choḥ /ʿan/ mettig yats kerstanashna?!
29:69: Tkhan düḥa q'aḥögush bersh– üsh nisbiyr bu Okha Tkhayn neq'a t'e. Bakq'alla a, Dela vu-q dikachärtsa.
30:3: (shayn makhkana) gergaḥorchu mettigeḥ. Üsh shayn esharal t'äḥa tölur bolush bu
30:4: tsḥa masiytta sharakh. Delan du ġullaq ḥalkha a‚ t'äḥa a. Otsu diynaḥ khazakhetar du muʾmanakhana.
30:5: Delan ġöntsa. Tso ġo do Shena luuchunna. Iza veza verg a‚ q'inkhetame verg a vu.
30:6: Delan vaʿda khilla (üsh tolar). Dala dokha tsa do Shen vaʿda‚ delaḥ a, nakhakh duqakhbolcharna tsa khäa-q.
30:7: Tsarna khäa dünenan dakharakh guchaḥ derg‚ ekhartakh üsh ġopal bu.
30:8: Tsara oyla tsa yo-te shäsh-shaykh? Dala tsa qöllina stiglanash a‚ latta a‚ tsu shinnan yukq'eḥ mel derg a baq'ontsa a‚ tsḥana tökhna (bilgalchu) khanna a ben. Bakq'alla a, nakhakh duqabersh shayn Qiosh-Qobuchunna düḥalqetar khilar khartsdesh bu-q.
30:9: Üsh tsa lella teḥa lättakhula‚ tsa gina-te‚ mukha khilla shayl ḥalkha khillacheran t'äḥe? Üsh tsaral ch'oġo ma bara nitsq'atsa‚ tsara leladora latta (düysh-derzosh)‚ bākha a ma bäkhna tsu t'eḥ shayl ḥalkha bäkhnachul alsam. Tsärga (hxoqaral ḥalkha khillachärga) ma bäkhkira shayn elchanash bilgalonashtsa. Dela vatsara tsarna zulam desh‚ delaḥ a, üsh shäsh khilira /shayna/ zulam desh.
30:10: T'akqa vón dinacheran t'äḥe von khilira tsara Delan ayatash khartsdarna‚ tsara üsh siysazdesh khilarna.
30:11: Dala dʿadolado qollar yuḥantsa‚ t'akqa Tso yukha karladokqu iza‚ t'akqa (tsul t'äḥa) shu Tsunna t'e yukhaderzor a du.
30:12: Saḥt hxöttinchu diynaḥ q'inosh dinarsh dogdillina büsur bu /Delan ʿazapakh k'elḥardovlar, shayna khir dotsiyla khiʾna/.
30:13: Tsa khilira tsarna shayn naq'ostekh shapaʿat desh bersh‚ üsh khilira shäsh /Dela a vitina, letsna khilla/ naq'ostiy (dünenaḥ tsara leram besh khilla bolu kharts delanash) hxintsa kerstabesh.
30:14: Saḥt hxöttinchu diynaḥ – otsu diynaḥ üsh beq'alur bu (tsḥabersh yalsamane, vazhabersh zhözhakhate ġur bu).
30:15: Iyman dillinarsh‚ dika ʿamalsh yinarsh – tsarna /yalsamanin/ boshmashkaḥ khazakhötüytur du (tam biyr bu).
30:16: Tsateshnarsh a‚ Tkhan ayatash a‚ ekhartaḥ vovshakhqetar (yukhadenbar) a khartsdinarsh a – üsh ʿazapeḥ /daima/ khir bu.
30:17: Tasbiḥ de Dalla (lamaz de Tsunna) shäsh süyrenga devlicha a‚ shäsh ʿüyranna ġevticha a,
30:18: Tsunna khastam bu stiglanashkaḥ a‚ lättaḥ a. Malkhbuzeḥ a‚ shuna delq'khan hxöttinchu khenaḥ a /de lamazash/.
30:19: Tso sḥadokqu (qullu) diynaderg dellachukh‚ dellarg a sḥadokqu diynachukh‚ dendolüytu latta i dellachul t'äḥa. Ishtta shu a sḥadokhur (yukhadendiyr) du /q'ematdiynaḥ/.
30:20: Tsünan delilekh du Tso shu qollar lättakh‚ t'akqa shu adamiyn tuqam a khilla, därzhash /lättakhula, Delera ritsq' lökhush/.
30:21: Tsünan delilekh du Tso shuna shukh shaykh zudariy qollar shu tsärtsa /parġat/ dākha. Tso khiliytina shuna yukq'eḥ bezam a‚ q'inkhetam a. Bakq'alla a, tsu choḥ delilsh du-q oylaechu nakhana.
30:22: Tsünan delilekh du stiglanash a‚ latta a qollar‚ shun mettanash a‚ besnash a khiytsadalar. Bakq'alla a, tsu choḥ delilash ma du khuush bolcharna (qetame bolcharna).
30:23: Tsünan delilekh yu shun nab büysanna a‚ diynaḥ a yesh yolu‚ Tsünan komärshallekh ash /bākham/ lakhar a. Bakq'alla a, tsu choḥ delilash ma du laduġuchu nakhana.
30:24: Tsünan delilekh du Tso shüga t'q'es gaytar qeram tasartsa a‚ /doġa daiytare/ dogdakhartsa a. Tso doüytu stiglara khi (doġa)‚ tsüntsa dendolüytu latta i dellachul t'äḥa. Bakq'alla a, tsu choḥ delilash ma du ḥeq'alechu nakhana.
30:25: Tsünan delilekh du stigal a‚ latta a Tsünan omratsa lättash khilar. Tsul t'äḥa Tso shüga lättara tsq'a qayqartsa qayqicha, shu /keshniyn chüra/ aradevr du /q'ematdiynaḥ/.
30:26: Tsünan du stiglanashkaḥ a‚ lättaḥ a mel derg. Masso a Tsunna müt'aḥ a vu.
30:27: Iza vu /hxuma/ qollar dʿadolosh verg – t'akqa Tso iza karladokqu. Iza Tsunna attō du (Tsunna dan khala hxuma danne a dats). Tsünan uggar laqara masal du stiglanashkaḥ a‚ lättaḥ a (Shen ts'erashtsa a, sibatashtsa a uggare laqara verg vu i Dela). Iza – veza verg a‚ Shegaḥ ḥeq'alalla derg a vu.
30:28: Tso shuna masal daliyna shukh shaykh. Shun buy shun ättu küygasha doladinacharakh naq'ostiy Okha shuna dellachu rits'q'eḥ, shu tsu ritsq'eḥ tsḥaniyssa a dolush‚ shu tsarna (von hxuma khilarna) qörush, shayna /khilarna/ qerarakh terra? Ishtta qetabo Okha ayatekh ḥeq'ale bolu nakh.
30:29: Amma, zulam dinarsh t'äḥahxittira shayn dezarshna tsḥa a ʿilma a dotsush. Ḥan nisbiyr bu-te Dala tilarchoḥ bitinarsh? Ma bats tsarna tsḥa a ġo den dersh!
30:30: Aḥ hxottae ḥan yuḥ /Delan/ dina t'e, ḥanif (Dela tsḥaʾ vesh verg) a khiliy, Delan qollaran bukhtsa tsḥänadoġush a dolchu, shena t'eḥ Tso /berrig/ nakh a qöllina dolchu. Khiytsam bats Delan qollaran. Iza du niysa dolu din‚ delaḥ a, duqakhbolchu nakhana tsa khäa-q!
30:31: Tsunna t'edörzursh khilalash dokhkodavlartsa (tōba dartsa)‚ Tsunakh (Delakh) qeralash‚ lamaz hxottadelash, shu ma khilalash mushrikekh,
30:32: shayn din deq'na, tobanash yinacharakh /ma khilalash shu/. Hxor toba shegaḥ dolchukh yakqiyesh yu (shena khetarg baq' lorush, qechärgaḥ derg khartsdesh).
30:33: Nakh shayga tsḥa von deacha, shayn Qiosh-Qobuchünga qoyqu‚ Tsunna t'ebörzursh a khüliy (dokhkobovlartsa). T'akqa Tso tsärga Shen q'inkhetaman cham bakqiyticha (i tsarakh ḥaqadella von dʿadäkqicha), tsarakh tsḥana deq'o shen Qiosh-Qobuchüntsa naq'ost lotsu
30:34: Okha shayna dellarg kerstadarḥama. Zovq ḥega! T'äḥa khuur du shuna.
30:35: Ya Okha tsärga (mushrikashka) teshalla dossiyna‚ tso düytsush tsara Shetsa naq'ost lotsush khillachukh?
30:36: Okha nakhe q'inkhetaman cham bakqiyticha‚ üsh tsunakh bakqiybö. Tq'a tsarakh vonig ḥaqadelcha shayn küygasha ḥalkhadäkqina dolchu, – tsara dog düllu /Delan q'inkhetamakh/.
30:37: Tsarna tsa gina-te Dala ritsq' alssam darzhosh khilar Shena luuchunna‚ doza tukhush khilar a /k'ezzig lush Shena luuchunna/. Bakq'alla a, tsu choḥ delilsh du-q teshash bolchu nakhana.
30:38: Dʿalo gergarchunna shen ḥaq' (tsunna doġurg)‚ miskachunna a‚ neq'akhochunna a /shayn ḥaq'/. Iza – dika du Delan yuḥ /gan/ luuchunna. Üsh bu deq'ala khin bersh (qu dünenaḥ a, ekhartaḥ a).
30:39: Ash ribana (sayakqarḥama) lush dolu bakhamakh hxuma (deqar, sovġat, qierg) nekhan bakhameḥ qiiyta – qüur dats i (riba) Dalla gergaḥ /yal khilartsa/. Ash, Delan yuḥ /gan/ luush lush dolu zakat (saġa, mülkhkha Delan düḥa desh dolu dika ġullaq) - /alssam qüur du Dalla gergaḥ/. Üsh (i desh bersh) bu shayna alssam yal khin yersh /ekhartaḥ/.
30:40: I Dela vu shu qöllinarg a‚ t'akqa shuna ritsq' dellarg a, t'akqa shu dolüytush verg a‚ t'akqa shu yukha dendesh verg a. Shun naq'ostekh (ash shayna delanash binacharakh) vuy sha ishttacharakh tsḥa a hxuma dalush verg? Ts'ena vu Iza /masso a qachambatsarekh/, leqa vu Iza tsara /Shetsa/ naq'ost latsarkh (tsara shayna delanash bu bokhush, letsnacharal).
30:41: Vonig (yoq'ana, tsamgarsh, un) guchudeli arengaḥ a‚ hxorda choḥ a nekhan küygasha dinarg (tsara desh dolu q'inosh) baḥana dolush‚ /Dala/ tsara dinchukh (vonekh) tsḥadersh ʿovshiytarḥama /tsärga dünenan dakhareḥ/ üsh yukhaberziytarḥama /niysachu novq'a/.
30:42: Aḥ āla /hxay paykhamar/: "Shu lela a lättakhula‚ ḥovsa‚ mukha khilla shul ḥalkharcheran (Nuḥin q'oman, ʿadiyn, samudiyn…) chakqe! Tsarakh duqakhbersh /Delatsa/ naq'ostiy letsnarsh ma khilla.
30:43: Aḥ yerzae ḥan yuḥ niysachu (ts'enachu) dine, shena Delera yukhaderzor (tsa doġush düsur) dotschu /q'emat/de dale ḥalkha. Otsu diynaḥ üsh beq'alur bu (yalsamane ġur bolchärgiy, zhözhakhate ġur bolchärgiy).
30:44: /Delan din/ kerstadinarg – tsunna shena düḥal khir du shen kerstanalla. Dika ʿamal yinarsh – tsara shäsh shayna /yalsamaneḥ hxusamash/ kechyiyr yu.
30:45: /I khir du/ iyman dillinchara a‚ dika ʿamalsh yinachara a Tsünan q'inkhetamakh yal etsarḥama. Bakq'alla a, Tsunna tsa beza tsatesharsh.
30:46: Tsünan ayatekh du Tso mekhash ekhiytar (doġa dale ḥalkha) dikachu qäʾnashtsa, shüga ʿovshiytarḥama a Shen q'inkhetamakh‚ kemanash leliytarḥama a Shen omratsa‚ shüga lakhiytarḥama a Tsünan komärshallekh‚ shu /Tsunna/ barkalle khiliytarḥama.
30:47: Okha bakhiytira ḥol ḥalkha a elchanash shayn-shayn q'ämnashka‚ üsh bäkhkira tsärga q'egginchu bilgalonashtsa‚ Okha ch'ir iytsira q'inosh dinachärgara. Tkhan deqar khilla muʾmanakhana ġo dar.
30:48: Dela vu Sha mekhash ḥöqüyturg‚ t'akqa tsara ḥeyo markhash‚ Tso üsh yarzhayo stiglaḥ Shena ma luu‚ Tso tsarakh keskash yo. T'akqa ḥuna go tsarna (markhiyn keskashna) yukq'ekhula sḥadolush dolu doġa. Tso iza qachiycha Shen lekh Shena luucharna – tsarna khazakheta /doġa deʾcha/,
30:49: tsul ḥalkha iza (doġa) shayna t'e dale üsh khilleḥ a dog dillina.
30:50: Ḥazhal Delan q'inkhetaman t'äḥenashka: mukha dendo Tso latta i dellachul t'äḥa?! Bakq'alla a, Iza bellarsh denbiyrig vu. Iza masso a hxumana t'eḥ nitsq' qochush verg vu.
30:51: Nagaḥ Okha bakhiytaḥ /tsarna zulame khir bolu/ mokh‚ t'akqa tsarna iza (lättaḥ qüush dolu yalta a, qiyolu hxuma a) mazhdella (daq'adella) gicha‚ tsul t'äḥa a üsh lättara ma bara barkalla tsa olush (Dala shayna ḥalkha della khillachu niʿmatashna a).
30:52: Bakq'alla a, ḥöga /hxay elcha/ khozüytalur dats bellachärga a‚ ḥöga khozüytalur dats q'orachärga a qayqar, üsh yukhabevlicha (aḥ sa ma gattade tsu mushrikasha ḥan qayqamna zhop tsadalarkh, tsarna baq'derg tsa kheza, bellacharna a, q'oracharna a tsakhazarkh terra).
30:53: Ḥo ma vats nisbiyr bolush bʿärsadotsursh shayn tilarkh. Aḥ khozüytur du bekq'a Tkhan ayatekh teshash bolcharna shäsh /Dalla/ müt'aḥ a bolchu.
30:54: Dela vu shu qöllinarg ledarallakh (t'adamakh)‚ t'akqa Tso khiliytina ledarallal t'äḥa nitsq' (q'onalla)‚ t'akqa khiliytina nitsq'al t'äḥa ledaralla (q'analla) a‚ q'özha chösh a. Tso qullu Shena luʾurg. Iza khuush verg a vu‚ nitsq' qochurg a vu.
30:55: Saḥt (q'ematde) hxöttinchu diynaḥ duynash buur bu q'inosh dinachara, shäsh soḥteḥ a tsa lättina, bokhush /dünenan dakhareḥ/. Ishtta ʿekhiyna khilla-q üsh /baq'dolchukh dünenaḥ/!
30:56: ʿilma a‚ iyman a shayna dellachara elira: "Shu disira /dünenaḥ/ Delan zhayni choḥ ma yazdarra yukha dendaran (q'emat) de qachchalts. Hxara du-q yukha dendaran de‚ amma shu tsa khuush khili-q!".
30:57: Otsu diynaḥ payda biyr bats zulam dinacharna shayn bekhkazlonasha‚ bekhkazadovlar a dökhur dats tsärga.
30:58: Okha daliyna nakhana hxoqu Q'urʾan choḥ masso a masal. Ḥo tsärga veʾcha a tsḥa ayat daḥash‚ er ma du tsateshachara: "Shu ma dats /baq'derg/ dokhiynarsh a ben".
30:59: Ishtta muhxar tukhu Dala tsakhuucheran degnashka.
30:60: Aḥ sobar de! Bakq'alla a, Delan vaʿda baq' du ḥuna. Ḥo atta ma khetiyla tsateshnacharna /sobarkh ma valalaḥ/.
31:2: Hxorsh shetsa ḥeq'alalla dolu zhaynin ayatash du,
31:3: shäsh niysa neq' a‚ q'inkhetam a khilla dolu dikanig decharna.
31:4: Üsh bu shäsh lamaz hxottosh (shäsh dan ma dezzara i desh)‚ zakat lush‚ ekhartakh (t'äkhḥarchu dakharkh) üsh /sheko yotstsush/ teshash bu.
31:5: Üsh shayn Qiosh-Qobuchüngarchu niysachu novq'aḥ bu. Üsh bu bakqiybiynash.
31:6: Nakhakh vu shegaḥ ʿilma a dotsush dässa (payda botsu) hxumanash (esharsh, illesh) ötsush verg Delan neq'akh /nakh/ tilorḥama. Siysazaboy sḥalotsu tso i /Delan neq'/. Üsh (i sannarsh) – tsarna siysaza dolu ʿazap du.
31:7: Shena Tkhan ayatash döshush, kuravälla dʿavirzi iza‚ shena üsh tsa khezcha sanna‚ shen lergashkaḥ q'oralla erg sanna. Aḥ tsunna qaʾ bakqa lazosh dolu ʿazap khirg khilartsa.
31:8: Bakq'alla a, iyman dillinarsh a‚ dika ʿamalsh yinarsh a – tsarna niʿmatiyn /yalsamanin/ boshmash khir yu.
31:9: Üsh tsu choḥ guttarenna büsur bu. Delan baq' khilla dolu vaʿda du iza. Iza veza verg a vu‚ Shegaḥ ḥeq'alalla derg a vu.
31:10: Tso qöllira stiglanash shuna gan tsḥa a bʿoġam botsush. Lättakhula ch'oġa lämnash düyġira Tso i (latta) shütsa tsa lestiyta‚ darzhiyra Tso tsigaḥ masso a diynat (sa dolu hxuma). Okha oḥadaiytira stiglara khi (doġa)‚ Okha qiiyra tsu t'eḥ (lättaḥ) hxor berkate shishsha /oramat/.
31:11: Iza Dala qöllinarg du. Hxintsa ash Söga gaytal‚ hxun qöllina Iza votscho. Hxaʾ‚ zulamkhoy bilggalchu tilarchoḥ bu-q!
31:12: Okha /ḥalkha/ dellera Luq'manna ḥeq'alalla: "Dalla shukur de(barkalla ala). Shukur decho – shena (paydenna) shukur desh du, kerstadesh verg - (shena desh du tso iza a). Dela ḥal dolush a vu‚ khastame a vu".
31:13: Ḥakhade! Luq'mana elira shen k'ante‚ sha tsunna ḥekhar desh: "Hxay san k'antalg‚ aḥ Delatsa naq'ost ma latsalaḥ. /Delatsa/ naq'ost latsar – /inzare/ dokqa zulam du".
31:14: Okha veset dina adamna, shen detsa-nenatsa dika khila, älla: shen nanas /kiyraḥ/ leliyna iza ġelʾyalarna t'e a ġellush‚ tsünan (beran) /nenakh daqorakh/ dakqar – shi sho düzcha du. Shukur de Suna a‚ ḥayn dena-nanna a. Suna t'e du /masseran a / dʿaderzar.
31:15: Nagaḥ sanna tsu shimmo q'aḥegaḥ, aḥ Sötsa naq'ost latsarna t'eḥ, ḥögaḥ tsunakh lätsna tsḥa a ʿilma (khuush hxuma a) dotsush, – t'akqa aḥ tsu shinga la ma doġalaḥ. Naq'ostalla de tsu shinna dünenaḥ dikachu hxumanna t'eḥ. Ḥo t'äḥavaza Suna t'evirzinchun novq'a. T'akqa Suna t'e du shun dʿaderzar. As khoüytur du shuna, ash /dünenaḥ/ lelosh khillarg.
31:16: "Hxay san k'antalg! I (vonig) khilaḥ a tsḥa zhimchu k'ollan bürtigal tarkhi (chkhari) choḥ, ya stiglanashkaḥ‚ ya lättaḥ – iza a guchudokqur du Dala. Bakq'alla a, Dela t'ekh qetame verg a vu‚ sov dika khuush verg a vu.
31:17: Hxay san k'antalg! Lamaz hxottade (dan ma dezzara de iza)‚ dikanig de ala /nakhe/‚ vochukh /nakh/ bukhatokha‚ sobare khila ḥayna t'edeanchunna. Iza ch'oġalla öshuchu ġullaqekh du.
31:18: /Kuralla esh, tsa veshash/ ḥayn yuḥ nakhakh dʿa ma erzae‚ ma lela lättakhula kurallitsa. Bakq'alla a, Dalla tsa veza masso a kurallash yesh verg a‚ dozallash desh verg a.
31:19: Yuq'anakq'ara khiliyta ḥayn bolar‚ az a laġde ḥayn. Äznekh uggar irchanig - viran ʿekhar (az) du".
31:20: Shuna tsa gina-te‚ Dala shayna müt'aḥ dar stiglanashkaḥ a‚ lättaḥ a mel derg‚ Tso shayna shortta della Shen niʿmatash: gush dersh a‚ ḥulameḥ dersh a? Nakhakh vu sha Delan ḥoq'eḥ q'üysush verg, shegaḥ tsḥa a ʿilma dotsush‚ niysa neq' botsush‚ nüre zhayna dotsush.
31:21: Shayga älcha: "T'äḥahxitta Dala dossiynachunna"‚ - tsara eli: "Hxan-hxa‚ tkho t'äḥahxüttu tkhuna tkhayn day shena t'eḥ kariynachunna". Ya shayt'a khilcha a shayga qoyqush zhözhakhatin ʿazape /t'akqa a hxüttu üsh shayn daysha lelinchu khartsonashna t'äḥa/?
31:22: Shen yuḥ Dalla müt'aḥ yesh verg, dika a khilla – tso sḥalätsna ch'oġa üyr. Dele yu ġullaqiyn chaqe.
31:23: Kerstanalla dinarg – ḥo singattame ma voyla tsünan kerstanallo. Tkhöga du tseran dʿaderzar‚ Okha düytsur du tsärga tsara dinarg. Bakq'alla a, Dela khuush vu degnashkaḥ derg.
31:24: Okha tsḥa k'ezzig payda ötsüytur bu tsärga, t'akqa irchachu ʿazape qachor bu üsh.
31:25: Aḥ tsärga khätticha‚ ḥan qöllina stiglanash a‚ latta a‚ älla‚ tsara er ma du: "Dala". Aḥ āla: "Khastam bu Dalla". Amma tsarakh duqakhbersh khuush bats.
31:26: Delan du stiglanashkaḥ a‚ lättaḥ a mel derg. Bakq'alla a, Dela – Iza vu ḥal dolush verg a‚ khastame verg a.
31:27: Lättaḥ mel dolchu dittakh q'olamash khilcha‚ tq'a (sheq'anan) hxordana shel t'äḥa qin vorhx hxordo /sheq'a a khilla/ ġo a dicha – qachalur ma datsara Delan deshnash. Bakq'alla a, Dela veza verg a‚ Shegaḥ ḥeq'alalla derg a vu.
31:28: Shu qollar a‚ shu yukhadendar a tsḥa sadaʿar sanna a ben dats /Dalla/. Bakq'alla a, Dela khezash verg a‚ gush verg a vu.
31:29: Ḥuna tsa khäa‚ Dala büysa denna chu yugu‚ de büysanna chu dügu (khiytsayo büsanan a, diynan a yokhalla, sheran khene ḥäzhzhina)‚ bolkh boytush bu malkhe a‚ batte a (Sha qöllincheran ḥashtash qochush desh): /tsarakh/ hxor (malkh a, butt a) dʿasalelash bu shen hxottiynachu khan t'eqachchalts‚ i Dela ash diyrig dika khuush khilar a /tsa khäa shuna/?
31:30: Iza du I Dela Sha baq'derg khilar‚ tq'a tsara, Iza a vitina, shega qoyqurg khartsderg khilar‚ Dela – Iza leqa verg a‚ vokqa verg a khilar a /du iza/.
31:31: Ḥuna tsa go kemanash, dʿasalelash hxorda chukhula Delan niʿmatatsa, Tso shüga gaytarḥama Shen ayatekh /tsḥadolu ayatash/. Bakq'alla a, tsu choḥ (kemanash lelareḥ) ayatash du masso a sobare volchunna a‚ shukur desh volchunna a.
31:32: Shäsh tulġeno, ʿindaġo sanna, ḥulbicha‚ üsh Dele qoyqu, Tsunna din a ts'andesh. Tso üsh /khi chüra/ lätta t'e k'elḥarbäkhcha, – tsarakh yuq'anakq'ara verg a vu (kerstanallina a‚ iymanna a yukq'eḥ)‚ /kerstanallina t'eḥ setstsarg a vu/. Tkhan ayatash kerstadiyr ma dats masso a teshnabekhk becho a‚ /Delan niʿmatashna/ inkarlo echo a ben.
31:33: Hxay nakh! Shu qeralash shayn Delakh‚ shu qeralash diynakh‚ da shen dözalkhochunna paydane khir votschu (tsunna dan tsḥa a ġo dotsush), dözalkho a shen dena tsḥanna hxumanna paydane khir votschu (shen dena dan tsḥa ġo dotsush). Bakq'alla a, Delan vaʿda - baq'erg yu. Shu ʿekha ma doyla dünenan dakharo‚ shu ʿekha ma doyla Delatsa ʿekhadalaro.
31:34: Bakq'alla a, Dalla gergaḥ du saḥtan ʿilma (q'ematde hxottar khaar)‚ Tso doüytu doġa‚ Tsunna khäa beran ts'a choḥ (nenan kiyraḥ) derg a. Tsḥanna a sina tsa khäa‚ hxun karadoġur du shena qana‚ tsḥanna a sina tsa khäa‚ mülkhachu lättaḥ sha liyr du. Bakq'alla a, Dela khuush verg a vu /q'aylakha derg‚ guchaḥ derg sanna/, dika devzash verg a vu.
32:2: /Hxoqu/ zhaynin (Q'urʾanan) dossadar, shena choḥ sheko yotstsush‚ ʿalamiyn Degara du.
32:3: Ya tsara (mushrikasha) olu: "Tso (Muḥammada) qöllina /khartsderg/ du iza"? Hxaʾ‚ iza baq'derg du ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchüngara ḥöga nakhana (Q'urayshashna a, qecharna a) qeram tasiytarḥama‚ ḥol ḥalkha shayga tsḥa a qeramcha veana votsucharna‚ üsh niysachu novq'a bevr batsara-te?
32:4: Dela vu Sha stiglanash a‚ latta a, tsu shinna yukq'eḥ mel derg a qöllinarg yalkh diynaḥ‚ t'akqa dʿanisvelira Iza ʿarsha t'eḥ. Ma vats shuna Iza votsurg tsḥa a doladiyrig a‚ tsḥa a ġodakqarkho a - ash oyla tsa yo-te?
32:5: Tso /derrige a/ ġullaqashna t'eḥ urkhalla do stiglara lätta t'e‚ t'akqa üsh (ġullaqash) Tsunna t'e yukha ḥalaqochu /tsḥana/ diynaḥ‚ shen baram ezar sho dolush ash (admasha) dagardechu kepara.
32:6: Iza vu ḥulameḥ derg a, guchaḥ derg a khuush verg. Veza verg a‚ q'inkhetame verg a /vu Iza/.
32:7: Iza vu Sha mel qöllinarg isbäḥa yina, adam qolla volavella Iza popparakh.
32:8: T'akqa tsünan (Ẳdaman) t'äḥe khiliytira Tso ladam botschu (tsḥa k'ezzigchu) khinan t'adamakh.
32:9: T'akqa Tso iza nisvira (hxor mezhe shen-shenan mette a hxottosh)‚ Tso Shen sikh /sa/ dillira tsu (Ẳdaman deġa) chu, Tso delira shuna lersa a‚ bʿärsa a‚ degnash a. Ma k'ezzig du-q ash shukur diyrig!
32:10: Tsara (mushrikasha) elira: "Tkho daycha lätta choḥ‚ tkho kerlachu qollareḥ khir duy (yukhadendiyr duy)?" Hxaʾ‚ üsh shayn Qiosh-Qobuchüntsa tsḥänaqetarkh tsa tesha.
32:11: Aḥ āla /hxay Muḥammad, otsu mushrikashka/: "Dolüytur du shu sa etsaran maliko‚ sha shuna t'e hxottina dolchu‚ t'akqa shayn Qiosh-Qobuchunna t'e shu dʿaderzor du.
32:12: Ḥuna gush belḥara i q'inosh dinarsh shayn kortosh oḥataʿiyna shayn Qiosh-Qobuchunna ḥalkhaḥ /olush/: "Tkhan Qiosh-qoburg‚ gina tkhuna‚ khezna tkhuna‚ yukhaderzadeḥ tkho /dünen chu/ – dika ʿamal yiyr yara okha‚ tkho /hxintsa/, sheko yotstsush, teshna du".
32:13: Tkhayna liʾneḥara, Okha lur bara hxor sinna shen niysa neq'‚ delaḥ a, baq'khili-q Sögara dosh: "Yuzaza yutur ma yats As zhözhakhati zhinekh a, nakhakh a - /tsarakh Dalla ʿesa khillacharakh/ massarakh a".
32:14: ʿovsha /ʿazap/ hxoqu shayn /q'emat/ denna düḥalqetar ash ditsdarna - /takhana/ Okha shu a ditsdina. ʿovsha guttarenan ʿazap shäsh /dünenaḥ/ lelosh khillarsh baḥaneḥ.
32:15: Bakq'alla a, teshash bu Tkhan ayatekh, shayna üsh dagadaiyticha, suzhude ögush bersh‚ shayn Qiosh-Qobuchunna khastam bartsa tasbiḥ desh bersh‚ shäsh kura a tsa bovlush.
32:16: Tseran /iyman dillincheran doġmiyn/ aġonash iyalo /büyshachu/ mettanashkara‚ shayn Qiosh-Qobuchünga qoyqu tsara (Tsünan ʿazapakh) qerartsa a‚ (Tsünan q'inkhetame) dogdakhartsa a‚ Okha shayna dellachu rits'q'ekh /dikachu aġora/ kharzhash yo tsara.
32:17: Tsa khäa tsḥanna sinna‚ hxun yu shayna (iyman dillincharna) ḥulyina bʿärgashna ezacharakh shäsh /dünenaḥ/ yina khillachu /dikachu/ ʿamalshna düḥal.
32:18: Tq'a muʾma stag khilla pesiq' stagakh tera? Tsḥaterra bats üsh /Dalla gergaḥ/!
32:19: Tq'a iyman dillinarsh a‚ dika ʿamalsh yinarsh a – tsarna t'etovzhiylin boshmash yu‚ ḥeshana sanna kechyina yolu tsara yina khilla ʿamalsh baḥaneḥ.
32:20: Tq'a pesiq' khillarsh a – tseran t'etovzhiyla /zhözhakhatin/ ts'e yu. Tsarna tsu chüra arabovla mel lii a, – tsu chu yukhaberzor bu üsh‚ tsärga er du: "ʿovsha shayna ts'eran ʿazap‚ shäsh i (ʿazap) khartsdesh khilla dolu".
32:21: Okha ʿovshiytur ma du tsärga /dünenan/ dayn ʿazap /ekhartan/ dokqachu ʿazapal ḥalkha, yukhabörzur batsara-te üsh /q'inosh dechüra/.
32:22: Tq'a mila vu t'ekh zulame shen Qiosh-Qobuchun ayatash shena dagadaiytinchul t'äḥa a tsarakh dʿavörzush volchul? Bakq'alla a, Tkho q'inosh dinachärgara beqam ötsur bersh ma du.
32:23: Okha dellera Musaga zhayna (Tavrat) – ḥo ma khilalaḥ shekoneḥ /ḥo/ tsüntsa tsḥänaqetarkh. Okha khiliytira tsunakh (Tavratakh) niysa neq' Israilan k'entashna.
32:24: Okha khiliytira tsarakh (Israilan k'entekh) küygalkhoy (ḥäkamash)‚ Tkhan omratsa /qibolu nakh/ nisbesh bolu, /otsu darzhe üsh qechira/ shäsh sobare a, Tkhan ayatekh ch'oġa teshash khilarna.
32:25: Bakq'alla a, ḥan Qiosh-Qobucho q'astor du tsarna yukq'eḥ q'ematdiynaḥ tseran shegaḥ khilpalo khillarg.
32:26: Tq'a Okha tsaral ḥalkha hxallakyina t'ekh duqa t'äḥenash khilaro a nis tsa bo-te üsh niysachu novq'a? Üsh (tsa teshash bersh) dʿasalelash ma bu tseran /yisina yolchu/ ġishloshkakhula! Bakq'alla a, tsu choḥ /Tkho baq'khilaran/ delilash du-q! Tsarna tsa kheza-te?
32:27: Tsarna tsa gina-te Okha dʿalollu khi (doġa a doy) /daq'adellachu/ lätta t'e‚ tsüntsa (doġantsa) yalta aradolüytu (qiado) Okha – tsunakh ma duu tseran bezhnasha a‚ tsara shäsh a?! Tsarna tsa go-te?
32:28: Tsara (din khartsdechara) olu: "Matsa khir bu /shuna/ tolam /tkhuna t'eḥ/, shu baq'lüysh khilleḥ?"
32:29: Aḥ āla: "Tolaman diynaḥ payda biyr bats tsateshacharna tseran iymano‚ üsh t'äḥa a tottur bats" /tōba dan/.
32:30: Dʿaverza tsarakh‚ ḥözhush ʿelaḥ‚ üsh bu ḥuna ḥözhush ʿesh.
33:1: Hxay paykhamar! Delakh qeralaḥ‚ ḥo müt'aḥ ma khilalaḥ kerstanashna a‚ munepiq'ashna a. Bakq'alla a, Dela khili khuush verg a‚ ḥukma /niysa/ desh verg a.
33:2: Ḥo t'äḥahxotta ḥayga väḥitsa ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchüngara doġuchunna. Bakq'alla a, Dela khili ash diyrig sov dika khuush.
33:3: Ḥo Dalla t'e tovzha– qacho yu /ḥuna/ Dela Shegaḥ /errig/ t'etovzhiyla erg khilar.
33:4: Tsa dina Dala tsḥanna a stagana shi dog tsünan kiyraḥ‚ tsa khiliytina Tso shun zudarekh‚ ash shayga shun bakq'ash shayn nanoyn bakq'ashka tera kheta‚ älla bolchu‚ shun nanoy‚ ash dolabäkhnachu berekh shuna k'entiy tsa khiliytina Tso. Iza shun dosh du shun baganashtsa /olush dolu/. Dala olu baq'derg‚ Tso nisvo niysachu novq'a.
33:5: Shayn dayshka (dayn ts'erashtsa) qayqa tsärga – iza du niysakhderg Dalla gergaḥ. Shuna tseran day tsa bovzaḥ, – shun vezhariy a bu üsh dineḥ‚ shun dottaġiy a bu. Shuna q'a dats shu shegaḥ ġalatdällachüngaḥ‚ ash dagalätsnachüngaḥ ben. Khili Dela t'ekh gechdesh verg a‚ q'inkhetame verg a.
33:6: Paykhamar tame vu muʾma nakhana shayl a‚ tsünan zudariy tseran nanoy bu. Gergarnash tsḥabersh vuqaral tame bu Delan zhaynaḥ /qechu/ muʾma nakhal a‚ hxizhar dikhkincharal a‚ ash shayn dottaġashna dikanig desh delaḥ ben. Khili iza zhaynaḥ dʿayazdella.
33:7: Okha sḥaiytsira paykhamarashkara veset (duynatsa ch'aġo a yesh)‚ ḥögara a‚ Nuḥera a‚ Ibrahximera a‚ Musagara a‚ Maryaman k'antera ʿiysagara a. Okha sḥaiytsira tsärgara ch'oġa veset.
33:8: Tso (Dala) bartkhattarḥama baq'lüychärga shayn baq'lerakh. Kechdina Tso kerstanashna lazosh dolu ʿazap.
33:9: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Ash dagadaiyta shayna khilla Delan niʿmat – shuna deara /malikiyn/ eskar – Okha bakhiytira tsarna t'e mokh a‚ eskar a‚ shuna sha gush dotsu. Khilira Dela ash diyrig gush verg.
33:10: Üsh bäkhkira shuna t'e shun t'ekhula a‚ shun bukhakhula a – /shun/ bʿärgash ḥen t'e bevlira‚ degnash q'amq'argashka qechira‚ shuna mottalora Delakh lätsna tsḥatstsa /niysa dotsu/ mottadalarsh.
33:11: Tsigaḥ ziyra muʾma nakh‚ /tseran degnash qeradella/ ch'oġa tokhadelira.
33:12: /Aḥ dagadaiyta/ munepiq'asha a‚ shayn degnashkaḥ tsamgar yolchara a elira: "Dala a‚ Tsünan elchano a vaytsa yina vaʿda ʿekhor ben ma dats".
33:13: /Aḥ ḥakhade, hxay Muḥammad/: tsarakh tsḥana tobano elira: "Hxay Yasriban bakharkhoy! Shuna latta mettig yats /t'om ban/‚ yukhaderza". Tsarakh tsḥa qierg (toba) paykhamare /ts'aḥ yisa/ purba dekha yolaelira‚ olush: "Tkhan ts'enosh dässa du". Dässa ma dats üsh – tsarna luurg bovdar du-q /t'am t'era/.
33:14: Tsarna chubakhkiyticha tsünan (ġalin) yistoshkakhula‚ t'akqa tsärga pitana dekhcha, – i lur ma dara ḥuna tsara‚ tsḥa k'ezzig ḥözhush lättar a ma batsara ḥuna üsh.
33:15: Üsh ḥalkha a khilira Delatsa vaʿda yesh‚ shäsh dovdur dats /t'am t'era/‚ bokhush. Khili Delan vaʿda zhop dökhush.
33:16: Aḥ āla: "Payda biyr bats shuna dovdaro shu dalarkh ya dayarkh devdicha, k'ezzig ben bakham khir bats shuna t'akqa a".
33:17: Aḥ āla: "Mila vu iza sha Delakh shu lardiyr verg, Tsunna shuna tsḥa zen (khila) liʾcha‚ ya Tsunna shuna tsḥa q'inkhetam (khila) liʾcha? Tsarna karor ma vats shayna Dela votsurg tsḥa a doladiyrig a‚ tsḥa a ġöncha a".
33:18: Bevza Dalla shukh novq'arlo esh bersh /nakh ġazote tsa bokhüytush/‚ shayn vezharshka olush bersh: "Sḥadüyla tkho dolchu /ma ġo ġazote/!" Tsḥa k'ezzig ben tsa bira tsara (munepiq'asha shütsa tsḥäna) t'om (ġazot),
33:19: /iza a/ shuna /bezamtsiy, doglazartsiy/ bʿärmetsig khülush a ben. Qeram beʾcha, ḥuna gira üsh ḥöga ḥözhush shayn bʿärgash ḥiyzash, vala khorsha eanarg sanna. Qeram dʿabälcha, shukh cheqdokhur du tsara ch'iran mettanash dikachunna bʿärmetsig khilla. Üsh iyman dillina bats ḥuna‚ Dala dʿayoyʾu ḥuna tseran ʿamalash. Iza khilira Dalla atta.
33:20: Tsarna möttu i tobanash dʿa tsa yakhna. I tobanash eʾcha, tsarna läa qelkhash lelachu ʿärbashna yukq'eḥ dʿasalelarsh khila‚ shun khabarsh khöttush. Shuna yukq'eḥ khilcha a, k'ezzig ben t'om bira batsara tsara.
33:21: Bakq'alla a, shuna khilira Delan elchaneḥ khaza masal - /shukh/ Dele a‚ t'äḥarchu diyne a dog dokhush volchunna a‚ dukqa a Dela ḥekhosh volchunna a.
33:22: Muʾma nakha, shayna i /t'om ban yoġu kerstaniyn/ tobanash gicha‚ elira: "Hxara yu Dala a‚ Tsünan elchano a vaytsa yina vaʿda‚ baq'liyna Dela a‚ Tsünan elcha a". /Tsu ġullaqo/ üsh alsam tsa bokhu iymantsa a‚ müt'aḥ khilartsa a ben.
33:23: Muʾma nakhakh tsḥa bozhariy bu shäsh baq'yina shayn Delatsa khilla yolu vaʿda‚ tsarakh shen ʿozhalla t'eqächnarg (vellarg) a vu‚ tsarakh /ġazoteḥ vala/ ḥözhush verg a vu‚ tsḥa a khiytsam tsa bina tsara /shayn Delatsa khillachu vaʿdin/
33:24: Dala yal yalarḥama baq'liynacharna shayn baq'lertsa‚ ʿazap darḥama munepiq'ashna, Shena laaḥ‚ ya gechdarḥama tsarna. Bakq'alla a, Dela khili gechdesh verg a‚ q'inkhetame verg a.
33:25: Dala yukhaberziyra tsateshnarsh shayn öġazallitsa‚ tsa qiira üsh dikachukh. Qacho khiliytira Dala muʾma nakhana t'amakh. Khili Dela nütsq'ala verg a‚ veza verg a.
33:26: /Dala/ oḥabossiyra zhaynin ohxlakh tsarna ġo dina khillarsh shayn ch'aġonashkara‚ Tso billira tseran degnashka qeram‚ tsḥabersh ash boyu‚ tsḥabersh ash yiysare lüytsu.
33:27: Tso irsana shuna delira tseran latta a‚ tseran ts'enosh a‚ tseran bakham a‚ /qin/ ash ḥeshna dotsu latta a. Khili Dela masso a hxumanna t'eḥ nitsq' bolush.
33:28: Hxay paykhamar! Aḥ āla ḥayn zudarshka: "Shu delaḥ dünenan dakhar dezash‚ tsünan khazalla a /ezash/‚ sḥadüyla – as yitinchu zudchunna doġurg lur du shuna‚ khazachu kepara parġatdokhur du shu.
33:29: Shu delaḥ vezash Dela a‚ Tsünan elcha a‚ t'äḥa khir yolu hxusam a (yalsamane), – Dala kechyina shukh dikanig decharna siylaḥ- yokqa yal.
33:30: Hxay paykhamaran zudariy! Shukh bilgala irchanig deanchunna – shozza alsam khir du tsunna ʿazap. Khili iza Dalla atta.
33:31: Shukh Dalla a‚ Tsünan elchanna a müt'aḥ khillarg a‚ dika ʿamal a yinarg – tsunna yal lur yu Okha shozza. Okha tsunna kechdina siylaḥ ritsq'.
33:32: Hxay paykhamaran zudariy! Shu dats zudarekh tsḥannakh a tera. Shu /Delakh/ qörush delaḥ, ma khila dashtsa k'eda /khiyrachu bozharshna/ – t'akqa shen dagchoḥ tsamgar yerg t'eḥiyzar vu‚ ash āla dika dosh.
33:33: Shayn ts'enoshkaḥ sovtsa‚ kech ma lo ḥalkhalera zhehxallin kechdalartsa. Lamaz a hxottade‚ zakat a lo‚ Dalla a‚ Tsünan elchanna a müt'aḥ khila. Bakq'alla a, Dalla läa, /hxay paykhamaran/ ts'iynan ohxla, shukh bökhu hxuma dʿadakqa a, shu ts'andan a ts'andartsa.
33:34: Dagadaiyta shayn ts'enoshkaḥ döshush dolu Delan ayatash a‚ ḥikmat a. Bakq'alla a, Dela khili dika qetash verg a‚ sov dika khuush verg a.
33:35: Bakq'alla a, busalba bozhariy a‚ busalba zudariy a‚ muʾma bozhariy a‚ muʾma zudariy a‚ /Delakh/ qörush bolu bozhariy a‚ /Delakh/ qörush bolu zudariy a‚ baq'lüysh bolu bozhariy a‚ baq'lüysh bolu zudariy a‚ sobare bolu bozhariy a‚ sobare bolu zudariy a‚ /Dalla/ müt'aḥ bolu bozhariy a‚ /Dalla/ müt'aḥ bolu zudariy a‚ saġa lush bolu bozhariy a‚ saġa lush bolu zudariy a‚ markha qobu bozhariy a‚ markha qobu zudariy a‚ shayn evḥaza yolu mettigash larʾesh bolu bozhariy a‚ zudariy a‚ dukqa a Dela ḥekhosh bolu bozhariy a‚ zudariy a – kechdina Dala tsarna gechdar a‚ siylaḥ-yokqa yal a.
33:36: Tsa khilla muʾma stagana‚ ya muʾma zudchunna, Dala a‚ Tsünan elchano a tsḥa ġullaq qochushdicha, shayn ġullaqakh /shayn dezarg/ kharzha baq'o. Dalla a‚ Tsünan elchanna a ʿesa verg tilavella bilgalchu tilartsa.
33:37: /Ḥazhal/ aḥ ma elira Dala a‚ aḥ a shen niʿmat dellachünga: "Ḥaygaḥ qaba ḥayn zuda‚ Delakh qera!" Aḥ ḥuldiyra ḥaygaḥ Dala guchudokqurg. Ḥo qörura nakhakh‚ tq'a Dela vuno a tam bolush vara ḥo Shekh qera. Zayda tsüntsa shen laam qochushbicha (tso iza yiticha, ʿiddat cheqdälcha)‚ Okha iza ḥuna yaliyra muʾma nakhana khalo tsa khiliytarḥama, shäsh day hxittinchu k'entiyn zudariy balo, tsara shayn tsärtsa dolu ġullaq cheqdäqicha (sharʿeḥ üsh biticha). Khili Delan ġullaq dina dälla.
33:38: Paykhamarna khalo khila megar dats Dala Shena t'e dillinchüngaḥ – Delan ʿadat /du iza/ ḥalkha bakhanchärgaḥ a khilla. Khili Delan ġullaq azalleḥ qochushkhilla.
33:39: Ishttanash bu üsh (ḥalkhabakhanarsh) shäsh Delan elchanalla qochushdina‚ Tsunakh qörush bolush‚ Dela votsucharakh tsḥannakh tsa qörush. Delatsa qacho khilla ḥesapdiyrig.
33:40: Tsa khilla Muḥammad shun bozharekh tsḥannan a da‚ delaḥ a Delan elcha a‚ paykhamariyn muhxar a du iza. Khili Dela masso a hxuma khuush verg.
33:41: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Ḥekhave Dela duqa ḥekhavartsa.
33:42: Tasbiḥ de Tsunna ʿüyranna a‚ süyranna a.
33:43: Iza vu shukh q'inkhetam besh verg‚ Tsünan malikash a /du shuna gechdar dökhush/‚ shu bodanashkara serlonga dakharḥama. Iza khili muʾma nakhakh q'inkhetam besh verg.
33:44: Tseran marshalla Tsunna düḥalqettachu diynaḥ – salam du. Tso kechyina tsarna siylaḥ yal.
33:45: Hxay paykhamar! Bakq'alla a, Okha vakhiytina ḥo tesh khilla‚ qaancha khilla‚ qeramcha khilla,
33:46: Dele qoyqush verg a khilla, Tsünan purbantsa‚ nüre chirq a khilla /vakhiytina ḥo/.
33:47: Aḥ qaʾ bakqa muʾma nakhe, tsarna Delera yokqa komärshalla yu älla.
33:48: Müt'aḥ ma khilalaḥ /Delakh/ tsateshacharna a‚ munepiq'ashna a‚ dita tseran /ḥuna desh dolu/ khalakhetarsh. Dalla t'e tovzha. Qacho yu /ḥuna/ Dela Shegaḥ /errig/ t'etovzhiyla erg khilar.
33:49: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Ash muʾma zudariy baliycha‚ t'akqa üsh biticha, shu tsarakh ḥaqadalale, shuna tsarna t'eḥ tsḥa ʿiddat dats, ash tergo yan dezash. Lo tsarna shayn payda etstsal hxuma‚ khazachu kepara bita üsh.
33:50: Hxay paykhamar! Okha ḥanal bina ḥuna ḥan zudariy‚ aḥ shayna makh bella bolu‚ ḥan ättu küyga doladinarsh ḥuna Dala hxonsana bellacharakh‚ ḥan den veshin mekhkariy a‚ ḥan den yishin mekhkariy a‚ ḥan nenan veshin mekhkariy a‚ ḥan nenan yishin mekhkariy a‚ shäsh ḥötsa hxizhar dina bolu; /qin mülkhkha/ muʾma zuda a /ḥanal yu ḥuna yalo/‚ tso sha paykhamarna dʿalaḥ‚ paykhamarna iza yalo a laaḥ‚ ekq'a ḥuna a /hxay paykhamar/ khülush qin muʾma nakhana yotsush. Tkhuna khii‚ hxun t'e dillina Okha tsarna shayn zudarshkaḥ‚ ättu küygasha doladinachärgaḥ a‚ ḥuna khalo tsa khiliytarḥama. Khili Dela gechdesh verg a‚ q'inkhetame verg a.
33:51: Aḥ t'äḥatottur yu ḥayna luurg tsarakh, ḥayna t'elotsur yu ḥayna luurg; ḥayna ezaḥ ayḥa /ḥalkha/ yustakh yakqinacharakh – q'a dats ḥuna /ḥo tsunna t'evakharkh/. Iza gergakh du tseran bʿärgash buzarna‚ üsh singattame tsakhilarna /i Delera duy khiʾcha/‚ üsh rezakhilarna a aḥa shayna dellachukh – üsh masso a. Dalla khäa shun degnashkaḥ derg. Khili Dela khuush verg a‚ /masso a hxuma shen-shena mettige dʿanisdesh verg a/, /q'inoshna düḥal taʿzar dareḥ/ sikh tsa lush verg a.
33:52: Ḥanal bats ḥuna zudariy tsaral sov a‚ üsh khiytsar a /qechu/ zudarekh‚ tseran khazallo ḥo tsetsvakqaḥ a‚ ḥan ättu küygo doladinarsh botsursh. Khili Dela masso a hxumanna t'eḥ tergo yesh verg.
33:53: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Paykhamaran ts'enoshna chu ma ġolash, shayna purba delcha ben, qacha baa, /t'akqa a duqa ḥalkha ma ġolash/ i /qacha/ kechbina balare ḥözhush tsa ʿan. Mukhkha delaḥ a, shayga qayqicha, – chu ġo. Shäsh hxuma yiʾcha, dʿasadarzha‚ khabarna yuq'a a tsa dölkhush. Bakq'alla a, shun ishtta khilaro paykhamarna novq'arlo yo‚ tsunna shukh eḥ kheta /shüga ala/. Dalla eḥ tsa kheta baq'dolchukh. Ash tsärga (elchan zudarshka) tsḥa hxuma ekhaḥ‚ ash ekha i tsärga kirḥana deḥakhula. Iza vuno a ts'ena du shun degnashna a‚ tseran degnashna a. Shuna megara dats Delan elchanna novq'arlo yan a‚ tsünan zudariy balaban a tsul t'äḥa tsq'ana tsq'a a. Bakq'alla a, iza khili Dalla gergaḥ deza-dokqanig (q'a).
33:54: Ash guchudakqaḥ a tsḥa hxuma‚ ya ḥuldaḥ i – bakq'alla a, Dela khili masso a hxuma khuush verg.
33:55: Q'a dats tsarna (zudarshna‚ qochchush ḥul tsa belcha) shayn dayshna‚ shayn k'entashna‚ shayn vezharshna‚ shayn vezhariyn k'entashna‚ shayn yizhariyn k'entashna‚ shayn /ḥalkha bolchu/ zudarshna‚ shayn ättu küygasha doladinacharna ḥalkhaḥ. Delakh qeralash /shu zudariy – khiyrachu bozharshna guchudovlareḥ/. Bakq'alla a, Dela khili masso a hxumanna t'eḥ tesh.
33:56: Bakq'alla a, Dala a‚ Tsünan malikasha a salot düllu paykhamarna. Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Asha a dilla tsunna salot‚ marshalla a khatta tsünga /khaza/ salam dalartsa.
33:57: Bakq'alla a, Dalla a‚ Tsünan elchanna a khalakhötüytush bersh – Dala neʿalt älla tsarna dünenaḥ a‚ ekhartaḥ a‚ kechdina tsarna siysaza ʿazap.
33:58: Muʾma bozharshna a‚ muʾma zudarshna a, tsärgara dälla hxumma a dotstsusheḥ, khalakhötüytush bersh – tsara (shayna t'eḥ) dʿaḥo dokqa eladita a‚ bilgala q'a a.
33:59: Hxay paykhamar! Āla ḥayn zudarshka a‚ ḥayn mekhkarshka a‚ muʾma nekhan zudarshka a, shayna t'e shayn oba (pardo) uziyla tsara. Iza gergakh du üsh bovzarna a‚ tsarna khalakhetar tsadarna a. Khili Dela gechdesh verg a‚ q'inkhetame verg a.
33:60: Munepiq'ash a‚ shayn degnashkaḥ tsamgar yersh a‚ Madinateḥ eladitanash darzhosh bersh a tsa sovtsaḥ, Okha hxottor ma vu ḥo tsarna t'e. T'akqa ḥan lulaḥ üsh tsigaḥ ʿiyr ma bats k'ezzig ben.
33:61: Shayna neʿalt khillarsh /bu üsh/. Michchaḥ khilaḥ a, sḥalötsur ma bu üsh‚ boyur ma bu (q'iza) bayartsa.
33:62: Delan sunnat du iza‚ ḥalkha dʿabakhanchärgaḥ a lella. Ḥuna karanne a karor ma bats Delan sunnatana khiytsam.
33:63: Ḥöga khöttu nakha saḥtakh lätsna. Aḥ āla: "Tsünan ʿilma Dalla gergaḥ du". Sten khoüytu ḥöga? – i saḥt-m gergadeana khila a mega.
33:64: Bakq'alla a, Dala neʿalt älla tsateshacharna‚ Tso kechyina tsarna zhözhakhati.
33:65: Üsh lättar bu tsu choḥ guttar. Tsarna karor vats tsḥa a doladiyrig a‚ tsḥa a ġöncha a.
33:66: Otsu diynaḥ shayn yakhḥash ts'erga erzosh, tsara er ma du: "Vay khilla khilleḥara Dalla müt'aḥ‚ elchanna müt'aḥ!"
33:67: Tsara er du: "Tkho Qiosh-Qoburg‚ tkho müt'aḥ khili tkhan elashna a‚ tkhan tḥamdashna a. Tsara tiliy tkho /niysachu/ neq'akh.
33:68: Tkhan Qiosh-Qoburg‚ lōlaḥ tsarna shozza ʿazap‚ dokqa neʿalt alalaḥ tsarna".
33:69: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Shu ma khilalash Musana khalakhetar dinacharakh tera. Dala ts'anvira iza tsara ällachukh. Iza khilira Dalla gergaḥ lorush verg.
33:70: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Delakh qeralash‚ niysa dosh alalash.
33:71: Tso dika khülüytur yu shun ʿamalsh‚ gechdiyr du shuna shun q'inosh. Dalla a‚ Tsünan elchanna a müt'aḥ verg – tso bäkqina bokqa tolam.
33:72: Okha ḥalkhadillira amanat stigalshna a‚ lättana a‚ lämnashna a – üsh düḥal khilira i dʿadaḥa‚ üsh qiyrira tsunakh‚ i dʿadäḥira adamo. Bakq'alla a, iza khili-q t'ekh zulame verg a‚ t'ekh tsa khuush verg a.
33:73: (I dira) Dala ʿazap darḥama munepiq' bozharshna a‚ munepiq' zudarshna a‚ shirk dinchu bozharshna a‚ shirk dinchu zudarshna a‚ Dala tōba q'obaldarḥama muʾma bozhariyn a‚ muʾma zudariyn a. Khili Dela gechdesh verg a‚ q'inkhetame verg a.
34:1: Khastam bu Dalla‚ Shena stigalashkaḥ a‚ lättaḥ a mel derg dolchu‚ Shena khastam bolchunna ekhartaḥ a. Iza Shegaḥ ḥeq'alalla derg a vu, sov dika khuush verg a vu.
34:2: Tsunna khäa lattana chudulush derg a‚ otsunakh sḥadolush derg a‚ stigalara oḥadoġush derg a‚ tsiga irkhdolush derg a. Iza q'inkhetame verg a vu‚ gechdesh verg a vu.
34:3: Tsateshachara elira: "Saḥt (q'ematde) vayna doġur a dats". Aḥ āla /hxay Muḥammad/: "Hxaʾ‚ san Qiosh-Qobuchukh duy bou as‚ q'aylakha derg khuush volchu: doġur dolush ma du iza shuna". Tsunakh (Delakh) q'aylader dats misq'alan zarrattal hxuma stigalshkaḥ a‚ lättaḥ a‚ tsul melkho a zhimanig a, melkho a dokqanig a‚ bilgalchu zhayni choḥ dolush ben
34:4: iyman dillincharna‚ dika ʿamalsh yinacharna yal yalarḥama. Üsh bu shayna gechdar a‚ siylaḥ ritsq' a khir dersh.
34:5: Tkhan ayatash talkho q'aḥögush bersh, /üsh/ ġeldan ġertash – tsarna ʿazap du lazosh dolchu taʿzarkh.
34:6: Shayna ʿilma dellacharna khäa ḥuna i ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchüngara dössinarg baq'derg duyla‚ sha /nakh/ nisbesh dolu veza volchun‚ khastame volchun (Delan) novq'a.
34:7: Tsateshnachara elira: "Okha nisdoy shu tsḥana stagana t'e‚ shüga sha düytsush volchu‚ shu errig kiysak khilla /keshniy choḥ/ dakhkadelcha, shu kerlachu qollar choḥ khir du /yukha dendiyr du/‚ bokhush volchu?
34:8: Dalla t'e khartsderg qöllina tso‚ ya tsüntsa zhinash du". Hxaʾ‚ ekhartakh tsa teshash bersh ʿazapa choḥ a‚ genarchu tilar choḥ a ma bu.
34:9: Tsarna tsa gina te shayna ḥalkhaḥ a, t'eḥaḥ a mel derg: stigal (shayna go bina yolu), latta (shena t'eḥ shäsh dekhash dolu – Delan vozallakh oyla yar ḥama)? Tkhuna liʾneḥara, Okha lätte khudüytur bara üsh‚ ya stigalara kiysakash egor yara tsarna t'e. Bakq'alla a, tsu choḥ delil ma du /tobadartsa Dalla / t'evörzush volchu lena.
34:10: Okha dellera Davudana Tkhaygara niʿmat‚ /elira/: "Hxay lämnash! Tasbiḥ de tsüntsa tsḥäna‚ /asha a/ olkhazarsh". Okha k'addira tsunna echig:
34:11: "ġäġnash de‚ t'e yusta /üsh/. Dikanig delash. Bakq'alla a, So ash diyrig gush vu".
34:12: Suleymanna a /müt'aḥ bira Okha/ mokh‚ tsünan ʿüyrenan neq' butt bolush‚ tsünan süyrenan neq' a butt bolush. Okha laliyra tsunna ts'esta (yez), /khin/ ḥosta sanna dʿaökhush. Zhinekh du shäsh tsunna ḥalkha bolkh besh dersh tsünan Qiosh-Qobuchun purbantsa. Tsarakh Tkhan omranakh dʿatillachärga ʿavshüytur du Okha zhözhakhatin ʿazapakh /ʿazap/.
34:13: Tsara esh tsunna‚ tsunna luu miḥrabash‚ sürtash a‚ kedash, ʿämnash sanna (bakqiy chu khi guldan)‚ ch'oġa ch'aġbina yaynash a. Barkalla alartsa ʿamal elash /Tkhuna/‚ hxay Davudan dözal. Ma k'ezzig bu-q San leykh barkalla olush bersh!
34:14: Okha tsunna (Suleymanna) ʿozhalla t'ehxottiycha, i valarna t'e üsh nis tsa bira tsḥana lättan diynato ben‚ sha tsünan ʿasa yuush. Iza /vella/ oḥavözhcha, bilgaldelira zhinashna: shayna q'ayle khuush khilleḥara, lättarg tsakhilar shäsh siysazchu ʿazapeḥ.
34:15: Khilira sabaashna shayn ġishloshkaḥ delil: shi besh - ättu aġorḥara a‚ ärru aġorḥara a. Daa shayn Qiosh-Qobuchun ritsq'ekh‚ barkalla āla Tsunna (shukur de Dalla)! Toqe mokhk a‚ gechdesh volu Qiosh-Qoburg /khilira tsarna/.
34:16: Dʿabevlira üsh /Dalla barkalla alarkh/‚ Okha yossiyra tsarna t'e dukqa a ʿovrash‚ tseran shina beshan metta khiliytira shi besh, q'äḥa stömash bolush‚ aslikh a‚ /tsḥatstsa/ hxuma k'ezzig sidrekh a yolush.
34:17: I beqam bira Okha tsarna, üsh tsa teshash khilarna. Okha /ishtta/ beqam boy tsateshacharna ben?
34:18: Tsarna (Sabaan) yukq'eḥ a‚ Okha shayna choḥ deq'alyina khillachu (Shaman) yartashna yukq'eḥ a Okha yira gush yolu yartash‚ tsarna choḥ q'astiyra neq': "Lela tsarna chukhula büysanashkaḥ a‚ denoshkaḥ a, qeram botsush!"
34:19: Tsara elira: "Tkhan Qiosh-Qoburg‚ gena khiliytalaḥ tkhan qerstash lelar". Tsara zulam dira shayna‚ Okha khiliytira tsarakh /nakhana/ diytsarsh‚ massanḥa a dʿasabärzhira üsh. Bakq'alla a, tsu choḥ delilash ma du masso a sobare volchunna a‚ khama bechunna a.
34:20: Ibliso baq'daytira tsärga shena mötturg‚ üsh tsunna t'äḥahxittira, muʾma nakhakh tsḥa toba yotsurg.
34:21: Ma yatsara tsunna tsarna t'eḥ tsḥa a baq'o‚ dekq'a Tkhuna khaarḥama‚ mila vu ekhartakh teshash tsunakh shekoneḥ khillacharakh. Ḥan Qiosh-Qoburg masso a hxumanna lardarkho vu.
34:22: Aḥ āla: "Qayqa shäsh, Allahx vitina, /delanash bu/ möttush khillachärga". Tsara dola ma tsa do misq'alan zarrattal /hxumanna/ stigalshkaḥ a‚ lättaḥ a. Ma dats tsarna (tsara shayn delanash bu bokhucharna) tsu shinna choḥ tsḥa a /Allahxatsa/ naq'ostalla‚ ma vats Tsunna tsarakh tsḥa a ġöncha /öshush/.
34:23: Payda biyr bats ġodakqaro Tsunna gergaḥ Tso shena purba dellachunna ben.
