Shayn degnashkara qeram dʿabäkqicha‚ tsara (shayna shapaʿat dan baq'o ella khilla dolchu malikasha a, paykhamarasha a) elira /vovshashka/: "Hxun elira shun Qiosh-Qobucho /shapaʿat daran ḥoq'eḥ/?" Tsara elira: "Baq'derg. Iza leqa a‚ vokqa a verg vu".
34:24: Aḥ āla /tsärga, hxay Muḥammad/: "Mila vu shuna ritsq' lush verg stigalshkara a‚ lättara a?" Aḥ āla: " Allahx-Dela vu". Bakq'alla a, Tkho ya shu niysachu novq'aḥ du ya bilgalchu tilar choḥ du?!".
34:25: Aḥ āla: "Shüga khottur dats okha dinchu q'ikh‚ tkhöga khottur dats ash desh dolchukh".
34:26: Aḥ āla: "Tsḥänatukhur du vay vayn Qiosh-Qobucho /q'ematdiynaḥ/ t'akqa q'astor du Tso vayna yukq'eḥ baq'dolchüntsa‚ Iza khuush volu t'ekh dika q'astosh verg vu".
34:27: Aḥ āla: "Ash gayta suna shäsh Tsunakh dʿatökhna naq'ostiy". Hxan-hxa! Iza vu Sha veza volu‚ Shegaḥ ḥeq'alalla dolu Dela.
34:28: Okha vakhiytina ma vats ḥo /hxay Muḥammad/ masso a nakhe qaʾ baḥash verg a‚ qeramcha a khilla ben‚ delaḥ a nakhakh duqakhbolcharna tsa khäa-q.
34:29: Tsara olu: "Matsa /qochush/ khir yu i vaʿda, shu baq'lüysh khilleḥ?"
34:30: Aḥ āla: "Shuna khan tökhna de du‚ tsunakh tsḥa saḥt t'äḥadüsur a dats shu‚ ḥalkhadevr a dats".
34:31: Tsateshnachara elira: "Teshane a teshar ma dats tkho hxokqu Q'urʾanakh a‚ tsul ḥalkha khillachukh a". Ḥuna gush belaḥara i zulamkhoy shayn Qiosh-Qobuchunna ḥalkha hxittiyna‚ tsarakh tsḥabersh vuqärga dosh yukhaderzadesh‚ shäsh zäʿap khillachara kuralla esh khillachärga olush: "Shu tsa khilleḥara, tkhokh muʾma nakh khilla khir ma bara".
34:32: Shäsh kuralla esh khillachara elira zäʿap khillachärga: "Okha dʿatiliyra shu /niysachu/ neq'akh i shüga beʾnachul t'äḥa? Hxaʾ‚ shu shäsh khilira q'inosh desh".
34:33: Shäsh zäʿap khillachara elira kuralla esh khillachärga: "Hxaʾ‚ büysanan a‚ diynan a mekarlontsa ash tkhuna omra ma dora tkho Delakh tsateshar‚ Okha Tsüntsa qibersh nisbar". Tsara ḥuldira dokhkobovlar, shayna ʿazap gicha. Okha burzhalsh-ġomatash tüykhira tsa teshash khillacheran logekh. Shäsh desh khillachüntsa ben beqam khir buy tsarna?
34:34: Okha tsa vakhiytira yurtaḥ tsḥa a qeramcha, tsünan (yurtan) ḥaldolchara olush ben: "Bakq'alla a, tkho shu shaytsa daiytinchunna /tsa teshash/ kersta du-q".
34:35: Tsara olura: "Tkho, melkho a, alsam du bakhamtsa a‚ dözaltsa a‚ tkhuna ʿazap diyr a dats".
34:36: Aḥ āla /tsärga, hxay elcha/: "Bakq'alla a, san Qiosh-Qobucho ritsq' darzhado Shena luuchunna /duqa lush/‚ baram a bo /k'ezzig lush/‚ delaḥ a nakhakh duqakhbolcharna tsa khäa-q."
34:37: Shun bakham a‚ shun dözal a ma bats shu Tkhuna gergadalosh bersh (k'ez-k'ezzig) gergadalortsa – sha iyman dillinarg a‚ dika ʿamal yinarg a ben. Üsh bu shayna masiyttazza alsam (ittanera vorhxbʿena t'eqachchalts, tsul a sov) yal khir yersh shäsh yinchu ʿamalshtsa‚ üsh /khir/ bu /yalsamanin/ hxusamashkaḥ, qeram botsush.
34:38: Tkhan ayatash /dokhoreḥ/ q'aḥögush bersh, shäsh /üsh/ ġorasiza diyr du möttush, – üsh ʿazap choḥ lattor ma bu.
34:39: Aḥ āla /nakhe, hxay elcha/: "Bakq'alla a, san Qiosh-Qobucho darzhado /shortta/ ritsq' Shen lekh Shen luuchunna‚ Tso tsunna baram a bo /k'ezzig lush/". Ash hxumanakh saġina ellarg Tso mettahxottor yu. Iza ritsq' lucharekh uggar dikanig vu.
34:40: Tsu /q'emat/diynaḥ Tso gulbiyr bu üsh berrige a‚ t'akqa er du malikashka: "Hxorsh bu i shuna ʿibadat desh khillarsh?"
34:41: Tsara elira: "Vonakh ts'ena vu ḥo‚ Ḥo vu-q tkhan vali (doladiyrig), üsh botsush. Hxaʾ‚ üsh khilira zhinashna ʿibadat desh‚ tsarakh duqakhbersh tsarna iyman dillina bu".
34:42: Takhana shukh tsḥabolcheran dolaḥ bats vuqarna payda a‚ zen a. Okha er du zulam dinachärga: "ʿovsha shayna ts'eran ʿazap, ash sha khartsdesh khilla dolu".
34:43: Shayna t'eḥ Tkhan bilgala dolu ayatash döshush, tsara elira: "Hxara ma vats shu shun day shena ʿibadat desh khillachukh dʿatilo luush volu stag ben". Tsara elira /yukha a/: "Tso sha qöllina khartsderg ben ma dats hxara /Q'urʾan/". Tsateshnachara elira baq'dolchunna, i shayga deʾcha: "Hxara dekq'a q'eggina bozbuunchalla du-q".
34:44: Okha tsa della /ḥalkha/ tsärga (Makkin ohxlane) tsḥa a zhayna tsara i ʿamadesh dolu‚ Okha tsa vakhiytina tsärga ḥol ḥalkha tsḥa a qeramcha.
34:45: Khartsdira tsaral ḥalkha khillachara a‚ /hxorsh-m/ tsa qiira Okha tsarna dellachukh ittalġachu deq'akh a. Tsara khartsbira San elchanash. Mukha khilira San /üsh/ tsalarar (San ʿazap)?!
34:46: Aḥ āla /hxay elcha, tsu tsateshachärga/: "As ḥökhu shuna tsḥa hxuma: shu dʿahxitta Dalla ḥalkha /baq'derg lökhush/ shishsha a‚ tsḥätstsa a‚ t'akqa ash oyla ye: shun naq'ost ma vats zhinekh. Iza ma vats qeramcha ben, ch'oġa ʿazap khilale ḥalkha /vaiytina volu/".
34:47: Aḥ āla /tsu tsateshachärga, hxay elcha/: "As shüga /din dʿaqachorna/ bökhu makh – shuna shayna bu (as tsa bökhu shüga tsunna düḥal makh). San makh Dalla t'eḥ ben bats. Iza masso a hxumanna t'eḥ tesh ma vu".
34:48: Aḥ āla: "Bakq'alla a, san Qiosh-Qobucho düllu /paykhamariyn degnashka/ baq'derg‚ q'aylenash t'ekh dika khuush verg vu Iza".
34:49: Aḥ āla: "Deana baq'derg. Dʿadolalur dats khartsderg‚ dukhadörzur a dats".
34:50: Aḥ āla: "So tilavelleḥ, – so tilalush vu sayna. So nisvelleḥ, – San Qiosh-Qobucho sayga dellachu väḥitsa /nisvella/. Bakq'alla a, Iza khezash verg a vu‚ gergaḥ verg a vu".
34:51: Ḥuna gineḥara üsh qerabella‚ bovla mettig yotsush‚ sḥälätsna gergarchu mettigera.
34:52: Tsara elira: "Okha iyman dillina tsunakh". Michara du tsarna /iymanakh/ qiar genarchu mettigera?
34:53: Tsara kerstadina iza ḥalkha. Tsara dʿatosura q'aylakha derg genarchu mettigera. (Tsara baq' tsa lorura shayga dünenaḥ düytsush khilla dolu q'ematdiynakh a, yukhadendarkh a, yalsamanikh a, zhözhakhatikh a lätsna khabarsh).
34:54: Düḥalo khilira tsarna a‚ tsarna dezachunna a yukq'eḥ‚ üsh sannacharakh ḥalkha dina ma-khilla. Bakq'alla a, üsh khilira shekonan shekoneḥ.
35:1: Khastam bu Dalla – stigaliyn a‚ lättan a yuḥantsa Qollarkhachunna‚ shishsha‚ qokqa‚ diʾ t'emash dolchu malikekh /paykhamarashka/ elchanash khiliytinchunna. Tso sovdokqu qollareḥ Shena luurg. Bakq'alla a, Dela masso a hxumanna t'eḥ nitsq' berg ma vu.
35:2: Dala nakhana Shen q'inkhetamakh dʿabellinchunna – vats tsunna dʿaq'ovlarkho. Tsul t'äḥa Tso dʿaq'evlinchunna – vats tsunna dʿakhötsurg . Iza veza verg a‚ ḥukma /niysa/ desh verg a vu.
35:3: Hxay nakh! Ḥekhade shayna t'eḥ khilla dolu Delan niʿmat. Dela votschu qechu qollarkhocho ritsq' lur dariy te shuna stigalara a‚ lättara a? Qin Dela ma vats Iza votsurg. Ma ʿekhadesh du-q shu!
35:4: Ḥo tsara khartsvaḥ /hxay Muḥammad/, – ḥol ḥalkha a khartsbina elchanash. Dalla t'e dʿadörzu ġullaqash.
35:5: Hxay nakh! Bakq'alla a, Delan vaʿda – ḥaq'-baq' yu. Shu danne a ʿekha ma doyla dünenan dakharo‚ shu danne a ʿekha ma doyla Delatsa ʿekhocho (shayt'ano).
35:6: Bakq'alla a, shayt'a shuna mostaġ du‚ mostaġ dey, sḥalatsa iza. Tso qoyqu shen toba zhözhakhatin ohxlakh khilare.
35:7: Tsateshnarsh – tsarna ch'oġa ʿazap /khir/ du. Iyman dillinarsh a‚ dikanash dinarsh a – tsarna gechdar a‚ yokqa yal khir ma yu!
35:8: Tq'a vu te shen ʿamalkh vonig shena khazyinarg‚ t'akqa iza shena khaza ginarg /dika ʿamal yinchukh terra/? Bakq'alla a, Dala tilavala ma vütu Shena luurg‚ Tso nis ma vo Shena luurg. Ḥan sa ma daa tsarna t'eḥ, ġayġa esh. Bakq'alla a, Dela vu tsara desh derg khuush verg.
35:9: Dela vu Sha mokh bokhüytush verg‚ Tso tsünga ḥeyoytu markhash. Okha üsh dʿaläkhkira bellachu makhka – tsüntsa (doġitsa) latta dendira iza dellachul t'äḥa. Ishtta du /shu/ yukhadendar a.
35:10: Milla a khilleḥ siy dezash, – Delan du siy derrige a. Tsunna t'e ḥalaaylo ts'ena dosh a‚ dika ʿamal a‚ Tso oyʾu iza. Vonashtsa mekarlo yesh bersh – tsarna ch'oġa ʿazap du. Tseran mekarlo – iza erna yu.
35:11: Dela vu Sha shu qöllinarg popparkh‚ t'akqa t'adamakh. T'akqa Tso khiliytina shukh börshanig a‚ stenig a. Tsḥa a zuda berakh khir ma yats‚ tso ber diyr ma dats Tsünan khaartsa ben. Tsḥa a vekhash verg vekhar a ma vats‚ tsünan dakharkh öshur a ma dats zhayni choḥ dolush ben. Bakq'alla a, iza Dalla atta ma du.
35:12: Tsḥaniyssa bats /hxara/ shi hxord: hxara merza-teza‚ shen khi mala atta dolush bu‚ tq'a vazha – düra tükha du. Hxorammakh ash duu kerla zhizhig‚ ash /tsarna chüra/ sḥayokhu mekhala marzhanash‚ ash üsh t'eukhku. Ḥuna go kema tsarna chukhula qerstash, ash lakharḥama Tsünan niʿmatakh‚ ash /Dala dellachu niʿmatashna / shukur darḥama a.
35:13: Tso büysa denna chu yalayo‚ de büysanna chu dalado‚ bolkh boytu malkhe a‚ batte a. Masso a dʿasalelash yu shen tökhna khan t'eqachchalts. Iza vu Dela‚ shun Ela‚ Tsünan du pachchaḥalla. Ash, Iza a vitina, shayga qoyqucheran dōlaḥ ma dats tsürrig a.
35:14: Ash tsärga qayqicha a‚ tsarna tsa kheza shun qayqar‚ khezcha a, – tsara shuna zhop tsa lo‚ q'ematdiynaḥ tsara kerstadiyr du shun naq'ostalla. Tsḥammo a ḥöga düytsur ma dats, Sha sov khuuchu (Tso) sanna.
35:15: Hxay nakh! Shu peq'arsh du Dele. Dela – Iza vu ḥalderg a‚ khastame verg a.
35:16: Shena laaḥ, shu dʿadakhiytina (hxallakdina), kerla khalq' dalor du Tso.
35:18: Ḥur bats dʿaḥocho qechun moḥ. /Q'inakh/ düzna sino dekhcha a shen /moḥ/ dʿabaḥar‚ hxumma a tsunakh dʿaḥur yats /tskhamma a/‚ gergarlo yolush iza khilleḥ a. Aḥ ḥekham be (qeram tasa, hxay elcha) shayn Qiosh-Qobuchukh qörush bolcharna, I gush votstsusheḥ‚ lamaz a hxottiynacharna. Ts'anvellarg – iza shena ts'anlo. Dele du /shun masseran a/ dʿaderzar.
35:19: Tsḥaniyssa vats bʿärsa dotsurg a‚ bʿärsa derg a‚
35:22: Tsḥaniyssa bats diynabersh a‚ bellarsh a. Bakq'alla a, Dala khozüytu Shena luuchünga. Ḥo ma vats khozüytur dolush keshnash choḥ volchünga.
35:24: Bakq'alla a, Okha vakhiytina ḥo baq'dolchüntsa qaʾ bokqurg a‚ qeram tosurg a khilla. Tsḥa a ummat tsa khilla, shena yukq'eḥ qeramcha väkhniy ben.
35:25: Tsara ḥo khartsvaḥ‚ tsaral ḥalkha khillachara a khartsbina /elchanash/. Tsärga bäkhkira tseran elchanash bilgalonashtsa a‚ yozanashtsa (ḥarchorashtsa) a‚ nüre dolchu zhaynitsa a.
35:26: T'akqa As sḥaletsira tsateshnarsh. Mukha khilira As tsalarar /tseran ʿamal, San öġazlo tsarna/?!
35:27: Ḥuna tsa gina, mukha dayti Dala stigalara khi (doġa). Okha sḥabekhira tsüntsa stömash‚ shayn besnash tayp-taypana a dolush‚ lämnekh a /dikhkira/ neq'ash: k'ayn a‚ ts'en a‚ shayn besnash tayp-taypana a dolush‚ ch'oġa ʿärzha dersh a.
35:28: Ishtta nakhakh a‚ diynatekh a‚ bezhnekh a /khiliytira Okha/ shayn besnash tayp-taypana dolush. Bakq'alla a, Delakh qöru Tsünan lekh ʿelamnakh. Bakq'alla a, Dela vu veza verg a‚ gechdesh verg a.
35:29: Bakq'alla a, Delan zhayna (Q'urʾan) döshush bersh‚ lamaz hxottiynarsh‚ Okha shayna dellachu ritsq'ekh q'aylakha a‚ guchoḥ a /Delan novq'aḥ/ kharzhash yesh bersh – üsh dog dokhush bu tsq'a a sa yotsush yusur yotschu yokhk-etsare (yalsamane)‚
35:30: /üsh dogdokhush bu/ Tso dʿayalare shayn yal‚ shäsh sovbakhare Shen niʿmatakh. Bakq'alla a, Iza vu gechdesh verg a‚ barkalle verg a /Shena ʿibadat dinacharna/.
35:31: Okha väḥitsa zhaynikh (Q'urʾanakh) ḥöga (hxay elcha) dellarg iza baq'derg du‚ niysa doġush a khilla dolu shel ḥalkha khillachüntsa (ḥol ḥalkha khillachu paykhamarshka daiytinchu zhaynashtsa). Bakq'alla a, Dela Shen lekh derg sov dika khuush a vu‚ gush a vu.
35:32: T'akqa Okha zhayna (Q'urʾan) delira irsana Tkhan lekh Okha khärzhinacharna. Tsarakh shena zulam diyrig a vu /tsu Q'urʾantsa ʿamal tsa esh/‚ tsarakh barameḥ /ʿamal yesh/ verg a vu‚ tsarakh Delan purbantsa dikanashtsa ḥalkhavällarg a vu. Iza du-q dokqa dozalla!
35:33: ʿadn (ts'e yolchu uggar eza yolchu yalsamanin) boshmash /yu tsarna/‚ shena chu üsh ġur bolush‚ /tseran küygekh/ bullur bu dasho a‚ luʾluʾan a hxoz‚ tseran dukhar tsu choḥ khir du dāri.
35:34: Tsara er du: "Khastam bu Dalla‚ tkhuna t'era singattam dʿabäkqinchu. Bakq'alla a, tkhan Qiosh-Qoburg gechdiyrig a vu‚ barkalle verg a vu.
35:35: Ishtanig vu Iza Sha ḥanal dina tkhuna /guttar lattaran/ ts'a (yalsamani) Shen dozallakh‚ tkhokh tsa ḥaqalo tsu choḥ khalo‚ tkhokh tsa ḥaqalo tsu choḥ k'addalar."
35:36: Tsateshnarsh – tsarna zhözhakhatin ts'e yu‚ qiel yiyr yats tsarna üsh lesh‚ aydiyr dats tsarna t'era tsünan ʿazapakh /hxumma a/. Ishtta beqam bo Okha hxor t'ekh tsateshachunna.
35:37: Tsara /Dele ġo dökhush/ qoyqur du tsu choḥ: "Tkhan Qiosh-Qoburg‚ aradākhaḥ tkho‚ okha dika ʿamal yiyr ma yara, tkhäsh yina khillarg a yotsush!" Okha dākha tsa ditira shu /dünenaḥ/ sha qetash verg qettal? Shüga ma veara qeramcha. ʿovsha /hxintsa ʿazap/‚ khir vats zulamkhoshna tsḥa a ġöncha!
35:38: Bakq'alla a, Dela vu stigaliyn a‚ lättan a ḥulameḥ derg khuush verg. Bakq'alla a, Iza vu degnashkaḥ derg khuush verg a.
35:39: Iza vu Sha shukh lättaḥ t'äḥe khiliytina. Milla a velaḥ kerstavälla, – tsunna shena du tsünan kerstanalla. Sovbokhur bats kerstanash tseran kerstanallo shayn Qiosh-Qobuchunna gergaḥ öġazallitsa ben. Sovbokhur bats kerstanash tseran kerstanallo eshallitsa ben.
35:40: Aḥ āla /tsu kerstanashka, hxay elcha/: "Ḥovsal shayn naq'ostashka‚ ash shayga qoyqush bolchu, Dela a vitina. Gaytal söga‚ hxun qöllina tsara lättaḥ‚ ya tsarna /Delatsa/ naq'ostalla du stigalshkaḥ‚ ya Okha tsärga zhayna della‚ üsh Tsüngara bilgalonashkaḥ a bolush?" Hxaʾ‚ zulamkhosha – tsḥabolchara vuqarna yesh yolu vaʿda ʿekhor ben ma yats.
35:41: Bakq'alla a, Dala satsosh yu stigalsh a‚ latta a dʿatilarkh. Üsh dʿatilcha, sotsüytur yariy üsh tsḥammo a Tsul t'äḥa? Bakq'alla a, Iza khilla t'ekh sobare verg a‚ gechdiyrig a.
35:42: Tsara (Makkara kerstanasha) duy biira Delakh, inzare ch'oġa duy, shayga qeramcha vaġaḥ‚ shäsh khir ma du uggar niysachu novq'aḥ dolchu ummatekh mülkhkhachul älla. Tsärga qeramcha veʾcha‚ tso sov tsa bekhira üsh /islam dinna/ genabovlartsa ben‚
35:43: lättaḥ kurabovlartsa a‚ vochu mekarlontsa a ben. Von mekarlo tsa ḥercha shen ohxlanakh ben. Ḥovsur buy üsh ḥalkhalerchiyn ʿadate ben? Ḥuna karor ma dats Delan ʿadatna khiytsar. Ḥuna karor ma dats Delan ʿadatna ḥavzor /qechunna t'e/.
35:44: Üsh tsa lela lättakhula‚ tsa ḥovsu te‚ mukha khilla tsaral ḥalkha khillacheran t'äḥe? Üsh ma bara hxoqaral vuno ch'oġa nütsq'ala. Dela khili Sha dukhatukhur votsush stigalashkaḥ a‚ lättaḥ a tsḥanna hxumano. Bakq'alla a, Iza khili khuush verg a‚ nitsq' berg a.
35:45: Dala nakh lüytsush belḥara tsara karadinchüntsa‚ tsu /lättan/ eq'ana t'eḥ düsur ma datsara tsḥa a diynat‚ delaḥ a t'äḥatottu Tso üsh shayna tökhna khan t'eqachchalts. Tseran /tökhna/ khan t'eeʾcha, – /Tso beqam biyr bu tsarna shayn ʿamalashka ḥäzhzhina/ - bakq'alla a, Dela khilla Shen lesh gush verg.
36:2: Shena choḥ /derrig/ ḥeq'alalla dolchu Q'urʾanakh duy bou As:
36:3: bakq'alla a, ḥo ma vu bakhkiytincharakh (tsḥa elcha)
36:5: Sha veza a‚ q'inkhetame a volchüngara dossiyna du iza (Q'urʾan)‚
36:6: ḥöga ḥekham bayta q'omana‚ shayn dayshna bina tsa khilla – üsh tidambotsush khilla (Delan din tsa devzash).
36:7: Tsarakh duqakhbolcharna t'eḥ dosh baq'khilla – tsara /aḥ deʾnachünga, hxay Muḥammad/ iyman düllur dats.
36:8: Tseran logekh Okha burzhalsh -ġomatash tökhna‚ üsh ch'enigekh qächna, – tseran kortosh irkh ayabella.
36:9: Tsarna ḥalkhakhula a‚ t'eḥakhula a düḥalo yina Okha‚ tseran bʿärgashna ḥalkha kirḥa dillina Okha – üsh gush ma bats.
36:10: Tsarna tsḥaterra du: aḥ ḥekham bicha a‚ tsa bicha a – üsh teshar bolush bats /aḥ deʾnachukh, hxay Muḥammad/.
36:11: Bakq'alla a, aḥ ḥekham be ḥekhamna t'äḥahxuttush volchunna‚ shena gush votstsusheḥ Q'inkhetame volchukh (Delakh) qörush volchunna. Aḥ tsünga qaʾ bakqa tsunna gechdina khilartsa a‚ siylaḥ yal khilartsa a.
36:12: Bakq'alla a, Okha den ma bo bellarsh‚ dʿayaz ma do Okha tsara ḥalkha leliynarg a‚ tseran /t'äḥa khir yolu/ lar a. Masso a hxuma dʿanis ma dina Okha bilgalchu zhayni choḥ.
36:13: Balabe tsarna masalna tsḥana yurtan day: tsiga bäkhkira elchanash.
36:14: Okha vakhiytinera tsärga shiʾ– tsara i shiʾ shiy a khartsvira. T'akqa Okha üsh ch'aġbira qoalġachüntsa‚ tsara elira: "Bakq'alla a, tkho shüga /dakhkiytina/ elchanash ma du".
36:15: Tsara (yurtarchu nakha) elira: "Shu ma dats tkho sanna adamash ben. Tsḥanna hxumantsa Q'inkhetame volcho dakhkiytina ma dats shu – shu khartslüysh ma du".
36:16: Tsara (elchanasha) elira: "Vayn Qiosh-Qobuchunna khäa-q tkho shüga dakhkiytina elchanash duyla.
36:17: Tkhuna t'eḥ-m dats bilgalderg dʿaqachor ben".
36:18: Tsara (yurtarchu nakha) elira: "Shu baḥaneḥ von bilgalonash khaaella tkhuna‚ shu tsa sovtsaḥ‚ okha shuna t'ulgash dettar ma du‚ tkhögara lazosh dolchu ʿazapo sḥalötsur ma du shu".
36:19: Tsara elira: "Shun von bilgalonash shütsa shaytsa yu. Tq'a shuna ḥekham bina dela /yu shun von bilgalonash; tsundela do ash tkhuna ʿazap?/ Hxaʾ‚ shu du-q t'alamza q'am (dukqa k'orgadakhna shu q'inosh dareḥ)".
36:20: Ġalina yistera vedda tsḥa stag sḥaqechira‚ tso elira: "Hxay san q'am! T'äḥahxitta otsu elchanashna.
36:21: T'äḥahxitta shayga makh tsa bökhush bolcharna – üsh niysachu novq'aḥ ma bu.
36:22: As hxunda tsa do ʿibadat suo Qöllinchunna‚ shu a Shena t'e dʿadügur dolchunna?
36:23: Iza a vütiy‚ qin delanash t'elotsu tq'a as? Q'inkhetame volchunna (Dalla) suna tsḥa zen dan liʾcha‚ tseran shapaʿatasha hxumma a ġo diyr ma datsara suna‚ tsara so k'elḥarvokqur ma vatsara /Delan ʿazapakh/.
36:24: Gan a gush dolchu tilarchoḥ khir ma vara so t'akqa.
36:25: Bakq'alla a, as iyman dilli shun Qiosh-Qobuchünga, söga ladoġa…"
36:26: /Malikasha/ elira: "Yalsamane ġo". Tso elira /shen sa dolush/: "Hxay san q'am‚ shu khuush khilleḥara-q
36:27: suna sayn Qiosh-Qobucho gechdina khilar a‚ Tso so siylaḥ bolcharakh khiliytar a".
36:28: Tsul t'äḥa tsünan q'omana t'e stigalara bʿo tsa baiytira Okha‚ i boüytursh tsa khilira Tkho.
36:29: Bekq'a tsḥa ch'oġa moḥ khilira – üsh /chim khilla/ dʿatiyna bisira.
36:30: Ma bokqa bala bu-q /San/ leshna: tsḥa a elcha tsa veana-q tsärga, i tsara ḥiyzavesh ben.
36:31: Tsarna tsa gina teḥa: mel duqa t'äḥenash hxallakyina Okha tsaral ḥalkha‚ üsh tsarna t'e yukhabörzur ma bats.
36:32: Masso a tsḥäna Tkhuna ḥalkha dʿahxittor ma bu.
36:33: Bilgala delil ma duy tsarna della dolu latta: Okha iza dendina‚ tsunakh Okha bürtigash a sḥadäkhna – tsarakh tsara qacha bou.
36:34: Tsunna t'eḥ Okha khurmaniyn a‚ kemsiyn a boshmash hxittiyna. Tsunakh Okha shovdanash a däkhna –
36:35: tsärga tsünan stömash baiyta – tseran küygasha tsa dina iza. Barkalla hxunda tsa olu tsara?
36:36: Ts'ena vu I (Dela masso a qachambatsarekh)‚ Sha masso a hxuma börsha a‚ sten a qöllina volu: lätto sḥadolüytush derg a‚ üsh shäsh a‚ tsarna tsakhuurg a.
36:37: Bilgala delil du tsarna büysa: tsunakh de sḥadokqu Okha‚ t'akqa üsh bodaneḥ büsush.
36:38: Malkh a dʿalela shena hxottiynachu mettige – Sha veza volchun‚ Sha khuush volchun dʿahxottam bu iza.
36:39: Bettan a baram bina Okha shen manzalashkaḥ– dʿabörzush khurmanan shirchu gännakh tarloy.
36:40: Malkh battana t'äḥa tsa qüu‚ büysa diynal ḥalkha tsa yolu – masso a shen-shen metteḥ neka desh yu.
36:41: Bilgala delil du tsarna Okha tseran zürret düzzina khillachu /Nuḥan/ kemanna t'eḥ dʿasaleliyna khilar.
36:42: Tsunakh tera qöllira Okha tsarna t'ekhaa hxumanash a.
36:43: Tkhuna liʾneḥara‚ khi chu bakhiytina khir bara üsh‚ – ma khir datsara tsarna ortsa‚ ma k'elḥarbokhur batsara üsh
36:44: Tkhögara q'inkhetam a‚ tsḥa khan t'eqachchalts bakham a khilcha ben.
36:45: Tsärga älcha: "Shu qeralash shul ḥalkha khillachukh a‚ shul t'äḥa khir dolchukh a – shukh q'inkhetam ban tam bara" /üsh dʿabörzu/.
36:46: Delan ayatekh tsḥa a ayat tsa doġu tsärga‚ üsh tsunakh /tsa teshash/ dʿabörzush ben.
36:47: Tsärga älcha: "Saġa lo /miskacharna / Dala shayna dellachu ritsq'anakh," tsateshachara olu iyman dillincharakh: "Okha hxunda qobu üsh? Dala, Shena laaḥ, Sha qobur bu‚ gan a gush tilarchoḥ du-q shu".
36:48: /T'akqa/ tsara olu: "Matsa khir du ash düytsurg, shu baq'lüysh khilleḥ?"
36:49: Ḥözhush lättar bats üsh – bekq'a tsḥa ch'oġa moḥ khir bu: tso sḥalotsur bu üsh, shäsh lättasheḥ q'üysush.
36:50: Veset dan a nitsq' qochur bats tseran‚ shayn nakhana t'e yukhabörzur a bats üsh.
36:51: Sur loqur yu – üsh keshnashkara shayn Qiosh-Qobuchunna t'e sikhlur bu.
36:52: Tsara är du: "Ma bokqa bala beana vayna! Ḥan ġovttiyna te vay‚ diyshina ʿokhkuchüra?!" /Malikasha ya muʾma nakha er du/: "Hxara du shuna Q'inkhetam bolcho khir du ällarg. Baq'liyna elchanash".
36:53: Bekq'a tsḥa ch'oġa moḥ khilla – üsh berrige a Tkhuna ḥalkha dʿatarbella.
36:54: Takhana sinna tsḥanna a hxumantsa zulam diyr ma dats‚ ash yinchu ʿamalshtsa ben beqam a shuna khir ma bats.
36:55: Bakq'alla a, yalsamanin day takhana /shayn/ ġullaqashkaḥ zovq ḥögush khir bu.
36:56: Üsh a‚ tseran zudariy a ʿindaġeḥ mänganashna t'eḥ dʿatevzhina khir ma bu.
36:57: Tsarna tsigaḥ stömash a‚ tsarna shäsh ekhnarg khir ma yu.
36:58: "Salam!" – olush, marshalla khir du q'inkhetame volchu Delera.
36:59: Shu dʿaq'asta takhana‚ hxay q'inosh dinarsh!
36:60: As shüga tsa ällera tq'a: "Hxay Ādaman k'entiy! Shayt'anna ʿibadat ma delash – iza shuna bilgala mostaġ ma duy?
36:61: Suna ʿibadat deysha – hxara bu niysa neq'!"
36:62: Shukh yokqa toba tiliyna dälla i! – Shu tsa khili-q ḥeq'ale?!
36:63: Hxara yu i zhözhakhate‚ khir yu shuna älla, ḥekhiynarg!
36:64: ʿovsha tsünan yovkho takhana– shäsh tsa teshash khilarna!
36:65: Takhana Okha tseran baganashna muhxar tukhur ma du‚ tseran küygasha Tkhöga düytsur ma du‚ tsara /dünenaḥ/ karadesh khillachunna kogasha teshalla diyr ma du.
36:66: Tkhuna liʾneḥara, bʿärsa deḥna üsh bütur bara‚ novq'akh tilla bisinchu, tsarna michara gur dara?
36:67: Ya Tkhuna liʾneḥara, shayn mettigeḥ kütsash khüytsur ma dara tseran – dʿabakhalur ma batsara üsh‚ yukhabörzur a ma batsara üsh.
36:68: Okha vākha vitinarg q'analle dʿaverzavo, üsh ḥeq'ale tsa khülu te?!
36:69: Tsa ʿamiyna Okha tsunna (Muḥammad-paykhamarna) baytash– i dan tso tam a ma batsara: iza ḥekham a, /hxumanash/ bilgaldokhu Q'urʾan a ma du‚
36:70: shetsa qeram tasa diynavolchunna‚ tsateshnacharna t'eḥ /tsarna ʿazap khir du älla/ dosh baq'khiliyta.
36:71: Tsarna tsa gina teḥa Okha shayna Tkhan küygasha dinchukh däkhni qöllina khilar‚ üsh tsarna t'eḥ day a bina?
36:72: Okha üsh tsarna müt'aḥ dina: tsarakh üsh t'ekhüyshursh a du‚ tsarakh tsara daa a dou.
36:73: Tsarna tsärgaḥ paydanash a‚ malarsh a du – barkalla hxunda tsa olu tsara?!
36:74: Allahx-Dela a vitina, qin delanash lätsna – shayna ġo khir du möttush.
36:75: Khir dats tsarna tsärgakhula ġo – ma bu üsh tsarna dʿahxottiyna bʿo!
36:76: Tseran dasho singattame ma voyla ḥo. Tkho khuush du ḥuna tsara q'ayladokqurg a‚ tsara dʿaḥediyrig a.
36:77: Adamna tsa gina te Okha sha qöllina khilar t'adamakh? – bilgala mostaġ khili-q tsunakh!
36:78: Tkhuna masal a daliyna‚ sha qollar dits a dina‚ ällera: "Ḥan denyiyr yu däʿakhkash, üsh yakhkaelcha?"
36:79: Aḥ āla /tsärga, hxay elcha/: "Denyiyr yu üsh shäsh dükhḥara qöllincho – Iza masso a hxuma qolla Sha khuush ma vu.
36:80: Iza vu shuna siynachu dittakh ts'e khiliytina‚ ash tsunakh lata a yesh".
36:81: Tq'a stigalsh a‚ latta a Sha qollinchunna nitsq' tsa qochu i sannarg yukhaqolla?! Qochu!!! I sha khuush volu sov dika Qollarkho ma vu!
36:82: Tsünan ġullaq du, Shena tsḥa hxuma liʾcha, tsünga "Khila!" ālar – t'akqa iza khülu.
36:83: Ts'ena vu I (Dela masso a qachambatsarekh)‚ Shen küygaḥ masso a hxumanan pachchaḥalla dolu‚ shu a Shena t'e dʿaderzor dolu.
37:4: Bakq'alla a, shun Dela tsḥaʾ vu.
37:5: Stigaliyn a‚ lättan a‚ tsu shinnan yukq'eḥ mel dolchun a Qiosh-Qoburg ma vu Iza‚ malkhbaliyn a Qiosh-Qoburg ma vu Iza.
37:6: Bakq'alla a, Okha khazdina gergara stigal sedarchiyn khazallitsa a,
37:8: Tsara laduġur dats Laqarchu Qetashone‚ dukhatukhur du masso a aġorḥara
37:9: genadakqartsa‚ tq'a tsarna du tsq'a a khedar dotsu ʿazap.
37:10: Sikhkha /tsḥa dosh/ sḥalätsnarg dotsurg‚ t'akqa tsunna a t'äḥaqüu /stigalara/ oḥabuzhu ts'e tukhu seda.
37:11: Aḥ khattal tsärga/hxay Muḥammad/: "Üsh bu sov ch'oġa qolla‚ ya Okha qöllinarg du?" Bakq'alla a, Okha qöllina üsh (tseran bukh – Ādam) letash bolchu popparakh (topparakh).
37:12: Hxaʾ‚ tsetsvälla ḥo, üsh tsa beshash bu /ḥan tsetsvalarkh/.
37:13: Shayna dagadaiyticha (baq'derg shayga dʿaqachiycha) a, tsara daga tsa doytu (payda tsa ötsu ḥekhamakh shayn degnash q'iza khilarna).
37:14: Shayna delil gicha a, t'ekh tsa beshash khülu.
37:15: Tsara elira: "Hxara bilgala bozbuunchalla ben dats.
37:16: Vay delcha‚ vaykh poppar a‚ däʿakhkash a khilcha, vay yukhadendiyr du?
37:18: Aḥ āla /tsärga, hxay elcha/: "Hxaʾ‚ shu k'eldüsur ma du".
37:19: Iza-m tsḥa az ben dats – üsh ḥözhush khir bu,
37:20: shäsh olush: "Ma bala bu vayna! Hxara du-q i beqaman de".
37:21: "Hxara du-q i q'astaran de‚ ash sha khartsdesh khilla dolu".
37:22: "Sḥagulbe i zulam dinarsh a‚ /üsh sanna bolu/ tseran naq'ostiy a‚ tsara /shayna/ ʿibadat desh khillarsh a,
37:23: Dela a vitina. Dʿanisbe üsh zhözhakhatin novq'a!
37:24: Sovtsabe üsh – tsärga bart khottur bu!"
37:25: "Shuna hxun khilla? Vovshashna ġo desh ma dats shu?"
37:26: Hxaʾ‚ üsh takhana müt'aḥ khilla /Delan ġullaqna/.
37:27: Tsarakh tsḥabersh t'ebirzi vuqarna, khöttush (vovshashna bekhkash bokhush).
37:28: Er du /tilabellachara shäsh t'äḥabäznachärga/: "Shu ma dara tkhuna t'edoġush ättu aġorḥara".
37:29: /Vuqara/ er du: "Hxaʾ‚ shu shäsh tsa khilira teshash /Delakh/.
37:30: Tkhan shuna t'eḥ tsḥa a nitsq' batsara. Hxaʾ‚ shu shäsh khili t'ekhdälla q'am.
37:31: Tkhuna t'eḥ baq' khili tkhan Qiosh-Qobuchun dosh. Bakq'alla a, okha ʿovshur du-q /ʿazap/.
37:32: Okha shu a tiliy-q‚ bakq'alla a, tkho tkhäsh a khilla-q tiladella".
37:33: Bakq'alla a, üsh otsu diynaḥ ʿazapeḥ /tsḥanna/ deq'akh khir bu.
37:34: Bakq'alla a, Okha ishtta do /ʿazap/ q'inosh dinacharna.
37:35: Bakq'alla a, üsh khilira shayga älcha: "Qin dela vats Allahx ben", kurabüylush.
37:36: Tsara olura: "Okha bütura tq'a tkhan delanash zhinekh volchu illanchin düḥa".
37:37: Hxaʾ‚ iza-m (i Muḥammad) veana baq'dolchüntsa‚ tso baq'bina bakhkiytinarsh.
37:38: Bakq'alla a, ash ʿovshur ma du lazosh dolu ʿazap.
37:39: Shuna beqam khir ma bats ash desh khillarg ben.
37:40: Delan sov ts'ena lesh botsuchara. (Tsarna khir dats ʿazap).
37:41: Tsarna devzash dolu ritsq' khir du –
37:45: Tsarna /t'eḥiyzash/ go bokqur bu /berasha/ shovdana chüra /ikhachu/ chaġaran kedatsa.
37:47: Tsu choḥ /ḥeq'al/ talkhar a khir dats /korta lozush/‚ üsh tsunakh bekhar a bats.
37:48: Bʿärsa lardesh bolu (khiyrachu bozharshka tsa ḥözhush), bʿärgash bakqiy bolu /khaza mekhkariy/ khir bu tseran.
37:50: Tsarakh tsḥabersh vuqarna düḥal ġur bu, khöttush.
37:51: Er du tsarakh olucho: "Bakq'alla a, san tsḥa naq'ost ma vara /dünenaḥ dolush/.
37:52: Tso olura: "Bakq'alla a, ḥo /paykhamarash/ baq'becharakh vu?
37:53: Vay delcha‚ vaykh poppar a‚ däʿakhkash a khilcha, vay beqame uzur du?"
37:54: Tso (Delakh teshash khillacho) er du: "Shu ḥovsiy (mukha du teḥa tsünan ḥal hxintsa)?"
37:55: Iza ḥäzhira‚ t'akqa tsunna iza zhözhakhatina yukq'eḥ gira.
37:56: Tso (teshash khillacho tsateshash khillachünga) er du: "Tallahxi‚ /tsḥana mäʿʿara/ so hxallakvesh ma lättara aḥ.
37:57: San Qiosh-Qobuchun niʿmat tsa khilleḥara, so khir ma vara /quzaḥ/ lättacharakh".
37:58: /T'akqa yalsamanin ohxlanga a virzina, tsu teshash khillacho er du/: "Vay /quzaḥ tsq'a a/ liyr dolush dats,
37:59: vayn tsq'a /dünenaḥ dolush khilla dolu/ dalar ben? Vayna /qin tsq'a a/ ʿazap diyr dolush a dats?!
37:60: Bakq'alla a, hxara bu-q siylaḥ-beza tolam!"
37:62: Tq'a iza du /ḥoshalġa/ vossa dika‚ ya zakq'um ditt du?
37:63: Bakq'alla a, Okha iza khiliytina pitana khilla zulamkhoshna.
37:64: Bakq'alla a, iza du zhözhakhatina bukhaḥ sḥadolu ditt.
37:65: Tsünan stömash bu, shayt'aniyn kortosh sanna.
37:66: Bakq'alla a, tsara (q'inosh dinachara) tsunakh duur dolush a du‚ gaynash yuzor yolush a yu tsunakh.
37:67: T'akqa bakq'alla a, tsarna tsunna t'e /tökhna/ ts'iydina khi du.
37:68: T'akqa, bakq'alla a, tseran dʿaderzar zhözhakhate khir du.
37:69: Bakq'alla a, tsarna kariyra shayn day a tilabella /tsarna t'äḥabäzira üsh/.
37:70: Tsara tseran (shayn dayn) lorakh bakha sikho yira. (Dünenaḥ bolush, shayn daysha letiyna q'inosh letiyra tsara a).
37:71: Tilabelira tsaral ḥalkha dükhḥar khillacharakh duqakhbersh.
37:73: Ḥazhal‚ mukha khilla shayna qeram tesnacheran chaqe.
37:75: Tkhöga qiyqira Nuḥas – ma dika zhop lush dersh du /Tkho/.
37:76: Okha k'elḥarväkqira iza a‚ tsünan dözal a bokqachu balekh.
37:77: Okha khiliytira tsünan zürret – iza bukhadüsurg.
37:80: Bakq'alla a, Okha ishtta /khaza/ beqam bo dikacharna.
37:81: Bakq'alla a, iza vu Tkhan muʾma leykh.
37:83: Bakq'alla a, tsünan tobanakh ma vu Ibrahxim a.
37:84: Dagadaiyta! Iza veara shen Qiosh-Qobuchunna t'e ts'enachu dagtsa.
37:85: Dagadaiyta! Tso ällera shen dega a‚ shen q'ome a: "Hxun yu ash ʿibadat desh yerg?
37:86: Khartsderg delanash /latsa/ läa shuna, Allahx- Dela a vitina?
37:87: Hxun du shuna mötturg ʿalamiyn Dekh?"
37:89: T'akqa tso elira: "Bakq'alla a, so tsomgush vu".
37:91: Iza t'evirzira tseran delashna‚ tso elira: "Ash tsa yuu?
37:92: Shuna hxun khilla‚ dist tsa khülu shu?"
37:93: Iza t'evirzira tsarna, tukhush ättu küygatsa.
37:94: Üsh düḥalqiytira tsunna, sikha bolartsa bevdda bäkhkina.
37:95: Tso (Ibrahxima) elira: "Ash ʿibadat do tq'a shäsh tsöstush yinacharna?
37:96: Dela ma vu shu qöllinarg a‚ ash desh derg a /qöllinarg a/".
37:97: Tsara elira: "Yē tsunna ġishlo‚ chuqossa iza yoguchu ts'erga!"
37:98: Tsarna liira tsüntsa mekarlo yan‚ Okha khiliytira üsh k'elbisincharakh.
37:99: Tso (Ibrahxima) elira: "Bakq'alla a, so vödu san Qiosh-Qobuchunna t'e. Tso nisviyr vu so.
37:101: Okha tsunna qaʾ bäkqira t'ekh sobare k'antatsa.
37:102: Iza tsüntsa (Ibrahximtsa) sikha lelaluchu ḥole qächcha‚ tso (Ibrahxima) elira: "Hxay san k'antalg‚ bakq'alla a, suna go ġenakh as ḥuna /ġurbanna/ urs ḥoqush‚ ḥazhal‚ ḥuna hxun kheta". Tso elira: "Dada‚ ḥayga omra desh derg de‚ ḥuna so karor vu‚ Dala muq'alaḥ‚ sobar decharakh".
37:103: I shiʾ /Dalla/ müt'aḥ khilcha‚ tso (Ibrahxima) iza ḥazh t'e villicha /urs ḥaqa/‚
37:105: Baq'khiliyti aḥ ġan". Bakq'alla a, Okha ishtta /khaza/ beqam bo dikacharna.
37:106: Bakq'alla a, hxara – iza du-q bilgala dolu zer.
37:108: Okha ditira tsünan /ts'e yakqar a‚ i khastavar a/ t'äḥaboġuchärgaḥ.
37:111: Bakq'alla a, iza vu Tkhan muʾma lekh.
37:112: Okha qaʾ bäkqira tsunna Isḥaq'atsa‚ dikacharakh paykhamartsa.
37:113: Okha deq'alvira iza a‚ Isḥaq' a. Tsu shinnan zürretakh dikanig a vu‚ sha-shena bilgala zulamkho a vu.
37:114: Musakh a‚ Hxarunakh a binera Okha /bokqa/ q'inkhetam.
37:115: K'elḥarväkqira Okha i shiʾ a‚ tsu shinnan q'am a bokqachu bālanakh.
37:116: Tsarna ġo dira Okha – üsh khilira töllarsh.
37:117: Okha delira tsu shinga bilgala dolu zhayna.
37:118: Okha nisvira i shiʾ niysachu novq'a.
37:119: Okha ditira tsu shinnan /khaza ts'e yakqar/ t'äḥaboġuchärgaḥ.
37:120: Salam-marshalla du Musaga a‚ Hxarune a.
37:121: Bakq'alla a, Okha ishtta /khaza/ beqam bo dikacharna.
37:122: Bakq'alla a, i shiʾ Tkhan muʾma lekh vu.
37:123: Bakq'alla a, Ilyas a ma vu bakhkiytincharakh.
37:124: Tso ma elira shen q'ome: "Shu /Delakh/ tsa qöru?
37:125: Ash qoyqu tq'a Baʿlaga‚ uggar dika Qollarkho a vütiy?
37:126: Allahx – shun Dela a, shun ḥalkhalera dayn Dela a vütiy?"
37:127: T'akqa tsara iza khartsvira – bakq'alla a, üsh ḥalkhahxittor ma bu /zhözhakhatina, ʿazapana/.
37:129: Okha ditira tsunna /khaza ts'e yakqar, nakha khastavar/ t'äḥaboġuchärgaḥ.
37:131: Bakq'alla a, Okha ishtta /khaza/ beqam bo dikacharna.
37:132: Bakq'alla a, i Tkhan muʾma lekh vu.
37:133: Bakq'alla a, Lut' a vu bakhkiytincharakh.
37:134: Okha k'elḥarväkqira iza a‚ tsünan berrig dözal a.
37:135: /ʿazapeḥ/ bisincharna yukq'eḥ khilla yolu /Lut'an zudarekh/ tsḥa yokqa stag yotsurg.
37:137: Bakq'alla a, shu lelash ma duy tsarna yukhkhekhula ʿüyranna a‚
37:138: büysanna a. Shu ḥeq'ale tsa khülu?
37:139: Bakq'alla a, Yȳnus a vu bakhkiytincharakh (elchanekh).
37:141: Tso qazh tesira /tsärtsa/ – iza eshnacharakh khilira.
37:142: I qällira ch'ero, i bekhke a volush.
37:143: Bakq'alla a, iza tsa khilleḥara tasbiḥ decharakh,
37:144: vüsur ma vara tsünan kiyraḥ üsh (khalq'ash) yukhadendechu /q'emat/diyne qachchalts.
37:145: Qössira Okha iza ara (yassachu mettige), tsomgush a volush.
37:147: Okha vakhiytira iza bʿe ezarna (dukqa nakhana t'e) ya sovbolchärga.
37:148: Tsara iyman dillira – Okha tsḥa khan t'eqachchalts bakham belira tsarna.
37:149: Aḥ khattal tsärga (ḥan nakhe, hxay elcha): "Tq'a ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchunna mekhkariy bu‚ tq'a tsarna k'entiy bu.
37:150: Ya Okha qöllina malikash sten, tsarna a gush?"
37:151: Hxan-hxa! Bakq'alla a, shayn eladitanakh düytsush ma du i tsara
37:152: Dala ber dina /bokhush/ – bakq'alla a, üsh khartslüysh ma bu.
37:154: Hxun du shuna‚ mukha ḥukma do ash?
37:157: Sḥalo shayn zhayna, shu baq'lüysh khilleḥ.
37:158: Tsara khiliytira Tsunna a‚ zhinashna a yuq'aḥ gergarlo. Zhinashna khiira üsh dʿahxittor buyla.
37:159: Ts'ena vu i Dela tsara dechu /kharts/ sibatekh.
37:160: Sov ts'ena Delan lesh botsursh /zhözhakhatina ḥalkha dʿahxottor bu/.
37:161: Bakq'alla a, asha a‚ asha /shena/ ʿibadat decho a –
37:164: /Elira malikash/: "Tkhokh ma dats tsḥa a shena bilgala mettig yolush ben.
37:165: Bakq'alla a, tkho moġarsh bina du (lättash ʿibadateḥ moġarshtsa).
37:166: Bakq'alla a, tkho tasbiḥ desh du".
37:169: tkho khir dara Delan sov ts'ena lesh".
37:170: Kerstanalla dina tsara tsunna (Q'urʾanna)‚ t'äḥa khuur du tsarna.
37:171: Ḥalkhadälla Tkhan dosh Tkhan bakhkiytinchu leshka,
37:172: bakq'alla a, üsh – üsh bu shayn ġo diyr dersh, älla dolu.
37:173: Bakq'alla a, Tkhan eskar (muʾma nakh) – i du tolamkho.
37:175: Ḥazha tsärga /tsarna ʿazap dussush/ – t'äḥa gur du tsarna /shayn kerstanallin beqam/.
37:176: Tq'a Tkhan ʿazaptsa a sikh lo üsh?
37:177: Iza (ʿazap) dössicha, tseran kertashka (arenga) – ma von khilla-q shayna qeram tesnacheran ʿüyre.
37:180: Ts'ena vu ḥan Qiosh-Qoburg – siylallin Ela – tsara /Shena t'eḥ/ qulluchu /kharts/ sibatekh.
38:1: Sād. Shegaḥ ḥekham bolchu Q'urʾanakh /duy bou As/:
38:2: hxaʾ‚ tsateshnarsh kurallina choḥ a‚ mostaġallina choḥ a bu-q.
38:3: Mel /duqa/ t'äḥe(-nash) hxallakyina Okha tsaral ḥalkha‚ tsara qoyqura /q'inkhetam bökhush/– yatsara i /k'elḥarbevlla/ bovdaran khan.
38:4: Tsetsbevlira üsh shayga shayn yukq'era qeramcha varakh. Tsateshachara elira: "Hxara t'ekh khartsvolu bozbuuncha vu.
38:5: Tso /dukqa delaniyn metta/ tsḥa dela khiliytina? I duqa tamashe hxuma du!"
38:6: Tsarakh ḥaldolu toba dʿayakhara /olush/: "Dʿaġo‚ sobar a de shayn delanashna t'eḥ. Bakq'alla a, hxara du dezash dolu hxuma.
38:7: Tkhuna tsa khezna otsunakh t'äḥarchu millateḥ. Iza shäsh qöllina hxuma a ben dats.
38:8: Tsünga bossiyna ḥekham vayna yukq'era?". Hxaʾ‚ üsh shekoneḥ bu-q San ḥekhamakh. Hxaʾ‚ tsara /hxintsa a/ tsa ʿävshina San ʿazap.
38:9: Tq'a tsärgaḥ yu veza volchu, /Sha Shen leshna niʿmatash/ shortta lush volchu ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchun q'inkhetaman khaznash?
38:10: Ya tseran du stigaliyn a‚ lättan a‚ tsu shinnan yukq'eḥ dolchun a pachchaḥalla? Ḥalaboliyla üsh /stigala/ ġirsashtsa.
38:11: /Paykhamarna düḥal vovshakhtökhnachu/ tobanekh tsḥa k'ezzig bʿo bu üsh – bokhor bu ḥuna iza.
38:12: Khartsbira /paykhamarsh/ tsaral ḥalkha Nuḥan q'omo a‚ ʿadasha a‚ ḥostamash dolchu Firʿavna a.
38:13: Samudasha a‚ Lut'an q'omo a‚ Aykatan daysha a – tsu /errig/ tobanasha.
38:14: Massara a khartsbira elchanash – baq'khilira San beqam.
38:15: Hxorsh ḥovsur ma bats tsḥana moḥe ben – tsunna khan yakhʾyar khir dats. (I moḥ tokhar t'äḥatottur dats).
38:16: Tsara (Makkin ohxlano tsa beshash) elira: "Tkhan Qiosh-Qoburg‚ sikhde tkhuna tkhan dāq'a ḥesapan de dale".
38:17: Satokha /aḥ‚ hxay Muḥammad/ tsara düytsuchunna‚ dagavaiyta Tkhan lay Davud‚ shegaḥ nitsq' khilla volu. Bakq'alla a, iza t'ekh /Dalla/ t'evörzush verg vara.
38:18: Okha müt'aḥ dira /Davudana/ lämnash – tsüntsa tsḥäna tasbiḥ desh süyranna a‚ /malkh/ qetash a.
38:19: Olkhazarsh a‚ guldesh /tobanashkaḥ/ – masso a tsunna (Davudana) t'edörzu /müt'aḥ khilartsa tsüntsa tsḥäna Dalla tasbiḥ dan/.
38:20: Okha ch'aġdira tsünan pachchaḥalla‚ delira tsunna ḥeq'alalla a‚ dov q'asto khaar a.
38:21: Ḥöga deʾniy /hxay elcha/ dovkhoyn khabar? Üsh miḥrabe ḥala ma bevlira /pena t'ekhula, neʿarekhula dotsush/.
38:22: Üsh Davud volchu chöḥa bevlira‚ iza tsarakh qeravelira. Tsara elira: "Ma qera. Shi dovkho vu /tkho/. Tkhan tsḥabersh vuqarna chuġirtina. Qiel ye tkhuna yukq'eḥ niysontsa‚ khartso ma yēlaḥ‚ nisde tkho niysachu novq'a.
38:23: Hxara san vasha vu‚ tsünan deztq'e tq'aesna üstaġ bu‚ san tsḥa üstaġ bu. Tso älla: "Suna qacho ye tsüntsa". Iza sol tölira devneḥ".
38:24: Tso (Davuda) elira: "Ḥuna zulam dina tso ḥan üstaġ bekhartsa shen üstaġashna t'e. Bakq'alla a, tsḥäna ġullaq decharakh duqakhbolchara vovshashna gamo yo‚ iyman dillinarsh a‚ dika ʿamalsh yesh bersh a botsuchara – ma k'ezzig bu üsh!" Davudana khiira Okha sha pitane lätsna khilar. T'akqa shen Qiosh-Qobuchünga gechdar diykhira tso‚ goravüyzhira iza‚ /Dalla/ t'evirzira iza.
38:25: Okha tsunna iza gechdira. Bakq'alla a, tsunna Tkhögaḥ gergarlo a du‚ khaza t'etovzhiyla a yu.
38:26: Hxay Davud! Okha khiliytina ḥokh lättaḥ khalip. Qiel ye nakhana yukq'eḥ niysontsa‚ t'äḥa ma hxotta dezarshna – tsara tilor vu ḥo Delan neq'akh. Bakq'alla a, Delan neq'akh tilalush bersh – tsarna ch'oġa ʿazap du tsara ḥesapan de ditsdarna.
38:27: Okha erna tsa qöllina stigal a‚ latta a‚ tsu shinnan yukq'eḥ mel derg a. Iza tsateshacheran mottar du. Bāla bu tsateshacharna /zhözhakhatin/ ts'ergara.
38:28: Ya Okha khülüytu iyman dillinarsh a, dika ʿamalsh yinarsh a lättaḥ bökhalelacharakh tera? Ya Okha khülüytu /Delakh/ qörush bersh q'inosh decharakh tera? /Hxan-hxa, khülüytur bats/
38:29: Zhayna du /hxara Q'urʾan, hxay elcha/‚ Okha sha ḥöga dossiyna‚ berkate dolush‚ tsärga tsünan ayatekh oyla yayta‚ ḥeq'al dolcharna dagadaiyta.
38:30: Okha velira Davudna Suleyman – dika lay. Bakq'alla a, iza sov /Dalla t'e/ t'evörzush verg vu /ʿibadat dareḥ/.
38:31: Tsunna (Suleymanna) gaytira süyranna berg tukhu /qa koga t'eḥ hxottalush/ govrash.
38:32: Tso elira: "Bakq'alla a, suna duqadiyzi niʿmat san Qiosh-Qoburg ḥekhoral kirḥatsa /malkh/ dʿaḥulballalts.
38:33: Sḥayalael üsh suna t'e!" Volavelira iza /urs/ ḥeqa nastarekh a‚ logekh a.
38:34: Okha pitane letsira Suleyman - tsünan ġanta t'e tsḥa deġ dillira Okha‚ t'akqa iza /tōba dartsa Tkhuna/ t'e virzira.
38:35: Tso elira: "/Veza/ Dela‚ gechdeḥ suna‚ lo suna pachchaḥalla, sol t'äḥa tsḥanna khir dotschu taypana. Bakq'alla a, ḥo vu-q t'ekh duqa lush verg".
38:36: Okha müt'aḥ bira tsunna mokh‚ bayn lelash tsünan omrantsa tsunna luuchu‚
38:37: shayt'anash a – masso a ġishloyarkho a‚ hxorda bukha vödurg a (marzhanash lökhush)‚
38:39: /Okha elira tsünga/: "Hxara – Tkhan sovġat du. Dʿalo /ḥan sovġatakh ritsq' ḥan dōlaḥ bolcharakh ḥayna luuchunna/ ya /tsa lush/ satsade /ḥayna luuchunna/, tsḥa a ḥesap a dotsush".
38:40: Bakq'alla a, tsunna Tkhögaḥ gergarlo a du‚ dika t'etovzhiyla a yu.
38:41: Dagavaiyta Tkhan lay Ayyub‚ iza qayqira shen Qiosh-Qobuchünga: "Bakq'alla a, so sḥalätsna shayt'ano khalontsa a‚ ʿazaptsa a".
38:42: /Elira tsünga/: "Tokha ḥayn kog! Hxara – shiyla liychar a du‚ malar a du".
38:43: Okha dʿabelira tsunna shen dözal a‚ qin tsärtsa tsḥäna otstsul Tkhögara q'inkhetam a khilla‚ ḥeq'al dolcharna ḥekham a khilla.
38:44: /Okha elira tsünga/: "Sḥaetsa ḥayn küyga ts'ov‚ iza tokha‚ ḥayn duy q'era ma khiliyta!" Bakq'alla a, Tkhuna iza kariyra sobare. Dika lay vu. Bakq'alla a, iza sov /Dalla t'e/ vörzush verg vu.
38:45: Dagabaiyta Tkhan lesh Ibrahxim‚ Isḥaq'‚ Yaʿq'ub‚ shaygaḥ nitsq' khilla bolu /Dalla ʿibadat dareḥ/‚ tidamalla a khilla bolu /din qochushdareḥ/.
38:46: Okha ts'anbira üsh ts'enachu ʿalashonna – /ekhartan/ ts'a dagadaiyta.
38:47: Bakq'alla a, üsh Tkhan gergaḥ khärzhincharakh‚ dikacharakh bu.
38:48: Dagabaiyta (ḥakhabe) Ismaʿil a‚ Alyasaʿ a‚ Zul-Kifl a – berrige a dikacharakh bu.
38:49: Hxara ḥekham bu. Bakq'alla a, /Delakh/ qörucharna dika t'evörziyla yu.
38:50: ʿadnan boshmash yu tsarna‚ /shayn/ neʿarsh dʿayillina yolu.
38:51: Tevzhina ʿash /khir bu üsh/ tsigaḥ‚ tsara sḥabökhush (tsarna t'eqöḥush) tsu choḥ dukqa stömash a‚ malar a /khir du/.
38:52: Tsarna khir bu bʿärgash gotta bolu‚ tsḥana khennara bolu /mekhkariy/.
38:53: Hxara du-q shuna /dünenaḥ dolush/ khir du ällarg ḥesapan denna.
38:54: Bakq'alla a, hxara Tkhan ritsq' du‚ tsunna qachadalar dats.
38:55: Hxara! Bakq'alla a, /Delan/ dozanakh bevllacharna von t'evörziyla yu-q!
38:56: Zhözhakhati – tsu choḥ bogur bu üsh – ma von /dʿavüzhu/ mott bu-q /iza/!
38:57: Hxara /ʿazap/ ʿovshiyla tsara‚ i du ts'iydina khi a‚ notq'a a.
38:58: Qin a‚ tsünan kepara‚ tayp-taypana /ʿazapash khir du tsarna/.
38:59: Hxara tulġe yu shütsa tsḥäna /zhözhakhatina/ chu yödush. "Marsha doġiyla" (dika t'elatsar) dats tsarna. Bakq'alla a, üsh ts'ergaḥ bogur bu-q (bägga cheq tsa bovlush).
38:60: Tsara (shäsh q'inoshdincharna t'äḥabäznachara) er du: "Hxaʾ‚ shuna "marsha doġiyla" dats-q. Ash ḥalkhadäkqina tkhuna hxara (shu baḥaneḥ qächcha tkho zhözhakhate). Ma von ch'aġo yu-q!"
38:61: Tsara er du: "Veza Dela‚ hxara tkhuna ḥalkhadäkqinchunna t'etokhalaḥ ʿazap shozza ts'ergaḥ".
38:62: Tsara elira: "Vayna hxun khilla tsa gan bozhariy‚ vay shäsh vocharakh lorush khilla bolu /dünenaḥ/?
38:63: Vay tsa deshash dara tsarakh‚ ya /vayn/ bʿärg tsarakh dʿatili?"
38:64: Bakq'alla a, iza ḥaq'-baq' du – zhözhakhatin daysha vovshashtsa q'iysar.
38:65: Aḥ āla /hxay paykhamar/: "Bakq'alla a, so qeramcha vu. Ma vats tsḥa a dela Sha vekq'a Tsḥaʾ volu‚ t'ekh nütsq'ala volu Allahx ben.
38:66: Sha stigaliyn a‚ lättan a‚ tsu shinnan yukq'eḥ dolchun Da volu‚ Sha veza volu‚ t'ekh gechdesh volu".
38:67: Aḥ āla: "Iza – siylaḥ dokqa khabar du.
38:69: Suna tsa khili lakqarchu elekh (Dalla gergaḥ dolu malikekh) lätsna khaar, üsh q'üysush bolush./Ādaman ḥoq'eḥ/.
38:70: Suna väḥiytsa khaiytina so bilgala qeramcha vuyla".
38:71: Dagadaiyta! Ḥan Qiosh-Qobucho ällera malikashka: "Bakq'alla a, So qolla vollu adam popparkh.
38:72: As iza nisvicha‚ tsu chu San sikh sa a dillicha, tsunna /siy desh/ suzhude ġolash".
38:74: /tsḥa/Iblis yuq'aradolush – tso kuralla yira‚ i khilira kerstanekh.
38:75: Tso (Dala) elira: "Hxay Iblis‚ sten düḥalo yina ḥuna suzhud dan As qöllinchunna San küygashtsa? Kuradälla ḥo‚ ya ḥo khilla ḥaladala ġertacharakh".
38:76: Tso elira: "So tsul (Ādamal) dika du. So qöllina Aḥ ts'erakh‚ i qöllina Aḥ popparkh".
38:77: Tso (Dala) elira: "Aradala tsu /yalsamane/ chüra. Bakq'alla a, ḥo neʿalt älla /masso a dikanakh/ khadiynarg du.
38:78: Bakq'alla a, ḥuna San neʿalt du beqaman de dallalts".
38:79: Tso (Ibliso) elira: "Veza Dela‚ khan yakhyēḥ san üsh (adamash) yukhadenben de t'eqachchalts". ("Q'ematde dallalts tsa dolüytush ditaḥ so").
38:80: Tso elira: "Bakq'alla a, khan yakhyinacharakh du-q ḥo!
38:81: Bilgalchu khenan de t'eqachchalts". ("Q'ematde dallalts liyr dats ḥo)."
38:82: Tso elira: "Ḥan vozallakh duy bou as: as tilor ma bu üsh berrige a,
38:83: tsarakh Ḥan sov ts'ena lesh botsursh".
38:84: Tso elira: "Bakq'alla a, ḥaq'-baq' As olu:
38:85: As yuzor ma yu zhözhakhati ḥokh a‚ ḥuna t'äḥa mel hxöttinchukh a – tsarakh massarakh a".
38:86: Aḥ āla /tsu tsateshachärga, hxay Muḥammad/: "As tsunakh tsḥa a makh tsa bökhu‚ so sayna t'edillincharakh a vats".
38:88: Shuna khuur ma du otsunan khabar, tsḥa khan yalcha.
39:1: Zhayna dossor /du hxara/ Sha veza volchu‚ ḥukma /niysa/ desh volchu Delera.
39:2: Bakq'alla a, Okha dossiyna ḥöga zhayna baq'dolchüntsa: Dalla ʿibadat de‚ Tsunna dog ts'ena khülush /dechu/ʿibadateḥ.
39:3: Tq'a Delan dats ts'ena din? Iza votsurg doladiyrash lätsnarsh‚ /olush/: okha tsarna ʿibadat tsa do tsara tkho Dalla gergadakhiyta ben ma-torru gergakhilartsa – bakq'alla a, Dala ḥukma diyr du tsarna yukq'eḥ tseran khilpalo yolchoḥ. Bakq'alla a, Dala nis tsa vo sha khartsverg a‚ t'ekh sov kersta khillarg a.
39:4: Dalla liʾneḥara Shena dözalkho latsa‚ Tso khärzhina khir ma vara Sha qöllinchukh Shena luurg. Vonakh ts'ena vu Iza. Iza Allahx vu‚ Sha tsḥaʾ volu‚ t'ekh sov nütsq'ala volu.
39:5: Tso qöllina stigalash a‚ latta baq'dolchüntsa. Tso ḥavzayo büysa diyne‚ de ḥovzado büysane‚ müt'aḥ bina malkh a‚ butt a– masso a dʿalelash du shen khan t'eqachchalts. Tq'a Iza vats veza verg a‚ t'ekh sov gechdesh verg a?
39:6: Tso shu qöllina tsḥana sinakh (Ādamakh)‚ t'akqa Tso yina tsunakh tsünan zuda (Ḥava)‚ Tso dossiyna shuna däkhnekh barhx– börsha a‚ sten a. Shu qullu Tso shun nanoyn kiyraḥ tsḥana qollartsa /qechu/ qollaral t'äḥa qaa /hxumanan/ bodaneḥ. Iza vu Allahx – shun Ela‚ Tsünan du pachchaḥalla. /Qin/ dela vats Iza votsurg – ma dʿatilosh du shu /Tsunakh/!
39:7: Ash kerstadaḥ – bakq'alla a, i Dela shügara hxumma öshush vats. Iza reza vats Shen leshna /tsara Shen din/ kerstadarna. Ash shukur daḥ – otsüntsa reza vu Iza shuna. Dʿaḥur bats dʿaḥocho qechun moḥ. T'akqa shun Qiosh-Qobuchunna t'e shun dʿaderzar du. Tso düytsur du shüga ash desh khillarg. Bakq'alla a, Iza vu degnashkaḥ derg khuush verg.
39:8: Adam tsḥana bokhamo sḥalätscha, – shen Qiosh-Qobuchünga qoyqu tso, Tsunna t'e vörziy /tōba dartsa/. T'akqa Tso Sha parġatväkqicha Shegara niʿmatatsa – ditsdo tso sha Tsünga qoyqush khillarg ḥalkha‚ Dalla niysarkhoy a bo tso Tsünan neq'akh /nakh/ tilorḥama. Aḥ āla /tsärga, hxay Muḥammad/: "Bakham be ḥan kerstanallitsa tsḥa k'ezzig. Bakq'alla a, ḥo vu ts'eran daykh".
39:9: Sha Dalla ġullaq desh verg büysanan saḥtashkaḥ‚ suzhud desh‚ /lamazash desh/ hxöttina verg ekhartakh qörush, shen Qiosh-Qobuchun q'inkhetame dog dokhush /vuy i tera Dalla ʿesalla echukh/? Aḥ āla: "Tsḥa terra buy khuush bersh a‚ tsa khuush bersh a?" Bakq'alla a, oyla yiyr yu ḥeq'al dolchara.
39:10: Aḥ āla /dʿaḥede tsärga, hxay elcha, San q'amel /: "Hxay san iyman dillina bolu lesh! Shu qera shayn Qiosh-Qobuchukh. Dikanig dinachunna hxoqu dünenaḥ – dikanig du. Delan latta shortta du. Sobar dinacharna shayn yal lur ma yu, tsḥa a ḥesap dotsush".
39:11: Aḥ āla: "Bakq'alla a, suna omra dina, söga Dalla ʿibadat de älla, Tsunna dog ts'ena khülush /dechu/ ʿibadateḥ.
39:12: Suna omra dina so dükhḥaralera busalba khila", - älla.
39:13: Aḥ āla: "Baq'alla a, so qöru, as san Qiosh-Qobuchunna ʿesalla yicha, deza-dokqachu /q'emat/ diynan ʿazapakh".
39:14: Aḥ āla /hxay elcha/: "Dalla ʿibadat do as, Tsunna dog ts'ena khülush sayn ʿibadateḥ.
39:15: Ash ʿibadat de shayna ma-luʾu Iza votsuchunna". Aḥ āla: "Bakq'alla a, eshna bisinarsh bu shäsh a‚ shayn dözal a baynarsh q'ematdiynaḥ". Iza bats tq'a bilgal esham?!
39:16: Tsarna shayna t'ekhula a ts'eran ġatt khir yu‚ shayna bukhakhula a ġatt yu. Ishtta tsüntsa qerabo Dala Shen lesh: «Hxay San lesh! Sokh qeralash».
39:17: T'aġut genadäkqinarsh shena ʿibadat darakh‚ Dalla t'e birzinarsh – tsarna qaʾ bu – aḥ qaʾ bakqa San leshna.
39:18: /Üsh/ dashe ladüyġush bersh bu‚ t'akqa tsünan uggar dikachunna t'äḥahxüttush – üsh bu Dala shäsh nisbinarsh. I bokhkursh – üsh bu ḥeq'aldersh!
39:19: Tq'a Shena t'eḥ ʿazapan dosh /zhözhakhate ġur vu älla/ baq'khillarg – /nislo dika ʿamal yechüntsa/? Aḥ k'elḥarvokqur vuy ts'ergaḥ verg?
39:20: Delaḥ a, shayn Qiosh-Qobuchukh qiyrinarsh – tsarna hxusamash khir yu‚ shayna t'ekhula a dina dälla ts'enosh dolush‚ shayna bukhakhula khish a lelash – Delera vaʿda khilla. Dala tsa yokhayo /Shen/ vaʿda.
39:21: Ḥuna tsa gina: Dala dossiyna stigalara khi‚ t'akqa dokhüytu i lättaḥ dolchu ḥostash chu‚ t'akqa tsüntsa yalta sḥadokqu Tso, tayp-taypana besnash dolush‚ t'akqa daq'adolüytu Tso – ḥuna i go mazhdella‚ t'akqa Tso tsarakh /ätta, yokhiyna/ kiysakash khülüytu. Bakq'alla a, tsu choḥ ḥekham bu ḥeq'aldolcharna.
39:22: Tq'a Dala shen dog islamana dʿadellinarg‚ sha shen Qiosh-Qobuchun nur t'eḥ volush /dika vats shen dagna t'e muhxar tökhnachul/? Bala bu shayn degnash Dela ḥekhorakh q'iza dolcharna. Üsh bilgalchu tilar choḥ bu-q!
39:23: Dala khabarakh uggar khaznig dossora – shen daq'oy (ayatash) vovshekh tera a dolu (isbäḥallitsa a, mäʿnitsa a), yukh-yukha düytsush a dolu zhayna. Tsunakh shayn Qiosh-Qobuchukh qörucheran ch'or dettalo /Delan ʿazapakh qörush/‚ t'akqa tseran ch'or a‚ degnash a Dela ḥekhorna k'adlo /yalsamaniga dog dokhush/. Iza bu Delan niysa neq'‚ Tso nisvo tsüntsa Shena luurg. Dala tilavala vütush verg – tsünan vats /sha/ nisviyrig.
39:24: Tq'a shen yuḥatsa q'ematdiynaḥ ʿazapan vonakh larvala ġirtinarg /vu tsu zhözhakhatikh larinchukh tera/? Älla /khir du/ zulamkhoshka: "ʿovsha /hxintsa/ shayna /dünenaḥ/ karadesh khillarg!"
39:25: Tsaral ḥalkha khillachara a khartsbira /elchanash/ – ʿazap deara tsarna shayna khaa tsa luchüra.
39:26: Dala ʿavshiytira tsärga dünenan dakhareḥ siysazalla, tq'a ekhartan ʿazap vuno dokqa du‚ üsh khuush khilleḥ.
39:27: Okha daliyna nakhana hxokqu Q'urʾanchoḥ hxor /hxumanakh/ masal, üsh oyla esh khir batsara te?
39:28: ʿärbiyn /mattaḥ/ Q'urʾan /khiliytina/‚ tsḥa a gamo yotsush – üsh qörur batsara te?
39:29: Valiyna Dala masalna tsḥa stag‚ bart tsa khüluchu naq'ostasha q'üysush volu (duqa nekhan dolaḥ volu)‚ /vazha/ stag a (vekq'a tsḥana stegan dolaḥ volu). I shiʾ tsḥaterra vuy masaltsa? Khastam bu Dalla. Hxette a‚ tsarakh duqakhbolcharna tsa khäa-q.
39:30: Bakq'alla a, ḥo a liyr volush vu /hxay Muḥammad/‚ bakq'alla a, üsh a liyr bolush bu.
39:31: T'akqa bakq'alla a, shu q'ematdiynaḥ shayn Dalla ḥalkhaḥ q'üysush khir du.
39:32: Mila vu tq'a t'ekh zulame sha Delan ḥoq'eḥ khartslüysh volchul‚ sha baq'derg, i shega deʾnachul t'äḥa, khartsdesh volchul? Tq'a zhözhakhatina choḥ yats ʿen mettig kerstanashna? /Ma shortta yu!/
39:33: Sha baq'dolchüntsa veʾnarg a /Muḥammad-paykhamar/, iza baq'vesh bersh a /muʾma nakh/ – üsh bu /Delakh/ qörush bersh.
39:34: Tsarna shayna luurg /khir/ yu shayn Qiosh-Qobuchunna gergaḥ. I bu dikacheran /khaza/ beqam.
39:35: Dala ts'anbarḥama uggar vochu shäsh dinchukh (q'inakh)‚ tsarna shayn yal yalarḥama, shäsh desh khillachukh uggar khazachüntsa.
39:36: Tq'a Dela vats qacho yolush Shen lena? Tsara ḥuna qeramash tüysu Tsul lakharchärtsa. Milla velaḥ a Dala tilavala vitinarg – ma vats tsunna tsḥa a iza nisviyrig.
39:37: Milla velaḥ a Dala nisvesh verg – ma vats tsḥa a i tilavan. Tq'a Dela vats veza verg a‚ shegaḥ beqam berg a? /Vu!/
39:38: Aḥ tsärga khätticha /hxay Muḥammad/: "Ḥan qöllina stigalash a‚ latta a" älla‚ tsara er ma du: "Dala". Aḥ āla: "Goy shuna i ash, Dela a vitina shayga qoyqursh‚ Dalla suna tsḥa zen liʾcha‚ tsara dʿadokqur dolush duy i Tsünan zen‚ ya Tsunna liʾcha, suna q'inkhetam‚ tsara satsor bolush buy i Tsünan q'inkhetam?" Aḥ āla: "Toam bu suna Dela‚ Tsunna t'e tovzhiyla shäsh t'etovzhush bersh".
39:39: Aḥ āla: "San q'am‚ ʿamal ye shayna megachu kepara‚ bakq'alla a, so a ʿamal yesh vu. T'äḥa khuur du shuna,
39:40: ḥanna t'e doġur du ʿazap, tsünan siy a doyʾush‚ ḥanna t'e ḥärchar du lättash dolu ʿazap."
39:41: Bakq'alla a, Okha dossiyna ḥöga nakhana /desha, ḥukma dan/ zhayna baq'dolchüntsa. Nisvellarg – shena /nisvella/‚ tilavellarg – iza a shena tilavella. Ḥo ma vats tsarna shegaḥ t'etovzhiyla yerg.
39:42: Dala sḥaötsu /nekhan/ sinosh üsh lechu khenaḥ‚ tsadellarg – nabarkh/sḥaötsu/. Tso sḥaötsu /nabarkh/ shena ʿozhalla satsam khillarg‚ dʿakhötsu vazha shen tökhnachu khanna. Bakq'alla a, tsu choḥ delilash ma du oyla yechu q'omana.
39:43: Tsara lätsna, Dela a vitina, shayna ġodokqursh? Aḥ āla /tsärga, hxay Muḥammad/: "Üsh tsḥanna a hxumanna doladesh tsa khilcha a‚ ḥeq'ale tsa khilcha a?"
39:44: Aḥ āla: "Delan du ġodakqar derrige a. Tsünan du stigaliyn a‚ lättan a pachchaḥalla. T'akqa Tsunna t'e shu dʿaderzor dolush du".
39:45: Vekq'a tsḥa Allahx-Dela ḥekhavicha, degnash tokhalo /i tsa dezash/ ekhartakh tsa teshash bolcheran. Iza votsursh ḥekhabicha, – üsh bakqiybe.
39:46: Aḥ āla /otsu mushrikashka, hxay elcha/: "/Veza/ Dela‚ /Ḥo vu-q/ stigalsh a‚ latta a qöllinarg‚ q'aylakha derg a‚ guchoḥ derg a khuush verg a‚ Aḥ ḥukma diyr du-q Ḥayn leshna yukq'eḥ‚ tsara khilpalo yesh khillachoḥ".
39:47: Zulam dinacharna lättaḥ mel derg a‚ tsüntsa qin otstsul khilcha a, – i dʿalur ma dara tsara q'ematdiynaḥ ʿazapan vochunna düḥal (k'elḥarbovlarḥama). Guchudelira tsarna Delera tsara tsḥa a ḥesap tsa desh khillarg.
39:48: Guchudelira tsarna bökha hxumanash shäsh karadinchukh‚ ḥaqadelira tsarakh üsh shekh tsa beshash khillarg.
39:49: Adamo tsḥana zeno sha sḥalätscha, Tkhöga qoyqu‚ t'akqa Okha iza Tkhaygara niʿmate ḥovzadicha‚ tso olu: "Bakq'alla a, iza-m dellera suna san khaarna (so-suo baḥaneḥ)". Hxette a‚ iza (Dala tsunna dellarg) pitana (i zerḥama della) du‚ delaḥ a tsarakh duqakhbolcharna tsa khäa-q.
39:50: Iza elira tsaral ḥalkha khillachara a‚ k'elḥar tsa bekhira üsh tsarna karadesh khillacho.
39:51: Tsarakh qiira bökha hxumanash‚ tsarna karadina khilla dolu. Hxoqarakh zulam dinarsh – tsarakh a qüur du shayna karadina dolu bökha hxumanash‚ tsara (i Delan ʿazap) ġeldiyr ma dats. (Tsunakh bovdur ma bats üsh).
39:52: Tsarna tsa khiʾna te Dala ritsq' darzhadesh khilar Shena luuchunna /i zerḥama/‚ baram a besh /khilar Shena luuchunna i bale ozorna/. Bakq'alla a, tsu choḥ delilash du-q teshash bolchu nakhana.
39:53: Aḥ āla /hxay Muḥammad, As (Dala) bokhu älla/:"Hxay San shayna /duqa q'inosh dartsa/ t'alamza khilla bolu lesh! Ash dog ma dilla Delan q'inkhetamakh. Bakq'alla a, Dala gechdo q'inosh derrige a. Bakq'alla a, Iza t'ekh gechdiyrig a‚ q'inkhetame verg a vu.
39:54: Shayn Qiosh-Qobuchunna t'e ḥovza (tōba dartsa)‚ müt'aḥ khila Tsunna shayga ʿazap dāle ḥalkha‚ t'akqa shuna ġo diyr dats.
39:55: T'äḥahxitta shayga shayn Qiosh-Qobuchüngara dossiynachukh uggar khazachunna, shayna ts'ekhḥana ʿazap dāle, shuna khaa tsa lush.
39:56: Sino alarkh /larlo/: "Baylaḥ disi so, Delan aġorḥara as ledarlo yarna‚ so khilira-q /Delan ayatekh/ tsadeshacharakh".
39:57: Ya tso alarkh: "Dala so nisdineḥ‚ so a khir ma dara /Delakh/ qörucharakh".
39:58: Ya tso alarkh, ʿazap shena gicha: "Suna yukhadelaḥara /dünenan dakhar/, – so khir ma dara dikanig decharakh".
39:59: Hxaʾ‚ deana ḥöga San ayatash‚ üsh khartsdira aḥ‚ ḥo kuradelira‚ ḥo khilira tsateshacharakh.
39:60: Q'ematdiynaḥ ḥuna gur bu Dalla t'eḥ khartsliynarsh shayn yakhḥash ʿarzhʾella. Tq'a zhözhakhatina choḥ yats ʿan mettig kurabolcharna?/Yu, Delora!/
39:61: Dala k'elḥarbokhur bu /Delakh/ qörush khillarsh /shäsh lökhu yalsamani shayna khülush/ shayna tolam khilartsa. Tsarakh ḥaqalur dats bökha hxuma‚ üsh singattame a khir bats.
39:62: Dela vu masso a hxumanan qollarkho. Iza masso a hxumanna Shegaḥ t'etovzhiyla yolush ma vu.
39:63: Tsünan du stigaliyn a‚ lättan a dōġanash. Delan ayatekh tsateshnarsh – üsh bu eshnarsh.
39:64: Aḥ āla /tsu mushrikashka, hxay elcha/: "Dela votsuchunna omra do ash söga ʿibadat de oliy‚ hxay‚ zhehxal nakh?!"
39:65: Ḥöga väḥitsa khaiytina‚ ḥol ḥalkhalerchärga a: "Aḥ naq'ost latsaḥ /Delatsa/‚ ḥan ʿamal yoyʾur yu ḥuna‚ ḥo eshnacharakh khir vu ḥuna".
39:66: Hxeta Dalla ʿibadat de aḥ‚ ḥo khila /Dalla/ shukur decharakh.
39:67: Makh tsa khadiyra tsara Delan khado ma-bezza‚ latta derrig Tsünan buynaḥ khir du q'ematdiynaḥ‚ stigalsh a khir yu ḥarchiyna Tsünan ättu küygatsa. /Masso a qachambatsarekh/ ts'ena vu Iza‚ laqaveli tsara /Shetsa/ naq'ost latsarkh.
39:68: Sur loqur yu (Israfil maliko dükhḥara zurmi chu hxup er du) – tentakver stigalshkaḥ mel verg a‚ lättaḥ mel verg a‚ Dalla liʾnarg votsurg. Yukha a loqur yu /sur/ qin tsq'a – üsh /keshnashkara/ ġevtina büsur bu, ḥözhush.
39:69: Q'egira latta shen Qiosh-Qobuchun nüratsa‚ oḥadillira zhayna‚ sḥabalabira paykhamarsh a‚ teshash a‚ qiel yira tsarna yukq'eḥ baq'dolchüntsa‚ tsarna zulam diyr dats.
39:70: Dʿadelira /mekhana/ hxora sina sha dinarg‚ Iza dika khuush vu tsara desh derg.
39:71: Dʿabigira tsateshnarsh zhözhakhate tobanashtsa‚ üsh tsiga bäkhkicha, dʿaellaelira tsünan neʿarsh‚ elira tsärga tsünan ġarolasha: "Tsa bäkhkira shüga elchanash shuna yukq'era‚ shäsh shuna shun Qiosh-Qobuchun ayatash a döshush‚ shäsh shuna dʿaḥedesh shun hxoqu denna düḥalqetar?" Tsara elira: "Hxaʾ‚ delaḥ a baq'khili kerstanashna ʿazap khir du älla dosh".
39:72: Elira: "Chuġo zhözhakhatina neʿarshkakhula, büsush tsu choḥ guttarenna a". Ma von yu-q kurabevllacheran choḥ ʿen mettig.
39:73: Dʿabigira shayn Qiosh-Qobuchukh qörush khillarsh yalsamane tobanashtsa‚ üsh tsiga bäkhkicha, dʿaellaelira tsünan neʿarsh‚ elira tsärga tsünan ġarolasha: "Salam-marshalla du shüga. Deq'ala khili shu. Chuġo tsunna guttarena a".
39:74: Tsara er du: "Khastam bu Dalla‚ Sha tkhuna baq'khiliytina Shen vaʿda‚ Tso irsana delira tkhuna /yalsamanin/ latta‚ oḥakhovshur du tkho yalsamaneḥ tkhayna luʾuchoḥ". ʿamal yecheran ma khaza yal yu-q /iza/!
39:75: 75.Ḥuna gur du /hxay elcha/ malikash, ḥiyzash ʿarshana gonakh‚ tasbiḥ desh shayn Qiosh-Qobuchunna I khastortsa. Qiel yiyr yu tsarna yukq'eḥ baq'dolchüntsa‚ er du (teshash khillachara): "Khastam bu Dalla – ʿalamiyn Dena".
40:2: Zhayna dossor /du hxara/ Sha veza volchu‚ khuush volchu Delera,
40:3: Sha q'inna gechdiyrig volchu‚ Sha tōba q'obaldiyrig volchu‚ beqameḥ ch'oġa volchu, komärshalla Shegaḥ yolchu. Vats /qin/ dela Iza votsurg‚ Tsünga du /q'ematdiynaḥ masseran a/ dʿaderzar.
40:4: Q'üysur ma dats Delan ayatashkaḥ shäsh /Delakh/ tsateshnachara ben‚ ḥo /hxay elcha/ ʿekha ma voyla tseran makhkaḥ /kura/ dʿasaidaro.
40:5: Khartsdira /Delan ts'ena din/ tsaral ḥalkha Nuḥan q'omo a‚ tsaral t'äḥa tobanasha a. Oyla yesh dara hxor ummat shen elchanakh iza /bokham bartsa/ sḥalatsa. Tsara q'iysira khartsdolchüntsa, tsüntsa baq'derg daya ġertash, – As sḥaletsira üsh /hxallakbartsa/. Mukha khili San taʿzar!
40:6: Ishtta baq'khilira ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchun dosh tsateshnacharna t'eḥ‚ üsh /zhözhakhatin/ ts'eran day bu älla dolu.
40:7: Shäsh ʿarsh lelosh bersh a, tsunna gonakh bersh a tasbiḥ desh bu khastambartsa shayn Qiosh-Qobuchunna‚ teshash bu Tsunakh‚ gechdar dökhush bu iyman dillincharna: "Tkhan Qiosh-Qoburg‚ masso a hxumanna shorto yina Aḥ q'inkhetamtsa a‚ ʿilmantsa a‚ Aḥ gechdelaḥ tōba dinacharna a‚ Ḥan neq'ana t'äḥahxittincharna a‚ üsh larbelaḥ zhözhakhatin ʿazapakh.
40:8: Tkhan Qiosh-Qoburg‚ ʿadnan/yalsamanin/ boshmash chu bokhkalaḥ üsh‚ Aḥ tsarna vaʿda yina yolchu‚ tseran daykh a‚ zudarekh a‚ zürretakh a dika ʿamal mel yinarg a. Bakq'alla a, Ḥo vu-q veza verg a‚ ḥukma /niysa/ desh verg a.
40:9: Aḥ larbelaḥ üsh vochukh (q'inosh baḥaneḥ dechu ʿazapakh). Otsu diynaḥ Aḥ sha vochukh larvinarg – Aḥ q'inkhetam bina tsunakh. Iza bu-q siylaḥ-bokqa tolam".
40:10: Bakq'alla a, tsateshnachärga qoyqur ma du: "Delan tsabezam vuno a bokqa bu shun tsabezamal shayga‚ shu qoyqura iymane – ash kerstadora".
40:11: Tsara elira: "Tkhan Qiosh-Qoburg‚ Aḥ daliytira tkho shozza‚ Aḥ den a dira tkho shozza‚ tkho q'era khilla tkhayn q'inoshna. Aradovla tsḥa a neq' buy?"
40:12: Iza (ʿazap du shuna) vekq'a tsḥana Dele qayqicha, ash i kerstadarna‚ Tsüntsa naq'ost lotsush khilcha, shu tesharna. Ḥukma /hxintsa/ leqa-vokqa volchu Delan du.
40:13: Iza vu goytush shuna Shen ayatash‚ Tso oḥadossado shuna stigalara ritsq' (mälkhan serlo a, doġa a doüytush). Oyla tsa yo-q sha /Dalla/ t'evörzush volcho ben.
40:14: Qayqa Dele shäsh Tsunna dog ts'ena khülush /dechu/ ʿibadateḥ, i kerstanashna /mel/ tsa dezaḥ a.
40:15: Darzhash ḥaladokhurg /vu Iza/‚ /shegaḥ/ ʿarsh yolush‚ Sa dokhüytu Tso Shen lekh Shena luuchünga qeram tasa vovshashtsa tsḥänaqetar khin dolchu dentsa.
40:16: Otsu diynaḥ üsh guchubevr bu /arabevr bu shayn keshnashkara/. Ḥullur dats Delakh tsarakh derg hxumma a. Ḥenan du pachchaḥalla takhana (q'ematdiynaḥ)? Sha tsḥaʾ volchu‚ t'ekh nütsq'ala volchu Delan du-q!
40:17: Takhana beqam biyr bu hxor sinna sha /dünenaḥ/ karadinchüntsa. Zulam khir dats takhana. Bakq'alla a, Dela sikhanig vu ḥesap dareḥ.
40:18: Qeram tasa tsarna /hxay elcha/ gergadoġur dolchu /q'emat/dentsa‚ /nekhan/ degnash q'amq'argashna t'e qächcha /qeradella dettalush/‚ üsh /shayn öġazlo a, singattam a/ yukhaoza ġertash /khir bolchu/. Ma khir vats zulamkhoshna tsḥa a dottaġ a, tsḥa a ġodokqurg a, shena /üsh/ müt'aḥ a bolush.
40:19: Khäa Tsunna bʿärgiyn teshnabekhk a /ḥaram hxumane ḥözhush/‚ degnasha ḥuldiyrig a.
40:20: Dala qiel yo baq'dolchüntsa. Iza a vitina, tsara shayga qoyqush bolchara qiel tsa yo tsḥanna a hxumantsa. Bakq'alla a, Dela – Iza vu khezash verg a‚ gush verg a.
40:21: Üsh tsa lella lättakhula‚ t'akqa üsh tsa ḥözhu, mukha khilla tsaral ḥalkha khillacheran chaqe? Üsh bara tsaral vuno ch'oġa nitsq'atsa a‚ lättaḥ asar ditartsa a. Dala sḥaletsira üsh shayn q'inosh baḥaneḥ‚ ma tsa khilira tsarna Delan düḥal tsḥa a lardarkho.
40:22: Iza /khilla/ tsärga boġush khilarna shayn elchanash bilgalonashtsa – tsara üsh khartsbora. Dala sḥaletsira üsh. Bakq'alla a, Iza nütsq'ala verg a vu‚ beqamtsa ch'oġanig a vu.
40:23: Okha vakhiytira Musa Tkhayn ayatashtsa a‚ bilgalchu baq'ontsa a
40:24: Firʿavne a‚ Hxamane a‚ Q'arune a. Tsara elira: "/Iza/ t'ekh khartslüysh volu bozbuuncha vu".
40:25: Iza tsärga veʾcha Tkhögara baq'dolchüntsa, tsara elira: "Baya tsüntsa tsḥäna iyman dillincheran k'entiy‚ diyna bita tseran zudariy". Kerstaniyn mekarlo tilarna choḥ ben ma yats.
40:26: Firʿavno elira: "Vita so Musa ven. Shen Qiosh-Qobuchünga qoyqur tso. Bakq'alla a, so qöru tso shun din khiytsorna ya lättaḥ bökhanig guchudakqarna".
40:27: Musas elira: "Bakq'alla a, so larvella san Qiosh-Qobuchüntsa a‚ shun Qiosh-Qobuchüntsa a masso a ḥesapan /q'emat/ diynakh tsa teshash kuravällachukh ".
40:28: Firʿavnan dözalakh tsḥana iyman dillinchu i shegaḥ ḥuldesh volchu staga elira: "Ash vö tq'a stag tso alarna: "San Qiosh-Qoburg tsḥa Allahx-Dela vu?" Tq'a iza shüga shun Qiosh-Qobuchüngara bilgalonashtsa ma veana. Iza khartslüysh velaḥ, tsunna shena yu-q i khartso. I baq'lüysh velaḥ, tso shuna khir du bokhuchukh tsḥaderg ḥaqalur (qetar) ma du shukh. Bakq'alla a, Dala nis tsa vo sha t'alamza verg a‚ t'ekh khartsverg a.
40:29: Hxay san q'am‚ shuna du pachchaḥalla takhana‚ shu /Misran/ lättaḥ /massaral/ tölush dolush. Ḥan ġo diyr du vayna Delan nitsq'akh /k'elḥaradovla/, i vayga beʾcha?" Firʿavno elira: "As shuna tsa goytu sayna gushderg ben‚ as shu nis tsa do niysonan novq'a ben".
40:30: Iyman dillincho elira: "San q'am‚ bakq'alla a, so qöru shuna tobaniyn de sannachu diynakh /ash Musa veḥ/.
40:31: Nuḥan q'oman a‚ ʿadiyn a‚ Samudiyn a‚ tsaral t'äḥa khillacheran ʿadatakh tera /du-q hxara ash lelorig/. Dela ma vats zulam luush Shen leshna.
40:32: Hxay san q'am‚ bakq'alla a, so qöru shuna vovshashka qayqaran diynakh.
40:33: Shu dukhadovdu dolchu diynakh – ma khir vats shuna Delera tsḥa a ġöncha. Dala tilavala vitinarg – ma vats tsunna tsḥa a nisviyrig".
40:34: Shüga veara ḥalkha Yȳsuf bilgalonashtsa, shu lättash du shekoneḥ tso shüga deʾnachukh. Iza hxallaqilcha (velcha), ash elira: "Vaiytanne a voüytur ma vats Dala tsul t'äḥa elcha". Ishtta tilabala bütu Dala shäsh t'alamza a, shekoneḥ a bersh,
40:35: Shäsh Delan ayatashkaḥ q'üysush bolu shayga eana baq'o a yotsush. Bokqa khili /tsärga bolu/ tsabezam Dalla gergaḥ a‚ iyman dillincharna gergaḥ a. Ishtta muhxar tukhu Dala hxor kuravällachun‚ /nakhana/ nitsq'bechun dagna t'e.
40:36: Firʿavno elira: "Hxay Hxaman! Yuġa suna ġala‚ so qia tarlo neq'ashka,
40:37: stiglaniyn neq'ashka. Musan Dalla t'eqochur vu so. Bakq'alla a, suna kheta i (Musa) kharts vu älla". Ishtta khazdina Firʿavnana tsünan balkhan vonig‚ dʿaḥovzina iza /niysachu/ neq'akh. Firʿavnan mekarlo ma yats hxallaqilar choḥ ben.
40:38: /T'akqa/ elira /Firʿavnan q'oman yukq'era/ iyman dillincho: "Hxay san q'am‚ suna t'äḥahxitta‚- as nisdiyr du shu niysonan novq'a.
40:39: Hxay san q'am! Bakq'alla a, hxara dünenan dakhar /k'ezzig/ zovq ḥegar du‚ tq'a ekhart – iza du ch'aġonan ts'a.
40:40: Vonig dinarg – tsunna beqam khir bats i sannachüntsa (vochüntsa) ben. Dikanig dinarg‚ stag velaḥ a‚ zuda elaḥ a‚ sha muʾma a volush – üsh yalsamani chu ġur bu‚ tsarna ritsq' lur du tsu choḥ, ḥesap a dotsush.
40:41: Hxay san q'am! Hxun du suna shu qayqa /zhözhakhatekh/ k'elḥardovlare‚ ash so qayqa /zhözhakhatin/ ts'erga?
40:42: Ash so qoyqu as Dalla kerstanalla dare‚ as Tsüntsa naq'ost latsare, suna shetsa tsḥa a ʿilma dotsurg‚ tq'a as shu qoyqu Sha veza a‚ t'ekh gechdiyrig a volchünga.
40:43: Dera, asha-m qoyqu so shena dünenaḥ a‚ ekhartaḥ a tsḥa a qayqar dotsuchünga‚ tq'a vayn dʿaderzar Dele ma du‚ amma t'alamza bersh – üsh ma bu /zhözhakhatin/ ts'eran day.
40:44: Shuna t'äḥa dagadoġur du as shüga düytsurg. As sayn ġullaq Dele dʿalo. Bakq'alla a, Dela vu-q /Shen/ lesh (khalq') gush verg."
40:45: Dala larvira iza (Firʿavnan q'omakh teshash khillarg) tsara yinchu mekarlonan vonakh. Ḥaqadelira Firʿavnan dözalakh ʿazapan vonig.
40:46: Ts'e – tsunna t'e üsh ḥalkhahxottor bu ʿüyranna a‚ süyranna a‚ saḥt hxuttuchu diynaḥ /qayqar khir du tsärga/: "Chubolla Firʿavnan dözal uggar ch'oġachu ʿazape".
40:47: Dagadaiyta! Vovshashtsa q'iysame bevr bu üsh /zhözhakhatin/ ts'ergaḥ‚ ġiylachara er du kurabevlla khillachärga: "Bakq'alla a, tkho dara shuna t'äḥahxittina /dünenaḥ ash bokhurg desh‚ hxintsa/ ash dʿadokqiy tkhokh ts'eran /ʿazapakh/ tsḥa a dāq'a?"
40:48: Shäsh kurabevlla khillachara er du: "/Hxan-hxa! Tsa tarlo./Bakq'alla a, vay derrige a tsu choḥ/ts'ergaḥ/ du-q. Bakq'alla a, Dala /niysa/ ḥukma dina leshna yukq'eḥ".
40:49: Er du ts'ergaḥ bolchara zhözhakhatin ġarolashka: "Dekhasha shayn Qiosh-Qobuchünga‚ dayde āla tkhuna t'era ʿazap tsḥana denna muq'ane a".
40:50: Tsara (zhözhakhatin ġarolasha) er du: "Shüga bokhküytush tsa khilira shun elchanash bilgalonashtsa?" Tsara elira: "Hxaʾ". Elira /ġarolasha/: "Dekha shäsh!" Kerstaniyn dekhar ma dats tilarna choḥ ben.
40:51: Bakq'alla a, Okha ġo diyr ma du Tkhayn elchanashna a‚ iyman dillincharna a dünenan dakhareḥ a‚ teshash hxuttuchu /q'emat/ diynaḥ a.
40:52: Otsu diynaḥ zulamkhoshna payda biyr bats tseran bekhkazlonasha. Tsarna neʿalt du‚ tsarna kechyina yu /ekhartaḥ/ von hxusam.
40:53: Okha belira Musaga niysa neq'‚ irsana ditira Israilan k'entashna zhayna (Tavrat).
40:54: Niysa neq' a‚ ḥekham a /khilla dolu/ ḥeq'aldolcharna.
40:55: Sobare khila /hxay Muḥammad/‚ bakq'alla a, Delan vaʿda ḥaq'-baq' yu‚ gechdar dekha ḥayn q'inna‚ tasbiḥ de ḥayn Qiosh-Qobuchunna khastam bartsa saraḥ a‚ ʿüyranna a.
40:56: Bakq'alla a, Delan ayatashkaḥ, shayga eana tsḥa a baq'o yotsush, q'üysush bersh – bakq'alla a, tseran kiyraḥ ma yats kuralla ben‚ üsh shena t'e qüur yotsu (üsh shayn laame qochur botsu). Larvalar lakha Delatsa. Bakq'alla a, Iza vu khezash verg a‚ gush verg a.
40:57: Sheko yotstsush, stigalsh a‚ latta a qollar vuno dokqa du nakh qollaral‚ delaḥ a duqakhbolchu nakhana tsa khäa-q.
40:58: Tsḥaterra bats bʿärsadotsurg a‚ gush verg a, /ishtta/ iyman a dillina, dika ʿamalsh yinarsh a‚ vonig desh verg a. Ma k'ezzig du-q ash oyla yiyrig!
40:59: Bakq'alla a, saḥt doġur dolush du, sheko yats tsu choḥ‚ delaḥ a duqakhbolu nakh teshash bats-q.
40:60: Shu Qetosh-Qiocho älla: "Söga qayqa (dekha) – As zhop lur du shuna". Bakq'alla a, shäsh Suna ʿibadat darakh kurabovlush bersh – chuġur ma bu zhözhakhatina, k'elbisina.”
40:61: Dela vu khiliytinarg shuna büysa shüga sadaʿiyta shena choḥ‚ de a /shuna/ serlo lush /shayn ġullaqash dan/. Bakq'alla a, Dela niʿmat dolush vu-q nakhana /dala/‚ delaḥ a duqakhbolchu nakha barkalla tsa olu-q.
40:62: I vu-q Allahx-Dela‚ shun Qiosh-Qoburg‚ masso a hxumanan qollarkho. /Qin/ dela vats Iza votsurg. Ma ʿekhosh du shu /genadokhush du baq'dolchukh/!
40:63: Ishtta ʿekhabora /genabokhura baq'dolchukh/ Delan ayatashna inkarlo yesh khillarsh.
40:64: Dela vu shuna lättakh ch'aġo yinarg‚ stigalkh ġishlo yinarg‚ shuna kütsash dinarg‚ t'akqa khazdina Tso shun kütsash, ts'enachu hxumanekh ritsq' a della shuna. I vu Allahx-Dela – shun Qiosh-Qoburg. Berkate khili Dela – ʿalamiyn Da.
40:65: Iza diynaverg vu‚ /qin/ dela vats Iza votsurg‚ qayqa Tsünga‚ Tsunna dog ts'ena khülush /dechu/ ʿibadateḥ. Khastam bu Dalla – ʿalamiyn Dena!
40:66: Aḥ āla /hxay elcha/: "Bakq'alla a, suna dikhkina ʿibadat dan ash, Dela a vitina, /shayga/ qoyqucharna san Qiosh-Qobuchüngara söga bilgalonash eʾnachul t'äḥa‚ suna omra dina ʿalamiyn Dena müt'aḥ khilar".
40:67: Iza vu shu qöllinarg popparkh /shun da Ᾱdam/‚ t'akqa t'adamakh /shun t'äḥe/‚ t'akqa ts'iyn ulkhakh‚ t'akqa, berash khüliy, aradokhu shu‚ t'akqa shu t'eqiarḥama shayn nitsq'ana‚ t'akqa shukh q'ena nakh khiliyta. Shukh vu ḥalkha lesh verg a. /I qiel yina Dala/ shu tökhnachu khanna t'eqacharḥama a, shu ḥeq'ale khiliytirḥama a.
40:68: Iza vu denvolüyturg a‚ volüyturg a. Shen /tsḥana/ ġullaq t'eḥ satsam khilcha‚ Tso olu tsünga: "Khila!" – iza khülu.
40:69: Ḥuna tsa gina i Delan ayatashkaḥ q'üysush bersh? Ma dʿaḥovzosh bu üsh /baq'dolchukh/!
40:70: /Üsh bu/ shäsh khartsdinarsh zhayna a‚ Okha shetsa Tkhayn elchanash bakhiytinarg a. T'äḥa khuur du-q tsarna!
40:71: Shayna logekh burzhalsh-ġomatash a tökhcha‚ zʿenash a /ekhkicha/, taqor bu üsh
40:72: qekhkachu khi chu‚ t'akqa ts'ergaḥ bagor bu /begna, cheq tsa bovlush/.
40:73: T'akqa er /du/ tsärga: "Michaḥ du ash /Delatsa/ naq'ost lotsush khillarg
40:74: Allahx votsurg?" Tsara er du: "Dʿatili üsh tkhokh. Hxaʾ‚ tkho datsara qoyqush ḥalkha hxumanne a". Ishtta tilabala bütu Dala kerstanash.
40:75: I (ʿazap du shuna) lättaḥ, tsḥa a baq'o a yotsush, shu dakqiydedash khilarna a‚ shu t'ekh khazakhetash khilarna a.
40:76: Chuġo zhözhakhatin neʿarshkakhula, guttarenna tsu choḥ düsush. Ma von choḥ ʿen mettig yu-q kurabevllacheran!
40:77: Sobare khila /hxay elcha/‚ bakq'alla a, Delan vaʿda ḥaq'-baq' yu. Okha goytur ma du ḥuna /khir du/ällachekh tsḥadolu hxumanash ya Okha volüytur vu ḥo – t'akqa Tkhuna t'e dʿaberzor bu üsh.
40:78: Bakq'al Okha bakhiytinera elchanash ḥol ḥalkha a‚ tsarakh Okha ḥuna biytsinarsh a bu‚ tsarakh Okha ḥuna biytsaza bersh a bu. Baq'aḥara tsa khilla tsḥanna a elchanna tsḥa a ayat dān, Delan purbantsa ben. Delan omra deʾcha, satsam khilira baq'dolchüntsa – quzaḥ iyshira /din/ khartsdesh khillarsh.
40:79: Dela vu shuna bezhanash khiliytinarg: tsarakh /tsḥadersh/ shuna t'ekhovsha‚ tsarakh /tsḥadersh/ ash daa a dou.
40:80: Shuna tsärgaḥ /qin/ paydanash a bu‚ ash tsarna t'eḥ qochushdarḥama shayn dagaḥ dolu ḥasht‚ tsarna t'eḥ a‚ kemanna t'eḥ a shu dʿalelado.
40:81: Tso goytu shuna Shen ayatash. Delan mülkhachu ayatana ash inkarlo yo?
40:82: Üsh tsa lella lättakhula‚ tsa ḥovsu te‚ mukha khilla tsaral ḥalkha khillacheran chaqe? Üsh ma bara vuno tsaral duqa nitsq'atsa a‚ lättaḥ /dütuchu/ asartsa a vuno ch'oġa a – k'elḥar ma tsa bekhira üsh tsarna /dünenaḥ/ karadesh khillacho.
40:83: Tsärga bäkhkicha tseran elchanash bilgalonashtsa‚ bakqiybira üsh shaygaḥ dolchu /dünenan/ ʿilmantsa‚ tsarakh ḥaqadelira tsara sha siysazadesh khillarg.
40:84: Shayna Tkhan nitsq' gicha‚ tsara elira: "Okha iyman dilli vekq'a tsḥana Dele‚ Okha kerstadina tkhäsh Tsüntsa naq'ost lotsush khillarg".
40:85: Tsa khilira tsarna paydeḥ tseran iyman Tkhan nitsq' beʾnachul t'äḥa. Delan ʿadat /du iza/‚ Tsünan leshkaḥ sha cheqdälla dolu. Iyshira quzaḥ kerstanash.
41:2: /Zhayna/ dossor /du hxara paykhamare/ Sha sov q'inkhetame a‚ q'inkhetame a volchüngara.
41:3: Zhayna /du hxara/‚ Shen ayatash q'astiyna dolu‚ ʿärbiyn /mattaḥ/ deshar a khilla khuush bolchu nakhana.
41:4: Qaʾ baḥarg a‚ qeramcha a /khilla du i Q'urʾan/‚ tsarakh duqakhbersh dʿabirzi – shayna tsa khezash (i q'obal tsa desh).
41:5: Tsara (Q'urʾan t'e tsa lotsush khillachara) elira /Muḥammad-paykhamare/: "Tkhan degnash ḥulameḥ du aḥ tkho shega qoyquchukh‚ tkhan lergashna choḥ q'oralla yu‚ tkhuna yukq'eḥ a‚ ḥuna yukq'eḥ a kirḥa du‚ aḥ /ḥayn/ ʿamal ye‚ okha a /tkhayn/ ʿamal yiyr yu".
41:6: Aḥ āla /tsärga, hxay Muḥammad/: "Bakq'alla a, so-m adam du shu sanna‚ söga väḥitsa khaiytina shun Dela tsḥa Dela vuyla‚ dʿanislo Tsünga, Tsünga gechdar dekha. Bāla bu-q /Delatsa/ naq'ost lotsucharna,
41:7: Shäsh zakat tsa lush bolu‚ ekhartana shäsh kersta bolu".
41:8: Bakq'alla a, iyman dillinarsh a‚ dika ʿamalsh yinarsh a – tsarna khedar yotsu yal yu.
41:9: Aḥ āla /tsärga, hxay elcha/: "Ash inkarlo yo Sha latta qöllinchunna shina diynaḥ‚ ash Tsunna niysarkhoy a khülüytu? Iza vu ʿalamiyn Da!".
41:10: Khiliytina Tso tsigaḥ (lättaḥ) ch'oġa döġnarsh (lämnash) tsunna t'ekhula‚ berkate dira Tso iza (latta)‚ diyq'ira tsu choḥ qachanash dea diynaḥ– tsḥaniyssa /diʾ de khilla/ khöttucharna.
41:11: T'akqa Iza t'evirzira stigalna – i k'ur bara (ayʾaella khin ʿä). Tso elira tsünga a, lätte a: "Sḥadüyla shayn laamtsa ya laamza". Tsu shimmo elira: "Tkho däkhkina tkhayn laamtsa".
41:12: Tso üsh qochushkhiliytira, vorhx stigal khilla shina diynaḥ‚ dʿakhaiytira /väḥitsa/ hxor stigalna shen ġullaq. Okha khazyira gergara stigal chirqashtsa‚ /laryira iza shayt'anakh/ ʿalashʾyartsa. Iza bu veza volchun‚ khuush volchun (Delan) dʿahxottam.
41:13: Üsh dʿaberzaḥ‚ aḥ āla: "As qeram tesi shuna tq'esatsa‚ ʿadiyn a‚ Samudiyn a tq'esakh tera".
41:14: Dagadaiyta! Tsärga bäkhkira elchanash‚ tsarna ḥalkhakhula a‚ t'eḥakhula a: "Ash Dalla ben ʿibadat ma de", /olush/. Tsara elira: "Tkhan Qiosh-Qobuchunna liʾneḥara‚ Tso malikash dossor dara. Bakq'alla a, tkho shu shetsa daiytinchunna kersta du-q".
41:15: Tq'a ʿadash kurabevlira lättaḥ tsḥa a baq'o yotsush‚ tsara elira: "Mila vu tkhol ch'oġa verg nitsq'atsa?" Tsarna tsa gina te üsh qöllina volu Dela tsaral ch'oġa vuyla nitsq'atsa?! Üsh khilira Tkhan ayatashna inkarlo yesh.
41:16: Okha bakhiytira tsarna shok löqu mokh khalachu denoshkaḥ tsärga ʿovshiytarḥama siysazallin ʿazap dünenan dakhareḥ. Ekhartan ʿazap vuno siysaza du. Tsarna ġo khir dats.
41:17: Tq'a Samudash – Okha bilgalbäkqira tsarna /dikanan a, vonan a/ neq', tq'a tsarna bʿärsazalla duqayiyzira niysachu neq'al. T'akqa üsh sḥaletsira tq'es tukhuchu siysazallin ʿazapo tsarna karadesh khillarg baḥaneḥ.
41:18: Okha k'elḥarbekhira iyman dillinarsh‚ shäsh /Delakh/ qörush khillarsh.
41:19: Delan mostaġiy /zhözhakhatin/ ts'erana ḥalkha gulbechu /q'emat/ diynaḥ – üsh /tsu choḥ/ sovtsor bu /moġarshkaḥ gulbina/.
41:20: Üsh tsiga (ts'erga) bäkhkicha, teshalla diyr du tsarna t'eḥ tseran lersano‚ bʿärsano‚ chq'uro, üsh hxun desh khilla älla.
41:21: Tsara er du shayn chq'örashka: "Ash hxunda teshalla dira tkhuna düḥal?" Tsara er du: "Distkhiliytina tkho Dala‚ Sha masso a hxuma distkhülüytush volchu". Tso shu qöllina tsq'a /shu dotsuchu khenaḥ/‚ Tsunna t'e shu dʿaderzor a du.
41:22: Shu tsa khilira ḥuldan ġertash shayna t'eḥ teshalla dan shun lersano a‚ shun bʿärsino a‚ shun chq'örasha a‚ delaḥ a, shuna möttura Dalla tsa khäa ash dechukh duqaderg.
41:23: Iza du shun mottar‚ shayn Qiosh-Qobuchukh shuna möttina dolu‚ tso (shun mottaro) hxallakdira shu‚ t'akqa shu khilira eshnacharakh.
41:24: Tsara nagaḥ satokhaḥ – ts'e yu tsarna choḥ ʿen mettig‚ tsara nagaḥ /Dela/ rezakhilar dekhaḥ – üsh khir bats /Iza/ shayna rezakhillacharakh.
41:25: Okha khiliytira tsarna dottaġiy /shayt'anekh a‚ zhinnekh a/‚ tsara khazdira tsarna shayn ḥalkhaḥ derg a‚ t'eḥaḥ derg a‚ tsarakh ḥaqadelira tsaral ḥalkhadakhanchu zhiniyn a‚ adamiyn a ummatashkaḥ älla dolu dosh. Bakq'alla a, üsh khilira eshnarsh.
41:26: Tsateshnachara elira: "La ma doġa hxoqu Q'urʾane‚ dässa khabar diytsa tsüngaḥ‚ shu tola mega".
41:27: ʿovshüytur ma du Okha tsateshnachärga ch'oġa ʿazap‚ beqam biyr ma bu Okha tsarna tsara desh khillachukh uggar vochüntsa.
41:28: I bu Delan mostaġiyn beqam – /zhözhakhatin/ ts'e. Tsarna tsu choḥ guttarenan hxusam khir yu – beqam a khilla tsarna shäsh Tkhan ayatashna inkarlo yesh khilarna.
41:29: Tsateshnachara elira /zhözhakhateḥ/: "Hxay tkhan Qiosh-Qoburg‚ gaytaḥ tkhuna zhinekh a‚ adamekh a tkho tiliyna i shiʾ– tkhayn kogash k'el bütur bara okha – üsh /shia/ khiliytaarḥama uggar bukhaḥ bolcharakh".
41:30: Bakq'alla a, ällarsh /shayn sa dolush/: "Tkhan Qiosh-Qoburg /tsḥa/ Dela-Allahx vu"‚ t'akqa nisbellarsh – tsarna t'e dussur du /q'inkhetaman/ malikash, /tsara olush/: "Shu ma qeralash, singattame ma khilalash, qaʾ khili shuna yalsamanitsa‚ shuna vaʿda yina khilla yolchu.
41:31: Tkho du shun dottaġiy dünenan dakhareḥ a‚ ekhartaḥ a‚ shuna tsigaḥ shun sinoshna dezarg du‚ shuna tsigaḥ ash dekhnarg a du‚
41:32: /ḥoshallina/ kechdina Sha gechdesh volchüngara‚ Sha q'inkhetame volchüngara.”
41:33: Mila vu q'amelatsa dikō verg sha Dele qayqinchul‚ dika ʿamal yinachul‚ sha älla volchul: "Bakq'alla a, so vu-q /Dalla/ müt'aḥ bolcharakh"?
41:34: Tsḥaniyssa tsa khülu dikanig a‚ vonig a‚ aḥ dukhatokha uggar khaza dolchüntsa – t'akqa ḥuna a‚ shena a yukq'eḥ mostaġalla yerg, ḥome dottaġ sanna khir vu ḥuna.
41:35: I dalur dats shäsh sobar dinachärga ben‚ i dalur dats shegaḥ dokqa /irsan/ dāq'a dolchünga ben.
41:36: Ḥuna /otsunna t'eḥ/ shayt'ano vasvasalla dag chu qossaḥ, Delera larvalar lakha. Bakq'alla a, Iza khezash verg a vu‚ khuush verg a vu.
41:37: Tsünan ʿalamatekh yu büysa a‚ de a‚ malkh a‚ butt a. Suzhud ma de ash malkhana a‚ battana a‚ ash suzhud de Sha üsh qöllina volchu Dalla‚ shäsh Tsunna ʿibadat desh delaḥ.
41:38: Tsara kuralla yaḥ‚ Dalla gergaḥ bersh Tsunna tasbiḥ desh bu büysanna a‚ diynaḥ a‚ tsarna k'orda tsa do.
41:39: Tsünan ʿalamatekh du ḥuna latta daq'adella gar. Okha tsunna t'e khi (doġa) dossiycha, iza dettalo‚ qüu. Bakq'alla a, Iza dendinarg – denbiyr bolush ma vu bellarsh. Bakq'alla a, Iza masso a hxumanna t'eḥ nitsq' qochush ma vu.
41:40: Tkhan ayatashkaḥ kerstanalla desh bersh Tkhuna q'aylabevr bats. Ts'erga qussur verg dika vu ya q'ematdiynaḥ qeramza voġur verg /dika/ vu? ʿamal ye shayna ma luʾu. Bakq'alla a, Iza ash diyrig gush ma vu.
41:41: Bakq'alla a, ḥekhamna (Q'urʾanna) kerstanalla dinarsh, i shayga beʾcha - /beqam biyr bu Okha tsarna/. Bakq'alla a, iza (Q'urʾan) deza dolu zhayna du-q.
41:42: Khartsderg doġur dats tsunna ḥalkhakhula a‚ t'eḥakhula a‚ /iza/ dossar du Shegaḥ ḥeq'alalla a dolchu‚ Sha khastame a volchüngara (Delera).
41:43: Ḥöga /hxay Muḥammad/ tsa olu ḥol ḥalkha elchanashka ällarg ben. Bakq'alla a, ḥan Qiosh-Qoburg Shegaḥ gechdar dolush a vu‚ lazame taʿzar dolush a vu.
41:44: Okha iza khiliytineḥara ʿärbekh dotsu Q'urʾan‚ /t'akqa a/ er ma dara tsara: "Tsünan ayatash q'astiyneḥara /tkhuna‚ tkho tsarakh qetarḥama/. Tq'a /Q'urʾan/ ʿärbekh dotsush khila dezara‚ /paykhamar sha/ ʿärbi a volush? Aḥ āla: "Iza (Q'urʾan) iyman dillincharna du‚ niysa neq' a‚ darba a khilla". Tsateshnarsh a – tseran lergash choḥ q'oralla yu‚ iza (Q'urʾan) tsarna bʿärsiza du (üsh tsa qeta tsunakh). Üsh bu shayga qoyqucharakh /tera/ genarchu mettigera.
41:45: Bakq'al, Okha dellera Musaga zhayna (Tavrat)‚ tsu choḥ a khilpalo khilira. Dosh ḥalkha tsa dälleḥara ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchüngara – ḥukma dina khir dara tsarna yukq'eḥ. Bakq'alla a, üsh shetsa sintem boyuchu shekoneḥ bu-q.
41:46: Dika ʿamal yinarg – /iza/ tsunna shena yu. Vonig dinarg – /iza a/ tsunna düḥal du. Ḥan Qiosh-Qoburg ma vats /tsürrig/ zulam diyr dolush leshna.
41:47: Tsunna t'e dukhaderzo saḥtan ʿilma. Ara tsa bolu zezagiyn yukq'era stömash a‚ tsḥa a stechun kiyra ber a tsa leta‚ tso ber tsa do, Tsunna khuush ben. Otsu diynaḥ tsärga qoyqur du: "Michaḥ bu San naq'ostiy?" Tsara er du: "Ḥöga khaiytina okha: vats tkhokh tsḥa a tesh".
41:48: Dʿabirzira tsarakh üsh ḥalkha shayga qoyqush khillarsh. Tsarna khiira shayna tsḥa a k'elḥardovliyla dotsiyla.
41:49: K'or tsa do adamna dikanash dekhar. Nagaḥ sanna shekh vonig qetaḥ, /Delan q'inkhetamakh/ dog düllu tso.
41:50: Okha tsünga (kersta stage) Tkhaygara q'inkhetam ʿovshiytaḥ, tsunakh zen qettachul t'äḥa‚ tso er ma du: "Hxara san /ḥünartsa/ du. Suna tsa möttu saḥt dʿahxuttur du. So sayn Qiosh-Qobuchunna t'e yukhaverzavaḥ, suna Tsüngaḥ vuno dikanig khir du". Okha düytsur ma du kerstanashka tsara dinarg‚ Okha ʿovshüytur ma du tsärga lürachu ʿazapakh /ʿazap/.
41:51: Okha adamna niʿmat delcha‚ dʿavörzu iza /barkalla alarkh/‚ aġorḥävziy. Vonig shekh qetaḥ, – dekhkha doʿanash desh khülu.
41:52: Aḥ āla /tsu tsateshachärga, hxay Muḥammad/: "Giniy shuna (ḥovsiysha)‚ iza /Q'urʾan/ Delera khilcha, /i ḥaq' – baq' du/, t'akqa ash tsunna kerstanalla dicha, mila vu tq'a sha /tsüntsa/ genarchu mostaġalleḥ volchul vuno tilavellarg?"
41:53: T'äḥa Okha tsärga goytur du Tkhan ʿalamatash /stigaliyn a‚ lättan a/ aġonashkaḥ a‚ tsärgaḥ shaygaḥ a tsarna bilgaldallalts iza baq'derg duyla. Qacho tsa khülu ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchüntsa Iza masso a hxumanna t'eḥ tesh khilar?
41:54: Bakq'alla a, üsh bats shayn Qiosh-Qobuchüntsa tsḥäna-qetarkh shekonna choḥ? Bakq'alla a, Iza vats masso a hxumanna go büllush verg /ʿilmantsa‚ Shena khaartsa/?
42:3: Ishtta väḥiy doüytu ḥöga a‚ ḥol ḥalkha khillachärga a Sha veza volchu‚ ḥukma /niysa/ desh volchu Dala.
42:4: Tsünan du stiglanashkaḥ mel derg a‚ lättaḥ mel derg a. Iza vu leqa verg a‚ veza- vokqa verg a.
42:5: Gerga du stiglanash atadala shayna t'ekhula /Delan siylallitsa/. Malikasha tasbiḥ do shayn Qiosh-Qoburg khastortsa‚ tsara gechdar dökhu lättaḥ bolcharna. Sema dovla /hxay nakh/! Bakq'alla a, Dela – Iza ma vu Sha t'ekh gechdesh verg a‚ q'inkhetame verg a.
42:6: I votsurg /shayna/ doladiyrash lätsnarsh – Dela vu tsarna t'eḥ lardarkho‚ ḥo vats tsarna t'eḥ vekal/hxay Muḥammad/.
42:7: Ishtta väḥitsa daiytira Okha ḥöga ʿärbiyn Deshar ḥöga qeram tasiyta yartiyn nanna a‚ tsunna gonaḥ bolcharna a‚ ḥöga qeram tasiyta guldaran dentsa‚ shena choḥ sheko yotschu – tsḥa toba (busalbanash) yalsamaneḥ khir yu‚ vazha toba (kerstanash) zhözhakhataḥ khir yu.
