42:8: Dalla liʾneḥara, Tso tsḥa ummat khülüytara dara tsarakh‚ delaḥ a‚ Tso shen q'inkhetamna chuvokhüytu Shena luurg‚ tq'a zulamkhoy– ma khir vats tsarna doladiyrig‚ ma khir vats /tsarna/ ġöncha.
42:9: Ya tsara Iza votsurg doladiyrash lätsna? Tq'a Dela – Iza vu-q doladiyrig‚ Tso denbo bellarsh‚ Iza vu masso a hxumanna t'eḥ nitsq' qochush verg.
42:10: Shun shegaḥ tsḥana hxumanakh khilpalo yözhneḥ – tsünan ḥukma /lakha/ Dalla t'e derzartsa (Q'urʾanna a, paykhamaran sunnatana a t'edüyla). /Ala:/ "Iza Allahx-Dela vu‚ san Qiosh-Qoburg‚ Tsunna t'e tevzhina so‚ Tsunna t'e dʿavörzu so /san masso a ġullaqashkaḥ/".
42:11: Stigalsh‚ latta a qöllinarg /vu Iza/. Tso khiliytina shuna shukh shaykh zudariy‚ bezhnekh a – tayp-taypa. Tso shu alsamdokhu tsüntsa (zudariy balabesh debartsa). Yats Tsunakh (Delakh) tera hxuma a. Iza khezash verg a vu‚ gush verg a vu.
42:12: Tsünan du stigaliyn a‚ lättan a doġanash. Tso shortta sovdokqu ritsq' Shena luuchunna‚ /k'ezzig/ baram a bo /Shena luuchunna – üsh zerḥama/. Bakq'alla a, Iza masso a hxuma khuush verg vu.
42:13: Tso shuna sharʿ (baq'o) khiliytina dinakh Sha shetsa veset dina khillarg Nuḥana a, ḥöga /hxay Muḥammad/ väḥitsa daiytinarg a‚ Okha shetsa veset dinarg Ibrahximna a‚ Musana a‚ ʿiysana a‚ "din hxottade, – älla‚ – deq'a ma lo tsu choḥ (dineḥ)". Dokqa /khala/ khili mushrikashna aḥ shäsh shena t'e qoyqurg. Dala tsunna (Dela tsḥaʾvarna) t'e khorzhu Shena luurg‚ Tso tsunna (Dela tsḥaʾvarna) t'e nisvo sha /tsunna t'e/ vörzurg.
42:14: Üsh beq'a ma tsa bella shayga ʿilma deʾnachul t'äḥa ben vovshiyn yukq'eḥ ḥaġ khilar baḥaneḥ. Dosh ḥalkha tsa dälleḥara ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchüngara "tökhna khan t'e qachchalts" älla dolu, qiel yina khir ma yara tsarna yukq'eḥ. Bakq'alla a, tsaral t'äḥa shayga irsana zhayna dellarsh tsunakh (Muḥammad-elcha khilarkh) sintem boyuchu shekoneḥ ma bu.
42:15: Tsünga (Dela tsḥaʾvare) qayqa /hxay Muḥammad/. Dʿanislo ḥayga omra ma-ddi. Tseran dezarshna t'äḥa ma hxotta‚ aḥ āla: "As iyman dilli Dala dossiynachu zhayne‚ suna omra dina shuna yukq'eḥ niyso yan. /Tsḥa/ Dela vu tkhan Qiosh-Qoburg a‚ shun Qiosh-Qoburg a‚ tkhuna tkhan ʿamalsh yu‚ shuna – shun ʿamalsh yu. Tsḥa a q'ovsam bats tkhuna a‚ shuna a yukq'eḥ. Dala tsḥänatukhur du vay (q'ematdiynaḥ baq'derg q'asto)‚ Tsunna t'e du dʿaderzar".
42:16: I Delan /dineḥ elchantsa/ q'üysush bersh Tsunna zhop dellachul t'äḥa tseran delilash dʿatettina /kharts/ du shayn Qiosh-Qobuchunna gergaḥ‚ tsarna öġazlo a yu /Delera/‚ ch'oġa ʿazap a du.
42:17: Dela vu Sha dossiynarg zhayna baq'dolchüntsa‚ terza a. Ḥuna ḥan khoüytu? Saḥt gerga khila tarlo.
42:18: Tsüntsa (q'ematdentsa) sikhlush bu shäsh tsunakh tsa teshash bersh. Iyman dillinarsh qörush bu tsunakh‚ tsarna khäa iza ḥaq'-baq' duyla. Samadovla! Bakq'alla a, tsu saḥtakh (q'ematdiynakh) sheko yersh genarchu tilarchoḥ ma bu.
42:19: Dela Shen lekh duqa q'inkhetame ma vu, ritsq' lo Tso Shena luuchunna. Iza nütsq'ala verg a vu‚ veza verg a vu.
42:20: Milla khilleḥ ekhartan yal ezash, – Okha sovvokqur vu iza shena yal yalareḥ. Milla khilleḥ a dünenan yal ezash, – lur yu Okha tsunna otsunakh‚ ekhartaḥ tsḥa a dāq'a dats tsunna.
42:21: Tq'a tsarna naq'ostiy bu shayna Dala tsa magiynarg dineḥ sharʿ desh? Q'astoran dosh tsa khilleḥara, qiel yina khir ma yara tsarna yukq'eḥ. Bakq'alla a, zulamkhoy – tsarna lazosh dolu ʿazap khir du.
42:22: Ḥuna gur bu zulamkhoy ch'oġa qörush shäsh /dünenaḥ/ karadinchukh, tsünan beqam /q'ematdiynaḥ/ shayna t'ebözhcha. Iyman dillinarsh a‚ dika ʿamalsh yinarsh a yalsamanin dikanashkaḥ khir bu. Tsarna khir yu shayna luurg shayn Dalla gergaḥ. Iza /Delera/ dokqa dozalla du-q!
42:23: Iza bu Dala Shen iyman dillina bolchu‚ dika ʿamalsh yina bolchu leshna bokqush bolu qaʾ. Aḥ āla /hxay elcha, tsu tsateshachärga/: "As tsa bökhu shüga tsunakh tsḥa a makh gergarlonashkaḥ bezam /tergal bar/ ben". Dikanig desh volchunna – Okha alsamdokqur du tsunna dikachüntsa. Bakq'alla a, Dela t'ekh gechdesh verg a vu‚ /dikanig dinachunna/ t'ekh barkalle verg a vu.
42:24: Ya tsara olu: "Tso (Muḥammad- paykhamaro) qöllina Dalla t'eḥ khartsderg?" Dalla luush delaḥara, ḥan dagna t'e muhxar tukhur ma dara Tso. Doyu Tso khartsderg, baq'do baq'derg Shen deshnashtsa. Bakq'alla a, Iza vu degnashkaḥ derg khuush verg.
42:25: Iza vu q'obaldesh tōba Shen leshkara‚ gechdesh vonash /ash tōba dicha/‚ Tsunna khäa ash diyrig.
42:26: Zhop lush vu Iza iyman dillinacharna a‚ dika ʿamalsh yinacharna a (tseran doʿanna)‚ Tso sovbokhu üsh Shen komärshallekh. Tq'a kerstanash – tsarna ch'oġa ʿazap khir du.
42:27: Dala shortta darzhiyneḥara ritsq' Shen leshna‚ t'ekhbevr ma bara üsh /Delan dozanel/ lättaḥ‚ delaḥ a Tso dossado /ritsq'/ Shena luuchu barameḥ. Bakq'alla a, Iza Shen lesh sov dika bevzash a‚ gush a ma vu.
42:28: Iza vu tsara dog dillinchul t'äḥa doġa doüytush verg‚ Tso barzhabo Shen q'inkhetam. Iza vu khastame volu doladiyrig.
42:29: Tsünan ʿalamatekh du stigalsh a‚ latta a qollar a‚ tsu shinna choḥ Tso darzhiyna dolu diynat a. Iza üsh guldarna t'eḥ, Shena ma-liʾineḥ, nitsq' bolush a vu.
42:30: Shukh qiʾna bolu /mülkha/ bokham – shun küygasha karadinchüntsa bu‚ duqakhdolchunna gechdo Tso.
42:31: Shu ma dats lättaḥ dʿadovdalur dolush /Delan qielakh/. Ma vats shuna Dela votsurg tsḥa a doladiyrig a‚ tsḥa a ġöncha a.
42:32: Tsünan ʿalamatekh yu hxorda choḥ lelash yersh‚ lämnekh tera.
42:33: Shena liʾcha mokh satsabo Tso‚ üsh (kemanash) düsu ch'aġdella tsünan buq'a t'eḥ. Bakq'alla a, tsu choḥ delilash ma du masso a t'ekh sobardolchunna a‚ t'ett'a barkalla oluchunna a.
42:34: Ya hxallakdiyr dara Tso üsh tsarna karadinarg baḥaneḥ‚ Tso gechdo duqakhdolchunna.
42:35: Tkhan ayatashkaḥ q'üysucharna khaiyla‚ shayna tsḥa a k'elḥardovliyla dotsiyla.
42:36: Tsḥatstsa hxumanakh shuna ellarg – dünenan dakharan dāq'a du. Dalla gergaḥ derg dika a du, vuno a bukhadüsush a du iyman dillincharna a‚ shayn Dalla t'etevzhincharna a.
42:37: /I khaza yal yu/ dakqiychu q'inoykh a‚ bökhachu hxumanekh a genabevvlacharna a‚ shäsh öġazbakhcha, gechdesh bolcharna a.
42:38: /Iza du/ shayn Qiosh-Qobuchunna zhop dellacharna a‚ lamaz hxottocharna a‚ shayn ġullaq vovshiy yuq'aḥ qetasho yolcharna a‚ Okha shayna dellachu ritsq'ekh /Delan novq'aḥ nakhana dikanig desh/ kharzhash yecharna a.
42:39: Shaykh tsḥa ḥaġ qiʾcha, vovshashna ġo desh bolcharna a.
42:40: Vochun beqam i sanna vonig du. Gechdina‚ maslaḥat dinarg - tsünan yal Dalla t'eḥ yu. Bakq'alla a, Tsunna tsa beza zulamkhoy.
42:41: Ġo lekhnarg shena zulam /dinchul/ t'äḥa – tsunna neq' bökhkur bats (bekhke lorur vats i; q'a dats tsunna).
42:42: Neq' bökhkur bu (taʿzar diyr du) nakhana zulamash desh bolcharna a‚ lättaḥ, bovla ḥaq' dotsush /nakhana nitsq'ash besh, von lelash/, kurabovlucharna a. Tsarna lazosh dolu ʿazap du.
42:43: Sobar dinarg a /shena nakha bechu tsatamashkaḥ/‚ gechdiynarg a /shena bokham binchunna/ – bakq'alla a, iza ch'oġachu ġullaqekh du.
42:44: Dala tilavala vitinarg ma vats tsunna tsḥa a doladiyrig Tsul t'äḥa. Ḥuna gur bu i zulamkhoy, shayna ʿazap ginchul t'äḥa, olush: "Dukhaderzan tsḥa a neq' buy te?"
42:45: Ḥuna gur bu üsh tsunna (zhözhakhatina) ḥalkhatettina‚ siysaza khilarkh qerabella‚ q'aylakha khözhush. Iyman dillinchara er du: "Bakq'alla a, zen khillarsh bu-q shäsh a‚ shayn dözal a baynarsh q'ematdiynaḥ. Samadovla! Tq'a, bakq'alla a, zulamkhoy /khir/ bats guttarenan ʿazapa choḥ?"
42:46: Ma tsa khili tsarna doladiyrash‚ tsarna ġo desh, Delan /ʿazapna/ düḥal. Dala tilavala vüturg, milla velaḥ a, – ma bats tsunna tsḥa a neq' /k'elḥarvala/.
42:47: Zhop lo shayn Qiosh-Qobuchunna (Tsunna ʿibadat dartsa), shayn Delera dukhtokhalur dotsu de dāle. Khir yats shuna tsḥa a dʿadovda mettig otsu diynaḥ‚ khir vats shuna tsḥa a /shun ʿazapan/ inkarlo yiyr yerg.
42:48: Üsh dʿaberzaḥ, – Okha tsa vakhiytina ḥo /hxay Muḥammad/ tsarna t'e khekho (lardarkho) khilla. Ḥan t'eḥ dʿakqachor ben dats. Okha adame ʿovshiyticha Tkhaygara q'inkhetam‚ dakqiydö iza tsüntsa. Tq'a tsunakh qiʾcha vonig, tsünan küygasha ḥalkhadäkqina dolu, t'akqa adam, t'ekh kersta khüliy, dʿahxuttu.
42:49: Delan du stigaliyn a‚ lättan a pachchaḥalla. Qullu Tso Shena luurg. Lo Tso Shena luuchunna zudaberash, lo Tso Shena luuchunna bozhaberash.
42:50: Ya tsḥänabalo (khülüytu) tsarna bozhaberash a‚ zudaberash a‚ Shena luurg t'äḥe yotsush vütu. Bakq'alla a, Iza khuush verg a vu‚ nitsq' qochurg a vu.
42:51: Tsa khili adamna Dela shega vistkhilar väḥitsa ben‚ ya kirḥanna deḥakhula‚ ya elcha vaiytartsa ben – tso väḥitsa lush Shen purbantsa Shena luurg. Bakq'alla a, Iza leqa verg a vu‚ ḥukma /niysa/ desh verg a vu.
42:52: Ishtta ḥöga a /hxay Muḥammad/ väḥitsa daiytina Okha sa Tkhan ġullaqakh. Ḥo ma vatsara khuush‚ zhayna hxun du‚ iyman hxun du a‚ delaḥ a, Okha nur khiliyta tsunakh (Q'urʾanakh), shetsa nisvesh Tkhayna luurg Tkhayn lekh‚ bakq'alla a, aḥ nisvalare ma qoyqu /islaman/ niysachu novq'a‚
42:53: Delan novq'a‚ stigalshkaḥ a‚ lättaḥ a mel derg Shen dolchu. Tq'a Dalla t'e tsa dölkhu ġullaqash? /Hxaʾ! Dölkhu!/
43:3: Okha khiliytina tsunakh ʿärbiyn /mattaḥ/ Q'urʾan shu /tsünan ḥukmanekh/ qetiyta.
43:4: Bakq'alla a, iza (Q'urʾan) zhaynin nanna choḥ du Tkhuna gergaḥ‚ leqanig a du /masso a qechu zhaynel/‚ shena choḥ ḥeq'alalla dolush a du.
43:5: Tq'a Okha shukh tsa qötüytush bütur bu ḥekham, shu t'alamza q'am khili älla?
43:7: Tsḥa a paykhamar tsa veana tsärga, tsara iza siysazvokqush ben.
43:8: Okha hxallakbina tsarakh /ḥan q'omal/ nitsq'atsa vuno ch'oġa bersh – dʿadakhana ḥalkhaleracheran masal.
43:9: Aḥ /hxay elcha/ tsärga khätticha‚ ḥan qöllina stigalsh a‚ latta a älla, tsara er ma du: "Üsh qöllina Sha veza volcho‚ Sha khuush volcho (Dala)!"
43:10: Ishttanig vu Iza khiliytina shuna lättakh /vizha/ mott‚ Sha khiliytina shuna tsu choḥ (lättaḥ) neq'ash – shu niysachu novq'aḥ khir datsara te.
43:11: Ishttanig a vu Iza Sha /t'etta/ doüytush stigalara khi (doġa) barameḥ – Okha denbina tsüntsa bella bolu mokhk. Ishtta shu /keshnashkara/ aradokhur du /q'ematdiynaḥ/.
43:12: Ishttanig a vu Iza Sha masso a hxuma shish-shishsha qöllina‚ Sha khiliytina shuna kemanakh a‚ bezhnekh a shuna t'ekhovsha hxumanash
43:13: Shu dʿanisdaliyta tseran bakq'ash t'eḥ‚ t'akqa shüga ḥekhadayta shayn Qiosh-Qobuchun niʿmat, shäsh tsarna t'eḥ dʿanisdelcha‚ shüga āliyta: "Vonakh ts'ena vu I, Sha tkhuna hxara müt'aḥ yina‚ tkhan tsu t'eḥ nitsq' qochur ma batsara.
43:14: Bakq'alla a, tkho tkhayn Qiosh-Qobuchünga dʿadörzur dolush ma du (q'ematdiynaḥ) ".
43:15: Tsara ma khiliyti Tsunna Tsünan lekh tsḥa dāq'a. Bakq'alla a, adam bilgala kersta khili-q.
43:16: Ya Tso lätsna Sha qöllinchukh /Shena/ mekhkariy‚ tq'a shu khärzhina k'entashtsa?
43:17: Tsarakh tsḥanna qaʾ bäkqicha, shäsh Q'inkhetam bolchunna masal daliynachüntsa– ʿarzhloy lätta tsünan yuḥ‚ khalla öġazlo yukhaozaesh /shena zudaber dünenchu dalar tsa dezash/.
43:18: Tq'a khazallashkaḥ qiʾnarg, sha q'iysameḥ /baq'dolchüntsa/ bilgala tsa yallarg (zudastag khülüytu tsara Dalla)?
43:19: Tsara khiliyti malikash‚ shäsh Q'inkhetam bolchun lesh dolu‚ zudariy. Üsh /ḥözhush/ bara te üsh (malikash) qulluchu khenaḥ? Dʿayazdiyr ma du tseran teshalla‚ tsärga bart khottur ma bu.
43:20: Tsara elira: "Q'inkhetam bolchunna liʾneḥara‚ okha tsarna (malikashna) ʿibadat dina khir datsara". Tsarna tsüntsa tsḥa a ʿilma dats. Üsh bats khartslüysh ben.
43:21: Ya Okha zhayna della te tsärga tsul (Q'urʾanal) ḥalkha, t'akqa üsh tsüntsa ch'aġbellarsh a khülush?
43:22: Hxaʾ‚ tsara elira: "Bakq'alla a, tkhuna kariyna tkhayn day tsḥana dina t'eḥ‚ tkho tseran lorakh (tachanakh) dʿanislush du".
43:23: Ishtta tsa vakhiytira Okha ḥol ḥalkha yurtaḥ tsḥa a qeramcha tsünan zovq ḥöguchara olush ben: "Bakq'alla a, tkhuna kariyna tkhayn day tsḥana dina t'eḥ‚ tkho tseran lorana (tachana) t'äḥadozush du".
43:24: Tso (Muḥammad-paykhamara) elira: "Tq'a so veʾneḥ shüga shuna shayn day shena t'eḥ kariynachul vuno niysachüntsa‚ /t'akqa a khartsvo ash so/?" Tsara elira: "Bakq'alla a, tkho shu (elchanash) shetsa daiytinchunna kersta du-q".
43:25: Okha ch'ir iytsira tsärgara. Ḥazhal ḥo‚ mukha khili /din/ khartsdinacheran t'äḥe!
43:26: Ḥakhade /hxay Muḥammad/: Ibrahxima ällera shen dega a‚ shen q'ome a: "Bakq'alla a, so ts'ena vu ash shena ʿibadat dechukh.
43:27: So qöllinchunna ben /diyr dats as ʿibadat/‚ bakq'alla a, Tso so nisviyr vu".
43:28: Iza khiliytira tso shen t'äḥeneḥ bukhadüsush dolu dosh – üsh yukhaberza tam bara-q.
43:29: Hxette a‚ As bakham belira hxoqarna a‚ tseran dayshna a tsärga baq'derg a‚ bilgala elcha a vallalts.
43:30: Shayga baq'derg deʾcha‚ tsara elira: "Hxara bozbuunchalla du‚ bakq'alla a, tkho tsunna kersta du".
43:31: Tsara elira: "Hxara Q'urʾan dossiyneḥara shina yurtara siylaḥ-vezachu stage".
43:32: Tq'a üsh bu ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchun q'inkhetam böq'ush bersh? Okha biyq'ina tsarna yukq'eḥ tseran bakham dünenan dakhareḥ‚ tsarakh tsḥabersh vovshashna t'eḥ darzhashtsa laqabäkhna‚ tsarakh tsḥabolchärga shayna vuqärga ġullaq daytarḥama. Ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchun q'inkhetam dika bu tsara guldesh dolchul.
43:33: Nakh /berrige a/ tsḥa ummat tsa khilaḥara, Okha khiliytina khir ma dara Q'inkhetam bolchukh tsateshacharna tseran ts'enoshna dato tkhevnash a‚ lamesh a‚ üsh shayna t'ebovlush bolu.
43:34: Tseran ts'enoshna neʿarsh a‚ üsh shayna t'etovzhush bolu mänganash a /dato khülüytura bara Okha/,
43:35: /qin/ khazallash a /lur yara Okha tsarna/. Iza derrige a – dünenan dakharan hxuma ben ma yats. Ekhart ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchunna gergaḥ /Delakh/ qörucharna du.
43:36: Sov q'inkhetame verg (Allahx-Dela) ḥeḥorakh ġopal khillarg – Okha t'equssu tsunna shayt'a, i tsunna tsa q'ästash naq'ost a khülush.
43:37: Bakq'alla a, tsara (shayt'anasha) dʿatilabo üsh (shayn naq'ostiy – adamash Delan niysachu) neq'akh‚ tsarna möttu shäsh niysachu novq'aḥ du.
43:38: Sha tkhuna t'e qachchalts‚ t'akqa er du: "Daq'aza ma vala so! Suna a‚ ḥuna a yukq'eḥ malkhbalen a‚ malkhbuzen a yuq'an genalla khilleḥara-q! Ma von naq'ost khili-q /suna ḥokh, shayt'anakh/".
43:39: Banne a payda /shu dokhkodavlarkh/ khir bats shuna takhana /q'ematdiynaḥ/‚ ash zulam dina. Bakq'alla a, shu ʿazapeḥ tsḥäna /daq'alotsush/ khir du.
43:40: Tq'a aḥ /hxay elcha/ khozüytu q'oravolchunna ya niysachu novq'a vokqu bʿärsadotsurg a‚ sha bilgalchu tilar choḥ khillarg a?
43:41: Okha ḥo dʿaqalkhiychi a – bakq'alla a, Okha tsärgara ch'ir ötsur yolush ma yu.
43:42: Ya Okha ḥuna goytur ma du Okha tsarna vaʿda dinarg – bakq'ala a Tkho tsarna t'eḥ nitsq' qochush ma du.
43:43: Aḥ /hxay elcha/ sḥalatsa ḥayga väḥitsa dellarg. Bakq'alla a, ḥo niysachu novq'aḥ ma vu.
43:44: Bakq'alla a, iza (Q'urʾan) ḥekham bu ḥuna a‚ ḥan q'ome a‚ t'äḥa khottur du shüga.
43:45: Aḥ khattal Okha ḥol ḥalkha elchanekh baiytinchärga: "Okha khiliytiniy te Q'inkhetame verg votsurg /qin/ delanash, shayna /nakha/ ʿibadat a desh?"
43:46: Okha vakhiytinera Musa Tkhan ayatashtsa Firʿavne a‚ tsünan elashka a‚ tso elira: "Bakq'alla a, so ʿalamiyn Den elcha vu".
43:47: Iza (Musa) shayga veʾcha, Tkhan ayatashtsa‚ üsh tsarakh (ayatekh) bölu.
43:48: Okha tsa goytu tsärga tsḥa a ayat iza shel ḥalkhadakhanchul dokqakh dolush ben. Okha sḥaletsira üsh ʿazaptsa – üsh yukhabörzur batsaram te /shayn tilarkh/.
43:49: Tsara (Firʿavna a, tsünan elasha a) elira: "Hxay bozbuuncha! Dekha tkhuna ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchünga ḥuna gergaḥ Tsünan vaʿda khillarg – bakq'alla a, tkho nislur ma du (okha iyman düllur ma du, i ʿazap dʿadäkqicha)".
43:50: Okha aya ma-dinneḥ shayna t'era ʿazap – tsara bart bokhabo.
43:51: Qiyqira Firʿavna shen q'omeḥ, elira: "Tq'a san dats Misran pachchaḥalla, hxara khish suna (san ġalina) bukhakhula lelash dolush? Shuna tsa go /san siylalla/?
43:52: Ya so dika vats hxoqul‚ sha zäʿap volchu‚ tolqa (mott tiysalush) volchu?
43:53: Yillineḥara tsunna t'e dasho ch'ug‚ ya deʾneḥara tsüntsa tsḥäna malikash /tsunakh/ khottadella".
43:54: /Duqa/ dayn kariyra tsunna (Firʿavna) shen q'am – üsh tsunna müt'aḥ khilira. Bakq'alla a, üsh khilira pesiq' nakh.
43:55: Tsara Tkho öġazdäkhcha, Okha tsärgara ch'ir iytsira – khina bukhabakhiytira üsh berrige a.
43:56: Üsh khiliytira Okha ḥalkhabäkhna‚ masal khilla t'äḥaboġucharna.
43:57: Maryaman k'antakh masal daliycha, ḥan q'omo ch'oġa ġovġa yokqu /khazakhetta/.
43:58: Tsara elira: "Tkhan delanash dika bu ya iza vu?" I (masal) tsa daliyra tsara q'iysamna ben. Hxaʾ‚ üsh /kharts/ q'üysush q'am du.
43:59: Iza-m (Maryaman k'ant ʿiysa) vekq'a lay ben vats‚ Okha niʿmat della tsunna‚ Okha khiliytina tsunakh masal Israilan k'entashna.
43:60: Tkhuna luush delḥara, shun metta malikash khülüytur dara Okha lättaḥ‚ /shu hxallakdinchul t'äḥa/ düsush.
43:61: Bakq'alla a, iza (ʿiysa- paykhamar) saḥtan (q'ematdiynan) ʿalamat du‚ ash yanne a sheko ma yelash tsüngaḥ. /Aḥ āla tsärga, hxay Muḥammad/: "Suna t'äḥadazalash. Hxara bu /shuna/ niysa neq'."
43:62: Danne a shayt'ano dʿa ma ḥavzadoyla shu /baq'dolchukh/. Bakq'alla a, iza shuna bilgala mostaġ ma du.
43:63: ʿiysa veʾcha bilgalonashtsa, tso elira: "So veana shüga ḥeq'alallitsa (ḥeq'al daḥash)‚ shuna shetsa khilpalo yolu tsḥadersh bilgaldakha a. Delakh qeralash‚ suna müt'aḥ a khilalash.
43:64: Bakq'alla a, Dela Iza vu san Ela a‚ shun Ela a‚ Tsunna ʿibadat delash. Hxara bu /shuna/ niysa neq'".
43:65: Khilpalo khilira tobanashna shayna yukq'eḥ. Ma /bokqa/ bāla bu zulam dinacharna lazame dolchu diynan ʿazapakh.
43:66: Üsh ḥovsiy te shayga ts'ekhḥana saḥt (q'ematde) dare ben, i shayna khaa tsa lush?
43:67: Dottaġiy otsu /q'emat/diynaḥ vovshiyn mostaġiy khir bu, /tsḥa Delakh/ qörush bersh botsursh. /Tq'a tsärga Dala er du/:
43:68: hxay San lesh! Qeram bats shuna takhana‚ shu singattame a khir dats:
43:69: Tkhan ayatekh iyman dillina khilla bersh‚ /Tkhan ḥukmanna a, Tkhan omranna a/ müt'aḥ khilla bersh.
43:70: Chuġo yalsamani shu a‚ shun zudariy a – /tsigaḥ shuna ch'oġa/ khazakhötüytur du.
43:71: Tsarna t'eḥiyzar ma bu /kegiy q'onakhiy/ dasho khedarshtsa a‚ kedashtsa a. Tsigaḥ sinoshna mel dezarg khir du‚ bʿärgash mel ʿebarg a khir du. Shu tsigaḥ guttar lättar du.
43:72: Iza yalsamani yu shuna irsana qächna ash yina khilla ʿamalsh baḥaneḥ.
43:73: Shuna tsigaḥ stömash a bu dukqa a‚ ash tsarakh buur a bu.
43:74: Bakq'alla a, q'inosh dinarsh zhözhakhatin ʿazapeḥ guttar a lättar bu.
43:75: I tsarakh aydiyr dats‚ üsh tsu choḥ /dikanakh/ dogdillina /ḥere/ khir bu.
43:76: Okha zulam tsa dina tsarna‚ delaḥ a üsh khilira shäsh /shayna/ zulamkhoy.
43:77: Tsara qoyqura: "Hxay /zhözhakhati/ dolaḥ yerg! Daliytaḥara tkho ḥan Qiosh-Qobucho" Tso elira: "Shu lättar du /liyr dotsush /".
43:78: Tkho däkhkinera shüga /dünenaḥ/ baq'dolchüntsa‚ delaḥ a shukh duqakhbolcharna baq'derg tsa diyzira.
43:79: Ya tsḥa ġullaq tsḥalkhadäkqi tsara (Makkin kerstanasha elchanna düḥal)? Bakq'alla a, Tkho du /ġullaqash/ tsḥalkhadokhursh (Okha hxallakbiyr bu üsh).
43:80: Ya tsarna möttu te Tkhuna tsa kheza tseran q'ayle a‚ shabar-shibar a. Vuno a‚ Tkhan elchanash (malikash) tsärgaḥ yazdesh lättash du.
43:81: Aḥ āla /tsärga, hxay elcha/:"Sov q'inkhetame volchunna (Delan) dözalkho khilcha‚ so tsḥalġa vu-q /otsu dözalkhochunna/ ʿibadat decharakh".
43:82: Vonakh ts'ena vu stigaliyn a‚ lättan a Da‚ ʿarshan Da‚ tsara dechu /kharts/ sibatekh.
43:83: Bita üsh q'iysa /khartsdolchüntsa/ a‚ lovza a‚ shayna vaʿda yina yolchu shayn /q'emat/denna düḥalqettalts.
43:84: Iza vu stigalaḥ a Dela‚ lättaḥ a Dela‚ Iza Shegaḥ ḥeq'alalla derg a‚ khuush verg a vu.
43:85: Deq'ala vu Shen stigaliyn a‚ lättan a‚ tsu shinna yukq'eḥ dolchun a pachchaḥalla derg‚ Tsüngaḥ du saḥt hxottaran ʿilma a‚ Tsunna t'e dʿaderzor du shu a.
43:86: Tsara, Iza a vitina, shayga qoyqucheran dolaḥ dats shapaʿat‚ sha baq'dolchüntsa teshalla a dinachüngaḥ ben, /i shäsh desh dolu shapaʿat Delan purbantsa duyla/ shayna khuush.
43:87: Aḥ tsärga khätticha‚ üsh ḥan qöllina älla‚ tsara er ma du: "Dala". Mukha ʿekhabina üsh /shayt'anasha/!
43:88: Tsünga (Muḥammad-paykhamara Dele) elira: "Hxay so Qiosh-Qoburg (veza-vokqa Dela)‚ hxara q'am iyman düllush ma dats".
43:89: Dʿaverza tsarakh (üsh ḥaytsa sanna, von ma khila tsärtsa)‚ āla: "Marshalla (shüga)!" T'äḥa khuur du tsarna.
44:3: Bakq'alla a, Okha dossiyna iza berkate yolchu busa. Bakq'alla a, Tkho khilira qeram tosursh /tsüntsa/.
44:4: Tsu choḥ (tsu berkate busa) q'astado masso a shetsa ḥeq'alalla dolu ġullaq.
44:5: Tkhan aġorḥara /deza mel dolu/ ġullaq. Bakq'alla a, Tkho khilira bokhküytursh/Muḥammad a, tsul ḥalkha khilla elchanash a/,
44:6: Q'inkhetam a khilla ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchüngara. Bakq'alla a, Iza khezash verg a vu‚ khuush verg a vu.
44:7: Stigaliyn a‚ lättan a‚ tsu shinnan yukq'eḥ mel dolchun a Da /vu Iza/‚ shu /ch'oġa/ teshash khilleḥ.
44:8: Vats tsḥa a dela Iza votsurg‚ Tso denbo‚ Tso bolüytu‚ shun Qiosh-Qoburg vu Iza‚ shun ḥalkhalera dayn a Qiosh-Qoburg vu Iza.
44:9: Hxette a‚ üsh (kerstanash) shekonchoḥ lovzush ma bu.
44:10: Aḥ tergalde stiglo bilgala k'ur baḥar bolu de.
44:11: Nakh dʿaḥulbiyr bu tso. /Tsara er du/: "Hxara lazosh dolu ʿazap du".
44:12: "Tkhan Qiosh-Qoburg‚ aydeḥa tkhuna t'era hxara ʿazap, /t'akqa/ bakq'alla a, okha iyman düllur du-q /Ḥan elchane/".
44:13: Mukha khir bu tsarna ḥekham? Tsärga veara ma-y bilgala volu elcha /Muḥammad/.
44:14: T'akqa üsh dʿabirzira tsunakh‚ tsara elira: "Zhiniykh volush shena /nakha Q'urʾan/ ʿamiynarg vu /hxara Muḥammad /".
44:15: Bakq'alla a, Okha aydiyr du /shuna t'era/ ʿazap k'ezzig – /gur shuna:/ shu yukha a t'edörzur ma du /shayn kerstanallina/.
44:16: Okha bokqachu nitsq'atsa /ʿazape/ lotsur dolchu diynaḥ– bakq'alla a, Okha ch'ir ötsur yu.
44:17: Tsaral ḥalkha a pitane letsira Okha Firʿavnan q'am – tsärga veara /Delan/ siylaḥ elcha (Musa).
44:18: "Dʿalo söga Delan lesh /olush/‚ bakq'alla a, so shuna teshame elcha ma vu.
44:19: Ḥaladovla (kuradovla) ma ġerta Dalla‚ bakq'alla a, as lur du shuna bilgala dolu delil.
44:20: Bakq'alla a, so larvella san Qiosh-Qobuchüntsa‚ shun Qiosh-Qobuchüntsa ash suna t'ulgash dettarkh (ash so verakh).
44:21: Shu sokh tsa teshaḥ‚ so vita /bokham tsa besh/".
44:22: /T'akqa/ tso (Musas) shen Qiosh-Qobuchünga qiyqira: "Hxara q'am q'inosh desh ma du"‚ /älla/.
44:23: /T'akqa elira Dala/: "Dʿaġo san leshtsa (Israilan k'entashtsa) busa‚ bakq'alla a, shuna t'äḥabevr bu ḥuna /Firʿavn a, tsünan eskar a/.
44:24: Hxord beq'abellachoḥ bita‚ bakq'alla a, üsh /hxorda/ bukhaġur dolu eskar ma du".
44:25: Mel /duqa/ bukhaditi tsara boshmash a‚ shovdanash a‚
44:27: shäsh shetsa zovq ḥögush khilla dolu /mel duqa/ niʿmatash a!
44:28: Ishtta /khilira tseran chakqe/. Okha üsh irsana dʿadelira qechu q'omana.
44:29: Stigal a, latta a tsa dilkhira tsarna t'eḥ‚ t'äḥa tsa tettira üsh /ʿazapakh/.
44:30: Okha k'elḥarbekhira Israilan k'entiy siysazchu ʿazapakh‚
44:31: Firʿavnakh. Bakq'alla a, iza ḥalavällarg khilira t'alamazacharakh.
44:32: Okha üsh (Israilan k'entiy) khärzhira ʿilmantsa /masso a/ ʿalamel.
44:33: Okha tsärga delira ayatekh shayna choḥ bilgala bāla bersh a.
44:34: Bakq'alla a, hxorsh (q'urayshash) olush ma bu:
44:35: "vayn tsḥa dükhḥarlera dalar ben dats‚ vay ġittor dats /dellachul t'äḥa/.
44:36: Sḥabalabe tkhan day, shu baq'lüysh khilleḥ".
44:37: Üsh dika bu, ya Tubbaʿan q'am a‚ tsaral ḥalkha khillarsh a dika bu? Okha üsh hxallakbira. Bakq'alla a, üsh q'inosh desh khilira.
44:38: Okha lovzush/dolchu ḥoleḥ/ tsa qöllina stigalsh a‚ latta a‚ tsu shinna yukq'eḥ mel derg a.
44:39: Okha tsa qöllina üsh baq'dolchüntsa ben‚ delaḥ a tsarakh duqakhbolcharna tsa khäa-q.
44:40: Bakq'alla a, q'astoran de – tsarna massarna a khan tökhna ma du.
44:41: Otsu diynaḥ gergarcho dukhatukhur dats gergarchukh /ʿazapakh/ hxumma a‚ tsarna ġo diyr ma dats
44:42: Dala shekh q'inkhetam binachunna ben. Bakq'alla a, Iza veza verg a vu‚ q'inkhetame verg a vu.
44:43: Bakq'alla a, i Zakq'um olu ditt -
44:45: Laliynachu ächgakh tera qekhkar bu iza gesh choḥ‚
44:47: /Moḥ khir bu/: "Sḥalatsa iza‚ dʿaqossa iza zhözhakhatina yukq'e.
44:48: Dʿadotta tsünan körtana t'ekhula ts'iydinchu khin ʿazap".
44:49: "ʿovsha ḥayna! Bakq'alla a, ḥo /hxay kersta/ veza verg vu‚ siylaḥ verg a vu /ḥuna mattartsa‚ ḥan dashtsa a/.
44:50: Bakq'alla a, hxara du ash shegaḥ sheko yesh khillarg".
44:51: Bakq'alla a, /Delakh/ qörush bersh – teshamechu mettigeḥ khir bu.
44:53: T'edukhur du tsara dütq'achu darikh a‚ stommachu darikh a, vovshiyn düḥ-düḥal hxüttush.
44:54: Ishtta Okha bālor bu tsarna khaza bʿärgash bersh.
44:55: Qoyqur du tsara hxora stöme, /üsh qachalur tsakhilarkh, masso a khalonekh/ teshame a bolush.
44:56: Tsu choḥ valar ʿovshur dats tsara dükhḥarlera /dünenaḥ khilla/ valar dotsurg – Tso larbira üsh zhözhakhatin ʿazapakh
44:57: Ḥan Qiosh – Qobuchüngara komärshallitsa. Iza bu-q siylaḥ-bokqa tolam.
44:58: Bakq'alla a, Okha atta dina iza /Q'urʾan/ – ḥan mattaḥ a dolush – üsh qetar batsare te.
44:59: Ḥo ḥazha /hxay Muḥammad, tsarakh hxun qiar du/, üsh a ḥovsush bu /ḥo hxallaqilare - t'äḥa khuur du, ḥan khir du ġo dünenaḥ a ekhartaḥ a/.
45:2: Zhayna dossar /du hxara/ veza volchu‚ ḥukma /niysa/ desh volchu Delera.
45:3: Bakq'alla a, stigalshkaḥ a‚ lättaḥ a delilash ma du muʾma nakhana.
45:4: Shu qollareḥ a‚ /masso a lättakhula/ därzhinchu diynateḥ a delilash du sha /ch'oġa/ teshash bolchu nakhana.
45:5: Büysa-de khiytsadalareḥ a‚ Dala stigalara oḥadossiynchu ritsq'eḥ a (doġeḥ a), Sha tsüntsa dellachul t'äḥa latta dendina dolchu‚ mokh ḥiyzareḥ a delilash ma du ḥeq'ale bolchu nakhana.
45:6: Hxorsh Delan ayatash du‚ Okha düytsu üsh ḥuna /hxay Muḥammad/ baq'dolchüntsa. Mülkhachu khabarakh Delal a‚ Tsünan ayatel t'äḥa tesha üsh?
45:7: /Bokqa/ bāla bu masso a q'a latosh, /ch'oġa/ khartslüysh volchunna,
45:8: sha laduġush volchu shena t'eḥ döshush dolchu Delan ayatashka, t'akqa ch'aġlush volchu /shen q'inoshkaḥ/, kuravälla shena üsh tsa khezachukh /tsa khezash sanna/ – aḥ qaʾ bakqa tsunna lazosh dolchu ʿazaptsa.
45:9: Shena Tkhan ayatekh tsḥa hxuma khiʾcha, – iza sḥalotsu tso, belam a boy. Üsh (An-Nadar a, i sannarsh a) shayna shäsh siysazbokhur bolu ʿazap khir dersh bu.
45:10: Tseran ḥalkhaḥ zhözhakhati khir yu. Tsarna karadincho a‚ Dela a vitina, tsara lätsnachu doladiyrasha a hxumma a k'elḥardokqur dats tsarakh. Tsarna deza-dokqa ʿazap khir du.
45:11: Hxara bu niysa neq'. Shayn Qiosh-Qobuchun ayatash kerstadinarsh – /üsh bu/ shayna lazosh dolchukh uggar ch'oġa ʿazap khir dersh.
45:12: Dela vu Sha hxord shuna müt'aḥ binarg: tsu chukhula kema leliyta a Shen omrantsa‚ shüga lekhiyta a Tsünan komärshallakh /hxordan niʿmatash – ch'ara‚ marzhanash…/‚ shüga barkalla aliyta a /Sha dellachu niʿmatashna/.
45:13: Shuna müt'aḥ dina Tso stigalshkaḥ mel derg a‚ lättaḥ mel derg a – derrige a Shegara. Bakq'alla a, tsu choḥ delilash ma du oyla esh bolchu nakhana.
45:14: Aḥ āla /hxay elcha/ iyman dillinchärga: gechdoyla tsara Delan denoshka dog dokhush botsucharna Tsünga beqam baytarḥama nakhana shäsh /dünenaḥ/ karadesh khillachüntsa.
45:15: Milla velaḥ dika dina, – tsunna shena du iza‚ milla velaḥ von dina, – tsunna shena düḥal du iza a. T'akqa shayn Qiosh-Qobuchunna t'e dʿaderzor du shu.
45:16: Okha delira Israilan k'entashka zhayna a‚ ḥukma a‚ paykhamaralla a‚ ritsq' delira tsarna ts'ena dolchukh‚ Okha bazbiyra üsh ʿalamel.
45:17: Okha elira tsarna /dinan/ ġullaqan bilgalonash. Tseran khilpalo ma tsa khilira, shayga ʿilma deʾnachul t'äḥa ben, vovshashna yukq'eḥ ḥaġ khilarna. Bakq'alla a, ḥan Qiosh-Qobucho qiel yiyr yu tsarna yukq'eḥ q'ematdiynaḥ shayn shetsa khilpalo khillachoḥ.
45:18: T'akqa ḥo /hxay Muḥammad/ khiliytina Okha /dinan/ ġullaqan baq'oneḥ– tsunna t'äḥahxotta‚ tsa khuush bolcheran dezarshna t'äḥa ma hxotta.
45:19: Bakq'alla a, tsara Delera hxumma a k'elḥardokqur dats ḥuna. Bakq'alla a, zulamkhoy - tseran tsḥabersh vuqeran ġönchiy (doladiyrash) bu ḥuna. Dela vu /Shekh/ qörush bolcheran ġöncha (doladiyrig).
45:20: Hxara – bilgalonash yu /bʿärg böllush/ nakhana‚ niysa neq' a bu‚ q'inkhetam a bu /ch'oġa/ teshash bolchu nakhana.
45:21: Q'inosh letiynacharna möttina te Okha shäsh iyman dillinchärtsa‚ dika ʿamalsh yinachärtsa tsḥaterra khülüytur bu – shayn denbalar a‚ balar a? Von khili tsara desh dolu ḥukma!
45:22: Dala qöllina stigalsh a‚ latta a baq'dolchüntsa‚ hxor sinna sha karadinchüntsa beqam khiliytarḥama a‚ tsarna /tsḥanna a tsadinarg baḥaneḥ/ zulam diyr dats.
45:23: Ḥuna goy i shena dezarg shen dela lätsnarg? Dala tilavala vitina iza shen khaartsa‚ Tso muhxar tökhna tsünan khazarna a‚ dagna a t'e‚ tsünan bʿärsana t'e kirḥa dillina Tso. T'akqa iza ḥan nisviyr vu Delal t'äḥa? Ash oyla tsa yo?
45:24: Tsara elira: "Hxara vayn dünenan dakhar ben qin dakhar dats. Lo /vayn tsḥabersh/‚ dünen chu bovla /tsḥabersh/‚ vay hxallakdiyr ma dats zamano ben". Tseran ma dats tsüntsa tsḥa a ʿilma. Üsh /bekq'a ishtta/ möttush bu.
45:25: Tsarna t'eḥ Tkhan bilgala dolu ayatash deshcha‚ tseran delil ma tsa khilira, tsara alar ben: "Sḥabalabe tkhan day, shu baq'lüysh khilleḥ".
45:26: Aḥ āla /tsärga, hxay elcha/: "Dala dendiyr du shu‚ t'akqa Tso dolüytur du shu‚ t'akqa guldiyr du shu q'ematdiyne‚ shena choḥ sheko yotschu". Delaḥ a duqakhbolchu nakhana tsa khäa-q.
45:27: Delan du-q stigaliyn a‚ lättan a pachchaḥalla. Saḥt hxöttinchu diynaḥ – otsu diynaḥ öshur ma bu khartsbersh.
45:28: Ḥuna gur ma du /hxay Muḥammad/ masso a ummat gorahxöttina. Hxor ummat qoyqur ma du shen zhayna t'e – takhana shuna beqam biyr ma bu ash desh khillachüntsa.
45:29: Hxara du Tkhan zhayna, teshalla diyr dolush shuna t'eḥ baq'dolchüntsa. Bakq'alla a, Tkho khilira dʿayazdesh ash desh khillarg.
45:30: Iyman dillinarsh a‚ dika ʿamalsh yinarsh a – üsh bukhkur bu shayn Qiosh-Qobucho Shen q'inkhetamna chu. Iza bilgala bolu tolam bu-q!
45:31: Tq'a tsateshnarsh /tsärga er du/: "San ayatash tsa khilira shuna t'eḥ döshush? T'akqa ash kuralla ma yira – shukh q'inosh desh dolu q'am khilira".
45:32: /Shüga/ älcha: "Bakq'alla a, Delan vaʿda baq' yu‚ saḥt /hxuttur du/‚ sheko yats tsu choḥ"‚ ash olura: "Tsa khäa tkhuna‚ saḥt hxun du a‚ vayna khuurg-m tsḥa mottar ben dats‚ bakq'alla a, teshash ma dats tkho /ekhartakh/".
45:33: Guchudelira tsarna shäsh dina khilla vonash‚ ḥaqadelira tsarakh üsh shekh tsa beshash khillarg.
45:34: Er du /tsärga q'ematdiynaḥ/: "Takhana Tkhuna shu ditsdella‚ shuna hxoqu denna düḥalqetar ditsdalarkh terra. Shun chuġoyla /zhözhakhatin/ ts'e yu‚ vats shuna ġönchekh tsḥa a.
45:35: Iza du /shuna/ ash Delan ayatash belame lätsna khilarna a‚ dünenan dakharo shu ʿekhorna a". Takhana üsh arabokhur bats tsu chüra‚ tsärga tōba dar a dökhur dats.
45:36: Dalla bu khastam /berrige a/‚ stigaliyn Da volchu‚ lättan Da volchu‚ ʿalamiyn Da volchu.
45:37: Tsünan du siylaḥ-dokqalla stigalshkaḥ a‚ lättaḥ a‚ Iza vu veza verg a‚ ḥukma /niysa/ desh verg a.
46:2: Zhayna (Q'urʾan) dossar du /hxara/ Sha veza volchu‚ ḥukma /niysa/ desh volchu Delera.
46:3: Okha tsa qöllina stigalsh a‚ latta a‚ tsu shinna yukq'eḥ mel derg a baq'ontsa ben‚ ts'e tökhnachu khanna ben. Kersta khillarsh shayna tiysinchu /ekhartan ʿazapan/ qeramakh dʿa ma börzu.
46:4: Aḥ āla /hxay Muḥammad/: "Diytsal suna, Dela a vitina, ash /shayga/ qoyqucharakh. Hxun qöllina tsara lattakh‚ ya tsarna naq'ostalla du /Delatsa tsḥäna hxuma qollareḥ/ stigalshkaḥ? Sḥalo söga zhayna hxoqul (Q'urʾanal) ḥalkha /dossiyna dolu/‚ ya ʿilmanakh lar, shu baq'lüysh khilleḥ".
46:5: Mila vu vunō tilavella sha Dela votschünga qoyqush volchul, shena zhop tsa luchünga q'ematde qachchalts‚ üsh tseran qayqarkh (ʿibadatakh) ġopal a bolush? /Vats tsḥa a!/
46:6: Nakh gulbicha /q'ematdiynaḥ/, üsh khili tsarna mostaġiy‚ tseran ʿibadatana kersta.
46:7: Shayna t'eḥ Tkhan bilgala dolu ayatash döshush, kersta khillachara elira baq'dolchukh (Q'urʾanakh), i shayga deʾnachul t'äḥa: "Hxara bilggala dolu bozbuunchalla du".
46:8: Ya tsara olu: "Tso /shegara/ qöllina iza?" Aḥ āla /hxay Muḥammad/: "As iza /Q'urʾan/ aysa qöllineḥara, ash doladiyr ma dats suna Delera hxumma a (shuna nitsq' qochur batsara sokh Delan ʿazap dukhatokha, t'akqa shun düḥa as hxunda qullu i saygara)? Iza dika khuush vu-q ash tsunakh /Q'urʾanakh/ düytsurg. Qacho yu-q Tsüntsa tesh khila suna a‚ shuna a yukq'eḥ. Iza t'ekh gechdiyrig a vu‚ q'inkhetame verg a vu".
46:9: Aḥ āla /hxay elcha, ḥayn q'oman mushrikashka/: "So khilla vats elchanekh dükhḥar vaiytinarg‚ suna tsa khäa saykh hxun diyr du a‚ shukh /hxun diyr du a/. So t'äḥahxuttu dekq'a sayga väḥitsa khaiytinchunna. So ma vats bilggala volu qeramcha (dʿakhoüyturg) ben".
46:10: Aḥ āla: "Ash diytsal suna /shayn ḥolakh/ iza /Q'urʾan/ Delan aġorḥara khilcha, ash tsunna kerstanalla dina‚ tq'a Israilan k'entekh tsḥammo teshalla di i sannachunna t'eḥ. Tso iyman dillira‚ shu kuradevlira. Bakq'alla a, Dāla nis ma tsa do zulame dolu q'am".
46:11: Tsateshnachara elira iyman dillncharekh: "/Iza‚ islam din/ dika khilleḥara, tkhol ḥalkha tsunna t'e qiar ma batsara üsh". Shäsh tsüntsa (Q'urʾantsa) niysachu novq'a nis tsa belcha‚ tsara er du: "Hxara ḥalkhalera khartsderg du".
46:12: Tsul ḥalkha Musan zhayna /dossiyra Okha/ bächcha a‚ q'inkhetam a khilla. Hxara zhayna /du/, baq'desh /shel ḥalkha khillarsh/‚ ʿärbiyn mattaḥ a dolush, qeram tasa zulam dinacharna‚ qaʾ khilla dikacharna.
46:13: Bakq'alla a, shäsh ällarsh: "Vayn Qiosh-Qoburg Dela vu"‚ t'akqa /Delan novq'aḥ/ ch'aġbellarsh – qeram a khir ma bats tsarna /ekhartaḥ Delan ʿazapakh/‚ üsh singattame a khir ma bats /dünenaḥ shayl bukhadüschukh/.
46:14: Üsh yalsamanin day bu‚ tsu choḥ guttar lättar bolush – /khaza/ beqam bu /iza/ tsara yesh khillachu /dikachu/ ʿamalna /düḥal/.
46:15: Veset dina Okha adame shen detsa-nenatsa dika khilar – nanas /kiyraḥ/ leliyna iza khalontsa‚ /dünena/ väkqina iza khalontsa. Iza /kiyraḥ/ leloran a‚ /vaqorakh/ q'astoran a khan tq'e itt butt bu /6-9 butt kiyraḥ, yisina khan vaqosh/. Sha ġemettahxötticha, shovztq'a shere välcha, tso elira: "Vezan Dela‚ ätto belaḥ suna Ḥan niʿmatana barkalla ala‚ Aḥ suna a‚ san dena-nanna a della dolchu‚ Ḥo shena reza volu dika ʿamal yan a‚ todelaḥ suna san zürreteḥ /san ġullaqash – nisbelaḥ üsh a niysachu novq'a/ a. Bakq'alla a, as tōba di Ḥöga‚ bakq'alla a, so /Dalla/ müt'aḥbolcharakh (busalbanekh) vu-q".
46:16: Üsh (Abu-Bakr a i sannarsh a) bu Okha shaygara q'obaldesh bersh shäsh yinchu ʿamalakh uggar khazanig‚ Okha tidame ötsur dats tseran /kegiy/ q'inosh‚ /üsh khir bu/ yalsamanin dayshkaḥ‚ /Delan/ baq' khilla vaʿda yu iza tsarna yina khilla yolu.
46:17: /Ḥazhal/ i ällarg shen dega-nene: "Üffay shu shiʾ‚ ash shimmo vaʿda yo suna so /vellachul t'äḥa kash chüra/ aravokqur vu‚ oliy‚ /duqa/ t'äḥenash dʿa ma yakhna sol ḥalkha /tsarakh tsḥa a tsa välla kash chüra ara/. Tsu shimmo ġo dökhush Dele: "Ma vāla deq'aza‚ iyman dilla. Bakq'alla a, Delan vaʿda baq' yu". Tso olu: "Hxorsh-m ḥalkhalerchiyn tüyranash ben datsara".
46:18: Üsh bu shayna t'eḥ ḥalkha dakhanchu zhiniyn a‚ adamiyn a ummatashkaḥ älla dolu dosh baq'khillarsh. Bakq'alla a, üsh khilira eshnarsh.
46:19: Hxoranna sha yinchu ʿamalan darzh yu. Tso beqam biyr bu tsarna tsara yinchu ʿamalashka /ḥäzhna/‚ tsarna zulam diyr dats.
46:20: Otsu /q'emat/diynaḥ tsateshnarsh ḥalkhatottur bu zhözhakhatina‚ /tsärga er du malikasha/: "Dʿadakhiytina ash shayn dikanash (niʿmatash) shayn dünenan dakhareḥ‚ tsüntsa /dünentsa/ zovq a ḥegna ash. Takhana shuna beqam bo siysazallin ʿazapatsa ash kuralla yarna lättaḥ, tsḥa a baq'o yotsush‚ shu pesiq' khilarna".
46:21: Ḥakhave ʿadiyn vasha‚ tso qeram tesira shen q'omana Aḥq'afeḥ‚ qeram tosursh /elchanash/ tsul ḥalkha a khilira‚ t'äḥa a khilira: "Ash ʿibadat ma delash Dalla ben‚ bakq'alla a, so qöru shuna siylaḥ-dokqachu diynan ʿazapakh"‚ älla.
46:22: Tsara elira: "Ḥo veana tkhuna tkho dʿaḥavzadan tkhan deliykh. Sḥadalade ayḥa tkhuna khir du bokhurg, ḥuo baq'lüycharakh khilleḥ".
46:23: Tso (Hxud-paykhamara) elira: "Bakq'alla a, ʿilma Dalla gergaḥ du‚ as shüga dʿaqachado so shetsa vaiytinarg /i ʿazap hxun du/‚ hxette a suna shu kheta zhehxal q'am".
46:24: Shayna gicha iza markha shayn toġina t'e yoġush‚ tsara elira: "Hxara markha vayna doġa daḥash yu-q". "Hxan-hxa! Iza ash sha sikhdinarg (ʿazap) du – mokh bu shena choḥ lazosh dolu ʿazap dolu"‚ /elira qechara/.
46:25: "Tso dokhor du masso a hxuma shen Delan omratsa"‚ /elira tsḥabolchara/‚ üsh ʿüyranga bevlira tseran ġishlosh ben gush hxuma a dotsush (Dala hxallakbira üsh). Ishtta beqam bo Okha q'inosh dechu q'omana.
46:26: Okha ch'aġbinera üsh shu (q'urayshash) shetsa ch'aġ tsa binchüntsa‚ Okha khiliytira tsarna lersa a‚ bʿärsa a‚ degnash a. Tsarna tsḥanna hxumanna paydane tsa khilira tseran lersa a‚ tseran bʿärsa a‚ tseran degnash a (tsarakh hxumma a k'elḥar tsa däkqira tsara Delan ʿazapakh)‚ üsh khilira Delan ayatekh tsa teshash. Tsarakh ḥärchira üsh shekh tsa beshash khillarg.
46:27: Okha hxallak ma yira shun gonaḥara yartash‚ daliyra delilash‚ üsh yukhabörzur batsara te.
46:28: Ġo dineḥara tsarna shäsh, Dela a vitina, Tsunna gergakhiliyta tsara lätsna khillachu dēlanasha. /Ma tsa dina!/ Hxette a‚ üsh dʿatilira tsarakh. Iza tseran khartsderg a dara‚ tsara kharts qullush khillarg a dara.
46:29: Okha ḥavzira ḥo volchu zhiniykh tsḥa toba‚ tsara Q'urʾane laduġu. Shäsh tsigaḥ dolush tsara /vovshashka/ elira: "Sovtsa /ladoġa Q'urʾane/". I deshna dälcha, üsh dʿadakhara shen q'omana t'e, qeram tosush.
46:30: Tsara elira: "Hxay tkhan q'am! Tkhuna khezira tsḥa zhayna‚ Musal t'äḥa dossiyna dolu, shel ḥalkha khillachüntsa (Tavratatsa a‚ Inzhilatsa a) niysa doġush dolu‚ sha nisvesh dolu baq'dolchunna t'e a‚ niysachu novq'a a.
46:31: Hxay tkhan q'am! Zhop lo Delera qoyqush volchunna‚ tesha tsunakh - Tso gechdiyr du shun q'inoshna‚ shu k'elḥardokhur du lazosh dolchu ʿazapakh".
46:32: Delera qoyqush volchunna zhop tsa lush verg – nitsq' qochur bats tsunna lättaḥ /Delan ʿazapakh k'elḥaravala/. Iza votsurg /tsḥa a/ ġönchiy bats tsunna. Ishttanash bilgalchu tilar choḥ bu-q!
46:33: Tsarna tsa gina teḥa Sha stigalsh a‚ latta a qöllina volu Dela‚ üsh qullush k'ad tsa vella volu‚ nitsq' qochush vuyla bellarsh denban? Hxaʾ! Bakq'alla a, Iza masso a hxumanna t'eḥ nitsq' qochush verg vu-q.
46:34: Otsu /q'emat/diynaḥ ḥalkhatottur bu tsateshnarsh /zhözhakhatin/ ts'arna /tsärga khottur du/: "Baq' dats hxara?" /olush/. Tsara er du: "Hxaʾ‚ tkhan Qiosh-Qobuchukh (duy bou okha): baq' du". Tso (Dāla) er du: "ʿovsha shayna ʿazap shäsh tsa teshash khilarna".
46:35: Sobare khila /ḥo, Muḥammad, tsu kerstanasha ḥayna bechu tsatamashkaḥ/‚ elchanekh shaygaḥ ch'aġo khillachara sobar darkh terra‚ sikh ma de tsarna /ʿazap dossar/. Üsh tera bu‚ shayna vaʿda yinarg shayna guchu diynaḥ‚ diynan tsḥana saḥteḥ ben /dünenaḥ/ tsa lättincharakh. /Hxara Q'urʾan nakhe/ dʿaqachor du /ḥuna t'eḥ/. Pesiq' q'am ben hxallakdesh duy? /Dats te!/
47:1: Shäsh tsateshnarsh a‚ Delan neq'akh /nakh/ dʿatiliynarsh a – Tso dʿatiliyna tseran ʿamalsh (tsara dünenaḥ dinachu dikanna düḥal dünenaḥ dikachüntsa beqam khir bu tsarna, ekhartaḥ tseran ʿamalsh ḥesape ötsur yats).
47:2: Iyman dillinarsh a‚ dika ʿamalsh yinarsh a‚ Muḥammade dossosh khillachukh teshnarsh a – iza tseran Qiosh-Qobuchüngara baq'derg du - Tso ts'anbiyr bu üsh shayn q'inoykh‚ todiyr du tseran ġullaq.
47:3: Iza du tsateshnarsh t'äḥahxüttush khilarna khartsdolchunna‚ iyman dillinarsh t'äḥahxüttush khilarna shayn Qiosh-Qobuchüngara baq'dolchunna. Ishtta dālado Dala nakhana shayn masalsh.
47:4: Shäsh düḥalqetcha tsateshnachärtsa – logekh tokha ash üsh ġelballalts‚ ch'aġde burzhalsh– t'äḥa q'inkhetam ber ya düḥal makh ötsur– t'amo shen moḥ oḥabillalts. Iza (du shütsa t'om bechu mostaġashtsa khila deza ḥal). Dalla laaḥara, Tso tolam lur bara tsarna t'eḥ‚ delaḥ a shun tsḥabersh vuqartsa zerḥama /boytu Dala t'emash/. Delan novq'aḥ bayinarsh – Tso yanne a dʿatilor yats tseran ʿamalsh.
47:5: Tso t'äḥa nisbiyr bu üsh‚ todiyr du tseran ġullaq.
47:6: Tso bukhkur bu üsh yalsamani chu‚ Sha tsarna yovziytina yolchu (hxoranna shena yalsamaneḥ khir yolu hxusam khuush).
47:7: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Ash Dalla ġo daḥ (Tsünan din ch'aġdesh)‚ Tso shuna a ġo diyr du‚ shun kogash a ch'aġbiyr bu.
47:8: Tsateshnarsh – hxallaqilar du tsarna‚ Tso dʿatiliyna tseran ʿamalsh.
47:9: Iza du tsarna tsa diyzina dela Dala dossiynarg (Q'urʾan) – Tso dʿayaya tseran ʿamalsh.
47:10: Üsh tsa lella lättakhula‚ tsa ḥovsu‚ mukha khilla tsaral ḥalkhakhillacheran chaqe? Dala bokhiyra üsh. /Hxoqu/ kerstanashna a tsunakh teranig khir du.
47:11: Iza - Dela iyman dillincheran ġöncha volu dela du‚ tq'a kerstanash – tseran tsḥa a ġöncha votsu dela du.
47:12: Bakq'alla a, Dala bukhkur bu iyman dillinarsh a‚ dika ʿamalsh yinarsh a boshmashka‚ shayn bukhakhula khish ökhush dolchu. Tq'a tsateshnarsha /k'ezzig/ zovq ḥögur du /qu dünenaḥ/‚ duur du bezhnasha ma dou – /t'akqa zhözhakhatin/ ts'e yu tsarna choḥʿayla.
47:13: Masa yurt‚ shäsh ḥo /hxay elcha/ shena chüra araväkqina, ḥan yurtal (Makkal) nütsq'alō yolush yolu‚ hxallakyina Okha‚ ma tsa khilira tsarna tsḥa a ġöncha!
47:14: Shen Qiosh-Qobuchüngara bilgalona t'eḥ verg tera vu tq'a shen ʿamalan vonig shena khazyinachukh? Shayn dezarshna t'äḥahxittira üsh!
47:15: /Delakh/ qörucharna khir yu älla yolchu yalsamanin masal du: tsu choḥ tatolash du /cham a‚ ḥozha a/ tsa khiytsaluchu khikh a‚ shen cham tsa khiytsaluchu shurin tatolash du‚ molucharna ch'oġa chōmeḥ dolchu chaġaran tatolash du‚ ts'enachu mezan tatolash a du. Tsarna tsu choḥ masso a stömekh /stömash/ bu‚ shäsh Qiosh-Qobuchüngara gechdar a du. Üsh (yalsamanin day) tera buy guttar ts'ergaḥ bolcharakh (zhözhakhatin daykh), shayna qekhkiyna khi malosh bolchu, t'akqa tso tseran chüyrash tüydush bolchu?
47:16: Tsarakh ḥöga ladöġursh bu, shäsh ḥo volchüra āra ma- bevllineḥ, tsara olura shaygaḥ ʿilma dolchärga: "Hxun elira tso (Muḥammada) hxintsa ḥalkha?" Üsh bu Dala shayn degnashna t'e muhxar tökhnarsh‚ shayn dezarshna t'äḥahxittira üsh.
47:17: Shäsh nisbellarsh a – Tso sovbekhira üsh niysachu neq'atsa‚ Tso delira tsarna /Delakh/ qerar.
47:18: Üsh ḥovsur buy saḥte, iza shayna dārakh (t'eqacharakh) ts'ekhḥana? Tsünan /tsḥatstsa/ shart'ash ma deana. Michara khir bu tsarna, iza shayna deʾcha, vovshashna ḥekham?! (Tso ġo diyr dats tsarna t'akqa).
47:19: Ḥuna khaalaḥ‚ qin dela vats sha Allahx (tsḥa Dela) ben‚ gechdar dēkha ḥan ledarlonashna a‚ muʾma bozharshna a‚ muʾma zudarshna a. Dela khuush vu shun dʿasaidar a /diynaḥ/‚ shun chuderzar a /busa/.
47:20: Iyman dillinchara olu: "Surat dössiyneḥara". /Shena choḥ niysa/ ḥukmanash dolu surat dossiycha‚ tsu choḥ t'om ḥakhiycha‚ ḥuna gi, shayn degnashkaḥ tsamgar yersh ḥöga ḥözhush, shena vala khorsha eanarg sanna. Tsarna vunō tame dara –
47:21: müt'aḥ khilar a‚ khaza dosh a (tam bara tsärgara ḥuna khaza). Ġullaq satsadellachu khenaḥ üsh Dele baq'liycha, – dika dara-q tsarna.
47:22: Shu khila mega, shäsh /iymanakh/ dʿadirzicha, bökhanig darzhadesh lättaḥ‚ gergarlonash khēdosh?
47:23: Üsh Dala shayna neʿalt ällarsh bu‚ t'akqa q'orbina Tso üsh /baq'derg tsa khezash/‚ bʿärsaza a bina /baq'derg tsa gush/.
47:24: Q'urʾanakh oyla tsa yo tsara‚ ya tseran degnashkaḥ dōġanash du?
47:25: Bakq'alla a, shäsh ḥalkha khillachunna (kerstanallina) t'e yukhabirzinarsh shayna niysa neq' bilgalbällachul t'äḥa – shayt'ano khazdina tsarna /shayn bökha ġullaqash/‚ tso dag chu qüssush du tsarna /Delan neq'akh dʿatilar/.
47:26: Iza du tsara alarna Dala dossosh derg (Q'urʾān) tsa dezash khillachärga: "Tkho müt'aḥ khir du shuna tsḥadolchu ġullaqashkaḥ". Dalla khuush ma yu tseran q'aylenash.
47:27: Mukha /khir du tseran ḥelash/ üsh malikasha dʿaqalkhiynchu khenaḥ‚ tsara tsarna ettash yakhḥiykh a‚ bakq'iykh a?
47:28: Iza du üsh Dela öġazvokquchunna t'äḥahxittarna‚ Iza rezakhilar shayna tsadezarna – t'akqa Tso dʿayoyʾu tseran ʿamalsh.
47:29: Shayn degnashkaḥ tsamgar yolcharna möttina te Dala tsq'a a shayn mostaġalla guchudokqur yats?
47:30: Tkhuna liʾcha, Okha gaytina khir bara üsh ḥuna – t'akqa ḥuna bevzina khir bara üsh shayn bilgalonashtsa. Ḥuna bevzar ma bu üsh deshan äznashtsa. Dela khuush vu-q shun ʿamalsh.
47:31: Okha züyr ma du shu Tkhuna shukh /Delan novq'aḥ t'amtsa/ q'aḥögursh a‚ sobar diyrash a bovzzalts‚ Okha züyr du shun khabarsh a.
47:32: Bakq'alla a, tsateshnarsh a‚ Delan neq'akh /nakh/ dʿatilinarsh a‚ shayna niysa neq' bilgalbällachul t'äḥa elchantsa mostaġalla leliynarsh a – tsara hxumma a zen diyr ma dats Dalla‚ t'äḥa Tso dʿayoyʾur yu tseran ʿamalsh.
47:33: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Dalla müt'aḥ khila‚ Delan elchanna müt'aḥ khila‚ shayn ʿamalsh ma yaya.
47:34: Bakq'alla a, tsateshnarsh‚ Delan neq'akh /nakh/ dʿatilinarsh‚ t'akqa kersta ḥoleḥ bellarsh – Dala tsq'a a gechdiyr dats tsarna.
47:35: Shu ledar ma dovlalash‚ mashare /kerstanash/ ma qayqalash‚ shu ḥalaḥ /nütsq'ala/ dolush. Dela shütsa vu shuna‚ Tso eshor yats shuna shun ʿamalsh.
47:36: Bakq'alla a, dünenan dakhar lovzar a‚ erna khan yayar a du. Ash iyman dillaḥ‚ shu /Delakh/ qeraḥ, – Tso shuna lur yu shun yal‚ dökhur dats shun däkhni a /dekq'a zakat dakqar ben/.
47:37: Tso shüga /derrig däkhni/ dökhush delḥara‚ shuna t'evirzina i dökhush‚ shu bʿärmetsig khir dara. Tso guchudokqur dara /shun degnashkaḥ dolu Delan novq'aḥ kharzhash yar/ tsadezar (bʿärmetsigalla).
47:38: Hxorsh du-q shu, shayga (paykhamara) qoyqush dolu Delan novq'aḥ kharzhash yare! Shukh bʿärmetsig (pis) verg ma vu. Bʿärmetsig verg – i shena bʿärmetsig (pis) ma vu. Dela ḥal dolush ma vu (tsḥangara hxumma a tsa öshush)‚ shu peq'arsh ma du (Delera dikanash öshush). Shu yukhadovlaḥ /iymanakh/, Tso khüytsur du shu qechu q'omatsa‚ t'akqa üsh khir bats shukh tera.
48:1: Bakq'alla a, Okha belira ḥuna /hxay Muḥammad/ q'egina tolam
48:2: gechdarḥama ḥuna Dala ḥan ḥalkhayakhana ledarlonashna‚ t'äḥakhillarg a‚ qochushdarḥama Shen niʿmat ḥuna t'eḥ‚ nisvarḥama ḥo niysachu novq'a‚
48:3: Tso ḥuna deza ġo darḥama a.
48:4: Iza vu muʾma nekhan degnashka sinparġato yossiynarg üsh sovbovliytarḥama shayn iymana t'e a iymantsa. Delan du stigaliyn a‚ lättan a eskarsh. Khilira Dela khuush verg‚ ḥukma /niysa/ desh verg a.
48:5: /I ḥukma do Dala/ Sha chubakhiyta muʾma bozhariy a‚ muʾma zudariy a /tseran Dalla desh dolu ʿibadat a, Delan novq'aḥ shayn sinoshtsa a, shayn bakhamtsa a q'aḥegar a baḥaneḥ/ shayn bukhakhula khish a ökhush dolchu boshmashna‚ üsh tsu choḥ guttar lättash‚ üsh q'inoykh ts'anban a. Iza khilira Dalla gergaḥ siylaḥ-bokqa tolam.
48:6: ʿazap dan a shäsh Delakh bökha oylanash yesh bolchu (ḥuna kerstanashna t'eḥ tolam khir bats‚ bokhush) munepiq' bozharshna a‚ munepiq' zudarshna a‚ Delatsa naq'ostiy lötsuchu bozharshna a‚ Delatsa naq'ostiy lötsuchu zudarshna a. Tsarakh /go besh/ ḥärchar du vonig (Delan ʿazap). Öġazvakhana tsarna Dela‚ neʿalt älla tsarna‚ Tso kechyina tsarna zhözhakhati. Von khili-q /tseran/ dʿadörziyla!
48:7: Delan du stigaliyn a‚ lättan a eskarsh. Khilira Dela veza verg a‚ ḥukma /niysa/ desh verg a.
48:8: Bakq'alla a, Okha vakhiytina ḥo /hxay Muḥammad/ tesh khilla /q'ematdiynaḥ nakhana t'eḥ/‚ qaancha khilla /muʾma nakhana yalsamanitsa/‚ qeramcha khilla /tsateshacharna ʿazapatsa/
48:9: shu teshiyta Delakh a‚ Tsünan elchanakh a‚ ash tsunna (elchanna) ġo dan a‚ ash iza lara a‚ ash Tsunna (Dalla) tasbiḥ dan ʿüyrentsa a‚ süyrentsa a.
48:10: Bakq'alla a, shäsh ḥötsa, duy boush, ch'aġo yinarsh – Delatsa, duy boush, ch'aġo yinarsh bu. Delan küg tseran küygash t'eḥ du. I /ch'aġo/ yokhiynarg – Tso yokhosh yu shena‚ qochushyinarg Delatsa shen khilla vaʿda – Tso tsunna lur yu siylaḥ-yokqa yal.
48:11: Ḥöga er du qelkhash lelachu ʿärbekh bukhabisinchara: "Tkho sovtsiyna tkhan bakhamo a‚ tkhan dözalo a‚ gechdar dekhaḥ tkhuna". Tsara olu mattatsa dagaḥ dotsurg. Aḥ āla /tsärga, hxay Muḥammad/: "Ḥan dola diyr dara shuna Dalla düḥal tsḥanna a hxumantsa‚ Tsunna shuna tsḥa zen liʾcha ya shuna tsḥa payda liʾcha? Hxaʾ‚ khili Dela ash diyrig sov dika khuush.
48:12: Hxette a, shu möttush dara, elcha a‚ muʾma nakh a shayn dözalna t'e tsq'a a börzur bats älla. Iza khazdina shun degnashkaḥ. Shuna möttura von hxuma. Von q'am khili-q shu".
48:13: Delakh a‚ Tsünan elchanakh a tsateshnarg – bakq'alla a, Okha kechyina kerstanashna zhözhakhati.
48:14: Delan du stigaliyn a‚ lättan a pachchaḥalla. Gechdo Tso Shena luuchunna‚ ʿazap a do Tso Shena luuchunna. Khili Dela t'ekh gechdiyrig a‚ q'inkhetame verg a.
48:15: Er du bukhabüsuchara shu hxonsana t'e dörzuchu khenaḥ i etsa: "Tkho a ditash shayna t'äḥahxitta". Üsh luush bu shäsh khiytsa Delan dosh. Aḥ āla /tsärga, hxay elcha/: "Tsq'a a tkhuna t'äḥahxüttur dats shu. Ishtta älla Dala ḥalkha". T'akqa tsara er du: "Hxaʾ‚ tkhuna ḥaġ yesh du-q shu". Hxaʾ‚ üsh khilira tsa qetash k'ezzig /hxumanakh/ ben.
48:16: Tsu qelkhash lelachu ʿärbekh bukhabüsuchärga aḥ āla: "T'äḥa shu qoyqur du ch'oġa nitsq' bolchu q'ome (tsüntsa t'om ban)‚ tsärtsa ash t'om biyr bu‚ ya üsh /shayn laameḥ Dalla/ müt'aḥ khir bu. Shu müt'aḥ khilaḥ /Delan omranna/, Dala khaza yal lur yu shuna. Shu dʿaderzaḥ shäsh ḥalkha dʿa ma-dirzzi‚ Tso lazosh dolchu ʿazaptsa ʿazap diyr du shuna".
48:17: Bʿärsa dotsuchunna q'a dats‚ astaġa volchunna a q'a dats‚ tsomgush volchunna a q'a dats /ġazote tsa bakhcha/. Dalla a‚ Tsünan elchanna a müt'aḥ verg – Tso vokhüytur vu iza boshmashka‚ shayna bukhakhula khish ökhush dolchu‚ dʿavirzinarg /Delan dinakh/ – Tso ʿazap diyr du tsunna lazosh dolchu ʿazaptsa.
48:18: Rezakhili Dela muʾma nakhana, tsara shäsh ḥuna teshame khir du älla, dosh lush ditta k'el‚ Tsunna khiira tseran degnashkaḥ derg. T'akqa Tso yossiyra sinparkhato tsarna‚ Tso sovġat delira tsarna gerga khir bolchu tolamtsa a,
48:19: dukqa a hxonsashtsa a‚ tsara shäsh ötsur yolu. Khilira Dela veza verg a‚ ḥukma /niysa/ desh verg a.
48:20: Dala vaʿda yira shuna dukqa hxonsash – ash üsh ötsur yu. Tso sikhdira shuna hxara /hxons/‚ aydira nekhan küygash shuna t'era‚ muʾma nakhana bilgalo khiliyta /tsarna ġo khila/‚ Tso shu nisdan niysachu novq'a.
48:21: Qin /hxonsash a khir yu/ shuna shena t'eḥ nitsq' qochur botsu, Dala go bina tsarna (Dalla khäa üsh shun khir yuyla). Khilira Dela masso a hxumanna t'eḥ nitsq' qochush.
48:22: Shütsa t'om bicha tsateshnachara – tsara /shuna shayn/ bakq'ash berzor bu. (Üsh yukhabevr bu) – t'akqa tsarna karor vats tsḥa a doladiyrig a‚ ġöncha a.
48:23: Delan ʿadat du iza‚ ḥalkha a lella dolu. Ḥuna tsq'a a karor ma bats Delan ʿadatna khiytsam.
48:24: Iza vu tseran küygash aydinarg shuna t'era‚ shun küygash /aydinarg a/ tsarna t'era Makkin Bat'neḥ Tso shuna tsarna t'eḥ tolam bellachul t'äḥa. Khilira Dela ash diyrig gush.
48:25: Üsh tsateshnarsh bu‚ shu dukhatüykhira tsara Dezachu mäzhdigakh‚ ġurbanna doyu bezhana qebira, satsiyna, shen mettige dʿaqacharkh. Muʾma bozhariy a, muʾma zudariy a tsa khilleḥara /Makkin ohxlakh/, shuna shäsh bevzash botsu /shuna purba lur dara Makka yokqush t'om ban/. Hxintsa – ash tsarna zulam diyr dara‚ /t'akqa/ tsärgara q'a ḥerchar dara shukh, tsa khuush. /Iza khilira/ Dala Shen q'inkhetam chu vakhiytarḥama Shena luurg. Üsh /Makkaḥ bisna khilla busalbanash/ q'ästash khilleḥara, Okha ʿazap dina khir dara tsarakh (Makkin ohxlakh) tsateshnacharna lazosh dolchu ʿazaptsa.
48:26: Tsateshnachara khiliytira shayn degnashkaḥ nütsq'ala öġazlo‚ zhehxal zamanan öġazlo – t'akqa Dala Shen sinparġato yossiyra Shen elchanna t'e a‚ muʾma nakhana t'e a‚ /siydartsa/ khärzhira tsarna /Delakh/ qeraran dosh. Üsh khilira tsunna (Delan q'inkhetamna) vunō ḥaq' tsünan (Makkin) ohxlal. Dela khili masso a hxuma khuush verg.
48:27: Baq'dira Dala Shen elchanna ġan baq'dolchüntsa: shu ġur ma du Dezachu Mäzhdiga chu‚ Dala muq'alaḥ‚ qeram botsush‚ shayn kortosh däshna‚ /meqash‚ qin chösh/ datsdina‚ shu qörur dats. Tsunna khiira shuna tsakhuurg‚ Tso khiliytira /shuna/ iza dotsurg gergara tolam a.
48:28: Iza vu Sha vakhiytinarg Shen elcha niysachu neq'atsa a‚ baq'onan dintsa a iza toliyta masso a dinal. Qacho khilla Delatsa tesh khilar.
48:29: Muḥammad – Delan elcha vu‚ tsüntsa bersh ch'oġa bu kerstanashna t'eḥ‚ q'inkhetame bu vovshashna yuq'aḥ. Ḥuna go üsh goraökhush‚ suzhud desh, shäsh lökhush Delera /Tsunna ʿibadat dartsa/ q'inkhetam a‚ rezakhilar a. Tseran bilgalonash shayn yakhḥashkaḥ yu – suzhud daran asar /du iza/. Iza du ḥuna tseran masal Tavrata choḥ. Tseran masal Inzhila choḥ tera du tsḥana yaltekh: tso zazadokqu‚ tsara tsunna /tödush‚ nisdesh/ ġo do‚ t'akqa iza ch'aġlo‚ nislo shen ġoda t'eḥ, tsetsbokhush yalta düysh bersh‚ tsarna kerstanash öġazbakhiyta. Dala vaʿda yina, Sha tsarakh iyman dillincharna a‚ dika ʿamalsh yinacharna a gechdar a‚ siylaḥ-yokqa yal lur yu älla.
49:1: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Ḥalkha ma ġerta Dalla a‚ Tsünan elchanna a‚ Delakh qera! Bakq'alla a, Dela khezash verg a vu‚ khuush verg a vu.
49:2: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Shayn äznash ay ma de paykhamaran ozal sov‚ ch'oġa a ma āla tsünga dosh, shun tsḥabolchara vovshashka ch'oġa ālarkh tera shun ʿamalsh tsa yaya, shuna khaa tsa lush.
49:3: Bakq'alla a, shayn äznash ġeldesh bersh Delan elcha volchoḥ – üsh bu Dala shayn degnash /Delakh/ qerarna t'eḥ ziyna bersh. Tsarna gechdar a du‚ siylaḥ-yokqa yal a yu.
49:4: Bakq'alla a, i ḥöga /hxay Muḥammad/ qoyqush bersh ts'enoyn chöniyn deḥaḥara – tsarakh duqakhbersh tsa qetash bu.
49:5: Tsara sobar daḥara ḥo shayna t'e aravallalts, tsarna dika khir ma dara. Dela t'ekh gechdiyrig a vu‚ q'inkhetame verg a vu.
49:6: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Shüga tsḥa pesiq' stag veʾcha tsḥa khabar daḥash‚ ash bilgaldakqalash /tso deʾnarg/ ash tsa khuush tsḥana nakhana zen tsa dan – t'akqa shu shäsh dinchunna t'eḥ dokhkodevlla khir du.
49:7: Shuna khaalash shuna yukq'eḥ Delan elcha vuyla. Duqa dolchu ġullaqashkaḥ i shüga laduġush velḥara – shuna shayna khala khir dara. Delaḥ a‚ Dala deziytina shuna iyman‚ Tso khazdina i shun degnashkaḥ‚ tsa deziytina shuna kerstanalla a‚ pesaq'alla a‚ ʿesalla a. Izash (i sibatash shaygaḥ dersh) – üsh bu niysa lelarsh
49:8: Delera q'inkhetamtsa a, niʿmatatsa a. I Dela khuush verg a vu‚ ḥukma /niysa/ desh verg a vu.
49:9: Muʾma nakhakh shi toba letacha‚ tsarna yukq'eḥ maslaḥat de. Tsu shinnakh tsḥaʾ vuqanakh letachakh tsa satsaḥ – t'om be /ash massara a/ otsu letachüntsa i Delan omranna (Sharʿana) t'eyalts. Iza t'eyaġaḥ /Delan omranna/‚ – maslaḥat de tsu shinnan yukq'eḥ niysontsa. Ash niyso yēlash. Bakq'alla a, Dalla beza niyso yesh bersh.
49:10: Bakq'alla a, muʾma nakh – vezhariy bu. Maslaḥat de shayn shina /dovdechu/ veshina yukq'eḥ. Delakh qera‚ shukh q'inkhetam ban megara.
49:11: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Tsḥa nakh qechu nakhakh tsa bēshash ma khüliyla‚ üsh tsaral dika khila a mega‚ zudariy a ma khüliyla qechu zudarekh tsa bēshash‚ üsh tsaral dika khila a mega‚ vovshiyn qachambatsarsh (saqtash) ma lēkhalash‚ vovshashna /tsa eza/ ts'ersh a ma tekhkalash. Von ts'e yu pesaq'alla iymanal t'äḥa. /Tsul t'äḥa/ tōba tsa dinarsh – üsh zulamkhoy bu.
49:12: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Genadovla duqa dolchu, mottaluchu (dagadoġuchu) hxumanekh. Tsḥadolu mottalu hxumanash q'a du. Vovshashna ma teʿalash /q'aylakha hxuma khaa ġertash/‚ shukh tsḥabersh vuqarekh t'eḥashkha ma lēlash‚ shukh tsḥanna a deziy shen veshin zhizhig daa, i velcha? – shuna iza tsa diyzi. Delakh qeralash! Bakq'alla a, Dela tōba duqa q'obal diyrig a vu‚ /duqa/ q'inkhetame verg a vu /dokhkovälla Shega tōba dinachunna/.
49:13: Hxay nakh! Bakq'alla a, Okha shu qöllina stagakh a‚ zudchukh a‚ khiliytina shukh khalq'ash a‚ taypanash a shu vovshashna dovziyta. Bakq'alla a, shukh Dalla gergaḥ uggar siylaḥ verg – shukh uggar /Delakh/ qörush verg vu-q. Bakq'alla a, Dela /shu/ devzash vu‚ sov dika khuush vu.
49:14: Qelkhash lelachu ʿärbasha elira: "Iyman dillina Okha". Aḥ āla /hxay Muḥammad, tsärga/: "Iyman tsa dillina ash‚ delaḥ a ash ālalash: "Müt'aḥ khili tkho". Hxintsa a iyman tsa dakhna shun degnashka. Shu Dalla a‚ Tsünan elchanna a müt'aḥ khilaḥ, – shun ʿamalekh hxumma a eshor ma yats Tso. Bakq'alla a, Dela t'ett'a gechdesh verg a vu, q'inkhetame verg a vu.
49:15: Bakq'alla a, muʾma nakh bu shäsh iyman dillinarsh Dele a‚ Tsünan elchane a‚ t'akqa sheko tsa yesh‚ shayn bakhamtsa a‚ shayn sinoshtsa a Delan novq'aḥ q'aḥegnarsh. Üsh bu baq'lüysh bersh.
49:16: Aḥ āla /hxay elcha, tsu qelkhash lelachu ʿärbashka/: "Shu khaiyta ġerta Dele shayn degnashkaḥ din /khilar/? Dela khuush ma vu stigalshkaḥ derg a‚ lättaḥ derg a. Dela masso a hxuma khuush verg ma vu".
49:17: Ḥuna bakqiybö bu üsh shäsh busalba khilarna. Aḥ āla: "Suna dakqiy ma dö shäsh busalba din t'elatsarna". Hxaʾ‚ Dela q'inkhetam besh vu shukh – shu nisdina iymanna t'e‚ shu baq'lüysh khilleḥ.
49:18: Bakq'alla a, Dalla khäa stigaliyn a‚ lättan a ḥulameḥ derg. Dela gush ma vu ash diyrig.
50:1: Q'āf. Siylaḥ dolchu Q'urʾanora /ḥo Delan elcha ma vu/.
50:2: Hxette a‚ ma tsetsbevli üsh shayga shayn yukq'era qeramcha varakh‚ kerstanasha elira: "Hxara tamashe hxuma du:
50:3: vay delcha‚ vaykh poppar khilcha‚ /vay dendiyr du bokhurg/ – iza duqa genara dukhaderzar du".
50:4: Tkhuna khiira, hxun lätto sḥadokqu tsarakh (tseran doġmekh)– Tkhögaḥ ʿalashdesh dolu zhayna ma du.
50:5: Tsara khartsdira baq'derg (Q'urʾan) iza shayga deʾnachul t'äḥa‚ t'akqa üsh duqa kegadellachu ġullaqeḥ bu-q.
50:6: Üsh tsa ḥovsu shayna t'ekhula /lättachu/ stigale‚ mukha hxottiyna Okha iza /tsḥa a bʿoġam a botsush/‚ mukha khazyina‚ tsünan tsḥa a ʿürg a ma dats.
50:7: Latta a darzhiyna Okha‚ tsu choḥ dikhkina Okha lämnash‚ tsu choḥ yaliytina Okha masso a khazchu shinnakh /oramatash/.
50:8: Gar a‚ ḥekham a khilla /khiliytina Okha üsh/ masso a /Tkhuna tōbantsa/ t'evörzachu lena.
50:9: Okha dossiyra stigalara berkate khilla dolu khi (doġa)‚ tsüntsa Okha yaliytina boshmash a‚ yaltin bürtig a.
50:10: Dekha (leqa) khurmanan dittash‚ shayn t'ett'a (moġarshtsa) stom a bolush.
50:11: /Delan/ leshna ritsq' a khilla. Tsüntsa (doġantsa) Okha denbina bella bolu mokhk. Ishtta /khir/ du /shun keshnash chüra/ aradovlar a.
50:12: Khartsdira /baq'dolu din/ tsaral ḥalkha Nuḥan q'omo a‚ Rassan daysha a‚ Samudasha a‚
50:13: ʿadasha a‚ Firʿavno a‚ Lut'an vezharsha a‚
50:14: Aykatan daysha a‚ Tubbaʿan q'omo a. /Tsara/ massara a khartsbira elchanash – baq' khilira San / tsarna qeram tasartsa / yina vaʿda.
50:15: Nitsq' tsa qochush disira Tkho ḥalkha qollareḥ /stigalsh a‚ latta a/? Hxaʾ‚ üsh shekoneḥ bu kerlachu qollarkh (denbarkh).
50:16: Okha qöllira adam‚ Tkhuna khäa tsünan sino qüssu vasvasalla. Tkho gerga du tsunna /shen/ logan pkhenal a.
50:17: T'eötsu /stago diyrig/ shino t'eötsuchu /maliko/, ättu aġor a, ärru aġor a, /shäsh/ khevshina dolush.
50:18: Tsḥa a dosh olush ma dats tso, shena gergaḥ kiycha volu tergal desh verg volush ben (dʿayazdesh malik).
50:19: Valaran q'aḥo eara /ekhartan ġullaq/ baq' khilartsa. Iza dara ḥo shekh vodush (qörush) verg.
50:20: Sur leqira– iza du sha /Dala kerstanashna ʿazap diyr du älla/ vaʿda yina de.
50:21: Deara masso a sa shetsa dʿalollurg a‚ tesh a volush (shetsa malikash a dolush).
50:22: Ḥo khillera ḥoqunakh ġopal volush /tidame tsa ötsush/ – Okha aydira ḥan /bʿärgash/ t'era kirḥa – takhana ḥan bʿärsa ira khilira.
50:23: Elira tsünan naq'osto (tsunna t'ehxöttinchu maliko): "Hxara du sögaḥ /ḥuna/ kechdinarg" – /zhözhakhatin ʿazap/.
50:24: /Omra khir du/: "Ash shimmo (t'ehxöttinchu malikasha) qossa zhözhakhati chu masso a nütsq'ala /düḥal khilla/ volu kersta.
50:25: Dikanakh /nakh/ dukhatukhush khilla volu‚ dozanakh välla khilla volu‚ /dineḥ nakhe/ sheko yoytush khilla volu.
50:26: Iza vu sha Delatsa qin dela khiliytinarg‚ asha shimmo (omra shina malike du) qossa iza ch'oġachu ʿazapa chu".
50:27: Tsünan naq'osto elira: "Tkhan Qiosh-Qoburg! As tsa tiliyna iza‚ amma iza sha khili-q genarchu tilar choḥ".
50:28: Elira /Dala/: "Ash ma q'iysa Suna gergaḥ. As ḥalkha /dünenaḥ/ bakhiytira shuna Sayn qeram.
50:29: Dosh khüytsur dats Suna gergaḥ. So vats zulamash diyr dolush Sayn leshna".
50:30: Otsu diynaḥ Okha er du zhözhakhatiga: "Ḥo yuzniy?" Tso er: "Qin sov buy?" /chubakhka/.
50:32: Hxara du shuna khir du ällarg – hxor /tōba dartsa/ Dalla t'e vörzuchunna‚ /din/ ʿalashdechunna,
50:33: Q'inkhetame volchukh qörush khillachunna, Iza shena gush votstsusheḥ‚ Sha /Dalla t'e/ dörzuchu dagtsa veana volchu.
50:34: Chuġo tsunna mashartsa (märsha)! Hxara du guttarenan de.
50:35: Tsarna shayna mel dezarg du tsu choḥ. Tkhögaḥ t'etokha a du.
50:36: Mel /duqa/ hxallakyina Okha tsaral ḥalkha t'äḥenash‚ üsh tsaral nitsq'atsa vunō ch'oġa a yolush. Üsh dʿasaidira makhkakhula‚ yuy teḥa /valarkh/ k'elḥarbovla mettig?
50:37: Bakq'alla a, tsu choḥ ḥekham bu-q shen dog dolchunna‚ ya sha lerg dillinchunna /ladoġa/, sha tesh a volush.
50:38: Okha qöllira stigalsh a‚ latta a‚ tsu shinna yukq'eḥ mel derg a yalkh diynaḥ‚ Tkhokh tsa ḥaqadelira tsḥa a k'addalar.
50:39: Aḥ sobar de tsara düytsuchunna t'eḥ /hxay elcha/‚ tasbiḥ de ḥuo Qiosh-Qoburg khastortsa malkh sḥaqetale a‚ dʿabuzale a.
50:40: Büysanakh a – tasbiḥ de Tsunna‚ suzhdaniyn (lamaziyn) t'äḥa a.
50:41: Ladoġa otsu diynaḥ qoyquchun (Israfil-malikan) qayqare (sur laqare stigalna) gerga yolchu mettera (Bayt al- Maq'disera).
50:42: Otsu diynaḥ tsarna khezar bu moḥ (Israfil-maliko sholġa zurma loqush yukha denbar) baq'desh. Iza aradovlu de du /keshnashkara/.
50:43: Bakq'alla a, Okha denbo‚ Okha bolüytu‚ Tkhuna t'e du dʿaderzar a.
50:44: Otsu diynaḥ latta dōdur du tsarakh, /üsh/ sikhlush /shäsh qoyquchunna t'e/. Iza guldar Tkhuna atta du.
50:45: Tkho dika khuush du tsara olurg. Ḥo vats tsarna t'eḥ nitsq' biyrig. Ḥekham be Q'urʾantsa San qeramakh qörush volchunna.
51:1: Darzhosh dolchekh /duy bou As/ darzhorakh tera.
51:4: Ġullaq döq'ush dolcharakh a /duy bou As/ :
51:5: shuna yesh yolu vaʿda baq'ʾerg ma yu.
51:7: Stigalakh /duy bou As/, shena /sedarchiy dʿasalela/ neq'ash dolchu.
51:8: Bakq'alla a, shu tayp-taypanchu dasheḥ ma du.
51:12: Tsara khöttu /hxay Muḥammad/: "Matsa khir du beqaman de?"
51:13: Otsu diynaḥ üsh ts'arna t'eḥ pitane lötsur ma bu. /Zhözhakhateḥ züyr ma bu/.
51:14: "ʿovsha shayn pitana– /olush/. – Hxara du i sha ash sikhdesh khillarg". (Zhözhakhatin ʿazap).
51:15: Bakq'alla a, /Delakh/ qörursh boshmashkaḥ a‚ shovdanashkaḥ a /khir/ bu
51:16: Sḥaötsush shäsh Qiosh-Qobucho shayna dellarg. Bakq'alla a, üsh khilira tsul ḥalkha dikanig desh.
51:17: Üsh khilira k'ezzig ben dotsush busa shäsh nab yar.
51:19: Shayn däkhnina (ḥola) choḥ ḥaq' dolush dökhuchunna a‚ sha /ritsq'akh/ khadiyna volchunna a.
51:20: Lättaḥ a delilash ma du /ch'oġa Delakh/ teshacharna.
51:21: Shu shäshkaḥ a /delilsh du/‚ shuna tsa go?
51:22: Stigalaḥ du shun ritsq' a (doġa‚ shetsa derrig hxuma qüu), shuna khir du ällarg a. (Ash yinachu ʿamalashna düḥal beqam).
51:23: Stigal a‚ latta a Qiosh-Qobuchukh /duy bou As/: iza baq' ma du, shu khabar düytsush khilar sanna.
51:24: Ḥöga khabar deʾniy /ya Muḥammad/ Ibrahximan siylaḥchu ḥeshekh lätsna?
51:25: Oyla ye! Üsh chöḥa bevlira i volchu‚ tsara elira: "Salam!" Tso elira: "Salam", /shega elira tso/: "Tsa bevza nakh /bu-q/".
51:26: Iza (Ibrahxim) q'aylakha vakhara shen nakh bolchu‚ veara derstana esa dalosh /ḥeshashna de/.
51:27: Tso iza (esa diyna‚ tsünan qerzina ya qekhkiyna zhizhig) tsarna gergaoziyra‚ elira: "Ash tsa dou?"
51:28: Iza tsarakh qeravelira. Tsara elira: "Ma qera!" Tsara tsunna qaʾ bäkqira qetame khir volchu k'antatsa /ḥan zudcho Sarata viyr vu qetame, Dela dika vevzash khir volu k'ant Isḥaq' älla/.
51:29: Düḥalʾeara tsünan zuda, ch'oġa moḥ bettash‚ tso shen yuḥakh t'ara dettara‚ ōlura: "Ber tsa khülu q'ena zuda yay sha-m!"
51:30: Tsara elira: "Ishtta älla ḥo Qiosh-Qobucho. Bakq'alla a, Iza Shegaḥ ḥeq'alalla dolush verg a vu‚ khuush verg a vu".
51:31: Tso (Ibrahxima) elira: "Shun hxun ġullaq du‚ hxay dakhkiytinarsh?"
51:32: Tsara elira: "Tkho dakhkiytina /Lut'an q'oman/ q'inosh dechu nakhana t'e.
51:34: ḥo Qiosh-Qobush volchunna (Dalla) gergaḥ t'alamza bolcharna bilgaldina khilla dolu".
51:35: Okha arabekhira tsu choḥ khilla bolu muʾma nakh.
51:36: Tkhuna tsa kariyra tsu choḥ /Dalla/ müt'aḥ bolcharakh tsḥa ts'a ben.
51:37: Okha ditira tsu choḥ delil lazosh dolchu ʿazapakh qörush bolcharna.
51:38: Musagaḥ a /delil ditira Okha/, Okha vakhiyticha iza Firʿavnna t'e bilgalchu baq'ontsa.
51:39: Iza (Firʿavn) yukhaḥaravelira shen bʿantsa /Musan din t'e tsa lotsush/‚ elira: "Bozbuuncha vu‚ ya zhinekh vu".
51:40: Okha sḥaletsira iza a‚ tsünan eskar a‚ qössira üsh hxorda chu‚ iza (Firʿavn) shen bekhk bakqa ḥaq' dolush vu /sha elchane iyman tsa dillarna‚ sha Dela vu bakharna/.
51:41: ʿadashkaḥ a /delil du shuna/. Okha bakhiytira tsarna shayn t'äḥe khadosh bolu mokh. (Shetsa doġa dotsu, berkat dotsu mokh).
51:42: Tsa yutush sha t'e qächna yolu hxuma yakhkaella hxuma yoy ben.
51:43: Samudashkaḥ a /du delilash/. Tsärga elira: "/Dünentsa zovq ḥögush/ dākha /shäsh hxallakdaran/ khan t'eqachchalts".
51:44: Shäsh Qiosh-Qobuchun ġullaqakh dʿabirzira üsh‚ üsh sḥaletsira mokho, shäsh ḥözhush lättash.
51:45: Tsarna tsa megira ġovtta a‚ shayna ġo desh a tsa khilira üsh.
51:46: Nuḥan q'omakh a ḥalkha /khilira delil/. Üsh khilira pesiq' q'am.
51:47: Stigal Okha yuyġira nütsq'allitsa. Bakq'alla a, Tkho nitsq' qochush du.
51:48: Latta darzhiyra Okha‚ Tkho dika darzhosh dersh du.
51:49: Masso a hxumanakh Okha qöllira shishsha‚ ash oyla yiyr yatsara te.
51:50: /Elira Nuḥas/: "Dʿadovda Dele. So shuna Tsüngara bilgala qeramcha vu.
51:51: Ma khiliyta Delatsa qin dela. So shuna Tsüngara bilgala qeramcha vu".
51:52: Ishtta tsa veana tsaral ḥalkha khillachärga a tsḥā a elcha‚ tsara olush ben: "Bozbuuncha vu, ya zhinekh vu".
51:53: Tsara vovshashna tsüntsa veset dora te? Hxette a! Üsh dozanekh dälla q'am du-q.
51:54: Yukhavala tsarakh (bita üsh, hxay elcha)‚ ḥuna bekhk büllur bats.
51:55: Ḥekham be‚ ḥekhamo payda bo muʾma nakhana.
51:56: As tsa qöllina zhinash a‚ adamash a Sayna ʿibadat dan ben.
51:57: Suna tsa deza tsärgara tsḥa a ritsq'‚ Suna tsa deza tsara suna daar dalar.
51:58: Bakq'alla a, Dela vu t'ett'a ritsq' lush verg a‚ nitsq' berg‚ ch'oġa verg a.
51:59: Bakq'alla a, zulam dinacharna /ʿazapakh/ dāq'a du, shayn /ḥalkha khillachu/ naq'ostiyn deq'akh terra‚ So sikh ma voyla tsara /ʿazap dosso/.
51:60: Bāla bu tsateshnacharna shayna vaʿda yina yolchu shayn diynera.
52:2: Moġanashtsa yazdinchu zhaynikh a /duy bou As/,
52:3: sha darzhiynachu anniy t'eḥ /yazdina/ khilla dolchu.
52:4: Shena ziyarat dechu ts'iynakh a /duy bou As/.
52:5: Aybina khilla bolchu tkhevnakh (stigalakh) a /duy bou As/,
52:6: /q'ematdiynaḥ ts'arakh/ büzzina khir bolchu hxordakh a:
52:7: bakq'alla a, ḥo Qiosh-Qobuchun ʿazap dözhna ma du (doġur dolush ma du).
52:13: Otsu diynaḥ üsh qüssur bu zhözhakhatin ts'erga nütsq'ala qossartsa.
52:14: /Er du tsärga/: "Hxara yu i ts'e‚ shu sha khartsʾesh khilla yolu.
52:15: Bozbuunchalla du hxara ya shu tsa gush du?
52:16: Dāga tsu choḥ‚ sobar de ya ma de – tsḥaterra du shuna. Shuna beqam besh bu ash yesh khillachu ʿamalshtsa".
52:17: Bakq'alla a, /Delakh/ qörush bersh – /yalsamanin/ boshmashkaḥ a‚ niʿmatashkaḥ a khir bu,
52:18: zovq ḥögush shäsh Qiosh-Qobucho shayna dellachüntsa. Shäsh Qiosh-Qobucho zhözhakhatin ʿazapakh larbina üsh.
52:19: /Er du tsärga/: "Ġoza daa‚ ġoza mala shayna shäsh yesh khilla ʿamalsh baḥaneḥ".
52:20: Vovshashtsa moġarshtsa lättachu mänganashna t'e tevzhina /khir bu üsh/. Okha bālor bu tsarna ḥural ʿinash.
52:21: Shäsh iyman dillina khilla bersh‚ shayn zürret a iymantsa shayna t'äḥahxittiyna khillarsh – tsarna t'eqior du Okha tseran zürret a. Tseran ʿamalekh hxumma a eshor a yats Okha. Masso a stag a sha /dünenaḥ/ karadinchüntsa zaq'alt vu.
52:22: Okha /khan mel eli/ lattor bu tsarna stömash a‚ zhizhig a tsarna dezash khillachukh.
52:23: Tsara vovshashka qiydor bu chaġaran kad‚ shetsa /i molush/ dässa q'amelash dotsush‚ q'a a dotsush bolu.
52:24: Tsarna /ġullaq desh/ t'eḥiyzar bu k'entiy-yalkhoy‚ shäsh ʿalashdesh dolu luʾluʾ sanna bolu.
52:25: Tsarakh tsḥabersh vuqarna t'ebörzur bu, khöttush.
52:26: Tsara er du: "Bakq'alla a, tkho ma dara ḥalkha tkhan dözalkh qörush (üsh hxallaqilarna).
52:27: Dala q'inkhetam bina tkhokh. Tso k'elḥardäkhna tkho samýman ʿazapakh.
52:28: Bakq'alla a, tkho dara ḥalkha /dünenaḥ/ Tsünga doʿanash desh. Bakq'alla a, Iza vu dikanig a‚ qinkhetame verg a".
52:29: /Kerstanashna/ qeram tasarna t'eḥ dāim latta! Ḥan Delan niʿmatatsa ḥo vats bozbuuncha a‚ zhiniykh verg a.
52:30: Ya tsara olu: "Illancha vu. Ḥovsur vay – zamano dʿalüstur vu iza".
52:31: Aḥ āla /tsärga, hxay Muḥammad/: "Ḥovsa shu. So a shütsa tsḥäna ḥovsacharakh vu".
52:32: Ya tseran nabaran ġenasha ḥökhush du te i tsarna‚ ya iza dozanakh dälla q'am du te?
52:33: Ya tsara olu: "Tso qöllina iza?" Hxaʾ‚ üsh tsa tesha-q!
52:34: Tsunakh tera diytsar daḥiyla tsara, shäsh baq'lüysh belaḥ.
52:35: Ya üsh hxumma yotschu hxumanakh qöllina bu‚ ya üsh shäsh bu qullursh?
52:36: Ya tsara qöllina stigalash a‚ latta a? Hxette, ma onda teshash bats üsh.
52:37: Ya tsärgaḥ yu ḥan Delan khaznash‚ ya üsh bu urkhalla desh?
52:38: Ya tsärgaḥ lami bu‚ /üsh shetsa ʿarsha t'e bovlush/, laduġush tsu choḥ /düytsuchünga/? Sḥadaladoyla tseran laduġucho bilgala delil!
52:39: Ya Tsünan mekhkariy bu‚ shuna k'entiy bu?
52:40: Ya aḥ tsärga makh bökhu, üsh deqarsha bazbina bolush?
52:41: Ya tsärgaḥ q'ayle yu‚ tsara dʿayazdesh?
52:42: Ya mekarlo ezash bu üsh? Tsa teshash khillarsh – tsarna yina mekarlo!
52:43: Ya tseran Allahx (ts'e yolu tsḥa Dela) votsurg qin dela vu? Ts'ena vu i Dela tsara /Shetsa/ naq'ost latsarkh!
52:44: Tsarna stigalara oḥayoġush kiysakash gicha a‚ tsara er ma dara: "T'ett'a yolu markha yu".
52:45: Bita üsh‚ shegaḥ tq'es yolchu shayn denna düḥalqettalts.
52:46: Otsu diynaḥ tseran mekarlono tsḥanna a hxumanakh k'elḥarbokhur bats üsh‚ tsarna ġo khir dats!
52:47: Bakq'alla a, zulam dinacharna tsul sovnakha ʿazap khir du‚ delaḥ a, tsarakh duqakhbolcharna tsa khäa-q.
52:48: Ḥayn Delan ḥukmanna sobare khila /hxay elcha/. Ḥo Tkhan bʿärgashna ḥalkha vu (Okha larvesh vu ḥo). Aḥ, ḥan Dalla khastam besh, tasbiḥ de, ḥuo ḥalaġottush.
52:49: Busa a tasbiḥ de Tsunna‚ sedarchiy dʿatülush a /de tasbiḥ/.
53:2: neq'akh dʿa tsa tili shun naq'ost (Muḥammad-paykhamar)‚ gal a tsa veli.
53:4: iza dekq'a väḥiy du, tsünga dʿakhoüytush dolu /Dala/.
53:5: Iza (Muḥammad-paykhamar) ʿamiyna sha nitsq'atsa ch'oġa dolcho,
53:6: Sha khazachu kütseḥ dolcho. Iza (Dzhabrail-malik) niyssa dʿahxöttira.
53:8: T'akqa iza gergakhilira /Muḥammad-paykhamarna adamiyn kütseḥ/‚ qin t'ekh gergadera /elchane väḥiy daḥash/.
53:9: Iza khilira /gergaḥ/ shina ʿadan barameḥ‚ ya qin a gerga.
53:10: Ishtta väḥiy daḥiytira Tso Shen lega‚ Sha daḥiytinarg.
53:11: Kharts tsa liyra dog /paykhamarna/ tsunna ginchukh.
53:12: Tq'a ash q'uysu tsüntsa (paykhamartsa) tsunna ginachüntsa?
53:13: Tsunna (Muḥammad- paykhamarna) iza gira qin a oḥadossareḥ (qin tsq'a dussush).
53:16: /Muḥammad-paykhamarna gira i ditt sha tamashe/ hxumnasha ḥuldechu khenaḥ.
53:17: Dʿa tsa tilina /paykhamaran/ bʿärsa‚ dozanakh tsa dälla.
53:18: Tsunna gira shen Qiosh-Qobuchun dakqiychu ayatekh /ayatash/.
53:19: Ash diytsal suna Al-latakh a‚ Al-ʿuzzakh a,
53:20: qin qozlaġa Manatakh a. /Buy tseran Delan sanna nitsq'?/
53:21: Tq'a shuna bozhaberash du‚ Tsunna zudaberash du?
53:23: Üsh ekq'a ts'ersh yu, asha a‚ shun daysha a tekhkina yolu. Dala tsḥa a baq'o tsa yossiyna /tsarakh lätsna/. Üsh t'äḥahxüttush ma bu dekq'a shayn mottalush dolchunna a‚ /shayn/ degnashna dezachunna a. Tsärga ma beana shayn Qiosh-Qobuchüngara niysa neq'.
53:25: Delan yu t'äḥarnig (ekhart) a, ḥalkharnig (düne) a.
53:26: Masa malik du stigalshkaḥ, shayn shapaʿatasha hxumma a k'elḥardokhur dotsush, Dala Shena luuchunna purba delchiy ben‚ Iza rezakhilchiy ben!
53:27: Bakq'alla a, ekhartakh tsateshachara yokqu malikekh zudariyn ts'e.
53:28: Tsüntsa tsḥa a ʿilma ma dats tseran. Üsh t'äḥahxüttush ma bu dekq'a mottarna. Tq'a mottaro hxumma a khüytsur dats baq'dolchukh.
53:29: Ḥo dʿaverza /hxay elcha/ Tkhan ḥekhamakh yukhavällachukh‚ dünenan dakhar ben shena tsa dezash volchukh.
53:30: Iza du tseran ʿilmanakh qiaran darzh. Bakq'alla a, ḥo Qiosh-Qoburg (ḥan Dela) – Iza vu dika vevzash Shen neq'akh tilavellarg a, Iza vu dika vevzash sha nisvellarg a.
53:31: Delan du stigalshkaḥ mel derg a‚ lättaḥ mel derg Tso beqam barḥama von khillacharna tsara dinachüntsa‚ Tso beqam ban dika dinacharna uggar dikachüntsa.
53:32: Ishttanash bu üsh, shäsh genabovlush q'inoykh dakqiycharakh a‚ bökhuchukh a, kegiynash ben /tsa dolüytush shaygara/. Bakq'alla a, ḥo Qiosh-Qoburg Shegaḥ shortta gechdar dolush vu-q. Iza dika khuush vu shukh derg shu Sha lättakh qulluchu khenaḥ a‚ shu shayn nanoyn kiyraḥ hxu dolchu khenaḥ a. Shäsh ts'an ma de – Tsunna dika vevzash vu /Delakh/ qörush verg!
53:34: K'ezzig /saġa/ delira tso‚ t'akqa yukhaozavelira /saġa luchukh/.
53:35: Tq'a tsüngaḥ du te q'aylenan ʿilma, tsunna gan a gush?
53:36: Ya tsünga tsa diytsina te Musan ḥarchorshkaḥ (Tavrata choḥ) derg?
53:37: Ibrahximan a /ḥarchorshkaḥ derg/‚ sha qochushdina khilla volchu /shena Dala t'edikhkinarsh/
53:38: /Tsünga tsa diytsina te/: ḥur bats ḥocho qechun moḥ älla‚
53:39: dats adamna sha q'aḥegnarg ben‚ älla‚
53:40: tsünan q'aḥegar t'äḥa gur du älla‚
53:41: t'äḥa khir bu tsunna sov niysa bolu beqam älla‚
53:43: bakq'alla a, Iza vu völüyturg a‚ /Iza vu/ völkhüyturg älla,
53:44: bakq'alla a, Iza vu volüyturg a‚ /Iza vu/ denviyrig älla‚
53:45: bakq'alla a, Tso qöllina shishsha – börsha a‚ sten a älla
53:46: /tsḥana/ t'adamakh, iza qetcha /nenan kiyraḥ dolchu beran ts'a chu/‚ älla,
53:47: Tsunna t'eḥ qin tsḥa qollar (bellarsh denbar) du älla,
53:48: bakq'alla a, Iza vu älla‚ (adam) ḥole desh verg a‚ /tsünga ritsq'atsa/ qacho yoytush verg a,
53:49: bakq'alla a, Iza vu Sirius ts'e yolu seda Qoburg (tsünan Dela) älla,
53:50: bakq'alla a, Iza vu älla, Sha hxallakbinarg ḥalkhalera ʿadash a,
53:51: Samudash a‚ /tsḥa a/ bukha tsa vitira /tsarakh/‚
53:52: Nuḥan q'am a ḥalkha. Bakq'alla a, üsh khilira vunō zulame a‚ vunō dozanekh bevlla a.
53:54: Dʿaḥulyira iza (Lut'an q'oman yurt) sha dʿaḥulyecho (dakqiy t'ulgash diygira stiglara).
53:55: Ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchun mülkhachu niʿmatatsa q'üysu aḥ /hxay adam/?
53:56: Hxara (Muḥammad-paykhamar) qeramcha vu, ḥalkhalerchu qeramchekh volush.
53:58: Ma vats tsunna Dela votsurg (i tsarna tsa doytush) satson verg.
53:59: Tq'a tsu khabarkh a tsetsdovlu shu?
53:61: Ma ġopal du shu (shayga düytsurg tidame tsa ötsush, khan erna yoyush)!
53:62: Ash Dalla suzhud de‚ /Tsunna/ ʿibadat a de!
54:2: Shayna delil (muʿzhizat) gicha a, üsh (tsatesharsh) yukhabovlu /iymanakh/‚ tsara olu: "Dakhdella bozbuunchalla du".
54:3: Tsara khartsdira /paykhamar vaiytar/‚ üsh t'äḥabezira shayn dezarshna. Masso a ġullaq /dikanig a‚ vonig a/ ch'aġdella du /shen tökhna khan yolush/.
54:4: Tsärga deara may khabarsh /ḥalkhalera Delakh tsa teshash khilla bolu nakh hxallakbarkh lätsna dolu/‚ shayna choḥ /üsh q'inakh/ yukhaozar a dolush.
54:5: K'orggera ḥikmat (ḥeq'alalla) a /deara tsärga/. Payda tsa bora qeramasha (ḥekhamasha).
54:6: Genavala tsarakh /hxay Muḥammad‚ bita üsh/. Otsu /q'emat/diynaḥ qoyqucho tsa dezachu hxumane /bartkhattare derrig khalq'/ qoyqur du,
54:7: bʿärgash ḥet'abälla /duqa qerabalarna/, arabovlur bu üsh keshnashkara, därzhina ts'oz sanna,
54:8: /shayga/ qoyqush volchunna /t'eqacha/ sikhbella. /Etstsaḥ/ tsateshachara er du: "Ma khala de du-q hxara!"
54:9: Khartsdira /din/ tsaral (q'urayshal) ḥalkha Nuḥan q'omo. Tsara khartsvira Tkhan lay /Nuḥ/‚ elira: "Zhinekh vu iza"‚ tsunna qeramash a tiysira (t'ulgash dettar du, bokhush).
54:10: T'akqa tso qiyqira sha Qiosh-Qobuchünga: "Bakq'alla a, so eshiyna (tsarna düḥalo yan nitsq' tsa qochu san). Aḥ ġo deḥa suna!"
54:11: T'akqa Okha dʿayillira stigalan neʿarsh dʿaqüssush dolchu khitsa.
54:12: Lättakh sḥadekhira Okha ḥostash, khi vovshakhqiytira (stiglara oḥadoġurg a, lättakh sḥadolurg a) sha yazdella khilla dolchu omranna t'eḥ (Delan omratsa).
54:13: Okha dʿaväḥira iza (Nuḥ kemana t'eḥ) annash a‚ ḥostamash a dolchu.
54:14: Iza (kema) dʿaikhira Tkhan bʿärgashna ḥalkha sha khartsvina khillacheran beqamna.
54:15: Okha ditira iza delil khilla‚ vuy tsḥa a iza tergal desh verg?
54:16: Mukha dara San ʿazap a‚ qeramtasar a?
54:17: Okha atta dira Q'urʾan dagalatsa. Vuy tsḥa a dagalotsurg? /ʿamade i, oyla ye tsunakh!/
54:18: Khartsdira /din/ ʿadasha a. Mukha khilira San ʿazap a‚ qeramtasar a?
54:19: Okha bakhiytira tsarna shok löqu mokh dakhdellachu deq'azchu diynaḥ.
54:20: Tso sḥabokhura nakh /shäsh bolchüra/, üsh büsush /lättakh/ sḥadokhush dolu khurmanan dittiyn oramash sanna.
54:21: Mukha khilira San ʿazap a‚ qeramtasar a?
54:22: Okha atta dira Q'urʾan dagalatsa. Vuy tsḥa a dagalotsurg?
54:24: Tsara (samudasha) elira: "Tkhaykh tsḥana adamna t'äḥadezar du tkho? T'akqa-m khir ma dara tkho tilar choḥ a‚ zhinekh a (ḥeq'al chüra devvla).
54:25: /Tsara elira/:"Vayna yukq'era /dekq'a/ tsünga dossiyna väḥiy? Hxa-hxa! Iza vu-q kuravälla /sov/ khartslüysh verg".
54:26: Khuur du tsarna qana‚ mila vu kuravälla /sov/ khartslüysh verg.
54:27: Okha yokhüytur emkal, tsarna pitana khilla. Ḥo ḥazhal tsärga /hxay Saliḥ/‚ sobare a khilla.
54:28: Dʿakhaiyta tsärga‚ khi deq'na khir du tsarna yuq'aḥ: hxoranna a shen malar khir du /tsḥana khenaḥ otsu emkalna malor du, qechu khenaḥ – shayn emkalshna/.
54:29: Tsara qayqira shayn naq'oste‚ tso /shen küyga/ sḥaiytsira /urs/‚ /emkalna i/ ḥäqira /t'akqa üsh hxallakbira/.
54:30: Mukha khilira San ʿazap a‚ qeramtasar a?
54:31: Okha bakhiytira tsarna t'e tsḥa /ch'oġa/ moḥ – üsh /bella/ bisira, /shen bezhnashna/ kert yinchun yaq'aella /dechigan/ yukhkash sanna.
54:32: Okha atta dira Q'urʾan dagalatsa. Vuy tsḥa a dagalotsurg?
54:34: Okha bakhiytira tsarna t'e t'ulgash ḥosh bolu mokh‚ Lut'an dözal yuq'ara- bokqush. Üsh k'elḥarbäkhira Okha satosush
54:35: Tkhaygara q'inkhetamtsa. Ishtta beqam bo Okha shukur dechunna.
54:36: Tso (Lut'as) qeram tesira tsarna Tkhan nitsq'atsa – tsara sheko yira qeram tasarkh.
54:37: Tsüngara (Lut'era) tsünan ḥeshiy sḥabakha ḥävsira üsh– Okha bʿärsa sḥaiytsira tseran‚ /elira/: "Hxintsa ʿovsha shayna San ʿazap a‚ San qeram a".
54:39: "ʿovsha shayna San ʿazap a‚ San qeram a!" (Er du tsärga Dala).
54:40: Okha atta dira Q'urʾan dagalatsa‚ vuy tsḥa a dagalotsurg?
54:41: Firʿavnan ohxlana t'e a bäkhkira qeramchash.
54:42: Tsara khartsdira Tkhan ayatash derrige a – Okha sḥaletsira üsh Veza volchun‚ nitsq' Bolchun sḥalatsartsa.
54:43: Shun tsatesharsh dika bu tsaral /hxay q'urayshash/ ya shu ts'ena khilaran baq'o yu Zuburiy choḥ?
54:44: Ya tsara (Abu Dzhahxla i sannachara) olu: "Vay derrig /tsḥäna khilcha/, tölur du /Muḥammadal/".
54:45: Berrig /üsh/ eshor bu – bovdur bu üsh.
54:46: Hxette a‚ saḥt (q'ematde) du tsarna tökhna khan. I saḥt vunō ircha a du‚ vunō q'äḥa a du.
54:47: Bakq'alla a, q'inosh dinarsh /dünenaḥ/ ḥere a‚ /ekhartaḥ/ zhözhakhatin ts'ergaḥ bogur bolush ma bu.
54:48: Otsu diynaḥ üsh taqor ma bu shayn yakhḥash t'eḥ ts'erga. /Er du/: "ʿovsha shayna saq'arakh ḥaqadalar!"
54:49: Okha masso a hxuma qöllina shen barameḥ.
54:50: Tkhan omra-m tsḥa /dosh/ ben dats, bʿärg- neġar tokhar sanna.
54:51: Okha hxallakyira shukh tera tobanash – vuy tsḥa a dagalotsurg?
54:52: Masso a tsara dina dolu hxuma Zuburiy (malikasha dʿayazdinchu zhayniy) choḥ du.
54:53: Masso a zhimanig‚ masso a dokqanig dʿayazdella du.
54:54: Bakq'alla a, /Delakh/ qörush bersh boshmashna choḥ a‚ khishkaḥ a khir bu,
54:55: baq'derg dolchaḥ‚ Nitsq' bolchu Pachchaḥan (Delan) gergaḥ /khir bu üsh/.
55:5: Malkh a‚ butt a /Tsünan/ ḥesaptsa /dʿasalelash/ bu.
55:6: Seda a‚ ditt a /Tsunna/ suzhud desh du.
55:7: Stigal – Tso iza ayyina‚ miyza-terza dʿahxottiyna
55:9: Ozar-dustar hxottade niysontsa‚ esha ma de terza!
55:11: Tsunna (lätta) t'eḥ stömash sḥabovlu‚ kedalgash dolu khurmanan ditt a /sḥadolu/.
55:12: Cha-ġad dolu bürtigash a, khaza ḥozha yolu batstsash a /sḥayolu lättakh/.
55:13: T'akqa a shayn Qiosh-Qobuchun mülkha niʿmat khartsdo ash shimmo?
55:14: Tso qöllira adam beq'achu popparkh, qiyra pḥeġa sanna (popparan pḥeġa sanna).
55:15: Tso qöllira zhin k'ur tsa boluchu (ts'enachu) ts'erakh.
55:16: T'akqa a shayn Qiosh-Qobuchun mülkha niʿmat khartsdo ash shimmo?
55:17: Shina malkhbalen a Dela vu Iza‚ shina malkhbuzen a Dela vu.
55:18: T'akqa a shayn Qiosh-Qobuchun mülkha niʿmat khartsdo ash shimmo?
55:19: Tso parġatbitira Shi hxord /düra berg a‚ teza berg a/ vovshashtsa tsḥänaqeta.
55:20: Tsarna shinna yukq'eḥ düḥalo yu, üsh vovshashna t'e tsa qiyda.
55:21: T'akqa a shayn Qiosh-Qobuchun mülkha niʿmat khartsdo ash shimmo?
55:22: Sḥadolu tsu shina /hxordakh/ luʾluʾ a‚ marzhan a.
55:23: T'akqa a shayn Qiosh-Qobuchun mülkha niʿmat khartsdo ash shimmo?
55:24: Tsünan du hxordachukhula dʿasalela kemanash, leqachu lämnekh tera.
55:25: T'akqa a shayn Qiosh-Qobuchun mülkha niʿmat khartsdo ash shimmo?
55:26: Masso a tsu /lätta/ t'eḥ verg hxallakkhir vu.
55:27: Yusur yu Shegaḥ siylaḥalla a‚ kömärshalla a dolchu ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchun yuḥ.
55:28: T'akqa a shayn Qiosh-Qobuchun mülkha niʿmat khartsdo ash shimmo?
55:29: Tsünga dökhu stigalshkaḥ a‚ lättaḥ a bolchara. Hxor diynaḥ Iza ġullaqeḥ vu.
55:30: T'akqa a shayn Qiosh-Qobuchun mülkha niʿmat khartsdo ash shimmo?
55:31: T'äḥa muq'ader du Tkho shuna, hxay shiy a deza lersh.
55:32: T'akqa a shayn Qiosh-Qobuchun mülkha niʿmat khartsdo ash shimmo?
55:33: Hxay zhiniyn a‚ adamiyn a gulam! Shayna magaḥ, stigaliyn a‚ lättan a dozanashna deḥadovla‚ dovlal! Shu dovlalur-m dats tsḥana baq'ontsa a ben.
