55:34: T'akqa a shayn Qiosh-Qobuchun mülkha niʿmat khartsdo ash shimmo?
55:35: Shuna shinna t'e yoüytur yu /k'ur botschu/ ts'eran alu a, k'ur a. Ġo diyr dats shuna shinna.
55:36: T'akqa a shayn Qiosh-Qobuchun mülkha niʿmat khartsdo ash shimmo?
55:37: Stigal yedicha /q'ematdiynaḥ/‚ iza yusur yu ts'iella, basar sanna.
55:38: T'akqa a shayn Qiosh-Qobuchun mülkha niʿmat khartsdo ash shimmo?
55:39: Otsu diynaḥ shen q'inakh khottur ma dats adame a‚ zhine a.
55:40: T'akqa a shayn Qiosh-Qobuchun mülkha niʿmat khartsdo ash shimmo?
55:41: Q'inosh dinarsh bevzar bu shayn bilgalonashtsa a‚ sḥalötsur bu k'uzhalshtsa a‚ kogashtsa a.
55:42: T'akqa a shayn Qiosh-Qobuchun mülkha niʿmat khartsdo ash shimmo?
55:43: Hxara yu i zhözhakhati, q'inosh letiynachara sha khartsʾesh khilla yolu.
55:44: Tsara gonash bokhur bu tsunna a, ts'iydinchu khinna a yukq'ekhula.
55:45: T'akqa a shayn Qiosh-Qobuchun mülkha niʿmat khartsdo ash shimmo?
55:46: Shen Qiosh-Qobuchunna ḥalkha hxottarkh qiyrinchunna /yalsamanin/ shi besh khir yu.
55:47: T'akqa a shayn Qiosh-Qobuchun mülkha niʿmat khartsdo ash shimmo?
55:48: Gännash dolush /yu i shi yalsamanin besh/.
55:49: T'akqa a shayn Qiosh-Qobuchun mülkha niʿmat khartsdo ash shimmo?
55:50: Tsu choḥ ökhush shi shovda khir du.
55:51: T'akqa a shayn Qiosh-Qobuchun mülkha niʿmat khartsdo ash shimmo?
55:52: Tsu shina /yalsamani/ choḥ hxor stömakh shi taypa bu.
55:53: T'akqa a shayn Qiosh-Qobuchun mülkha niʿmat khartsdo ash shimmo?
55:54: Üsh (dika ʿamalsh yinarsh) khir bu mängana t'e tevzhina‚ /tsu mänganiyn/ chö ezadarekh yina yolush. Tsu yalsamani choḥ /stömash/ bakha gergaḥ khir bu.
55:55: T'akqa a shayn Qiosh-Qobuchun mülkha niʿmat khartsdo ash shimmo?
55:56: Tsu /yalsamani/ choḥ bʿärg özda mekhkariy khir bu‚ shaykh tsaral ḥalkha tsḥa a adam a‚ zhin a ḥaqadella botsu.
55:57: T'akqa a shayn Qiosh-Qobuchun mülkha niʿmat khartsdo ash shimmo?
55:58: Shäsh yaq'ut a‚ marzhan sanna khir bu üsh.
55:59: T'akqa a shayn Qiosh-Qobuchun mülkha niʿmat khartsdo ash shimmo?
55:60: Tq'a dikanan beqam dika a ben duy?
55:61: T'akqa a shayn Qiosh-Qobuchun mülkha niʿmat khartsdo ash shimmo?
55:62: I shiʾ yotsurg qin shi besh khir yu.
55:63: T'akqa a shayn Qiosh-Qobuchun mülkha niʿmat khartsdo ash shimmo?
55:64: Täʿna bätstsara bosaḥ /khir yu i shi besh/.
55:65: T'akqa a shayn Qiosh-Qobuchun mülkha niʿmat khartsdo ash shimmo?
55:66: Tsarna choḥ khi qüssush shi shovda khir du.
55:67: T'akqa a shayn Qiosh-Qobuchun mülkha niʿmat khartsdo ash shimmo?
55:68: Tsarna choḥ stömash khir bu‚ khurma a‚ nar a khir yu.
55:69: T'akqa a shayn Qiosh-Qobuchun mülkha niʿmat khartsdo ash shimmo?
55:70: Tsarna choḥ dika‚ khaza mekhkariy khir bu.
55:71: T'akqa a shayn Qiosh-Qobuchun mülkha niʿmat khartsdo ash shimmo?
55:72: ʿärzha bʿärgash bolush‚ ḥazhar lotsu dolu mekhkariy khir bu chetarshkaḥ.
55:73: T'akqa shayn Qiosh-Qobuchun mülkha niʿmat khartsdo ash shimmo?
55:74: Shaykh tsaral ḥalkha tsḥa a adam a‚ zhin a ḥaqadella botsu.
55:75: T'akqa a shayn Qiosh-Qobuchun mülkha niʿmat khartsdo ash shimmo?
55:76: Shäsh t'etevzhina bolush bätstsarchu ġaybaniy‚ khazallekh büzzinchu kuzashniy a.
55:77: T'akqa a shayn Qiosh-Qobuchun mülkha niʿmat khartsdo ash shimmo?
55:78: Berkate khilla Shegaḥ siylaḥalla a‚ komärshalla a dolchu ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchun ts'e.
56:2: I khilar khartsdesh tsḥa a /sa/ ma khir dats.
56:3: /Duqakhbersh/ tso oḥataʿor bu‚ /duqakhbersh/ ḥalabokhur ma bu.
56:7: Shu a khilcha qaa deq'e deq'adella:
56:8: ättu küygan day – mülsh bu i ättu küygan day?
56:9: ärru küygan day – mülsh bu i ärru küygan day?
56:10: /iymantsa dünenaḥ/ ḥalkhabevlla khillarsh – khir bu /yal shayna yalartsa q'ematdiynaḥ/ ḥalkhabevlla bersh.
56:15: /Deshikh‚ zhovhxarekh/ tegnachu mänganash t'eḥ khir bu (üsh).
56:17: Tsarna /ġullaq desh/ t'eḥiyzar bu guttar q'ona kegiyrkhoy
56:19: kortosh lozur dats tseran tsunakh‚ bekhar a bats üsh.
56:20: Stömash khir bu tsarna shäsh khärzhinchukh‚
56:21: ḥozanan zhizhig khir du tsarna shayna duqadezachukh‚
56:22: ʿärzha‚ bakqiy (khaza) bʿärgash bolu mekhkariy a khir bu‚
56:24: tsara desh khillachun /khazachu/ beqaman düḥa du iza.
56:25: Tsarna khezar dats tsu choḥ (yalsamaneḥ) dässa khabarsh a‚ q'inosh dina bokhush, bekhkash a –
56:27: Ättu küygan day – mülsh bu i ättu küygan day?
56:28: K'okhtsalsh dotschu lotos dittiyn yukq'eḥ khir bu /üsh/‚
56:29: t'etta stömekh düznachu t'alḥ dittashna yukq'eḥ /khir bu/‚
56:31: guttar ökhuchu khinna yukq'eḥ khir bu‚
56:32: dukqa a stömashna yukq'eḥ khir bu‚
56:33: Shäsh tsarakh khador botschu‚ dukhatukhur botschu‚
56:35: Bakq'alla a, Okha qiiyna üsh qiortsa‚
56:41: Ärru kuʾygan day – mülsh bu i ärru küygan day?
56:42: Üsh khir bu ts'e ettachu makheḥ‚ ts'iydinchu khi choḥ‚
56:44: sha shiyla dotschu‚ sha /deġana/ tam besh dotschu.
56:45: Bakq'alla a, üsh ma bara otsul ḥalkha /dünenaḥ/ zovq ḥögush.
56:46: Üsh bara, q'ar tsa lush, dokqa q'a desh.
56:47: Üsh bara olush: “Tkho delcha‚ tkhokh poppar a‚ däʿakhkash a khilcha, tkho yukha dendiyr du?
56:49: Aḥ āla /tsärga, hxay elcha/: “Bakq'alla a, ḥalkhaleranash a‚ t'äḥarnash a
56:50: gulbiyr ma bu bilgalchu /q'emat/ diynan tökhnachu khanna.
56:51: T'akqa, bakq'alla a, ash‚ hxay tiladellarsh‚/baq'derg/ khartsdiynarsh‚
56:54: tsunna t'e /ash/ mer ma du ts'iydinchu khikh.
56:55: /Ash/ mer ma du ḥagʾellachu emkalan malar.”
56:56: Iza (daar) du tsarna kechdiynarg beqaman diynaḥ.
56:57: Okha qöllina shu‚ ash hxunda baq' tsa do /yukhadendar q'ematdiynaḥ/?
56:58: Shuna tsa gina, shäsh hxu tosush?
56:59: Ash qullush du iza /adam/ ya Tkho du qullursh?
56:60: Okha bilgaldäkqira shuna yukq'eḥ valar‚ Tkho t'äḥadüsur dats
56:61: shu khiytsa shukh teracharakh‚ shu qio shuna tsa khuuchu kepara.
56:62: Shuna devzira-may dükhḥarlera qollar‚ ash oyla hxunda tsa yo?
56:64: Shu du i /lättakh/ qüüytush, ya Tkho du i qüüytursh?
56:65: Tkhuna liʾneḥara‚ Okha eq'a yar khülüytur yara tsunakh‚ shu tsetsdevlla düsur ma dara‚ /olush/:
56:66: "Bakq'alla a, tkho deqarna k'el ma disi.
56:67: Hxaʾ‚ tkho hxumma a dotsush ma disi".
56:68: Shuna giniy shäsh molush dolu khi?
56:69: Ash daiytina iza markhina yukq'era, ya Tkho du i doüytursh?
56:70: Tkhuna laaḥara, Okha i düra khiliytina khir dara /shüga mala tsa lush/‚ barkalla hxunda tsa olu ash?
56:71: Shuna giniy ts'e‚ shäsh lataesh yolu?
56:72: Ash qiiyna tsünan ditt, ya Tkho du i qiosh dersh?
56:73: Okha khiliytina iza /zhözhakhatin ts'e/ dagayoüyturg a‚ yassachu araḥ bolcharna payda ötsu hxuma a khilla (tsarna nakh ʿash bolu mettig yovzüytush).
56:74: Ḥayn siylaḥ-vokqa volchu Qiosh-Qobuchun ts'e khastae (I masso a vochu hxumanekh ts'anvesh)!
56:75: T'akqa As duy bou sedarchiy dʿaduzuchu mettigakh.
56:76: Bakq'alla a, i duy‚ shuna khaaḥara‚ beza-bokqa ma bu!
56:77: Bakq'alla a, iza siylaḥ Q'urʾan ma du
56:79: Tsunakh ḥaqa tsa lo ts'ena bersh ben.
56:81: I khabar a tsa lorush du shu?
56:82: Shayna ritsq' dalarna /Dalla shukur dar/ shäsh /tsünan/ niʿmat (din) khartsdar khülüytu ash?
56:84: tsu khenaḥ shu ḥözhush dolush, /shuna i yukhachuderzo megar ma datsara/,
56:85: Tkho vunō gergaḥ du tsunna shul‚ delaḥ a shuna tsa go.
56:86: Shu tsa khilleḥara /q'ematdiynaḥ/ shaygara beqam ötsush‚
56:87: ash dukhaderzor dara i /sa/, shäsh baq' lüysh khilleḥ?
56:89: /t'akqa tsunna/ du sadaʿar‚ dog parġatdalar a‚ niʿmatiyn boshmash a.
56:90: Amma iza khilleḥ ättu küygan dekh –
56:91: t'akqa salam du ḥuna ättu küygan dayshkara.
56:93: Tsunna khir du ḥoshalġa t'elatsar ts'iydellachu khikh‚
56:96: Aḥ khastae ḥayn siylaḥ-vokqachu Qiosh-Qobuchun ts'e (I masso a vochu hxumanekh ts'anvesh)!
57:1: Dalla tasbiḥ dina stigalshkaḥ a‚ lättaḥ a mel dolcho. Iza veza verg a vu‚ ḥukma /niysa/ desh verg a vu.
57:2: Tsünan du stigaliyn a‚ lättan a pachchaḥalla. Tso dendo‚ Tso dolüytu. Iza masso a hxumanna t'eḥ nitsq' qochush vu.
57:3: Iza vu ḥalkharnig a‚ t'äḥarnig a‚ guchoḥ verg a‚ q'aylaḥverg a. Iza vu masso a hxuma khuush verg a.
57:4: Iza vu Sha qöllinarg stigalsh a‚ latta a yalkh diynaḥ (Shen ḥikmatatsa, Shena üsh qolla tarlush khilarkh tsḥana dashtsa). T'akqa Iza dʿanisvelira ʿarsha t'eḥ. Tsunna khäa latta chu dȳlurg a‚ tsu chüra aradolurg a‚ stigalara oḥadoġurg a‚ tsu chu ayalurg a. Iza shütsa vu (Shen khaarshtsa, nitsq'atsa a), shu michchaḥa khilcha a. I Dela ash diyrig gush vu.
57:5: Tsünan du stigaliyn a‚ lättan a pachchaḥalla. Dele dʿaderzo ġullaqash.
57:6: Büysa denna chuyolüytu Tso‚ de büysanna chudolüytu. Iza vu khuush verg degnashkaḥ derg.
57:7: Shu tesha Delakh a‚ Tsünan elchanakh a‚ kharzhash ye /Delan novq'aḥ – saġa lush…/ Okha lelo shayga ellachukh. Shukh iyman dillinarsh a, /Delan novq'aḥ/ kharzhash yinarsh a – tsarna yokqa yal yu.
57:8: Shun hxun du tsa tesha Delakh? – Elcha ma vuy shüga qoyqush shayn Qiosh-Qobuchünga teshare‚ Tso ("Sha vuy shun Dela", – olush, ash: "Vu Dellara", – olush) shügara ch'aġo ma etsna, shu muʾma nakh delaḥ.
57:9: Iza vu dossosh verg Shen lega bilgala ayatash, shu aradakharḥama bodanashkara nüre. Bakq'alla a, i Dela shuna q'int'eravolurg a‚ q'inkhetame verg a ma vu.
57:10: Shun hxun du Delan novq'aḥ kharzh tsa yan? Delan ma du stigaliyn a‚ lättan a irs! Tsḥaterra vats shukh /Delan novq'aḥ/ kharzh yinarg tolam bakqale‚ t'om binarg /tsul t'äḥa kharzhash yinarg a‚ t'om binarg a/. Tsarna vunō siylaḥ-yokqa yal yu t'äḥa kharzh yinacharnachul‚ t'äḥa t'om binacharnachul. /Tsarna/ massarna a khaznig vaʿda yina Dala. Dela ash diyrig dika khuush vu.
57:11: Mila vu Dele yukhalurg khaza deqar lush verg? – Tso t'ett'a alsam dokqur du Iza tsunna‚ tsunna khir yu siylaḥ yolu yal a.
57:12: Otsu /q'emat/diynaḥ ḥuna gur bu /hxay Muḥammad/ i muʾma bozhariy, i muʾma zudariy, shayn nur shayna ḥalkhakhula‚ ättu küygan aġorḥara üydash‚ /tsärga olush malikasha/: "Qaʾ bu shuna takhana – boshmash shayna bukhakhula khish ökhush dolu. Tsu choḥ /shu/ guttar lättar du. Iza bu siylaḥ-bokqa tolam!"
57:13: Otsu diynaḥ munepiq' bozharsha a‚ munepiq' zudarsha a er du teshash khillachärga: "Ḥovsiysha tkhöga! Shun nürakh nur ötsur dara Okha". Er du: "Yukhaderza‚ lakha shayna nur!" Tsarna (muʾma nakhana a, munepiq' nakhana a) yukq'eḥ kert hxottor yu, shen neʿ yolush‚ tsunna chöḥakhula (muʾma nakh bolu aġo) q'inkhetam bolush‚ tsunna araḥakhula (munepiq' nakh bolu aġo) ʿazap dolush.
57:14: Tsärga qoyqura tsara (araḥ bolchara – munepiq'asha): "Tkho shütsa datsara tq'a?" Tsara er du: "Hxaʾ‚ delaḥ a shayn doġmash pitane letsira ash‚ /tkhuna von khilare/ ladüyġira ash‚ /Delan vaʿda/ shekone letsira ash‚ laamasha ʿekhiyra shu Delan omra (ʿozhalla) dallalts‚ Delatsa ʿekhiyra shu ʿekhocho (shayt'ano).
57:15: Takhana ötsur bats shügara makh‚ tsa teshash khillachärgara a /ötsur bats/. Shun chuġoyla zhözhakhati khir yu. Iza yu shun t'etovzhiyla. Ma von dʿaderzar du-q iza!"
57:16: Khan tsa qächna te iyman dillincharna shayn degnash müt'aḥ khila Dela ḥekhorna a‚ baq'dolchukh dössinchunna a‚ üsh tsa khila a ḥalkha shayga zhayna dossiynacharakh tera? Tseran-m (zhaynin ohxlanan) zama yakhʾelira – degnash /q'izallitsa/ ch'aġdelira tseran. Tsarakh duqakhbersh pesiq' ma bu.
57:17: Shuna khaalash‚ Dala latta dendo i dellachul t'äḥa. Okha bilgaldäkhna shuna ayatash‚ shu khir dats te ḥeq'ale.
57:18: Bakq'alla a, saġa lush bersh‚ bozhariy a‚ zudariy a‚ Dalla yukhalurg khaza deqar a dellarsh – Tso t'ett'a alsam dokqur du tsarna /mela balartsa/. Tsarna khir yu siylaḥ yal a.
57:19: Delakh a‚ Tsünan elchanekh a teshnarsh – üsh bu baq'bersh a‚ shayn Dalla gergaḥ shahxidash a. Tsarna shayn yal a yu‚ nur a du. Tq'a tsateshnarsh a‚ Tkhan ayatash khartsdinarsh a – üsh bu zhözhakhatin day.
57:20: Shuna khaalash: dünenan dakhar – lovzar a‚ erna khan yayar a du‚ khazakhetash shayga ḥezhar du‚ vovshashna yukq'eḥ kurallash yar a du‚ ḥoleḥ a‚ dözaleḥ a vovshashna yukq'eḥ sovbiylar a du. Doġanakh tera du /iza/: i deacha /lättakh/ sḥayoluchu hxumanasha tsetsbokhu kerstanash. T'akqa üsh yaq'alo‚ ḥuna go üsh mazhʾella‚ t'akqa khülu üsh kagʾella. Ekhartaḥ nütsq'ala ʿazap du /kerstanashna/‚ Delera gechdar a‚ rezakhilar a du /muʾma nakhana/. Ma dats i dünenan dakhar /tsḥa / ʿekhavalaran hxuma ben.
57:21: Sikhlo shayn Qiosh-Qobuchüngara gechdare a‚ yalsamane‚ shen shoralla stigalan a‚ lättan shorallakh tera yolchu‚ sha kechyina yolchu Delakh a‚ Tsünan elchanekh a teshash khillacharna. I Delan dozalla du-q‚ Tso lo i Shena luuchunna. I Dela Shegaḥ sov dokqa dozalla dolush vu-q.
57:22: Tsḥa a bokham khir ma bats lättaḥ a‚ shügaḥ shaygaḥ a /tsamgar khilartsa/, iza Okha khiliytale ḥalkha /Lavḥ maḥfuz/ zhayni choḥ yazbella bolush ben. Bakq'alla a, iza Dalla atta du –
57:23: /Iza du/ shu ġayġane tsa khiliytarḥama shukh dʿatilinchukh‚ shu dakqiy tsa dedaytarḥama Tso shuna dellachüntsa. Dalla tsa veza-q masso a kura verg a‚ sha /nakha/ khestavan luush verg a‚–
57:24: sha bʿärmetsig volush‚ nakhana a bʿärmetsig khila, bokhush, omra desh volu. Milla a dʿaverzaḥ /Delan neq'akh/, – bakq'alla a, i Dela Sha ḥal dolush a vu‚ khastame a vu.
57:25: Okha bakhiytira Tkhayn elchanash bilgalonashtsa‚ dossiyra tsärtsa zhayna a‚ terza a nakh lattarḥama niysonna t'eḥ. Okha dossiyra echig‚ shena choḥ ch'oġa nitsq' bolush‚ nakhana paydanash bolush‚ Dalla khaarḥama‚ mila vu Shena a‚ Shen elchanashna a ġo lotsush verg, /i Dela/ shena gush votstsusheḥ. Bakq'alla a, i Dela nütsq'ala verg a vu‚ veza verg a vu.
57:26: Okha vakhiytira Nuḥ a‚ Ibrahxim a‚ Okha khiliytira tseran zürreteḥ paykhamaralla a‚ zhayna a. Tsarakh nisvellarg a vu‚ tsarakh duqabersh pesiq' bu-q.
57:27: T'akqa tseran lorakh Okha bakhiytira Tkhayn elchanash. /Tseran lorakh/ Okha vakhiytira Maryaman k'ant ʿiysa‚ tsünga delira Okha Inzhil‚ tsunna t'äḥahxittincheran degnashkaḥ khiliytira Okha degak'edalla a‚ q'inkhetam a. Dünenan marzonakh dʿakhadar– iza tsara shäsh qöllina du‚ Okha i lelor tsarna t'e tsa dillina‚ Dela rezakhilar lakhar a ben. Iza a tergal tsa dina tsara tergal dan ma-dezza. Tsarakh iyman dillincharna shayn yal eli Okha. Tsarakh duqakhbersh pesiq' bu-q.
57:28: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Delakh qeralash‚ Tsünan elchanakh teshalash – Tso Shen q'inkhetamakh shi daq'a lur du shuna‚ Tso khülüytur du shuna nur‚ tsüntsa shu lelash‚ Tso shuna gechdiyr du. I Dela gechdiyrig a vu‚ q'inkhetame verg a vu.
57:29: /I khoüytu As shuna / zhaynin ohxlana khaarḥama Delan q'inkhetamakh tsḥanna a hxumanna t'eḥ shayna nitsq' qochur botsiyla‚ q'inkhetam Delan karaḥ buyla: Tso lo iza Shena luuchunna. I Dela Shegaḥ beza-bokqa q'inkhetam bolush vu-q.
58:1: Khezna-q Dalla shen mayrachukh lätsna ḥöga yukh-yukha a düytsush yolchun dosh‚ tso Dele dalkhado shen ġullaq‚ i Dela khezash ma vu shu shinnan q'amel. Bakq'alla a, i Dela khezash verg a ma vu‚ gush verg a ma vu.
58:2: Shukh shayn zudarshka "shu tkhuna tkhan nanoyn buq'akh tera du" bokhursh – üsh tseran nanoy tsa khülu /tsara iza bakharkh/. Tseran nanoy üsh binarsh ben bats. Bakq'alla a, tsara düytsurg tsa deza dosh ma du‚ khartsderg ma du. Bakq'alla a, Dela /üsh dokhkobevlla, i q'a ditcha/ bekhk tsabüllurg a vu‚ gechdiyrig a vu.
58:3: I shayn zudarshka "shu tkhuna tkhan nanoyn buq'akh tera du" olursh‚ t'akqa shäsh ällachunna t'e yukhabörzush bersh– tsḥa lay azatvakqa veza tsara shäsh /mayrachun a, zudchun a yuq'amettigtsa/ gergadakhale. Tsüntsa ḥekham besh bu shuna. Dela ash diyrig sov dika khuush vu.
58:4: I tsakariynacho markha qobur du shina battaḥ t'ett'a, shäshshiʾ /mayrachun a, zudchun a yuq'amettigtsa/ gergadakhale. I tsa magaḥ - quztq'a miskachunna daa hxuma lur du. Iza du shu Delakh a‚ Tsünan elchanakh a teshiytarḥama. Üsh Delan dozanash du /t'ekh ma dovla tsarna/. /Delakh/ tsateshacharna lazosh dolu ʿazap du.
58:5: Bakq'alla a, Dalla a‚ Tsünan elchanna a /mostaġallitsa/ düḥalbovlush bersh siysazbiyr bolush bu‚ tsaral ḥalkha khillarsh siysazbarkh terra. Okha dossiyna bilgala dolu ayatash. Tsateshacharna /üsh/ siysazbesh dolu ʿazap khir ma du.
58:6: Otsu diynaḥ Dala ġovtor bu üsh berrige /keshnash chüra/‚ Tso düytsur du tsärga tsara dina khillarg /dünenaḥ/. Dala tidam bina tsunakh‚ tsara ditsdina. I Dela masso a hxumanna t'eḥ tesh vu-q.
58:7: Ḥuna tsa gina: i Dela khuush ma vu stigalashkaḥ a‚ lättaḥ a mel derg. Qaannan q'aylaḥ khabar khir ma dats, vöalġanig Iza volush ben‚ pkheannan a – yolkhalġanig Iza volush ben. Tsul /k'ezzig/ derg a‚ tsul duqa derg a khir ma dats, Iza tsärtsa volush ben, üsh michchaḥa khilcha a. T'akqa Tso tsärga düytsur du tsara dina khillarg q'ematdiynaḥ. Bakq'alla a, Dela masso a hxuma khuush verg ma vu.
58:8: Ḥuna tsa gira i q'aylakha khabar diytsar shayna tsa magiyna khillarsh? T'akqa yukha a t'ebörzush shayna tsa magiyna khillachunna‚ vovshashka q'aylakha khabarsh düytsush, q'a dartsiy‚ mostaġallitsiy‚ elchanna ʿesalla yartsiy. Ḥo volchu shäsh bäkhkicha, ḥöga salam lo tsara Dala ḥöga salam tsa luchu kepara. Shayga olu tsara: "Hxunda ʿazap tsa do vayna Dala vay bokhuchüntsa?" Qacho yu tsarna zhözhakhati – bōgur bu üsh tsu choḥ. Ma vōn dʿavörzu mettig yu-q iza!
58:9: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Shäsh q'aylakha khabar diytsaḥ‚ ma diytsa iza q'inatsiy‚ mostaġallitsiy‚ elchanna ʿesalla yartsiy. Ash diytsa q'aylakha khabar dikantsiy‚ /Delakh/ qerartsiy. Shu qeralash Delakh‚ shu Shena t'e dʿaguldiyr dolchu.
58:10: Bakq'alla a, q'aylakha khabar diytsar shayt'anera du, iyman dillinarsh poshme khiliytarḥama. Tsarna tsürrig zen diyr dats tso, Delan purbantsiy ben. Dalla t'e tevzhiyla muʾma nakh!
58:11: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Shayga älcha: "Mettig khiliyta /dʿasakhiliy/ mazhliseḥ‚ mettig khiliyta. Dala shorto yiyr yu shuna. "Ḥalaġovta!" älcha, ḥalaġovta. Dala laqabokhu shukh iyman dillinarsh a‚ shayna ʿilma dellarsh a darzhatsa. I Dela ash diyrig sov dika khuush ma vu.
58:12: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Ash q'aylakha khabar diytsineḥ elchanna ḥalkha, tsu shayn q'aylakha khabarna ḥalkhadakqalash saġa. Iza shuna dika a du‚ vunō ts'ena a du. I /saġa/ shuna tsa karadaḥ – t'akqa, bakq'alla a, i Dela t'ekh gechdesh verg a vu, q'inkhetame verg a vu.
58:13: Shu qiyrira shayn q'aylakha khabaral ḥalkha saġa dakqa? /Shügaḥ i dotsu dela/. T'akqa ash iza tsa dicha‚ Dala shuna gech a dicha (shuna t'era i saġa dalar dʿadäkqina), – t'akqa ash lamaz hxottade‚ zakat a lo‚ Dalla a‚ Tsünan elchanna a müt'aḥ khila. (Tsüntsa qacho khir yu paykhamarna ḥalkha q'aylakha khabar diytsale ḥalkha saġa dakqarkh). I Dela dika khuush verg vu ash diyrig.
58:14: Ḥuna giniy i Dela shayna öġazvakhanchu q'omatsa dottaġalla lelosh bersh? Üsh shukh bats‚ tsarakh a bats. Khartsdolchunna t'eḥ duy boush bu üsh, shayna khuʾusheḥ.
58:15: Dala kechdina tsarna ch'oġa ʿazap. Bakq'alla a, ma vōn khili-q tsara desh khillarg.
58:16: Tsara letsira shayn duynash /nekhan devnakh a‚ bekhkakh a‚ shayn q'inoykh/ düḥalo yina‚ ishtta tsara dʿatilira /nakh/ Delan neq'akh. Tsarna /üsh/ siysazbesh dolu ʿazap khir du-q.
58:17: Hxumma a ḥalkhadokqur dats Delera tseran ḥolo a, tseran dözalo a. Üsh /zhözhakhatin/ ts'eran day bu-q. Üsh tsu choḥ guttar khir bu.
58:18: Tsḥana diynaḥ Dala ḥalaġovtor bu üsh berrig‚ t'akqa tsara Tsunna duynash bour bu, shuna shäsh duynash baarkh terra. Tsarna möttur du, shäsh tsḥana bukhana t'eḥ du. Tq'a, bakq'alla a, üsh bats khartslüysh bersh?!
58:19: Shayt'ano doladina tsarna t'eḥ‚ tso ditsdayti tsärga Dela ḥekhavar. Üsh shayt'anan tōba yu. Tq'a shayt'anan tōba yats ġorasaznig (eshnarg)?
58:20: Bakq'alla a, Dalla a‚ Tsünan elchanna a /mostaġallitsa/ düḥalbüylursh – üsh bu-q uggar siysazkhillacharna yukq'eḥ.
58:21: Dʿayazdina Dala /azalleḥ/: "Tölur vu So a‚ San elchanash a". Bakq'alla a, Dela nütsq'ala verg a vu‚ veza verg a vu.
58:22: Ḥuna karor bats Delakh a‚ t'äḥarchu diynakh a teshash bolu nakh shayna duqabezash Dalla a‚ Tsünan elchanna a düḥalbüylush bersh‚ üsh tseran day khilleḥ a‚ ya k'entiy khilleḥ‚ ya vezhariy khilleḥ‚ ya tseran gergara khilleḥ. Üsh bu Tso shayn degnashkaḥ iyman yazdinarsh‚ Tso ch'aġbinarsh Shegarchu sintsa (niysona t'eḥ Shegara ġöntsa). Tso bukhkur bu üsh boshmashka‚ shayn bukhakhula khish lelash dolchu‚ üsh tsu choḥ guttar büsush. Dela rezakhili tsarna‚ üsh a rezakhili Tsunna. Üsh bu Delan tōba. Tq'a, bakq'alla a, Delan tōba – i yats yakqiyedar erg?! / Yu, Dellara!/
59:1: Tasbiḥ dina Dalla stigalshkaḥ mel dolcho a‚ lättaḥ mel dolcho a. Iza veza verg a vu‚ ḥukma /niysa/ desh verg a vu.
59:2: Iza vu Sha arabäkhnarg zhaynin ohxlakh tsateshnarsh ḥalkharchu dʿalakhkareḥ. Shuna tsa möttura üsh arabevr bu. Tsarna möttura shayn /t'eman/ ġepasha lardiyr du shäsh Delakh. Dela t'eqiira tsarna shayna daga a tsa doġuchukhula. Tseran degnashka qeram tesira Tso, - dokhadesh shayn ts'enosh shayn küygashtsa a‚ muʾma nekhan küygashtsa a. Ḥekham khiliyta shayna tsunakh‚ hxay bʿärsadersh!
59:3: Dala tsarna tsa yazdineḥara makhkara arabakhar, ʿazap dina khir dara tsarna dünenaḥ. Tsarna ekhartaḥ a ts'eran ʿazap khir du.
59:4: Iza du tsara düḥalo yarna Dalla a‚ Delan elchanna a. Milla velaḥ a Dalla düḥalo yesh verg - bakq'alla a, Dela ch'oġa vu-q taʿzar dareḥ.
59:5: Ash khadiyna dolu khurmanan ditt‚ ya ditina derg shen oramash t'eḥ- Delan purbantsa du‚ pesiq' nakh siysazbarna a.
59:6: Dala Shen elchanna /ash t'om tsa besh / ella tsärgara hxons- shuna tsa qiytira tsunna t'äḥa lakhka govrash a‚ emkalsh a‚ amma Dala lo urkhalla Shen elchanashka Shena luuchunna t'eḥ. Dela masso a hxumanna t'eḥ nitsq' qochush vu.
59:7: Dala Shen elchanna yartiyn nakhera sḥayakqina ella hxons yu Dalla‚ Tsünan elchanna‚ /paykhamaran/ gergarcharna‚ boberashna‚ miskacharna‚ neq'akhochunna shukh ḥal dolchu nekhan dolaḥ tsa khiliytarḥama. Elchano deʾnarg sḥaetsa‚ tso tsa magiynarg dita: Delakh qeralash. Bakq'alla a, i Dela ch'oġa vu-q taʿzar dareḥ.
59:8: Muhxazhiriyn miska nakhana a /yu i hxons/‚ shayn ts'enoykh a‚ bakhamakh a arabäkhna khilla bolchu‚ tsara Delera q'inkhetam a, rezakhilar a lakharna‚ Dalla a‚ Tsünan elchanna a ġo darna. Üsh bu baq'bersh.
59:9: Tsaral ḥalkha /Madinat/ ġalaḥ bakha khevzhina khillarsh‚ iymana choḥ ch'aġbellarsh - bezash bu shayna t'e bäkhkinarsh‚ tsarna tsa karayo shayn degnashkaḥ /muhxazhirshna ella hxons baḥaneḥ/ ḥaġ‚ shayl a üsh sovbokhu tsara, shaygaḥ peq'aralla khilleḥ a. Shäsh bʿärmetsigallakh larbinarsh (saġanash lush) - üsh bu-q bakqiybiyr bersh.
59:10: Tsaral t'äḥa bäkhkinarsh a, olush: "Veza Dela‚ gechdelaḥ tkhuna a‚ iymantsa tkhol ḥalkhabevllachu tkhan vezharshna a‚ ma khiliytalaḥ tkhan degnashkaḥ iyman dillinchärga tsabezam. Veza Dela‚ bakq'alla a, Ḥo vu-q /tkhuna/ q'int'eravolurg a, q'inkhetame verg a" /ḥaq' bu shayna hxonsakh daq'a qacha/.
59:11: Ḥuna giriy i munepiq' nakh, shäsh olush zhaynin ohxlakh tsa teshash khillachu shayn vezharshka: "Shu aradäkhna khilleḥara‚ tkho a aradevr ma dara shütsa. Shuna düḥal tsḥanna a tsq'a a müt'aḥ khir datsara tkho. Shütsa t'om bineḥara - shuna ġo diyr ma dara okha". Dala teshalla do‚ bakq'alla a, üsh khartslüysh ma bu älla.
59:12: Üsh arabäkhcha‚ tsärtsa arabevr a ma batsara üsh. Tsärtsa t'om bicha, - tsarna ġo diyr ma datsara tsara. Tsara tsarna ġo dicha a, yukhabevr ma bara üsh (bovdur ma bara üsh)‚ t'akqa /tseran/ ġo tsarna khir ma datsara.
59:13: Shu ma du tseran degnashkaḥ Delal a t'ekh qerame. Iza üsh qetam botsu q'am dolu dela du.
59:14: Tsara shütsa t'om biyr bats massara a tsḥana ch'aġyina yartashkaḥ ben ya penashna t'eḥara ben. Tseran nitsq' vovshashna yuq'aḥ ch'oġa bu. Ḥuna möttu, üsh tsḥäna bu. Tseran degnash deq'adella du. Iza üsh ḥeq'al dotsu q'am dolu dela du.
59:15: Duqa khan yotsush shayl ḥalkha khillacharakh tera bu üsh: shayn ġullaqan bāla ʿävshira tsara. Tsarna khir du lazosh dolu ʿazap a /ekhartaḥ/.
59:16: Shayt'anakh tera bu üsh, sha ällachu adame: "/Delakh/ tsatesharg khila!" Iza /Delakh/ tsatesharg khilcha, tso elira: "Bakq'alla a, so ts'ena du ḥokh. Bakq'alla a, so qöru Delakh - ʿalamiyn Dekh!"
59:17: Tsu shinnan (shayt'anan a, tsunna t'äḥahxöttinchu adaman a) zhamʿ khilira i shiʾ zhözhakhateḥ khilar‚ tsu choḥ guttar a büsush. Iza bu zulamkhoyn beqam.
59:18: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Delakh qeralash. Ḥozhiyla sa‚ sha hxun kechdina te qanenna. Shu qeralash Delakh. Bakq'alla a, Dela sov dika khuush vu ash diyrig.
59:19: Shu ma khilalash Dela vitsvincharakh tera – t'akqa Tso bitsbaytira tsärga shäsh a. Üsh pesiq' nakh bu.
59:20: Tsḥaterra bats zhözhakhatin day a‚ yalsamanin day a. Yalsamanin day - üsh bu töllarsh!
59:21: Okha hxara Q'urʾan dossiyna khilleḥara lamane, ḥuna gur ma bara iza dʿatiyna, bädda Delakh qerabalarna. Hxara masalsh Okha dālado nakhana, tsara oyla yaḥara älla.
59:22: Iza Allahx (tsḥa Dela) vu‚ qin dela vats Iza votsurg. Ḥulameḥ derg a‚ guchoḥ derg a khuurg vu Iza. Iza sov q'inkhetame verg a‚ q'inkhetame verg a vu.
59:23: Iza Allahx vu‚ qin dela vats Iza votsurg. Pachchaḥ vu Iza‚ /masso a bökhachu, qöllinchu sibatekh, qachambatsarekh/ ts'ena verg vu‚ /Shen khalq'ana/ mashar /lush/ verg vu‚ /Shen elchanashka tsärgakhula Shen muʿzhizatash guchudakhartsa nakhe/ iyman düllüytush verg vu‚ /masso a hxuma/ʿalashdiyrig vu‚ veza verg vu‚ nütsq'ala verg vu‚ /vāla ḥaq' dolush/ kura verg vu. Ts'ena vu Iza /Shetsa/ tsara naq'ost latsarkh.
59:24: Iza Allahx vu‚ Qollarkho vu Iza‚ yotsuchüra hxumanash khülüyturg a vu Iza, surt hxottosh verg a vu /Sha qulluchu hxumanan/. Tsünan khaza ts'ersh a yu. Tsunna tasbiḥ desh du stigalshkaḥ mel derg a‚ lättaḥ mel derg a. Iza veza verg a vu‚ ḥukma /niysa/ desh verg a vu.
60:1: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Ma letsa San mostaġiy a‚ shun mostaġiy a dottaġiy‚ ash tsärga bezam a qiydabesh. Tsara kersta ma dina shüga deana dolu baq'derg‚ shäsh aravokqush elcha a‚ shu a /ts'enoshkara/ dekq'a shu Delakh – shäsh Qiosh-Qobush volchukh teshash dolu dela. Shu aradevlcha ġazotana San novq'aḥ‚ San rezakhilar lökhush /ma letsalash kerstanash shayna dottaġiy/. Ash /degnashkaḥ/ ḥulbora tsärga bezam, So dika khuush vu ash ḥuldinarg a‚ ash dʿaḥedinarg a. Shukh iza desh verg tilavella vu niysachu neq'akh.
60:2: Shuna t'eḥ shayn ätto bälcha – shuna mostaġiy khülu tsarakh‚ shuna t'eqiydado shayn küygash a‚ shayn mettanash a /shuna/ zen dartsa‚ tsarna liira ash /i baq'derg/ kerstadoyla.
60:3: Banne a shuna payda biyr ma bats shun gergarlonasha a‚ shun dözalsha a q'ematdiynaḥ: Tso q'astam biyr bu shuna yukq'eḥ. I Dela ash diyrig gush ma vu.
60:4: Khaza masal ma khilira shuna Ibrahximeḥ a‚ tsüntsa khillachärgaḥ a‚ tsara älcha shayn nakhe: "Tkho ts'ena du shukh a‚ ash shayna, Dela a vitina, ʿibadat dechu hxumanekh a. Okha shuna kerstanalla dina. Tkhuniy‚ shuniy yukq'eḥ mostaġalla du‚ öġazlo a yu guttarenna a ash vekq'a tsḥana Dele iyman dillalts". Ibrahxima shen dega älla tsḥa dosh dotsurg /tsunakh masal ma etsa/: "Ḥuna gechdar dökhur ma du as Dele‚ /hxette a/ Delera ḥuna tsḥanna a hxumanna doladesh-m vats so". /Tsara – Ibrahxima a‚ tsünan naq'ostasha a doʿa dora/: "Tkho Qiosh-Qobush volu tkhan Dela! Ḥuna t'etevzhi tkho‚ Ḥuna t'edirzi tkho‚ Ḥuna t'e du-q tkhan dʿaderzar a.
60:5: Tkho qiosh-qobush volu tkhan Dela! Tkhokh pitana ma delaḥ tsateshnacharna (tsarna tolam ma lolaḥ tkhuna t'eḥ – t'akqa tsarna möttur du shäsh baq' du, busalba din kharts du)‚ Aḥ gechdelaḥ tkhuna‚ tkho qiosh-qobush volu tkhan Dela. Bakq'alla a, Ḥo vu-q veza verg a‚ ḥukma /niysa/ desh verg a".
60:6: Shuna khili tsärgaḥ khaza masal – Dele a‚ q'ematdiyne a dog dokhush volchunna. /Otsunakh/ milla a dʿaverzaḥ, – bakq'alla a, i Dela ḥal dolush a vu‚ khastame a vu.
60:7: Tarlo Dala shuna a‚ tsarakh ash shaytsa mostaġalla lelosh yolcharna a yukq'eḥ bezam khiliyta. Dela nitsq' qochush vu. I Dela t'ekh gechdiyrig a vu‚ q'inkhetame verg a vu.
60:8: Dala tsa magosh dats shuna din baḥaneḥ shütsa t'om tsa bincharna a‚ shu shayn ts'enoshkara ara tsa däkhnacharna a dikanig dan a‚ ash tsärtsa niyso yan a. Bakq'alla a, Dalla beza niyso yesh bersh.
60:9: Bakq'alla a, Dala tsa magado shuna din baḥaneḥ shütsa t'om binacharakh‚ shu shayn ts'enoshkara aradäkhnacharakh‚ shu aradakharna t'eḥ /shun mostaġashna/ ġodinacharakh ash shayna dottaġiy letsa. Tsarakh dottaġiy lötsush bersh – üsh zulamkhoy bu.
60:10: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Shüga bäkhkicha bevdda muʾma zudariy – zēlash üsh, Dalla-m dika khäa tseran iyman. Shayna khaadelcha üsh iyman dillina buyla, – üsh kerstanashka dʿa ma berzabelash. Üsh (i muʾma zudariy) tsarna (kerstanashna) ḥanal bats. I (kersta nakh) a bats tsarna (zudarshna) ḥanal. Dʿalo tsarna (tsu zudariyn khillachu kersta maroshna) tsara yina kharzh (tsara zudarshna della khilla dolu urdo). Q'a dats shuna ash üsh shayna baliycha, tsarna shayn makh (urdo) dʿa a bella. Ash ma letsa tsa teshash bolchu zudarshtsa /zudchun-mayrachun/ üyrash (ash ma qaba shaygaḥ khilla bolu t'akqa kerstaniyn aġor bevlla bolu zudariy). Ash ekha tsärgara shäsh yina kharzh. Tsara a yökhiyla shäsh yina kharzh /shüga/. Iza du Delan ḥukma: Tso do shuna yukq'eḥ ḥukma. Dela khuush verg a vu‚ ḥukma /niysa/ desh verg a vu.
60:11: Shun zudarekh tsḥaʾ dʿayakhcha tsateshachärga‚ tq'a ash t'om bina hxons yakqineḥ, – dʿalo shaygara zudariy dʿabakhancharna tsara yina kharzhatsa nislurg /hxonsakh/. Shu qeralash /i niyso tsa yan/ Delakh‚ shäsh Tsunakh teshash dolchu.
60:12: Hxay paykhamar! Ḥuna t'e bäkhkicha muʾma zudariy ḥötsa duytsa bart ban /dinan aġonash larʾyan/ shäsh Delatsa tsḥanna hxumantsa naq'ost tsalatsarna t'eḥ‚ shäsh /hxuma/ tsalachq'orna t'eḥ, zina tsadarna t'eḥ‚ shäsh shayn berash tsadayarna t'eḥ‚ shäsh tsadaḥarna t'eḥ eladita, shäsh iza qullush, shayn küygiyn a‚ kogiyn a ḥalkha (shen mayrachunna dina dotsu ber tsunakh tsa qiosh)‚ shäsh dikachu hxumanna t'eḥ ḥuna ʿesalla tsayarna t'eḥ – tsärtsa duynatsa bart be‚ tsarna Dele gechdar dekha. Bakq'alla a, i Dela t'ekh gechdiyrig vu‚ q'inkhetame verg vu.
60:13: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Ash dottaġiy ma letsa shayna Dela öġazvakhana q'am. Tsara dog dillina ekhartakh‚ tsateshachara dog dillina khilarkh terra keshniyn daykh (üsh denbina ġovtorakh).
61:1: Dalla tasbiḥ dina stigalshkaḥ mel dolcho a‚ lättaḥ mel dolcho. Iza veza verg a‚ ḥukma /niysa/ desh verg a vu.
61:2: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Ash hxunda düytsu shäsh desh dotsurg?
61:3: Yokqa khilla öġazlo Dalla gergaḥ ash ālar shäsh desh dotsurg.
61:4: Bakq'alla a, Dalla beza Shen novq'aḥ t'om besh bersh, tsḥa moġa bina, shäsh ch'aġyina ġishlo sanna.
61:5: Musas ma elira shen q'ome /aḥ ḥakhade iza‚ hxay Muḥammad‚ ḥayn nakhe/: "Hxay san q'am‚ ash hxunda suna khalakhötüytu? Shu khuush ma duy, so shüga /vaiytina/ Delan elcha vuyla". Üsh /baq'dolchukh/ dʿabirzicha, – Dala dʿaderziyra tseran degnash /baq'dolchukh/. Dala nis tsa do pesiq' q'am.
61:6: Maryaman k'anta ʿiysas ma elira‚ /aḥ dagadayta iza ḥayn nakhe‚ hxay Muḥammad/: "Hxay Israilan k'entiy! Bakq'alla a, so shüga /vaiytina/ Delan elcha vu-q‚ baq'desh sol ḥalkha khilla Tavrat a‚ qaʾ bokqush sol t'äḥa voġur volchu elchantsa, shen ts'e Aḥmad yolush". T'äḥa iza shayga veʾcha bilgalonashtsa‚ tsara elira: "Hxara bilgala bozbuunchalla du".
61:7: Mila vu t'ekh zulame sha Dalla t'eḥ khartsderg qöllina volchul‚ sha /Dalla/ müt'aḥ khilare (islam dine) qoyqush a volush? Dala nis tsa do zulame q'am.
61:8: Üsh luush bu shayn baganashtsa Delan nur daya. Dala qochushdo Shen nur, tsateshacharna i mel tsa dezaḥ a.
61:9: Iza vu vakhiytinarg Shen elcha niysachu neq'atsa a‚ baq'dolchu dintsa, iza toliytarḥama masso a dina t'eḥ, mushrikashna iza mel tsa dezaḥ a.
61:10: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! As nisdoy shu yokhka-etsarna t'e, tso shu k'elḥaradokhur dolush lazosh dolchu ʿazapakh? /Iza :/
61:11: shu Delakh a‚ Tsünan elchanakh a teshar du‚ ash Delan novq'aḥ q'aḥegar du shayn bakhamtsa a‚ sinoshtsa a. Iza dika du shuna, shu khuush khilleḥ.
61:12: Tso (Dala) gechdiyr du shun q'inoshna‚ chudokhüytur du boshmashna‚ shayna bukhakhula khish ökhush dolchu‚ ʿadn yalsamanin ts'enachu ġishloshna. Iza siylaḥ-bokqa tolam bu-q!
61:13: Qin /niʿmat khir du/, shuna sha dezash dolu – Delera ġo a‚ gergara tolam a. Aḥ qaʾ bakqa muʾma nakhana.
61:14: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Shu khilalash Delan ġönchiy, Maryaman k'anta ʿiysas shen mutaʿelimashka älla khilarkh terra: "Mülsh bu Delan aġorgaḥa san ġönchiy?" Mutaʿelimasha elira: "Tkho du Delan ġönchiy". Israilan k'entekh tsḥana tobano iyman dillira‚ /qechu/ tobano kerstanalla dira. T'akqa Okha ch'aġbira iyman dillinarsh tseran mostaġchunna t'eḥ – üsh khilira tolam bäkqinarsh /delilashtsa a, bilgalonashtsa a/.
62:1: Sha pachchaḥ volchu‚ Sha /masso a qachambatsarekh/ ts'ena volchu‚ Sha veza volchu‚ Shegaḥ ḥikmat dolchu Dalla tasbiḥ desh du stigalshkaḥ mel derg a‚ lättaḥ mel derg a.
62:2: Iza vu Sha vaiytinarg yoza tsa khuuchu nakheḥ tsarna shayna yukq'era elcha‚ tso tsarna düytsush Tsünan ayatash‚ üsh ts'anbesh‚ tsarna ʿamadesh zhayna a‚ ḥikmat a‚ üsh ḥalkha khilleḥ a gan a gush dolchu tilarchoḥ.
62:3: /Nakhakh/ qecharna a /düytsu tso Delan ayatash/, shäsh tsarakh (ḥalkha Muḥammad-paykhamarna gonakh khilla bolcharakh) tsa qiʾna bolchu. Iza veza verg a vu‚ ḥukma /niysa/ desh verg a vu.
62:4: Iza Delan dozalla (siy) du‚ Tso lo iza Shena luuchunna. Dela Shegaḥ siylaḥ-dokqa dozalla dolush vu.
62:5: Shayna t'e Tavrat dillincheran‚ t'akqa iza dʿa tsa diḥincheran masal du zhaynash ḥochu viran masalkh tera. Von du-q Delan ayatash khartsdinchu q'oman masal. Dala nis tsa bo zulame nakh.
62:6: Aḥ āla /hxay Muḥammad/: "Hxay zhügtiy (-n dineḥ) khillarsh! Shu möttush delaḥ shäsh Delan dottaġiy du /qin/ nakh botsush, – shuna dala laal, shäsh baq'lüysh khilleḥ".
62:7: Iza tsq'a a luur dats tsarna, shayn küygasha ḥalkha a däkqina. Dela bevzash vu zulamkhoy.
62:8: Aḥ āla: "Shu shekh dovdush dolu i valar düḥalqetar du shuna. T'akqa shu dʿaderzor du q'aylakha derg a‚ guchoḥ derg a khuush volchünga (Dalla t'e). T'akqa Tso dʿadüytsur du shüga ash desh khillarg".
62:9: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Shayga qayqicha lamaze p'eraskanan diynaḥ, sikhlo Dela ḥekho /ruzban lamaze/‚ yita yokhka-etsar. Iza dika du shuna, shu khuush khilleḥ.
62:10: Lamaz qochushkhilcha, – dʿasadarzha lättakhula‚ lekha Delan niʿmat. Ash ḥekhave Dela dukqa a - shu dakqiydedayta.
62:11: Shayna yokhka-etsar ya sinq'eram gicha, tsunna t'e börzu üsh‚ ḥo vütu tsara hxöttina lättachoḥ. Aḥ āla /tsärga, hxay Muḥammad/: "Dalla gergaḥ derg dika du sinq'eramal a‚ yokhka-etsaral a. I Dela ritsq' lucharekh uggar dikanig vu-q".
63:1: Ḥuna t'e munepiq'ash bäkhkicha, tsara elira: "Okha teshalla do: bakq'alla a, ḥo Delan elcha ma vu." Dalla khuush du ḥo, bakq'alla a, Shen elcha vuyla. Dala teshalla do: bakq'alla a, i munepiq'ash khartslüysh ma bu.
63:2: Shayn duynash shayna /busalbanashkara zen tsa khiliyta/ turs khilla liytsira tsara – /ishtta/ tsara dʿatiliyna /nakh/ Delan neq'akh. Bakq'alla a, ma von khili-q tsara desh khillarg!
63:3: Iza du tsara iyman dillina khilarna t'akqa kerstadarna. Tseran degnekh muhxar tökhna– üsh tsa qeta.
63:4: Ḥuna üsh gicha, ḥo tsetsvokqu tseran doġmasha‚ tsara khabar düytsush, aḥ laduġu tseran dashe. Ġortiyna bʿoġamash sanna bu üsh (shäsh hxöttina ʿa tsa lush). Masso a moḥ shayna düḥal bu möttu tsarna. Üsh mostaġiy bu‚ ḥo larlolaḥ tsarakh. Dala hxallakbiyr bu üsh. Mukha genabevlla üsh /iymanakh bilgalonash eʾnachul t'äḥa/?!
63:5: Tsärga elcha: "Sḥadüyla‚ Delan elchano gechdar dökhur du shuna"‚ shayn kortosh ḥebo tsara. Ḥuna gina üsh dʿabörzush /iymanakh/, shäsh kura a bovliy.
63:6: Tsarna tsḥaterra du: aḥ tsarna gechdar dekhcha a‚ tsa dekhcha a. Danne a Dala gechdiyr dats tsarna. Bakq'alla a, Dala nis tsa bo pesiq' nakh.
63:7: Üsh bu olush: "Kharzhash ma ye Delan elchanna gergaḥ bolcharna– dʿasabarzhiyta üsh /Madinatera/". Delan yu stigaliyn a, lättan a khaznash, amma munepiq'ash qetash bats-q.
63:8: Tsara (munepiq'asha) olu: "Tkho Madinate yukhadirzicha, siylaḥ bolchara siysaza bersh arabokhur bu tsu (Madinata) chüra". Delan du siy‚ Tsünan elchanan a du‚ muʾma nekhan a du‚ delaḥ a munepiq'ashna tsa khäa-q.
63:9: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Shu yuq'akh ma dokhiyla shun bakhamo a‚ shun dözalo a Dela ḥekhorakh (diynaḥ-busiy dechu pkhea lamazakh). I desh bersh– üsh bu eshnarsh.
63:10: Kharzhash ye /Delan novq'aḥ/ Okha shayna dellachu ritsq'anakh shaykh tsḥanna t'e valar qachale‚ t'akqa tso olush: "Veza Dela‚ Aḥ so t'äḥatettineḥara tsḥa k'ezzig zamanna, as saġa dokqur dara‚ so khir vara dika ʿamalsh yecharakh".
63:11: T'äḥatottur dats Dala tsḥa a sa, tsünan ʿozhalla eʾcha. Dela dika khuush verg vu ash diyrig.
64:1: Dalla tasbiḥ desh du stigalshkaḥ a‚ lättaḥ a mel derg. Tsunna du pachchaḥalla‚ Tsunna bu khastam a. Iza vu masso a hxumanna t'eḥ nitsq' qochush verg.
64:2: Iza vu shu qöllinarg. Shukh vu tsa teshash verg a‚ shukh vu teshash verg a /Delakh/. Dela ash diyrig gush verg vu.
64:3: Tso qöllira stigalsh a‚ latta a baq'ontsa‚ Tso hxottiyra shun kuts‚ t'akqa khazdira shun kütsash. Tsunna t'e du /chakqenan/ dʿaderzar.
64:4: Tsunna khäa stigalshkaḥ mel derg a‚ lättaḥ mel derg a. Tsunna khäa ash q'ayladokqurg a‚ ash dʿaḥedorig a. Dela vu khuush verg degnashkaḥ derg.
64:5: Shüga tsa deara ḥalkha tsa teshash khillacheran khabar? Tsara ʿävshira shayn ġullaqiyn bāla‚ tsarna lazosh dolu ʿazap a khir du /ekhartaḥ/.
64:6: Iza du tsärga boġush khilarna shayn elchanash bilgalonashtsa‚ t'akqa tsara olush khilarna: "/Vay sanna/ nakha dükhkur du vay niysachu novq'a?" Tsara kerstadira /üsh Dala bakhkiytar/‚ üsh dʿabirzira /otsu elchanekh a‚ baq'dolchu iymanakh a/. Dela /tseran ʿibadat/ tsa khilarkh a volu: Dela ḥal dolush a vu‚ khastame a vu.
64:7: /Delakh/ tsateshnacharna möttina shäsh dendiyr dats. Aḥ āla /tsärga, hxay Muḥammad/: "Hxaʾ‚ so Qiosh-Qobuchu san Delakh duy bou as: dendiyr ma du shu‚ t'akqa shüga düytsur ma du ash desh khillarg. Iza Dalla atta du".
64:8: Shu tesha Delakh a‚ Tsünan elchanakh a‚ Okha dossiynchu nürakh a (Q'urʾanakh). Dela ash diyrig sov dika khuush verg vu.
64:9: Tsḥana diynaḥ Tso guldiyr du shu gulaman /q'emat/diyne. Iza du vovshashna zenash khilaran a, qiamash khilaran a de. Milla velaḥ Delakh teshash a, dika ʿamalsh yesh a, Okha ts'anviyr vu iza shen q'inoykh‚ vokhüytur vu boshmash chu‚ shayn bukhakhula khish ökhush dolchu, tsu choḥ üsh guttar a lättash. Iza siylaḥ-bokqa tolam bu-q!
64:10: Tsateshnarsh a‚ Tkhan ayatash khartsdina khillarsh a – üsh /zhözhakhatin/ ts'eran day bu‚ tsu choḥ guttar lättar bolush. Ma von dʿaderzar du-q iza!
64:11: Tsḥa a bokham khir bats Delan purbantsa ben. Milla velaḥ Delakh teshash – Tso nisdiyr du tsünan dog. Dela masso a hxuma khuush verg vu.
64:12: Müt'aḥ khila Dalla a‚ müt'aḥ khila elchanna a. Shu dʿaderzaḥ /iymanakh/ – Tkhan elchanna t'eḥ-m bilgala dʿaqachor ben dats.
64:13: Allahx-Dela vu‚ qin dela vats Iza votsurg. Dalla t'e tevzhiyla muʾma nakh.
64:14: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Bakq'alla a, shun zudarekh a‚ dözalakh a shuna mostaġiy bersh a bu‚ tsarakh larlolash. Shu /tseran/ bekhkakh dovlaḥ‚ tovaḥ‚ ash gechdaḥ – /i dika du shuna/, bakq'alla a, Dela t'ekh gechdiyrig a vu‚ q'inkhetame verg a vu.
64:15: Bakq'alla a, shun bakham a‚ shun dözal a pitana du. Tq'a Dela – Tsunna gergaḥ siylaḥ-yokqa yal yu!
64:16: Shu Delakh qeralash shayn nitsq' ma-qochchu‚ ash ladoġalash /shayga Dala dechu omrane/‚ shu müt'aḥ khilalash /Dala bokhuchunna/‚ ash kharzhash ye /Delan novq'aḥ/ shuna shayna dika khiliytarḥama. Shayn sinoyn bʿärmetsigallakh ʿalash khillarsh – üsh bu bakqiybiyr bersh.
64:17: Ash /yukhalurg/ Dalla laḥ khaza deqar, – Tso masittazza alsamdäkqina yukhaderzor du iza shuna‚ shuna gechdiyr a du. Dela barkalle a vu‚ duqa sobare vu (Shekh teshnacharna öġaze votsush).
64:18: Ḥulameḥ derg a‚ guchoḥ derg a khuush verg a vu /Iza/‚ Sha veza verg a‚ ḥukma /niysa/ desh verg a vu
65:1: Hxay paykhamar! Shäsh zudariy bütush, üsh bita ʿiddatana. Ash dagarde ʿiddat /-an denosh/. Shu qeralash Delakh – shäsh Qiosh-Qobush volchukh /i ʿiddat tergal tsa dan/. Shayn ts'enoshkara ara ma bakhalash üsh /i ʿiddat cheqdalaza/. Üsh shäsh a ma bovliyla /shayn ts'enoshkara/ ara, tsḥa bilgala irchanig shäsh deʾneḥ ben. Hxorsh du Delan dozanash. Delan dozanekh vällarg shena zulam dinarg vu. Ḥuna khaats, Dala tsḥa ġullaq khiliyta tarlo tsul t'äḥa.
65:2: Tseran khan (ʿiddat) qochushkhilcha‚ yukhaberzabe üsh khazachu ġillaqtsa /shäsh tsḥäna dakha luush delaḥ/‚ ya q'astabe üsh khazachu ġillaqtsa /shayna, tsḥäna dakha tarlur dats älla, khetalaḥ/. Ash shiʾ tesh hxottave /tsḥänaqetarna ya dʿaq'astarna/ shaykh ʿedale bersh. Ash teshalla hxottade Dalla. Iza du Delakh a‚ t'äḥarchu diynakh a teshna khillachunna shetsa ḥekham besh derg. Shekh qörush volchunna Dala neq' khülüytur bu /masso a balekh ḥalkhavala/,
65:3: Tso (Dala) tsunna ritsq' lur du tso ḥesap tsa dinachüra. Dalla t'e tovzhush verg – iza Tsünan ḥesapeḥ vu. Bakq'alla a, Dela qochushdesh vu Shen ġullaq. Dala khiliytina masso a hxumanna baram.
65:4: Shun zudarekh shayn ts'iy darakh dog dillina bersh‚ shu sheko yolush khilleḥ‚ tseran ʿiddat qo butt bu‚ i ts'iy dar hxintsa a tsa khillacharna (zhima khilar baḥaneḥ) a /qo butt bu/. Berakh bisincheran /ʿiddatan/ khan – ber dar du. (Ber dicha, cheqdolu tseran ʿiddat). Delakh qörush verg milla velaḥ a, – Tso tsunna shen ġullaqakh attalla khülüytur yu (tsünan ġullaq atta khülüytur du).
65:5: Hxara Delan omra du‚ Tso shüga dossiyna dolu. Dala ts'anviyr vu shen q'inoykh Shekh qörush verg‚ Tso alsamyokqur tsunna yal.
65:6: ʿayta /i shäsh ʿiddatana bitina bolu zudariy/ shäsh a /hxay maroy/ ʿachchoḥ, shayn tarone ḥäzhzhina. Zen ma de tsarna ash gatto yartsa. Üsh berakh belaḥ, kharzh ye tsarna ber khillalts. Tsara shuna berash daqadaḥ, – tseran makh dʿalo. Vovshashtsa dogadovla /hxay mar a, zuda a/ khazachu ġillaqtsa. Shuna khalo khilaḥ /ber daqorna kharzh yan/‚ qechu zudcho daqadoyla tsunna.
65:7: Ḥal dolcho shen ḥolakh kharzh yoyla. Shegaḥ k'ezzig ritsq' dolcho kharzh yoyla Dala shena dellachukh. Dala tsḥanna a sina t'e tsa düllu Sha tsunna dellarg ben. Dala khalonal t'äḥa attalla khülüytur yu.
65:8: Masa yurt düḥalʾyalla khilla sha Qiosh-Qobush volchu Delan a‚ Tsünan elchaniyn omranna. Okha üsh tergal yira ch'oġachu ḥesaptsa‚ Okha ʿazap dira tsarna irchachu ʿazaptsa.
65:9: Tsara ʿävshira shayn ġullaqan bāla‚ tseran ġullaqakh khillarg eshalla yara.
65:10: Dala kechdina tsarna ch'oġa ʿazap. Shu qera Delakh‚ hxay ḥeq'al dersh‚ shäsh iyman dillina dolu. Dala shüga bossiyna ḥekham (Q'urʾan).
65:11: Elcha /vaiytina shüga/‚ tso shuna düytsush Delan q'egina ayatash iyman dillinarsh‚ dika ʿamalsh yinarsh a bodanashkara nüre bakharḥama. Delakh a tiyshina, dika ʿamal yesh verg – Tso iza vüllur vu boshmashka‚ shayn bukhakhula khish ökhush dolchu‚ iza tsu choḥ guttar lättar vu. Khaza khiliytina Dala tsunna ritsq'.
65:12: Dela vu Sha qöllinarg vorhx stigal‚ lättakh a tsärga terra. /Delan/ omra oḥadussu tsarna yukq'ekhula shuna khaarḥama, i Dela masso a hxumanna t'eḥ nitsq' qochush vuyla a‚ Tso chulätsna yuyla masso a hxuma Shen ʿilmantsa.
66:1: Hxay paykhamar! Aḥ hxunda ḥaram do Dala ḥuna ḥanal dinarg, ḥayn zudariy rezaban ġertash? Dela t'ekh gechdiyrig a‚ q'inkhetame verg a vu.
66:2: Dala t'edillina shuna duynash bastar. Dela vu shun ġöncha. Iza vu khuush verg a‚ ḥukma /niysa/ desh verg (Shegaḥ ḥeq'alalla derg) a.
66:3: Paykhamara shen tsḥabolchu zudarshka (Ḥafsate) q'aylakh diytsira tsḥa khabar. Tso (Ḥafsata) iza qechärga (ʿaishate) diytsicha‚ Dala iza tsunna (elchanna) guchudäkqicha, tsunakh (tsu khabarkh) tsḥaderg dovziytira tso (elchano Ḥafsate), tsḥaderg ḥuldira. Tso tsünga (Ḥafsate) i diytsicha‚ elira /Ḥafsata/: "Ḥan diytsina ḥöga iza?" Tso elira: "Söga diytsina iza /nekhan q'aylenash/ khuush volcho‚ /masso a hxuma/ dika devzash volcho (Dala)."
66:4: Ash shimmo (Ḥafsata a‚ ʿaishata a) tōba dineḥara Dele… /I dika khir dara shuna ash tsunna düḥal bart bechul/. Shu shinnan dog dʿatevzhira /Delan elchantsa lelo dezachu ġillaqakh/. Ash vovshashna ġo daḥ tsunna (paykhamarna) düḥal – bakq'alla a, Dela – Iza vu i larviyr verg‚ Dzhibril a du‚ muʾma nakhakh dika mel verg a vu‚ malikash a du tsul t'äḥa ġönchiy.
66:5: Mega iza qiosh-qobush volchu tsünan Dala, tso shu diticha, tsunna shul dika zudariy balo: shäsh busalba bolush‚ shaygaḥ iyman dolush‚ müt'aḥ bolush‚ tōba desh bolush‚ ʿibadat desh bolush‚ /paykhamartsa/ dʿasalelash bolush‚ ḥalkha mareḥ khillarsh a‚ mare bakhaza bolu mekhkariy a.
66:6: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Larde shäsh a‚ shayn dözal a /zhözhakhatin/ ts'erakh‚ shen yagorig nakh a‚ t'ulgash a bolchu. Tsunna t'e hxittiyna ircha‚ ch'oġa malikash du‚ yukha tsa dovlush Dala shayna omra dinchukh, shäsh qochushdesh shayga omra desh derg.
66:7: Hxay /Delakh/ tsateshnarsh! Shu bekhkaza ma diyla takhana /q'ematdiynaḥ/: shuna besh bolu beqam ash /dünenaḥ/ desh khillarg /baḥaneḥ/ du.
66:8: Hxay iyman dillinarsh! Shu dʿaderza Dele ts'ena tōba dartsa – tarlo shu qiosh-qobuchu shun Dala shu ts'andan shun q'inoykh‚ /t'akqa/ shu boshmashna chu dikhka‚ shayn bukhakhula khish ökhush dolchu‚ otsu diynaḥ Dala siysazviyr vats paykhamar a‚ tsüntsa iyman dillinarsh a. Tseran nur dedda lelar du tsarna ḥalkhakhula a‚ tseran ättu küygash dolchu aġorḥara a‚ tsara olush: "Tkho qiosh-qobush volu tkhan Dela‚ Aḥ qochushdelaḥ tkhan nur‚ Aḥ tkhuna gechdelaḥ. Bakq'alla a, Ḥo vu-q masso a hxumanna t'eḥ nitsq' qochush verg".
66:9: Hxay paykhamar! Q'iysam lattabe tsateshachärtsa a‚ munepiq'ashtsa a‚ lüra khila tsärtsa. Tseran chuġoyla zhözhakhati yu. Ma von du-q /tseran/ dʿaderzar!
66:10: Dala masal daliyna tsateshacharna Nuḥan zudchukh a‚ Lut'an zudchukh a: üsh bara Tkhan dikachu lekh shina lena /küyga/ k'el‚ tsara shimmo a tsarna shinna teshnabekhk bira /zina dar botsu/‚ tsḥanna a hxumantsa Delera shäsh shiʾ k'elḥar-m tsa yakqira tsara‚ elira /tsärga/: "Shu shiʾ chu ġo /zhözhakhatin/ ts'erga tsu chu bölkhush bolchartsa".
66:11: Dala masal daliyna iyman dillincharna Firʿavnan zudchukh‚ tso ma elira: "So qiosh-qobush volu san Dela‚ Aḥ suna dēlaḥ Ḥayna gergaḥ yalsamani choḥ ts'a‚ Aḥ so k'elḥarʾyakqalaḥ Firʿavnakh a‚ tsünan balkhakh a‚ Aḥ so k'elḥarʾyakqalaḥ zulam dechu q'omakh".
66:12: ʿimranan yoʿakh Maryamakh a /masal daliyna Dala/‚ sha lardina khillachu shen yoʿalla. Okha tsünan deġa chu sa üyzira Tkhan Sikh (Dzhabrail-maliko)‚ tso (Maryama) baq'dira sha qiosh-qobush volchu shen Delan deshnash‚ Tsünan zhaynash a‚ iza khilira /Dalla ch'oġa/ müt'aḥ bolcharakh.
67:1: Berkate (khastame) khili Iza (Dela)‚ Shen küygaḥ pachchaḥalla dolu‚ Sha masso a hxumanna t'eḥ nitsq' qochush volu.
67:2: Iza vu Sha qöllina dalar a‚ dakhar a shu zerḥama‚ mülkharnig vu shukh vunō dikanig ʿamal yartsa. Iza vu veza verg a‚ t'ekh gechdiyrig a.
67:3: Iza vu Sha qöllina vorhx stigal t'ett'a. Ḥuna /hxay adam/ gur ma yats sov Q'inkhetame volcho qöllinchungaḥ tsḥa a vovshashtsa tsa yoġu hxuma. Tokhal bʿärg: goy ḥuna tsḥa a yadda mettig?
67:4: T'akqa yukh-yukha a tokhal bʿärg – ḥöga dukhadörzur du bʿärgtokhar k'eldisna‚ sha ġeldella dolush (Dala qöllinchu hxumanashkaḥ tsḥa a tsḥänatsadar tsa karosh).
67:5: Okha khazyina dünenan stigal chirqashtsa (sedarchashtsa)‚ Okha khiliytina üsh shayt'anashna qossarsh. Okha kechdina tsarna (shayt'anashna) egachu ts'eran ʿazap.
67:6: Shäsh Qiosh-Qobuchukh (Delakh) tsateshnacharna a zhözhakhatin ʿazap du. Ma von dʿaderzar du-q iza!
67:7: Shäsh tsu chu qissicha, tsarna khezar du tsünan uġarsh‚ i sha qekhkash yolush,
67:8: Sha öġazʾyalla ekqa kechʾella: tsu chu /q'inosh dinacheran/ tolġa (toba) mossaza qössicha a, tsünan ġarolasha tsärga khottur du: "Qeramcha (Delan elcha) tsa veara shüga?" – älla.
67:9: Tsara er du: "Hxaʾ‚ veara tkhöga qeramcha – okha iza khartsvira‚ okha elira: "Dala hxumma a tsa dossora‚ shu ma du dokqachu tilarchoḥ".
67:10: Tsara er du: "Tkho khilleḥara laduġush a‚ oyla yesh a – tkho khir ma datsara egachu ts'eran dayshlaḥ".
67:11: Üsh q'era khilira shayn q'inna. /Delan q'inkhetamakh/ ma genaḥ bu-q egachu ts'eran day!
67:12: Bakq'alla a, shayna gush votstsusheḥ, shäsh qiosh-qobush volchu shayn Delakh qörush bersh – tsarna du gechdar a‚ yokqa yal.
67:13: Q'ayladakqa shayn dosh, ya guchudakqa iza – bakq'alla a, Iza vu degnashkaḥ derg khuush verg.
67:14: Tq'a tsa khäa Tsunna‚ sha qöllinchunna? Iza vu sov dika qetame verg a‚ sov dika khuush verg a.
67:15: Iza vu shuna latta k'eda /lela atta/ dinarg – lela /shu, hxay nakh/ tsünan aġonashkakhula, daa tsünan ritsq'anakh (Dala lättaḥ della niʿmatash ḥanal q'aḥegartsa). – Tsünga du /shun keshnashkara/ ġovttar.
67:16: Shu teshna duy /hxay Dalla inkarlo yesh bersh/ stigalaḥ Volchukh, Tso shäsh lättakh khudor dats älla, t'akqa i /latta/ dettalush?
67:17: Ya shu teshna duy stigalaḥ Volchukh, Tso shayna boüytur bats älla t'ulgekh /büzna/ ch'oġa mokh? T'äḥa khuur du shuna‚ mukha bu San qeram.
67:18: Kharts ma bira /elchanash/ tsaral ḥalkha khillachara a – mukha khilira /tsarna/ San inkarlo! (Ma ircha khilira San ʿazap!).
67:19: Tsarna tsa gira olkhazarsh, shayna t'ekhula lelash dolu – /shayn t'emash/ darzhadesh‚ t'akqa t'eguldesh? Üsh satsadesh verg-m Sov Q'inkhetame volu Dela ben vats. Bakq'alla a, Iza vu-q masso a hxuma gush verg.
67:20: Mila vu, i shuna bʿo khilla, ġo diyr derg sha sov q'inkhetame volchu Delan ʿazap dukhatokha? Tsateshnarsh ma bats ʿekhabalargaḥ ben.
67:21: Mila vu iza shuna ritsq' lun derg, Tso Shen ritsq' satsadicha? Hxette a‚ ma /Dalla/ düḥalbevlla üsh‚ ma /baq'dolchunna/ genabevlla üsh!
67:22: Tq'a shen yuḥa t'eḥ lelash verg vu niysa‚ ya niysachu novq'a niyssa lelash verg vu?
67:23: Aḥ āla /tsärga, hxay Muḥammad/: "Iza vu shu qiiynarg a‚ shuna lersa a‚ bʿärsa a‚ degnash a dinarg a. K'ezzig du-q ash barkalla olurg!"
67:24: Aḥ āla: "Iza vu shu lättaḥ darzhiynarg‚ Tsünga guldiyr dolush a du shu".
67:25: Tsara olu: "Matsa khir du i ash bokhurg, shu baq'lüysh khilleḥ?"
67:26: Aḥ āla /hxay elcha/: "ʿilma Dalla gergaḥ du‚ tq'a so bilgala volu qeramcha vu".
67:27: Iza shayna gicha gergaḥ‚ tsateshnacheran yakhḥash erchaevlira‚ /tsärga/ elira /malikasha, bekhk bokqush/: "Hxara du iza ash /dünenaḥ dolush/ sha lökhush khillarg!"
67:28: Aḥ āla: "Goy shuna‚ so Dala hxallakvicha‚ sötsa bersh a‚ ya Tso tkhokh q'inkhetam bicha‚ ḥan k'elḥarbokhur bu tsateshnarsh lazosh dolchu ʿazapakh?"
67:29: Aḥ āla: "Iza vu sov q'inkhetame volu Dela‚ Tsünga iyman dillina okha‚ Tsunna t'e a tevzhina. T'äḥa khuur du shuna‚ mila vu gan a gush dolchu tilarchoḥ".
67:30: Aḥ āla: "Goy shuna‚ i shun khi ʿüyrentsa leq'cha‚ ḥan lur du shuna ökhush dolu ḥastan khi?"
68:1: Nỳn. Duy bou As q'olamakh a‚ tsara /nakha/ yazdesh dolchukh a:
68:2: Ḥo ma vats /hxay Muḥammad/ ḥo Qiosh–Qobuchun (Delan) q'inkhetamtsa zhiniykh.
68:3: Bakq'alla a, ḥuna ma yu khadalur yotsu yal.
68:4: Bakq'alla a, ḥo ma vu siylaḥ-dokqa (khaza) ġillaq ḥaygaḥ dolush.
68:5: T'äḥa gur du ḥuna‚ tsarna a gur du‚
68:7: Bakq'alla a, ḥan Qiosh-Qoburg – Tsunna dika vevza Shen neq'akh tilavellarg a‚ Tsunna dika bevza niysachu novq'aḥ bersh a.
68:8: Ḥo /hxay Muḥammad/ müt'aḥ ma khilalaḥ /din/ khartsdesh bolcharna.
68:9: Üsh luush bara ḥo k'eda khila – t'akqa shäsh k'eda khir bara.
68:10: Ḥo müt'aḥ ma khilalaḥ hxor /kharts/ duynash duqa boush siysaz- volchunna‚
68:11: /hxor/ lüysh volchunna /nakhana yuḥ düḥal/‚ /tsarna yukq'eḥ/ mettanash dʿasaqöḥush volchunna‚
68:12: dikachu /hxumanna/ novq'arlo yesh volchunna‚ q'inosh desh dozanekh välla volchunna‚
68:13: q'izachunna‚ tsul sovnakha a shen dünenchu valar shekoneḥ dolchunna (da mila vu tsa khuush, bökha lelartsa vevzash volchu).
68:14: Shen däkhni a, k'entiy a khilartsa /Delan dozanekh a välla, kura a välla i/.
68:15: Shena Tkhan ayatash deshcha, tso elira: "Ḥalkhalerachiyn tüyranash du hxorsh".
68:16: Okha tsünan mera t'e vast düllur du.
68:17: Bakq'alla a, Okha ziyra üsh‚ Okha tsḥana beshan day zerakh terra: tsara duy biira‚ shäsh /beshara/ stömash bokhur bu ʿüyranna älla‚
68:18: shäsh /hxumma a/ t'e tsa tukhush ("Dala muq'alaḥ" tsa olush).
68:19: T'akqa tsunna (beshana) go tesira ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchüngara go tosush dolcho‚ üsh nab yesh bolush.
68:20: /Yagna/ ʿarzhʾellarg sanna ʿüyrenga elira i /tseran besh/.
68:22: "Shayn besha chu ġo‚ shäsh stömash bokhur belaḥ"‚ – älla.
68:23: Üsh büylabelira, mellasha vovshashka a lüysh:
68:24: "Takhana shuna t'e /shun besha/ tsḥa a miskanig ma voġiyla /stömash bökhush/".
68:25: ʿüyranna novq'a bevlira üsh, shayn dagaḥ /miskanig/ dukhatokha nitsq' bolush.
68:26: Iza shayna /yagna/ gicha‚ tsara elira: "Bakq'alla a, vay tiladella.
68:28: Tsarakh qecharal ʿedale (veza) volcho elira: "As tsa ällera shüga: ash /Dalla/ khastam bineḥara"‚ – älla?
68:29: Tsara elira: "Vonakh ts'ena vu-q i vay qiosh-qobush volu Dela‚ bakq'alla a, vay khili-q zulamkhoy".
68:31: Tsara elira: "Ma bala bu vayna: vay khilira /Delan dozanekh/ t'ekhdovlursh.
68:32: Vay qiosh-qobush volchu vay Dala vayna tsul dikachüntsa /i besh/ khiytsa a tarlo. Bakq'alla a, vay qiosh-qobush volchu vayn Delan /dikane/ dog dokhush du-q".
68:33: Ishtta du ʿazap‚ tq'a ekhartan ʿazap vunō dokqa du, üsh khuush khilleḥ.
68:34: Bakq'alla a, /Delakh/ qörucharna shäsh qiosh-qobush volchu Dalla gergaḥ niʿmatiyn boshmash yu.
68:35: Tq'a Okha khülüytu /Dalla/ müt'aḥ bolu nakh q'inosh decharakh tera?
68:36: Shuna hxun khilla /ishtta oyla yal/? Ash mukha ḥukma do?
68:37: Ya shuna zhayna du‚ ash shena choḥ döshush /i ḥukma/?
68:38: Bakq'alla a, shuna tsu /zhayni/ choḥ dolush ash mel khorzhurg?
68:39: Ya shun Tkhötsa biʾna duynash bu q'ematde qachchalts‚ bakq'alla a, shayna ash dina ḥukma khir dolush?
68:40: Khatta tsärga /hxay Muḥammad/‚ mila vu tsarakh /tsu t'era/ dosh lur derg.
68:41: Ya tseran naq'ostiy bu? Sḥabalabe tsara shayn i naq'ostiy, shäsh baq'lüysh khilleḥ.
68:42: Otsu diynaḥ nastarsh erzina khir yu‚ üsh qoyqur bu suzhude – tsarna megar dats‚ –
68:43: bʿärgash oḥadakhna‚ siysazalla t'eyözhna. Tsärga suzhude qoyqush dara üsh mogush bolush.
68:44: Vita So-suo hxara khabar khartsdesh bolchartsa. Okha sḥalotsur bu üsh k'ez-k'ezzig /hxallakbartsa/ tsarna tsa khuuchukhula.
68:45: As khan lur yu tsarna. /Tseran mekarlonna düḥal/ San mekarlo ch'oġa yu-q.
68:46: Ya aḥ tsärga makh bökhu /hxay Muḥammad/, üsh deqarsha bazbina bolush?
68:47: Ya tsärgaḥ gushdotsurg /devzash ʿilma/ du, tsara dʿayazdesh?
68:48: Sobar de ḥuo qiosh-qobush volchu ḥan Delan ḥukmanna‚ ma khilalaḥ ch'eran naq'ostakh tera: tso /Dele/ qayqira sha /ch'eran kiyraḥ pashmallitsa/ gatvella volush.
68:49: Sha Qiosh-Qobuchun niʿmat shekh tsa qiʾneḥara, iza qössina khir vara /ch'eran kiyrara/ ara, siysaz a khilla.
68:50: Sha Qiosh-Qobucho khärzhira iza‚ tso khiliytira iza dikacharakh.
68:51: Tsateshnarsha mäʿʿargona shayn bʿärgashtsa ḥo hxallakviyr ma vara shayna ḥekham kheznachul t'äḥa‚ tsara olu: "Bakq'alla a, iza zhiniykh vu-q".
68:52: Iza-m dats masso a ʿalamna ḥekham ben.
69:3: Sten khaiytina ḥöga /hxay Muḥammad/‚ hxun du i baq'khilla dözhnarg?
69:4: Samudasha a‚ ʿadasha a khartsdira tukhush derg.
69:5: Amma samudash a - üsh hxallakbira /ch'oġallitsa/ dozanakh bellachu moḥatsa.
69:6: Va amma ʿadash a – tq'a üsh hxallakbira inzare nütsq'alchu t'ekh shiylachu mekhatsa.
69:7: Tso /nütsq'alla/ baliytira i tsarna vorhx busa a‚ barhx diynaḥ a t'ett'a. Ḥuna gur bara nakh otsu diynaḥ /hxallakbina/ dʿasaqissina‚ dässa disna (choḥ khara yolu) khurmanan dittan ġaddash sanna.
69:8: Tsḥa a bukhadisar goy ḥuna tsarna?
69:9: Veara Firʿavn‚ tsul ḥalkha mel verg a‚ muʾtafikatash a /bäkhkira/, q'a desh.
69:10: Tsara ʿesalla yira shäsh Qiosh-Qobush volchu Delan elchanna – t'akqa üsh sḥaletsira t'ekh ch'oġa dolchu sḥalatsaro.
69:11: Okha khi dozanakh dälcha, diḥira shu lelash dolchüntsa (kemantsa).
69:12: Iza khiliytarḥama shuna ḥekham‚ tidame dolchu lerge tidame etsiytarḥama a.
69:14: Latta a dʿadäḥcha‚ lämnash a /aydicha/‚ tsarakh, ätta, hxur bicha tsḥana atartsa -
69:15: Otsu diynaḥ doġur du danza tsa dällarg (q'ematde).
69:16: Stigal yedar yu‚ otsu diynaḥ khir yu iza ledarʾyalla (ch'aġo yotsush),
69:17: Malikash khir du tsünan yistashkakhula. Ḥo Qiosh-Qobush volchun ʿarsh ḥur yu otsu diynaḥ barhxammo shayna t'ekhula.
69:18: Otsu diynaḥ shu hxottor du /qielna/ ḥalkha‚ tsḥa a ḥullesh khülu hxuma ḥuldella khir dats shukh.
69:19: Amma shen zhayna shega ättu (baq'aḥara) küyga dellarg‚ tso er ma du /ch'oġa khazakhetta/: "Hxey‚ sḥadüyla! Desha san zhayna!
69:20: Bakq'alla a, so möttush ma vara /tsḥana diynaḥ/ san ḥesap suna düḥalqetar duyla".
69:21: Iza khir vu sha reza volchu dakhareḥ.
69:24: /Er du tsärga/: "Ġoza daa‚ ġoza mala shayna /dünenan/ dʿadakhanchu denoshkaḥ shäsh ḥalkhadäkqinarg /baḥaneḥ/ ".
69:25: Va amma shen zhayna shega ärru (khartsḥara) küyga dellarg‚ tso er ma du: "Ehx! I san zhayna söga ma delleḥara!
69:26: I san /ch'oġa suna düḥal dolu/ ḥesap khuush tsa khilleḥara so.
69:27: Ehx! I san /dünenaḥ/ valar khilleḥara t'äkhḥara‚ /so yukha den tsa vesh/.
69:28: So k'elḥar tsa väkqi san bakhamo.
69:29: Hxallakkhili sögara san dolaḥ mel khillarg (san üyrash a, san ḥal a)".
69:30: /Delan omra doġur du/: "Sḥalatsa iza! Dʿavekhka iza!
69:32: T'akqa shen yakhalla quztq'e itt dol yolchu zʿenakh vikhkina, dʿalalla iza".
69:33: Bakq'alla a, iza vatsara siylaḥ-vokqachu Delakh teshash.
69:34: Miskachunna daa hxuma dala /qecharna/ dagadoüytush vatsara iza.
69:35: Vats tsunna takhana quzaḥ tsḥa a dottaġ.
69:38: Hxan-hxa! As duy bou shuna gush dolchukh,
69:40: bakq'alla a, iza siylaḥchu elchanan dosh ma du (Delera tso düytsush).
69:41: Shaʿiran dosh ma dats iza‚ k'ezzig du-q shu teshash derg.
69:42: Bozbuunchin dosh a ma dats iza‚ k'ezzig du-q ash oyla esh derg.
69:44: Tso Tkhokh älleḥara tsḥatstsa (Okha älla dotsu) deshnash,
69:45: Okha sḥalätsna khir vara iza ättu (baq'aḥara) küyga‚
69:46: T'akqa khadiyna khir bara tsünan degan pkha.
69:47: Shukh tsḥa a khir ma vatsara, tsunakh iza dukhatukhush.
69:48: Bakq'alla a, iza (Q'urʾan) ḥekham bu-q /Delakh/ qörush bolcharna.
69:49: Bakq'alla a, Tkho khuush du-q shukh /din/ khartsdesh bersh buyla.
69:50: Bakq'alla a, iza (Q'urʾan) ġayġa yu-q tsateshacharna. (Tsünga iyman dillincharna khir dolu niʿmatash gina poshme khir bu kerstanash q'ematdiynaḥ).
69:52: Siylaḥ-vokqachu ḥuo qiosh-qobush volchu ḥan Delan ts'e khastae! (Masso a vochu sibatekh ts'anve Iza).
70:1: Diykhira tsḥana dökhucho doġur dolu ʿazap.
70:3: Delera /ʿazap/ du iza‚ Shen /malikashna ḥaladovla/ kenzash yolchu.
70:4: Ḥaladovlu malikash a‚ Sa (Dzhibril-malik) a Iza volchu‚ shen baram /nakhana gergaḥ/ shovztq'e itt ezar sho dolchu diynaḥ.
70:5: Aḥ khazachu sobartsa sobar delaḥ /hxay Muḥammad, tsu kerstanasha, ḥo siysazvan ġertash, düytsuchunna t'eḥ/.
70:6: Bakq'alla a, tsarna iza (Delan ʿazap) gush du genaḥ‚
70:8: Otsu diynaḥ stigal khir yu, laliyna ts'esta sanna.
70:9: Lämnash khir du /bezhnashna t'era sḥayakqina/, ts'oka sanna.
70:10: /Otsu diynaḥ/ dottaġcho dottaġchukh khottur ma dats /shen bāla sovbalarna/–
70:11: Üsh vovshashna goytush khir ma bu /hxette a khöttur dats tsara vovshekh/. Luur du q'inosh dinchunna otsu diynaḥ ʿazapakh k'elḥarvala, shen k'entiy dʿabella a‚
70:12: shen zuda a‚ shen vasha a /dʿavella a/‚
70:13: sha t'elätsna khilla dolu shen taypa a /dʿadella a/‚
70:14: masso a lättaḥ mel verg a /dʿavella a/, t'akqa k'elḥarvala /luur dara tsunna/.
70:15: Hxan-hxa! Bakq'alla a, iza (zhözhakhati) ālu lepa ts'e yu.
70:16: Sḥaozor dolush du tso körtan chq'or.
70:17: T'eqoyqur vu tso sha /Dela tsḥaʾ varkh/ yukhavällarg a‚ /iymanakh/ dʿaveddarg a,
70:18: guldinarg /dünenaḥ däkhni, ḥanal-ḥaram tsa q'estosh/, t'akqa i dʿadillinarg a /Delan a, nekhan a ḥaq' dʿa tsa lush/.
70:19: Adam qölina du /bāla beʾcha/ sobar dotsush, /Delan niʿmatashna/ shukur dotsush.
70:20: Shekh tsadezarg (peq'aralla, tsamgar, qeram) ʿottadelcha, nütsq'ala sobarkh dolush (masso a dikanakh dog düllush),
70:21: shekh dikanig ʿottadelcha, nütsq'ala pis khülush /saġa dalar‚ dikachu aġor kharzh yar a tsa dezash/,
70:25: /saġa/ dökhuchunna a‚ shegaḥ hxumma a dotschunna a (saġa tsa dökhuchunna a);
70:28: bakq'alla a, üsh Qiosh-Qobush volchu tseran Delan ʿazap teshame dats /mülkhachu khenaḥ dan tarlo/ -
70:29: shäsh shayn eḥe mezhenash larʾesh bersh
70:30: shayn zudariy botsucharakh a‚ shayn ättu küygo doladina zudariy botsucharakh a. Otsärgaḥ üsh bekhke bats.
70:31: Tsul t'ekhbevllarsh – üsh /Delan/ dozanekh bevllarsh bu.
70:32: Shäsh shayna bina tesham a‚ shäsh yina vaʿda a qochushʾesh bersh;
70:33: shäsh shayn teshallina t'eḥ lättash bersh;
70:35: üsh /yalsamanin/ boshmashkaḥ khir bu, shaykh siydina.
70:36: Hxun khilla tsateshnacharna – ḥuna (hxay Muḥammad) ḥalkha dʿasaüdush bolcharna‚
70:37: /ḥuna/ ättu aġorḥa‚ ärru aġorḥa a tobanash esh bolchu /busalbanekh tsa beshash, vovshashka düytsush bolchu: hxorsh yalsamane ġaḥ‚ vay tsaral ḥalkha ġur du/?
70:38: Luush vuy te tsarakh hxor stag sha niʿmatiyn yalsamane vakhiyta?
70:39: Hxan-hxa! Bakq'alla a, Okha üsh qöllira tsarna khuuchukh /t'adamakh, kurabovla tsa öshura tsarna/.
70:40: Hxan-hxa! As duy bou malkhbaliyn a‚ malkhbuziyn a qiosh-qobuchu Delakh: bakq'alla a, Tkho nitsq' bolush du-q
70:41: /üsh/ khiytsa tsaral dikachärtsa‚ /tsu t'eḥ/ tkhol ḥalkhaver vats /tsḥa a/.
70:42: Bita üsh /shayn tilarchoḥ/ dʿasaida a‚ lovza a, shayn vaʿda yina yolchu /q'emat/ denna düḥalqettalts.
70:43: Otsu diynaḥ üsh arabevr bu keshnash chüra, sikhbevlla, shäsh /ḥalkha shäsh ʿibadat desh khilla bolu/ t'ulgashna t'e bovdush sanna‚
70:44: shayn bʿärgash oḥatökhna. Siysazalla qüur yu tsarakh. I de du-q, tsarna khir du älla, vaʿda yina khillarg!
71:1: Bakq'alla a, Okha vakhiytira shen q'omana t'e Nuḥ: "Qeram tasa ḥayn q'omana tsunna t'e lazosh dolu ʿazap dale"‚ – älla.
71:2: Tso elira: "Hxay san q'am! Bakq'alla a, so shuna /vaiytina/ bilgala volu qeramcha vu-q:
71:3: Dalla ʿibadat de‚ Tsunakh qera‚ suna müt'aḥ khila!
71:4: /T'akqa/ Tso gechdiyr du shuna shun q'inosh‚ t'äḥatottur du shu /ʿazap tsa desh/ tsḥana tökhnachu khanna – ʿozhalla t'eqachchalts. Bakq'alla a, Delan ʿozhalla, sha eʾcha, t'äḥatottur yats‚ shu khuush khilleḥ".
71:5: Tso (Nuḥas sha duqa q'aḥegnachul t'äḥa, nakha din t'e tsa lotsush, gattavelcha) elira: "So qiosh-qobush volu san Dela‚ bakq'alla a, as qayqiyra /din/ sayn q'ome busa a‚ diynaḥ a.
71:6: Amma san qayqamo üsh /dinakh/ bovdar ben alsam tsa däkqi.
71:7: Bakq'alla a, as üsh mel qayqi Ḥöga shayna gechdan‚ tsara shayn p'elgash shayn lergash chudükhkura /san qayqar shayna tsa khaziytarḥama/‚ shayn bedarshtsa shayn kortosh ḥuldora /tsa khaziytarḥama/‚ üsh ch'aġbelira /shayn q'inosh t'eḥ/‚ kurabevlira kurabovlartsa.
71:8: T'akqa as tsärga qayqira ch'oġa (tsa qörush, az aydina).
71:9: T'akqa, bakq'alla a, as tsärga qayqira guchoḥ, as qayqira tsärga q'aylakha.
71:10: As olura: "Gechdar dekha shäsh qiosh-qobush volchu Dele‚ bakq'alla a, Iza khilla duqa gechdiyrig.
71:11: Tso stigal yoüytur yu shuna alsam /doġantsa/.
71:12: Tso ġo diyr du shuna ḥolatsa‚ k'entashtsa‚ khülüytur yu shuna boshmash‚ khülüytur du shuna khish-tatolash.
71:13: Shuna hxun khilla? Hxunda dog tsa dokhu ash Dele /Iza/ lerartsa?
71:14: Tso qöllina shu darzhatsa (ḥalkha t'adam‚ t'akqa ts'iyn ulkh khülush‚ t'akqa – däʿakhk khülush‚ t'akqa tsunna t'e zhizhig latosh…).
71:15: Shuna tsa gina‚ mukha qöllira Dala t'ett'a vorhx stigal?
71:16: Tso khiliytira butt tsarna choḥ, nur khilla‚ Tso khiliytira malkh, chirq khilla.
71:17: Dala shu sḥadovliytira lättakh oramat /sanna qüush/. (Ādam lättakh qöllira).
71:18: T'akqa Tso shu yukha dʿaderzor du tsünga (lätte)‚ aradokhur du /lätta chüra/ aradakhartsa /q'ematdiynaḥ/.
71:19: Dala khiliytina shuna latta, /dʿabarzhiyna/ kuz sanna
71:20: shu tsunna t'ekhula leliytarḥama, shayna shüyra neq'ash lötsush".
71:21: Nuḥas elira: "So qiosh-qobush volu san Dela‚ bakq'alla a, tsara suna ʿesalla yi‚ üsh t'äḥahxitti shen bakhamo a‚ shen dözalo a shayna eshalla ben sov tsa yakqinchunna.
71:23: tsara elira: "Ma bitalash shayn delanash a‚ ma vitalash Vadda a‚ Suvaʿ a‚ Yaġus a‚ Yaʿuq' a‚ Nasr a!"
71:24: /Nuḥas doʿa dira/: "Tsara tiliyra duqakhbersh‚ zulamkhoy sov ma bakhalaḥ tilartsiy ben".
71:25: Shayn ġalatekh (q'inoykh) üsh khi chu bakhiytira‚ t'akqa ts'erga bakhiytira‚ tsarna tsa kariyra Dela votsurg ġönchiy.
71:26: Nuḥas elira: "So qiosh-qobush volu san Dela‚ Aḥ ma vitalaḥ lätta t'eḥ tsateshacharakh tsḥa a ts'a choḥ vekhash verg.
71:27: Bakq'alla a, Aḥ üsh bitaḥ, tsara Ḥan lesh tilor bu‚ tsara dünena vokqur vats q'inosh desh verg‚ t'ekh tsa teshash verg ben.
71:28: So qiosh-qobush volu san Dela‚ Aḥ gechdelaḥ suna a‚ san dena-nanna a‚ iyman dillina san ts'a chu vällachunna a‚ muʾma bozharshna a‚ muʾma zudarshna a‚ Aḥ sov ma bakhalaḥ zulamkhoy, hxallakbartsiy ben!"
72:1: Aḥ āla /hxay elcha, ḥan q'ome/: "Söga väḥitsa khaiytina: "Ladüyġira /Q'urʾane/ zhiniyn tsḥana tobano‚ t'akqa tsara elira: "Bakq'alla a, tkhuna khezira tsḥa tamashe deshar !
72:2: Tso (Q'urʾano) nisvo niysachu novq'a‚ tkho tsunakh tiyshira‚ okha latsanne a lotsur vats tkhäsh qiosh-qobush volchu Delatsa tsḥa a naq'ost.
72:3: Bakq'alla a, laqadeli tkho qiosh-qobush volchu Delan vozalla – tsa letsi Tso zuda-naq'ost a‚ dözalkho a.
72:4: Bakq'alla a, khili tkhan ʿovdalnig olush Dalla t'eḥ k'orggera khartsderg.
72:5: Tkhuna möttura tsq'a a er dats adamo a‚ zhino a Dalla t'eḥ khartsderg.
72:6: Adamiyn tsḥa bozhariy bara larlush zhiniyn bozharshtsa (tsärgara ġo lötsush) – tsara sovbekhira üsh tilartsa (Delan dozanekh bovlartsa).
72:7: Bakq'alla a, tsarna möttura shuna möttush khillarg: "Tsq'a a Dala tsḥa a denviyr vats"‚ – älla.
72:8: /Zhinasha elira/: "Tkho ḥaqadelira stigalakh‚ tkhuna iza kariyra nütsq'alchu ġarolekh‚ ts'e tukhuchu sedarchekh yuzzina.
72:9: Tkho khilira tsigaḥ oḥakhuush ladoġaran oḥakhaarna. Laduġush volchunna hxintsa karor shena k'elo yina ʿash bolu ts'e tukhu seda.
72:10: Tkhuna khaats‚ vonig luush du lättaḥ bolcharna ya üsh qiosh-qobush volu Dela tsarna niysa neq' luush vu.
72:11: Tkhokh dikanash a du‚ tkhokh üsh dotsursh a du‚ tkho khilira tayp-taypana neq'enash.
72:12: Tkhuna khiira: tkhan tsq'a a nitsq' qochur bats Dela (-n omranakh dovla) lättaḥ a‚ tkhan tsq'a a nitsq' qochur bats devdda k'elḥardovla a.
72:13: Tkhuna niysa neq' (Q'urʾan) khezcha‚ tkho Tsunakh (Delakh) tiyshira. Sha qiosh-qobush volchu shen Delakh teshash verg – qörur vats shen mela esharkh a‚ zulam khilarkh a /q'a sov dälla/.
72:14: Bakq'alla a, tkhokh /Dalla/ müt'aḥ dersh a du‚ tkhokh /baq'dolchukh/ dʿadirzinarsh a du. Tq'a shäsh /Dalla/ müt'aḥ khillarsh – dikachunna t'e /niysachu novq'a/ nisbella.
72:15: Amma baq'bolchu neq'akh dʿabirzinarsh – tsarakh khili zhözhakhatina yagorig".
72:16: Üsh nisbelleḥara /islaman/ novq'a, Okha malor dara tsarna shortta khi (öshuchu khenaḥ shortta doġa doüytur dara Okha tsarna)‚
72:17: Tsüntsa üsh zerḥama. Sha qiosh-qobush volu shen Dela ḥekhorakh dʿavörzush verg – Tso vokhüytur vu i lan khala dolchu ʿazapa chu.
72:18: Bakq'alla a, mäzhdigash Delan du – ash ma qayqa Delatsa tsḥa a!
72:19: Bakq'alla a, Delan lay (Muḥammad) dʿahxötticha Tsünga qoyqush, üsh (busalba zhinash) disira, t'ett'a tsunna t'e guldella /ladoġa luush/.
72:20: Aḥ āla /tsu kerstanashka, hxay Muḥammad/: "Bakq'alla a, as qoyqu so qiosh-qobush volchu sayn Dele‚ Tsüntsa tsḥa a naq'ost tsa lotsu as".
72:21: Aḥ āla: "Bakq'alla a, so vats san dolaḥ shuna zen dolush‚ niysa neq' bolush a".
72:22: Aḥ āla /hxay elcha/: "Bakq'alla a, so Delakh laror vats tsḥammo a‚ suna karor yats Iza votsurg vada mettig.
72:23: Delera derg a‚ Tsünan elchanallin derg a dʿaqachor ben /nakhe dats suna t'eḥ/. Dalla a‚ Tsünan elchanna a ʿesalla esh verg – bakq'alla a, tsunna zhözhakhatin ts'e khir yu‚ üsh tsu choḥ guttar lättash.
72:24: Shayna khir du älla vaʿda yinarg gallalts – t'akqa khuur du tsarna‚ mila vu vunō ledara ġönchiy khilartsa‚ vunō k'ezig nitsq' khilartsa.
72:25: Aḥ āla /tsu mushrikashka, hxay elcha/: "Suna khaats‚ gerga du i shuna khir du älla vaʿda yinarg, ya so qiosh-qobush volchu san Dala tsunna khan tökhna‚
72:26: q'ayle khuurg /vu Iza/‚ Tso tsa qiavo Shen q'aylenna t'e tsḥa a,
72:27: elchanekh Sha /shena/ rezakhillarg votsurg. T'akqa, bakq'alla a, Tso lölüytu elchanna ḥalkhakhula a‚ t'eḥakhula a /iza zhinekh a, shayt'anan vasvasallakh a ʿalashvesh malikiyn/ tergaman toba.
72:28: Shena (elchanna) khaiyta tsara (ḥalkha khillachu) elchanasha) dʿaqachiyna duyla shäsh qiosh-qobush volchu shayn Delan elchanalla. Tsärgaḥ derg qochchush khuush vu Iza‚ hxor hxuma dagaryina Tso baramtsa".
73:2: Ġatta busa‚ tsḥa k'ezzig /büysa/ yitiy /ḥayna sadaʿa/.
73:3: Tsünan akh /yita/‚ ya tsunakh tsḥa k'ezzig eshae.
73:4: Ya t'etokha tsunna. Q'urʾan desha (mellasha, khazachu) deshartsa.
73:5: Okha düḥaltukhur du ḥuna deza dosh.
73:6: Bakq'alla a, büysanan khan eza yu (lamaz dechunna)‚ vunō bilgal yu dashtsa.
73:7: Bakq'alla a, ḥuna /dan/ diynaḥ dekhkha ġullaqash du (Q'urʾan desha muq'a tsa volu ḥo).
73:8: Ḥekhae ḥuo Qiosh-Qobush volchun /Delan/ ts'e. /Dünenan ġullaqekh/ khada Tsunna (Dala) ʿibadat dartsa, (dog ts'ena) khadartsa.
73:9: Malkhbalin a‚ malkhbuzen a Qiosh-Qoburg vu Iza‚ vats qin dela Iza votsurg‚ latsa Tsunakh /ḥayna/ vekal (t'etovzha ġöncha).
73:10: Sobare khila tsara (Makkin kerstanasha) oluchunna t'eḥ‚ bita üsh khazachu kepara. /Duqa bekhkash tsa bokhush, tsatam tsa besh/.
73:11: Vita So a‚ i shaygaḥ niʿmatash dolu /din/ khartsdesh bersh a‚ sobar de tsärtsa tsḥa k'ezzig.
73:12: Bakq'alla a, Tkhögaḥ burzhalsh a du‚ /zhözhakhatin/ ts'e a yu.
73:13: Loga choḥ düsur dolu daar a du‚ lazosh dolu ʿazap a du.
73:14: Otsu /q'emat/diynaḥ latta a‚ lämnash a degalur du‚ lämnekh khir bu ʿenash bolu ġamaran barz.
73:15: Bakq'alla a, Okha vaiytina shüga elcha /Muḥammad/ shuna t'eḥ tesh khilla‚ Okha Firʿavne a elcha /Musa/ vakhiytarkh terra.
73:16: Firʿavn ʿesa khilira elchanna – t'akqa Okha iza sḥaletsira ch'oġachu sḥalatsartsa.
73:17: Shu mukha k'elḥardovlur du /hxay q'urayshiyn toba/, ash kerstanalla dicha, sha berash q'ezhbiyr bolchu (q'emat) diynakh (tsünan ʿazapakh)? –
73:18: Stigal et'ar yu /otsu diynan erchallakh/. Tsünan (Delan) vaʿda qochushkhilla.
73:19: Bakq'alla a, hxara ḥekham bu. Shena luucho shen Qiosh-Qobuchünga neq' sḥalotsur bu /tsunakh/.
73:20: Bakq'alla a, ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchunna khuush du ḥo büysanan qa dèq'an shina dèq'al k'ezzig yolchu zamanchoḥ ġättina /Shena ʿamal yesh/ vuyla‚ tsünan akh zamanchoḥ‚ qa dèq'an tsḥa dáq'a zamanchoḥ a‚ ḥötsa bolcharakh tsḥa toba yu, /ishtta busa ġättina, ʿamal yesh – iza a khäa Dalla/. Dála baram bina büysanan a‚ diynan a. Tsunna khii shuna /errig büysa ya tsunakh duqakhʾerg ʿibadat dartsa denʾyan/ megar dotsiyla, /hxintsa/ gechdina Tso shuna – desha Q'urʾanakh shayna atta derg /busa/. Tsunna (Dalla) khii‚ shukh khir vu tsomgushnig‚ qibersh lättakhula bevlla lelash bu Delan niʿmat lökhush (shayna ritsq' tardesh)‚ /tsḥa/ qibersh Delan novq'aḥ t'om besh bu – desha tsunakh (Q'urʾanakh) shayna atta derg. Hxottade lamaz‚ dʿalo zakat‚ ash dʿalo Dalla khaza deqar /yukhalurg/. Ash shayna ḥalkhadäkqina dikanig shuna iza karor du Dalla gergaḥ dikanig a‚ siylaḥ-eza yal a khilla. Dele gechdar dēkha. Bakq'alla a, Dela t'ekh gechdiyrig a vu‚ q'inkhetame verg a vu.
74:6: Ma lo hxuma, ḥayna /tsunakh/ alssam t'eqiar lökhush.
74:11: Vita So a i As qöllinarg a tkhäsh.
74:12: As khiliytira tsunna shortta däkhni a‚
74:13: K'entiy a, shäsh tsüntsa tsḥäna /guttar/ lättash.
74:14: As ätto bira tsunna /khaza/ ätto bartsa.
74:15: T'akqa a liira tsunna As sovdakqa /shen ḥal/.
74:16: Hxan-hxa! Bakq'alla a, iza khilira Tkhan ayatashna düḥal.
74:17: As t'eyullur yu tsunna irkho (ʿazapan moḥ).
74:18: Bakq'alla a, tso oyla yora‚ ḥesap a dora.
74:20: T'akqa a hxallaqilarg! Mukha dora tso ḥesap?
74:24: Tso elira: "Hxara (Muḥammada düytsurg) dekq'a bozbuunchalla du /ḥalkha düyna dayshkara/ sḥadoġush dolu.
74:26: As vagor vu iza saq'aran /zhözhakhati/ choḥ.
74:27: Ḥan khaiytina ḥuna /hxay Muḥammad/‚ hxun yu i saq'ar?
74:28: Bukha a tsa vütu tso‚ dʿa a tsa tosu,
74:31: Zhözhakhatina t'ehxöttina bersh Okha malikash ben tsa khiliytina. Tseran dagardar tsa khiliytina Okha dekq'a tsateshacharna pitanna ben a‚ zhaynin ohxlana i baq' duyla khaiytarḥama a‚ /Delakh/ teshash bersh iymantsa sovbakharḥama a‚ sheko tsa yaytarḥama zhaynin ohxlane a‚ muʾma nakhe a; shayn degnashkaḥ tsamgar yolchärga a‚ tsateshachärga a aliytarḥama: "Hxun liʾna teḥa Dalla, hxoqüntsa masal a daliyna?" Ishtta tilavala vütu Dala Shena luurg‚ nisvo Shena luurg. Ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchun eskar khuur dats Tsunna Shena ben. Iza bekq'a ḥekham bu-q adamashna.
74:33: büysanakh duy bou, i t'äḥayakhanchu khenaḥ;
74:34: satasarkh duy bou, i guchudällachu khenaḥ:
74:35: bakq'alla a, iza (saq'ar olu zhözhakhati) uggar bakqiycharakh tsḥa bala bu,
74:37: Shukh shen luuchunna /dikanna/ ḥalkhavala a‚ /vochunna/ t'äḥavisa a.
74:38: Masso a sa sha karadinchüntsa zaq'alt du
74:43: Tsara (tsu zhözhakhate bakhanchara) er du: "Tkho tsa khilira lamazash decharakh,
74:44: tkho tsa khilira, miskacharna hxuma daosh.
74:45: Dässa khabarsh düytsuchärtsa /dässa/ khabarsh düytsush khilira tkho‚
74:48: Payda biyr bats tsarna shapaʿat decheran shapaʿato.
74:49: Hxun du tsarna üsh ḥekhamakh dʿaberza?
74:52: Hxette a, tsarakh masso a vu luush shega loyla sḥadillina zhaynash.
74:54: Hxan-hxa! Bakq'alla a, iza /Q'urʾan/ ḥekham bu,
74:56: Dalla laaḥ ben, tsara t'elotsur-m bats. Iza vu /Shekh/ qeraran ohxla‚ Iza vu /Sha/ gechdaran ohxla.
75:2: Hxan-hxa! Duy bou As duqa bekhkash bokhuchu sinakh.
75:3: Adamna möttu te Okha yanne a gulyiyr yats shen däʿakhkash?
75:4: Hxaʾ! Nitsq' bolush du /Tkho/ tsünan p'elgash /guldina‚ vovshakhtökhna/ dʿanisdan.
75:5: Hxette a‚ luu adamna q'inosh dan /i q'ematde khartsdartsa/ shen ḥalkha /yisinchu zamanchoḥ/.
75:6: Khottu tso /q'inosh dinchu kersta adamo, tsa veshash/: "Matsa khir du i q'ematde?" –
75:8: Butt lätscha /shen nur dʿadäḥna‚ boda khilcha/.
75:10: Er du adamo otsu /q'emat/diynaḥ: "Michaḥ yu dʿavada mettig?"
75:12: Ḥuo Qiosh-Qobuchunna t'e yu otsu diynaḥ dʿanisvala mettig.
75:13: Dʿadüytsur du otsu diynaḥ adame tso ḥalkhadäkqinarg a‚ tso t'äḥatettinarg a.
75:14: Hxette a, adam sha shena t'eḥ tesh khir du-q (masso a mezheno teshalla diyr du sha dinachunna t'eḥ).
75:15: Shen bekhkazlonash tso mel yaliycha a /q'obalyiyr yats üsh/.
75:16: Ḥan mott ma ḥavzabe /Dzhabrail-maliko ḥayga Q'urʾanan ayatash döshuchu khenaḥ/ tsüntsa sikhvalarḥama /ḥayna dagaḥ tsadisarna qörush, hxay Muḥammad/.
75:17: Bakq'alla a, Tkhuna t'eḥ du iza guldar a /ḥan dag choḥ/‚ iza deshiytar a /ḥan mattatsa/.
75:18: Okha iza döshush, t'äḥahxotta tsünan desharna.
75:19: T'akqa Tkhuna t'eḥ du iza bilgaldakqar a.
75:20: Hxan-hxa (dats i kerstanashna ma möttu)! Hxette a, shu ma dezash du sikhanig.
75:22: Tsḥa yakhḥash khir yu otsu diynaḥ eqaella‚
75:24: Tsḥa /qin/ yakhḥash khir yu otsu diynaḥ markhaella
75:25: shayna t'eḥ bokqa nitsq' bina ḥuna khetalush.
75:26: Hxan-hxa! /Sa oziyna dokqush/ i loge qächcha, /tso saüyzush/,
75:30: Ḥuo Qiosh-Qobuchünga khir du otsu diynaḥ /nakh/ dʿalakhkar /shäsh yinchu ʿamalkh beqam etsa/.
75:31: Baq' tsa dora / kersta adamo hxara din/‚ lamaz a tsa dora.
75:33: T'akqa shen dözalna t'e vödura, kuravolush.
75:34: Ma bāla bu ḥuna‚ ma bāla bu!
75:35: T'akqa a ma bāla bu ḥuna‚ ma bāla bu!
75:36: Möttush du te adamna sha erna dütur du /dendina, bart tsa khottush /?
75:37: Iza (adam) datsara tq'a /khilla/ t'adamakh (zudchun beran ts'achu qetnachu stegan khikh)?
75:38: T'akqa duq'adella ts'iy khilira tsunakh. T'akqa Tso qöllira /tsunakh adam/‚ nisvira iza /shen mezhenashtsa/.
75:39: T'akqa tsunakh Tso khiliytira shiʾ: börsha stag a‚ zuda a.
75:40: Tq'a I /Dela, Sha tsu kepara tamashe hxumanash qöllinarg/ nitsq' qochush vats bellarsh denban? /Vu, Delora!/
76:1: Eariy tq'a adamna t'e zamanan tsḥa kirtig, i sha ḥekho hxuma a yotsush?
76:2: Bakq'alla a, Okha qöllira adam iynachu t'adamakh‚ Okha iza züysh vu /t'e deqarsh dakhkartsa‚ bālanash qissartsa/. T'akqa khiliytira iza khezash a‚ gush a.
76:3: Bakq'alla a, Okha iza nisvira novq'a: ya tso barkalla olush‚ ya kerstadesh.
76:4: Bakq'alla a, Okha kechyina tsateshacharna zʿenash a‚ burzhalsh a‚/zhözhakhatin/ ts'e a.
76:5: Bakq'alla /Dala bokhurg desh/ dika khillachara mer du keda chüra /khaza malarsh/, shekh kafur (khaza ḥozha yoġu hxuma) tökhna dolu.
76:6: Shovdanan khi müylur du Delan lesha‚ shäsh i sḥadokqush /shayna luuchoḥ/ shortta sḥadakqartsa.
76:7: Üsh qochushdesh bu /Dalla ʿibadat dan/ della dosh‚ üsh qörush bu /q'emat/ diynakh‚ shen von ch'oġa därzhina khillachu.
76:8: Tsara daado daar, shayna dezzasheḥ, miskachunna a‚ boberana a‚ yiysarna a,
76:9: /shäsh olush/: "Okha daado shuna Delan yuḥana (Delan düḥa)‚ tkhuna tsa öshu shügara beqam a‚ barkalla a.
76:10: Bakq'alla a, tkho qöru tkhan Qiosh-Qobuchüngara yakhḥash ch'oġa khebar yolchu diynakh".
76:11: Dala lariyra üsh otsu diynan vonakh‚ dillira /tseran yakhḥash t'e/ boslepar a‚ khazakhetar a.
76:12: Beqam bira tsarna shäsh /Dalla yechu ʿamalna t'eḥ/ sobar darna beshtsiy‚ daritsiy.
76:13: Tsigaḥ üsh ʿiyr bu mänganash t'etevzhina. Tsarna gur bats tsigaḥ malkh a‚ shelo a‚
76:14: gergaḥ khülush tsarna /tsu beshan/ ʿindaġa‚ oḥaqevdina khir bu tsünan stömash oḥaqovdarkh (ätto khülush shäsh bākha irahxöttina volchunna a‚ oḥakhiʾna volchunna a‚ vizhna volchunna a).
76:15: Tsarna t'eḥiyzor bu dato pḥeġitsa‚ choḥ sa guchu kedatsa /kegiy nakh/ –
76:16: Dato, choḥ sa guchu kedatsa (otsu t'eḥiyzachara ḥuna mala beġiyla yolchu kepara a, barameḥ a malar) dʿalush.
76:17: Tsigaḥ malor bu chaġaran kad‚ shekh zanzhabil tökhna bolu.
76:18: Tsigaḥ /malor du/ shovda‚ shekh salsabil olu.
76:19: Tsarna t'eḥiyzar bu q'an tsa lun kegirkhoy‚ ḥuna üsh gicha, dʿasadärzhina luʾluʾ du möttush.
76:20: Ḥo ḥäzhnachu khenaḥ‚ tsigaḥ ḥuna gur du niʿmatash a‚ dokqa /chakqe yotsush/ mulk (niʿmat, Dala ḥuna della dolu).
76:21: Tsarna t'edüykhina khir du dutq'achu bätstsarchu darin dukhar a‚ stommachu darin dukhar a‚ üsh khazbina khir bu dato ch'agarshtsa‚ üsh Qiosh-Qobucho tsarna malor du ts'ena malar a.
76:22: "Bakq'alla a, hxara khili shuna /khazachu/ beqamna /ash yina dika ʿamalsh baḥaneḥ/‚ shun /dünenaḥ/ q'aḥegar khili /hxintsa/ barkalle".
76:23: Bakq'alla a, Okha dossora ḥöga Q'urʾan /k'ez-k'ezzig/ dossortsa.
76:24: Ḥo sobare khila ḥuo Qiosh-Qobuchun ḥukmanna‚ ḥo müt'aḥ ma khila tsarakh q'inosh dechunna a‚ /din/ kersta dechunna.
76:25: Aḥ ḥekhae ḥuo Qiosh-Qobuchun ts'e ʿüyranna a‚ süyranna a.(Lamazash de, ʿibadat de Dalla).
76:26: Büysanakh a /tsḥana deq'eḥ/ suzhud de Tsunna‚ tasbiḥ a de Tsunna ekhkhachu büysanna. (Büysa denye Dalla ʿibadat dartsa).
76:27: Bakq'alla a, hxorsh duqadezash bu sikha cheqdän derg (düne)‚ dütu shayna t'eḥa deza (khala) de – /q'ematde/.
76:28: Okha qöllina üsh‚ ch'aġyina tseran mezhenash. Tkhuna liʾcha, Okha /üsh/ khüytsur bara tsarakh terachärtsa khiytsartsa.
76:29: Bakq'alla a, hxara ḥekham bu‚ shena luucho t'elätsna /iza/, sha Qiosh-Qobuchünga neq' bina.
76:30: Shuna luur dats, Dalla laaḥ ben. Bakq'alla a, Dela khili khuush verg a‚ ḥukma /niysa/ desh verg a.
76:31: Tso vokhüytu Shena luurg Shen q'inkhetamna chu. Tq'a zulamkhoy – tsarna Tso kechdina lazosh dolu ʿazap.
77:3: /doġa/ darzhochu mekhashekh /duy bou As/‚ /ya doġa daiyta markhash lokhkuchu malikekh/,
77:4: /baq'derg khartsdolchukh‚ ḥanal derg ḥaram dolchukh/ q'astochu /malikekh/ duy bou As‚
77:6: /Dalla nakha/ bekhk tsa billiytarna /shayga elchanash tsa bakhkiytira älla/ a‚ /Delera/ qeram tasartsa a /doüytu i väḥiy/:
77:7: bakq'alla a, shuna vaʿda yinarg khilaza tsa dolu /i q'ematde doġur du/.
77:11: elchanash /gulban teshalla dan/ khan tökhnachu khenaḥ.
77:14: Sten khaiytina ḥöga /hxay Muḥammad/‚ hxun du i q'astaman de?
77:15: Bokqa bāla khir bu otsu diynaḥ /din/ khartsdecharna.
77:16: Okha hxallak tsa bina ḥalkha khillarsh?
77:17: T'akqa tsarna t'äḥabokhüytur bu Okha t'äḥakhillarsh.
77:18: Ishtta /taʿzar/ diyr du Okha q'inosh letocharna.
77:19: Bokqa bāla khir bu otsu diynaḥ /din/ khartsdecharna.
77:20: Okha tsa qöllina shu hxumma a yotschu khikh?
77:21: T'akqa Okha dʿa ma nisdira iza ch'oġachu mettigeḥ.
77:23: Okha dʿanisdira‚ dika dʿanisdiyrash a du /Tkho/.
77:24: Bokqa bāla khir bu otsu diynaḥ /din/ khartsdecharna.
77:25: Okha tsa khiliytira latta /shuna/ dʿatardala mettig khila,
77:27: Okha khiliytira tsunna (lättana) t'eḥ leqa lämnash‚ shuna malora teza khi (khaza cham bolu, deġana tome dolu khi).
77:28: Bokqa bāla khir bu otsu diynaḥ /din/ khartsdecharna.
77:29: /Er du malikasha/: "Dʿaġo /hxintsa/ shäsh sha khartsdesh khillachunna (zhözhakhatin ʿazapna) t'e!
77:30: Dʿaġo shen qo dāq'a dolchu ʿindaġe!"
77:31: ʿindaġa a khir dats /tsunakh/‚ ts'erakh a lardiyr dats tso.
77:32: Bakq'alla a, tso suynash qüssur du, ġalanash sanna (dakqiy)‚
77:34: Bokqa bāla khir bu otsu diynaḥ /din/ khartsdecharna!
77:35: I du – üsh bist khir botsu de.
77:36: Tsarna purba lur dats t'akqa tsara bekhkazlonash yan.
77:37: Bokqa bāla khir bu otsu diynaḥ /din/ khartsdecharna!
77:38: Iza q'astaman de du. Okha guldiyr du shu a‚ ḥalkharnash a.
77:39: Shayna tsḥa mekarlo khilleḥ‚ ye Suna /shayn/ mekarlo!
77:40: Bokqa bāla khir bu otsu diynaḥ /din/ khartsdecharna!
77:41: Bakq'alla a, /Delakh/ qörush bersh – üsh khir bu ʿindaġeḥ a‚ shovdanashkaḥ a‚
77:43: Ġoza daa‚ ġoza mala, shäsh ʿamal yina ma khilla!
77:45: Bokqa bāla khir bu otsu diynaḥ /din/ khartsdecharna!
77:46: Daa‚ k'ezzig payda etsa /dünenaḥ/: bakq'alla a, shu q'inosh dinarsh du-q!
77:47: Bokqa bāla khir bu otsu diynaḥ /din/ khartsdecharna!
77:48: Tsärga älcha: "Gora ġo /lamaz de/!" – üsh gora tsa ġora.
