77:49: Bokqa bāla khir bu otsu diynaḥ /din/ khartsdecharna!
77:50: Mülkhachu diytsarkh tsul t'äḥa üsh teshar bu?
78:3: Shäsh tsu choḥ khilpalo yolush dolchu.
78:5: T'akqa a hxan-hxa! T'äḥa khuur du tsarna!
78:6: Okha tsa dina latta, mott khilla ?
78:8: Okha qöllina shu shishsha (börsha a‚ sten a).
78:9: Okha khiliytina shun nab, sadaʿar khilla.
78:11: Okha khiliytina de, dakhar khilla /shayn ḥashtash qochushdan/
78:12: Okha yöġna shuna t'ekhula vorhx ch'oġa /stigal/‚
78:14: Okha daiytina ʿävdash yolchu markhashna yukq'era duttush dolu khi (doġa).
78:15: Tsüntsa Okha sḥabakqarḥama bürtig a‚ oramat a‚
78:17: Bakq'alla a, q'astaman de khilla khan tökhna.
78:18: Otsu diynaḥ sur (Israfil-maliko zurma) loqur yu – shu doġur du tobanashtsa.
78:20: Dʿadiḥira lämnash – /tsarakh/ disira shäsh khilla surt.
78:21: Bakq'alla a, zhözhakhati khilira k'elonna yöġna (kerstanash chubakhkare ḥözhush)‚
78:23: Lättar bu üsh tsu choḥ dukqa a khenashkaḥ.
78:24: ʿovshur dats tsara tsu choḥ, shelo a‚ malar a,
78:27: Bakq'alla a, üsh khilira dog tsa dokhush /shäsh dinachun/ ḥesape.
78:28: Tsara khartsdora Tkhan ayatash t'ekh khartsdartsa.
78:29: Masso a hxuma dʿatergaldina Okha zhaynitsa!
78:30: ʿovsha shayna! Sovdokqur dats Okha shuna ʿazap ben.
78:31: Bakq'alla a, /Delakh/ qörucharna tola mettig ma yu /yalsamani choḥ/.
78:33: /Tsarna/ naqosh gorga dolu‚ sherashtsa tsḥaniysa bolu mekhkariy /khir bu/.
78:35: Tsarna khezar dats tsu choḥ dässa khabar a‚ khartsderg a.
78:36: Beqam bu /iza/ ḥo Qiosh-Qobuchüngara‚ sovġat a‚ ḥesap a /Tsüngara/ khilla,
78:37: Stigaliyn a‚ lättan a tsarna yukq'eḥ mel dolchun a Qiosh-Qobuchüngara, Sha sov q'inkhetame volchüngara. Tsüngara khabar diytsaran doladiyr dats tsara.
78:38: Otsu diynaḥ dʿahxuttur du Sa a‚ malikash a moġareḥ. Vist khir vats shena Sov Q'inkhetame volcho purba dellarg ben – tso a er du baq'derg.
78:39: Iza ḥaq'-baq' dolu de du. Shena liʾnacho sḥalätsna shen Qiosh-Qobuchünga dʿaverzaran neq'.
78:40: 40. Bakq'alla a, Okha qeram tesna shuna gergaḥ dolchu ʿazaptsa – otsu diynaḥ adam ḥozhur du shen shina küygo ḥalkhadäkqinchünga‚ er du kerstano: "Ehx! Sokh khilla belḥara poppar /-an chan/!"
79:1: Shäsh nütsq'ala /kerstaniyn sinosh/ sḥadokhuchu /malikekh/ duy bou As,
79:2: shäsh zhigara /muʾma nekhan sinosh/ sḥaötsuchu /malikekh/ duy bou As,
79:3: neka decharakh, neka dartsa, duy bou As,
79:4: sikhlush dolcharakh, sikhdalartsa, duy bou As,
79:5: /Delan/ omra shen-shen metta dʿadöq'ucharakh /malikekh/ a duy bou As:
79:9: Tseran ḥezhar /shayn ircha ḥal guchudälcha, siysazadälla/ oḥatäʿna khir du.
79:10: Olura tsara /dünenaḥ bolush, tsa beshash/: "Vay yukhaderzor du vay sḥadällachu /dakhare/
79:12: Olura tsara: "Iza hxeta paydabotsu yukhaderzar ma du".
79:13: Bakq'alla a, iza bekq'a tsḥa moḥ khir bu. (Israfil-maliko sur laqar).
79:14: Üsh berrige a /denbina/ latta t'eḥ khir bu.
79:16: Tsünga qayqira iza Qiosh-Qobucho T'uva ts'e yolchu ezachu ataġaḥ:
79:17: "ḥada, Firʿavnna t'e ġo‚ iza t'ekhvälla /Delan dozanekh/.
79:19: As nisviyr vu ḥo Qiosh-Qobuchunna t'e‚ t'akqa qörur vu ḥo /Tsünan ʿazapakh/".
79:20: Tso (Musas) gaytira tsünga dokqa delil (muʿzhizat‚ bozbuunchalla).
79:23: Tso gulbira /bozbuunchash a‚ shen bʿo a/‚ qayqira‚
79:24: t'akqa tso elira: "So vu vunō leqa volu, shu qiosh-qobush volu /shun dela/!"
79:25: Dala sḥaletsira iza t'äkhḥara /dosh baḥaneḥ/ taʿzartsiy‚ ḥalkha älla /dosh baḥaneḥ/ taʿzartsiy.
79:26: Bakq'alla a, tsu choḥ ḥekham ma bu /Delakh/ qörush volchunna.
79:27: Shu dara khala /Tsunna/ qolla ya stigal yara? Tso hxottiyna iza!
79:28: Tso aybira tsünan tkhov‚ t'akqa nisyira /tsḥa a gush ʿürg dotsush/.
79:29: Bodane yira tsünan büysa‚ sḥadäkqira satasar.
79:31: Sḥadäkqira tsunakh khi a‚ dezhiylash a.
79:33: Shuna a payda bolush‚ shun bezhnashna a.
79:35: Otsu diynaḥ adamna dagadoġur du sha q'aḥegnarg.
79:40: Amma sha Qiosh-Qobuchunna ḥalkha hxotta qörush khillarg‚ shen dezachukh (dünenan marzonakh) shen sa a dukhatökhnarg–
79:42: Ḥöga khöttu tsara /hxay Muḥammad, tsa beshash/ saḥtakh‚ matsa khir du iza hxottar bokhush.
79:45: Bakq'alla a, ḥo qeramcha vu tsunakh qörush volchunna.
79:46: Üsh iza shayna gush dolchu diynaḥ khir bu, shäsh /dünenaḥ/ tsḥa süyre ya tsḥa ʿüyre ben tsa yakqinarsh sanna.
80:3: Sten khoüytu ḥöga /hxay elcha/‚ iza-m ts'anvala a megiy?
80:4: Ya tso tergo yiyr yu /ḥekhamakh/ – tsu ḥekhamo tsunna payda biyr bu.
80:7: Ḥuna t'eḥ ma dats /q'a/, iza ts'an tsa velcha a.
80:10: aḥ iza tergal a tsa vo.
80:11: Hxan-hxa! /Ma lelade iza/ bakq'alla a, iza (Q'urʾan) ḥekham bu!
80:13: Siylaḥ dolchu zhaynashkaḥ bu iza (Lavḥ maḥfuza choḥ).
80:14: Shäsh aydina khilla dolchu /Dalla gergaḥ/‚ ts'andina khilla dolchu /zhaynashkaḥ/‚
80:15: /Delan a, Tsünan elchaniyn a yukq'eḥ/ elchanash khilla dolchu malikiyn küygashtsa /yazdina dolchu/‚
80:16: /Dalla gergaḥ/ siylaḥ dolchu, /Delakh qörush/ dika ʿamalsh yesh dolchu /malikiyn küygashtsa/.
80:17: Hxallakkhili adam! Ma kerstanalla dina tso Tsunna (ma barkalle tsa khili i Tsunna)!
80:18: Mülkhachu hxumanakh Tso (Dala) sha qöllina /khaiy tsunna/?
80:19: T'adamakh qöllina Tso iza‚ t'akqa Tso tsunna /masso a hxumantsa/ baram bina!
80:20: T'akqa Tso tsunna neq' atta bina.
80:21: T'akqa Tso iza valiytina‚ kash chuvilliytina.
80:22: T'akqa, Shena ma-liʾineḥ, Tso iza denviyr vu /q'ematdiynaḥ/.
80:23: Hxan-hxa! Tso (adamo) hxintsale qochush tsa dina shega /Dala/ omra dinarg.
80:25: Okha ma döttina /i stiglara/ khi (doġa) shortta dottartsa!
80:26: T'akqa Okha ma dadiyna i latta dadortsa.
80:27: Okha ma baliytina tsu choḥ bürtig‚
80:30: dukqa a dittash dolu boshmash a‚
80:32: Shuna a payda bolush‚ shun bezhnashna a payda bolush.
80:34: Otsu diynaḥ stag vodur vu shen veshikh‚
80:35: shen nenakh a‚ shen dekh a‚
80:36: shen zudchukh a‚ shen k'entekh a.
80:37: Otsarakh hxor stegan otsu diynaḥ ġullaq khir du sha ḥalkhavakqar.
80:38: Tsḥa yakhḥash otsu diynaḥ khir yu q'egina‚
80:40: Tsḥa /qin/ yakhḥash otsu diynaḥ khir yu shayna t'e chan yillina‚
81:7: sinosh /shayn dünenaḥ khillachu doġmash chu/ dʿaderziycha‚
81:8: diyna dolush /keshnash chu/ dʿadöllina khillachu zudabere khätticha,
81:9: hxun q'a baḥaneḥ iza diyna khilla älla,
81:10: /nekhan ʿamalsh t'eyazdina/ teptarsh dʿasadeq'cha (tsärga shayga dʿadelcha)‚
81:11: stigal /üstaġan ts'oka yokqush sanna sḥaözna/ dʿayakqicha‚
81:14: /I masso a hxuma khilcha, t'akqa/ sinna khuur du, sha hxun deana.
81:15: Hxan-hxa! Duy bou As diynaḥ ḥuldechu, büysanna guchudoluchu (q'egachu) sedarchekh.
81:16: /Mälkhatsa, battatsa/ dʿasalelash‚ t'akqa /malkh dʿabuzuchu khenaḥ/ q'ayladovlush dolchu sedarchekh a‚
81:19: bakq'alla a, iza (Q'urʾan) siylaḥ dolchu elchanan dosh ma du‚
81:20: nütsq'ala dolchu, Shegaḥ ʿarsh yolchun (Dalla) gergaḥ ch'oġa dolchu‚
81:21: /shena qin malikash/ müt'aḥ dolchu‚ tsigaḥ sha teshame dolchu.
81:22: Ma vats shun naq'ost (Muḥammad) zhinekh /tsḥabolchu kerstanashna ma möttu/.
81:23: Tsunna i (Dzhabrail-malik) ma gira serlayallachu anaḥ (stiglan araḥ).
81:24: Iza-m a vats shega q'aylakha (nakhana tsa gush dolu) doüytuchu väḥekh hxumma a eshadesh (nakhakh ḥuldesh‚ tsa düytsush).
81:25: I (Q'urʾan) ma dats /tsḥabolchu kerstanashna ma möttu/ shena neʿalt ällachu shayt'anan dosh.
81:26: Shu micha dölkhu /tsu Q'urʾanna inkarlo esh/?
81:29: Shuna luur-m dats, ʿalamiyn Da sha volchu Dalla tsa laaḥ.
82:3: hxordash /shayn yistosh dʿaevlla, vovshakhʾiyna/ tsḥa hxord khilcha‚
82:5: /t'akqa/ khuur du sinna, sha hxun ḥalkhadäkqi‚ hxun t'äḥatetti.
82:6: Hxay adam! Sten marzdina ḥuna ḥan siylaḥ Qiosh-Qobuchunna ʿesalla yan?
82:7: Ishtta vu Iza, Sha ḥo qöllina‚ t'akqa ḥo (adam) dʿanisdina (ḥan masso a mezhe niysa yolush, ḥo khezash, oyla esh, gush dolush), t'akqa /khazachu kütseḥ/ dʿatardina.
82:8: Shena luuchu sürteḥ Tso dʿahxotti ḥo.
82:9: Hxan-hxa! Shu khartsdesh ma du beqam khirg khilar /q'ematdiynaḥ/.
82:10: Bakq'alla a, shuna t'e hxittiyna lardarkhoy ma bu‚
82:13: Bakq'alla a, dika bersh /shena choḥ masso a hxuma dolu/ naʿim ts'e yolchu yalsamaneḥ khir bu.
82:14: Bakq'alla a, q'inosh desh bersh zhözhakhateḥ khir bu.
82:15: Tsu chu ġur bu üsh‚ /tsünan yovkho ʿovshur yu tsara/ beqaman /q'emat/ diynaḥ.
82:17: Ḥuna sten khaiytina /hxay elcha/‚ iza hxun beqaman de du?
82:18: T'akqa a ḥuna sten khaiytina‚ iza hxun beqaman de du?
82:19: Otsu diynaḥ sino sinan tsḥanna a hxumanna t'eḥ doladiyr dats. Ġullaq otsu diynaḥ khir du Delan.
83:1: Bokqa bāla bu /yokhka-etsar yesh dustush-uzush/ eshosh bolcharna‚
83:2: ishttanash bu üsh shäsh nakhera dustush ötsush /terza/, nisyoytush‚
83:3: tq'a shäsh tsarna dustush a‚ uzush a – eshaesh.
83:4: Tsarna tsa kheta-te shäsh /dellachul t'äḥa/ dendiyr duyla
83:6: Otsu diynaḥ nakh dʿahxuttur bu ʿalamiyn Dena /Dalla/ ḥalkha.
83:7: Hxan-hxa! Bakq'alla a, q'inosh dinacheran teptar Sizhzhūna choḥ khir du!
83:8: Ḥuna sten khaiytina /hxay Muḥammad/‚ i Sizhzhūn hxun yu?
83:10: Bokqa bāla bu otsu diynaḥ /din/ khartsdecharna,
83:12: Iza khartsdiyr ma dats masso a dozanakh välla‚ q'inosh desh volcho ben.
83:13: Shena t'eḥ Tkhan ayatash deshcha‚ tso olura: "Ḥalkhalerchiyn tüyranash /du hxorsh/".
83:14: Hxan-hxa! Hxaʾ! Tsara karadesh dolcho mēqa latsiytina tseran degnashka.
83:15: Hxan-hxa! Bakq'alla a, üsh otsu diynaḥ shäsh Qiosh-Qobuchukh dʿaḥulbina khir bu (tsarna i Dela gur vats).
83:16: T'akqa üsh chuġur bu (bagiyna, dʿa a tsa bokhush, bagor bolchu) zhözhakhatina.
83:17: T'akqa er du (tsärga): "Hxara du ash khartsdesh khillarg".
83:18: Hxan-hxa! Bakq'alla a, dikacheran teptar ʿilliyyȳnan choḥ khir du.
83:19: Ḥuna sten khaiytina /hxay Muḥammad/‚ i hxun ʿilliyyȳn yu?
83:21: Tsunna teshalla diyr du /Dalla/ gergaḥ dolchu /malikasha/.
83:22: Bakq'alla a, dikanig dinarsh /yalsamaneḥ/ niʿmatashkaḥ khir bu‚
83:24: Ḥuna devzar du tseran yakhḥashkaḥ niʿmatiyn lepar!
83:25: Malor du tsarna muhxar tökhnachu uggar ts'enachu chaġarkh‚
83:26: tsünan chakqe misk khir yu. Otsunna t'eḥ yoḥe bovliyla shäsh yoḥe bovlursh!
83:28: shovda du iza‚ shena chüra mer dolush /Dalla/ gergabolchara.
83:29: Bakq'alla a, q'inosh dinarsh bara iyman dillincharakh bölush‚
83:31: shayn dözalna t'ebörzush, t'ebörzura zabarsh yesh‚
83:32: i /muʾma nakh/ shayna gicha‚ tsara olura: "Bakq'alla a, hxorsh tilabellarsh bu-q!"
83:33: Tsa bakhiytina üsh tsarna (busalbanashna) t'e, tergamkhoy khilla.
83:34: Takhana iyman dillina khillarsh /Delakh/ tsateshacharakh bölur bu!
83:36: /Niyssa/ beqam biniy /Delakh/ tsateshacharna tsara desh khillachüntsa? /Hxaʾ, bina, Delora!/
84:2: shen qiosh-qobush volchu Dalla müt'aḥ khilla‚ /i Dalla müt'aḥ khilar tsunna/ ḥaq' khilcha.
84:3: Latta dʿadarzhiycha /nisdicha, t'eḥ mel yolu hxuma dʿa a yakqina/‚
84:4: shena t'eḥ (choḥ) mel derg dʿaqössina‚ sha dässa discha‚
84:5: shen qiosh-qobush volchu Dalla müt'aḥ khilla, /i Dalla müt'aḥ khilar tsunna/ ḥaq' khilcha /hxuttur du q'ematde/.
84:6: Hxay adam! Bakq'alla a, ḥo, ḥayn Qiosh-Qobuchunna t'e dakha q'akhögush du q'aḥegartsa (dalarna t'e dakha ya Dalla)‚ ḥo Tsunna düḥalqetar ma du (ya ayḥa yinchu ʿamalna – dikanig elaḥ a‚ vonig elaḥ a).
84:7: Amma i shen teptar shega shen ättu küyga dʿadellarg –
84:8: t'äḥa tsunna ḥesap diyr du attachu ḥesaptsa /miza-terza uzush/‚
84:9: shen ts'iynan ohxlanna t'e iza dʿavörzur vu, khazakhetash.
84:10: Amma i shen teptar shega shen buq'a t'eḥakhula dʿadellarg –
84:11: t'äḥa tso qoyqur du hxallaqilare /della dʿadalar atta dara tsunna/‚
84:12: chuder du (q'inosh dina adam) (egash yolchu) zhözhakhatina.
84:13: Bakq'alla a, iza (adam) dara shen dözaleḥ khazakhetash /dünenaḥ dolush/.
84:14: Bakq'alla a, tsunna möttura sha /shen Qiosh-Qobuchunna t'e/ tsq'a a yukhadörzur dats.
84:15: Hxette a‚ iza qiosh-qobush volu Dela ma khilla tsunakh derg gush.
84:16: Hxan-hxa! Duy bou As /malkh dʿabuzush ya malkh sḥaqetash/ stigal ts'iyyalarkh‚
84:17: /duy bou As/ büysanakh a‚ tso guldechukh a,
84:18: battakh a /duy bou As/, i büzcha /bokqa khilla/:
84:19: shu ḥävzar ma du tsḥana ḥolera qechu ḥole.
84:20: Hxun du-te tsarna üsh tsa tesha?
84:21: Shayna t'eḥ Q'urʾan döshush, suzhud tsa dan?
84:22: Hxaʾ! I tsa teshash khillarsh /din/ khartsdesh bu-q.
84:23: Dela dika khuush vu tsara shaygaḥ ḥuldinarg.
84:24: Qaʾ bakqa tsarna lazosh dolchu ʿazaptsa‚
84:25: iyman dillinarsh a‚ dika ʿamalsh yinarsh botsucharna – tsarna khir yu khedar yotsu yal!
85:1: Stigalakh duy bou As‚ /sedarchiy choḥ dolu/ ġalanash yolchu‚
85:2: shuna vaʿda yinchu /q'emat/ diynakh a duy bou As‚
85:3: sha teshalla diyr dolchukh a, shena t'eḥ teshalla diyr dolchukh a /duy bou As/.
85:5: /muʾma nakhakh/ shena yagorig yinchu ts'eran day.
85:7: shäsh muʾma nakhana t'eḥ dechünga ḥözhush.
85:8: Tsärgara ch'ir tsa ötsura tsara, dekq'a üsh Sha veza volchu‚ Sha khastame volchu Delakh teshash bu älla ben.
85:9: Ishttanig vu Iza Shegaḥ dolush stigaliyn a‚ lättan a pachchaḥalla. I Dela masso a hxumanna t'eḥ tesh ma vu.
85:10: Bakq'alla a, i muʾma bozhariy a‚ muʾma zudariy a bale lätsnarsh‚ t'akqa tōba tsa dinarsh – tsarna zhözhakhatin ʿazap du‚ tsarna ts'eran ʿazap du.
85:11: Bakq'alla a, iyman dillinarsh a‚ dika ʿamalsh yinarsh a – tsarna boshmash yu‚ shayna bukhakhula khish ökhush yolu. Iza bokqa tolam bu-q!
85:12: Bakq'alla a, ḥo Qiosh-Qobush volchun /Delan/ nitsq' ch'oġa bu-q!
85:13: Bakq'alla a, Tso dʿadolado‚ Tso karladokqu /mülkha ġullaq/. (Tso qöllina khalq' yuḥantsa, Tso dendiyr du i t'äḥa q'ematdinaḥ)
85:14: Iza sov gechdiyrig a vu‚ bezash verg a vu /Shena ġullaq desh bersh/.
85:16: Shena luurg desh verg a vu.
85:19: Hxette a, tsateshnarsh khartsonna choḥ ma bu.
85:20: Dela tsarna t'eḥakhula go bina ma vu (Dela tsarna t'eḥ nitsq' bolush vu).
85:21: Hxette a! Iza siylaḥ Q'urʾan ma du.
86:1: Stigalkh a duy bou As‚ /busa qetachu/ sedanakh a duy bou As.
86:2: Ḥöga sten khaiytina /hxay Muḥammad/, i / busa qetarg/ hxun seda bu?
86:3: Boda khadosh bolu seda bu iza.
86:4: Tsḥa a sa ma dats, shena t'eḥ tergamkho volush ben.
86:5: Ḥozhiyla adam‚ sha stenakh qöllina du!
86:6: Iza qöllina du iynachu /börshachu stegan a‚ zudchun a/ khikh.
86:8: Bakq'alla a, I /Dela/ vu iza yukhaverzo nitsq' qochush verg.
86:10: Ma bats tsunna (q'inosh dinachunna) nitsq' a‚ ma vats tsunna (q'inosh dinachunna) ġöncha a.
86:11: Stigalkh a duy bou As‚ shegaḥ yukhaderzor dolchu (shen khen-khenaḥ dölkhu doġa dolchu).
86:12: Lättakh a duy bou As‚ shegaḥ dādar dolchu /oramat sḥadolush/:
86:13: bakq'alla a, i /Q'urʾan/ /dikanig a‚ vonig a/ q'astosh dosh du-q!
86:15: Bakq'alla a, üsh (kerstanash) mekarlo yesh bu mekarlo yartsa.
86:16: As a yo /tseran mekarlonna düḥal/ mekarlo.
86:17: Bita i kerstanash /sikh tsa lush tsärgara ch'ir etsa, Dele tsarna sikhkha ʿazap dar tsa dökhush/‚ As a bütur bu üsh tsḥazhimma /t'äḥa diyr du tsarna ḥaq' dolu ʿazap, üsh, dokhko a bevvla, dinna t'e tsa berzaḥ/.
87:1: /Masso a Shetsa khila tam botschu vochu sibatekh/ ts'anʾe ḥan vunō leqa volchu Qiosh-Qobuchun ts'e!
87:2: Ishttanig vu Iza Sha qöllina‚ /masso a hxuma shen-shen mettige/ dʿanisyina volu‚
87:3: ishttanig a vu Iza, Sha /masso a hxumanan/ baram bina‚ /adam/ niysachu novq'a dillina volu‚
87:4: ishttanig a vu Iza, Sha /shun bezhnashna/ dezhiylash sḥadäkhna volu.
87:5: Tso khiliytina tsarakh /senʾellachul t'äḥa/ yaq'aella, ʿarzhʾella yarash.
87:6: Okha ḥuna /hxay Muḥammad/ döshur du /Q'urʾan/‚ ḥuna ditslur dats iza
87:7: Dalla liʾnarg ben! Bakq'alla a, Iza khuush vu guchoḥ derg a‚ q'aylaḥ derg a.
87:8: Okha atta diyr du ḥuna attadolchunna /t'äḥahxotta ḥo/.
87:9: Ḥekham be /Q'urʾantsa/‚ ḥekhamo payda baḥ / biyr bu älla ḥayna khetachunna/!
87:10: T'elotsur bu ḥuna /i ḥan ḥekham - Q'urʾan/ /Delakh/ qörush volcho.
87:11: Tsunakh khiyrver vu ḥuna t'ekh daq'azavällarg.
87:12: Iza vu ḥuna vogur volush yokqachu ts'ergaḥ.
87:13: T'akqa iza liyr a vats tsigaḥ /ʿazapakh parġat a volush/, vekhar a vats /irsechu dakhareḥ/.
87:15: sha Qiosh-Qobush volchun ts'e ḥekhiynarg‚ t'akqa lamaz dinarg.
87:16: Hxette a, ash dünenan dakhar khorzhu /ekhart a dütiy/!
87:17: Tq'a ekhart dika a‚ melkhō a bukhadüsush ma dara!
87:18: Bakq'alla a, hxara du-q ḥalkhalerchu zhaynashkaḥ derg a‚
87:19: Ibrahximan a‚ Musan a zhaynashkaḥ derg a.
88:2: Tsḥa yakhḥash otsu diynaḥ siysaza khir yu‚
88:6: Daar khir dats tsarna k'okhtsalkh ben.
88:7: Tso barstor bats /üsh/‚ matsallakh ḥalkhabokhur a bats.
88:8: Tsḥa /qin/ yakhḥash khir yu otsu diynaḥ niʿmat ḥögush,
88:9: shäsh /dünenaḥ yolush Dalla ġullaqdareḥ/ q'aḥegarna reza yolush,
88:11: Tsarna khezar dats tsu choḥ dässa khabarsh.
88:12: Tsu choḥ ökhush shovda khir du.
88:13: Tsu choḥ aydina mängesh khir du.
88:17: Üsh tsa ḥovsu emkale‚ iza mukha qöllina yu?
88:20: Lätte‚ iza mukha darzhiyna du /todina, nakhana payda etsa/?
88:21: Ḥekham be /hxay Muḥammad/! Ḥo, bakq'alla a, ḥekhamcha ma vuy!
88:22: Ḥo tsarna t'e hxottiyna ḥäkam ma vats.
88:23: Sha dʿavirzinarg /ḥekhamakh/‚ kerstanalla dinarg a votsuchunna /ḥekham be/.
88:24: Tsunna Dala ʿazap diyr du vunō dokqachu ʿazaptsa.
88:25: Bakq'alla a, Tkhuna t'e tseran dʿaderzar khir du.
88:26: T'akqa, bakq'alla a, Tkhuna t'eḥ tseran ḥesap khir du.
89:2: Itt büysanekh a duy bou As.
89:3: Shala a‚ shalza a dolchukh duy bou As.
89:4: Büysanakh a duy bou As‚ iza dʿayolaelcha.
89:5: Tsu choḥ duy bats tq'a ḥeq'al dolchunna? /Bu, Delora!/
89:6: Ḥöga tsa qechira /hxay Muḥammad/‚ mukha khilira ḥo Qiosh-Qobush verg ʿadashtsa?
89:8: Ishttanash bu üsh, shaykh teranash makhkaḥ qin qöllina botsush.
89:9: Samudashtsa a, ataġaḥ tarkhash (charash) tüstush /ts'enosh desh/ khillachu?
89:11: Shäsh makhkaḥ /Delan dozanekh/ t'ekhbevlla khilla bolchu.
89:12: Duqa dira tsara tsigaḥ von hxumanash.
89:13: Tsarna t'e ʿaniyra ḥo Qiosh-Qobucho tayp-taypana ʿazap.
89:14: Bakq'alla a, ḥo, Qiosh-Qoburg, /nakhana/ t'eḥozhush vu-q /tseran ʿamalsh tergal esh/.
89:15: Adamo, sha Qiosh-Qobucho ziycha‚ Tso shen siy dicha‚ niʿmatash delcha‚ olu: "So Qiosh-Qobucho siy dina san".
89:16: Amma, Tso sha ziycha‚ shena ritsq' k'ezzig delcha‚ tso olu: "So Qiosh-Qobucho so siysazaväkqi".
89:17: Hxan-hxa! Boberan siy tsa do ash.
89:18: Miskachunna daa hxuma dala /nekhan/ degnash aya tsa do ash.
89:19: /Boberiyn a‚ zudariyn a/ irs duush du shu ch'oġachu daartsa.
89:20: Däkhni dezash du shu duqa dezartsa.
89:21: Latta nisdicha‚ nisdesh‚ nisdesh /tsunakh dʿasayarzhina chan khülush/.
89:22: Voġur vu ḥo Qiosh-Qoburg a‚ malik a moġaneḥ – moġaneḥ.
89:23: Otsu /q'emat/diynaḥ yalor yu (guchuyokqur yu) zhözhakhati. Otsu diynaḥ dagadoġur du adamna. Stenna du tsunna /hxintsa/ i dagadar?!
89:24: Tso er du: "Ḥalkhadäkqina khilleḥara as /dikanig/ sayn /khirg dolchu/ dakharna".
89:25: Otsu diynaḥ Tsünan (Delan) ʿazap diyr dats tsḥammo a.
89:26: Tsḥammo a bükhkur bats Tsünan shad.
89:27: /Delakh qörush khillacharakh volchünga er du/: "Hxay sintem khilla dolu sa!
89:28: Dʿaderza ḥuo Qiosh-Qobuchünga, ḥo reza dolush‚ ḥayna /Dela a‚ malikash a/ reza dolush.
90:1: Hxan-hxa! Duy bou As hxokqu ġalikh (Makkakh).
90:2: Ḥo /hxay Muḥammad/ ḥanal vu-q tsu ġalaḥ!
90:3: Dekh (Ᾱdamakh) duy bou As‚ tso dünena väkqinchukh a (tsünan dözalkh – nakhakh):
90:5: Tsunna möttu-te shena t'eḥ tsḥanna a nitsq' qochur bats?
90:7: Tsunna möttu-te sha tsḥanna a gina vats?
90:8: Okha tsunna (adamna) shi bʿärg tsa bina?
90:9: Mott a‚ shi balda a /tsa dina/?
90:10: Okha nisdina iza /dikachunna a‚ vochunna a t'e böduchu/ shina novq'a.
90:11: Irkho yaḥa ḥala tsa ġirti iza.
90:12: Ḥöga sten khaiytina /hxay elcha/‚ iza hxun irkho yaḥar du?
90:14: ya hxuma yaor du matsalla yolchudiynaḥ
90:17: T'akqa /iza daḥ/ khir vu iza iymandillincharakh a‚ vovshashka sobare khila olush veset dinacharakh a‚ vovshashka q'inkhetame khila olush, veset dinacharakh a.
90:19: Tkhan ayatekh tsateshnarsh – üsh bu ärru aġonan (zhözhakhatin) day.
90:20: Tsarna khir yu /shen neʿarsh tsarna t'eḥ/ dʿaq'evlina ts'e.
91:1: Mälkhakh duy bou As‚ tsünan leparkh a.
91:2: Battakh a duy bou As‚ iza tsu /mälkhana/ t'äḥahxuttush /qetash, iza dʿabüzcha/.
91:3: Diynakh a duy bou As, iza tso (mälkho) q'agosh.
91:4: Büysanakh a duy bou As‚ tso i (malkh) dʿaḥulbesh.
91:5: Stigalkh a duy bou As‚ i hxottiynchukh a (As Saykh).
91:6: Lättakh a duy bou As‚ iza darzhiynchukh a (As Saykh).
91:7: Sikh a duy bou As‚ iza dʿanisdinchukh a (As Saykh).
91:8: Tso (Dala) qetiyna i (sa) q'a darakh a‚ /Delakh/ qerarkh a.
91:9: Deq'alakhili i /sa dika ʿamalsh yartsa/ ts'andinarg.
91:10: Deq'azakhili i /sa von ʿamalsh yartsa/ bekhdinarg.
91:11: Khartsdira /Delan din/ samudasha shäsh t'ekh tilartsa.
91:12: Sikhvelira tsarakh uggar deq'aznig /Dala yaiytinchu emkalna urs ḥaqa/.
91:13: Elira tsärga Delan elchano (Saliḥa): "(Shu larlolash zen darkh a) Delan emkalna, (novq'arlo yarkh a) tsunna khi mala".
91:14: Tsara iza khartsvira‚ tsu /emkalna/ urs ḥäqira. Shäsh Qiosh-Qobucho tseran q'a baḥaneḥ üsh hxallakbira – /tsu hxallakbareḥ/ tsḥanisbira.
91:15: Tsünan t'äḥenakh Iza tsa qöru (Dela Shen mostaġashna taʿzar darna t'eḥ zhöpallakh tsa qöru).
92:1: Büysanakh duy bou As, /tso ʿalam bodantsa/ dʿaḥuldesh‚
92:2: diynakh a duy bou As‚ iza serladälcha,
92:3: sha börsha a, sten a adam qöllinchukh (Delakh) a duy bou As:
92:4: bakq'alla a, shun q'aḥegar tayp-taypana du-q!
92:5: Amma sha /shen däkhni/ dʿadellarg a (kharzhash yesh Dala bokhuchu novq'aḥ)‚ /Delakh/ qiyrinarg a‚
92:7: Okha tsunna atta diyr du attachunna (dikachu ʿamalna) t'e /vakhar/.
92:8: Amma sha pis khillarg‚ /dünenan/ ḥal lekhnarg a‚
92:10: Okha tsunna atta diyr du khalachunna (vochu dakharna dünenaḥ a, ekhartaḥ a) t'e (vakhar).
92:11: Tsunna paydēn khir bats tsünan bakham, iza k'elvischa /zhözhakhate vokhüytush/.
92:12: Bakq'alla a, Tkhuna t'eḥ bu niysa neq' /iza bilgalbakqar/.
92:13: Bakq'alla a, Tkhan du t'äḥarnig a‚ ḥalkharnig a (ekhart a‚ düne a).
92:14: As qeram tesna shuna alu qüssuchu ts'ertsa.
92:15: Chuġur vats tsunna (-chu vaga) uggar deq'azanig ben‚
92:16: sha /din/ khartsdina khilla volu, /tsunakh/ dʿavirzina khilla volu.
92:17: Tsunakh genavokqur vu uggar /Delakh/ qörush verg‚
92:18: shen bakham sha ts'anvala (zakatna, saġina) dʿalush verg‚
92:19: tsḥängara shena beqamna dika tsa lökhush‚
92:20: uggar laqaḥ volchu sha Qiosh-Qobuchun yuḥ ezar ben.
92:21: T'äḥa rezakhir vu iza /Dala yalsamaneḥ shena dellachu niʿmatashna/.
93:2: büysanakh duy bou As‚ iza boda baḥash dʿatiycha:
93:3: ḥo dʿa tsa tesna ḥo Qiosh-Qobush volcho‚ vats Iza ḥöga bezam bayna a.
93:5: T'äḥa lur du ḥo Qiosh-Qobush volcho ḥuna – khir vu ḥo reza.
93:6: Ḥo tsa kariyra Tsunna bober ? Tso ḥo t'eiytsira.
93:7: Ḥo kariyra Tsunna, (niysa din dovza) välla lelash– Tso ḥo niysachu novq'a villira.
93:8: Ḥo kariyra Tsunna q'ēn – Tso ḥo ḥal dolush khiliytira.
94:1: Okha dʿa tsa dillira /paykhamaralla dalartsa/ ḥan dog /hxay Muḥammad/?
94:4: Okha daz ma dira ḥo ḥekhavar.
94:5: Bakq'alla a, khalontsa attalla khir ma du.
94:6: Bakq'alla a, khalontsa attalla khir ma du.
94:7: Ḥuo parġatvälcha /lamaz dina/, q'aḥega /doʿanash dartsa‚ ya dünenan ritsq' lakhartsa/.
94:8: Ḥo Qiosh-Qobush volchünga ḥastalo (Tsüngaḥ dolchunna t'eġerta).
95:1: Inzhirakh a duy bou As‚ zaytunakh a‚
95:2: Sinin oluchu lamanakh a duy bou As‚
95:3: hxoqu teshame yolchu ġālikh a (Makkikh) duy bou As:
95:4: Okha qöllira adam uggar khazachu ḥoleḥ.
95:5: T'akqa Okha dʿaderziyna iza uggar bukharchu ḥole (q'anloy‚ tishloy; muʾma stegan ʿamal eshalo, iza q'ona khillachu zamane ḥäzhcha‚ Dala tsunna yal lo Shen dashtsa),
95:6: iyman dillinarsh a‚ dika ʿamalsh yinarsh a botsursh – tsarna khir yu khedar yotsu yal.
95:7: Sten khartsdoytu ḥöga /hxay kersta/ tsul t'äḥa a din?
95:8: Tq'a Dela vats ḥukma decharakh uggar /niysa/ ḥukma desh verg?
96:1: Desha ḥo Qiosh-Qobuchun ts'artsa‚ Sha /ʿalamash/ qöllina volchu!
96:3: Desha! Ḥo Qiosh-Qoburg vu uggar komärsha verg.
96:6: Hxan-hxa! Bakq'alla a, adam t'ekhdolu /Delan dozanekh/,
96:8: Bakq'alla a, ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchünga du /masseran a/ dʿaderzar.
96:9: Ḥuna giniy /hxay Muḥammad/ i novq'arlo yesh verg (Abu-Dzhahxal)
96:11: Giniy ḥuna, i (shena novq'arlo yiyrig Muḥammad-paykhamar) niysachu novq'aḥ khilleḥ?
96:13: Ḥuna giniy i /sha paykhamarna novq'arlo yesh volu Abu-Dzhahxal/‚ /Dela/ khartsvesh khilleḥ‚ /baq'dolchukh/ dʿavirzineḥ?
96:14: Tsunna tsa khiʾna te Dalla gush duyla?
96:15: Hxan-hxa! I tsa satsaḥ‚ Okha dʿaozor vu iza k'uzhaltsa /zhözhakhate/‚
96:19: Hxan-hxa! Tso bokhurg ma de aḥ /hxay Muḥammad/‚ /Dalla/ suzhud de‚ /Tsunna/ gerga ġo /ʿamal yartsa/.
97:1: Okha dossiyna iza /Q'urʾan Lavḥ maḥfuz chüra dünenan stigala/ "Laylat al-q'adr" oluchu busa.
97:2: Ḥöga sten khaiytina /hxay Muḥammad/‚ i hxun büysa yu Laylat al-q'adr?
97:3: Laylat al-q'adr büysa dika yu ezar battal.
97:4: Oḥadüssu malikash a‚ Sa a (Dzhabrail-malik) tsu choḥ shäsh Qiosh-Qobuchun purbantsa masso a ġullaq etsna.
98:1: Tsa khilira zhaynin ohxlakh a‚ mushrikekh a bolu kerstanash dʿatülush /shäsh t'eḥ khillachu kersta dinakh/ shayga q'egina delil dalts–
98:2: Delera elcha (Muḥammad- paykhamar)‚ sha düytsush /tsarna/ ts'ena dolu ḥarchorash.
98:3: Tsarna choḥ mekhala dolu yazdinarsh a (ayatash, ḥukmanash) dolush.
98:4: Shayga zhayna dossiynarsh beq'a tsa belira shayga q'egina dolu delil deʾnachul t'äḥa ben‚
98:5: tsärga omra-m tsa dinera /dekq'a/ Dalla ʿibadat de älla a ben‚ shäsh Tsunna dog ts'ena khülush /dechu/ ʿibadateḥ, baq' dolchunna (Ibrahximan a‚ Muḥammadan a dinna) t'e tiyzhash‚ lamaz hxottade‚ zakat lo älla ben. Iza du niysa dolu din.
98:6: Bakq'alla a, zhaynin ohxlakh a‚ mushrikekh a bolu i kerstanash zhözhakhatin ts'ergaḥ khir bu‚ guttar tsu choḥ lättash. Üsh von khalq' du-q.
98:7: Bakq'alla a, iyman dillinarsh a‚ dika ʿamalsh yinarsh a – üsh dika khalq' du-q!
98:8: Tseran /khaza/ beqam shäsh Qiosh-Qobuchunna gergaḥ ʿadn ts'e yolchu yalsamanin boshmash yu-q‚ shayna bukhakhula ökhush khish a dolush‚ tsu choḥ üsh guttar lättash. Dela rezakhili tsarna‚ üsh a khili Tsunna reza. Iza du sha Qiosh-Qobuchukh qörush khillachunna derg.
99:2: lätto /shena t'era/ yozallash (shena t'eḥ mel yolu hxuma – adam a‚ bezhana a‚ ditt a…) araqössicha‚
99:4: Otsu diynaḥ tso shen khabar düytsur ma du,
99:6: Otsu diynaḥ nakh tobanashtsa dʿaökhur ma bu shayn ʿamalsh shayga dʿagayta.
99:7: Misq'alan zarrattal dikanig dinachunna – iza gur ma du.
99:8: Misq'alan zarrattal vonig dinachunna – iza a gur ma du.
100:1: /Shayn bagara/ az dolush t'eḥädda yoġuchu /govrekh/ duy bou As‚
100:2: /shayn bergashtsa lättakh/ suynash qüssuchu /govrekh/ duy bou As,
100:6: Bakq'alla a, adam sha Qiosh-Qobush volchun /niʿmatashna/ kersta ma du.
100:7: Bakq'alla a, iza tsu t'eḥ /sha a/ tesh ma du.
100:8: Bakq'alla a, iza /dünenan/ ḥal dezareḥ ch'oġa ma du.
100:9: Tsunna tsa khäa: keshnash choḥ mel derg araqössicha‚
100:11: bakq'alla a, üsh Qiosh-Qobush verg otsu diynaḥ tsarakh derg sov dika khuush vuyla?
101:3: Ḥöga sten khaiytina /hxay Muḥammad/‚ i tukhush derg hxun du?
101:4: Otsu diynaḥ adamash khir du, därzhina ts'oz sanna‚
101:5: lämnash khir du, q'ovziyna t'arġa sanna.
101:6: Amma shen terza dazdellarg (dika ʿamalsh sovʾyalla) –
101:7: iza khir vu /sha/ reza volchu dakhareḥ /yalsamani choḥ/.
101:8: Amma shen terza daydellarg (dika ʿamalsh k'ezzig khilla) –
101:10: Ḥöga sten khaiytina /hxay Muḥammad/‚ iza hxun yu?
102:1: Shu dukhatökhna /Dalla ġullaq darkh/ shun /däkhnitsa a‚ dözalshtsa a/ alsamdiylaro
102:2: shu keshnashka derzzalts (dʿaqalkhar t'ehxottalts Dela daga tsa voġu shuna).
102:4: T'akqa a hxan-hxa! T'äḥa khuur du shuna!
102:5: Hxan-hxa! Shu khuush delḥara baq' dolu ʿilma,
102:7: T'äḥa /ekhartaḥ/ shuna gur a ma yu iza /shayn/ bʿärga.
102:8: T'akqa shüga khottur ma du otsu /q'emat/diynaḥ /shuna dünenaḥ khillachu/ niʿmatekh.
103:2: bakq'alla a, adam eshameḥ ma du‚
103:3: iyman dillinarsh botsursh a‚ dika ʿamalsh yinarsh botsursh a, vovshashka baq'dolchüntsa (iymantsa‚ dintsa) veset dinarsh a‚ vovshashka sobartsa veset dinarsh a botsursh.
104:1: Bokqa bāla bu masso a /nakhana/ lüysh volchunna a‚ /nakh/siysazabesh volchunna a‚
104:2: sha /dünenan/ ḥal guldesh khillachu i dagardesh khillachu‚ /masso a hxumanna düḥal/ iza kechdesh khillachu.
104:3: Iza möttush vu shen ḥolo sha guttar lattor vu /dünenaḥ‚ tsa volüytush/?!
104:4: Hxan-hxa! Iza qussur ma vu kiysakash yesh yolchu hxumanna chu.
104:5: Ḥuna sten khaiytina /hxay Muḥammad/‚ iza hxun kiysakash yesh yolu hxuma yu?
104:6: Delan ts'e yu iza, latiyna yolu‚
104:8: Bakq'alla a, iza tsarna t'eḥ nartol yolush khir yu‚
105:1: Ḥöga tsa qechira /hxay Muḥammad/‚ hxun dira ḥan Qiosh-Qobucho piylan daykh?
105:2: Tseran mekarlo tilarchoḥ tsa khiliytira Tso?
105:4: tsara qüssush tsarna t'e bagiynachu popparan t'ulgash.
105:5: Tso khiliytira üsh /bezhniyn/ ʿiyshina doq'ar sanna.
106:1: /Piylan day hxallakbira Dala/ Q'urayshiyn bart khiliytarḥama‚
106:2: tseran bart khiliytarḥama /yokhka-etsarna/ novq'abovla ʿay a /Yemenan makhka/‚ äkhka a /Shaman makhka/.
106:3: Tsara ʿibadat doyla hxoqu /Makkaḥ dolchu ḥäzh/ ts'iynan Dena (Allahxana)‚
106:4: üsh matsbellachul t'äḥa tsarna daa hxuma dellachu‚ tsarna /piylan dayshkara/ qeram khillachul t'äḥa üsh märshabäkhnachu.
107:1: Ḥuna giniy /hxay Muḥammad/ i din khartsdesh verg?
107:2: Iza vu bober (beda) shen ḥoq'akh (baq'onakh) dukhatukhush verg.
107:3: Miskachunna daa hxuma dala /nakhana/ daga tsa doüytu tso. (Sha mukhkhale a tsa lo).
107:5: shäsh dechu lamazakh tergo yesh botschu‚
107:7: shäsh /nakhe khanna paydaetsa/ ts'era salpal yala magosh botschu.
108:1: Bakq'alla a, Okha delira ḥuna /hxay Muḥammad/ dukqa a dikanash.
108:2: Aḥ lamaz de ḥuo Qiosh-Qobush volchunna‚ /ġurbanna/ bezhanna urs a ḥaqa.
108:3: Bakq'alla a, ḥuna khalakhötüyturg– iza vu ḥuna ts'oga dotsurg.
109:1: Aḥ āla /hxay Muḥammad tsu kerstanashka/: «Hxay kerstanash!
109:2: As ʿibadat tsa do ash ʿibadat dechunna.
109:3: Shu a dats ʿibadat desh as ʿibadat dechunna.
109:4: So a vats (tsq'a a) ʿibadat diyr dolush ash ʿibadat dinachunna.
109:5: Shu a dats ʿibadat diyr dolush as ʿibadat dechunna.
109:6: Shuna shayn din du‚ suna san din du".
110:1: Delera ġo a deʾcha‚ /Makka yokqush/ tolam a beʾcha‚
110:2: ḥuna gira nakh, Delan din chu büylush tobanashtsa.
110:3: Tasbiḥ de ḥan Qiosh-Qobuchunna khastambartsa‚ Tsünga gechdar dekha. Bakq'alla a, Iza khilla t'ett'a tōba q'obaldiyrig.
111:1: Hxallaqili Ālun den shiy a küg, i sha a hxallaqili.
111:2: K'elḥar tsa väkqi iza tsünan ḥolo a‚ tsunna karadincho a.
111:3: Vogur vu iza ālu yolchu ts'ergaḥ‚
111:4: tsünan zuda a /yogur yu ts'ergaḥ/ – dechig qöḥurg.
111:5: Tsünan laga t'eḥ /khir/ bu khurmanan dittan ḥesan mush.
112:1: Aḥ āla /hxay Muḥammad‚ tsu ḥayga Delakh lätsna khöttuchärga/: "Iza, Allahx, tsḥaʾ vu /Shen naq'ost khilarkh, da-nana khilarkh, zuda‚ dözalkho khilarkh ts'ena a volush/,
112:2: Allahx vu‚ guttar Sha /tsḥannakh vözna a votsush/ volush verg vu /massarna a Sha öshush, Shena hxumma a tsa öshush volu/.
112:3: Ber tsa khilla Tsünan‚ Iza Sha a tsa välla /dünenchu/ dekh-nenakh.
112:4: Tsa khilla Tsüntsa nislush tsḥa a". (Vats Tsünga tera tsḥa a).
113:3: bodanan vonakh‚ tso /büysanna ʿalam/ dʿaḥuldicha /guchuyoluchu vochu hxumanakh a larlo so/‚
113:4: sheddash besh, tsu chu hxup oluchu zudariyn 2 vonakh a /larlo so/‚
113:5: ḥaġ lelochun vonakh a /larlo so/‚ tso ḥaġ yicha.
114:4: vasvasalla (dag chu doġu von mel derg) qüssuchu‚ Delan ts'e yakqicha, doduchu /shayt'anan/ vonakh‚
114:5: sha vasvasalla qüssush dolchu nekhan degnashka.
114:6: Zhinekh a du /i shayt'a/‚ nakhakh a du".
